Name: Kopi Kenangan
Description:
Kopi Kenangan is a coffee chain with more than 1000 stores globally. We are in Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, India and Australia.  We became the 1st F&B Unicorn in SE Asia in December 2021.  We are Halal Certified and was named Brand of The Year winner in the Café Chain Category Indonesia by The World Branding Awards 2025 – 2026. 

Our mission is to serve high quality coffee, made with the freshest Indonesia sourced ingredients to customers in Indonesia and the rest of the world. 

Other brands under our umbrella are Kenangan Coffee (@kenangancoffee.my; @kenangancoffee.sg and @kenangancoffee.in), Chigo (@chigo.id) and Kenangan Hanyauntukmu (@kenangan.hanyauntukmu).

We have a culture that rewards results and impact.  We work as a team and move fast to respond to market and consumer needs.  Our people are agile, result driven, and passionate in delivering quality products and services to our customers.

For a full listing of career opportunities with us, visit http://www.kopikenangan.com/careers or follow us @insidekopikenangan

Name: Jollibee Group
Description:
Jollibee Foods Corporation (PSE: JFC) (the "Company") is one of the world’s fastest-growing restaurant companies, driven by its purpose of spreading joy through superior taste. It manages and operates a portfolio which includes 19 brands (the "Jollibee Group") with over 10,000 stores and cafés across 33 countries.

Learn more about the Jollibee Group at www.jollibeegroup.com.

Name: Arcos Dorados
Description:
ESPAÑOL:

Arcos Dorados es el mayor franquiciado independiente de McDonald’s del mundo en términos de ventas en todo el sistema y en número de locales. La compañía es la cadena de restaurantes de servicio rápido ("QSR") más grande en América Latina y el Caribe. Tiene el derecho exclusivo a poseer, operar y otorgar franquicias de locales McDonald’s en 21 países y territorios de América Latina y el Caribe, incluyendo Argentina, Aruba, Brasil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Curaçao, Ecuador, Guyana Francesa, Guadalupe, Martinica, México, Panamá, Perú, Puerto Rico, St. Croix, St. Martin, St. Thomas, Trinidad y Tobago, Uruguay y Venezuela. La compañía opera o franquicia 2500 restaurantes McDonald’s con más de 100.000 empleados y es conocida una de las mejores empresas para trabajar en América Latina. Arcos Dorados cotiza en la Bolsa de Valores de Nueva York (NYSE: ARCO). 


PORTUGUÊS: 

A Arcos Dorados é a maior franquia independente do McDonald’s do mundo, tanto em vendas totais do sistema como em número de restaurantes. A Companhia é a maior rede de serviço rápido de alimentação da América Latina e Caribe, com direitos exclusivos de possuir, operar e conceder franquias de restaurantes McDonald’s em 21 países e territórios, incluindo Argentina, Aruba, Brasil, Chile, Colômbia, Costa Rica, Curaçao, Equador, Guiana Francesa, Guadalupe, Martinica, México, Panamá, Peru, Porto Rico, St. Croix, St. Martin, St. Thomas, Trinidad & Tobago, Uruguai e Venezuela. A Companhia opera ou franqueia mais de 2.400 restaurantes McDonald’s com mais de 100.000 funcionários e é reconhecida como uma das melhores empresas para se trabalhar no América Latina. A Arcos Dorados está listada na Bolsa de Valores de Nova York (NYSE: ARCO).

Name: CELSIUS
Description:
Celsius Holdings, Inc. is a global beverage company and maker of premium, lifestyle energy drink CELSIUS – the better-for-you, zero-sugar alternative to traditional energy drinks. CELSIUS inspires global communities of fitness enthusiasts and promotes active lifestyles by disrupting the rapidly growing performance energy space.

CELSIUS inspires people to LIVE FIT by empowering them to achieve their daily goals and maintain an active lifestyle. Living fit is about more than just fitness, it’s a mindset and a lifestyle embodied by those who push their limits and hustle every day. Every drop is Essential, and every fruit-forward flavor is refreshing, functional and balanced. With an expansive portfolio of flavors and formats, from CELSIUS to Fizz-Free to On The Go powders, CELSIUS is the perfect pick-me-up to help individuals LIVE FIT every day.

Name: Liquid Death
Description: As one of the fastest growing non-alcoholic beverage brands, Liquid Death uses comedy and entertainment to make health and sustainability 50 times more fun. We take low-calorie beverages and package them into infinitely recyclable cans that compete with the fun marketing of unhealthy brands across energy drinks, beer, and junk food. Our product lines include mountain water, soda-flavored sparkling water, iced tea, better-for-you energy, and more. A portion of Liquid Death’s proceeds goes to nonprofits who are helping fight plastic pollution and further our death to plastic bottles sustainability mission.

Name: Super Food Holding
Description:
Somos Super Food Holding , el equipo administrativo que impulsa el crecimiento y expansión de todos nuestros formatos: plazaVea, Vivanda, tiendas Mass, Makro, Oslo Logistics y Merkao. Síguenos en nuestro IG Oficial @ViveSuperFoodHolding y conoce mucho más de nosotr@s. 

Somos parte del grupo Intercorp y estamos comprometidos con nuestro propósito: que nuestros clientes sean prioridad en todo lo que hacemos.

POLITICA DE CALIDAD
El equipo de calidad de Super Food Holding se compromete a normar, estandarizar y controlar el sistema de gestión de calidad de las diferentes empresas a las cuales brinda servicio, de acuerdo con sus requisitos establecidos y normas legales aplicables a la calidad, higiene e inocuidad alimentaria; con un enfoque sistémico, disciplinado, sostenible, basado en riesgos y de mejora continua, buscando superar las expectativas de sus clientes y demás partes interesadas.

Name: ORGANIC INDIA
Description:
At the heart of ORGANIC INDIA is our commitment to be a living embodiment of love and consciousness in action. We work with thousands of small family farmers in India to cultivate tens of thousands of acres of sustainable organic farmland.

All ORGANIC INDIA products support health and True Wellness and are made with loving care. Each product is one link in a chain of connectedness between Mother Nature, our farmers and you. By choosing ORGANIC INDIA you are completing this chain, actively participating in our mission to create a sustainable environment of True Wellness, providing training and a life of dignity to our farmers, and bringing health, happiness and True Wellness to you.

All of our farmers and tribal wildcrafters are educated in organic and biodynamic agricultural practices. We pay all the fees associated with acquiring the necessary organic certifications for them, and then we purchase the harvested crops and herbs at a premium market price. The farmers also rotate between growing crops on their land for ORGANIC INDIA with food crops for themselves. This means farming families are supported by a sustainable income, while at the same time improving and preserving their own health and natural environment.

ORGANIC INDIA is committed to being a trustworthy and innovative global leader by providing genuine True Wellness products. Our advanced processing methods and dehydration technologies ensure that our herbs retain their maximum level of potency for the highest quality, most effective, pure and natural True Wellness products available in the market today. Our success serves as living proof that shared abundance can be created with an uncompromising commitment to environmental and social responsibility. In living this vision, we are inspired to introduce a new standard for new paradigm companies:

ORGANIC INDIA is proud to announce its partnership with FabIndia, India's largest private retail platform for craft-based products.

Name: Javvy Coffee
Description: Forward thinking coffee with a focus on flavor. Reimagine your daily grind

Name: Gerber
Description: Gerber Products Company was founded in 1928 in Fremont, Michigan. Gerber joined the Nestlé family on September 1, 2007. Gerber is a leader in early childhood nutrition. At Gerber, research informs everything we do – from the products we make, the nutrition education we deliver and the services we offer. Gerber provides resources from the Feeding Infants and Toddlers Study (FITS) for health care professionals at Medical.Gerber.com/FITS and for parents at Gerber.com.

Name: APAS - Associação Paulista de Supermercados
Description:
A Associação Paulista de Supermercados (APAS) é a maior entidade de classe do setor supermercadista brasileiro. Com uma Sede e 3 Distritais na cidade de São Paulo, a APAS possui 13 Sedes Regionais estrategicamente distribuídas por todo o Estado de São Paulo.

Agente promotor da modernização institucional do País, a APAS atua de forma construtiva, ao lado do poder público, na consolidação de um ambiente de negócios favorável ao crescimento do setor supermercadista, da geração de empregos e do desenvolvimento sustentável do estado de São Paulo e do Brasil. 

Em nossa premissa, conferimos a todos os nossos associados, às autoridades nacionais e internacionais, bem como aos diferentes stakeholders das várias cadeias produtivas que compõem o mix de produtos comercializados no varejo de alimentos e bebidas, um tratamento homogêneo.

Name: Nestle
Description: We unlock the power of food to enhance quality of life for everyone, today and for generations to come.

Name: TenderCuts.in
Description:
TenderCuts is India’s first omnichannel clean protein brand — reshaping a fragmented meat & seafood trade into a fresh, traceable, and trusted category at scale. Founded in 2015, the brand combines omnichannel reach, direct sourcing, decentralised processing, full-stack integration, proprietary technology, and a skilled, formalised workforce to deliver affordable, high-quality protein across the consumption pyramid. The model blends online convenience with offline trust, supported by SOP-led operations, asset-light retail formats, and industry-best unit economics.

From high-burn beginnings to EBITDA-positive growth, TenderCuts has demonstrated that raising standards works for customers, for the industry, and livelihoods. Positioned to serve over 10 million households and skill 5,000+ meat professionals by 2030, the brand is building a future where clean protein is universally accessible, nutrition equity is achieved, and the meat & seafood trade is dignified, efficient, and sustainable.

Name: epigamia
Description:
A new-age FMCG company, Epigamia is one of India's leading health snack brands. Catering to a wide consumer demographic owing to our unique and diverse  product offerings - we believe we are contemporizing traditional dairy.

From Greek Yogurt to Artisanal Curd, Smoothies to Milkshakes, Lactose-free ranges to Plant-based ranges - we constantly push boundaries in the most creative manner to make sure you never have to choose between health and taste.

A brand that is by the people, of the people and for the people who love food. A love so deep that it made us think of ourselves as Activists of Taste and Advocates of Health! We push boundaries to make food yummier and ensure some, if not all, health boxes are ticked! For our very first creation, we added the best of Indian and Greek cultures to a cup and let the magic loose. And the rest? History. We love thinking outside the cup - oops, we mean box. With plenty of creative elbow room and a passion for pushing boundaries, we experiment with unique flavours, create new products and bring innovation to life!

Name: Naked Wines
Description:
Discover great wine, your way. We directly support world-class, independent winemakers for a fairer price all round. No tie-ins. No time-limits. You choose how to shop and we’ll credit you back for a wine you didn’t love. 

You’ll get tailored recommendations to suit your taste buds, get to know the faces behind the bottles and have your say on every sip. This is the world of wine, on your doorstep.

Name: Savoria
Description:
SAVORIA (FMCG Djarum Group) is well-known as the market leader for consumer goods. The aggressive growing companies that provide career's opportunity to all professionals. 

All our companies are certified with the international standard and halal products:
- PT Global Dairi Alami, the integrated farm and factory with premium dairy product of "Milk Life".
- PT Prima Top Boga is specialized for pastry with premium brand "5 Days Croissants and Bon Chef".
- PT Sumber Kopi Prima, the international factory producing premium coffee with the brand of "Kopi Tubruk Gadjah and Caffino".
- PT Savoria Kreasi Rasa, for premium snacks, confectionaries, and beverages of "FOXS, Krizzi, Hydro Plus and Shot".
- PT Gonusa Prima Distribusi, the sales arm as the distributor for all principals that spread into 151 sales offices from Papua to Aceh also cover global market in 42 countries.

Having a strong culture of INCREDIBLE and TRUE Leader to bond all employees to grow together beyond boundaries to success.

Name: Little Spoon
Description:
Little Spoon is on a mission to make parents' lives easier and kids healthier. Pioneering a new era of kids food, Little Spoon was built to meet the needs and standards of the modern parent by delivering uncompromising quality and time-saving convenience. 

From first bites to big kid years, Little Spoon’s rigorous ingredient sourcing, product testing, and format innovation take the stress away from fueling your kids without sacrificing peace of mind. 

Since launching nationally with the first fresh baby food in 2017, Little Spoon has quickly become America’s #1 online baby and kids food company, having delivered more than 70 million meals to families across the US. 

Their award-winning product lineup, which consists of 100+ products available exclusively at LittleSpoon.com,  includes their signature Babyblends, Biteables, Plates, Lunchers, Smoothies, and YoGos, along with a range of snacks and other products. Learn more at LittleSpoon.com.

Name: Van Leeuwen Ice Cream
Description:
We started Van Leeuwen Ice Cream in a yellow truck on the streets of NYC in 2008 with a mission to make good ice cream that makes you feel good.

Nowadays, people can spend so much time on what’s “healthy” they don’t stop to consider what’s healthy. As far as we’re concerned, happiness is healthiness. What could be happier than that magic combination of milk, cream, eggs, and cane sugar (or coconuts, cashews and oats for our vegan friends)? Yes, our ice cream has fat. And that’s okay. It’s good-good, not good-bad.

Good is choice ingredients. Even if we have to go to Mount Etna to get them.

Good is simple ingredients. If it’s tough to pronounce, it’s probably tough to digest.
Good is harmonious ingredients. We seek to satisfy omnivores and vegans alike.

This is our way. The good way. The Van Leeuwen way. Not just the best way to make ice cream, but to live.

BECAUSE A LIFE WITHOUT ANYTHING GOOD IS BAD.

Name: Nutrabolt
Description:
Nutrabolt is a fast-growing, global active health and wellness company with a portfolio of market-leading, performance-oriented brands that energize and fuel active lifestyles. The company’s disruptive and innovative products compete in the Functional Beverage and Active Nutrition categories under four consumer-loved brands: C4 (one of the fastest-growing energy drink brands in the United States and the #1 global pre-workout brand), XTEND (America’s #1 BCAA brand), Cellucor (an award-winning sports nutrition brand created in 2002), and Bloom (a leading wellness brand offering approachable, high-quality supplements and functional beverages for everyday consumers). Since its founding over 20 years ago, Nutrabolt’s mission has been to meet the discerning needs of performance athletes and fitness enthusiasts—while empowering a broader community of consumers around the world who are making healthy, active living a daily priority.

Nutrabolt’s portfolio is distributed in more than 125 countries and available through company-owned DTC platforms, Amazon, and other leading online marketplaces, as well as top U.S. retailers including Walmart, Target, 7-Eleven, Albertson’s/Safeway, Walgreens, Kroger, H-E-B, Wawa, Publix, GNC, and The Vitamin Shoppe. For more information, please visit nutrabolt.com and follow @C4Energy, @Cellucor, @Xtend, and @Bloomsupps on social media.

Name: UnidaSul Distribuidora Alimentícia S/A.
Description:
A UnidaSul, fundada em 2006, é a quarta maior empresa do setor supermercadista do Rio Grande do Sul. A empresa nasceu da fusão entre a Comercial Unida e Comercial Rissul, que trazem consigo mais de 50 anos de expertise em varejo, atacado, atacarejo, distribuição, fabricação, transporte e logística de alimentos. Destacam-se entre os negócios administrados pela holding as 33 lojas do Rissul e as 13 do Macromix Atacado, que atendem 24 cidades dos Vales do Sinos e do Paranhana, Litoral Norte, Serra e Região Metropolitana, incluindo a capital, Porto Alegre.


Além disso, a UnidaSul administra outras 10 marcas: CBS Alimentos, Valore Alimentos, No Ponto Carnes, Estância Rissul, Caldo Nobre, Caldo Grosso, Amigo Pet, Supercau, Mistercau e Num Instante; e detém as bandeiras de distribuição DecSul, Disbem e Supri Certo, CBS, Valore, Frimix e o canal de distribuição online Mr. Estoque.


Também constituem a UnidaSul outros sete negócios que fornecem tanto para as lojas Rissul e Macromix quanto para as demais empresas da holding: a Indústria de Beneficiamento de Grãos, Farinhas, Temperos e Achocolatados e as Centrais de Fatiamento de Cárneos e Lácteos; de Padaria; Frigorífica de Bovinos e Suínos; de Hortifruti; de Perecíveis e de Minimamente Processados. 


Embora números e conquistas sejam importantes, o que mais orgulha a empresa são os mais de 7,5 mil colaboradores. Independente do negócio e área de atuação, todos trabalham unidos sob uma diretriz: a paixão por servir. Essa paixão aparece quando diariamente são oferecidos os melhores produtos e serviços para clientes e parceiros, em todas as unidades e em cada novo projeto.


NEGÓCIO 

Servir Pessoas.


MISSÃO

Servir pessoas com produtos e serviços adequados às suas necessidades, surpreendendo-as com nossa paixão.


PRINCÍPIOS

Integridade e ética nas nossas relações pessoais e comerciais. Eficiência e eficácia permanente em todos os processos. Organização competente focada em resultados. Pessoas talentosas e comprometidas

Name: Little Spoon
Description:
Little Spoon is on a mission to make parents' lives easier and kids healthier. Pioneering a new era of kids food, Little Spoon was built to meet the needs and standards of the modern parent by delivering uncompromising quality and time-saving convenience. 

From first bites to big kid years, Little Spoon’s rigorous ingredient sourcing, product testing, and format innovation take the stress away from fueling your kids without sacrificing peace of mind. 

Since launching nationally with the first fresh baby food in 2017, Little Spoon has quickly become America’s #1 online baby and kids food company, having delivered more than 70 million meals to families across the US. 

Their award-winning product lineup, which consists of 100+ products available exclusively at LittleSpoon.com,  includes their signature Babyblends, Biteables, Plates, Lunchers, Smoothies, and YoGos, along with a range of snacks and other products. Learn more at LittleSpoon.com.

Name: TOMORO COFFEE
Description:
The founder of TOMORO has travelled across the world for years and has been to over 30 countries including Southeast Asia, South Asia, the Middle East, North Africa, and the Americas. This enabled him to deeply feel people’s passion for coffee culture from different countries, races, and occupations. 

The founder strives to pursue the ultimate passion for coffee and quality living by creating unique coffee humanities for TOMORO, ultimately introducing the ‘coffee culture’ to every corner of the world, and letting every customer enjoys a worthy cup of good coffee. 

TOMORO refers to “tomorrow“ and it means “embrace the goodness and yearn for tomorrow”. This is the original aspiration of TOMORO, strive to make every good cup of coffee with heart and encourage everyone to follow their heart bravely, feel the life with heart while yearning for tomorrow.

Name: waterdrop
Description:
We inspire consumers to live healthier, more sustainable lives by drinking more water.

waterdrop is a global company dedicated to changing the way people hydrate. Our innovative, tasty, sugar-free hydration cubes are made from natural fruit and plant extracts, providing a unique flavor experience wherever you are, whenever you want.

Daily hydration, made simple.

Name: Four Sigmatic
Description:
We’re Four Sigmatic, the #1 mushroom coffee and protein brand. We infuse functional mushrooms into everyday products you love, to enrich your mind and your well-being. Think lion’s mane for focus, cordyceps for energy, or reishi for a sense of calm. Our brews, blends, and powders get you in a good headspace so you can focus on what matters most. Some people call it magic. It’s our secret to Nordic wisdom for a fulfilling life.

Read more here:
https://us.foursigmatic.com/pages/about
https://international.foursigmatic.com/pages/about

Name: Le Fourgon
Description:
Le Fourgon vous permet de vous faire livrer vos produits consignés gratuitement dans la journée.

 La commande se passe sur lefourgon.com : plus de 500 références de produits (Boisson, épicerie, maison).
 On vous livre chez vous en fourgon électrique sur le créneau choisi
 Et au passage suivant on récupère vos contenants vides qu’on renvoie lavés au producteur pour ré-emploi #zerodechet

Alors, vous montez à bord du Fourgon ?

Name: Espresso Americano
Description: Espresso Americano is the #1 coffee retail company in Central America and one of Honduras' leading food and beverage companies.

Name: Vegalsa-Eroski
Description:
Vegalsa-Eroski, empresa líder de la distribución comercial en Galicia, está participada al 50% por la familia de Ventura González y Eroski.

Los orígenes de la compañía se remontan a los años cuarenta del pasado siglo XX, cuando el fundador y actual presidente de honor instala en Vigo su primer negocio de alimentación. En un largo recorrido, siempre en vanguardia de los formatos comerciales en Galicia, la compañía opera como mayorista de alimentación, crea las primeras tiendas, inaugura y expande el modelo de franquicia, hasta la creación de una red de supermercados propios que se extiende por toda Galicia con distintas enseñas.

En 1998, con la alianza con Eroski la compañía se fortalece para abordar los retos del liderazgo comercial en Galicia, lo que consigue con una política de compromiso con la Comunidad, con presencia en todo el territorio y apuesta por los productos gallegos.

Vegalsa-Eroski, con más de 4.300 trabajadores, es la sexta empresa de Galicia por facturación y empleo.

Name: Enhance Group- WJ Towell Group company
Description:
As the FMCG and Retail Business cluster of the WJ Towell Group, Enhance is the leading provider of Brand Distribution and Retail Management Solutions in Oman with expanding management responsibilities in other GCC Markets.

Enhance Group, Oman comprises of 4 companies – Enhance Oman ( Matrah Cold Stores LLC ), Fairtrade LLC, Majan Distribution Company, and CSTC.  

In Oman, Enhance Group provides Distribution and Sales Management Solutions for global, international, and regional brands such as Reckitt,  Kenvue, L'Oreal, California Garden, Afia, Mars-Wrigley’s, Ulker, Bahlsen, Nestle, Unilever, Weetabix, Al Rifai, Ooredoo, NAPCO, Al Safi Danone, SC Johnson, Energizer, NFIC, and many others. 

The Enhance retail operations manage the majority of  Al Maha forecourt convenience stores and our Supermarket stores named Noor Shopping and convenience stores named Noor Express shops present across the Sultanate of Oman.
Enhance Group, Oman is present in all categories and services all distribution channels including hotels and ships through the Food Service Division making Enhance the largest FMCG distributor in the Sultanate.
Enhance Group also operates in UAE  in the Manufacturing and Distribution business as Enhance UAE and Gulf seafood.

Name: Theka Coffee
Description:
Theka Coffee is a new generation coffee chain that sources 100% Arabica coffee beans from a single estate and attempts to offer it to the end consumer in competitive prices. The coffee is also cold-brewed which is a superior brewing method as it is high in caffeine and low on acidity.

We are on a mission to be at every nook and corner around you with our low cost static and movable carts. 

Visit our website for more details and career page for job info.

Cheers!

Name: Tim Hortons Pakistan
Description:
Tim Hortons is more than a coffee shop – it’s one of the largest restaurant chains in North America and the largest in Canada. Its diverse menu appeals to a broad range of tastes, solidifying its place as one of Canada’s most iconic brands in the process. The company operates in the highly competitive quick-service restaurant sector, part of the broad multi-billion dollar food-service business. Its powerful scale and reach in Canada creates unmatched opportunities, but also the dynamic challenge of leading the industry. 

Tim Hortons is more than a place to work – it’s a chance to be a part of the driving force behind a company and culture so many people love. Find your role in this growing company and help us serve the neighbourhoods we call home.

Name: Bretas Supermercados
Description:
Seja bem-vindo (a) ao Bretas. Somos uma empresa da Rede Cencosud, líder em vendas na América Latina e 4ª maior rede supermercadista do Brasil. 

Com uma história de mais de 6 décadas, contamos hoje com aproximadamente 5 mil funcionários, 81 lojas espalhadas em dois estados (MG e GO) e 38 cidades, e mais de 223 mil metros de área de vendas. 

Trabalhamos incansavelmente para levar os valores e princípios éticos da Cencosud aos nossos clientes, através de um negócio multiformatos: Atacarejo, Supermercado, Armazém, Postos e Digital. 

Conheça aqui um pouco mais sobre nossa história e conquistas do dia a dia.

Name: FARM SHOP
Description:
We are food heritage ! Where Authenticity  meets Guilt-Free indulgence.


From farm to fork and from shop to restaurant, we offer three different business verticals Facilitating Synergies for Excellence : 
-         Grocery : Elevating Culinary Excellence
Delved into three distinct divisions that embody the zenith of culinary excellence, The Butcher Shop, The Fresh Produce and The Packed Goods

-	Restaurant : Revolutionizing Guilt-Free Gastronomy
Crafting a menu that harmonizes flavors, quality, and accessibility. Here, every bite is a testament to our unwavering dedication to redefining fast food.

-	Catering : Integrated Culinary Solutions for All Occasions 
Farm Shop Catering is a dynamic powerhouse that offers one-stop, integrated catering solutions for diverse segments.

We're passionate about delivering authenticity in every bite, offering a tantalizing array of gourmet organic delights. 

Our commitment to healthy conscious eating is evident in every ingredient we select, ensuring that each product and dish not only satisfies the palate but also nourishes the body!

Experience the magic of flavors enhanced by our dedication to quality and sustainability. Join us on a culinary journey where every meal is a celebration of heritage, authenticity, and wellness

Name: Taster
Description:
We are food innovators redefining quick service dining for the 21st century. 

In 2017, frustrated by soggy takeaways and uninspiring delivery options, our founder Anton Soulier had a vision: to create food brands specifically designed for the digital age. Since then, we've grown to 150 franchise partners across 4 countries, and will be serving over €120 million worth of meals in 2024. 

Every day, our partners craft irresistible food from our 5 iconic brands, making it possible for customers to enjoy restaurant-quality meals in the comfort of their homes.

Our brands : Pepe Chicken | SpudBros Express | Starsmash | Outfry | La Vie Dirty Vegan Burgers

Name: Go Zero
Description:
Welcome to Go Zero - where ice cream dreams come true without the guilt! We’re all about serving up creamy, dreamy scoops that are as cool as you. Made with our magical in-house proprietary blend, every bite is a party in your mouth: low-cal, no preservatives, no fake stuff, and zero added sugar.

Sweetened naturally with Stevia and boosted with FOS and Maltitol for that perfect texture, Go Zero is proof that you can have it all. Launched in 2022, inspired by your love for health and happiness, we’re here to make every craving count. Better, bolder, guilt-free - what’s not to love?

Name: Wip
Description:
Wip is building a new standard in energy – creating breakthrough products that deliver performance, portability, and purpose for people on the move. Our energy pouches are crafted with natural caffeine, vitamins, and minerals in a format that meets real-life needs.
 
We’re a category-defining, culture-shaping company with world-class product development, scaled manufacturing, and best-in-class commercialization.
 
Our ambition is big: to redefine what energy means and how it’s delivered.

Name: CHAGEE USA
Description:
CHAGEE (pronounced CHAH-jee) is a Modern Teahouse with over 7,000 locations globally, focused on serving freshly handcrafted teas that captivate all five senses. As the leading premium tea house operator in China and South-East Asia, we strive to provide an authentic and memorable experience.

CHAGEE is dedicated to promoting wellness and community, providing a mindful space where guests can relax, revitalize, and reconnect over an exquisite cup of tea which gave birth to our moto "CHAGEE together".

Headquartered in Irvine, CA, we are commencing the U.S. expansion of corporately-owned tea houses in Southern California with a vision to delivering moments of sensorial pleasure & curating a modern tea culture to inspire and delight the senses.

Stay tuned for more posts about CHAGEE USA and our expansion plans for California.

Name: SMOOR Chocolates
Description:
Welcome to a world of True Couverture Chocolates, Desserts, Lounges/Cafes and Corporate Gifting across India. 

#smoorchocolates #celebratemore

Name: The Wine Society
Description:
Passion before Profit ‒ it’s a principle we’ve lived by since 1874. We only source the wines our buyers truly believe in, not the ones that make the most money. We guarantee the fairest prices for our members and for our growers. 

Our profits go back into making our services even better, so you can buy a bottle from us with complete confidence, knowing that 150 years of dedication, pride and care has gone into every sip. And if one of our wines isn’t to your taste, you can return it under our Society’s Promise. 

Discover more about our unique co-operative ‒ owned by our members, for our members ‒ on our website.

Name: flaschenpost SE
Description:
Die flaschenpost SE erweitert den Getränkehandel durch on-demand delivery. Dies ist durch eine weitgehende Automatisierung der logistischen Prozesse sowie die Nutzung eines effizienten Routing-Algorithmus zur Tourenplanung möglich. Unser Geschäftsmodell ist bisher einzigartig in Deutschland. Die flaschenpost bietet den Kunden einen enormen Nutzen im Vergleich zu anderen Wettbewerbern – dem Einzelhandel und auch anderen Lieferdiensten. Wesentliche Elemente der Dienstleistung der flaschenpost sind: 
 
•	Keine Liefergebühr 
•	Lieferung innerhalb von 120 Minuten nach Bestellung 
•	Günstige Preise wie im Supermarkt 
•	Kostenlose Leergutmitnahme und sofortige Verrechnung mit dem 
        Bestellwert 
•	Alle Bestellungen werden kostenfrei bis an die Wohnungs- oder 
        Haustür geliefert - egal in welchem Stockwerk sich diese befindet. 
•	Bezahlung einfach und sicher per PayPal oder Lastschrift 

2016 in Münster gegründet, sorgen mittlerweile über 500 flaschenpostler dafür, dass unsere 80 Auslieferungsfahrzeuge tagtäglich auf den Straßen der Fahrradmetropole unterwegs sind und unsere Kunden schnell und unkompliziert Ihre Bestellungen erhalten.

Du möchtest Teil dieses Teams werden und unsere Expansion in andere Städte mit vorantreiben? Dann schau jetzt vorbei auf www.wirsindflaschenpost.de !

A seamless commerce business striving to dominate the gourmet food space in India, offering customers the convenience of ordering through the website, whatsapp chats, and phone calls, alongside an immersive in-store shopping experience.

The first Foodstories store, a 9,000 sq ft format at Ambience Mall, Vasant Kunj, Delhi NCR along with its digital twin, foodstories.shop was launched in March 2024. The store also houses, a 30-seater all-day dining café that showcases a unique and wholly organic estate-to-cup coffee program, a luxurious single-origin chocolate experience, bespoke cheese, single-origin spices and dry fruits, farm-sourced fruits and vegetables and a new-age biohacking zone to cater to India’s evolving wellbeing needs. 

Since then, Foodstories has expanded with a stunning 10,000 sq ft store in Hyderabad’s Banjara Hills and opened doors in Bengaluru with a 12,000 sq ft store and Garden Cafe at Lavelle Road — bringing a signature blend of curation, design, and discovery to new cities.

Name: Nomad Pizza
Description:
In September 2019, we opened our delivery kitchen with the mission to make the best pizzas in Delhi.

Our unique concept of bringing ‘pizzas from around the world to your doorstep’ quickly caught the imagination of a discerning South Delhi audience. In just four months we became one of the fastest-growing pizza delivery start-ups in India and opened our second outlet for delivery and a dine-in service in Gurgaon.

We offer pizzas from 11 different regions of the world – ranging from America to Korea. We insist on quality and therefore use the best and freshest ingredients possible. There is absolutely no compromise on this. Even our pizza dough is made fresh onsite everyday and our various pizza bases speak for themselves!

As they say, it’s not hard to find pizza but it’s very hard to find really good pizza! We hope you’ll try ours and become a fan of our passion!

The Group has also developed and manages a wide portfolio of unique foodservice concepts, e-commerce ventures and two production units specializing in the production and distribution of meat products, ready-made meals and desserts, and the capacity to undertake large scale contract catering projects as well as in-flight catering. The Group operates over 560 points of sale in Greece and abroad and employs over 5.000 people (directly or indirectly through its partner franchisees). Driven by passion for innovation, Goody’s-Everest is always committed to excellence in execution in serving its customers’ needs and aspirations.

In 2022, we undertook a group-wide rebranding exercise, renaming from "Yu Kee" to "Yew Kee" to more closely reflect our history and heritage.

Description:
A história da Baurucas começou em 2018, movida por um grande amor e um “vício” irresistível por pipocas de um casal empreendedor.

Sabendo que o Brasil é o segundo maior consumidor de pipocas do mundo, decidiram transformar essa paixão em um negócio. O sucesso e crescimento da marca despertaram inúmeros interesses, e assim nasceu a Baurucas Franquias.

Hoje, com mais de 40 lojas, oferecemos as melhores receitas de pipocas que você pode imaginar. Além disso, nossos produtos cativam e conquistam cada vez mais fãs por todo o Brasil!

Nossas receitas são inspiradas no universo das pipocas dos Estados Unidos, mas com um paladar totalmente brasileiro!

Nossa missão: transformar o consumo de pipocas no Brasil, entregando um momento Baurucas para o maior número de pessoas possível.

Aqui, não vendemos só pipocas; nossas receitas são o motivo perfeito para levar um momento especial à rotina das pessoas.

E não se esqueça: Curta esse momento!

Name: SAASOA
Description:
Strategic Alliance for Affiliated Store Owners of America (SAASOA) is a non-profit organization serving gas station, convenience store, smoke shop, and liquor store owners. We help our members access the best deals, discounts, and rebates available, saving them money and boosting their bottom line.

Founded in 2012 with just 25 member sites in Alabama, SAASOA has grown into the most trusted alliance representing over 5,150 stores across 13 states in the Southern, Eastern, and Midwestern U.S.

But we’re more than just a buying group. We bring educational resources, legislative grassroots efforts, networking opportunities, promote our vendors’ products, support our members with technology and marketing tools, and keep them informed on the latest retail trends. Our goal is to level the playing field for small and independent businesses, helping them grow, compete, and succeed.

Our vision goes beyond business. We aim to build a supportive community where owners grow not only financially, but also personally, rooted in unity, cultural values, and shared success.

We’re not just a network. We’re a movement.
Join us. Grow with us. Win with us.

Name: Winefamly.dk
Description:
Winefamly.dk er en medlemsbaseret online vinportal- og butik, som sælger håndplukkede vine fra hele verden. Alle produkter udvælges af os og distribueres direkte ud til medlemmerne. På den måde elimineres de fordyrende mellemled og Winefamly er i stand til at tilbyde medlemmerne vin, til den lavest mulige pris, samtidig med at vi sikrer vinbønderne en fair pris for deres produkter. 

De mere end 50.000 medlemmer hos Winefamly, tilbydes en lang række fordele i forbindelse med deres køb af vin, herunder muligheden for at blande og bestille vin som de ønsker - altså ingen krav om køb af 6 stk. for at opnå en rabat. Plus-medlemmer hos Winefamly kan desuden bestille al deres vin til kostpris og alle andre får vinen til landets laveste pris. Der er selvfølgelig også 100% nydelsesgaranti på alle flasker - fordi ingen må drikke vin uden at nyde det.

Som virksomhed befinder Winefamly sig i krydsfeltet mellem tech- og vinindustrien. Vi sætter en ære i at kombinere det tekniske med det velsmagende. Winefamly er en ungdommelig arbejdsplads med en flad struktur og en høj grad af diversitet i sammensætningen af medarbejdere. Der bliver nørdet alt fra kode og SEO-optimering, til tysk Riesling og gode år for italiensk Barolo.
Fælles for os alle er en høj grad af arbejdsglæde, faglig stolthed og stor passion for at være sammen om den gode vin. 

Hos Winefamly er vi i konstant vækst og er derfor altid interesseret i at høre fra dig hvis du mener at vi mangler netop din profil i vores team.

Description:

Name: Cookie Co.
Description:
Cookie Co. was founded in 2020 during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic by Elise and Matt Thomas. Working behind the scenes to open the first Cookie Co. location, Elise baked her signature cookie recipes using real eggs, real butter, and real cane sugar in her home, preparing hundreds of boxes weekly by hand for driveway pick-up. Quickly becoming known as “The Cookie Lady,” and amassing an organic social media following, Elise realized that her passion project was blooming into a full blown business. The original Cookie Co. shop opened just around the corner, allowing the company to serve more loyal Cookie Co. fans.

Despite all odds, the flagship Cookie Co. location opened in August 2020 without any formal marketing - simply great cookies and happy customers sharing word of mouth. With their proprietary recipes, Cookie Co. began to offer four flavors per week, with one always being Cookie Co.’s famous Chocolate Chip cookie.

Cookie Co.’s mission is to be the local cookie shop at the core of every great town - a symbol of happiness, comfort, and hope. Supporting all things local by investing in the community and paying it forward through charitable giving, Cookie Co. believes that each local cookie shop can help their communities thrive together.

Name: Flavour Salt
Description: Flavoursalt is a healthy food blog that covers everything from the rearmost exploration of nutrition to healthy fashions and everything in between. We give tips on healthy eating, exercise, and overall heartiness. We also offer succulent and nutritional fashions that are perfect for any time of day. Flavoursalt has grown into a trusted resource for millions of people around the world. We're proud to offer our compendiums unprejudiced, substantiation-grounded information on all effects of nutrition and health. We believe that a well-balanced diet is the key to a happy and healthy life. We also offer a wide variety of healthy fashions that are easy to make and succulent. Whether you're looking for a quick breakfast or a healthy regale option, we've you covered. We believe that by making small changes in our diurnal routines, we can make a big impact on our overall health and well-being. We hope that our blog will inspire you to make healthy choices in your own life and help you to reach your pretensions! We believe that healthy eating should be succulent, nutritional, and affordable! We offer realistic tips and tricks that fit into any busy life. Our fashions are quick and easy to make, but they also taste great! We hope that you'll find our blog to be a precious resource in your trip to living a healthier life! Our thing is to help you make stylish choices for your health and well-being. We're a devoted platoon to furnishing accurate and over-to-date information on nutrition, fitness, and healthy living. So whether you're just starting on your trip to health and heartiness or you're looking for some new ideas to mix effects up, we're then to help. Thanks for stopping by!

Name: Amarket Chile
Description:
Somos una empresa orientada al ámbito social, trabajamos con fundaciones de diversos colegios y con empresas.
 Con las fundaciones buscamos facilitar la entrega de alimentos, con el objetivo de ser un socio confiable y estratégico, capaz de proporcionar los alimentos a precio justo, a tiempo, disminuyendo la baja recolección en los cursos medios y superiores de cada colegio y con la continuidad que se merecen los niños de cada fundación sin perder la formación y la motivación de donar de los alumnos de cada colegio.
 En el área de empresas estamos potenciando el comercio justo, siendo un socio con las áreas de bienestar para que ellas puedan entregar un beneficio a sus funcionarios logrando que los trabajadores den prioridad a la alimentación de sus familias con productos de buena calidad a un precio menor que el de mercado y ayudando con formación financiera y economía saludable para las familias.

Name: Hiper Select Supermercados
Description: O Hiper Select é uma rede de supermercados com 30 anos de história, dedicada a proporcionar bons momentos aos nossos clientes por meio de produtos de qualidade, um ambiente aconchegante e um atendimento de excelência. Com 10 lojas em Florianópolis e Palhoça, nossa missão é valorizar o crescimento pessoal e profissional dos colaboradores, além de promover o bem-estar social e a preservação do meio ambiente. Nosso objetivo é estar entre as melhores redes de varejo premium de Santa Catarina, guiadas por valores de fé, ética, respeito, eficiência, humildade e cooperação.

Name: miCafetal
Description:
miCafetal is a foodservice group, with a focus on captive and closed markets. The Group has also developed and manages a wide portfolio of unique foodservice concepts including mini meal, miCafetal Bakery, Greco Corner and Greco street. 

The Group operates 35 points of sale across Greece and employs over 220 people. Driven by a passion for excellence, miCafetal is on a mission to offer high-quality products and exceptional service in a stunningly crafted environment.

Name: Pheasant Creek Retail Services
Description: Pheasant Creek Retail Services is a US owned, boutique provider of transparent retail sales and merchandising solutions for established, new, and emerging businesses. We specialize in scaling businesses through executive-level program design, in-store gap coverage, and customer base expansion. With our variable merchandising and management model, we drive success while reducing costs. Our fractional and workforce management services ensure immediate impact and seamless retail execution. Leveraging a proven network of service partners, we prioritize their financial health and operational excellence based on core competency metrics, ultimately benefiting our customers. With an experienced team, extensive in-store capabilities, and a commitment to excellence, Pheasant Creek is your trusted partner for achieving retail success.

Name: Badger Bevs
Description:
After years of development, countless tastings and reformulations, Badger’s unparalleled taste has finally arrived. Old-World class meets the fierceness and unrelenting nature of the Badger.  Made with the world’s best, all-natural flavors in this collection of high-end cocktail mixers. Proudly produced in the USA and designed for the most discerning palates; Badger’s Tonic Water, Club Soda and Ginger Beer are designed to be mixed with your favorite top shelf spirit, but can also be enjoyed on their own.  For an elevated experience, choose Badger.  Raising The Bar

Why a badger?  A badger is considered to be one of the toughest, fiercest and most unrelenting animals in the world.  We admire the badger for its gritty nature and engrain its tenacious spirit into our commitment to quality ingredients and tasting experience.

Badger Bevs, LLC was founded in 2022 by David Vogel.  David is partnered with the Bishop Family, founders of Sobe Beverages and Blue Buffalo Pet Products.  Together they plan to bring Badger to America’s best bars, restaurants, country clubs, hotels, cruise lines and retailers.

Name: Candy Corner Philippines
Description:
Candy Corner is the number one source of quality candies and chocolates in the Philippines. Our products are sourced and hand picked from all over the world to bring Filipinos the very best that the confectionery world has to offer.

Candy Corner is the first retail outlet in the Philippines to combine traditional packaged and novelty confectionery with the concept of customers’ choosing and combining their own selection of sweets. The first Candy Corner store in Glorietta 2 was opened in October 1996. 

Today, with 20 years of experience in the confectionery retail trade, we are proud to have a total of 100 outlets nationwide, of which 97 are company owned.
We aim to continuously work to maintain our spot as the Filipino’s favorite retailer of quality, premium candies, and chocolates by providing fun, unique and exciting products to everyone.
Thus, the company has focused its efforts and resources in research and development, especially in its merchandising department, that handpicks only the best treats and innovations the confectionary world has to offer. New products are introduced in our stores every month to ensure that our customers get the very best fun, unique and exciting products available!
We currently offer over 300 varieties of confectionery to our customers, including some world-renowned brands in the industry. Candy Corner is the official distributor of Wonka’s imaginative candy products, Jelly Belly: the world’s number one gourmet jelly bean, Russell Stover: America’s number one sugar-free confectionary, the classic and delicious Roca products from Brown and Haley, Ghirardelli luscious chocolate squares, Warheads Extreme Sour, Albanese World’s Best Gummies, American Licorice’s Sour Punch and Red Vines, Original Gourmet Lollipops and Fini Gummies. Truly, Candy Corner is still, and has always been, a purveyor of premium confectionary in the Philippines.

Name: Pur Südtirol
Description:
Wer sind wir:
Wir inspirieren Lebensfreude durch nachhaltigen und regionalen Genuss.

Mission:
Wir inspirieren Lebensfreude.

Unser gemeinsamer Auftrag ist es, den Anbau, die Produktion und den achtsamen Konsum von Wein & Lebensmitteln – die glücklich machen – zu fördern.

Name: La Ferme Du Poteau
Description: La Ferme Du Poteau est une entreprise spécialisée dans la vente de fruits et légumes biologiques. Il est connu pour sa sélection de produits frais, locaux et de saison, soigneusement sélectionnés le matin par des producteurs qui récoltent pour leur savoir-faire et leur engagement dans l'agriculture biologique. Les fruits et légumes sont livrés en magasin à Paris dans la journée, garantissant ainsi au client la meilleure fraîcheur et la meilleure qualité des produits. La Ferme Du Poteau s'inscrit dans une démarche éthique et responsable, proposant une alimentation saine, respectueuse de l'environnement et de l'agriculture locale.

Name: C-Tradis  ( Groupe Capital Finance )
Description:
Filiale du groupe Capital Finance, C-Tradis est une entreprise spécialisée dans la distribution des produits de grande consommation (FMCG). Nous entretenons des partenariats solides avec des multinationales et des entreprises nationales leaders dans leur domaine, notamment Unilever, Savola, Silver-Food et Centrale Danone (produits ambiants). Notre présence s'étend sur le canal traditionnel, couvrant plus de 60 % du territoire marocain, de Tanger à Essaouira.
Notre équipe est composée de 500 employés répartis dans tous les départements, incluant le commercial, la logistique et les finances. Nous avons mis en place un système ERP pour automatiser nos ventes et notre comptabilité, ainsi que des solutions informatiques permettant une analyse instantanée des données (ventes, KPIs qualitatifs, etc.).
Notre ambition est d'être reconnu comme le meilleur distributeur au Maroc, et nous travaillons chaque jour pour atteindre cet objectif.
As a subsidiary of Capital Finance Group, C-Tradis is a company specializing in the distribution of Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG). We have strong partnerships with leading multinational and national companies in their respective fields, including Unilever, Savola, Silver-Food, and Centrale Danone (ambient products). Operating primarily through traditional channels, we cover over 60% of the Moroccan territory, from Tanger to Essaouira.
Our workforce comprises a total of 500 employees across all departments, including sales, logistics, and finance. We utilize an ERP system to automate our sales and accounting processes, along with IT solutions that provide real-time data on sales, qualitative KPIs, and more.
Our objective is to be recognized as the premier distributor in Morocco, and we are dedicated to achieving this goal through ongoing efforts and dedication.

With over 100 self-operated retail stores across the city, the Group has built a strong reputation for offering a wide range of herbal and non-herbal wellness products, including herbal drinks, soups, tortoise herbal jelly, and seasonal wellness foods.

Adhering to the principle of “Naturally Made, Wholeheartedly Good,” Hung Fook Tong is committed to promoting healthy living and traditional wellness culture. The Group not only maintains a robust retail presence in Hong Kong but also continues to expand its footprint into Mainland China and international markets.

Aaj Pakao means 'Cook Today'(in Hindi)

 Passionate about Indian and Indo-fusion cuisines? Discover the perfect blend of convenience and flavor with our ready-to-cook and ready-to-eat food brand.

It all started with our father, Ronald Dart, back in 1971 when he started one of Britain’s first pick-your-own businesses; Pic Fresh, when the idea of selling direct to the consumer was born!

Since launching Fìon in 2021, Miguel and Vera have quickly become the go-to team for unforgettable wine events, pop-ups, and private or corporate tastings across Scotland. With over 12 years of combined experience in top wine bars and fine dining restaurants in Edinburgh, they bring both expertise and passion to every glass they pour.

Miguel has been recently listed within the UK’s Top 50 Sommeliers ranked in 7th position. He also works as a panellist for some wine magazines, and is becoming one of the leading voices when talking about wines from the Atlantic regions. He also has made his name as a wine writer, contributing to specialist magazines and even catching the attention of Decanter, who recently interviewed him for his standout role in the industry.

Name: Love and Cheesecake
Description:
At Love and Cheesecake, we are dedicated to redefining the way you experience desserts. We serve Fresh, Natural & Delicious desserts, crafted with a commitment to perfection, ensuring unparalleled taste and presentation. Our journey is a testament to our unwavering passion for crafting sweet moments of indulgence.
With a legacy of exquisite craftsmanship, we cater to discerning palates and special moments. From celebrations to simple joys, our creations add an extra layer of elegance to every occasion. You can find us at 22 locations across Mumbai and Pune – come visit our stores or order online to savour our delightful offerings.
Choose from more than 56 cheesecake flavours and join us as we continue to set the standard for culinary luxury and sophistication.

Name: Marius Wine Shop
Description:
Eén van de fijnste wijnwinkels van Nederland. Dat is waar we bij Marius naar streven. In onze winkels in het Haagse Zeeheldenkwartier (sinds 2005) en Wassenaar. Marius wil een plek zijn van en voor wijnliefhebbers, met een collectie wijn waar we trots op zijn. Die we direct bij de wijnmakers zelf proeven én inkopen. Wijn van toegewijde kleine en grote wijnhuizen, wijnboeren en estates van over de hele wereld. Wijnmakers die geloven in wat ze maken, gepassioneerd zijn om iets bijzonders te creëren. Het aan-bod in onze winkels is net zo breed en gevarieerd als ons smaakpalet. Veel van onze wijnen scoren elk jaar opnieuw weer hoog in wijngidsen als de Omfietswijn, De Grote Hamersma, maar ook bij gerenommeerde internationale kenners als Parker, Decanter en The Wine Advocate. We leveren niet voor niets aan een toe-nemend aantal restaurants in Den Haag en omstreken, van eetcafé’s tot sterrenzaak.

Bij Marius vind je wijnen uit de oude en de nieuwe wereld, van eenvoudige plezierige en gemakkelijke wijnen die je elke dag zou kunnen drinken tot wijnen met een diepgang en complexiteit waar je lang en intens van kunt genieten. We helpen je graag de juiste wijn te vinden, van een snelle doordeweekse fles, een bijzondere saké tot een uitgebreide reis door de wijnwereld. Elke vrijdag en zaterdag staan er in onze winkels flessen open om te proeven. Regelmatig ontvangen we wijnmakers in de winkel en houden we proeverijen. Het team van Marius organiseert daarnaast wijnavonden en wijndiners in samenwerking met de restaurants waar wij aan leveren en verzorgt ook opleidingen in samenwerking met de wijnacademie. In onze webshop MariusWijn.nl is de hele collectie die Marius biedt terug te vinden én te bestellen. Wij bezorgen de wijn zo snel mogelijk, desgewenst in cadeauverpakking. In onze winkels geven we graag persoonlijk advies. Liefst zo goed mogelijk. Omdat we nu eenmaal één van de fijnste wijnwinkels van Nederland willen zijn. Welkom bij Marius.

Name: Demma Sanitaria
Description:
Da sempre al fianco delle famiglie. 
DEMMA è una community di persone, bambini e famiglie. 

Sin dal primo anno in cui è iniziata l’attività nel 1978 in un piccolo negozio a Palermo, ci siamo messi al fianco e al servizio di tutte le famiglie. La nostra offerta nasce dall’ascolto dei vostri bisogni dall’ascolto delle vostre esigenze e dalla consapevolezza di essere un punto di riferimento per molti. 

Consigliamo i prodotti migliori, seguiamo la crescita dei vostri figli e aiutiamo mamme e papà durante le prime fasi di sviluppo dei loro bambini. 

5 società, 18 punti vendita distribuiti in tutta la regione Sicilia, 140 risorse che formiamo continuamente e che si prendono giornalmente cura di voi per garantirvi un servizio eccellente ascoltando le vostre richieste. 

Siamo un’azienda che da sempre mette in primo piano l’ascolto, la qualità, e l’efficienza.

Name: Von Beanhardi
Description:
Disrupting the corporate led coffee industry, one coffee sniffer at a time.

A revolution in coffee, honouring the infamous Baron Von Beanhardi, nemesis to Fredrick The Great of Prussia, who forced all but a few coffee roasters to working illegally as underground operators.

Luckily, we're fully licensed and totally legal, but we recreate the very same roasts and blends that got old Fredrick triggered back in 1777.

Name: Bumpin Blends
Description: Bumpin Blends creates frozen, absolutely delicious smoothie cubes - designed for your body, delivered to your door. Each of our dietitian-designed flavors is made to support a specific symptom. So whether you're dealing with low energy, stress, anxiety, dull skin, bloating, or even low sex drive, we have a blend for you. Just pop the cubes into your blender, add liquid, and watch a smoothie change your life.

Name: GreenKarmas - Sustainable Food solutions
Description:
GreenKarmas | Sustainable Food Solutions for Healthier Living 

At GreenKarmas, we are pioneering a shift in the food industry by offering organic, low-glycemic products that enhance well-being without compromising taste or sustainability. Our product range, including organic honey, super seed peanut butter, honey-based sauces, and premium teas, is designed to nourish your body while supporting a healthier planet.

Born from a legacy of organic farming and ethical sourcing, GreenKarmas is committed to:

Sustainable beekeeping and low-impact farming
Clean, natural ingredients with no added sugars or palm oil
Nutrient-rich foods that help maintain balanced energy and promote overall well-being
Our products not only taste great, but they’re also packed with benefits:

Low glycemic index for steady blood sugar levels
High in antioxidants and superfood ingredients like chia and pumpkin seeds
Free from preservatives or artificial additives
By choosing GreenKarmas, you’re not just making healthier choices for yourself—you’re also supporting eco-friendly practices and empowering local farmers. Together, we can bring the essence of nature to your table, one jar at a time.

#GreenKarmas #SustainableFood #LowGlycemic #OrganicLiving #HealthyEating #Sustainability #NaturalGoodness #FarmToTable

We are the largest showcase of typical Tuscan products and wines, in fact, we count more than 500 products from 100 producers!

Tuscany is one of those Italian regions that can easily be defined as unique and incredible because its history, its cities and its traditions together
breathtaking landscapes and food and wine products that have been handed down from generation to generation, have made this region unique and continue to do so every day...

Follow us on our never-ending journey to discover this magnificent region, Tuscany!

We are an innovative startup and we are revolutionizing the world of Tuscan food and wine tourism and through the project "Around Tuscany" we will make you live Tuscany at 360° explaining production processes, centuries-old traditions and showing you cities and landscapes to paint.

Name: DivyaNarayani
Description:
Divyanarayani is a wellness brand dedicated to offering high-quality herbal products, such as green tea, herbal teas, Ayurvedic remedies, and nutraceutical powders. The brand focuses on delivering natural wellness solutions that enhance the overall health and lifestyle of its customers.

Founded with the mission to bring the ancient wisdom of Ayurveda and traditional herbal remedies to modern consumers, Divyanarayani has earned a strong reputation for promoting vitality, energy, and well-being. Operating mainly in India, the brand aims to expand globally, offering products that nurture the body, mind, and spirit.

Name: BRUGNANO WINES
Description:
|A 50 YEAR-OLD FAMILY TRADITION |

Very young in age, brothers Francesco and Giuseppe Brugnano continue a fiftyyear-old family tradition in the journey of wine and they start again with a new, contemporary and dynamic vision, capable of shortening the distance between producers and consumers. They are the protagonists of the “new era” of the Brugnano winery; two young people who belong to a new generation, proud of their roots, who believe that the value of a uniqueness should be defended and protected.

Name: aēlo Expertly Handcrafted Cocktails
Description:
aēlo was created with a passion for creativity and obsession for the perfect cocktail experience... with none of the prep work. Our specific brand of high quality, hand-crafted and incredibly detail-oriented recipes is something that we hope will help guide the hospitality industry and cocktails to a higher standard.

Gone are the days of ingredients you can’t pronounce that have been thrown together carelessly without thought or regard for how it will negatively affect your body now and in the future.

aēlo original recipes were first tested in living rooms amongst circles of friends with a fine appreciation for a boutique beverage experience. Through months of hard work and seeking perfection, aēlo has now found its way to a larger audience. 

We’re excited to share our creations with you. By offering all of our products in both Limited Edition alcoholic and non-alcoholic variations, we aim to include any lifestyle and have you covered no matter what the occasion.

Whether you’re celebrating your latest promotion, rewarding yourself after a long hike, or simply settling in on a Sunday evening mentally preparing for the week to come, there’s an aēlo cocktail for you.

Klever Fruit tự hào là môi trường phát triển lý tưởng cho ứng viên, thu nhập được đánh giá xứng đáng với năng lực. Đến với chúng tôi - bước đầu chạm đến giấc mơ của bạn.

Name: PaanFoods
Description:
PaanFoods is early stage start-up, building distribution network for fruits and vegetables. We offer pristine care to each and every piece of fruits and vegetables that we supply as if they were meals for our own family. This helps us guarantee the same taste everyday for our consumers.

Our mission to building the widest, product network to ensure consistent, identical and top grade fulfilment of fresh fruits and vegetables along with reducing the wastage to zero in the value chain in future.

Team of 5 members are building, and developing network from farmers to small retailers; solving the problems like higher costs, low quality and unhygienic produce, high price volatility, and the everyday hassle of going to the market. The traditional Supply Chain is highly inefficient, unorganised, and has a high rate of food wastage.

Now, we are offering our service to our small retailer, traders and Small- mandies in Gurgaon.

Name: Libellula
Description:
Libellula is a collective of family farmers in the hills just outside of Rome. 

Father-daughter duo Julia and Camillo founded Libellula to support small-scale Italian olive farmers who were abandoning their groves due to the challenges of climate change. 

By coming together as a collective, we pool our knowledge and resources, ensuring each farmer is able to keep their olive groves for many more generations to come – and share their exquisite extra virgin olive oil with those beyond just their small towns! 

Because we use regenerative farming, Libellula is 3-6 times higher in polyphenols and antioxidants than typical extra virgin olive oil.

Name: Harbour City Dimsum House Co. Inc
Description:
Over 50 years ago, the Harbour City Group opened the doors of its first humble eatery, marking a significant milestone in the history of Cebuano cuisine. Its first chapter, Ding How, introduced the art of dimsum to the local palate as it pioneered the concept of all-day dimsum dining in 1969.  

Founded by a family passionate about bringing people together over delicious dimsum, the Harbour City restaurants are now considered hallmarks of homegrown culinary excellence. 

These days, the Harbour City Group is a household name across Visayas and Mindanao, a brand known for its commitment to quality and innovation. The Harbour City Group now carries 5 brands that offers variety of menu and experiential dining- Dimsum Break, Harbour City, Ding How, Ding Qua Qua, and Dai Pai Dong. With the evolving market, Harbour City Group is poised to further elevate the dimsum experience.

Dal 2019 Va Lentino gestisce l’Imbarchino, un suggestivo spazio nel cuore del Parco del Valentino che ospita un bar, un'aula studio, una programmazione di eventi e una radio online. 

Con uno sguardo al futuro, Va Lentino intende ampliare le proprie attività, contribuendo a immaginare una città più aperta e sostenibile attraverso la valorizzazione di nuovi spazi attualmente dismessi o sottoutilizzati.

Name: דיפלומט ישראל
Description:
דיפלומט ישראל היא חברת ייבוא, מכירות והפצה של מותגי צריכה בינלאומיים. כבר למעלה מ-50 שנה אנחנו מגוונים את מדפי החנויות ורשתות השיווק בארץ, ומביאים אל כל בית בישראל את המותגים הפופולריים והאהובים ביותר בעולם, מהשוקולד הקלאסי ועד למברשות השיניים החדשניות ביותר.
 
בזכות אנשינו, המומחיות שצברנו בחיבור בין הטעם המקומי למותגים הגלובליים, היכולת להתאים עצמנו לשינויים בשוק והקפדה על סטנדרטים בלתי מתפשרים של איכות, שירות והוגנות - אנו ממשיכים לבנות גשרים בין מותגים גלובאליים לצרכנים בישראל.
אנו מאמינים שלכל אחת ולכל אחד, בכל רחבי הארץ, מגיע ליהנות ממבחר של מוצרים איכותיים וממגוון אפשרויות בחירה.
זו לא רק הבטחה - זו המחויבות שלנו.

Name: St Pierres Sushi
Description:
“To improve the quality of life of people through new exciting tasty
& healthy foods" - Its why we do what we do!

St Pierre's began in Wellington by three brothers in 1984 as a seafood delicatessen. With a range of products included Beluga Russian Caviar, sushi, smoked and fresh salmon it was very innovative for it's time.

In 1993 St Pierre's formed an alliance with one of Japans largest food exporters, The Tokyo Mutual Trading Company. They had been the pioneers of Japanese food in the USA and had provided superior cooking condiments and expertise to St Pierre's . From that time St Pierre's started to import all its own products used for making sushi from Japan, to make the most delicious sushi possible.

Fresh salmon arrives daily from the Marlborough Sounds and is skinned and boned on premises. The rice is freshly cooked California short grain rice. The fresh chicken for Teriyaki Chicken arrives daily and is marinated and cooked fresh every day. All the cucumbers, avocados and other vegetables are cut daily for super freshness. 

If a sushi flavour has sold out, we encourage customers to ask our sushi chefs to make up a fresh sushi roll! And special requests are always welcomed.

The name St Pierre's is the French the famous New Zealand fish; the John Dory it also translates to St Peter, who was the Patron Saint of Fisherman.

Description:
We’re GreenSalad, the fastest-growing salad brand dedicated to serving the healthiest foods while ensuring substantial returns to our stakeholders. Our mission is to revolutionize healthy eating by making it convenient, accessible, and delicious for individuals and businesses alike.

What We Offer:

Salad Subscriptions: Perfect for daily health-conscious eating.

Name: Puravida Foods, Inc.
Description:
PuraVida is where flavor meets innovation. We fuse chef-crafted recipes, fire-roasting, and our CryoCrafted freezing method to make craveable foods healthier, more balanced, and better for the planet—without sacrificing taste or convenience. From our first sold-out launch to nationwide shelves, we’ve stayed true to one idea: food can be good for you, good for the planet, and taste amazing.

Our team of talented chefs and culinary creators focus on crafting minimally processed, convenient foods that are trend forward and easy to prepare. Our unique creations look amazing and are packed with fresh, crisp, clean, vibrant, all natural ingredients.  

Our creations are plant based when we can, always ethically sourced, organic when possible, vegan if we can, never bioengineered and we never compromise on flavor! We create dishes inspired by the diverse culinary flavors and textures of the world and we use proprietary preparation techniques, and our own unique processes to create foods that are different, and ultimately foods that you will be proud to serve to your friends and family.

Name: Elle Cafe
Description:
Elle Cafe offers a unique experience inspired by the sophisticated and elegant café culture of Paris. Blending the aesthetic approach of the Elle brand, Elle Cafe aims to provide an unforgettable pleasure to its guests with its refined atmosphere and carefully curated menu.

Elle Cafe brings together iconic flavors of Paris with modern touches, offering coffee, desserts, and gourmet delights that accompany every moment of the day. Every detail of Elle Cafe creates a sophisticated ambiance, providing guests with a peaceful and elegant retreat.

Initially opening its doors on Bağdat Avenue, Elle Cafe is set to continue its growth with a new branch in Kuruçeşme. It has quickly become a popular meeting point for those who embrace a modern urban lifestyle.

With high-quality coffee, elegant presentations, and a Paris-inspired atmosphere, Elle Cafe continues to offer inspiring and unforgettable experiences.

Name: Swadeshi Gaon Wala
Description:
Swadeshi Gaon Wala is a homegrown brand on a mission to bring purity back to your kitchen — one jar at a time. We specialize in traditionally prepared A2 Bilona Cow Ghee, made in small batches using age-old methods from rural India.

Rooted in the belief that food should be both nourishing and honest, Swadeshi Gaon Wala sources milk from free-grazing desi cows and buffaloes raised on small farms — not factories. Every step, from hand-churning to slow simmering on mitti chulhas, is designed to retain nutrition, aroma, and authenticity.

We don’t blend, refine, or mass-produce.
We revive lost traditions with integrity — and deliver ghee that your body understands and your soul trusts.

Name: Haymarket
Description:
Haymarket celebrates the best that local and global culinary artisans have to offer. 

Straight from our soil to our shelves we offer a variety of freshly harvested Haymarket produce, artisan bread, pasture-raised meats, drive through coffee and convenient prepared foods – all designed to elevate your daily mealtimes.

Our shelves are curated with products that we believe in, and our promise is to satisfy your appetite for things that matter – quality, variety, and sustainability.

Name: 壺 Potion House

Our mission is to create innovative recipes with inspirations from all

Name: Ufresh
Description:
Uğur Şirketler Grubu bünyesinde faaliyet yürüten Uğur Entegre Gıda Şirketinin bir markasıdır. 2011 yılında, Nazilli ilçesinde, kurulan Ufresh’in çıktığı lezzet yolcuğu günümüzde yüksek kaliteli ürünleri ve nitelikli satış ağı ile sürmektedir. Ufresh; lezzet ve tazelikten ödün vermeden tüketicisine kuruyemiş, lokum, kahve, draje, yağ ve kuru meyve ürünlerini sunmaktadır.

Ufresh başta verimli toprakları ile ünlü Nazilli ve Türkiye’nin dört bir yanından gelen özenle seçilmiş lezzetleri, geniş ürün yelpazesini tüketiciler ile buluşturmaktadır. 2020 Yılında başladığı perakende serüveninde, seçkin lezzetler ve özgün ürün gamı ile mağazalarında hizmet vermeye başlayan Ufresh, sektörünün yenilikçi markalarındandır.

Çağımızın gerekliliklerini modern vizyonu ile harmanlayan Ufresh, mağazalarındaki çeşitlilik ve farklı konseptleri ile dikkat çekmektedir. Mağazasında misafirlerine, yaşayan mağaza konsepti ile tüketicilere yeni lezzetleri keşfetme imkânı tanıyor.

Ufresh, lezzetleri ile sadece anınıza eşlik etmekle kalmaz, anın tadını sonuna kadar çıkarmanızı sağlar. Zamanınızı lezzet ile dolu yaşamanızı sağlayacak Ufresh, sezon hasatlarıyla size her zaman taze ve yeni ürün keşfi sunar.

Ufresh, mağazalarında misafirlerine kaliteli, modern ve otantik bir deneyim sunar. Değişen konseptleri ile sizlere yeni lezzetleri keşfetme keyfi yaşatır.

Mağazaları ve internet sitesi ile Türkiye’nin dört bir yanındaki müşterilerinin tüm istek ve ihtiyaçlarını karşılamayı başaran Ufresh, ürün grubuna her geçen gün yeni ürünler eklemekte, kaliteli ürün gamını geliştirmektedir. Farklı ambalaj, gramaj ve abonelik sistemleri ile tüketiciye özel olarak sunulan hizmetleri ile Türkiye’de ilklere imza atmaktadır.

Name: Overstory Ventures
Description:
What do Kernza perennial grain, hybrid hazelnuts, and new winter annual crops have in common? They all represent innovative approaches to sustainable agriculture that can enhance soil health, reduce environmental impact, and promote long-term farming resilience. 

At Overstory Ventures, we focus on launching companies that will introduce these groundbreaking regenerative crops to the market. Our mission is to transform agriculture, steering it towards practices that mirror natural ecosystems.

Here is another fact. Did you know that in nature, a striking 90% of plants are perennial, thriving with living roots and lush green cover year-round? Yet, our agricultural practices often stray far from this natural balance. In the US and Europe, over 300 million acres of arable farmland are primarily devoted to annual grains, largely relying on high-input monocultures that demand excessive tillage and inputs. Shockingly, more than half of this land in Europe and a staggering 95% in the US lack winter cover crops, leading to severe soil erosion, nutrient depletion, carbon emissions, loss of biodiversity, and missed revenue opportunities for growers.

But there’s a silver lining! Profitable, viable perennial and winter annual crops are in development, providing a robust toolkit for the food and agricultural sector. By embracing these crops, we can harmonize farming with natural systems, reducing labor and inputs for farmers, minimizing soil disturbance, boosting production efficiency, and unlocking significant environmental benefits.

At Overstory we believe that well-supported entrepreneurship is key to advancing these new regenerative crops to market. We invite talented entrepreneurs eager to make an impact to join us on this journey. 

The uniqueness that we use a venture building model that brings together:
1. Access to cutting-edge intellectual property on new crops
2. Essential resources and structured support for success 

Interested in joining our mission? Contact us!

Name: Rede Max Argolo
Description:
Quem somos nós?
A rede Max Argolo é uma empresa com tradição familiar no ramo de supermercados e panificadora. Senhor Gildo, pai dos atuais sócios das empresas, tem mais de 30 anos de atuação em comércios na cidade de Amargosa, situada a 240 km de Salvador, na Bahia. Atualmente,  o Max Argolo possui 11 unidades presente em 09 municípios da Bahia!
Quer saber um pouco mais sobre nossa história? Continue lendo! 
Em 1992, Sr. Gildo abre uma panificadora na zona rural de amargosa, mas somente em 1995, nasce a ARGOLO & ALVES COMERCIAL DE ALIMENTOS LTDA, que ao longo dos anos, resistindo a diversos cenários como crises, troca de moedas e inflações, veio se fortalecendo cada vez mais!
Victor e Eric, únicos filhos do senhor Gildo, desde pequenos, já ajudavam o pai no comércio. Foram inseridos no mundo empresarial mesmo antes da idade adulta e o espírito empreendedor inevitavelmente tomou conta de toda a família! 
Victor dividia seu tempo entre os estudos e o supermercado do pai. De um lado, os estudos conferiram a ele a aprovação em vestibular e conclusão da faculdade de medicina, do outro lado, o trabalho com o pai desde cedo moldou nele a responsabilidade com os negócios da família e a consciência de que tudo o que o Sr. Gildo havia construído precisava ser perpetuado.
Eric, por sua vez, a exemplo do pai e do irmão mais velho, sempre esteve envolvido nos negócios. É hoje o presidente do grupo e executivo mais atuante, tendo buscado diversos cursos e treinamentos e atualmente cursa faculdade de Administração justamente pela aplicabilidade nos negócios da família. A responsabilidade e o comprometimento com os negócios são, talvez, a principal marca: “tenho obrigação de dar sequência ao trabalho do meu pai”.
E assim tem sido! Estamos em crescente e constante busca pelo nosso maior objetivo: fazer o varejo acontecer! Com a qualidade e variedade que nossos clientes merecem.

Name: Angels in my Kitchen
Description:
Invigorated by their love for baking and envisioned by a dream to bring the distinct taste of sour dough bread and flaky pastries to the Indian palette, two friends from the Institute of hotel management at Kolkata & Bhubaneswar, ventured into setting up their very own local bakery in the Indian capital and called it “ANGELS IN MY KITCHEN”.

Much like Angels are pure messengers of God, they incarnated themselves as messengers of pure taste to deliver mouth-watering cakes and establish them in the Indian culinary arena. With this credo and large-hearted devotedness to enchant their customers, they set up a bakery and patisserie storein the New Friends Colony ofNew Delhi in 2003.   Working incessantly with flour on their fingers, handcrafting breads and cakes they kept customer satisfaction atthe forefront and created a thesis ofbeing genuine bakers. Within a couple of years, they propelled into opening more stores and today they are a leading retail bakery & patisserie chain with 18 outlets, 10 in Delhi, 6 in Gurugram and 2 in Noida. On their bill of fare are over 120 items of irresistible cakes, flaky pastries, savouries designed to "clear the palate" and desserts to tickle the brain for more, eachcreated by them at their Commissary in Gurugram. All outlets are professionally run and managed, providing the best of bakery and confectionery at reasonable prices. Once customers savour their delights, they find their way back again and again!!!

The key factor of their prosperity has been their personal involvement in baking and utilizing the very same fixings and methods as those utilized in home preparations. Every single bakery of “Angels in my kitchen” is supplied food that has their mastery touch of being pastry specialists and cake decorators.

Over the past decade, they have been on the minds and the pallets of the customers, and won many accolades to their credit

Name: Wijnwinkel Barneveld
Description:
Wie we zijn
Wijnwinkel Barneveld is al generaties lang hét vertrouwde adres in Barneveld. Wat begon als de zuivelhandel van overgrootvader Gert is uitgegroeid tot dé wijnspeciaalzaak en slijterij van de regio. Inmiddels staat de vierde generatie aan het roer: Jan en Liesbeth van den Brink. Met liefde voor het vak, uitgebreide productkennis en oprechte aandacht voor iedere klant zetten zij de traditie van kwaliteit en gastvrijheid voort samen met hun team.

Onze missie
