Met ons brede assortiment – van betaalbare kwaliteitswijnen tot exclusieve whisky’s, speciaalbieren en geschenken – maken we elk moment bijzonder. Persoonlijke service staat centraal: we denken mee, verrassen en ontzorgen. Proef de smaak van kwaliteit.

Winkel
•	Advies op maat: deskundig en afgestemd op jouw wensen.
•	Proefmogelijkheden: ontdek nieuwe smaken in onze proefkasten.
•	Cadeaus: stijlvol verpakt, van losse flessen tot geschenkpakketten.
•	Cadeaubonnen: voor wie zelf de keuze wil maken.

Webshop
•	Online bestellen: eenvoudig en veilig.
•	Verzending per post: laat je bestelling thuisbezorgen.
•	Afhalen in de winkel: online gemak, persoonlijk contact.

Drank voor je feest & tapverhuur
•	Complete drankverzorging voor feesten en evenementen.
•	Inclusief tapverhuur en glazenservice.
•	Wat over is, mag retour – zo betaal je nooit te veel.

Relatiegeschenken
Persoonlijke en zakelijke geschenken het hele jaar door, volledig op maat samengesteld.

Kerstpakketten
Eindejaarsgeschenken voor collega’s, vrijwilligers of relaties, passend bij elk budget en elke wens.

Bezoek ons
Kom langs in onze winkel aan de Amersfoortsestraat 65 in Barneveld of bestel via onze webshop www.wijnwinkelbarneveld.nl. Wijnwinkel Barneveld: waar kwaliteit, service en aandacht samenkomen voor bijzondere momenten.

Name: Rede de Supermercados Bom Dia
Description:
Em Fevereiro de 1996, um grupo de pequenos supermercadistas do noroeste do Paraná, decidiu se unir para poder concorrer com as grandes redes de supermercados que estavam surgindo na região. 

Esse grupo deu início então a uma associação de compras chamada "UNISUPER".  O primeiro presidente foi o Sr. Roberto Júnior Gazolla, proprietário de um supermercado na cidade de Nova Esperança.  

A UNISUPER teve inicio em um pequeno imóvel locado na avenida Kakogawa, na cidade de Maringá. Em 2004, os associados perceberam que precisavam fazer as ações de marketing em conjunto. 

A maioria das lojas já existia há mais de uma década o que gerou bastante resistência em abandonar os nomes antigos e tradicionais, para usar um novo nome, totalmente desconhecido. Entretanto os empresários foram arrojados e reconheceram a necessidade de inovar e aceitaram a mudança, surgindo então a marca ?

BOMDIA?. Com o nome fantasia em comum, todas as ações de divulgação das lojas foram unificadas. A rede começou a fazer anúncios na TV aberta, outdoors, rádio e jornais de ofertas. 

Foram padronizados também, as sacolinhas, etiquetas e uniformes.  Hoje, a rede BOMDIA possui um centro de distribuição próprio, construído dentro de uma área de 50 mil metros quadrados. Conta com um depósito de 6 mil metros, onde é feito o recebimento, separação e expedição dos produtos através de sua frota própria. 

Neste mesmo espaço, encontra-se a central de negócios, onde estão sediados os departamentos de marketing e comercial da rede. Atualmente, a rede BOMDIA conta com 12 associados e 40 lojas, distribuídas em 12 cidades do noroeste do Paraná. Além de Maringá, as cidades de Sarandi, Iguatemi, Paiçandu, Mandaguaçu, Nova Esperança, Campo Mourão, Engenheiro Beltrão, Peabiru, Quinta do Sol, Santa Fé e São Pedro do Ivaí têm uma loja do BOMDIA perto de você!  

As lojas totalizam juntas 32 mil metros de área de vendas, 312 check-outs, 2.200 colaboradores diretos e são comercializados mais de 10 mil iten

Name: AFK Épicerie Fine | Spécialités Africaines et Antillaises
Description:
REDÉFINIR L'ÉPICERIE FINE AFRICAINE EN ESSONNE 

AFK est la première #ÉpicerieFine africaine implantée au cœur d'Évry, en #Essonne, face à la gare du Bras de Fer, dans un environnement urbain dynamique. Notre ambition est de centraliser et de valoriser la richesse et la diversité des produits d'épicerie africaine au sein d'un espace de vente moderne et accueillant.

Notre proposition de valeur repose sur trois piliers fondamentaux :
| EXPERTISE : Une connaissance approfondie de nos produits, de leur origine à leurs spécificités.
| QUALITÉ : Une sélection rigoureuse de produits d'une qualité irréprochable, privilégiant l'authenticité et le savoir-faire.
| TRANSPARENCE : Un engagement clair sur l'ensemble de notre chaîne de valeur, de la production à la distribution.

#AFK propose une gamme étendue de plus d'une centaine de références, incluant des produits rares et exclusifs en Essonne, allant des ingrédients essentiels aux découvertes gastronomiques telles que le chocolat artisanal de Côte d'Ivoire, la vanille de Madagascar et le Poivre de Penja (IGP).

Fondée par Aïssatou, AFK est née d'une vision : celle de revaloriser l'épicerie africaine et de la rendre accessible à un public plus large.
L'implantation stratégique à #Évry témoigne également d'une volonté de contribuer à la revitalisation des centres urbains de banlieue.

AFK invite partenaires, fournisseurs et clients à se joindre à cette mission collective : redonner à l'épicerie africaine la place qu'elle mérite.

Name: FlourabyChoyal
Description:
We are proud to introduce our innovative and sustainable solution to the traditional flour industry - freshly milled, fresh ground flour made with the world's first fresh flour grinding and vending machine. Our unique approach to flour production reduces carbon footprint and minimizes the need for transportation.
We believe that good food starts with quality ingredients, and that's why we only use the finest grains in our stone mill grinding process. Our state-of-the-art machine allows us to offer freshly ground flour that's full of flavor, nutrients, and aroma. Our customers can now enjoy the taste and health benefits of fresh flour that was once only available to professional bakers and chefs.
Our commitment to sustainability is at the core of our business philosophy. By using locally sourced grains and reducing transportation, we aim to minimize our environmental impact and contribute to a cleaner, healthier planet. We're proud to offer an eco-friendly product that not only benefits our customers' health but also our planet's future.
Join us in our mission to revolutionize the flour industry and promote sustainable food practices. Connect with us to learn more about our products and services, and how we can work together to make a difference.

Name: Altima Caviar
Description:
Altima Caviar sources the highest quality caviar from the world’s most exclusive and sustainable farms.

Our Farms raise their sturgeon in controlled, clean, and secure environments.  They are overseen by internationally-acclaimed biologists to assure sustainable conditions, individual quality and compliance to all international regulations.

Each fish is always raised in conditions that closely match their natural habitat. This, as well as an abundance of clean, flowing, and oxygen-rich water allows our farms to maintain the highest product quality without using antibiotics, growth hormones, GMO’s, or preservatives.

 Every tin of Altima caviar is produced from one single fish which ensures our clients will experience consistency regardless of their order size.

 We take great pride and joy in providing our clients a curated selection of the world’s best Beluga, Sevruga, Starlet and Oscietra.

Packed with plant-based protein and powered by feel-good ingredients, it’s designed to nourish your body, lift your mood, and crush cravings - without the junk.

Whether you're fueling up post-workout, grabbing a quick breakfast, or sharing a treat with the family, Doich fits right in. With three bold flavors, it's gluten-free, dairy-free, soy-free, vegan, and seriously satisfying.

Name: Taste Supply
Description:
Taste Supply is a startup and the first and only Social E-commerce Platform dedicated to small and medium-sized Specialty Food Makers and consumers.  Launched in 2024, Taste Supply connects food entrepreneurs with food lovers in the $207 billion Specialty Food market.

The Problem:
Big Food companies not only dominate our grocery stores but also online with Amazon and Google, as a result thousands of small and medium-sized Food Makers struggle to compete due to limited resources and lack of exposure. 

Consumers and Foodies find it frustrating and time-consuming searching for these premium, unique food products both in stores and online.

The Solution:
Taste Supply stands out as the only Social E-commerce Platform connecting Specialty Food Makers with Consumers and Foodies across the nation.  Our mission is to revolutionize the traditional grocery industry by providing a "one-stop shop" online for Specialty Foods, catering to the millions of people who cannot easily find these foods.  Just as Etsy revolutionized the handmade and vintage E-commerce market and Chewy did the same with the retail pet food/products category, we aim to do the same for the Specialty Foods & Beverages.

Platform Features:
On TasteSupply.com, Food Makers can utilize social media capabilities like TikTok, YouTube and Instagram to engage with consumers.  More than ever, people today are searching for foods not only for taste and discovery, but they are also looking for foods that address certain allergies, diets, cultures and lifestyles.  Visitors to our platform can easily discover a wide range of specialty foods, learn about the passionate entrepreneurs behind them, and support businesses that align with their beliefs and values. 

From Louisiana shortbreads to Virginia peanuts, from a veteran owned pasta sauce company to a curry paste made by a woman who immigrated from Cambodia, our platform celebrates small and medium sized Food Makers and their food treasures.

Name: Nourish
Description:
Nourish is not a chia pudding. It is not a protein powder. It is the best of both worlds: a protein pudding made out of chia, ready instantly. Just scoop, and water, stir, and enjoy anywhere. Nourish solved your high-protein meal replacement needs in seconds with purposeful ingredients.

Our Protein Pudding has upcycled chia, 22g of protein, >5g of fiber per serving, and is USDA Organic. No compromises, just clean, nutritious fuel. 
Moreover, every single ingredient has been meticulously selected to nourish you. You can read about the research behind each of our ingredients on our website.

Nourish is on a dual mission to nourish your body and your planet, one spoonful at a time. For every bag sold, we plant a tree. 

So ditch your depressing, liquidy protein shake an help us  #SavetheWorldwithChia, one creamy spoonful at a time.

Name: Marczyk Fine Foods
Description:
It all started in April of 2002…

That’s when we first opened the doors to Marczyk Fine Foods.  Pete Marczyk has always been passionate about great ingredients, but was frustrated at having to drive all over Denver to find them.  One place for fish, another for meat, another for produce… you get the picture.  Pete raised the funds to start his market, hired the contractor, found the staff and filled the shelves with products Denver had never seen under one roof:  sustainably raised beef, pork and lamb from family farms, unique and interesting Italian imports, old fashioned sodas, milk in glass bottles, amazing Colorado-made products, and so much more.  We are a neighborhood market where people can get great ingredients for breakfast, lunch and dinner or really excellent prepared food for an easy meal.

We opened a second location in 2011 at the corner of Colfax and Fairfax, in a building that once was a Safeway store.  Same great ingredients, plus a great, big kitchen to create all our prepared foods. In 2012 we celebrated our first store’s 10 year anniversary.  That same year Pete and Paul's long-time dream of starting an in-house bakery for fresh baguettes and sandwich breads came to fruition.  Our special events, like summer burger nights, our Colfax anniversary clambake, and the fall pig roast continue to build community, and the Colorado offerings just get better and better. Stay tuned, because there's always something great being cooked up at Marczyk's!

Name: HIPER CESTA
Description:
Há mais de 17 anos, a Hiper Cesta foi fundada com um propósito simples e poderoso: alimentar o mundo, desenvolvendo pessoas e gerando oportunidades. Desde o início, nossa missão tem sido fornecer cestas básicas de alta qualidade através de um atendimento personalizado de porta em porta. Com muito esforço, crescemos e nos consolidamos no mercado, sempre com o foco em manter a qualidade dos produtos e oferecer um atendimento diferenciado que encanta nossos clientes.

Nossa Cultura
Na Hiper Cesta, temos orgulho de cultivar uma cultura de crescimento e desenvolvimento contínuo. Aqui, nossos colaboradores têm a oportunidade de evoluir profissionalmente, sendo recompensados por seu esforço e dedicação. Acreditamos que o sucesso está diretamente relacionado ao bem-estar de cada colaborador. Por isso, investimos em um ambiente de trabalho baseado no respeito, na honestidade e no companheirismo, criando um lugar onde todos têm espaço para crescer.

Nossas Unidades
Hoje, a Hiper Cesta conta com 6 unidades estrategicamente localizadas permitindo-nos estar sempre próximos de nossos clientes. Nossas unidades estão localizadas em: Curitiba (Sítio Cercado), São José dos Pinhais, Almirante Tamandaré, Araucária, Campina Grande do Sul e Ponta Grossa.

Estamos em constante expansão, sempre buscando novas formas de levar nossas cestas de qualidade e atendimento excepcional a cada vez mais pessoas e regiões.

Hiper Cesta – Entregamos o que há de melhor

And our founder, Sherry’s, journey into founding Gourmaison is no different.

Name: Spectrum Wine
Description:
Spectrum Wine is a global fine and rare wine and wine services firm headquartered in Santa Ana, California with additional offices in Newport Beach, California; Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong; and Minneapolis, Minnesota.

We specialize in fine and rare wine auctions, traditional wine merchant retail and e-commerce, wine storage, and associated wine services including inventory, transport, appraisal, and more. Our auction and retail businesses also offer a wide selection of fine, rare, and aged beers, spirits, liqueurs, and other fine foods and beverages.

Spectrum Wine traces its history to the founding of Orange County's first wine store - Rolf's Wine & Spirits - in Tustin in 1953 by local entrepreneur, sports legend, inventor, and wine pioneer Rolf Engen.

Following an early and formidable career in basketball and volleyball, Rolf's entrepreneurial passion for wine developed quickly as he found success with his game-changing wine store in Tustin. He duly expanded the original Tustin store in 1956 and later came to expand his wine retail business throughout the region. In the 1960s, Rolf began traveling to Europe to taste and to source the great wines of France, Italy, and Germany, and he came to be one of the first to import and to sell the great wines of Europe in Orange County.

In 2017, Rolf's Wine & Spirits merged with wine auction house Spectrum Wine Auctions. Spectrum Wine, a nimble, new, 21st-century auction house of fine, rare, and collectible wines led by a deep team of passionate wine-lovers and established as a subsidiary of the Fortune 500-listed auctioneer and global collectibles and trading network Spectrum Group International (SPGZ), had grown rapidly with a global customer list and a consistent series of marquee auctions. In 2014, Spectrum Wine was taken private by longtime CEO Jason D. Boland.

→ Visit us at www.SpectrumWine.com
→ Visit our retail store online at www.SpectrumWine.com/Retail
→ Explore storage options at www.SpectrumWine.com/Storage

Name: DON’YA Ukraine's Kitchen
Description:
About Ukraine's Kitchen:

Name: Kongsi Tea Bar India
Description:
At 𝗞𝗼𝗻𝗴𝘀𝗶 𝗧𝗲𝗮 𝗕𝗮𝗿, we’re not just brewing tea —we’re crafting experiences that resonate.

𝗕𝗼𝗿𝗻 𝗶𝗻 𝗧𝗵𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 and reimagined for India, the idea was sparked during a family trip — a sip of authentic bubble tea that felt different. That moment lit the path: a brand built not on trends, but on trust, taste, and craft.

From the start, we knew we were entering a tough space. The Indian market was flooded with shortcuts — premixes, powders, diluted interpretations. But we made a different choice: to bet on authenticity. To believe quality, integrity, and cultural depth would speak louder than convenience.

Our journey began with one mission: to set a new standard for bubble tea in India. With ingredients from Thailand and beyond, we bring freshly brewed teas and perfectly cooked boba — to a nation that loves its beverages bold, and full of flavor.

Kongsi is a space where moments are shared, ideas are sparked, and communities come together. With sustainable practices like RPET bottles and in-house RO ice, we’re making every sip better — for you and the planet.

After 18 months of planning, hours of tasting, and a focus on authenticity, our team’s precision and passion have helped Kongsi become the gold standard for bubble tea in India.

As an early mover in the category, we’re reshaping how India discovers, experiences, and embraces real bubble tea. With 7 outlets in Bangalore and a roadmap to 100 across India by 2026, we’re building a brand that’s as innovative as it is welcoming.

Milestones
• From Phuket’s streets to Bangalore’s heart, we’ve redefined what bubble tea can be.
• Introducing India to authentic Thai Bubble Tea made with uncompromised quality.
• Recognized for our cafés and premium kiosk model, ideal for scale.

We exist to bring uncompromised bubble tea moments for you to remember.
Come experience bubble tea the way it was meant to be — bold, brewed fresh, and made with care.

Kongsi isn’t just a drink. It’s a mood. It’s a movement

Name: BURGER&SAUCE
Description:
Burger&Sauce is a fast-casual burger brand that aims to bring the freshness and quality back into fast food.  We live by our motto ‘Always Fresh. Never Frozen.’

Founded at the end of 2020, the brand has had a consistent trajectory of growth and now has 19 sites trading.  Our vision is to be recognised as one of the top fast-casual burger brands in the UK.

To help us do this our burgers are made using only the best quality ingredients whilst maintaining a competitively low price point.  Every order we make is freshly prepared to ensure our guests have a great experience each and every time whether in store or delivered.

We maintain this quality and consistency by having our own integrated supply chain which allows us to control the freshness of meats, poultry as well as vegetables used. 

With over 15 years of franchise and fast food experience behind us  we have created our own unique signature sauces as well as innovating new burger concepts in our limited ranges.

By combining consistently fresh food, fast quality service and a clean friendly environment, we hope to continue to grow our name in this market.

Name: Ren Beaulieu
Description:
Ren Beaulieu Luxury Tea is an exquisite experience that encapsulates life's most intimate moments. Ren Beaulieu is a story that lies deep within our hearts. it's a story in the warmth of family moments shared over a cup of tea.  And our stories are woven into each leaf, each blend that we bring to you today. 

We take great pride and care when crafting our bespoke collections. For us, luxury is an art, a form of resilience, love, and passion. What you find in our store is what we truly enjoy at home, the teas that are the highest grades. Our selection process takes more than a year; we examine the lands, soil, waters and altitudes in which these tea plants grow. We look into workers' living conditions and how they are being treated. 

Each leaf is selected with the utmost care, ensuring that only the best ingredients make it into every Ren Beaulieu blend. Our artisans skillfully combine these leaves with rare herbs and exotic spices, crafting a range of teas that are not only rich in flavor but also steeped in quality.

From the delicate aroma that greets you upon opening each package to the last lingering note of flavor, every sip is a testament to our dedication to excellence. Our teas are an invitation to indulge in a moment of luxury, to pause and savor life's finer things.

We invite you to join us on this journey of discovery and indulgence. Follow Ren Beaulieu on LinkedIn for the latest updates on our exclusive blends, insights into the world of luxury teas, and stories that celebrate the art and culture surrounding this timeless beverage.

Ren Beaulieu - Where every cup tells a story.

Name: Wohlenberg Vinhandel
Description:
Wohlenberg - Specialbutikken i Sønderborg
Et navn, der forpligter - og en butik, som kan fejre 100 års jubilæum i 2013. 
Vi - Anna & Jørn Petersen - købte Butikken pr. 1. maj 2004, og i 2007 blev Jens Kristian Bertelsen kompagnon med en andel på 20%. Vores filosofi er at videreføre Butikken med respekt for fortiden samt med nye tiltag sikre, at Butikken fremstår som en "moderne specialbutik" i Sønderborg Centrum med et udbud af mange spændende og unikke produkter.
 
Tre butikker - én Vinhandel
Butikken på Perlegade 10 tilbyder alt indenfor: Kaffe - med vores egne blandinger. Te - 130 slags. Specialøl - 150 slags. De verdenskendte lakridsprodukter fra Johan Bülow, karameller fra Bornholm, chokolade fra Summerbird, Sv. Michelsen, Konnerup & Co. og Valrhona, specialiteter fra hele verden som fx krydderier fra Mill & Mortar, olie og balsamico fra tapperi, Læsø-salt, spiritus og vin. Vi mener selv, at vi er "verdensmestre" i at lave gavepakker og spændende kurve. 
På Vinlageret i baggården kan man opleve et vinkældermiljø med ca. 10.000 flasker vin samt høj faglig betjening. Kom med din menu, og vi sammensætter vin og mad.Vi er mestre i at lave vinsmagninger og aktiviter med vin og mad.
Kiosken blev en del af Wohlenberg i april 2010. Her fører vi Orlik pibetobak, Cuba cigarer, Tips og Lotto, Landbrugslotteriet samt forhandler gavekort til Sønderborg Handel.

As a team of passionate entrepreneurs and food enthusiasts, we are dedicated to creating an elevated gastronomic experience that is available to anyone, anywhere in the world. With lightning-fast delivery and a commitment to sourcing only the finest ingredients, KAI Food Network is your go-to destination for discovering and savoring the best that the culinary world has to offer.

 Mission: To democratize access to top-quality food and beverage products for everyone, everywhere, and at all times by empowering local producers and artisans to sell their unique and high-quality products through our online marketplace, while providing consumers with a convenient and accessible way to discover and purchase these items from the comfort of their own homes.

Vision: To create an elevated gastronomic experience that is available to anyone, anywhere in the world, by providing lightning-fast delivery and sourcing only the finest ingredients to bring the best that the culinary world has to offer to customers.

Description:
Chez Nasdrow, nous sublimons l’art du sans-alcool en proposant des cocktails dignes des plus grands bars, à savourer chez vous, sans compromis.

 Chaque création allie équilibre, authenticité et raffinement
 Un goût d’exception
 Des ingrédients 100 % naturels (et sans conservateurs!)

Notre mission ? Créer des moments de partage et de convivialité, où plaisir et bien-être se rencontrent. Que ce soit pour une fête, une soirée entre amis ou un instant de détente, Nasdrow transforme vos occasions en expériences mémorables.

Découvrez une nouvelle façon de trinquer.
Rejoignez la communauté Nasdrow, et créons ensemble les meilleurs cocktails sans alcool de demain.

Name: Fresh Mart
Description:
Welcome to our family-owned international grocery store! We are passionate about providing our customers with the best selection of products from around the world. Our carefully curated inventory includes items from diverse cultures and cuisines, so you can find something to satisfy even the most adventurous taste buds. 

Our mission is simple – to provide quality, affordable food that nourishes and delights. We strive to make a positive difference in our community by supporting local farmers, vendors and suppliers whenever possible.

Name: Woodfrog Bakery
Description:
Founded in St Kilda, Woodfrog Bakery has grown from a single shop into a Melbourne-wide bakery known for quality and consistency. Our sourdoughs are hand-shaped, baked fresh each morning, and fermented for up to 28 hours to achieve the caramelised crusts we’re known for.  

As our retail footprint and wholesale partnerships continue to expand, we still bake the way we always have, with no shortcuts. We’re grateful to be part of Melbourne’s everyday rituals, one loaf at a time.

Name: RFOOD
Description:
Who are we: 
An agency who collaborates in Italy and Europe with meat producer’s pioneers. A deep knowledge of the market, together with our expertise, professionalism and passion of our collaborators, allows us to ensure a service always ready to answer our costumers needs with high quality solutions. 
Expertise area:
Consultancy, training, sales and commercial support in the food sector with a special focus in fresh, frozen and cured meat.
Customer Support :
We lead you in the perfect product research and assist you in every phase of the purchase, from the producer to the delivery. 
Services: 
Develop and optimize the performance stages of our customers in the purchase and sale of raw meat, management of activities and production processes.

Name: Oasis Energy Drink
Description:
Oasis Energy Drink is a clean, functional energy drink crafted with nootropics to fuel both body and mind — without the crash. We blend natural caffeine from green tea, guayusa, and essential vitamins to deliver sustained, clean energy and sharpened focus. Unlike traditional energy drinks overloaded with sugar and artificial ingredients, Oasis is refreshing, better-for-you, and built for those who want to perform at their best — in the gym, at work, or on the go.

Beyond the drink, Oasis is a movement. Through our LiveLimitless community, we bring together like-minded individuals striving to become the best versions of themselves and inspire others to do the same. Together, we’re reimagining how energy drinks fit into daily life — not just as a source of energy, but as a way to improve overall quality of life, today and for the long term.

Name: A'la Liberty
Description:
Welcome to A'La Liberty, where Culinary Innovation meets unparalleled Hospitality. Since our inception in 1988 as a humble Catering Business, we've continuously evolved, setting trends and redefining the culinary landscape.

In the early 1990s, we pioneered the introduction of International Cuisines, elevating the dining experience with a diverse array of dishes including desserts, chaats, and starters. Our commitment to attention to detail and cleanliness became synonymous with our brand, setting new standards in the industry.

One of our groundbreaking innovations was the introduction of Live Counters for Hot Naans at events, adding an interactive element to our Catering Services. This innovation not only delighted guests but also set a new benchmark for Outdoor Catering.

In 2010, we took a bold step forward by expanding into the banquet and restaurant businesses. Today, we proudly operate two Restaurants and three Banquets in the Twin Cities, catering to a diverse range of clientele.

At A'La Liberty, our commitment to the "Style of Liberty" goes beyond just food and ambiance. It encompasses our dedication to both our Customers and our Internal Team Members, creating warm and endearing bonds with every interaction.

Whether you're a vegetarian enthusiast or someone seeking a unique dining adventure, A'La Liberty invites you to immerse yourself in the essence of Vegetarian Dining and Hospitality. Join us on a culinary journey where innovation, hospitality, and passion come together to create cherishing experiences in all our locations, be it the Banquets, Restaurants or our Catering Services!

Value Creation

Our people

Name: WOLFOOD | PET FOOD
Description:
Wolfood es alimentación natural real para perros, creada con propósito y ciencia.

Cocinamos recetas 100% naturales, precocidas y libres de químicos, desarrolladas para respetar el sistema digestivo canino y mejorar su bienestar de forma visible y sostenida. Usamos proteína de alta calidad, frutas, verduras y carbohidratos sin gluten, en proporciones diseñadas para digestión ligera, alta absorción de nutrientes y mayor vitalidad.

Hablar de Wolfood es hablar de perros más felices, con mejor energía, heces saludables y menos mal olor, pero también de familias tranquilas, que sienten que finalmente encontraron una opción confiable, práctica y honesta.

Nuestros clientes destacan tres cosas que nos hacen distintos:
• Calidad que se nota. La comida huele bien, se ve bien y se sienten los resultados.
• Acompañamiento real. No vendemos comida; guiamos, resolvemos dudas y seguimos el proceso de cada perro.
• Comodidad y confianza. Entregas a domicilio, atención cercana, consistencia y transparencia en cada lote.

En Wolfood creemos que la nutrición es una manera de cuidar la vida que amas.
Si quieres unirte a una comunidad que alimenta con conciencia y cariño, estamos aquí para ti y tu compañero de cuatro patas.

Name: La Cave Parallèle • Aix-en-Provence
Description:
La Cave Parallèle, la première boutique au coeur d’Aix-en-Provence  qui offre des alternatives de qualité à celles et ceux qui ne consomment pas d’alcool ou qui souhaitent modérer leur consommation, tout en préservant le plaisir. 

Découvrez un monde parallèle insoupçonné  à travers une sélection de plus de 350 boissons sans alcool : vins, bières, « spiritueux » et autres boissons alternatives. 

Nous croyons en un monde où chacun peut choisir de consommer ou non de l'alcool sans se sentir exclu(e) ou limité(e) dans ses choix. Encore faut-il savoir que d’autres alternatives de qualité existent, et où les trouver facilement… 

La Cave Parallèle • Aix-en-Provence est là pour vous offrir cette liberté.  Nous proposons des alternatives complémentaires aux boissons alcoolisées pour toujours plus d’inclusion, de partage et de plaisir.

Découvrez une nouvelle façon de savourer la vie !
Sans alcool et surtout… Sans modération

Our goal is making hydration fun & smart while reducing plastic pollution. 

Life is getting busier and more is expected of us. A healthy lifestyle can take you a long way, and an important part of that is drinking enough water. But that's not always easy.

Enter Qallo. The way to drink more water and experience a healthy energy boost. Qallo is a powder solution based on natural fruit and plant extracts enriched with natural caffeine and various vitamins that you mix with at least 750 ml of water, resulting in a refreshing, fruity drink with limited ecological impact.

Description: Lay & Wheeler Trading is a modern fine wine merchant whose expert team are dedicated to providing an ultra-personalised service to our clients. Our bespoke managed portfolio services are catered to each individual client’s needs and are accompanied by our comprehensive storage solutions. Bethlehem Co-op Market | Your Community-Owned Grocery Store Open to All Shoppers 

At our grocery store, community and quality come together. We’re redefining what a grocery store can be— a hub for connection, fostering relationships, environmental stewardship, and local empowerment.

Description:
We're Billionaire Cookies, Dubai's first rotating cookie concept with brand new flavours dropping every single week available for a limited time only.

Name: Fluffy Fluffy UK
Description:
Fuwa Fuwa, meaning “fluffy fluffy” is North America’s largest soufflé pancake and dessert café, and now it’s come to the UK as fluffy fluffy. Fluffy Fluffy first launched its signature souffle pancakes in 2018, taking Toronto, Canada by storm. They now have 32 sites across North America, plus multiple sites in Europe. The brand, known for its light and fluffy Japanese souffle-style pancakes, opened its debut UK site in Manchester in October 2022 with an estate of 9 stores and more coming soon. Fluffy Fluffy is hoping to open further sites in 2025 with more franchisees signing in other cities.

The carefully crafted Fluffy Fluffy pancakes are served in the Japanese soufflé style and have become a viral sensation with fans queuing along the street to be the first to get a taste. Each of the fluffy pancakes begins with egg whites whipped to soft peaks, essential to their finally airy quality, and is then cooked very slowly at low temperature. Tasting like a delicate balance between a soufflé and a traditional pancake, soufflé pancakes are soft, bouncy, and light.

Name: Jazzy's Burger
Description: The journey of Jazzy's Burger since its launch in December 2022 has been nothing short of spectacular. It's a testament to the power of passion, dedication, and a clear vision. The brand has not only become a household name but is also poised to set a new standard for excellence in the fast-food industry in Africa. With a vision to become Africa's biggest burger brand by 2025, Jazzy's Burger is embarking on a journey that goes beyond growth; it's about creating a legacy. It's about sharing the love for burgers, fostering entrepreneurship, and contributing to the local economies of the regions they enter. Jazzy's Burger is not just building a brand; they're shaping the future of fast food in Africa

Name: Catalano Companies | RT 65 Management, LLC
Description:
Catalano Companies | Route 65 Management is a proud Dunkin’ franchisee with more than 60 locations across Central Massachusetts and Middle Tennessee, including several Dunkin’ Baskin Robbins combos.

Our story began in the mid-1980s, when Owner and Managing Partner Steve Catalano opened his first Dunkin’ restaurant. Over three decades later, the Catalano network has grown steadily, building strong roots in Massachusetts and expanding into Middle Tennessee in partnership with Matt Campobasso, Managing Partner & Chief Legal Counsel.

Together, Steve and Matt have led the company’s rapid growth, including the opening of 17 new Dunkin’ restaurants in Tennessee over the past decade. Today, Catalano Companies continues to invest in Next Generation remodels and new store development, ensuring every guest experience reflects Dunkin’s modern, welcoming brand.

At our core, we believe in more than coffee and donuts. We’re committed to supporting our employees, building lasting community partnerships, and keeping our guests running on Dunkin’.

Name: SUPERMERCADO PADRÃO
Description:
Com duas lojas localizadas nos bairros de Pinheiros e Butantã na Capital Paulista, além de oferecer vendas também pela internet, o Padrão Supermercados tem uma história que começa nos idos dos anos 90.

30 ANOS: Vindo da cidade de Panelas, interior de Pernambuco, o Sr. Antônio chega a São Paulo aos 17 anos de idade. Batalhando muito para realizar o sonho de tantos outros e ter uma vida melhor, trabalhou desde o início no ramo alimentício, e junto com seu irmão, abriu em 1991 seu primeiro comércio, uma quitanda, inicialmente com 40m², com apenas 1 funcionário e 80 produtos de hortifrúti.

Com o passar do tempo, com a sugestão dos clientes, o comércio foi se adaptando às necessidades da região e com isso foi crescendo e hoje se tornou uma das principais referências em supermercados, contando com um time de mais de 400 funcionários.

Name: Guizhou Guitianxia Tea Co., Ltd.
Description:
Guizhou Guitianxia Tea Co., Ltd (known as Guitianxia) is a state-owned enterprise founded in 2012, which is the leading and biggest manufacturer and exporter of tea in Guizhou province, China. Guitianxia has integrated tea plantations, production, processing, packing, retail and wholesale, and import and export trading.

Guitianxia owns 12000 acres of tea gardens, including 4000 acres of organic tea gardens, the annual production is approximately 36000MT. Thanks to the average altitude of 1200 meters of the tea gardens, the prominent ecosystem ensures high-quality tea from Guitianxia.

Guitianxia is always executing the strict standard on quality control and performs on the standard of “pollution-free and additive-free” and is certified with “SC”, “HACCP”, “ISO9001”, and “ISO14001”. Guitianxia has a professional production and sales team, and the work tenet of excellence has made the products sold by Guitianxia unanimously highly praised.

With export ranges to North Africa, including Morocco, Lybia, Senegal, Algeria, Mauritania, and Mali, Guitianxia is attempting to bring the flavor, character, and culture of tea from Guizhou to the global world.

Every year, over 20 Billion KG of coffee fruit is discarded, resulting in significant environmental and social degradation. 

IAG is committed to solving this crisis through adding value to a currently discarded resource and educating and empowering by-product innovation. 

Our sustainable snacks are Antioxidant packed, have no added nasties, showcase only natural ingredients and are of course…delicious! 

Grab your box of impact snacks today! 
#Coffeeisafruit

Name: Coopérative Sherpa
Description:
Depuis 1988, la Coopérative Sherpa propose du choix et de la qualité dans ses super marchés de montagne. 
Chaque magasin est un acteur engagé dans sa station, souvent partenaire de l’office du tourisme ou de l’école de ski et en liaison avec les producteurs locaux.
Chaque Sherpa est une personnalité de la communauté montagnarde, hiver comme été, et parfois même toute l’année.

Ce nom Sherpa est emprunté aux célèbres porteurs d’altitude au Népal qui, par leur résistance, leur ténacité et leur courage assurent l’approvisionnement et la survie des équipes d’alpinistes engagés sur les pentes himalayennes.

Ainsi, le nom Sherpa marque notre originalité et notre personnalité pour vous permettre de nous différencier des autres enseignes alimentaires. 
Il témoigne de notre intuition depuis presque 40 ans, que l’alimentation est un besoin essentiel en montagne et résume notre mission : apporter le ravitaillement en territoires de montagne !

Notre ADN et nos valeurs de coopérative alimentaire privilégient l’humain avec le fonctionnement en collectif : un homme/ une femme = une voix. 

Devenir Sherpa, ça se travaille au quotidien ! 
Pour rester leader de l’alimentation en station, les 120 magasins de notre réseau s’engagent sur la même Charte de qualité et de services. 
Répartis dans 100 stations des Alpes, du Jura et des Pyrénées françaises, chacun apporte son approche de la montagne, ses goûts et ses spécialités selon son terroir local.

Rejoindre la coopérative Sherpa, c’est avoir la chance de vivre au rythme de la montagne et de prendre à coeur de répondre aux besoins quotidiens de ses habitants permanents ou occasionnels, au rythme des saisons : un véritable équilibre et choix de vie.

Découvrez nos services 100% dédiés à nos clients : https://www.sherpa.net/nos-services 
courses en ligne, retrait en magasin ou livraison à domicile, 
prêt de pelle à neige, prêt d’appareils à raclette, fondue ou pierre à griller, etc.

Name: Abogados Café
Description:
Welcome to the Twin Cities’ first Latina-owned coffee shop—and first law-themed in the US.
América Latina is here for you. Enjoy!

Our Story
Wife and husband team Ofelia & Inti are proud to bring you Abogados Café. As both abogados (lawyers) and native Hondurans with a passion for coffee and law, they wish to warmly invite you to the Latin American coffee experience. They decided to open Abogados Café in the beloved Como Park area because there is no coffee shop here. Their neighbors had been longing for a coffee shop for ages. 

One door after another opened up, making Ofelia & Inti realize that this wouldn’t be muy loco. Ofelia dreamed of opening a coffee shop when she lived in Honduras. Perhaps it was now a sign from God. But they didn’t want to open just another mainstream coffee shop. Blah. It needed to be an extension of themselves. Being unauthentic is not cool. Why not a law-themed, Latin American coffee shop?! 

So, after seventeen months of plans, applications, designs, construction, and inspections… cha cha cha! Here is Abogados Café for you. We are starting with a to-go espresso bar & mercadito. If there is customer demand we could expand to sit-down. Come check us out and tell us what you think!

Description:
I set up Pot Gang back in 2020, delivering gardening kits across London during lockdown weekends in a rent-a-van. 5 years later, we've got gang members in all corners of the UK, delivering 10,000+ of our fruit, veg and herb growing boxes to customers each month.

We do this direct-to-consumer, largely on a subscription basis, and business-to-business, working with corporate wellbeing teams and also children via the public sector. 

Our sole aim is to help anyone successfully grow fruit, veg and herbs from home. Our monthly boxes contain absolutely everything beginners need to grow seasonal produce, with step-by-step instruction guides and personal support on WhatsApp. Done in a way that's the total opposite to what you expect from the gardening industry.

It's led to us being named The Sunday Times Best Gardening Subscription, having one of our boxes presented to King Charles, plus even collabing with Nike for Air Max Day.

I'm mega proud of how this has been achieved by a few twenty-somethings with no investment, external support, nor experience in the gardening industry. On we go.

Drop a follow on insta: @pot.gang or find us at: www.potgang.co.uk

Name: The Scottish Bee Company
Description:
Passionate about pollinators.

We founded The Scottish Bee Company back in 2017 after long discussions about what we could do to help the environment. We always wanted to run a business that was socially and environmentally responsible and the more we read about the decline in bee numbers, the more we felt we needed to do something.

We started off by giving bees to beefarmers across Scotland in order to help them as there was no funding available to beefarmers. We increased bee numbers by 23 million but quickly learned that there many more types of pollinators that needed our help.

This led us to starting our sister charity, Repollinate.org.uk. 10p from every unit sold goes to this charity that aims to increase pollination through education programmes and wildflower projects.

Since then we have achieved multiple awards for our honey and are currently working hard to tackle the problem of honey fraud around the world.

We will always be a business with the environment and people in mind. We pay a living wage and have flexible working hours. We only use recycled or recyclable packaging. We source ethical honey, beeswax and scents and we always strive to learn more and be our best in all of these areas.

We are progressing to be much more of a Scottish Larder focusing on slow food and regenerative farming. The ingredients we use at The Scottish Bee Company are deeply connected to the soil, climate and environment that create them.

Name: GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA
Description:
GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA brings the treasures of beautiful Colombia to the world. 
In addition to the their signature product PANELA – the golden whole cane sugar, the company also has Café de Colombia and fine chocolate products in its delicatessen range.

GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA by Meisel Fine Goods has been founded by Anna Elisabeth Segovia in 2016. Her mission is to offer a natural alternative to industrial sugar and at the same time spread the tradition of Colombia, her parent's home country. Thanks to GUATAVITA PANELA, you can easily substitute refined white and brown sugar with a an organic product, which owing to its gentle processing by hand still contains valuable minerals as well as Vitamin B6. 

GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA bringt die Schätze des wunderschönen Kolumbiens in die Welt. 
Neben deren bekannten Signature Produkt PANELA – der goldene Bio-Vollrohrzucker, hat das Unternehmen auch Café de Colombia und feine Schokoladenprodukte im Feinkost-Sortiment.

GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA by Meisel Fine Goods wurde im Jahr 2016 von Anna Elisabeth Segovia gegründet – mit der Mission, eine natürlich Alternative zu Industriezucker anzubieten und gleichzeitig die Tradition aus Kolumbien, der Heimat ihrer Eltern, in der Welt zu verbreiten. Why attend?

Learn from industry experts with insightful sessions on shared economy models, food safety, and ever-evolving consumer preferences. Gain valuable knowledge, exchange ideas, and stay ahead of the curve.

Indulge your senses with exquisite wine-tasting experiences and master the art of food and beverage pairing. Food A'Fair is a delightful treat for your taste buds!

Experience Hyderabad's rich culinary heritage as the enchanting "City of Pearls" sets the perfect backdrop for the event. Savor a blend of South Asian, Mughlai, Turkish, Arabic, and Indian flavors for an unforgettable journey.

Join the Food Revolution!

Name: Patang
Description:
In every corner of India, there’s a breeze that rises come January. A kite climbs. A thread tightens. Someone shouts “Kai po che!” And just like that — a quiet ritual becomes a celebration.

Patang is born from that very spirit.
Of flight, of freedom, and of flavours passed down, not mass-produced.
We’re not just here to sell snacks. We’re here to tell stories.
Stories of faraway kitchens, of whispered recipes, of dusty towns and bustling melas. Stories of taste that stayed with us — long after the moment had passed.

What is Patang?
Patang is a journey through India’s most iconic snacks — made in the places they come from, with ingredients you’d find in your own kitchen. No artificial colour, no preservatives, and no bad oils — just honest food that remembers where it came from.
We source directly from local makers, staying true to the roots of every recipe. Each pack is like a flavour postcard — carrying the scent of a place, the soul of a region, the pride of its people.
We travel to Sattur for that perfect golden Seeval.
To Thoothukudi for pepper-kissed cashews.
To Kolhapur for Bhadang that bites back.
And to Pune for Bhakarwadi that tastes like memory.
These aren’t just SKUs. They’re rituals wrapped in paper.

How We Fly
We’re a young company with an old-school heart.
No mass factories. No shortcuts. No algorithms telling us what nostalgia should taste like.
Just clean ingredients, regional wisdom, and makers who still believe that food should be slow, sacred, and stubborn.
We do things the long way — not because it’s trendy, but because it’s right.

Why Now? Why Patang?
Because something’s missing in the world of snacking.
A sense of place. A sense of pride. A sense of home.
Today’s India wants more than just crunch and salt.
It wants culture. It wants clarity. It wants to feel something.
Patang is for those who crave more than food.
For those who want to open a packet and find a memory.
A tiffin box. A monsoon train. A rooftop full of cousins.

Name: BEUNOSH ORGANICS
Description:
BEUNOSH is a contemporary ‘Wellness Food Brand’ inspired by traditional food wisdom and the incredible healing power of ancient Indian superfoods & super grains. Each product at BEUNOSH is a reflection of our enthusiasm and love for our homegrown MILLETS & SUPERFOODS.
During our extensive 3 years research on modern eating habits and effect of processed foods on body; we learnt that mindful eating is all the more relevant in today’s time given that lifestyle diseases are cropping up due to highly processed foods which have zero nutrition and are loaded with chemicals & additives. Our busy lifestyle, lack of time has gotten instant; highly processed foods prominent space on retail shelves & in our kitchens. The way our ancestors ate & cooked is replaced with modern convenient food practices.
Our challenge was to incorporate ancient healing grains and superfoods into daily diet and yet keep it incredibly easy & modern. The aim was to make sure that every product of Beunosh has a benefit to the body and mind. Beunosh was thus incorporated with product line designed around main aggregators responsible for clustering of lifestyle risk factors. We offer an array of products from single to multi-ingredient superfood blends to convenient breakfast mixes and wholefood flours all nutritionally dense in profile.

Handcrafted at our state of art manufacturing kitchen in Pune, we follow German Cyclone Cold Milling Technology for milling. We use only best quality hand-sorted super grains, solar dry our superfoods, and use hand-pounding techniques to craft our products and retain its nutrition to the fullest.

Sourcing local wherever possible, we work in partnership with local farmers to grow and mill quality foods into award-winning products. All our products are 100% VEGAN, Synthetic Sugar-Free, NON-GMO, Unbleached, Zero fillers and free from nasty ingredients.

We’re committed to keeping it simple, the way nature intended.

Name: BEEUP
Description:
In 2025, BEEUP was founded to bring the natural power of honey to the kids’ snack aisle. The brand is co-founded by David Beckham, former athlete, entrepreneur, and Shaun Neff, the serial entrepreneur, together with Authentic Brands Group (ABG), one of the world’s largest brand development and entertainment platforms.

The idea was inspired by David’s well-documented passion for beekeeping. As a father and former pro athlete, he saw firsthand the power of honey as a nutritious, natural source of energy. That spark became BEEUP, a new kind of snack brand created to fuel kids and families through busy mornings, after-school sports, and everything in between.

BEEUP snacks harness honey’s superfood power with bold flavors, simple ingredients, and no synthetic dyes or artificial flavors. Made with real honey as the number-one ingredient, they are non-GMO, gluten-free, and an excellent source of Vitamins A, C, and E. The reimagined fruit snack line is now available nationwide at Target, Target.com, and beeupsnacks.com.

BEEUP is proud to be the Official Fruit Snack Partner of AYSO and Inter Miami CF Academy, and to partner with the Bee Health Collective, furthering our commitment to the development of youth sports and to protecting the bees behind our favorite ingredient.

Name: James Gin
Description:
James Gin is a premium craft gin brand - ‘The Gin of the People’. Unusual, award-winning gin flavours, created by James May in a shed in Wiltshire, not just another generic celebrity-endorsed product. 

“Any reasonably conceited TV presenter or Hollywood actor will eventually have a go at making a gin. It’s easier than whisky and more interesting than vodka (which has no flavour, and is pointless). I was conceited enough to try it. But, in my defence, my gin really is mine, not a cynical branding exercise. I came up with the idea of blending the flavour of parsnip (because it reminds me of England and its dampness) with Asian spices (because they add excitement). We put it up for sale and amazingly, it sold out within a few days, rather than the few years I’d anticipated. None of it made it to the pub. 

Since then he has added Navy Strength Asian Parsnip, American Mustard (the ideal accompaniment to burgers and hot-dogs) and London Drizzle (everyone else has a London Dry and London generally isn’t, so this gin is designed to recreate the smell of a wet London pavement on a hot day).

To date, UK sales have been mainly via jamesgin.com and Amazon. We have recently secured a nationwide listing with LWC distributors, the UK’s largest independent drinks wholesaler.

In the US, we have a successful online presence and are now building relationships with retail distributors – initially in California, Oregon and Tennessee.

Globally we currently supply customers in 40 countries via our German distributor. We have additional relationships with wholesalers in Norway Sweden and Canada as well as local manufacturing under license in Australia. In 2025 we aim to start DTC sales in Mexico via our own website, Mercado Libre and Amazon.

Awards to date include: Great Taste Award, World Gin Awards, London Spirits Awards and IWSC Awards.

As James observes, "Our experiment has turned into a gin-fuelled monster. Like most things involving gin, it’s all got a bit out of hand.”

At Nithya Amirtham, we aspire to be a part of every joyous occasion in your life, whether big or small. We take pride in adding a touch of sweetness (or even some spiciness) to your most memorable moments. It is our privilege to celebrate your victories and milestones alongside you.

We carefully source the finest ingredients from trusted suppliers, avoiding any artificial colours and flavours, and use only fresh stocks. Our talented and experienced chefs craft each product with meticulous attention, while constant quality checks guarantee consistency. Name: Spectrum Foodservice Solutions LLC
Description:
Spectrum Foodservice Solutions is a provider of kitchen and cafeteria equipment. The focus is K12 schools, national chains, and independent restaurants. Spectrum FS.1 is located in Nashville, TN | Orlando, FL

The two principals, Kern Halls, and Sean King founded Spectrum Foodservice Solutions, LLC in 2023, initially as a matter of necessity. After years of collaboration on foodservice projects, they aligned their expertise and resources forming a minority and veteran-owned business.

Kern Halls has a long and diverse track record of success in food and beverage industry.

Starting as a culinary specialist in the United States Navy, Kern finished at the top of his class earning him accelerated advancement for his rank as well as a recommendation to work at Camp David.

Kern has worked on ships that carried a range of 300 to over 3,500 servicemen. He was amassed (in civilian terms “employee of the month”) for 6 months in a row. He has cooked for dignitaries from other countries and has been awarded numerous accolades while serving his country.

Sean King brings 35 years of foodservice design and AIA protocol to SFS. Sean has been featured in national publications like The Specifier Magazine and most notably Foodservice Equipment & Supply Magazine. Over the years he has worked with Cracker Barrel, Ruby Tuesdays, Brookfield Development and Food Network to name a few. Together Kern & Sean bring over 70 years of collective expertise in the foodservice Industry.

Mission:
We are a minority and Veteran owned organization. We promote diversity in the workplace and seek alliances with those who seek the same. Our mission is to build foodservice spaces that inspire creativity and productivity.

Name: La Melting Coop
Description:
La Melting Coop : une épicerie et un café participatifs en plein cœur de Villeurbanne. 

Notre projet La Melting Coop regroupe sous une même enseigne :
- l'épicerie coopérative et participative de la coopérative "Demain Supermarché",
- un café participatif géré par l'association "Les Amis de Demain"

C'est, la supérette coopérative et citoyenne lyonnaise. Une épicerie créé, gérée et détenue par et pour ses clients coopérateur·rices. 

Difficile aujourd’hui de combiner qualité, accessibilité et responsabilité lors de nos achats quotidiens. Pourtant, nous sommes de plus en plus nombreux·ses sur l’agglomération lyonnaise à ne pas être satisfait·es de l’offre proposée dans les supermarchés. Partant de ce constat, nous avons décidé de reprendre le contrôle sur notre alimentation, de sortir du modèle de la grande distribution et de construire un lieu à notre image, sur la métropole de Lyon ! Un supermarché différent, à la fois coopératif et citoyen. 

Notre projet La Melting Coop s’inscrit dans une logique d’économie solidaire, de coopération et d’intelligence collective. Notre souhait ? Proposer une alternative de consommation aux Grand·es Lyonnais·es, une gamme de produits alimentaires et non-alimentaires sélectionnée par les coopérateur·rices eux-mêmes !

Notre épicerie a ouvert sur ce principe en octobre 2019 et a déménagé à Villeurbanne en mars 2023 : venez la découvrir !

Notre nouveau local nous permet d'avoir un café participatif qui propose de très nombreuses animations ! 
N'hésitez pas à les découvrir : 
https://les-amis-de-demain.assoconnect.com/page/2248443-accueil

Name: Fagokho Corporation (Ramen Nagi PH)
Description:
RAMEN NAGI
Highly regarded by ramen purists and trendsetters alike, our authentic preparation, bold approach and innovation sets us apart within the sphere of top-quality ramen shops. Our Master Ramen Chef Satoshi Ikuta trained for over a decade in classic Hakata ramen shops before winning a contest for a spot in Tokyo’s famous Tachikawa Ramen Square. Founded in 2004, we have expanded to over 35 restaurants with branches throughout Asia. Our Palo Alto ramen shop is our first US location and the realization of a dream come true.

RAMEN MASTER
CHEF SATOSHI IKUTA
Nagi was founded in 2004 by Mr. Satoshi Ikuta at the age of 27. Chef Ikuta, who had trained for over a decade in various classic Hakata ramen shops, began with the practice known as ‘aida kari’, borrowing bar space one day a week to run a guerrilla ramen shop. With his rebellious spirit, Ikuta made a name for himself by first winning a contest for a spot in Tokyo’s famous Tachikawa Ramen Square (noodle theme park). He quickly followed with a successful shop in Shibuya and then Shinjuku Golden Gai. There are now over 35 locations around the world.

Name: Dengo France
Description:
Dengo est un projet à impact social et d'agro-foresterie durable autour du cacao lancé au Brésil en 2017.  Parti de l’idée de protéger la Forêt Atlantique et la biodiversité, Dengo a pour mission d’améliorer les conditions de vie des fermiers et de leurs familles. Ainsi est né Dengo avec pour seule ambition :  changer le monde du chocolat grâce à un projet qui protège autant la nature que les communautés locales, sans faire de compromis sur le plaisir et le goût. Dengo est certifiée B Corp depuis sa création. 

Au Brésil, Dengo travaille déjà avec plus de 150 familles qui cultivent le cacao. Leurs fèves sont achetées en direct, à un prix entre 90 et 160 % de la valeur du marché (données 2022) pour la plus haute qualité. Programmes de formation à l’agro-foresterie; à la protection de l’environnement; Dengo accompagne les producteurs dans leur métier au quotidien, y compris en veillant à la scolarisation des enfants.

Avec les "Quebra-Quebra" et les "Pepitas", les chocolats Dengo sont devenus les favoris des Brésiliens, surtout lorsqu'il s'agit de se faire plaisir, d'apporter de la joie et de faire découvrir ce que la nature sait faire de mieux à ses proches. 

Dengo a déjà développé plus de 30 boutiques au Brésil, et une boutique en ligne. Pas surprenant qu'en 2023, Dengo arrive en Europe avec la France pour première escale.

Name: Insectyumz - Insect Food Pte Ltd
Description:
Insect Food Pte Ltd is the First and Largest Brand and supplier of Edible Insect Food for Human Consumption in Singapore. Our products include most of Singapore Food Agency (SFA’s) approved list of species such as Crickets, Mealworms and Silkworms. 

Our first brand, Insectyumz was launched in July 2024 immediately after SFA announced the approval of edible insects for human consumption

Our edible insects are farmed and processed in regulated establishments under the oversight of the relevant Competent Authority. The establishments are equipped with Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (HACCP) and are certified with the Food Safety Management System, conforming to ISO 22000 stands.


Health certificates certifying that products have been subjected to sufficient heat treatment are also submitted for every imported shipment. Our edible insects are approved by Singapore Customs and SFA, hence are very safe for human consumption.

Description:
NutriMotion – Revolutionizing Healthy Living 

At NutriMotion, we’re not just a brand, we’re a movement shaping the future of healthy eating. 
Our vision is to build a holistic, sustainable ecosystem where nutritious, high-quality, and delicious food is accessible to everyone, empowering individuals and communities to embrace a healthier, more balanced lifestyle.

At NutriMotion, we believe that food is fuel, and your health starts with what you eat. We're here to redefine wellness, one bite at a time.

Join the movement. Eat well. Live well. Thrive.

Name: Delikao
Description:
Chez Delikao, nous avons l’intime conviction qu’il est crucial de repenser notre relation à la nourriture dans une société où les normes et les attentes sont souvent dictées par des idéaux de beauté et de santé souvent irréalistes. 

Trop souvent, nous sommes confrontés à une multitude de messages contradictoires sur ce qui constitue une alimentation "bonne" ou "mauvaise", avec certains aliments vantés comme indispensables tandis que d'autres sont stigmatisés. Cette pression constante pour se conformer à des régimes alimentaires restrictifs peut avoir des conséquences néfastes sur notre estime de soi et notre bien-être général. Nous nous retrouvons pris dans un cycle incessant d'excès, que ce soit en nous privant de certains aliments essentiels à notre équilibre nutritionnel ou en nous livrant à des comportements compulsifs pour compenser nos frustrations. 

En fin de compte, cette obsession pour les régimes alimentaires et la restriction conduit souvent à un déséquilibre mental et physique, compromettant notre santé globale et notre bonheur. Il est donc impératif de reconsidérer notre approche de l'alimentation et de cultiver une relation plus équilibrée et bienveillante envers la nourriture, en mettant l'accent sur le plaisir, la variété et le respect de nos besoins individuels.

Delikao, c'est une solution innovante qui allie gourmandise et bien être.   Elle permet à chacun de se rapprocher un peu plus d'un équilibre personnel. Nous nous donnons comme mission de vous apporter sourire et satisfaction grâce à nos recettes premium uniques.

Deccan Mudra is a Low GI staples brand that intends to leave its mark on the Food Map across the world, starting with India.

Name: Sabeel
Description:
Sabeel est un projet marocain de vente de produits naturels locaux, tels que le miel, l'huile d'olive, le safran, l'argane, le thym et les fruits du terroir. Le projet vise à promouvoir les produits naturels du Maroc et à les rendre accessibles à un public plus large.

Les produits proposés par Sabeel sont tous produits localement, à partir de matières premières de qualité supérieure. Le miel, par exemple, est produit à partir de fleurs sauvages dans les montagnes du Haut Atlas, tandis que l'huile d'olive est extraite des olives cultivées dans la région de Marrakech. Le safran est cultivé dans les plaines de Taliouine, connues pour produire la meilleure qualité de safran au Maroc.

L'argane est également une composante importante des produits Sabeel. L'huile d'argane est extraite des noix d'argane, qui sont récoltées dans les régions semi-arides du sud-ouest du Maroc. Cette huile est riche en acides gras essentiels et en antioxydants, et est utilisée depuis des siècles par les femmes berbères pour ses propriétés nourrissantes et hydratantes.

En plus de ces produits de base, Sabeel propose également une variété de fruits du terroir, tels que les figues, les dattes et les grenades, qui sont tous cultivés dans les vergers du Maroc.

Le projet Sabeel vise à promouvoir la consommation de produits naturels et à encourager le développement économique des régions rurales du Maroc. Les produits Sabeel sont vendus en ligne et dans des magasins spécialisés à travers le pays, offrant ainsi une solution pratique pour les consommateurs qui cherchent à acheter des produits de qualité supérieure.

Description:
Foi numa barraca de feira que o Caboclo Distribuidor deu os seus primeiros passos. Em meio à alegria do comércio, da aproximação com o público, e com o olhar focado na dinâmica de mercado, Carlos Caboclo visualizou uma grande oportunidade. Naquele tempo os feirantes reclamavam da atenção dos atacadistas. Recebiam cotas de produtos insuficientes, que se esgotavam nas primeiras horas da manhã.

Um prejuízo e tanto para quem vive de vender.

Como Carlos Caboclo sempre trabalhava bem abastecido, acabava por emprestar parte do seu estoque para os colegas. Resultado: rapidamente as gentilezas viraram um negócio. Em menos de um ano, a "Barraca do Emporinho" deu lugar à primeira sede do Caboclo, no bairro paulistano do Jabaquara. Um atacado de balcão voltado a suprir principalmente os feirantes.

Após 45 anos, já no final de 2.013 houve a primeira mudança de endereço, adequando a sua operação em uma instalação maior, agora no bairro da Vila Carioca, também na zona sul da capital.

Em março/2017 completamos 50 anos de atuação no mercado, sempre procurando a excelência em nossos serviços, o que compreende agilidade e compromisso com nossos clientes.

Trabalhamos com marcas renomadas como Lacta, Oreo, Trident, Halls, Club Social, Tang, Trakinas, Bis, entre outros.

Name: The Company Coffee
Description:
The Company Coffee, kahveden öte; insanları, hikâyeleri ve hayalleri buluşturma yolculuğudur. Bizim için kahve insanları bir araya getiren, sohbeti başlatan ve bağ kurduran bir deneyimdir. 

25 yıllık sektör tecrübesi ile, Eskişehir, İzmir, Bursa, Aydın, Kütahya ve Afyon'da bulunan toplam 13 (şimdilik) şubemizle, büyüme yolculuğumuzun en önemli motivasyonu misafirlerimiz, çalışanlarımız ve ortaklarımız ile kurduğumuz bağdır. 

Ve en önemli değerimiz olan çalışanlarımız sadece “ekip arkadaşları” değil, bu yolculuğun gerçek ortaklarıdır. Çünkü burada çalışmak, yalnızca bir iş yapmak değil; birlikte büyümek, birlikte öğrenmek ve birlikte güzel şeyler başarmak demektir.

Her gün hazırladığımız her fincan kahve, hem misafirlerimize hem de bize ilham verir. Bizimle yol almak, kendi potansiyelini keşfetme fırsatı, insanlığa ve çevreye katkı sağlama imkânı ve daha güçlü bir kariyer yolculuğu demektir.

The Company Coffee’de herkese yer var. Farklılıklarımızı zenginlik olarak görüyoruz ve her bireyin hikâyesine değer veriyoruz.

Amacımız basit ama güçlü: En iyi kahveyi sunarken, her fincanda insan ruhuna dokunmak.

Gelin, birlikte daha fazlasını paylaşalım.
Her fincanda ilhamla buluşalım.

Our promise is simple: real taste, real people, real impact.
Every jar of spice, every scoop of tea, and every blend we create carries the essence of its true origin — from GI-tagged turmeric in Erode to filter coffee nurtured in the fields of Thanjavur.

At Chithriya, we partner directly with farmers and women’s collectives, paying them 3× fairer prices to ensure dignity, sustainability, and transparency across every step.
We believe food made with integrity nourishes more than the body — it nurtures the earth, empowers people, and preserves culture.

Through Chithriya Makers — our growing community of farmers, cooks, and creators — we’re building a world where food is not just consumed but celebrated.

 What We Stand For:

Fair farmer pay & ethical sourcing

Women-led employment in Thanjavur

Authentic, origin-based ingredients

Sustainable, refillable packaging

Transparent supply chains powered by people

Join us in our journey to bring back the real taste of India — one honest harvest at a time.

Serving global markets with traceable, sustainable Indian food

Name: Acker
Description:
Now in its third century of business, established in 1820, Acker is the oldest and most respected wine shop in America, the largest global wine auction house, and the preeminent destination for fine wine and spirits worldwide. A true one-stop-shop for expert wine services in every form, Acker’s culture is deeply rooted in customer service, upholding a commitment to the highest standards, applied across a vast array of amenities including a world-class wine club, fine wine retail inventory, a wine concierge service, advisement on wine as an investment, cellar consultations and appraisals, first-class wine education programs, bespoke events and tastings, corporate business services, and its crown jewel, global fine and rare wine and spirits auctions.

In 2008, only ten years after its first auction in New York City, Acker became the first auction house to recognize the growing thirst for wine in Asia and held its first Asia sale on May 31st, 2008 in Hong Kong. In 2011, Acker cemented its position at the top of the wine auction market by being the first wine auction firm to exceed US$100 million in revenue between all of its affiliates, setting hundreds of world records for wine throughout the year in the process. It crossed the $1 billion mark in auction revenue in 2018. With affiliated companies in Hong Kong, New York City, Tokyo, London, and further expansion on the horizon, Acker hosts “live” auctions every month, and has a constantly running internet auction, providing its clients constant access to the world’s best wines and spirits.

Today, it is the world’s largest wine auction house, atop the wine auction market in revenue earnings for the majority of the past decade. Its name is synonymous with personalized, polished, and expert services in all areas of wine and spirits.

Name: Brar's
Description:
Three decades ago, Brar’s started as a small sweets (mithai) shop in Toronto’s Little India. Our brand has always stood for the highest quality products crafted with care. Over time, our delicious products gained popularity, and their demand grew across various cities in Canada and the U.S. To meet this increasing demand, we set up a dedicated kitchen for producing sweets and samosas. From there, we expanded into a wide range of products, including dairy, desserts, samosas, and snacks. Fast forward to today, Brar’s has become a leading Canadian ethnic food brand. We operate out of a state-of-the-art facility approved by the Canadian Food Inspection Agency (CFIA). Many of our retail products are also certified by the Halal Monitoring Authority (HMA).

In addition to our retail products, Brar’s is celebrated for its pure vegetarian restaurants across the GTA. With five restaurants serving three different cities, we continue to create exquisite vegetarian Indian cuisine.

Our Purpose

Since 1986, we've been at the forefront of incredible flavour, the guiding light for those who crave more than the ordinary. Our journey doesn't just stop at crafting exquisite vegetarian Indian cuisine; it's a way into the heart of your gatherings – connecting generations and infusing every bite with a sense of celebration. With us, food becomes a conduit to your occasions, where the more vibrant the flavours, the more unforgettable the memories. At Brar's, we believe that food should be filled with energy, colour, and connection. Each bite is a burst of pure, unadulterated dedication– from the farmers who grew the ingredients to the chefs who prepared the recipes. Our homestyle cuisine and family focus encourages a feeling of always being welcomed, cared for, and nourished. At Brar's, above all else, we embrace the vibrant way – because life should always be this flavourful.

For more information about our retail products and restaurants, please visit brars.com

PERCUP is:

- Your last-mile delivery service
- Your performance and digital support 

We’re shaking up a trade that’s been around for centuries and overturning shipping restrictions to change the way people shop online for caffeine.

Our goal is simple. Whether you’re a brand or a customer, we’re here to perk up your every day.

Name: The Meals Collective
Description:
Every week, over 1.4 billion meals are consumed in the UK — yet too many of these are shaped by short-term profits, not long-term value. 

The result? Poor-quality food, wasteful packaging, limited healthy options, and a resistance to change.

At The Meals Collective, we believe this can and needs to change.

Founded by Olly Pinder in 2022, our mission is simple but urgent: to create better meal occasions for both people and the planet.

We're here to challenge the status quo — to shift away from inertia and towards innovation that puts consumers and sustainability at the centre. By sharing insights, ideas, and experiences across the food system, we believe we can inspire meaningful, lasting impact.

The collective has now grown into a vibrant community of 100+ businesses who believe in our purpose and are striving to deliver change.

At the core of The Meals Collective is a consultancy — helping food businesses unlock smarter, faster innovation and growth.

Led by Olly, we work with retailers, brands, and startups to shape better product strategies, improve commercial performance, and respond to changing consumer needs.

Olly has been working at the forefront of the food industry since 2010, building a uniquely diverse career across innovation, commercial strategy, retail buying, and eCommerce.

He’s led transformation at start-ups, scale-ups and national retailers, including:

Scaling Gousto 10x in 3 years, helping the UK’s #1 recipe kit grow to 70,000 orders a week

Leading the Meals Mission at Co-op, transforming Meals across 2,500+ convenience stores and their quick-commerce channels

Managing major categories at Ocado, including Dairy, Produce, and Frozen

Whether you need hands-on delivery or strategic guidance, our approach is informed by real-time conversations and deep industry connectivity.

Name: Quest Restaurants Management
Description:
Quest Restaurant Management is an operator, developer, and investor of unique, exciting and high-quality brands within the food delivery and fast casual segments of the F&B industry. Our focus is strictly on quality and consistency of product, and reliability and speed of service.

QRM began in 2013 with the development and launch of Pizza Di Rocco – a multi award winning authentic Italian pizzeria focused on delivery – and has continued to successfully develop, launch, invest in and grow F&B delivery operations since driven by new technology, new solutions, new concepts and trends.

Current brands under management and development include: 
• Pizza Di Rocco - An award winning traditional Italian Pizzeria
• Gino's Deli - Famous for its authentic panuozzo, homemade ingredients & premium Italian flavours
• Pasta Della Nonna - Premium, pasta, authentic flavours & homemade quality - just like Nonna makes it!
• The Mac Kitchen - Passionate purveyors of creamy, cheesy Mac specialities
• La Patrona - An authentic 'Mexican taqueria' purely inspired by inherited recipes and preparation methods
• Chicano - Tex-Mex creation with a wild, varied, loaded and cheesy menu.
• Pinsa Romana - Authentic pinsa hand crafted from homemade ingredients, unique combinations and premium flavours.
• Brassa - Brassa Grill Club brings the Latin American steak scene to the UAE with premium cuts like Picanha, Rib Eye, and Brisket.

"Food is our common ground, a universal experience"

We believe that brands should be based around quality ingredients, attention to detail, consistency - as well as convenience. The formula for success in a delivery business is delivering high quality food, consistently, in the fastest and most convenient manner.

Wedgewood’s mission is to remain 100% Plastic Neutral, to find innovative ways to create and maintain a negative carbon footprint, and to invest back into conservation and the environment; to inspire others and become what is necessary to save the planet. Currently, Wedgewood has four Hamper & Gifting Emporiums (in Parkhurst/Joburg, Lourensford/Cape Town, Piggly Wiggly/Midlands and The Ballito Lifestyle Centre), as well as a growing farm shop on our farm.

Name: No Days Wasted
Description:
Founded in 2017, No Days Wasted is a science-backed, experience-centric wellness brand. The company has three hero products in the USA - DHM Detox, Hydration Replenisher and Sleep Assist.

In Canada, No Days Wasted sells DHM Blend (NHP capsules) and Hydration Replenisher (Food Product - drink mix).

DHM Detox (USA) is the better way to celebrate. It helps consumers bounce back after socializing and celebrating the moment so they can get back to doing what they love the next day. This product is for high-performers and helps them achieve balance. 

Hydration Replenisher (USA) is an electrolyte drink mix that helps rehydrate and provides a source of sodium, potassium, Vitamin C, D, zinc and B-Complex.

Sleep Assist (USA) is a magnesium-based supplement that helps promote relaxation and manage your circadian rhythm with the use of Magnesium L-Threonate, Magnesium Bisglycinate, Apigenin and L-Theanine.

No Days Wasted products are distributed by NDW Labs Inc.

Name: A&W (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd
Description:
A&W was started by Frank Wright who partnered with Roy Allen in June 1919, to help Wright with the root beer business he started that year. The company became famous in the United States for its “frosty mugs,” where the mug would be kept in the freezer prior to being filled with RB and served to the customer.

In 1963, A&W made Malaysian history when it became the first fast food restaurant to open in the country.

This was followed in 1965 with the first Drive-in restaurant in Petaling Jaya.

For more than half a century, the brand has etched itself into the hearts of Malaysians with its famed and distinguished root beer, floats, burgers, ice cream waffles and its beloved mascot, Rooty the Bear. It would go on to be a brand with which Malaysians from all walks of life would grow to love, creating deeply rooted memories with friends and loved ones.

A pioneer in the Malaysian fast food industry, the brand now has conceptualized plans to leverage on its rich heritage and legacy in Malaysia to make a big comeback to relive its glory days, reclaiming the hearts and minds of a new generation of discerning consumers.

A&W Malaysia was bought over by Eng Food Group, with an aggressive expansion drive to revamp and expand its reach. Currently, A&W operates a total of 104 outlets around the country. 

Join Our Flavorful Family!

Are you a seasoned leader with a passion for delectable food and the ability to inspire and lead a dynamic team? If you believe that good food truly starts with great people, then you're the perfect fit for our A&W family!

Ackerherz ist die deutsche Expansion vom französischem Scaleup La Fourche. Mit über 100,000 Mitgliedern und 300 Mitarbeitenden ist La Fourche Marktführer im Online Bio-Segment in Frankreich. La Fourche wurde vor über 5 Jahre gegründet, hat eine gesicherte Finanzierung und wächst weiterhin stetig. Mit Ackerherz wird das Erfolgsmodell nun nach Deutschland gebracht 

Wir bieten dir somit die Chance, bei uns die Dynamik eines Startups mit der Erfahrung eines erfolgreichen Scaleups zu kombinieren. Wir sind auf der Suche nach hungrigen Teamplayern, die Lust haben, gemeinsam etwas aufzubauen. Wenn du Lust hast, viel Verantwortung zu übernehmen und mit deiner Arbeit einen merkbaren Impact zu haben, freuen wir uns riesig über deine Bewerbung
