Name: The Altitude Store
Description:
The Altitude Store offers a wide range of organic, chemical-free products, including fresh fruits and vegetables, daily essentials, pantry items, meats, eggs, artisan cheeses, and other dairy products. We are dedicated to providing you with healthy, sustainable alternatives free from synthetic agrochemicals and harmful substances.
Our Altitude Bakery delivers fresh, delectable baked goods daily, while The Altitude Kitchen is always ready if you prefer to order in rather than cook. Since 2010, we've been serving families across Delhi, Gurugram, Greater Noida, and Noida, earning trust through quality and consistency.
Organic Acres, our 40-acre farm located just 90 km from our retail outlets, is the heart of our commitment to sustainability. The farm features fruit orchards, ancient grains like Khapli wheat and millet, and seasonal vegetables. It is also home to livestock, including cows, chickens, ducks, geese, and bees. Over 80,000 trees on the farm support a diverse ecosystem of wildlife, such as peacocks and the occasional Neelgai.
At The Altitude Store, we pride ourselves on supporting local farmers and artisans who share our values of sustainability and quality. Every product we offer meets rigorous standards of freshness and purity, ensuring you receive the best in organic living.
With over 14 years of dedication, The Altitude Store is a leader in the organic movement, promoting healthier lifestyles and a more sustainable world. Join us in choosing organic, sustainable products for a brighter future.
Start your journey towards organic living today!

Name: Maifud: El Mercado de lo Imperfecto

Combatimos el desperdicio de alimentos conectándonos directamente con productores locales para rescatar a precio justo producción "imperfecta" que de otra manera se perdería, y la ofrecemos en nuestra plataforma a clientes finales con hasta un 50% de descuento respecto a otras plataformas online, y a la puerta de su casa.
 
Bienvenid@s a quienes sueñen con un mundo sin alimentos desperdiciados!

Name: JESSY DIFFUSION- TRANSMED COMPANY
Description:
La société Jessy Diffusion a été créée en 1988 par Maurice Namias avec un capital social de 400.000 Dirhams. Elle a pour activité l’importation et la distribution sur le marché marocain de produits alimentaires de différentes origines. Le capital social de la société a été porté à 800.000 dhs en 1992, à 7.500.000 dhs en 1997 et à 15.000.000 dhs en 2012.

Ces augmentations de capital ont permis à Jessy Diffusion de conforter son développement, ses investissements, et de devenir l’un des importateurs les plus importants sur le marché Marocain. 

Avec un portefeuille de plus de 45 marques  internationales (Lorenz, Tabasco, Royal Canin, Loacker, Morando, et bien d'autres) et plus de 2000 références, Jessy Diffusion s'impose comme l’un des leader sur le marché. Elle est Depuis 2009,  classée parmi les 500 plus importantes entreprises du Maroc.

Name: BellyCare
Description:
En France, 1 français sur 2 se sent concerné par les troubles digestifs : gaz, ballonnements, transit irrégulier...plein de symptômes très sexy dont on ne parle pas assez ! 

15% de la population souffrirait chroniquement de ces symptômes "bénins" ce qui nuit considérablement à la qualité de vie du quotidien. C'est une pathologie qui s'appelle "le syndrome de l'intestin irritable" qui est aujourd'hui sous-diagnostiquée car seul 5% de la population aurait posé des mots sur leurs maux.

Malgré le diagnostic, le suivi et les solutions ne sont pas toujours au rendez-vous... 

BellyCare a la vocation de libérer la parole autour des troubles du bidou, faire connaitre et comprendre ces maux du quotidien mais surtout d'apporter une solution clé en main avec des plats préparés adaptés qui permettraient de réduire ces troubles grâce à une formulation pauvre en "FODMAP" - des petits sucres qui irriteraient les intestins.  Des plats équilibrés, sans gluten, sans lactose mais avec saveurs - fabriqués à partir de produits français et de saison.

En complément de ces plats, BellyCare c'est aussi un accompagnement personnalisé avec des professionnels de santé compétents, bienveillants et à l'écoute disponibles sur une application mobile qui comporterait un espace de partage pour la BellyCare.

Name: We are Noon
Description:
Découvrez l'aventure familiale et amicale Noon : une histoire de passion et d'innovation autour du Nashi !
Chez Noon, nous avons transformé notre amour pour le fruit asiatique Nashi en une véritable mission : offrir un antidote naturel et efficace pour les lendemains de fêtes.
Notre jus de poires Nashi, 100% naturel et produit dans le nord de l'Italie, est conçu pour adoucir les effets de la "Gueule de bois", sans réduire le plaisir de faire la fête.
Mais Noon, ce n'est pas seulement un produit. C'est aussi une démarche engagée : proximité de la production pour réduire notre impact environnemental, soutien aux agriculteurs locaux dans une logique d'agriculture raisonnée, et engagement en faveur de l'inclusion en employant des personnes en situation de handicap.
Noon vous accompagne partout, dans un format pratique de 120 ml. Parce que chez Noon, nous croyons que chaque moment mérite d'être vécu pleinement, même après une soirée bien arrosée.
Rejoignez l'aventure Noon et découvrez comment un fruit peut changer vos lendemains de fêtes !
Retrouvez-nous sur wearenoon.fr
Elisa, Elise et Dominique
Cofondateurs

Name: Sommellerie de France
Description:
C’est en 1976 à Sierck-les-Bains que naquit la société Sommellerie de France, succédant à l’entreprise familiale Heintz, spécialisée dans les jus de fruits. Dirigée par Nicolas Heintz, elle employait 6 personnes, qui s'occupaient de la récolte, du pressage, de la mise en bouteille et de la distribution.

 La société Heintz fournissait les épiceries et les particuliers. Edmond Heintz succéda à son père au déut des années 70, et devant le vieillissement des machines, il décida de créer une société de distribution de vin, baptisée Sommellerie de France.

 Ne vendant que du vin blanc à ses débuts, Sommellerie de France offre désormais à ses clients les meilleurs vins de toutes les origines, des vins de pays de qualité aux plus grandes appellations de renommée mondiale.

L'objectif est simple : vous aider à trouver la bouteille qui conviendra le mieux à vos envies.
 
Au travers d'une sélection haut-de-gamme et originale, Jean-Luc Jamrozik Maitre-Sommelier et Président de la plus Vieille Association de Sommellerie du monde à voulu partager ses coups de cœur de dégustation.

Name: Royal Mile Whiskies
Description:
Royal Mile Whiskies is one of the world’s most respected specialist whisky retailers and the pre-eminent wholesaler of specialist spirits across the Scottish on-trade and off-trade, with an accounts list of some of the very best hospitality venues in Scotland and beyond.  

Established in 1991 on Edinburgh’s famous Royal Mile, we have gained a reputation as the go-to place to find new, interesting and hard-to-find whiskies and spirits. In 2000, the company launched www.royalmilewhiskies.com, which made us one of the first to retail whisky online. Today, we ship thousands of whiskies each year to customers around the globe. 

We’re motivated by connecting with people through great spirits, and we’re serious about making the experience of discovering great whisky and good spirits fun.

Our knowledgeable team hold real enthusiasm for what we do and are endlessly passionate and curious about what’s new (and old!) in the world of whisky and other spirits. 

This passion, enthusiasm and knowledge runs through our entire business. We’ve got decades of experience in whisky, and our friendly team are always excited to share this knowledge with our customers, by helping them with personal recommendations, or giving them a unique insight behind the bottles we sell.

Name: AKOUA GmbH
Description:
Ausgezeichnet als „Most Innovative Sustainable Solution“ – Gewinner der Food Ingredients Europe Startup Challenge 2024!

AKOUA revolutioniert die Nutzung des Cashewapfels – einer Frucht, die bislang ungenutzt blieb und bei der Cashewkern-Produktion als Abfall galt. Wir verwandeln diesen wertvollen Rohstoff in hochwertiges Cashewsaft-Konzentrat, das als natürliches Süßungsmittel eine nachhaltige Alternative für Eiscreme, Getränke und Lebensmittel bietet.

Wusstest du, dass bei der Herstellung von 1 kg Cashewkernen rund 10 kg Cashewäpfel weggeworfen werden? 

 Nachhaltig für die Umwelt – Weniger Lebensmittelverschwendung, mehr Ressourceneffizienz.
 Fair für die Cashewbauern in Benin – Zusätzliche Einkommensquellen sorgen für mehr wirtschaftliche Stabilität.
 Innovativ für die cashewproduzierenden Länder – Neue Wertschöpfungsketten fördern wirtschaftliches Wachstum und lokale Entwicklung.

####

Winner of the Food Ingredients Europe Startup Challenge 2024 – Awarded “Most Innovative Sustainable Solution”!

AKOUA is revolutionizing the use of the cashew apple – a fruit that has long been discarded as waste during cashew nut production. We transform this valuable resource into premium cashew juice concentrate, offering a natural and sustainable sweetening alternative for ice cream, beverages, and food products.

Did you know that for every 1 kg of cashew nuts produced, approximately 10 kg of cashew apples are thrown away?

 Better for the environment – Less food waste, more efficient use of natural resources.
 Empowering cashew farmers in Benin – Providing additional income and improving economic stability.
 Driving innovation in cashew-producing countries – Creating new value chains that promote economic growth and regional development.

Name: Noble House Group - Hampers & Corporate Gifting + Coffee
Description:
The Noble House Group is a premium food & drink producer & retailer, specialising in the highest quality hampers & gifts for the corporate & retail markets. Own label Noble House Coffee- premium coffee blends and the full range of coffee services (including coffee machines, installation and servicing) for the workplace, hospitality, restaurants and retail.

For our corporate clients we offer a bespoke hamper and gifting service, designing the gift boxes and hampers to suit your specific requirements. Full branding and customisation options are available to compliment the wide range of premium products that we stock- we will create the perfect range of gifts for your company's needs, for clients and co-workers alike. We specialise in accommodating all dietary requirements, so no-one is left out. 

The Noble House range of ethical and carefully selected coffees and hand crafted chocolate, as well as our wide selection of fabulous hampers and gift boxes for all occasions, are available through our retail website at www.noblehouseprepared.com (and delivered nationwide), as well as direct to businesses and distributors nationwide. 

Served and stocked in an ever increasing number of restaurants, cafés and businesses, our coffee range is sure to delight the most discerning of real coffee lovers. Through Noble House Coffee we offer the full range of coffee services from wholesale and retail supply of our delicious own-brand bean, ground and compostable capsule coffees, through to machine supply and servicing.

The team at Noble House has been working in the fine food industry for over a decade, supplying high profile private clients and leading multinational companies. Our services include bespoke event consultancy and planning, as well as facilities management and purchasing.

Name: International Dreams Work
Description:
𝐈𝐃𝐖 : 𝐈nternational 𝐃reams 𝐖ork est une société qui existe depuis 23 ans.

Le but de cette page est de vous présenter les résultats "Concrets" que nous pouvons atteindre ensemble, tant sur le plan physique que professionnel, ainsi que notre état d'esprit.

𝐈nternational 𝐃reams 𝐖ork est une entreprise qui offre une double opportunité unique ! 

D'une part, elle permet d'améliorer sa santé et sa forme grâce à son concept 80% Nutrition 20% Sport. 

D'autre part, elle offre la possibilité d'apprendre un métier dans le domaine du bien-être, du sport et de la nutrition avec un concept clé en main, que ce soit à temps choisi ou à temps plein et avec une rémunération évolutive !

Avec plus de 23 ans d'expérience, il n'a jamais été aussi propice de se lancer dans l'entrepreneuriat, d'autant plus que + de 50% des Français souhaitent devenir indépendants ! 

En la matière, notre statut offre des avantages équivalents à ceux d'un salarié, avec une protection sociale et une réduction d'impôt de 72 %. Ainsi, vous pouvez vous lancer sans prendre de risque. De plus, vous avez également la possibilité d'ajouter ces revenus à vos droits d'Assedic.

Notre équipe de plus de 100 personnes se développe dans toute la France en aidant entre 1200 et 1300 personnes à améliorer leur bien-être.

Notre objectif est d'aider 2000 personnes, c'est pourquoi nous sommes à la recherche de personnes ayant une forte éthique, un bon état d'esprit et désireuses d'apprendre. 

Cette activité, à la fois fun, dynamique et professionnelle, est accessible à tous ceux qui ont une forte envie d'améliorer ou de changer leur qualité de vie.

Nous serions ravis d'échanger avec vous !

Name: Misfits
Description:
We're not your average beverage company.
We're Misfits — a new-age soda brand flipping the script on everything you thought you knew about “healthy drinks.”

At Misfits, we’ve reimagined soda from the ground up. Our drinks are powered with 7g of prebiotic fiber, real fruit, and only 3-4g of sugar — no chemicals, no preservatives, no fake promises. Just guilt-free fizz that tastes damn good and actually does good for your gut.

Built for the bold, crafted for the conscious — Misfits is more than a drink. It’s a rebellion against the status quo of junk-filled beverages and meaningless labels.

Name: Dona do Doce Bolacharia Gourmet
Description:
A Dona do Doce é a primeira bolacharia gourmet artesanal do Brasil, fundada em 2012, especializada em transformar momentos em doces memórias por meio de receitas autorais, artesanais e afetivas. Com unidades em São Caetano, Santo André, Oscar Freire e Morumbi, a marca oferece um portfólio de delícias artesanais que podem ser personalizadas com identidade visual, embalagens exclusivas e sabores pensados para encantar convidados ou funcionários em eventos corporativos e celebrações especiais.

Para empresas, a Dona do Doce desenvolve lembranças personalizadas sob medida, desde pequenas lembranças até grandes volumes para eventos, sempre com atenção aos detalhes e ao sabor insubstituível que é sua marca registrada. 

Mais do que produtos, a Dona do Doce oferece experiências afetivas que fortalecem conexões e celebram vínculos importantes, tornando-se uma escolha ideal para ações de endomarketing, brindes corporativos e eventos que buscam encantar com autenticidade e sabor.

Na Dona do Doce, o "doce" inspira amor, de todos os jeitos, para todos. O "dona" não é sobre mando, é sobre dom: o dom de insistir até acertar. Somos feitos para presentear, celebrar e, acima de tudo, compartilhar. Com café, com conversa, com afeto. Mais do que explicar, é sentir.
Location: São Caetano do Sul, São Paulo

Name: Ghetto Gastro
Description:
We’re Ghetto Gastro—a culinary collective born in the Bronx, by Jon Gray, Pierre Serrao, and Lester Walker.

We specialize in creative cultural collision through cooking, using food as a tool to tell stories about where we come from and open borders to the cultures that inspire us. We create experiences around the world, making delicious food and collaborating with the best-in-class partners across fashion, art, design, and music. As Ghetto Gastro, we big-up the Bronx as a driver of global culture, with food as our primary means to connect and make an impact in our community. 

Break bread to break the mold. Let's cook.

Name: ARTUKBEY Coffee
Description:
We are independently owned and operated, and we believe in giving our franchisees all the support they deserve to protect their investment and help them make money by becoming the center of the community anywhere they are.
Our elders have been in the retail business since 1910, and then we used and multiplied that experience to open our first retail coffee branch in 1988 in Mardin / Turkey. We hope to build long-term relationships with our customers through our customer-focused approach. This includes providing high-quality products at competitive prices. 
Mr. Tacettin Yertum is the founder and CEO of Artukbey coffee (1981 Merdin, Turkey), and he is an experienced businessman in the retail market. Mr. Tacettin branded the company as Artuk Bey Kahve in 2011, creating a sustainable and efficient coffee franchise model. The brand successfully expanded, reaching 75 branches in Turkey, 7 in Iraq and 1 in Dubai by 2020.      
We reached 83 locations in 2022 and developing 47 locations this year to reach a total of 130 locations by the end of 2023.

Name: Eat Hybrids
Description:
Eat Hybrids: For a tasteful future!

At Eat Hybrids, we're all about amazing burgers that are good for you and the planet! 

Our mission: combine mouthwatering meat taste and plant-based health benefits. 

Our Belief: Flavorful Sustainability
We believe burgers should be a treat without guilt. That's why we're flipping the script, crafting burgers that are delicious and eco-friendly. Everyone, from meat lovers to health-conscious flexitarians, can relish our guilt-free burgers.

Our Vision: Hybrid Food Revolution
Meat production harms the Earth with emissions, water waste, and deforestation. We're on a mission to lead a food revolution for flexitarians – those balancing their diets. Meat demand is soaring, harming our planet's resources. 

Challenges: Netherlands & Beyond
We're tackling crises like the Netherlands' nitrogen problem by creating middle ground solutions. For the 48% of Dutch flexitarians, our hybrid burgers nail taste and values. We're committed to taste without compromise.

The Hybrid Edge: Taste, Health, Green
Eat Hybrids burgers bring it all – flavor, health, and eco-consciousness. Ideal for flexitarians and those cutting back on meat, we're your go-to for sustainable and scrumptious burgers. As flexitarianism grows, we're here to satisfy evolving palates.

Join the Movement: Flavor & Sustainability 
Get onboard the sustainability train without ditching your burger fix. Eat Hybrids offers a tasty solution, appealing to both carnivores and plant-based enthusiasts. We're all about flavor and responsibility!

Connect with Us
Let's transform eating habits together! 
Follow us for updates, insights, and a taste of the ultimate hybrid burger experience. One burger at a time, we're changing how the world dines.

Contact us: admin@eat-hybrids.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/eat_hybrids?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y

Name: Greendale Farm Shop
Description: Deep in the heart of the East Devon countryside, surrounded by acres of farmland, you’ll find the award-winning Greendale Farm Shop and its family-friendly café & restaurant. Full of fresh, locally-sourced produce, this welcoming shop has become a must-visit destination. Here at Greendale Farm Shop, we like to keep things local whenever possible; you’ll find our butchers well stocked with delicious meat from our farm, while the fishmongers sell fish fresh from our own boats, and our on-site bakery team bakes fresh bread each day. If we can’t grow, raise, catch or make something ourselves, we source it from carefully chosen suppliers - we prefer to work with local growers for our vibrant veg and fresh fruit if we can, and you’ll find our shelves are packed with locally-made goodies, from cheese, chutney and fudge to ale, wine, spirits and more.

Name: Homemade Cuisine Gluten Free
Description:
Homemade Cuisine is a company based in Lahore providing a range of gluten-free products prepared in dedicated facilities across Pakistan. We have branches in Lahore, Islamabad, and Faisalabad; additionally stocking at premium stores across the country. Our product range includes gluten free flours, fast food, bakery, mithai, desserts, additives, and much more.

We also additionally cater to alternative diets such as Dairy Free, Egg Free, Keto, Low FODMAP, and low sugar.

For the future, we are working on becoming FSSC 22000 compliant through establishing an effective food safety management system that our clients can trust globally.

Name: DIVVINO
Description:
Le vin ne doit pas être uniquement le produit de l’industrie, mais le résultat d’une alchimie entre l’homme et la nature. Divvino partage sa passion dans le respect des terroirs, en proposant des vins de vignerons artisans en bio, biodynamie et nature ainsi que des vignerons mythiques de Bourgogne, Champagne, Jura et d’ailleurs.
Les deux ‘V’ de Divvino signifient in vino veritas. Nous avons environ 1 200 références dont 200 vins italiens, quelques précieux flacons brésiliens, un vaste choix de spiritueux et un espace épicerie fine.
Divvino  offre une large sélection de vins au verre, des cours de dégustation et privatise l'espace pour vos événements, dans un lieu unique et historique du XVI siècle.

Name: Chudleigh's Brand
Description:
We first invited people to visit our family’s apple farm in Milton, Ontario, in 1967. We were inspired to see how families from nearby cities loved this taste of country life and how a sunny fall day on the farm seemed to turn everybody into a kid. 
Since then, our commitment to high-quality products and exceptional customer service has earned us a reputation as a Canadian success story. We take pride in fostering a sense of community and bringing people together through the taste of our products and the memories made at our family farm and blossom cafés.
Interested in joining the Chudleigh's team?  We want to hear from you!

Name: Akali
Description:
2014 yılında Maçka’da küçük bir restoran olarak yola çıkan Akali, kısa sürede kendine özgü lezzetleriyle dikkat çekti. Menüye eklenen burgerler, misafirlerden büyük ilgi gördü ve bu ilgi Akali’yi bugün bildiğimiz butik burger markasına dönüştürdü.

Zaman içinde Etiler, Karaköy, Marmaris ve Bodrum gibi lokasyonlarda yeni şubeler açarak büyümeye devam etti. Her yeni adım, markanın hem yerel kimliğini hem de kalite anlayışını daha geniş bir kitleye ulaştırdı.

Bugün İstanbul’un farklı bölgelerinde hizmet veren Akali, 2025’in başında Mall of Istanbul şubesiyle bu yolculuğa yeni bir halka daha ekledi.

Bizim için her tabak, sadece bir yemek değil; emeğin, özenin ve sadeliğin birleşimidir. Misafirlerimize her zaman kaliteli, samimi ve özgün bir deneyim sunmak için buradayız.

Name: Love Biryani
Description:
About Us – Love Biryani

At Love Biryani, we believe food is more than just a meal – it’s an experience. Our mission is to bring the magic of authentic biryani to your plate, with every grain of rice infused with love, passion, and bold flavors. From the heart of Lahore, we offer a dining experience that blends traditional recipes with a modern touch, creating a biryani that is both comforting and unforgettable.

Whether you’re enjoying a meal at one of our welcoming dine-in locations or grabbing a quick bite from our vibrant food trucks, Love Biryani promises to deliver the perfect balance of spices, freshness, and warmth in every bite.

Our signature dishes are crafted using only the finest ingredients, because we believe in quality that speaks for itself. We aim to not just serve food but to create moments – moments of joy, connection, and love. With every dish, we invite you to experience the richness of flavor and the heart behind our biryani.

Join us, and let’s make every meal a celebration of taste, passion, and love.

Name: The Well Coffee Roasters
Description:
Based in Nashville, The Well Coffeehouse & Roasters is a nonprofit with multiple locations and one mission: to turn coffee into clean water for communities in need around the world.

We source responsibly and sustainably, building direct relationships with trusted farmers whenever possible. Each batch is roasted in-house with care, honoring the people and places behind every bean.

Our coffeehouses are built on hospitality and warmth, inviting people into spaces where community happens. They’re places to pause, to connect, and to be part of something bigger than a cup.

As a nonprofit, all profits fund clean water projects, providing lasting access to safe drinking water around the globe. Every cup served helps bring health, dignity, and hope to those who need it most.

At The Well, coffee can do more. It can change lives — from farm to faucet, from our hands to theirs.

Name: Lunys
Description: Sme slovenská spoločnosť špecializujúca sa na dovoz a distribúciu čerstvého ovocia, zeleniny, potravinárskeho sortimentu a drogérie na celom území Slovenska priamo k vašim dverám, či už máte vlastný penzión, hotel, reštauráciu, závodnú či školskú jedáleň, potraviny alebo rovno k vám domov. Vďaka spolupráci s viac než 500 obchodnými partnermi z celej Európy dovážame a vyrábame pre našich klientov viac než 7 000 produktov, medzi ktoré patria aj čerstvé bylinky, huby, exotické druhy ovocia, široký potravinársky sortiment, ako aj balená a čistená zelenina, ovocie a čerstvé šťavy z vlastnej produkcie. S ročnou prepravou viac ako 28 000 ton tovaru, vlastnou flotilou viac ako 150 chladiarenských vozidiel a špedičnou prepravou, modernými vychystávacími a baliacimi linkami a vyše 400 zamestnancami patríme medzi najbonitnejšie, najzodpovednejšie a najrýchlejšie reagujúce spoločnosti v oblasti distribúcie potravín všetkého druhu na Slovensku a Morave.

Name: COQUINARIA
Description:
Coquinaria es una empresa Chilena especializada en la importación y comercialización de productos gourmet y accesorios y equipamiento para la mesa y cocina. Representamos marcas de alto prestigio provenientes de distintos lugares del mundo, principalmente desde Europa y Estados Unidos.

Nuestros canales de venta son la venta directa en tiendas propias, la venta mayorista a cadenas de retail y tiendas especializadas, la venta de regalos corporativos personalizados para empresas e instituciones, y también un importante enfoque hacia nuestros canales de e-commerce, como nuestra propia tienda online (coqiuinaria.com) y las principales plataformas de Marketplace disponibles en Chile.

Con más de 12 años en el mercado Chileno, fuimos pioneros en ofrecer una propuesta integral en torno al mundo de los productos gourmet, siendo el primer Mercado Gourmet del mercado con una diferenciación de las mejores marcas del planeta, traídas de forma exclusiva para el público chileno.

Name: The Rugby Wine Club
Description:
£6 per case goes back into rugby.  Kicked off in 2021 by England legend Mike Tindall to help grassroots rugby clubs and rugby-related charities raise much needed funds simply by asking their members and friends to switch their wine buying away from the supermarket and to have some fun wine experiences...it's that simple!  Buy wines in our online shop, nominate your club/charity at checkout and we will deliver the wine to you AND the funds raised directly to your club or rugby related charity.   It really is that easy!

£6 PER CASE OF 6 BOTTLES GOES DIRECTLY TO YOUR RUGBY CLUB. YOU CAN ORDER WHATEVER WINE YOU NEED OR SET UP A SUBSCRIPTION AT www.therugbywineclub.com/shop.

We host innovative wine events and charity auctions with our partner clubs and corporates with the now infamous Van du Vin, free wine tastings, rugby stars, wine experts, competitions and touchline tastings. Our events page has details of where you can catch us next for a free tasting!  We also support club events such as dinners, lunches, balls with our wholesale proposition and signed auction items.

We partner with companies to raise funds for their nominated charities with staff offers and also to entertain their clients by hosting innovative events either in person or online with rugby stars and wine experts.

Please email jason@therugbywineclub.com to get in touch and raise funds for your club…no investment is needed, just a little of your time!

Name: Seabra Foods Supermaket
Description: Features products from Portugal, Brazil, Ecuador, Peru, Mexico, Spain and more. We specialize in the freshest products around.

Name: Noka Matcha
Description:
En 2022, je pars à l'aventure pour la première fois de ma vie à l'autre bout du monde, seule, pour prendre le temps de me recentrer sur moi-même. Un voyage mouvementé et riche d'expériences qui m'a fait grandir. Mais surtout, il a fait naître un rêve : créer ma marque de Matcha.

Une marque qui mélangerait une identité visuelle forte et pétillante à l'excellence du savoir-faire traditionnel japonais.Nōka Matcha c'est donc un rêve, une magnifique aventure, pour vous proposer une sélection de matcha d'exception à travers une marque pleine de fraîcheur.

J'ai sélectionné pour vous des matchas d'exceptions récoltés en famille, au Japon, entre Nagasaki et Kagoshima. Le terroir de ces deux régions est réputé pour l’excellence de son matcha.

C'est le savoir-faire ancestral japonais au service de votre bien-être quotidien. Découvrez une expérience gustative unique qui vous fera voyager.

Description:

Fundada en mayo de 2022, estamos comprometidos con ofrecer experiencias gastronómicas auténticas y únicas que reflejan la cultura culinaria de Corea. Nuestro menú está diseñado para satisfacer los paladares aventureros con opciones de comida tradicional coreana y platos fusionados con ingredientes locales.

Desde nuestra fundación, hemos experimentado un rápido crecimiento gracias a nuestro enfoque en la calidad de los ingredientes, la atención al detalle en la preparación y la excelencia en el servicio al cliente. Estamos comprometidos con la innovación y el aprendizaje continuo, lo que nos permite adaptarnos rápidamente a las tendencias del mercado y a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Como empresa, estamos enfocados en promover una cultura de inclusión y diversidad, donde cada miembro de nuestro equipo se sienta valorado y respetado. Valoramos la integridad, la honestidad y la ética en todas nuestras relaciones empresariales.

Estamos emocionados de continuar nuestro crecimiento y llevar la auténtica experiencia de Korean Street Food a más personas.

Name: Pakka AG
Description:
Pakka distributes high quality, organically grown and fairly traded nuts, dried fruit and chocolate. A variety of finishes, packaging solutions and sizes result in an attractive and flexible product range. The customer base includes retailers and wholesalers, the food service industry as well as private and corporate customers in Switzerland and Europe. Thanks to the Pakka Group’s various business units, which cover the entire value chain from cultivation to distribution, Pakka stands for products from guaranteed responsible sources.

Our partners and suppliers
Pakka invests a great deal of time and energy in developing and maintaining partnerships in the countries of origin of our raw materials and products. The resulting relationships and partnerships go far beyond traditional commercial contracts. Working with Pakka means a stable and, above all, higher income for the farming families who belong to the cooperatives. Smallholder farmers in particular benefit from these partnerships, as meeting daily expenses and health and safety costs is one of their biggest challenges. Through this type of collaboration, Pakka is currently helping around 20,000 families in Asia, Africa and Latin America to improve their livelihoods.
Over the past 17 years, Pakka has developed strong supplier relationships based on partnership. This enables us to reliably supply our customers in Europe with high quality, organically certified and fairly traded products.

Name: Panificadora Cepam Ltda

Hoje a Cepam é mais do que uma panificadora, é um ponto de encontro de pessoas de todas as regiões da cidade, das mais variadas classes, origens, profissões e costumes, que vão em busca de qualidade, inovação e, principalmente, respeito ao cliente. São 4 estacionamentos próprios, para garantir o conforto e a segurança que você merece! Faça uma visita e conheça uma dos mais saborosos locais de São Paulo. Esperamos você!

Name: HOAC FOODS INDIA LIMITED
Description:
Founded in 2009 by a young enthusiast couple, Ram and Gayatri, laid the small foundation of a big dream of providing high nutritional values in your kitchen. 

Since then, we worked constantly and made this dream their mission. Within a span of 12 years, they now have 4 company operating retail units, 6 Franchises, and 1 manufacturing & processing unit in Northern and Central India.

Since our inception, we always believed in providing our customers nothing but the best and this strong belief took us to new heights. Our quality consciousness helped us to pioneer in the FMCG sector and today we stand among one the top leaders in the industry.

We started our big journey with a small start. We introduced MP Desi Atta, which was rich in natural ingredients and minerals. Demand for quality produce kept on increasing and based on our market study, we decided to introduce variants like MP Sharbati and Multigrain Atta. Our customers were delighted to see the variety and customization we offered in our products.

Later on, we included 100% pure and premium quality Herbs & Spices and unpolished grains & pulses in our product range. Now we have become a preferred One-Stop destination for our valued customers for their grocery needs.

Our customer-centric approach helped us reach new heights. Today we have a strong team of 50+ members at the service of our 60K+ delighted customers. We also have a centralized contact center to process online orders and address customer grievances, if any.

Name: 02n Growth Enablers Private Limited
Description:
0-to-1 is a vertical growth process (doing new things) whereas 1-to-n is a horizontal growth process (doing things that work, better). We have the experience to navigate the challenges of both the environments. (Inspired by Peter Thiel).

Plan. Execute. Succeed.

02n is here to provide a unique platform for budding businesses in the e-commerce, Modern and General trade domains.

Ideas are important to make an impact. If you have an idea, we have the real-world experience to help you succeed. If you have passion and a great product, we help you in taking the brand where it should belong.

We provide a 360-degree approach in business building across all verticals like, Sales & Distribution, e-commerce, Branding, Customer Insights, Organisation Building, Digital Marketing.

In a way, our business model is similar to a venture capitalist with the modification that we mainly invest our knowledge and skill sets instead of capital. In exchange for equity or sales-based tie up, we form medium to long term partnerships with companies. Our deals evolve with the business, matching the offering to the company’s requirement.

Our expertise lies in consumer-focused businesses be it FMCG (Food or Personal Care), Home and Fashion.

Our founders have a combined experience of over 80 years in the FMCG, Fashion, Retail and e-commerce industries. They have held leadership positions at various organizations and have helped these businesses from inception to profitability.

Name: KİM GRUP
Description:
Kim Grup olarak bizler, perakende sektöründe bir marka olmayı, inanarak ve çok çalışarak gerçekleştirdik.Prensibimiz dürüst, çalışkan, ahlaklı ve ilkeli olmaktır. İlk kurulduğumuz 1987 yılından bu yana onlarca mağaza açmanın ve hizmet vermenin haklı gururunu yaşıyoruz.. Bizler, bugün yeni açmaya hazırlandığımız mağazalarımızda hala daha ilk günkü heyecanı yaşıyoruz. Küreselleşen dünyada ve Uluslararası rekabette kaliteden ödün vermeden çalışmanın sorumluluğunu çok iyi biliyoruz. Büyük başarılar tesadüf değildir.  Başarıların ortak özelliği; araştırma, geliştirme, kalite ve daha çok çalışmaktır. 3000 e yakın çalışanımızla istihdama katkımızın olmasından gurur duyuyoruz.

Başarımızda; girişim ruhumuz, teknoloji, kalite, yönetim kadromuz, tecrübeli çalışanlarımız, müşteri memnuniyeti, hizmet anlayışımızı sektörde bilgi ve deneyimle birleştirerek şirketimizin amaç ve kurumsal kimliğini en güzel şekilde yansıtmaktadır.

Kim Grup olarak insanlar için güven üzerine kurulu daha iyi bir hizmet kalitesi sağlamak ve ülkemizin gelişmesinde üstümüze düşen görevi yapmaktır.

Name: Chubby Group

Chubby Group is a U.S.-based food & beverage platform company transforming the dining experience through bold concepts, vertical integration, and community-driven loyalty.

With 50+ locations and 20+ brands, we’re behind renowned concepts like X Pot, Chubby Cattle BBQ, NIKU X, Chubby Skewers, Wagyu House, and Chubby Cattle Shabu — all known for immersive dining, high-quality sourcing, and operational excellence.

Name: Mariller, Pâtissier rêveur
Description:
Mariller, c’est une pâtisserie créative, joyeuse, surprenante, familiale et audacieuse. Une pâtisserie comme une fabrique à rêver, nourrie chaque matin par le savoir-faire et l’imagination du chef Clément Mariller.
 
Pour le chef et son équipe, créer des gâteaux est une fête. Dans l’atelier de production, chacun puise des émotions qui se transforment en pâtisseries, pour faire vivre des moments inoubliables aux gourmands.
Nous travaillons des produits aussi locaux que possible, au fil de quatre collections qui se suivent selon les saisons. Clément Mariller propose également des éphémères au gré de ce que la nature et ses réflexions lui murmurent à l’oreille. Toute l’année, croquez dans nos gâteaux singuliers et embarquez pour de merveilleux mondes sucrés. 

Mariller, c’est aussi une histoire familiale, dans laquelle Clément le frère invente, tandis que Pauline la sœur met toute sa détermination au service du développement de leur projet entrepreneurial. Leur ambition : répandre la joie autour d’eux, grâce à leur pâtisserie unique et inoubliable.

Nos points de vente : 

 Boutique Lyon 6ème - Foch : 1 rue de Sèze 
 Boutique Lyon 4ème - Croix Rousse : 24 place de la Croix Rousse
 Boutique Gare Part-Dieu - 69003

Name: SAIT Coop – Consorzio delle Cooperative di Consumo Trentine
Description:
SAIT Coop è il Consorzio delle Cooperative di Consumo Trentine: ci occupiamo di gestire supermercati e di fornire beni e servizi alle Famiglie Cooperative associate e ai loro punti vendita.

SAIT nasce nel 1899 da un’idea dell'ingegnere Emanuele Lanzerotti che decide di fondare una centrale di rifornimento e smistamento per riunire le Cooperative di consumo locali che gestiscono piccoli negozi al dettaglio. Oggi quell’idea si è trasformata in un gruppo di oltre 400 persone attive nei reparti Acquisti, IT, Risorse Umane, Logistica, Marketing e Vendite che gestiscono direttamente più di 20 supermercati con insegna Coop e Famiglia Cooperativa oltre al Coop Superstore di Trento.

Oggi come ieri al Consorzio spetta anche il compito di fornire beni e servizi alle Cooperative associate composte da 110.000 soci di Cooperativa, 98 Cooperative di cui 77 sul territorio trentino e 21 fuori dalla provincia con oltre 400 punti vendita.

Quel che ci distingue più di ogni altra cosa sono i valori su cui è fondato il Consorzio. I supermercati delle Cooperative sono infatti punti di riferimento, luoghi d'incontro e di relazione, presidi di socialità prima ancora che esercizio commerciale. Abbiamo a cuore le nostre comunità che sono il fondamento della nostra identità sociale: per questo ci impegniamo a farne parte per sostenerle e migliorarle, mettendo in campo iniziative economiche e di sostegno.

Al centro dei nostri progetti c’è il benessere e la cura delle persone. Perché per noi cooperare significa operare assieme, nell’attività e nei servizi, per raggiungere obiettivi comuni.

Name: Uncle Peter's Pancakes

Name: Molini Valente S.p.A.
Description:
Fondata nel 1854, Molini Valente è una realtà storica nel settore della produzione di farine di grano tenero di alta qualità. Grazie a un processo continuo di crescita e innovazione, l'azienda oggi opera con successo. Tecnologie avanzate e grandi capacità di stoccaggio garantiscono costanza qualitativa del prodotto nel tempo. La qualità e la sicurezza delle farine è garantita da un'attenta selezione delle materie prime e dai rigorosi controlli di qualità di tecnici altamente specializzati. Il raccordo ferroviario interno consente una riduzione del traffico e dell’inquinamento provocato dal trasporto su strada con grandi benefici in termini di sostenibilità ambientale. 
Molini Valente fornisce alcune delle principali industrie dolciarie, panifici industriali, il settore artigianale, pasticceria e ho.re.ca.  L’azienda è strutturata per assistere i Clienti sotto l’aspetto tecnologico e formativo su loro specifiche esigenze. 
Certificazioni aziendali: UNI EN ISO 9001 per il Sistema Qualità, UNI EN ISO 45001 per Salute e Sicurezza sul Lavoro, FSSC 22000 per la Sicurezza Alimentare, UNI EN ISO 14001 per la Gestione Ambientale, ISCC per il Sistema di Agricoltura Sostenibile e disponiamo di Certificazione KOSCHER.
Impegno, passione e continua ricerca sono i pilastri che ci guidano. Scopri di più sul nostro sito: www.molinivalente.it.

Name: ODStore
Description: ODStore è la più grande catena italiana specializzata in prodotti dolci e salati, con oltre 130 negozi in Italia, 3 in Polonia e 2 a Parigi. La sua storia inizia negli anni '90 con l'intuizione di Mauro Tiberti, che da fornaio avvia il gruppo "Sapori Artigianali". Dopo le prime aperture, il brand cresce con l'obiettivo di offrire un vasto assortimento di qualità a prezzi competitivi. Nel 2008 nasce il primo ODStore nell’Outlet Franciacorta, segnando l’inizio di un'espansione strategica nelle grandi città. Oggi i negozi, caratterizzati da un design vivace e riconoscibile, offrono un’esperienza d’acquisto unica tra prodotti freschi e confezionati dei migliori brand italiani. Con una presenza in continua crescita, ODStore è un punto di riferimento per chi cerca gusto, qualità e convenienza.

Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or simply indulging in a sweet craving, Dust has the perfect treat to sweeten your day. Experience the magic in every bite with Dust.

Each Queenam chocolate piece delivered to customers undergoes rigorous testing, selecting only the finest raw materials to achieve the highest quality. The production line is closely monitored at every stage to ensure that our products consistently satisfy consumers, from taste to packaging.

Combining traditional and modern flavors, Queenam introduces 12 varieties of chocolate coated with nutritious nuts (cashews, almonds, macadamias), ranging from the most familiar to the most unique flavors. Each bite promises an adventurous journey for the palate.
--
Vision : Elevating Vietnamese chocolate quality to the world.

Mission: Queenam is a young brand driven by the ambition to become a symbolic name in Vietnamese chocolate. Step by step, we are affirming our presence in the international market. With that foundation, Queenam aims not only to inspire aspiring Vietnamese start-ups chasing their dreams, but also to build an ideal working environment for passionate, dedicated young talents. We believe that with the companionship of the new generation, the journey to elevate Vietnamese products onto the global stage will be proudly and fully accomplished.

Description:

Name: Carlino's
Description:
The Carlino Family began to cultivate the finest fruits and vegetables and raise the healthiest game and livestock on the family farm in the sunny hills of Abruzzo, Italy over six generations ago. Many of Carlino’s Olde World recipes were developed in those kitchens and are still enjoyed today. Cured meats like prosciutto and soppresatta, sausages, sun-dried tomatoes, crusty breads, oil-cured olives, dried figs and olive oils, handmade pasta, sauces and sweets have outlasted the test of time and remain virtually unchanged.

Grandfather Pasquale came to America in the early 1900’s and was later followed by his family, including his daughter-in-law, Angela Carlino, who was known and loved as the famous “Mama Carlino”. Carlino’s opened its first family store in Ardmore, Pa., in the 1980’s offering homemade pastas, sauces and the freshest pastries and cookies. The business flourished and grew over the years to become one of the best-known specialty food stores in the Philadelphia area with two gourmet markets and a full catering service.

Today, in our third generation of ownership, Carlino’s Specialty Foods continues as purveyors of artisan cheeses, homemade desserts, signature pasta and sauces, handmade fresh bread, prepared gourmet take away foods, an authentic deli, house made sausages, hand- roasted meats, a collection of over 40 hand-selected olive oils and balsamic vinegars on tap from around the globe, gelati, an impressive selection of Italian groceries, many of which are imported exclusively by Carlino’s.

Our commitment to Olde World techniques, treasured family recipes, the finest ingredients and an enduring hospitality has not changed. Our family invites you to celebrate with us the art of cooking, the joy of family and the value of tradition…from our kitchen to yours.

O corpo humano tem cerca de 37,2 trilhões de células. Convenhamos, é muita coisa para cuidar sozinho, né?

É aí que a gente entra: uma empresa criada para te ajudar nessa missão e dar às suas células o cuidado e a atenção que elas merecem. A nossa meta vai além de aumentar a sua expectativa de vida. Queremos que cada minuto seja vivido com saúde, vitalidade e qualidade – porque essa é a nossa paixão, o nosso compromisso.

A BetterBE é muito mais do que uma empresa de tecnologia, longevidade e nutrição. Somos uma comunidade, feita de pessoas como você: que buscam uma vida mais ativa, jovem e saudável. Name: Our Cow
Description:
Our Cow is the leading and fastest-growing direct-to-consumer meat subscription company in Australia, and is redefining the future of food and farming in Australia.

Paddock to Plate - Direct to Consumers:
Offering a flexible, convenient and fully customizable home delivered meat subscription service to thousands of customers throughout Australia, sourcing the very best grass-fed and organic meat products directly from farmers. Our Cow is the link between farmers and consumers, connecting consumers to the provenance of their food, making healthy, ethical and sustainable meat products accessible to family households and stabilising pricing for hard-working farmers.

They Almost Lost Everything:
Founders Dave McGiveron & Bianca Tarrant were so excited to purchase their first farm, only to find out the hard way that farming isn’t all it’s cracked up to be. Shortly after purchasing their farm in 2017, they were faced with a series of horrific bushfires and the worst drought in Australia’s history, which all but wiped out their home and livelihood. From necessity comes invention, with their novel idea of selling their own beef on social media spawning a $15million (and growing) eCommerce business.

Supporting Aussie Farmers:
They believe the 200-year-old Australian livestock industry format is prime for change, and they’re happy to help disrupt the old practices. Working directly with over 100 top notch Aussie farmers, they pay them a higher price than the supermarkets because their produce is better, and they raise their animals ethically with respect for the environment.

Crowdfunding the Future of Food:
In 2022 Our Cow successfully raised $2.4million from thousands of Australian investors to continue the company’s extraordinary growth trajectory.

Name: 42 Maslak
Description:
42 Maslak, İstanbul’un merkezinde birbirine entegre 4 farklı konseptten (Rezidans, Yatay Ofis, Multi-Ofis, Perakende/ dükkân alanları) oluşan en kapsamlı projedir. Mimari özelliği sayesinde, 42 Maslak’taki yaşam stilleri hem iç içe geçmiş hem de incelikle birbirlerinden ayrılmış durumdadır.

Mimari tasarımı LEED Yeşil Bina Sertifikası alınması hedefiyle hazırlanan 42 Maslak, 2014 yılında Ofis 1, Ofis 2, Ofis 3, Ofis 4 blokları ile 42 Maslak Yatay Ofisleri, Türkiye'de LEED Platinum Yeşil Bina sertifikasına sahip olan ilk, dünyada ise 123. shell & core kategorisinde inşa edilen, ticari ofis ünvanını taşıyor. Buna ek olarak 42 Maslak, A Kule ve B Kule’deki rezidans ve penthouse’larıyla 2 ayrı LEED GOLD seviyesinde sertifika almayı başararak, sürdürülebilirlik konusundaki ciddiyetini bir kez daha kanıtlamıştır.

Odak noktası insan, sanat ve yaşam olan 42 Maslak, kat maliklerine ve ofis çalışanlarına renkli bir hayat sunuyor. Rezidans ve ofis sahiplerinin dinlenebileceği, kiralanabilir seminer ve toplantı odalarının bulunduğu 42 Lounge, A Kule ve B Kule’nin 25.katlarında yer alan iki ayrı sosyal tesis 42 Fitness - Pool & SPA ise bu anlayışın en güçlü tezahürlerindendir. 42 Maslak, alışveriş ve yeme-içmeye de yeni bir bakış açısı getiriyor ve hizmet noktalarında mimari açıdan gün ışığını maksimum kullanarak, gelenlerin adeta caddede alışveriş yapıyor hissini yaşayacağı bir alan sunuyor. Özenle seçilen her bir marka kendi alanında tek ve öncü olması ile biliniyor. Bu konsept ile oluşturulan 30,000 m²’lik 42 Shopping Mall; gastronomi, sanat, alışveriş ve eğlenceyi bir araya getiren benzersiz bir alışveriş ve yaşam merkezi olma vizyonuyla, Ocak 2018’den beri hizmet veriyor. 42 Shopping Mall‘de yer alan mağazalar ve Türkiye’de ilk defa geleneksel Türk yemeklerinin özgün bir konseptle aynı çatı altında toplandığı 1.800 kişilik oturma kapasitesiyle Türk Lezzet Müzesi, 42 Maslak’ın ayrışan yaşam stilinin önemli unsurlarını oluşturuyor.

Our water flows from Sebago Lake, surrounded by deep forest that acts as a natural filter. We work with Maine brewers to package mainelove in 100% recyclable cans, which helps keep our waters crisp and clean while supporting the local economy.

At the end of the day, mainelove is about more than water. It’s about community, sustainability, and love. Because even a small business in Maine can make a big difference.

Name: Sajeevan Life
Description:
Sajeevan Organics is committed to revolutionizing the sourcing and distribution model for herbs and medicinal plants in India. 

Our mission is to bring about transformative changes in the production, processing, logistics and consumption of herbs, medicinal plants and food.

Our primary focus lies in ensuring the profitability of farmers, the sustainability of crops, and the nutrition of communities. By collaborating with like-minded Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs) and Farmer Collectives, we aim to create replicable and scalable models that drive positive disruption across India. Currently, Sajeevan Organics is actively working with 60,000 farmers across 100 Farmer Producer Companies (FPCs) in Gujarat. However, our vision extends beyond a single state. We are determined to scale our operations nationwide by partnering with FPOs and Farmer Collectives from different states in India.

To achieve our goals, Sajeevan Organics will focus on the following key areas:

•	Innovative Sales and Distribution Models: We aim to build innovative sales and distribution models that cater to both B2B and B2C clientele. For B2B clients, we offer opportunities for white labelling and raw material sourcing, ensuring high-quality products for their own Ayurvedic formulations. For B2C clientele, we plan to utilize e-commerce platforms and establish physical distribution models through franchisee and entrepreneur-owned Sajeevan branded outlets across India.
•	Farmer Profitability: Sajeevan Organics is dedicated to enhancing the profitability of farmers by providing fair prices for their products and establishing long-term partnerships. 
•	Crop Sustainability: Sustainability is at the core of our operations. We encourage farmers to adopt organic farming techniques, promoting biodiversity, soil health, and ecological balance.
•	Community Nutrition: We firmly believe that access to high high-quality herbs and medicinal plants is essential for promoting community health and nutrition.

Name: Wild Idea Buffalo Co.
Description:
Wild Idea was founded in 1997 by Dan O’Brien. Through partnerships with likeminded ranchers, Indigenous communities, and conservation organizations, Wild Idea is repairing a broken ecosystem and food system by returning buffalo to the Great Plains.

We are committed to large-landscape grazing. The American bison is a keystone species of the grassland ecosystem. When buffalo are allowed to move freely across great swaths of landscape as they did for millennia, they can feed on native grasses without overgrazing. They gently disturb the earth with their hooves without damaging soil structure essential to native grasses. 

We use only humane field harvest. Just as we give our buffalo the room to roam that they require, we believe in honoring their dignity at harvest. Our humane field-harvest means we only harvest our buffalo on the prairie where they graze. They never see the inside of a trailer or a feedlot, unlike 90% of the buffalo raised for meat in the US. 

Our meat is always 100% grass-fed and grass-finished. Wild Idea’s commitment to large-landscape grazing and a humane field harvest means that our buffalo are never fed grain and are never given antibiotics or hormones. From birth to death, 365 days a year, they know only the openness of the plains and the taste of prairie grasses, free of GMOs, herbicides, and pesticides.  And because they are never subjected to the stress of transport and confinement, their meat is unaffected by a surge of stress hormones. 

The health of our planet depends on changing the way we feed ourselves. A food system that relies on chemical intervention, monocropping, and animal confinement is a broken one. We believe in empowering people to make better choices about their food, and we provide meat that not only unparalleled in taste but truly nourishing—for people and for the planet. And that impact reaches beyond the buffalo and the grasses of the Great Plains, to strengthen the connection between us and all living things.

Le chocolat qui change des vies.

Name: Nasmati Trading Company
Description: تأسست شركة نسمتي برؤية واضحة ترتكز على الجودة والتميز لبناء علامة تجارية ذات ثقة عالية. نسعى لتقديم منتجات غذائية طبيعية وصحية وآمنة، ملتزمين بأعلى معايير الجودة العالمية لدعم عادات الغذاء الصحية وإحداث تغيير إيجابي في حياة الأفراد. على مدى السنوات الماضية، نجحنا في كسب ثقة عملائنا والتوسع في جميع أنحاء المملكة، مع نسمتي، صحتك تلتقي بالجودة.

Name: Peak Moods
Description:
PEAK Moods is a future wellness brand defining a new category of ready to drink beverages.

From energy drinks and alcohol to coffee and cannabis, we all look for something to shift our mood, day or night. But with 50% of Gen Z battling daily anxiety, PEAK has created a new way to feel good without the downsides.

Mood Drinks enhance your mood by naturally increasing the production of 'feel-good' chemicals in your brain: dopamine and serotonin. PEAK Mood Drinks allow you to shift your mind-state to whatever your day demands by choosing your mood; Hype or Calm.

Built by creatives, for creatives, the company supports emerging talent and includes renowned UK artists Reuben Dangoor and Slawn. Recently launched with their flagship store on Portobello Road, PEAK is now available exclusively in corner stores throughout London.

Over the next 5 years PEAK aims to become the global leader of the mood drinks category on their mission of bringing wellness to youth culture.

Name: Richkey Spot
Description:
Discover a world of wholesome goodness
Explore the finest selection of natural products, carefully curated to bring flavor, wellness, and quality to your everyday life. From aromatic teas and rich spices to nutritious nuts and seeds, find everything you need for a balanced, flavorful journey.

Name: Da Nord a Food
Description:
Da Nord a Food crea esperienze enogastronomiche italiane uniche, grazie alle valigette gourmet personalizzabili, contenenti le migliori eccellenze agroalimentari regionali. Combiniamo la qualità artigianale con il design innovativo e la sostenibilità, offrendo un regalo aziendale che va oltre le aspettative.

Cosa facciamo:

Selezioniamo i migliori prodotti provenienti da piccole realtà locali italiane, che vanno dalle Dolomiti alla Sicilia, per offrirti una vera e propria esperienza gastronomica. Le nostre valigette gourmet sono un viaggio sensoriale tra i sapori più autentici d’Italia.

Come lo facciamo:

Le nostre valigette sono personalizzabili con il logo aziendale e sono ideali per eventi, regali aziendali, o semplicemente per sorprendere chi ami. Ogni prodotto è scelto personalmente per garantire la massima qualità e freschezza, con un packaging esclusivo, realizzato in cartone riciclato.

Perché scegliere Da Nord a Food:

- Qualità Artigianale: Selezioniamo solo il meglio delle produzioni locali, da piccoli produttori che raccontano storie di passione e tradizione.

- Personalizzazione: Ogni valigetta è unica, personalizzabile con il logo aziendale o i tuoi colori, per un tocco esclusivo e personalizzato.

- Convenienza Fiscale: Deducibile al 100%, rendendo il regalo non solo esclusivo, ma anche conveniente per la tua azienda.

- Sostenibilità e Innovazione: Il nostro packaging è realizzato in cartone riciclato, unendo tradizione e innovazione nel rispetto dell’ambiente.

Contattaci:

Scopri di più e crea il regalo perfetto per la tua azienda su www.danordafood.it

Name: IG WINES
Description: IG Wines is a modern fine wine merchant whose expert team are dedicated to providing an ultra-personalised service to our clients. By taking a wine-driven, people-focused approach, our knowledgeable team leverage their deep expertise of the fine wine and cask whisky industry to deliver tailored guidance to help clients build strategic collections and cellars. Our bespoke managed portfolio services are catered to each individual client’s needs and are accompanied by our comprehensive storage solutions. We are committed to transparency and accessibility, and therefore offer our clients exclusive access to incredible allocations, new releases, and unique wine experiences without imposing restrictive spending requirements or management fees.

Name: Bonefrog Coffee Company
Description: Bonefrog Coffees Company was founded in 2019 by Tim Cruickshank after serving 25 years in the US Navy. This company is a tribute to his teammates, who lost their lives defending our freedom and American way of life. This company honors their memories and gives back to the foundations that support the Naval Special Warfare community. We hope you join us in honoring the memories of these great Americans!

Name: Yroyak Supermercados
Description:
No ano de 1995, começava a história do Varejão, fruto de um olhar empreendedor do fundador da empresa, Francisco Hiroiaque, e com ajuda dos seus familiares.
Como produto do amadurecimento da empresa o VAREJÃO passou a viver um novo momento a partir de 24 de novembro de 2017, em que passa-se a se chamar YROYAK SUPERMERCADOS.
O que antes era uma simples e acolhedora loja de hortifruti, transformou-se em duas grandes lojas.
Suas duas lojas estão situadas nos bairros Vieiralves e Ponta Negra, que empregam mais de 230 colaboradores, beneficiando assim muitas famílias. 
Em meados de 2022, iremos inaugurar mais um novo projeto, uma nova loja, que será situada na Avenida Mário Ypiranga, n°1600, bairro Adrianópolis. Uma grande nova loja com mais 1.000 m2 que trará mais conforto e comodidade aos nossos clientes além de ser um espaço para que outros empreendimentos possam também expor seus produtos e serviços.
Desde o seu nascimento, até os dias de hoje, a empresa vem se reinventando, mantendo o foco em sua Missão: “Atuar no mercado de varejo de supermercados oferecendo aos seus clientes comodidade, agilidade, mix de produtos de boa qualidade, com um atendimento humanizado”. E tem como Propósito é criar uma experiência de compra prazerosa e com acolhimento e confiança.
Sua nova marca surge agregando nossos Valores: “Respeito, Postura Empreendedora, Humor e Alegria, Honestidade e Espírito de Equipe”.  
O Yroyak Supermercados se orgulha da sua trajetória trilhada até o momento, buscando oferecer serviços e produtos de qualidade aos seus clientes e se tornando uma marca com a cara de Manaus.

Name: Feisty
Description:
Meet Feisty: the world’s first plant-powered protein soda.

Hate chalky protein shakes? Imagine if your favourite fruity soda had the protein of 2 eggs (no friggin’ whey). Founded by a scientist mother–daughter team, Feisty is fizzing up the $30B protein RTD industry with the world’s first soda powered by complete plant-based protein and a patent-pending formula. Just like a soda, clear, refreshing, and made for everyone (not just gym bros). Top up your protein whenever, wherever. 

 What makes us different:
• First to market with protein soda, the next wave in better-for-you soda
• Scientist-backed, developed in-house with years of R&D
• Patent-pending formula ensuring clarity, stability & taste
• Clean label: complete plant-based protein, allergen-free, no added sugar, low calorie, caffeine free.

Founded in 2024, Feisty is available in leading UK retailers including Selfridges, Harrods, Whole Foods Market, Soho House, and many more.

Name: Buenos Aires Bakery
Description:
Con una trayectoria que nos respalda desde 2008, Buenos Aires Bakery cuenta con una cadena de 40 sucursales ubicados en la Ciudad de Buenos Aires y el Gran Buenos Aires, cada uno con una atmósfera cálida y acogedora que combina los sabores clásicos con deliciosas innovaciones.

Buscamos crear experiencias memorables a través de cada uno de nuestros más de 200 productos, que incluyen, desde panes recién horneados y facturas, hasta el tradicional chipá, sándwiches de miga y otras delicias argentinas como tortas, tartas, budines y galletitas, además de opciones de almuerzo, cafetería y servicios de catering para eventos y empresas.

La calidad comienza con la selección de ingredientes y continúa con la atención de nuestro personal, siempre listo para recibirte con una sonrisa.

Buenos Aires Bakery sigue creciendo gracias a un modelo de negocio sólido basado en franquicias, ofreciendo una oportunidad única para aquellos emprendedores que deseen llevar la tradición panadera a nuevos destinos.

Nos llena de orgullo honrar el legado cultural de la panificación argentina, preservando las recetas de siempre e innovando para deleitar al paladar moderno. Buscamos la excelencia diaria para nuestros clientes y colaboradores.

Visitanos y sé parte de una historia de pasión, calidad y comunidad.

Name: Duck Donuts EG
Description:
Duck Donuts has enjoyed tremendous success
and has built a strong following over the past 14 years
with our “Warm, Delicious & Made-to-Order” concept.
Duck Donuts first opened in Duck and Kitty Hawk, NC on the Outer Banks in the
United States. What started as a fun concept has now turned into a world
known, award-winning brand and a product that has everyone smiling!

Name: Supermercados Guarapari
Description:
A rede de Supermercados Guarapari é uma empresa do ramo supermercadista iniciada em 1983, na cidade de Viamão - RS.
Hoje, com operações nas cidades gaúchas de Porto Alegre, Viamão e Alvorada, a empresa busca atender seus clientes com qualidade e preços competitivos.

Name: BottlesXO
Description:
BottlesXO disrupts the value chain of the beverage industry by offering an on-demand, ready-to-drink, and mobile-first solution and by vertically connecting consumers with quality producers of quality wine, craft beers and premium spirits.

Our service is currently available in Shanghai and Mainland China.

We deliver chilled bottles ready-to-drink and selected gourmet food in an average delivery time of 30 minutes. Our selection offers a range of boutique wines, craft beers and artisanal spirits. These are bottles you can trust: delicious, crafted and never mass-produced, plus carefully curated to make your choice effortless.

We take the time to get to know each producer behind our bottles, so we can select only the finest products and offer them at competitive prices. All the people behind our selection are passionate in their craft, mindful of their environment and have an awesome story to tell.

Our cutting-edge app means that ordering is simple. Customers can follow their order with GPS tracking, access exclusive flash sales and promotions, and even find food-pairing suggestions for your bottles. We combine our tech-savvy operations with a people-to-people approach, fostering community and connecting drinkers directly to our producers. 

Find our app on your mobile store (iOS & Android) by searching for BottlesXO and start your experience!

Name: Zing Bars
Description: Unlike any bar on the mIntroducing Zing Bars – the ultimate snack bar crafted by Professional Nutritionists for your family's well-being. Unlike other bars on the market, Zing Bars are plant-based, utilizing a unique protein blend of almonds and rice protein. Packed with heart-healthy fats from nuts and nut butters, Zing Bars are Certified Gluten-Free & Wheat-Free, Non-GMO, Soy-Free, Vegan, and Kosher.

Name: THE CO.
Description:
THE CO.; kahve, topluluk ve konforu bir araya getirerek kahve sektöründe yeni bir soluk yaratma amacıyla yola çıktı. Bugün, 20’den fazla şubemizle kahveyi sevenleriyle buluşturmaya devam ediyoruz.

Kahvemizi doğrudan çiftçilerden temin ediyor, kendi kavurma tesisimizde özenle hazırlıyoruz. Sürdürülebilir tarımı, geri dönüşümü ve topluluk oluşturan her teması destekliyor; baristalarımızı da kendimiz yetiştiriyoruz.

Bulunduğumuz şehirlerde yalnızca iyi kahve değil, aynı zamanda konforlu bir ortam ve paylaşılmaya değer bir kültür sunuyoruz.

Name: FinX Commune
Description:
FinX Commune is a café and a home for traders, finance enthusiasts, and coffee lovers.

Located at Kemps Corner, Mumbai, we bring together thoughtfully brewed coffee, freshly prepared 100% pure vegetarian food, and a calm, work friendly environment designed for real conversations and focused time.

With live market screens, comfortable seating, and relaxed corners, FinX Commune supports productivity without pressure. Whether it’s market discussions, client meetings, solo work sessions, or a quiet pause between trades, the space adapts to your rhythm.

At our core, we believe in comfort, consistency, and community.
Because the best ideas, conversations, and connections often begin over a cup of coffee.

 Kemps Corner, Mumbai
 Coffee |  Markets |  Community

Name: Biscoitos Zezé
Description:
Carinho que vem de família!

Fundada em 1.968, nossa empresa é a combinação de DNA familiar e olhar para o futuro.  Atualmente, contamos com mais de 50 produtos no portfólio, comercializados para todo o Brasil e também para o Uruguai.

Name: Anmasa
Description:
Anmasa: Eat Better

Anmasa is a D2C omnichannel grocery startup on a mission to make pure, freshly milled staples the everyday choice for every household. We are not building a commodity. We are building a daily ritual people can trust.

Founded in 2024 by Yatish Talvadia (Founder & CEO of Milkbasket, acquired by Reliance Retail) and Shailendra Upadhyay (Founder of Veggie India, acquired by Milkbasket in 2019), Anmasa has raised $1.1 million in pre-seed funding from Snow Leopard Technology Ventures, Veltis Capital, Blume Ventures, Indigram Labs, and a group of angel investors.

At Anmasa, our goal is to restore transparency and trust in food through experiential stores featuring live milling. Our mills are custom designed for natural, slow stone grinding at 50 rotations per minute (RPM). The process is slow enough to retain maximum micronutrients and flavour in the flour.

We believe people should never have to compromise freshness for convenience. That is why we began offline with our first experience store in Gurgaon, where customers can see, taste, and believe what true freshness means.

Our flours, including MP premium, khapli, sharbati, and multigrain, are milled only after customers place an order. They can get them delivered within 90 minutes or visit one of our experience stores to watch them being milled live.

Today, Anmasa serves households across Gurgaon, Noida, and Ghaziabad. With 10 stores already operating across NCR, we are expanding quickly to bring freshness closer to more families. Along with atta, we now offer freshly ground spices, wood-pressed oils, and dry fruits, all minimally processed to preserve nutrients.

Freshness starts here → about.anmasa.com
Find your nearest store → store.anmasa.com

Name: KUDO
Description: Kudo Snacks is an innovative snack brand providing tasty, delicious, and nutritious protein popcorn. Try all three flavors now at www.kudosnacks.com

Name: Langkah Kecil (MOI)
Description:
Big changes start with #LangkahKecil (Small Steps).

Langkah Kecil is home for those who believe: every step matters.

We nurture over 70 outlets and 4 growing brands — Salad MOI, Hola Jus, KopiBuah, and EatFit — across Java, Bali, and Sumatra. Many are led by women, bringing heart, character, and passion into every step.

We build growth with purpose: 16 clear career paths, peer-to-peer internal learning, and even fully sponsored international experiences. This is not just about job titles, but about the courage to grow together.

At Langkah Kecil, appreciation means action: above-average wages, profit-linked bonuses, insurance, and healthcare — rewards worthy of those who contribute.

Our workplace is a warm ecosystem: a private gym, aviary, mini zoo, rice field views, and weekly gatherings. These moments fuel energy and belonging.

Together, these #LangkahKecil (Small Steps) shape a healthier, stronger, and happier future. 

"Langkah Kecil is the shared identity in F&B, distribution, HR, logistics, and innovation. All employment and legal contracts are carried out through the respective legal entities."

Name: Agrari
Description:
Agrari is an e-commerce of fresh food directly from the farmer with quick delivery. 

What makes us different?

 Direct from the farmer: we cut out the middlemen in the supply chain, which allows us to offer products with a price up to 40% cheaper than in the supermarket, while our farmers receive a decent payment for their work - up to 7 times more than with a traditional middleman.

 Quick delivery: in less than 24h, you receive your order at home with fresh products, straight from the field.

 Quality and taste: at Agrari, the products are harvested at their optimum point, preserving the typical freshness of the Valencian "huerta".

Support local consumption, eat tasty products and experience the Agrari effect! 
 Visit the store: agrari.es

Translated with www.DeepL.com/Translator (free version)

Name: Dea Bakery
Description: Dea Bakery adalah Perusahaan berkembang yang bergerak dibidang produksi dan retail produk roti, cake dan tart. Dan saat ini telah memiliki 32 Outlet yang tersebar di seluruh Indonesia

Name: Power Fix Solutions
Description:
At Power Fix Solutions, we believe that convenience is more than a luxury—it’s a necessity. That’s why we specialize in delivering fully-managed, customizable micro markets and vending solutions that bring wellness and simplicity to the forefront of workplaces, government agencies, law enforcement departments, and residential communities.

Our journey began with a simple idea: to make healthier choices more accessible, no matter the setting. From round-the-clock snack options in high-stress environments to thoughtfully curated essentials in luxury apartment complexes, we’re here to redefine how convenience can enhance daily life.

We know that no two locations are the same. That’s why every micro market we create is designed to meet the unique needs of our clients. Whether it’s ensuring law enforcement officers have access to energy-boosting snacks during long shifts or giving residents in multi-family developments 24/7 access to fresh, high-quality products, we’re all about finding the perfect fit.

And the best part? We handle it all. From installation to stocking and maintenance, our turnkey service model ensures you can focus on your mission while we take care of everything behind the scenes.

We’re proud to support local vendors to provide fresh, organic, and sustainable products. By collaborating with partners who share our values, we’re not just offering convenience—we’re making an impact on the communities we serve.

For us, it’s about more than snacks and beverages. It’s about improving lives. By promoting healthier lifestyle choices, we help businesses and communities boost productivity, morale, and overall satisfaction.

And because giving back matters to us, a portion of our profits are donated, reinforcing our commitment to making a difference.

Whether you’re looking to upgrade your workplace wellness, enhance resident satisfaction, or streamline access to essentials, we’re here to help. At Power Fix Solutions, we make convenience a priority.

Name: HOP - Fuel Your Future

Name: Biofood
Description: Our vision is to contribute to the well-being of people and our planet. Our mission is to offer a wide range of organic, natural, and sustainable products of the highest quality in nutrition and skincare—accessible to everyone. To leave a green footprint, we collaborate with the best suppliers locally and globally. We make it simple, enjoyable, and meaningful to discover and choose our products. We bring out the love for food that tastes good and does good! Choose our organic and natural foods to live in harmony with yourself and the world—not just for now, but for the future. Eat good – feel fine!

Name: Supermercados Alvorada
Description: Empresa do ramo de supermercados, sempre atendendo nossos clientes com uma variedade de produtos, prezando sempre a qualidade e o atendimento.

Name: Mambalam Iyers
Description:
Mambalam Iyers, was launched in the year 2008, with a mission to provide traditional and authentic South Indian food specialities, a variety of Pickles and Ready Mix products. Today, Mambalam lyers has become a household name in the whole of South India.

The secret authentic grandmothers recipes, combined with elaborate traditional preparation methods have become the hallmark of Mambalam lyers products. Mambalam lyers brings to you a wide range of product categories. Squash, Health Mix, Appalam, Special Mixes and Masala powders in addition to Pickles and Rice Mix pastes, making it convenient for the new generation to relish and remember the taste of home made traditional food. Prepared with high quality spices, pulses and carefully chosen ingredients, Mambalam Iyers rice mixes and pickles are made with 100% Gingelly Oil.

All products are 100% vegetarian and manufactured under hygienic conditions with strict quality standards. The products undergo testing on a regular basis at our Labs and conform to the FSSAI norms. Mambalam Iyers stands for unique taste, which can only be compared with mother's love, sure to win many many hearts.

Mambalam lyers will provide consistent quality and taste of our native food preparations that will be loved by one-and-all and deliver tasty, healthy and nutritious Indian Traditional Food.

We Celebrate Food. Enjoy it. Bon Apetit!

Name: RoyalPOS
Description:
RoyalPOS - Complete Point of Sale Solutions for Restaurant and Retail Business!

Name: Supermercados Pessotto
Description:
Somos os Supermercados Pessotto, uma rede dedicada a oferecer qualidade e variedade de produtos para atender às necessidades de nossos clientes. Com várias unidades em Fernandópolis e Estrela D'Oeste, temos o compromisso de proporcionar uma experiência de compra positiva, pautada em atendimento diferenciado, ética e credibilidade.

Em nossas prateleiras, você encontrará uma ampla seleção de alimentos frescos, produtos de higiene pessoal, limpeza e muito mais. Nossa missão é trabalhar com excelência, oferecendo não apenas itens essenciais do dia a dia, mas também um ambiente acolhedor que promove o conforto de nossos clientes.

Além disso, buscamos atender às demandas modernas, oferecendo serviços como delivery para garantir praticidade e segurança para sua família. Você pode fazer suas compras sem sair de casa, incluindo a entrega de gás de cozinha.

Estamos comprometidos com o crescimento de nossa equipe, proporcionando oportunidades de desenvolvimento profissional para nossos colaboradores. Afinal, acreditamos que nosso sucesso está diretamente ligado ao sucesso e satisfação de nossa equipe e clientes.

Na Rede Pessotto, nossa visão é expandir e consolidar nossa posição como a melhor escolha para compras de supermercado, mantendo nosso compromisso com preços justos, bom atendimento e qualidade superior. Nosso foco contínuo é superar as expectativas de nossos clientes, proporcionando uma experiência única a cada visita.

Seja para suas compras diárias ou ocasiões especiais, os Supermercados Pessotto estão aqui para atendê-lo com dedicação, oferecendo a qualidade e variedade que você merece. Junte-se a nós nessa jornada de proporcionar conforto e satisfação para sua família e comunidade.

Name: House of Negroni
Description: The House of Negroni connects Negroni lovers all across the world through exceptional experiences.

Name: La Panetière
Description:
C’est en 1936, qu’est né notre pain au goût inimitable. Le grand-père, Fernand Moly, artisan boulanger dans le petit village aveyronnais de Drulhe créa ce pain dont la réputation s’exporta rapidement au-delà des frontières de la commune, puis du département. 

Fort de cet héritage, la famille Moly s’investit en 1971, dans la création d’une unité de production plus moderne à Villefranche-de-Rouergue. 
De cette union entre tradition et modernité, est né un succès inégalé à travers une large gamme de produits, fruit du savoir-faire de nos collaborateurs qui perpétuent l’histoire de la famille de boulangers.

Aujourd'hui, avec plus de 200 points de vente, La Panetière & Secrets de Pains vous accueillent dans un univers où la tradition côtoie le plaisir et la qualité. En centre-ville, en périphérie ou en zones commerciales, nos boutiques traditionnelles sont des lieux de convivialité où la restauration boulangère prend tout son sens.

Chez La Panetière, notre engagement est de vous offrir une expérience authentique, empreinte de passion et de qualité, où chaque bouchée raconte une histoire riche en saveurs et en émotions. 
Bienvenue dans notre univers, où le pain est une véritable tradition familiale. 

Groupe OCCIPAIN
