Name: Oliver's Wines
Description:
Today, with eCommerce thriving and self-checkouts taking over, our wine journey and buying experience is as impersonal and transactional as ever. Oliver’s Wines was created to restore this hyper-personal buying experience for wine lovers everywhere, no matter what age or what stage of their journey they’re on.

Through the knowledge and data that’s been collected over the years, as well as Jeremy Oliver's experience in guiding people through their wine discovery journey, Oliver’s Wines is introducing the world’s finest and most personal wine recommendation software.

Curate a wine collection that you're guaranteed to love and get it delivered straight to your door.

Name: QahwaBLK | قهوة بلاك
Description:
In 2019, we started QahwaBLK with a simple yet bold question? Could we consistently deliver an exceptional cup of coffee with a great experience without the hefty price tag or the intimidating atmosphere?

This question became our mission, leading us to create a space where everyone feels welcome. Our approach strips away the complexities, focusing on quality coffee and genuine interactions. It's not just our baristas who make QahwaBLK special; it's the culture they embody and share with every customer. By marrying straightforward marketing with our team's passion, we've turned every visit into an opportunity for connection, making QahwaBLK a place where coffee lovers gather, not just for the beverage but for the experience that comes with it.

Name: Plaay

At Plaay, we blend wholesome indulgence with playful energy, redefining what it means to snack smart. Founded by nutritionist Rashi Chowdhary, Plaay brings you 100% clean & highly indulgent chocolates and snacks that satisfy cravings without compromise.

Based in Dubai, Plaay creates indulgent, mindful snacks that balance flavour with wellness—perfect for those who crave something sweet without the sugar crash. Whether you need a quick pick-me-up or a moment to savour, Plaay delivers a unique snacking experience with 100% clean ingredients.

Everything is made in-house at our Dubai factory, where innovation meets indulgence. Join us in building a world of guilt-free indulgence and be part of the Plaay family as we craft moments of indulgence that fuel your day, mind, and body.

Name: KERO Hipermercado

Name: Grupo Verona
OKAM
Description:
Established in 1979 as a result of a joint venture between two major groups in the Middle East: The Omar Kassem Alesayi group and HSA - The Hayel Saeed Anam group of companies (Frimex Investment).
Established as a food division company with an unwavering vision to become the leading food distribution company in Saudi Arabia, and one of the largest in the Middle East.

Over the 45 years, OKAM became one of the major importers and distributors of branded and quality products in several food categories, with aggressive plans for further expansion and diversifying the current portfolio.

Today OKAM, with over 500 employees, is one of the leading FMCG Marketing & Distribution companies in Saudi Arabia.

Our Product Categories Include: Rice | Tuna | Canned Beans | Sterilized Cream | Olive Oil | Olives | Honey 

تأسست شركة اوكام عام 1979 نتيجة شراكة بين مجموعتين رائدتين في الشرق الأوسط: مجموعة عمر قاسم العيسائي ومجموعة هائل سعيد أنعم ( شركة فريمكس للاستثمار).

انطلقت كشركة متخصصة في قطاع الأغذية، برؤية ثابتة لتصبح الشركة الرائدة في توزيع المواد الغذائية في المملكة العربية السعودية، وواحدة من أكبر الشركات في الشرق الأوسط.

على مدى 45 عامًا، أصبحت شركة اوكام من أكبر مستوردي وموزعي المنتجات ذات العلامات التجارية والجودة العالمية في العديد من فئات الأغذية، مع خطط طموحة للتوسع وتنوع محفظتها الحالية.

اليوم، تضم شركة اوكام أكثر من 500 موظف، وتعد واحدة من الشركات الرائدة في تسويق وتوزيع السلع الاستهلاكية في المملكة العربية السعودية.

تشمل فئات منتجات اوكام : الأرز | التونا | البقوليات المعلبة | القشطة  | زيت زيتون | زيتون | العسل

Name: SuperYou
Description:
Welcome to SUPERYOU, where science meets snacking.

We’re the first brand to introduce fermented yeast protein to India. It’s as effective as whey, better than plant protein, and designed to fuel every you—snackers, movers, shakers, and game-changers alike.
With 10g of clean protein in every bite, we’re reimagining what protein can be—smarter, tastier, and accessible for all. No chalky aftertaste, no compromises, no added sugar and 3g of fiber. 

Ready to taste the revolution? Let’s keep it super.

Name: Independent Brands Australia
Description:
The Independent Brands Australia (IBA) network is home to a number of successful national brands such as Cellarbrations, The Bottle-O, IGA Liquor, Porters Liquor and Thirsty Camel. The IBA retail network consists of more than 1,800 tier one bannered stores across Australia and New Zealand.

We support IBA bannered retailers through a framework that offers national buying power, marketing support, shopper-focused promotional programs and network investment to provide ‘The Best Store in Their Town’.

Our IBA network is well positioned to meet current shopper trends with local and convenient store locations, tailored ranges and marketing programs.

Name: Zachys Wine & Liquor
Description:
Zachys is a fourth-generation family-owned business with a rich history dating back almost eight decades. Founded by Zachy Zacharia in 1944, Zachys has evolved from a corner liquor store into a renowned destination for fine wine and spirits and an internationally recognized auction powerhouse. 

Our mission is to offer unique experiences and access opportunities to our clients. In the 1970s, we were the first U.S. retailer to sell Bordeaux Futures. In the 1990s, we were among the first in the industry to launch a website. In the mid-1990s, we played a pivotal role in introducing wine auctions to New York, transforming these events into social gatherings where clients could acquire rare bottles while enjoying great company. 

Today, Zachys offers a comprehensive suite of services encompassing Retail, Storage, and Auction, expertly guiding clients through an extraordinary journey from discovery to curation, and even to consignment.

With four generations of the Zacharia family and a dedicated team, we've evolved from a local shop in Scarsdale, NY, into the institution we are today. Our commitment to our clients’ complete satisfaction and delivering exclusive discoveries and unforgettable experiences remains unwavering. We invite you to join us on this incredible journey.

Name: Elavate Superfoods
Description:
Founded in 2023, Elavate Superfoods is on a mission to help women achieve their skin health & wellness goals, through science-backed superfood products. Elavate was built from our founder's (Alex Philip) personal experience. After witnessing his mother's frustration with overpriced, ineffective, and unpalatable collagen supplements, he set out to create something extraordinary: a collagen supplement that actually worked, tasted great, and remained affordable.

Today, that mission has transformed into the UK's fastest-growing Collagen brand. In just our first year, we've helped over 20,000 women regain their confidence and vitality.

We're based in London, UK and we're actively seeking exceptional talent to join us in scaling Elavate to 9 figures in revenue. If you're an ambitious high-performer and want to be part of the UK's next biggest supplement brand, we'd love to connect and explore how you could help shape our future.

Name: FoodHealth Score
Description:
Home of the FoodHealth Score.
One score to make nutrition simple.

About FoodHealth Company
FoodHealth Co. is a nutrition intelligence company revolutionizing how we understand and access healthy food. Through its personalized FoodHealth Score, the company provides data tools that help consumers make better choices, retailers curate smarter shelves, and brands design with health in mind. Formerly known as bitewell, the company is headquartered in San Francisco.

Name: FoodHealth Company
Description:
Home of the FoodHealth Score.
One score to make nutrition simple.

About FoodHealth Company
FoodHealth Co. is a nutrition intelligence company revolutionizing how we understand and access healthy food. Through its personalized FoodHealth Score, the company provides data tools that help consumers make better choices, retailers curate smarter shelves, and brands design with health in mind. Formerly known as bitewell, the company is headquartered in San Francisco.

Name: Epicure
Description:
Epicure is Canada’s go-to brand for simple and healthy meals. Epicure’s clean, gluten and allergen free meal kits, seasonings and dips are loved by millions. Epicure’s innovation and customer-focused approach has allowed the company to achieve an industry leading Net Promoter Score of 91. 

Epicure is back!

We can't wait to join you at your table.

The Epicure Team

Name: Culligan UK
Description:
Culligan UK delivers innovative, high-quality water solutions to homes and businesses across the United Kingdom.

Our solutions include:
- Bottled and Mains-Fed Watercoolers
- Hospitality water systems
- Multi-functional taps
- Water softeners and filtration systems
- Customised water refill stations and drinking fountains for public, offices, and commercial spaces

Driven by a mission to provide better, sustainable drinking water for everyone — at home, at work, or on the go, we're helping customers reduce reliance on single-use plastic and enjoy great-tasting, high-quality water every day. 

Part of Culligan International, a global leader in water treatment for more than 85 years, we combine local expertise with world-class technology to meet a wide range of hydration needs.

Name: Beauty In
Description:
beauty´in é a primeira empresa do mundo a lançar produtos aliméticos, alimentos com ativos que garantem propriedades cosméticas e de bem estar. Idealizada por Cristiana Arcangeli, tem como investidor o BTG Pactual, um dos maiores grupos financeiros do país. 

A marca, que foi lançada em 2010, conta com 4 linhas de produtos: beautydrink, em oito versões, beautycandy, em quatro versões, beautybar, em quatro versões, e beautydrink de preparo instantâneo, também em quatro versões. Os produtos contêm vitaminas, minerais, colágeno e compostos bioativos extraídos de frutas orgânicas com funcionalidade cosmética e de bem estar, que ajudam na saúde, beleza e na disposição e bom humor. 

beauty´in já recebeu diversos prêmios de inovação e design e conta com todo o know how de Cristiana Arcangeli, empresária pioneira no segmento de cosméticos e bem estar. 

beauty´in faz bem por dentro e cuida por fora.

Name: BERO
Description: BERO is a premium non-alcoholic beer created by Tom Holland.

Name: Farmers Fresh Zone
Description: Farmers Fresh Zone is leading consumer Brand for safe and fresh Fruits and Vegetables which are grown locally, We want to improve peoples health by providing real safe food that they can trust through a traceable food chain.

Name: Business Of Food
Description:
𝐀 𝐆𝐨-𝐓𝐨 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐞 𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐈𝐧-𝐃𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐡 𝐂𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞 & 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐜 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬 
- 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐂𝐗𝐎𝐬 & 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐃𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬 
- 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐞 𝐅𝐨𝐨𝐝 & 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞: 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭 𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐬, 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐛𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐓𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐧𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐲 & 𝐈𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐜 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, 𝐂𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩

Name: Altaawon
Description: شركة التعاون هي من كبرى الشركات في جمهورية العراق، من حيث النشاط الاقتصادي والاستثمارات المتنوعة والتبادل التجاري، وهي الشركة الرئيسية التي تدار من خلالها كافة اعمال الشركات التابعة لها من قبل مالكها ومجلس الإدارة فيها و بإسهام ما يقارب ( 5000 موظف ) في العراق وخارجه ، وفي كافة الاستثمارات والقطاعات التي تساند من خلالها الأداء الحكومي بالتوافق مع المعايير الاجتماعية ، وتعتبر أول شركة قابضة أسست في العراق

Name: Holi Supermercado
Description:
En Supermercados Holi creemos que hacer las compras debería sentirse tan bien como compartir un buen momento. Por eso, no solo vendemos productos: construimos experiencias pensadas para nuestros clientes, colaboradores y aliados.

Con presencia en Lima y en constante crecimiento —ya con 7 tiendas abiertas— nos hemos convertido en un supermercado que apuesta por la innovación, la frescura y la cercanía. Nuestra misión es transformar la manera en la que se vive el retail, ofreciendo más que precios competitivos: un lugar donde la comunidad siempre es lo primero.

Somos Holi: un supermercado que crece contigo, que escucha, que sorprende y que siempre busca marcar la diferencia.

Name: BODEBOCA
Description:
BODEBOCA (www.bodeboca.com) es la plataforma líder en España en la venta online de vino.

Fundada en 2010 por los emprendedores Greg Bulckaert y Nathanaël Berbessou y adquirida en 2019 por el grupo Pernod Ricard, tiene la mayor comunidad online de aficionados al vino en España.

Actualmente cuenta con más de dos millones de usuarios registrados y más de 200.000 opiniones de compradores, lo que la convierte en la mayor comunidad de aficionados al vino en España.

 BODEBOCA comercializa vinos de 1.500 bodegas entre las más prestigiosas del país y tiene un catálogo de más de 9.000 vinos y 1.000 destilados seleccionados de todo el mundo.

Name: Graviss Good Foods
Description:
Graviss Good Foods, a part of The Graviss Group (www.gravissgroup.com), was born with a simple mission; to make everyone’s food-lives diverse, exciting and fulfilling, no matter how they choose to eat. 

In a world of fun and tempting foods, "healthy eating” often becomes a serious, boring and narrowly-defined choice. However, At GGF we strongly believe that eating with joy is essential to eating better. That's why we're obsessed with creating enjoyable food experiences for everyone, regardless of their health journeys or preferences.

In alignment with our mission, we launched The Brooklyn Creamery’s range of low calorie, no added sugar treats in early 2020 and most recently launched the second brand under the Graviss Good Foods Umbrella – Plantaway. 3 years since launch, our products can be found in over 7 countries including The United Arab Emirates, The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, India, The Maldives & more which supports our vision of becoming a multi-brand, multi-category FMCG company focused on the better-for-you food & beverage market across the globe.

Name: NutriTap
Description:
Nutritap is a retail-tech company providing 24X7, neighbourhood retail to customers through patented, IoT based retail kiosks. Nutritap is creating alternate retail channels for brand to reach their customers directly. 

NutriTap brings retail products on tap through state of the art automated retail machines. Our mission is to make 24X7 neighbourhood retail accessible to consumers. Through our innovative, tech-driven and anywhere-anytime automated retailing machines, we bring FMCG retail at an arm's length of customers.

Name: Singarea Foodstuff Trading LLC
Description: Asian foodstuffs importers and exporters since 1980 from Kuwait. Singarea UAE established in 2012.

Name: HAJAR DELIGHTS
Description:
HAJAR DELIGHTS is a Saudi Al-Ahsa brand specializing in the creation of the finest luxury chocolates infused with the spirit of the nation.

We embody innovation through a unique fusion methodology: we blend the peak of global mastery with the ancient heritage of Al-Ahsa Oasis to craft unparalleled creations. Every innovation is a story of Al-Ahsa pride, designed to elevate the standard of Arab hospitality.

Our mission is to deliver a bespoke luxury experience that is worthy of representing our national identity at every occasion.

Name: Brim Burgers Pk
Description:
Brim Burgers, a pioneering smash burger concept, inaugurated its first corporate store in May 2021 in the UK, with the
ambitious goal of ascending to the summit of the quick service restaurant (QSR) hierarchy in the UK. The adept team
behind the venture boasts a collective experience of over 15 years in the industry, bringing together a harmonious fusion
of business management acumen and advanced technical expertise.
BRIM Burgers entered the Pakistan market in March 2023, launching its first store in May 2023. Following an exceptional
response, the brand rapidly expanded, opening nine stores across Lahore, Sargodha ,and Islamabad. Introducing its
pioneering smash burger concept, BRIM Burgers has gained strong traction by offering high-quality ingredients, freshly
smashed burgers, and a modern fast-casual dining experience. Leveraging its proven UK franchise model, the brand
ensures strict quality control, hygiene, efficient operations, and local supply chain optimization.
With Pakistan's growing demand for premium burger concepts, BRIM Burgers is actively exploring further expansion to
all major cities across Pakistan, supported by an experienced team, operational excellence, marketing and key partnerships to maximize consistent returns.
Committed to ensuring the success of their franchisees, Brim Burgers has implemented rigorous vetting procedures.
These procedures focus on assessing candidates' management skills, business acumen, and financial standing. Prior
to accepting any franchisee, the Brim team conducts thorough due diligence to maintain the brand's high standards.

Name: etepetete
Description:
Wir sind etepetete, ein junges Unternehmen aus München, welches es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht hat, der Lebensmittelverschwendung den Kampf anzusagen. Denn jährlich schaffen es rund 30 - 40% der Ernte nicht in den Handel und das nur aufgrund von Schönheitsfehlern. Das Obst und Gemüse wird dann vernichtet oder zur Energiegewinnung zweckentfremdet. Bis jetzt konnten wir mit unseren Obst und -Gemüseboxen über 15 Millionen kg Bio-Obst und -Gemüse retten. Und es werden von Tag zu Tag mehr.
.
Unsere Boxen:
>100% Bio
>klimaneutraler Versand
>direkt vor deine Haustür

Helft uns gemeinsam die Welt ein bisschen Konsum-Bewusster zu gestalten und gegen Verschwendung anzukämpfen.

Name: Artisanal Brewing Ventures
Description:
Artisanal Brewing Ventures (ABV) is a Charlotte, NC based east coast focused family of like-minded, best-in-class craft beverage companies including Victory Brewing, Southern Tier Brewing, Southern Tier Distilling, Sixpoint Brewery, & Bold Rock Cider.

ABV is currently ranked as a top 10 regional craft company in the U.S., with locations in 5 states (NY, PA, OH, VA, NC) including taprooms, production facilities, & our corporate headquarters.

Our corporate teams support our family of brands through managing the “back office” work so the team members who support in the production of our liquids can focus on making great tasting, innovative quality craft beverages. Our shared services team is made up of accounting/finance, human resources, supply chain, marketing, & sales – all who are skilled in their space & share a love of craft beverages.

Brands under the ABV umbrella maintain independence with actively involved founders and a craft focused Executive Management Team.

Name: Wild&Org healthy Grab&Go cafes
Description:
It’s hard to find healthy, delicious food in the middle of a busy day, so we created a welcoming place where you can eat on your terms and live the healthy, adventurous life you deserve. 

This is why we are launching Wild&Org – to bring healthy Grab&Go to our community in Jeddah. 

Now you won’t have to make compromises on food quality for the sake of time. 

Our professional nutritionists & chefs are cooking up tantalizing tastes of earth's best to tend to your wild side’s need for culinary discovery and enjoyment while nurturing your health with honest, natural food inspired by local ingredients, all with Grab & Go convenience.

We can’t wait to meet you here soon. 

. . 

Wild&Org is the delicious Grab&Go cafe for the savvy, health-conscious foodie.


We’re committed to supporting our customers’ efforts to live their best, healthiest lives by making it easy to find healthy, organic, delicious food throughout cities in Saudi Arabia using locally-inspired ingredients. 

Our shortcut-free approach to bringing unparalleled food choices in a ready-made format to our local community puts us at the leading forefront of an urban health movement. 

Visit us online at WildandOrg.com.

Name: Guday
Description: Criada pela influenciadora Manu Cit, a Guday oferece gummies deliciosos que tornam a suplementação divertida. Combinando sabor e nutrição, a marca inspira um estilo de vida saudável de forma mais agradável.

Name: Switz Foods Private Limited - Mio Amore
Description:
Switz Foods Private Limited is a part of SwitzGroup, a conglomeration of consumer-facing business across Bakery, Ingredients and Frozen Dough. The Switz group has businesses across Middle East, Eastern Europe, the Indian sub-continent and Australia.
 
Switz Foods Private Limited which started its journey in India in the year 1991, is the largest fresh bakery retail chain in Eastern India. At present there are around 310+ exclusive stores in West Bengal and 40+ exclusive stores in Orissa under the brand "MIO AMORE".

"Mio Amore" offers the widest range in Bakery and Confectionary wares in Eastern India and captivates to fall in love with its wide array of mouth-watering items, freshly baked.

For more details please visit www.mioamore.net & www.switzgroup.com

Name: Qargo Coffee
Description: At Qargo Coffee, we bring you much more than just your daily cup of coffee, we bring you an inclusive family experience, premium coffee, fresh baked pastries and a beautiful location for meetings, study sessions or work.

Name: Greyston Bakery
Description:
At Greyston Bakery, we don't just bake awesomely good brownies, we give people facing employment barriers a chance to work - and build better lives for their families.
 
Greyston uses Open Hiring, which means we start baking without resumes, interviews, or background checks. We get training and a chance to prove ourselves on the job.

The result? We care about the work we do, bake largely by hand, and use only the most wholesome ingredients, like fair-trade cocoa powder and pure cane sugar.  
Our brownies are so rich and chocolatey, so moist and fudgy, that Ben & Jerry’s mixes them into their Chocolate Fudge Brownie ice cream!
 
Indulgent baked treats from a mission-driven bakery... now that's awesomely good!

greystonbakeryfoodservice.com

Name: Maev
Description:
Maev is the only fresh, ready-to-eat dog food made with the highest quality human-grade ingredients you can name just by looking. Created to radically improve the health and happiness of dogs everywhere, Maev works with veterinary nutritionists to craft complete and balanced fresh-frozen food blends that are high in protein and made from only whole ingredients to support longevity, vitality, and everyday joy.

Maev is made with the same premium, human-grade, recognizable ingredients you’d find in your own fridge or pantry, delivering the gold standard of canine nutrition with unmatched convenience – fresh-frozen and ready to serve – straight to your door. Founded in 2018 by Katie Spies, Maev, named in honor of the spunky Irish Wolfhound who started it all, began with a deeply personal goal: to improve how our dogs live. What started as a passion project has grown into a nationwide movement because our dogs deserve nothing less. Follow along @meetmaev and learn more at meetmaev.com.

As of 2023, Maev is the #1 fastest growing, most disruptive brand in the hyper-competitive category of Pet — and the 38th fastest growing private company in America.

Name: Good Protein
Description:
At Good Protein, we believe healthy can be tasty too. Since 2019, we’ve dedicated ourselves to creating a healthier, smoother and tastier shake that offers way more than just protein. Think probiotics for gut health, vitamins and minerals for immune support, and complete protein to keep your muscles healthy.

We’ve scoured the world for the best suppliers and the highest-quality ingredients to create plant-based shakes that taste like your favourite sweet snacks and juices that are as satisfying as a freshly squeezed glass. Today, we’re proud to say that we’ve sold over 30 million shakes across Canada (and we’re just getting started).

Name: Carrefour City
Description: Carrefour City Anglet Larochefoucauld

Name: MOSH
Description: Mosh is a brain wellness brand co-founded by Maria Shriver and Patrick Schwarzenegger on a mission to the change the conversation about brain health through food, education, research and providing the tools for a "mindstyle" lifestyle. We aspire to equip every generation with the tools needed to be strong in mind and body in every decade of life.

Name: Neutonic
Description:
Neutonic is a nootropic energy brand crafted for those striving to perform at their best. Founded by leading creators Chris Williamson and James Smith, Neutonic delivers functional drinks and supplements designed to boost focus, mental clarity, and productivity — without the crash. With over 3 million cans sold in just 18 months, Neutonic combines research-backed ingredients, clean energy, and great taste to help people unlock their potential every day.

We’re growing fast across DTC, Amazon, and retail, powered by a community-first approach and a mission to make cognitive performance accessible to all.

Name: yaba
Description:
Pioneering a new era of thriving longevity, not only to live longer but also better.

Curating emerging wellness brands for our community.

Name: My Coffee Co.
Description:
At My Coffee Co., we believe that every cup tells a story – of connection, inspiration, and the perfect start to your day. Nestled in the heart of Gurgaon’s vibrant Cyber City, our kiosk is more than just a coffee stop; it’s a hub for professionals to refuel, recharge, and relish their moments.

With an emphasis on quality and convenience, we curate a menu of artisanal coffee blends, refreshing teas, and wholesome grab-and-go options tailored for the fast-paced corporate lifestyle. Whether you’re looking for your morning caffeine fix, a mid-day pick-me-up, or a cozy tea break, we’re here to make every sip count.

Join us in redefining coffee culture, one brew at a time. Because at My Coffee Co., it’s not just about the coffee—it’s about the experience.

Name: Starbucks Cambodia/Laos
Description:
Our story began in 1971. Back then we were a roaster and retailer of whole bean and ground coffee, tea, and spices with a single store in Seattle’s Pike Place Market. Today, we are privileged to connect with millions of customers every day with exceptional products and more than 30,000 retail stores in 80 markets. Starbucks is named after the first mate in Herman Melville’s Moby Dick. Our logo is also inspired by the sea – featuring a twin-tailed siren from Greek mythology.
Starbucks in Cambodia began its business operation by opening its first coffeehouse in 2015. By staying connected, one cup at a time, what started off as a staff of less than 5 has grown to a staff of nearly four hundred in just 8 years. Starbucks has expanded over 30 retail locations across the country. The company is dedicated to making the Starbucks Experience a rewarding part of the day for all its customers in Cambodia while contributing positively to the community, people, and planet positive through its sponsorship and CSR activities. Aside from extraordinary coffee, Starbucks has made a business out of human connections, community involvement, and the celebration of cultures.

Name: The Health Factory
Description:
At The Health Factory, we pride ourselves on being innovators in the realm of wholesome nutrition. We're not ones to shy away from trying new things and challenging the norm because we believe that the path to a healthier and happier life is often carved by those willing to take the less-traveled route.

For generations, bread has been a cherished staple in the lives of many, a testament to its enduring popularity. However, in recent times, there have arisen unsettling doubts about the purity and nutritional value of the breads produced by commercial manufacturers. This is where The Health Factory steps in, committed to restoring your faith in this timeless classic.

Our mission is clear and unwavering: we aim to provide our customers with bread in its truest form. The cornerstone of our philosophy is purity, and to this end, we craft our bread with no compromises – no preservatives, no added colors, and absolutely no maida. We understand that your health is of paramount importance, and our range of products is meticulously crafted to reflect this commitment.

In a world where dietary choices often come laden with guilt, The Health Factory's range of bread offers a refreshing change. We aspire to redefine the way India consumes bread, making it not just a source of sustenance but a source of health and well-being. With each bite, you can indulge guilt-free, knowing that you are savoring the simple, unadulterated goodness of bread as it was meant to be.

Welcome to The Health Factory, where we invite you to embrace a new era of bread-eating, one that promises authenticity, quality, and, above all, your well-being. 
BREAD BADLO. AADAT NAHI.

Name: Al-Taawon food corporation
Description: شركة التعاون هي من كبرى الشركات في جمهورية العراق، من حيث النشاط الاقتصادي والاستثمارات المتنوعة والتبادل التجاري، وهي الشركة الرئيسية التي تدار من خلالها كافة اعمال الشركات التابعة لها من قبل مالكها ومجلس الإدارة فيها و بإسهام ما يقارب ( 5000 موظف ) في العراق وخارجه ، وفي كافة الاستثمارات والقطاعات التي تساند من خلالها الأداء الحكومي بالتوافق مع المعايير الاجتماعية ، وتعتبر أول شركة قابضة أسست في العراق

Name: Sitaf Food

Name: GORGIE
Description:
Meet your new best friend! GORGIE, an energy drink with benefits from a brand with benefits.


A Community, a brand, a platform on a mission to make wellness fun! We believe that wellness, energy, supplements and good for you products should no longer be a sacrifice in taste, vibe or aesthetic.  We are a brand with benefits creating beverages with benefits, and we are starting with ENERGY.

What started out as a product for intense fitness performance is now evolving to become a go-to want and need for all day, everyday life - growing into a $40B industry.  Energy drinks are now for Monday morning motivation, pre workout boosts, 3pm pick me ups, and Saturday night dance parties.


It has women's wants and needs written all over it, yet there is not a single brand focused on building with a truly women-first lens. We want products that give us energy, yes, but with added benefits we love for health, wellness and mindfulness.  

We want products that are good for you and look good with you! We want communities and brands that speak to us visually and show up reliably, with digital moments and IRL experiences we care about.  And we want a brand that is built by women for women, yet inclusive for the whole household!


GORGIE started community first.  We crowdsourced every moment of this journey thus far, and we plan to do so every step of the way.  We’re a brand built by followers and friends, driven by community. We're talking IG surveys, Tiktok competitions, and Geneva conversations for input on products, flavors, visuals, compelling names! Our community has chosen it all, and we’re just getting started…

GORGIE is launching January of 2023 and already the community is building and bursting. 

We are inviting you to join this mission, this journey, and this brand that is about to change the world

At Boba Bhai, we believe that bubble tea is not just a beverage; it's an art form. Our team of passionate tea experts and mixologists tirelessly curate a diverse range of flavors, blending traditional Indian tea with modern twists and international influences. From classic milk teas to refreshing fruit infusions, our menu boasts a tantalizing array of options to suit every palate.

Our tapioca pearls are cooked to perfection, offering a delightful chewy texture that harmonizes with the rich flavors of our teas. Additionally, we use premium tea leaves, fresh fruits, and natural syrups, ensuring an authentic and unforgettable taste experience.

Beyond our exceptional beverages, Boba Bhai strives to create an atmosphere that exudes warmth, joy, and creativity. Our vibrant and welcoming stores provide a haven for tea lovers to connect, unwind, and indulge in the magic of bubble tea. Whether you're a student seeking a refreshing study break or a group of friends in search of a delightful hangout spot, Boba Bhai offers an inviting ambiance that enhances your overall experience.

We are also committed to sustainability and environmental consciousness. Our packaging is eco-friendly, minimizing our ecological footprint and promoting a greener future. We believe in responsible business practices and giving back to the communities we serve.

As Boba Bhai continues to expand its presence, we invite you to join us on this exciting journey.

Name: Sweet Creme Pakistan
Description:
Every dessert trip with his kids left a father — a LUMS grad and devoted dad — thinking, why is it so hard to find soft serve that’s actually good?

Too many artificial flavors. Cones too bright to be natural. Hygiene that raised more questions than comfort.

In 2018, driven by love for his son and a deep sense of care, he decided to change that. What started as a mission to find real, clean, and delicious soft serve for his own child quickly grew into something greater — a purpose to bring premium, quality soft serve to all the children of Pakistan.

That’s how Sweet Creme was born — a brand built on 100% real dairy, thoughtfully chosen ingredients, and a family-friendly space where parents could feel at ease.

We started small: one outlet, five people, and a dream rooted in love.

Our Blizzards — rich, creamy soft serve swirled with cookies, brownies, and chocolate chunks — quickly became a fan favorite. A treat that felt exciting, satisfying, and above all, real.

This wasn’t just about dessert anymore. It became about giving kids across Pakistan the experience they deserve — something crafted with care, made in clean environments, and full of real goodness.

It began with a dad’s love for his son. Today, it’s a brand trusted by families across the country.

Sweet Creme —
Real ingredients. Real care. Real good.
Made for our kids — and yours.

Description:
Aliive est une entreprise de la foodtech 100% digitale, fondée en 2009 par le chef 3* Michelin Mauro Colagreco et Vincent Guillet.

Pionnière sur la livraison à domicile de repas frais à vocation santé, la mission d'Aliive (contraction de "Alimentation" et "Positive") est d'aider ses clients à se sentir bien au quotidien grâce à une alimentation personnalisée aux besoins de chacun, centrée autour du plaisir et de la naturalité des produits, et pratique grâce à la livraison à domicile.
Pour cela, Aliive s’appuie sur les meilleurs:
- Les recettes sont élaborées par le chef 3* Michelin Mauro Colagreco, nommé meilleur restaurant du monde en 2020.
- La société collabore avec des sociétés scientifiques et des médecins experts en nutrition pour développer des innovations à impact sur la qualité de vie des clients

5 marques pour des objectifs personnalisés :
- DietBon : des programmes de rééquilibrage alimentaire sur mesure, intégrant le suivi par des diététiciennes et livrés à température ambiante. Dietbon Optimum est le premier programme à optimiser le choix des repas au profil microbiote du client pour améliorer ses résultats et sa qualité de vie.
- KitchenDiet : des programmes de rééquilibrage alimentaire, livrés en frais, intégrant le suivi par des diététiciennes.
- KitchenDaily : des repas équilibrés livrés en frais dans le cadre d'une formule d'abonnement hebdomadaire : bien pratique pour le quotidien.
- KitchenDetox : des cures detox de jus et/ou de plats frais de 3 à 7 jours
- GoodSanté : des repas enrichis en protéines et aux textures et portions adaptées destinés aux patients opérés d'une chirurgie bariatrique (sleeve, bypass ou anneau) ; Goodsanté a été élue innovation de l'année au congrès des médecins en chirurgie bariatrique en 2019.

Description:
1993 wurde mit der Eröffnung der ersten WEIN & CO Filiale ein wichtiger Meilenstein im österreichischen Weinhandel gelegt. Mittlerweile ist WEIN & CO mit insgesamt 24 Filialen und rund 250 Mitarbeiter:innen in ganz Österreich vertreten. 

Unser Sortiment umfasst die besten Weine aus Österreich und Europa, aber auch angesagte Geheimtipps aus der Neuen Welt. Mit der gleichen Sorgfalt und Kompetenz selektionieren wir auch erlesene Delikatessen, die man nicht im Supermarkt findet: handwerkliche Pasta, die höchstbewerteten nativen Olivenöle, beste Essige und viele weitere Spezialitäten von höchster Qualität. Dank der hybriden Vertriebsstrategie entwickelte sich WEIN & CO zum österreichischen Marktführer im Weinsegment. Seit 2018 gehört WEIN & CO der Hawesko Holding AG, der führenden Weinhandelsgruppe Deutschlands, an. 

Die Liebe und Leidenschaft zum Genuss wird bei uns mit Herz & Seele gelebt und verbindet uns. Das wird sowohl in der Fachberatung bei Kund:innen als auch in der Zusammenarbeit im Team täglich deutlich. In unserer WEIN & CO Familie legen wir Wert auf Zusammenhalt,  Gemeinschaftssinn und einen respektvollen, wertschätzenden Umgang. Regelmäßige Weiterbildung hat bei uns einen enormen Stellenwert.  Jede/r Mitarbeiter:in hat bei uns die Möglichkeit von finanzierten Aus- -und Weiterbildungen zu profitieren.

Bei regelmäßigen Mitarbeiter:innenschulungen, Events, Verkostungen und Kellerführungen bis hin zu Rebschnitt-Workshops wird jedem Team-Mitglied von WEIN & CO viel Know-How vermittelt, um die Faszination für das Thema Wein optimal an Kund:innen weiterzugeben.

Name: North American Sustainable Refrigeration Council (NASRC)

NASRC is an environmental nonprofit committed to taking action to address those hurdles and educating its members and the public about the environmental benefits of using natural refrigerants.

Name: The Fruit Company
Description:
The Fruit Company specializes in premium gourmet gifts, but we are not any ordinary gifting company which is why we have been featured as one of Oprah's favorite things in her "O" Magazine Gift Guide, and highlighted by media influencer Robyn Spizman.  One of the main things that set us apart from competitors is that we use ONLY premium grade fruit, and even that is sorted three times before it makes the cut to our gifts.  Furthermore, our Complimentary Corporate Concierge Program allows for customization and the ability to incorporate a brand into the gift, and our HarvestClub members have the ability to customize the months they receive their fruit at any time.  We have harder-to-find options such as Gluten-Free, Kosher, and Organic gift items as well.

Our roots extend back to 1942, when Roy Webster founded Webster Orchards and began delivering extraordinary pears and apples to the Hood River Valley of northern Oregon.  

Roy’s grandsons, Scott and Addison, grew up in the family business of growing fruit. Their Dad’s love for growing fruit and the family business was an inspiration. After leaving the valley to pursue their academic and professional careers, they returned with the same vision of expanding the Webster Orchard venture. 

Today The Fruit Company owns over 600 acres of fruit trees and blueberry fields and does much of its business through online orders at thefruitcompany.com, compared to their grandfather’s first mail-order catalog.  The Fruit Company has also been one of the top 15 growing companies in Oregon and part of Internet Retailer’s Top 50 “Best of the Web.”

Our goal remains unchanged: Bring the Nation the World's Finest Fruit. We welcome you to visit our website and make someone smile with a fresh fruit gift.

Whether you’re looking for a curated charcuterie board, a ready to eat picnic basket or your daily fruits & vegetables - we’ve got you covered! Name: Sezamo.it
Description:
Con +7.000 referenze, Sezamo.it è un servizio di food e-commerce che consegna la tua spesa a domicilio in tre ore dal momento dell’ordine.
Da noi puoi trovare un vasto e completo assortimento di prodotti che vanno dai freschi ai surgelati, dalla dispensa al gelato in vaschetta, dalla cura della persona a quella della casa, in un perfetto connubio tra prodotti artigianali, gourmet e regionali con le grandi marche.
Supermercato e cascine, insieme. E non è tutto: consegnando la spesa con furgoni completamente ecosostenibili dotati di contenitori refrigerati, riusciamo non solo ad assicurare la freschezza e la qualità dei nostri prodotti, ma ci impegniamo anche a ridurre al minimo il nostro impatto sull’ambiente.
Cosa ci contraddistingue:
- Il cliente è al centro del nostro universo. Tutto quello che facciamo, lo facciamo per lui!
- Eat well, Live well è il nostro motto. Abbiamo a cuore il benessere dei nostri clienti, nella convinzione che mangiare bene ci aiuti a vivere una vita più sana e felice.
- Consegniamo la spesa in tre ore direttamente al piano e ti offriamo la possibilità di scegliere la fascia oraria preferita. Potrai pagare online o direttamente alla consegna con carta.
- Il nostro servizio clienti, attivo ogni giorno dalle 8:00 alle 22:00, ti supporterà in ogni richiesta grazie alla costruzione di un rapporto di completa fiducia.
Facciamo parte della grande famiglia Rohlik, una delle più importanti piattaforme di food e-commerce in Europa. Nato nel 2014 in Repubblica Ceca (Rohlik.cz), il gruppo è riuscito in pochissimo tempo a raggiungere l’Ungheria (kifli.hu), l’Austria (gurkerl.at) e la Germania (knuspr.de).
La rivoluzione della spesa online è arrivata a Milano, vuoi farne parte? Ordina subito e goditi il piacere di una spesa completa senza file al supermercato.

With quality service and hundreds of appetizing eats, there are options fit for every taste and occasion including premium meats, meals, snacks and treats. From Marvin Schwan’s first yellow truck to our modern-day fleet of Yelloh freezers-on-wheels, we’ve been pioneering frozen food delivery for over 70 years. To learn more or start shopping and fill your Freezer Full of Happy, visit yelloh.com.

Name: Grupo Planes
Description:
El Grupo Planes, está formado por compuesto por tres divisiones: Grupo Planes Distribución, Casa Planes e Italian Dough.

En Grupo Planes Distribución trabajamos para acercar la frescura de todo tipo de carnes y elaborados a negocios de restauración, catering y distribución de alimentación. Contamos con una flota propia mediante la cual repartimos en las 3 provincias de la Comunidad Valenciana a más de 200 clientes satisfechos. 

Las tiendas Casa Planes son un concepto avanzado de carnicería tradicional donde encontrará:
-La atención cercana  a los clientes.
-Una relación calidad-precio que solo una gran empresa puede ofrecer.
-Un surtido seleccionado y especializado muy amplio.

Por último en Italian Dough fabricamos pizzas, bases y bolas siguiendo la receta tradicional y utilizando los mejores ingredientes. Contamos con una línea productiva de última tecnología y con los mejores pizzeros que le dan el toque maestro a todas nuestras elaboraciones. 

Desde 1939: Aunque poseamos más de 80 años de historia hay valores que no cambian.

En el Grupo Planes hay dos inmutables:
*Calidad: Sólo adquirimos materia prima de origen nacional de la máxima calidad. 
*Frescura: Nuestros pollos, y el despiece de los mismo, llegan frescos (con menos de 24 horas desde que se sacrificaron) antes de las 9 de la mañana de cada día a  todas y cada una de las tiendas y clientes.

Conservamos el mismo espíritu y respeto por la calidad, el cliente de los tenderos tradicionales.

Nuestras cifras reflejan el éxito del trabajo bien hecho:
-140 tiendas en Valencia, Castellón, Alicante y Barcelona.
-Más de 50 millones de euros de facturación.
-Un equipo de más de 400 personas.

Description:
Refriango RDC est une filiale de la firme portugaise Nuvi Group spécialisée dans la production et la distribution de boissons gazeuses, jus, eaux, boissons énergisantes et boissons alcoolisées.

Établie en RDC depuis 2023, la société y construit son usine de fabrication de boissons à Kinshasa, dans la zone économique de Maluku, sur une étendue de 15 hectares afin d'offrir des boissons de meilleure qualité pour le bien être des consommateurs Congolais.

Refriango RDC s'introduit avec un portefeuille de 16 marques, dont certaines sont déja leaders sur le marché angolais dans leurs segments respectifs, les boissons gazeuses BLUE & RED, la boisson énergisante SPEED, les jus NUTRY et TUTTI, les bières TIGRA, les vins GAIVOTA, la sangria TROPICANA, et enfin le cidre JADE.

Leader sur le marché des boissons en Angola, Refriango y possède l'une des plus grandes unités industrielles du continent africain, avec 42 hectares, 3000 travailleurs et une technologie de pointe aux normes des meilleures usines de boissons du monde. Avec une capacité de production de 1,9 milliards de litres par an, l'usine de production en Angola dispose de 27 lignes de remplissage pour tous types de conditionnements répondant à plus de 160 produits.

L’expansion de Refriango en RDC témoigne de son engagement à soutenir la croissance économique, à contribuer au développement durable de la RDC et à répondre aux besoins des consommateurs dans la région.

Name: Casa Rio Verde
Description:
RIO VERDE: Paixão pelo Vinho

NOSSA MISSÃO Há mais de 20 anos no mercado, a Casa Rio Verde tem como missão divulgar a cultura do vinho. Transformar o maior número possível de consumidores de vinhos em “conhecedores de vinhos”.

GARANTIA DE PROCEDÊNCIA E CONFIABILIDADE Nossos produtos têm a garantia da Casa Rio Verde: uma empresa que conquistou a confiança do público consumidor de Minas Gerais, pela procedência e qualidade dos produtos, assim como pela conduta ética na condução dos negócios ao longo dos anos.

A MAIOR PROPORÇÃO DE VINHOS PONTUADOS DE TODO O MERCADO Grande parte dos vinhos de trabalho da Casa Rio Verde recebem pontuação superior a 81 pontos em 100, pelas publicações estrangeiras “Wine Spectator” e “Wine Advocate”, esta dirigida pelo crítico de vinhos Robert Parker. Confira na ficha técnica de cada vinho, quais já foram avaliados e aprovados por essas duas famosas publicações internacionais.

PREÇOS BAIXOS Temos um princípio que deve ser obedecido: toda vez que colocamos uma garrafa de vinho à venda, ela deverá valer mais, às vezes muito mais, do que o seu preço de venda. A isso chamamos relação preço/qualidade.

GARANTIA DE PROCEDÊNCIA E CONFIABILIDADE Nossos produtos têm a garantia da Casa Rio Verde: uma empresa que conquistou a confiança do público consumidor de Minas Gerais, pela procedência e qualidade dos produtos, assim como pela ética na condução dos negócios ao longo dos anos.

Name: HERE-O
Description:
WHAT MAKES OUR DONUTS SUPER?

 HEROICALLY HANDMADE 
There's love in our donuts!

One of the things that makes our donuts so good is the love that goes into them. Love only possible through the attentive nature of our entirely handmade process. The attention we put into ensuring our sourdough starter yeast is fermented to perfection, through to making all our glazes and fillings from scratch, all lead to a donut you can’t help but love.

 EXTRAORIDNARILY ORIGINAL
Iconic. Bold. Like all heroes!

We aim for originality and perfection in the execution of our iconic donuts. The signature donuts on our menu are the result of graft and craft. Our chief bakers possess donut making superpowers and pour every ounce of their creativity into delivering the goods when it comes to daring donut perfection.

 INCREDIBLE INGREDIENTS
Jaw dropping! Mouth watering!

We take as much pride in the originality of our donut flavours, as we do in the selection of our ingredients. Simply put, they are the finest and freshest you'll find in a donut! With an emphasis on working with local suppliers we've an opulent array of luxurious ingredients at our disposal - utilised to deliver the freshest, most iconic, delectable donuts.

 OH! AND THE... DOUGH
Putting the Oh! in the sourdough

Our sourdough and the process in its creation is what puts the oh! in our donuts. Everything about our heroic donuts stand against the nemesis of pre-mixed commercial doughs dispensed straight into the fryer.

The slow fermentation process of the sour dough ‘starter’ gives our donuts a spectacular flavour and texture.

Airy but chewy – not only do they taste GOOD, but they are good for you too! Just like other fermented foods, sourdough is a gut-healing food, because it provides the body with beneficial bacteria. It is also more easily digested due to the fermented grain’s nutrients being more readily available for digestion. Super!

Name: Raiz
Description:
At Raiz, we believe another way of growing food is possible. Welcome to the urban farming evolution. 

We're building a network of vertical farms in city centres with a hybrid energy and a decentralized funding model.

Focusing on the principles of circularity and sustainability, our vertical farms produce a wide variety of flavourful fresh herbs & veggies.

We are creating a climate-resilient, decentralized food system.

Name: Sweet Creme Pakistan
Description:
Every dessert trip with his kids left a father — a LUMS grad and devoted dad — thinking, why is it so hard to find soft serve that’s actually good?

Too many artificial flavors. Cones too bright to be natural. Hygiene that raised more questions than comfort.

In 2018, driven by love for his son and a deep sense of care, he decided to change that. What started as a mission to find real, clean, and delicious soft serve for his own child quickly grew into something greater — a purpose to bring premium, quality soft serve to all the children of Pakistan.

That’s how Sweet Creme was born — a brand built on 100% real dairy, thoughtfully chosen ingredients, and a family-friendly space where parents could feel at ease.

We started small: one outlet, five people, and a dream rooted in love.

Our Blizzards — rich, creamy soft serve swirled with cookies, brownies, and chocolate chunks — quickly became a fan favorite. A treat that felt exciting, satisfying, and above all, real.

This wasn’t just about dessert anymore. It became about giving kids across Pakistan the experience they deserve — something crafted with care, made in clean environments, and full of real goodness.

It began with a dad’s love for his son. Today, it’s a brand trusted by families across the country.

Sweet Creme —
Real ingredients. Real care. Real good.
Made for our kids — and yours.

Name: Tập đoàn Hải Sản Hoàng Gia
Description:
VỀ HẢI SẢN HOÀNG GIA (HSHG):
HSHG tiền thân là một doanh nghiệp xuất nhập khẩu thủy hải sản ra đời năm 2002. Sau 22 năm hoạt động, HSHG đang đồng hành cùng hơn 2.000 nhà hàng khách sạn trên khắp cả nước. Từ năm 2020, HSHG phát triển thành chuỗi siêu thị hải sản và nhà hàng ẩm thực nhằm phục vụ tốt hơn nữa nhu cầu thưởng thức hải sản của người dân.
Với khẩu hiệu “Tươi ngon từ nguồn”, HSHG mang những con hải sản tươi ngon nhất từ mọi vùng biển trên thế giới về phục vụ người Việt cùng trải nghiệm thưởng thức hải sản tốt nhất. HSHG đang trên hành trình cải tiến, nâng tầm chất lượng mỗi ngày để trở thành thương hiệu hải sản tươi sống số 1 Đông Nam Á, góp phần nâng tầm ẩm thực biển Việt Nam và Thế giới.
Mỗi thành viên của HSHG là một đại sứ ẩm thực biển Việt Nam và thế giới, mang lại bữa ăn hạnh phúc, sum vầy cho mọi gia đình, mang lại cuộc sống chất lượng hơn, thịnh vượng hơn cho khách hàng, đội ngũ và đối tác. 
6 giá trị cốt lõi: Học hỏi | Cam kết | Chia sẻ | Tiên phong | Tận tâm | Trung thực
5 tính cách thương hiệu: Năng động | Thân thiện | Tiên phong | Tin cậy | Quốc tế

HÃY ĐẾN VỚI HSHG NẾU BẠN ĐANG TÌM KIẾM:
- Một công việc không chỉ để có thu nhập, mà còn là hành trình trưởng thành mỗi ngày.
- Một doanh nghiệp không chỉ cung cấp sản phẩm và dịch vụ, mà còn thực hiện sứ mệnh nâng tầm ẩm thực biển.
- Một đội ngũ không chỉ gắn kết và chuyên nghiệp, mà còn sống cùng hoài bão vươn tầm khu vực.

Name: HERE-O
Description:
WHAT MAKES OUR DONUTS SUPER?

 HEROICALLY HANDMADE 
There's love in our donuts!

One of the things that makes our donuts so good is the love that goes into them. Love only possible through the attentive nature of our entirely handmade process. The attention we put into ensuring our sourdough starter yeast is fermented to perfection, through to making all our glazes and fillings from scratch, all lead to a donut you can’t help but love.

 EXTRAORIDNARILY ORIGINAL
Iconic. Bold. Like all heroes!

We aim for originality and perfection in the execution of our iconic donuts. The signature donuts on our menu are the result of graft and craft. Our chief bakers possess donut making superpowers and pour every ounce of their creativity into delivering the goods when it comes to daring donut perfection.

 INCREDIBLE INGREDIENTS
Jaw dropping! Mouth watering!

We take as much pride in the originality of our donut flavours, as we do in the selection of our ingredients. Simply put, they are the finest and freshest you'll find in a donut! With an emphasis on working with local suppliers we've an opulent array of luxurious ingredients at our disposal - utilised to deliver the freshest, most iconic, delectable donuts.

 OH! AND THE... DOUGH
Putting the Oh! in the sourdough

Our sourdough and the process in its creation is what puts the oh! in our donuts. Everything about our heroic donuts stand against the nemesis of pre-mixed commercial doughs dispensed straight into the fryer.

The slow fermentation process of the sour dough ‘starter’ gives our donuts a spectacular flavour and texture.

Airy but chewy – not only do they taste GOOD, but they are good for you too! Just like other fermented foods, sourdough is a gut-healing food, because it provides the body with beneficial bacteria. It is also more easily digested due to the fermented grain’s nutrients being more readily available for digestion. Super!

Name: Zorbas Group
Description:
Ο Όμιλος Ζορπάς είναι ένας από τους ταχύτερα αναπτυσσόμενους ομίλους στην Κύπρο με παρουσία και στην Αμερική. Ξεκίνησε ως ένας μικρός οικογενειακός φούρνος στο χωριό Αθηένου, στη Λάρνακα το 1975 και μέχρι σήμερα, σχεδόν 50 χρόνια μετά, ανέπτυξε διαφορετικά brands που επεκτείνονται σε όλη την Κύπρο και το εξωτερικό, παρέχοντας ποιοτικές επιλογές και τοποθετώντας πάντα στο επίκεντρο τον άνθρωπο.
 
Ο Όμιλος Ζορπάς συμπεριλαμβάνει τους Φούρνους Ζορπάς, τα ζαχαροπλαστεία Pralina Confectioneries, τα πολυβραβευμένα εστιατόρια Pralina Experience, το ιταλικό εστιατόριο Pinolo, τις καφετέριες Coffee Berry, τα παγωτά Κayak, τα καταστήματα The French Workshop στη Νέα Υόρκη και το Ίδρυμα ΜΑΖΙ.

The Zorbas Group is one of the fastest-growing groups in Cyprus, with a presence in the USA. It started as a small family bakery in the village of Athienou in Larnaca in 1975 and, almost 50 years later, it has successfully developed different brands that have expanded throughout Cyprus and abroad, providing quality choices and always putting people at the center. 
Zorbas Group is mainly based on growth and innovation, has a people-oriented character with more than 3.000 employees, and has cultivated a family culture of mutual respect and equal opportunities. 

Members of the Zorbas Group are the brands Zorbas Bakeries, Pralina Confectioneries & Experience, Pinolo, Coffee Berry, The French Workshop, Kayak, and the MAZI Foundation.

Name: MAY & CO.
Description:
MAY & CO. crafts a range of essential bar quality syrups & shrubs in small batches using real ingredients to help you enjoy a world of better drinks. We aim to simplify the art of making cocktails, so you can enjoy delicious cocktails easily at home! Our syrups are made using only real ingredients that are fresh & locally sourced, so you get the most authentic flavour. No artificial flavours - ever.

CREATIVITY MEETS TRANSPARENCY
With MAY & CO., you know exactly what you’re getting- authentic cocktail syrups & shrubs that are never over processed or artificially flavoured. Handcrafted only from real ingredients.

HOW WE CAME ABOUT
Cocktails today are no longer Plain Janes. Right from Generation Y to the millennials, theres a growing need & appreciation for high quality, fuss free, experimental cocktails.

So we went about on a journey - that of concocting a product that is perfectly balanced, honest, no nonsense & straight forward. After extensive research, recipe creations, taste tests, endless discussions, we finally arrived at a concoction that is a perfect balance. A concoction that gives you a high quality cocktail. Every. Single. Time.

REAL. HONEST. AUTHENTIC.
All of our ingredients are carefully sourced from local farms and then handcrafted into custom-blended syrups & shrubs. All in small batches. Our ingredients come from farms that have been passed down for generations & are masterfully grown & harvested with labour of love. Each of these ingredients are carefully chosen & procured after endless tastings of the abundant species available across the country, giving you a product that is honest, real and as close as it can get to tasting a real fruit.

Name: Al kaman global Company LTD
Description:
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة:
شركة رائدة في مجال تصدير التمور منذ عام 2014
والموزع الحصري والشريك لعدة شركات أوروبية داخل المملكة العربية السعودية لمنتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية
مقرها الرئيسي في مدينة الرياض ولديها فروع متعددة في أرجاء المملكة العربية السعودية
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة:
خبرة واسعة في مجال تصدير التمور:
 تأسست الشركة عام 2014، ولديها خبرة واسعة في مجال تصدير التمور إلى مختلف أنحاء العالم.
جودة عالية: 
تلتزم الشركة بأعلى معايير الجودة في جميع مراحل الإنتاج والتغليف.
تنوع المنتجات: 
تقدم الشركة مجموعة واسعة من أنواع التمور، بما في ذلك التمور الطازجة والمجففة والمعلبة.
أسعار تنافسية:
 تقدم الشركة أسعارًا تنافسية لمنتجاتها عالية الجودة.
خدمة عملاء ممتازة: 
تقدم الشركة خدمة عملاء ممتازة لضمان رضا العملاء.
المنتجات:
التمور: تقدم الشركة مجموعة واسعة من أنواع التمور، بما في ذلك التمور الطازجة والمجففة والمعلبة.
منتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية: 
توزع الشركة منتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية من عدة شركات أوروبية رائدة.
الفروع:
المقر الرئيسي: مدينة الرياض
فروع متعددة في أرجاء المملكة العربية السعودية
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة هي الخيار الأمثل لتصدير التمور والحصول على منتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية عالية الجودة.
إضافات:
الشريك لعدة شركات أوروبية: تُعد شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة شريكًا موثوقًا به لعدة شركات أوروبية رائدة في مجال المواد الغذائية الصحية.

Name: Casa Rica
Description:
Mercado gourmet

Una cultura de trabajo familiar
La historia de Casa Rica comienza con el arribo desde Alemania de Don Walter Lange (comerciante) y Benedikto Hiebl (panadero) en Asunción, Paraguay, en los años veinte. Don Benedikto empezó como albañil y luego de varias labores por la zona de Villarrica empezó su modesta producción de panes y venta a domicilio. Don Walter se dedicó al comercio internacional. Con ellos se iniciaba una cultura de trabajo.
 
Sus hijos se conocieron y se casaron en la ciudad de Asunción. Con el transcurrir de los años, la hija de Don Walter y nuera de Don Benedikto, la Sra. Hertha Lange de Hiebl, abrió en 1.989 su propio local de cocina alemana, ubicado en el entonces tranquilo barrio de Villa Morra. Desde ahí, deleitaba al público con recetas tradicionales como el apfelstrudel, milanesas, stollen y bretzels.
 
A modo de poder elaborar las recetas auténticamente alemanas, y lograr la calidad acostumbrada, comenzaron a importar desde el país europeo ingredientes especiales que necesitaban como materia prima.
 Con el tiempo, Hertha decidió hacer crecer su negocio, y respondiendo al entusiasmo del público con esta oferta diferenciada, fue ampliando su variedad de productos, importándolos primero de Europa, y luego del resto del mundo. A éstos, sumó también algunos de producción propia y otros de suministro local.
 
Con los años, Casa Rica fue creciendo hasta contar con una de las bodegas más completas del Paraguay, un bazar exclusivo, las mejores selecciones productos y delikatessen.  En los años 90, el local original de Casa Rica sobre la Avenida Aviadores del Chaco tuvo dos ampliaciones para poder cumplir con la creciente demanda de sus clientes, expandiendo su cocina, salón, línea de caja y estacionamiento. Todo ésto, exhibido en un ambiente diferenciado, sumado a su atención personalizada, permitió a Casa Rica se posicionase en el mercado.

Name: BRUNO MARINI
Description:
Bruno começou a trabalhar muito cedo com seu pai. Aos 12 anos era entregador no Mercado Municipal de Barra Mansa. Já aos 16 anos, o pai de Bruno resolveu mudar de ramo e abriu sua primeira loja de móveis, a Momar Móveis. Nesta loja, ele começou como vendedor, passou para o cargo de gerente e se tornou um dos maiores compradores das lojas, que de uma passou para oito lojas no total.
No ano de 1996, Bruno quis ser dono do seu próprio negócio e montou sua primeira loja, a Brumar Móveis. O primeiro empreendimento foi na Avenida Amaral Peixoto na cidade de Volta Redonda, em seguida no Centro de Barra Mansa. Ele chegou a abrir um total de oito lojas de móveis, também nas cidades de Resende, Angra dos Reis, Três Rios, Cruzeiro, São José dos Campos e Pindamonhangaba, onde gerou emprego para mais de 150 pessoas.
Em 2002, ainda com todas as lojas, Bruno quis seguir para o ramo de água mineral e inaugurou no ano de 2002 o Grupo Attiva. Já em 2004 ele entendeu a necessidade de dar mais atenção ao grupo e que esse era um caminho promissor, devido a isso vendeu todas as lojas para investir e se dedicar com exclusividade a Attiva.
O grupo Atiiva fica na estrada Barra Mansa/Bananal e a empresa possui cerca de 200 funcionários. A empresa é responsável por engarrafar água mineral com e sem gás, sucos e energéticos.
Sempre envolvido e interessado nas questões do município, Bruno faz parte da diretoria da CDL – Câmara de Dirigentes Lojistas de Barra Mansa - desde o ano de 1994. Bruno também faz parte da diretoria do Sindicato do Comércio Varejista de Barra Mansa, Quatis e Rio Claro desde o ano 2000, Bruno tem orgulho de fazer parte de instituições que representam o comércio, que é o ramo que mais gera emprego no país.

Description:
Alphafood è un'azienda innovativa che si è posta l'obiettivo di ampliare l'industria alimentare attraverso l'allevamento e la trasformazione dei Grilli Acheta Domesticus. Siamo pionieri in questo settore emergente, guidati dalla passione per la sostenibilità e la salute globale. Con sede nella splendida Sicilia, siamo un team dinamico di esperti dedicati a fornire alternative proteiche ecologiche e nutrienti. 
La Nostra Missione:
Il mondo affronta una crescente crisi alimentare con la crescente popolazione mondiale e l'inevitabile esaurimento delle risorse alimentari tradizionali. In Alphafood, crediamo che la soluzione giaccia nella natura stessa, e i grilli Acheta Domesticus rappresentano una risorsa ecologica straordinaria. La nostra missione è contribuire a ridurre l'impatto ambientale dell'industria alimentare fornendo una fonte di proteine sostenibili e nutrienti.Cosa Facciamo:
Alleviamo e coltiviamo Grilli Acheta Domesticus in un ambiente controllato e sicuro, seguendo rigorosi standard di qualità e benessere animale. La nostra avanzata tecnologia ci consente di ottenere grilli di alta qualità, ricchi di proteine e con un impatto minimo sull'ambiente. Successivamente, trasformiamo questi insetti in prodotti alimentari innovativi, come farine proteiche, snack, e integratori, destinati a migliorare la dieta umana
Alphafood è impegnata nella lotta alla sostenibilità ambientale, riducendo l'impatto delle attività agricole tradizionali e promuovendo la biodiversità.
Siamo all'avanguardia nella ricerca e nello sviluppo di nuovi prodotti a base di grilli, offrendo soluzioni creative e deliziose per soddisfare le esigenze alimentari del futuro.
Garantiamo la massima qualità in ogni fase della produzione, dall'allevamento alla trasformazione, per offrire prodotti sicuri e nutrienti ai nostri clienti.

Description:

Com quase 100 anos de experiência comercial em Portugal, é um importante abastecedor de vinhos, recorrendo a uma ampla seleção de grossistas, retalhistas e colecionadores.

Nas décadas que se seguiram à sua fundação, o empreendimento recolheu uma espantosa quantidade de bebidas espirituosas e vinhos premium vintage que encheriam o olho de qualquer garrafeira. A seleção da Garrafeira Nacional representa uma das mais extensas e valiosas coletâneas de raros Vinhos do Porto Vintage, Vinhos da Madeira, Whiskies, Cognacs, Aguardentes, Champanhe e bebidas diversas, todos criteriosamente selecionados de acordo com a autenticidade e relevância da sua origem.

Gerida por Jaime Vaz, a Garrafeira Nacional tem uma estrutura empresarial com mais de 60 funcionários, através da qual tem investido continuadamente na aquisição de vinhos e espirituosos de forma a sulcar mercados nacionais e internacionais. Todos os produtos são cuidadosamente armazenados, ao abrigo de um rigoroso controlo de humidade e temperatura. Assim, voltados para um futuro solidamente alicerçado no mais nobre passado enológico, temos como apaixonada missão estimar, partilhar e difundir o prazer inigualável da apreciação de vinhos e espirituosos.

In the heart of Tokyo, where the rhythm of street culture and the pulse of fashion create a symphony of contrasts, 2foods emerged as an icon. Our journey started with a vision—to orchestrate harmony from the seemingly discordant. Just like Tokyo itself, 2foods embodies a fusion of worlds. It's a blend of tradition and innovation, bridging the gap between the bold and the humble, the global and the quintessentially Japanese.

Our name, TWO, encapsulates our ethos. It signifies the perfect balance between function and emotion, fashion and universality. In each delectable, 100% plant-based bite we offer, we capture the essence of emotions, crafting not just food, but unforgettable experiences.

At 2foods, we're not just creators; we're catalysts for change. We're deeply rooted in the cultural movements that shape our world. From the electrifying beats of hip-hop to the adrenaline-fueled world of extreme sports, our connection to street culture is not just authentic; it's at the core of our identity. In just over two years, this connection has propelled us to become Tokyo's number one plant-based restaurant group and CPG brand.

We stand at the intersection of music, fashion, and plant-based living, celebrating a vibrant and inclusive community. Our products are a tribute to impeccable Japanese quality and craftsmanship, ensuring that every plant-based offering is as delicious as it is responsible.

But 2foods isn't just about feeding the body; it's about nourishing the soul. It's about being part of a movement that values taste, texture, and the planet equally. We're here to change the world, one delectable, plant-based bite at a time. Made with love in Japan, cherished in every corner of the globe.

With 2foods, you don't just savor flavor; you savor life's most flavorful moments.

Name: Dodjivi
Description:
We’ve only got one life to live, so why not make it a great one! We are dedicated to providing epicureans like you with an experience to satisfy the senses. Functional foods and high-quality mushroom-based products, backed by powerful scientific research, accessible to everyone. Tried-and-true, live life the Dodjivi way, with your cup half-full. Everybody say yama-yama with me, it’s time to start a functional food revolution!

Our journey began in 2013. My spouse, Claudine, and I are salsa dance teachers in Quebec; it’s certainly a way to warm up the Canadian winters. Dodjivi came to life as a by-product of my love for Claudine and our journey towards health together. After sustaining multiple injuries and health complications, dancing became difficult for Claudine. As her pain and sleepless nights continued, I knew I had to do something, so paso a paso, I searched tirelessly for a solution…

What does Dodjivi mean and how on Earth do you say it?! Pronounced as doe-(d)jee-vee; the name Dodjivi holds significant meaning. My name is Komlanvi Dodji Dodjro, I am a native of the small but mighty country, Togo in West Africa. In my mother tongue, Ewe, the word Dodji means courage, fortitude, hope, and perseverance. Vi means to start small.

We strive to educate our fellow foodies on how to incorporate functional foods into their daily nutrition and lifestyle. We aim to simplify our global community’s path to good health. Our mission is to allow people to discover how to look after themselves by joining a wholesome revolution.

Vision
Our vision is to lead an exciting movement in the functional food industry. We want to be a sustainable Canadian company proud of making high-quality functional mushroom-based products accessible to everyone, everywhere! We believe in providing holistic solutions to support your health journey and small lifestyle changes for a vibrant future.

Read our full story: dodjivi.com/our-story

Name: La minute locale
Description:
Pour répondre aux problèmes rencontrés auprès des producteurs et des consommateurs, nous installons des distributeurs automatiques de produits locaux par casier.

Acreditamos que uma alimentação saudável e nutritiva é a força mais poderosa para mudança que o mundo precisa. E é por isso que nosso objetivo é criar um ecossistema que promove renda justa, reduz desperdícios e contribui para um caminho de suprimentos mais sustentável, diminuido a distância dos alimentos até o seu prato. 

Quintal Coletivo, revolucionando o modelo de consumo atual através de um mercado sustentável. Pediu, chegou!

Name: Monday Morning AF
Description:
Most people doubt it’s possible to enjoy alcohol-free drinking. At Monday Morning, we called B.S. We curate the best non-alcoholic brews, wines, spirits, and cocktails from around the world and bring them to our non-alcoholic bottle shop in San Diego so San Diegans can enjoy drinking differently.

We’re on a mission to remove the barriers to alcohol-free drinking and transform the AF scene with vibrant drinks that bring people together without the haze of alcohol.

Enjoy the top non-alcoholic drinks from around the world at our bottle shop, tasting room, and online store. Whatever your reason for drinking booze-free beverages, do it without missing out on fun or flavor.

Choosing a non-alcoholic beverage is about choosing you. And when you choose yourself, you also choose connection and community. Doing what you need to do for yourself makes the people around you better, too. We’re all about that.

Our non-alcoholic bottle shop and tasting room is a welcoming place for mindful drinkers to:
Sample different non-alcoholic drinks to find your favorites
Attend mocktail mixology classes so you can learn to DIY your own drinks at home
Connect with fellow AF drinkers, whether fully AF or sober curious
Create a custom pack of your favorite non-alcoholic brews
Shop non-alcoholic wines, brews, spirits, and cocktails from around the globe–many of which you’ll only be able to find in OUR shop!

Whatever brings you to our shop – cutting back, going dry, or simply sober curious — you’re welcome here at Monday Morning.

Whether you’re making cocktails for a crowd, or a mocktail for yourself, the versatile flavors of Mixly will delight and refresh!

Name: The Chef's Wife

As a couple we are both extremely passionate & adventurous about food. Candy as Cabin crew & myself as a chef on a cruise liner, we’ve had the privilege to travel the world professionally & as a family on vacations & it is the most wonderful experience to meet with so many different cultures & their foods.
The idea of The Chef’s Wife is to introduce good, hearty foods from around the world, cooked with the simplest of ingredients to satisfy your hunger, your soul & bring a smile to your face. Some traditional, some fusion & some twisted with a little or may be a lot of mischief to give you an unforgettable experience.

-

Our mission is to make it easy to incorporate these clean ingredients into your daily routine and feel so confident that you don’t even have to look at our label. We are committed to sourcing only the highest quality ingredients, and everything we make is truly next-level.

They are delicious, refreshing, and packed with nutrients to fuel your day. At FlavCity, we believe that everyone deserves access to clean, whole-food products they can trust. Whether you're a busy professional, a fitness enthusiast, or just looking for some on-the-go healthy products, we have something for you.

Name: Marin Trading
Description:
With over 25 years of activity, it has established as an entity of reference within the commerce and distribution of food and non food, with a range from fresh to frozen, confectionery to yeast, hygiene to cleaning products. With an extensive and sophisticated distribution network, we cover the country South to North. 
   - "To establish Marin Trading as consumers’ first choice, and that our products accompany the day to day of surrounding communities, contributing for their better health and well being."

Name: Pizza Wine
Description:
Pizza Wine is a highly crushable, canned sparkling red wine that’s great with pizza and great without. Made from hybrid grapes grown in NY’s Lake Erie AVA, Pizza Wine is on a mission to make wine less intimidating without sacrificing quality. 

Our grapes are farmed with minimal intervention. Nothing is added that doesn’t belong (no artificial flavors, no concentrates, no “natural” flavors, no chemicals). Every seed, skin, stem is returned to the soil. 

We’re restaurant and bar people (not celebrities) that have built our careers around making people feel welcome. We live for the perfect pairing and are devastated (truly) that traditional wine culture is pushing people away. 

We could spend hours explaining why this pizza and wine pairing works — how the structure perfectly balances the acidity in the tomatoes, and the bubbles attach to and wash down the fats from the cheese — but that’s not our vibe. 

Italians have been drinking sparkling red with pizza for hundreds of years — we couldn’t find one that tasted the way we wanted, so we made it ourselves. Drink it from the can, pour it over ice, or mix it with Coke for all we care.  Hope you love it.

Name: GASTRO'S
Description:
Hos Gastro's er vores mission at skabe rammerne for en bedre pause, om det er på arbejdspladsen, uddannelsesinstitutionen, på sygehuset eller til træning.
Vi tror på at produkter af høj kvalitet skaber en bedre oplevelse, derfor har vi stort fokus på hvilke produkter vi tilbyder i vores Gastro Pods, så de passer til den situation forbrugeren befinder sig i. 
Når vi tilbyder kaffe, så er det ikke bare kaffe. Vores barista har udvalgt økologiske bønner af højeste kvalitet, som er ristet til den nordiske smag.

Vi skal værne om miljøet, derfor er vores kaffeløsninger altid Co2 neutrale og vi tilbyder desuden et retur system, så vi tager den brugte kaffegrums retur, så den kan genanvendes i økologisk planteproduktion.

Vil I høre mere om hvordan Gastro's kan hjælpe din virksomhed med at skabe større trivsel blandt medarbejderne, studerende på en skole eller noget helt tredje, så kontakt os på info@gastros.dk

Name: Coffee By Primates
Description:
Coffee By Primates foretrukne kunde bliver dig der værdsætter en god kop. 
Dig der værdsætter og forstår at kaffe ikke blot er en kop sort drik der skal hældes ned for at "overleve", men en oplevelse og for mange et ritual og hverdags rytme man skal tage alvorligt for kaffe betyder vitterligt noget og for mange betyder det at have adgang til en god kop rigtig meget!. 

Vi tager udviklingen og smagsuniverset alvorligt og tilbyder, et smagsunivers og en prissætning, der gør det muligt for alle at få en rigtig god kop kaffe uanset om det værende derhjemme eller i virksomheden!

Name: Mercat de la Boqueria

A la Boqueria hi podreu trobar 200 parades especialitzades en productes de tota mena -verdura i fruita, carn, peix i marisc, aviram, llegums, conserves, queviures...- i 10 bars que ofereixen cuina de mercat per a tots els paladars.

Per acostar encara més la bona alimentació a la ciutat, al mercat també comptem amb una aula gastronòmica, on realitzem cursos i tallers de cuina, i amb l'Espai Boqueria, una sala de formació i divulgació dels productes de mercat i la gastronomia de la ciutat.

La Boqueria arriba també a casa teva! Aquest any hem estrenat un nou mercat online mitjançant el qual els clients del mercat poden comprar des de casa. Els compradors fan els encàrrecs directament a les parades, com si compressin presencialment als seus venedors de confiança, i els fem arribar tota la comanda en una sola tramesa.

Name: LET IT BiB
Description:
Vins naturels et bio en bag-in-box.
Vente en ligne au particuliers: let-it-bib.fr
Vente pros (hors cavistes) : pro@let-it-bib.fr

Avec une offre de près de quatre vingt références en rouge, blanc, rosé et orange, Let it BIB (www.let-it-bib.fr) est aujourd’hui le leader français de la distribution de vins 100% naturels, biodynamiques, bio de qualité, exclusivement conditionnés en bag-in-box (BIB ou cubi), à destination des particuliers comme des professionnels.   

Le BIB est de loin plus pratique (conservation longue de 4 à 6 semaines une fois ouvert, stockage optimisé), plus écologique (recyclable et empreinte carbone jusqu’à 9 fois inférieure / bouteille en verre) et plus économique (prix d’achat largement inférieur aux mêmes vins en bouteilles quand ils existent). 
  
Les vins sélectionnés par Let it BIB sont TOUS produits par des vigneron(ne)s que nous avons vraiment rencontré(e)s et vraiment aimé(e)s, respectueux de l’environnement, tout comme leurs vins que nous avons tous goutés et rigoureusement sélectionnés pour leurs qualités gustatives .

Vive le cubi libre ! 

Nos héro.ïne.s : Hervé Villemade, Karim Vionnet, la famille Lapierre, Valentina Passalacqua, le Clos des Mourres, la famille Breton, La Selve, Axel Chambert, Anne Rouxelin, La Mongestine, la famille Richaud, Sylvie Ledran et Philippe Maffre, Christophe Pacalet, Maxime Dancoine, Guillaume Lavie, Germain Croisille, Mickaël Raynal, Le Clos des Jarres, Villa Roca, Perro Longo, Catherine Bernard, domaine de Prapin, domaine Obrière, Cyril Alonso, Vincent Caillé, Cajus, Peybonhomme, Julie Le Breton et Christophe Vial, domaine Eblin-Fuchs, Benoît Landron, Nathanaël Villet, Francesco Dissegna, Château Bouissel, La Navicelle, domaine de Malaïgue, Alain & Christian Couillaud, la Cantina Orsogna, Amélie Sauvayre, Nadia Lusseau, Dominique Terrier, domaine de Rocheville, domaine Galus, Quinta do Montalto, Bodega Marsilea…

Name: Gander Australia
Description:
The Australian retail sector wastes 527 kilotonnes (or $4.4 billion) of food per year. For retailers, the value of their wasted food is equal to roughly double the profits from their sales.
Gander is a world-first solution on a mission to prevent as much food as possible (ideally all) from becoming waste from a retailer's shelves. As a world-first solution, Gander connects retailers' near-waste food to local consumers via a mobile app. 
The app automatically showcases exactly what markdown items are available in store in real time so shoppers can browse or search for food to buy before it goes to waste.
As a result, significantly more markdowns are sold meaning less go to waste and markdowns are sold faster meaning they are sold at higher margins.
With Gander, retailers reduce their waste profitably while changing nothing to their in-store processes.

Name: ALMOSTO
Description:
