Together, we focus on nurturing our planet, starting by regenerative viticulture.

We believe that regenerative viticulture and wines can lead, boost and accelerate the regenerative products movement and grower's adaptation to the climate crisis. 

By revitalising vineyards and cultivating sustainability, we work:

- to improve soil health & increase biodiversity, 
- for a sustainable life for the farmer, for you, for the planet we call home, and
- to perpetuate healthier, tastier and environmentally responsible products

for now, and for generations to come.

Name: V and B Tours
Description:

Name: SIGMA BAKERIES LTD
Description:
Οur history as family bakers goes back three generations. Companions in your everyday life, at your table for breakfast, lunch and dinner; we honor our lasting relationship by using natural and the purest ingredients as well as by being consistent with the traditional practices of bread making in line with a healthy diet.

We use only the best ingredients in all our baked goods, without preservatives or additives. Our baking methods follow the time-honored family know-how, traditions and techniques passed down from generation to generation. The extra time and care we take in our baking process ensures that we deliver to you exceptional, flavourful bread, rich in color, with a moist texture and crisp crust. After all, the art of baking bread - and lots more! - is one we have mastered for over a century.

- HISTORY -

Sigma bakeries began with our great-grandfather, an artisan of bread making who mastered and passed the technique to our grandfather, his son, George. George started his first bakery in Limassol in 1922; he then moved to Famagusta in the late 50’s. His know-how, enthusiasm and love for artisan bread was inherited by his son Savvas, who became a master baker. Savvas and his wife Andriana, both worked hard and managed to advance and prosper with one old bakery shop at Leondiou street, Old hospital road in Limassol.

In the late 70s the children of the family, entered the business bringing a new philosophy, vision and culture which was established under the name of SIGMA. The brand name Sigma was derived from the initials of all the family members’ names. Being together, united as a family, with almost no capital to invest, they were faced with the challenging task of creating a leading, trusted brand. 
Joining forces with other like-minded professionals, persevering through hard work, being united in vision and trust, the Company evolved to become a leading chain of bakeries and among the very best performing companies in the food sector in Cyprus today.

Name: Homebaker@Clover
Description:
Our journey started in 2015 when we started to create our first homemade recipe, the Signature Classic Cinnamon Rolls and there’s nothing like our smooth dough and rich cream cheese as the finishing touch. By focusing on the art of artisan bakery, we have now created more varieties for the community to savor. Our pastries are designed to be a tantalizing treat for your day.

Deconstructing the traditional recipes, we source the finest ingredients for daily baking in small batches. The cinnamon rolls that we make are not only fluffy but easier to digest. Once our bakes are out of the oven, we encase them with melting toppings that will tickle your taste buds and satiate your sweet tooth.

In 2020, we have opened the doors of our first outlet in Bukit Jelutong, Shah Alam for C.Lovers to enjoy our modern industrial Northern Europe ambience while indulging in our selection of Cinnamon Rolls varieties. Alternatively, we also serve Swedish Knots Polish Bapka, Bear Claw, Assorted Bagels, and a selection of bagels in our All-Day Breakfast Menu for people who prefer other types of pastries for their 'fika'. Consequently, we are kicking our plans into high gear to open more branches in different community areas so that you will get to have the pastries that you crave from any of our nearby cafe outlets.

If you have been a part of our journey, you are the bee’s knees. Words are not enough to describe how thankful we are for the chance to bring happiness into your life and we are pleased to have more C.Lovers to visit us along our journey as an artisan bakery. At Homebaker@Clover, desserts are never an afterthought.

Name: Sadie's Foods
Description:
Founded and operated by entrepreneur/mom/TV host/community builder Mercedes E. Wilson.

While growing up Mercedes' grandparents had eleven children!  They had a huge garden in their backyard and from it, her grandmother canned a lot of food.  One of the dishes that she canned was something they all called Cha Cha Relish and Mercedes' Grandmother used to put it on her collard greens to give it a little kick.  Mercedes learned about Cha Cha Relish while doing a Recipes for Life  segment on ABC Buffalo affiliate with her father in early 2020.  They did collard greens with relish and everyone fell in love with it.  

Mercedes has since made her now famous relish for all of her friends and family to try and they fell in love with it too!  The relish that you see in stores today, is that exact relish – the one inspired by Mercedes' grandmother that was loved by so many.

Nous bénéficions d’une réelle proximité avec nos vignerons partenaires, ce qui nous permet de vous offrir une sélection confidentielle, rigoureuse et authentique au meilleur prix. Name: Epsilon-Vet Coffee
Description:
Every Bean Tells a Story of Valor and Virtue.

At Epsilon-Vet Coffee, we believe in the unmatched freshness of coffee, but our mission runs deeper than just delivering the freshest coffee to your doorstep. Founded and operated by Special Operations Veterans, we're dedicated to honoring the service and sacrifice of our fellow heroes. We don't just roast coffee; we craft a blend of courage, community, and commitment to making a real difference.

Freshness with a Purpose

We pledge an unparalleled coffee experience, ensuring no bean is roasted until your order is placed. This relentless pursuit of excellence and freshness means every cup is imbued with the richness and vitality of perfectly roasted coffee, shipped the same day to guarantee the ultimate taste experience. But there's more in every sip than just flavor.

A Cup Full of Support

Beyond the brew, Epsilon-Vet Coffee is a conduit for change, a salute to those who've served. A portion of every purchase is directly invested in initiatives designed to combat veteran suicide and support mental health, reinforcing our belief that together, we can brew a better future for our veterans.

Join Our Mission

When you choose Epsilon-Vet Coffee, you're not just selecting a coffee; you're joining a movement. Together, we celebrate the resilience of the human spirit and honor the bravery of those who've worn the uniform. Experience the goodness of freshly roasted beans that carry a legacy of strength and service.

Taste the Difference, Make a Difference

Embark on a journey with us, where every order offers more than just a morning ritual—it's a pledge to support, honor, and uplift the veteran community. Let's make every cup count.

Name: State of Play Brewing
Description:
BEERPRENEUR | STATE OF PLAY | TASTE ABOVE ALL ELSE 
I launched NZ’s first zero alcohol brewery, State Of Play Brewing, because I want people to have a choice of quality drinks on every occasion. With good choice comes great change and now we can all enjoy a beer with mates regardless of the alcohol content. That’s my State of Play. 

 STATE OF PLAY | THE TRUTH ABOUT ALCOHOL
As NZ’s first zero-alcohol brewery in a sea of traditional options, I'm on a mission to redefine social norms around alcohol consumption. I believe in empowering individuals to make informed choices about their health and well-being, whether that's through moderation, exploration of alcohol-free alternatives, or embracing a lifestyle change.

 WHAT IF YOU LOVE BEER, BUT DON’T WANT ALCOHOL?
Whatever your motivation, the State of Play award winning Zero’s will hit the spot. Taste is above all else. At State of Play we brew the proper way, no funny business. Naturally brewed with an innovative yeast to retain all the beeriness. It’s beer that tastes like beer should – full of flavour. Our flagship IPA is brewed with New Zealand hops and Canterbury malts, in sunny Hawkes Bay. Crack a can today.

 TESTIMONIAL
“Stunned. It’s delicious. It’s full of flavour – malty hoppy goodness. I can’t finish this, I’ve got stuff to do tonight…oh no wait, I totally can!!!" 

 Whether you're interested in beer, business, entrepreneurship, wellness, or simply curious about my journey.  Call me on 022-454-7900 to talk or email grant@stateofplaybeer.com

 Have a beer question or want to place a wholesale order? Call 0800-651-539 or email sales@stateofplaybeer.com

Name: Carrossel Supermercados
Description:
O Carrossel Supermercados é uma empresa familiar, inaugurada em 11 de novembro de 1972, em São Lourenço, juntamente com uma loja de materiais de construção e com a representação de bebidas Antártica, pelos sócios da empresa Casa Dutra Ltda:

João Flori, José Carbone Filho, Miguel Arcanjo Gorgulho e José Ildefonso Fernandes. Em julho de 1973 esta sociedade foi desfeita e cada um dos sócios assumiu uma parte do negócio. José Ildefonso, em sociedade com seu cunhado Lourenço Sérgio Nogueira, ficou com a parte de auto-serviço, hoje Carrossel Supermercados. Em outubro de 1975 Lourenço Sérgio Nogueira deixou a sociedade e José

Ildefonso assumiu a empresa ao lado de sua esposa Regina. Com o passar do tempo, os filhos foram admitidos na sociedade e atualmente administram a empresa: Heli e José Carlos (desde 01/10/1972), Dimas (desde 31/12/1980), Flávio (desde 02/01/1984), Luciano (desde 16/12/1990) e Regina Célia (desde 01/11/2003). Em 1988 José Ildefonso se afastou, passando a administrar o Sítio Carrossel.

A família realizou uma votação e o filho Heli foi escolhido para dirigir a empresa, dando continuidade à administração, juntamente com os irmãos. A empresa chega aos seus 50 anos com cinco lojas da bandeira Carrossel nas cidades de São Lourenço, Caxambu, Baependi e Itanhandu e uma loja com a bandeira Sempre Nosso, na cidade de São Lourenço, gerando atualmente mais de 600 empregos diretos. E já planejamos crescer nos próximos anos, gerando mais empregos e atendendo com toda excelência nossos clientes.

No decorrer dos anos a Wine-Time Europe pressentiu um crescimento na área dos vermutes e aperitivos devido ao crescimento de estrangeiros radicados em Portugal e pelos milhares de visitantes ocasionais, todos trazendo com eles a cultura dos seus países, nomeadamente os da Europa do Sul, que não dispensavam o seu apéritif.

Assim nasceu a vontade de empurrar esta cultura aproveitando a abertura de esplanadas em todos os passeios disponíveis em Portugal e proporcionando assim mais uma fonte de receitas para os especialistas do canal Horeca.

Hoje podemos afirmar que embora ainda principiante a noção do aperitivo está já bem assente e já podemos afirmar que os vermutes não são unicamente utilizados na mixologia para cocktails famosos como o Negroni ou o Manhattan.

Aqui na Vermuteria Portuguesa, quisemos criar um espaço virtual onde os amantes de Vermutes e Aperitivos podem encontrar o que se faz de melhor nesta categoria de bebidas antigas mas de tanta actualidade,

De filosofie van toen is de basis van nu, de lekkerste producten direct van de bron. Ook verkopen wij andere delicatessen zoals olijven, tapenades, verschillende worst soorten en natuurlijk onze eigen Zuivelhoeve zuivel.

Wij geloven er in dat eten alleen lekker en gezond is als het met liefde en kunde is gemaakt, met een directe verbinding tot de bron.

Eerlijk smaakt het lekkerst!

RAIN is proud to bottle at the source in Tiger, GA, deep in the Appalachian Mountains. Sourced in a true temperate rainforest with over 65" of rainfall a year, not only is our packaging sustainable - So is the water!

Founded in 2018, RAIN Bottling Company is on a mission to end our dependance on single use plastics. While convenient bottled water is one of the largest contributors to our plastic waste problem, we aim to change that.

Name: Kids' Food and Drink Collective
Description:
The Kids' Food & Drink Collective - Challenging and Changing our Children's Food Culture

Founded in September 2024, the KFDC is the first UK membership association for healthier children’s food and drink brands. We hope to bring together businesses, brands and parents in a common goal to drive up the standard of children’s food and drink and encourage a change in the general culture that often pervades this category. We have developed a unique accreditation system, which will help both industry and consumers to quickly and easily discern which products represent a healthier choice for children.

Currently our joining criteria are designed to consider aspects such as HFSS compliance, levels of processing and artificial ingredients and sugar content (including free sugars from fruit juice, concentrates and purees) in accordance with current NHS and government guidelines. 

Our long-term goal is to establish a set of criteria that consumers will expect products to meet, giving brands an incentive to innovate and improve and in turn driving up overall standards across the children’s food sector. 

Find out more about the work we're doing and how to join the KFDC by visiting our website.

Noi di Bennati selezioniamo con cura i migliori prodotti per realizzare doni che fanno davvero la differenza e che regalano momenti di gioia e condivisione durante le festività.  
La nostra mission è offrire qualità, abbondanza e il miglior rapporto qualità-prezzo ai nostri clienti che ogni anno ci scelgono e diventano parte della nostra grande famiglia.  

Siamo una famiglia che si preoccupa della nostra comunità e del benessere delle persone che la compongono e desideriamo accogliere iniziative sociali per garantire un impatto positivo sulla comunità in cui viviamo e lavoriamo. 

Siamo coraggiosi promotori di un cambiamento reale e tangibile: qui in Bennati favoriamo l’integrazione delle persone diversamente abili anche e soprattutto sul lavoro. Questo per noi significa restituire loro un’indipendenza economica, ma soprattutto dare loro la possibilità di esercitare ciò che, a tutti gli effetti, è un loro diritto come esseri umani.  

Nel 2018 nasce inoltre la collaborazione con Banco Alimentare e oggi siamo entusiasti di aver contribuito alla donazione di oltre 1.900.000 pasti a coloro che ne hanno più bisogno, dimostrando il nostro impegno costante nel sostenere e aiutare la comunità, un impegno che si rinnova e cresce proprio grazie ai nostri fedeli clienti che ci permettono di raggiungere ogni anno un obiettivo concreto.  

Scegliendo Bennati hai la possibilità di fare un magnifico regalo ai tuoi collaboratori, ma anche un dono alla società in cui viviamo.

Name: Dr. Kiran's Gluten Free
Description:
After years of studying gluten and its effects, We began our experiment and research on gluten-free and healthy food. As a result of our research and study, we have developed healthy, nutritious, and tasty products that are gluten-free.

Why is gluten-free food good for you? 

•	A gluten-free diet is essential for managing the signs and symptoms of celiac disease (wheat allergy) and other medical conditions associated with gluten.

•	A gluten-free diet is also popular among people who adopt a healthy lifestyle and enhance their quality of life.

•	It helps ease digestive symptoms, reduce chronic inflammation, boost energy, and promote weight loss.

Our team is working since 2015, and Currently we manufacture affordable Gluten-free products like 

•	Flour  -Suji, Besan, Multigrain Flour
•	Gluten-Free Cookies  -Tutty-Fruity, Elaichi, and Coconut, Jeera

The driving force behind Fati's is Chef Fatma Ahmed, a culinary arts specialist with a passion for creating mouth-watering baked goods. Alongside Chef Fatma is Abdelrahman, a marketing expert dedicated to bringing Fati's delicious offerings to a wider audience by using unique marketing strategies such content creation. Together, they have built a brand known for its innovation, convenience, and customer satisfaction.

At Fati's, we believe in the magic of baking and the joy it brings to people's lives. Our cloud-based approach ensures that our freshly baked goods are just a click away, ready to be enjoyed by sweet lovers across Egypt.

Name: Beans
Description:
On a mission to reduce food waste while helping consumers save money.

Beans is a system to help FMCGs manage their waste more intelligently and, ultimately, reduce it. At our very core, we believe in challenging the status quo by giving a second chance to products that would otherwise be thrown out or, worse, be buried or incinerated. We believe in a world where there is no such thing as waste, only pre-repurposed products. To rephrase the famous idiom, one business’ trash is another person’s treasure.

The world of consumer goods and retail, with their rules and regulations around expiry dates, shape and size requirements, promotions, etc. only encourage wasteful consumption. It’s this attitude that leads to unnecessary waste.

The only thing better than a win-win, is a win-win-win, right? Time to reset our throwaway society, empower businesses to do better and give consumers their purchasing power back.

Name: JustGood
Description:
JustGood first found its roots of inspiration in the Sabah local natives’ market called Tamu. It showed us how we could share goodness grown with love. That’s why we strive to bring people back to the roots of authentic food. 

We know that in a world of processed food, we need secure sustenance. The home cooks, the chefs, and the farmers, the hearty gastronomes need nutritious, wholesome meals that are trustworthy and traceable. We offer authentic nourishment to support a healthy eating culture. Our stores, restaurants and cafes bring this genuine goodness to everyone. 

We build a healthy human-food relationship. To do this, we focus on putting people, the planet and purpose first. As courageous cultivators, we are driven to provide nutrition to the nation. To sow the seeds of sustainability in the furrows of agriculture. To create food for the family. We want raise a robust generation rooted in hearty meals. They should have food that is just good as it is. We strive for purposeful growth in the community, driving everyone towards a better life that is just good.

This is an introduction to a much bigger story about algae. This tiny plant has the potential to reshape how we source some of the highest-quality, flavor-enhancing ingredients with a fraction of the planetary resources. We can’t wait to hear your thoughts and show that algae deserves a seat at the culinary table.

Name: Ginsiders
Description:
C’est en 2016, lors d’une soirée cocktails, que deux amis de longue date, Maxime Eberhardt et Pierre Yves Kielwasser, décident de créer ensemble une page Instagram : Ginsiders. 
 
Bien plus qu’une simple collaboration amicale, ce compte éponyme aux milliers d’abonnés résulte d’une passion commune pour l’univers des spiritueux, -en particulier le gin-, et d’un certain goût pour l’esthétisme, où se mêlent photographie et créativité.
 
Leur but ? Créer et alimenter des contenus originaux autour du gin, et mettre en avant leurs créations cocktails au travers de nombreux posts Instagram.  

C’est notamment par ce biais que Ginsiders s’est forgé une solide réputation et a vu naître un réel engouement sur les réseaux sociaux ; après quelques années d’existence seulement, la page affichait presque 100 000 abonnés ! Par la suite, de nombreuses marques de gins ont sollicité des collaborations, en vue de promouvoir leur marque et leurs produits, profitant ainsi d'une large visibilité. En effet, Ginsiders se révèle être une véritable vitrine en ligne incontournable ; bénéficiant d’un rayonnement international, certaines vidéos culminent à plusieurs millions de vues ! 
 
Leader mondialement reconnu pour sa communication ambitieuse et originale, Ginsiders compte aujourd’hui parmi les plus gros influenceurs dans l’univers du gin, avec plus de 300 000 abonnés sur les réseaux sociaux (Instagram, Facebook, etc.) 
 
Au fil du temps, Ginsiders a donc beaucoup évolué et s’est professionnalisé en créant, en parallèle, la première plateforme en ligne dédiée à cet univers inspirant: 
- Un site web 100% gin, qui recense un large éventail de plus de 200 références de Gin & Tonic
- Une mappemonde interactive qui référence plus de 1 200 distilleries
- L’histoire du Gin, du Tonic
- De nombreuses recettes cocktails

Depuis fin 2021, Ginsiders ajoute à ses activités un concept de salon encore inédit en France : Ginsiders Festival, le grand salon du gin.

Name: Doce Magia
Description:
A Doce Magia nasceu primeiro no coração da Tô. É assim que ela é conhecida pelos mais chegados. Ela amava preparar receitas especiais para a família. O sorriso de todos era a inspiração para aprimorar o talento que surgia em cada nova criação. 

O nosso propósito é produzir sabores que ficam guardados na memória de nossos clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores, despertando os melhores sentimentos através de uma comida que te abraça. Afinal, a vida é feita de doces momentos. Por isso, mantemos a essência de quando começamos 30 anos atrás. 

Atualmente, com três lojas e um time de quase 100 colaboradores, nós vamos espalhar a magia de todo o afeto presente em cada receita com uma visão de longo prazo. Queremos ganhar o coração das pessoas com a qualidade incomparável que oferecemos e, dessa forma, alçar voos cada vez maiores, sendo autoridade quando o assunto é confeitaria artesanal. 

A Doce Magia almeja ser referência para os momentos especiais, sejam eles uma grande festa, ou um momento mais íntimo com a família ou amigos. Estaremos presentes nas mais doces lembranças, fazendo parte de memórias afetivas com o gostinho de quero mais.

Name: BEZI
Description:
We found ourselves entering social gatherings, snacks scattered recklessly around the table. Strawberries and carrots askew, we’d timidly ask, “Excuse me, where’s the labneh?” 

Horrified—or worse—confused looks would turn our way. “Well, I don’t know about labneh, but we have some hummus,” these so-called friends would answer. We were appalled. Time and time again, we entered parties, grocery stores, picnics, bowling clubs, period-drama nights, even our own fridges in search of this dippable goodness. Only to be met with a labneh-hole in our heart (and stomach). 

So, we took it upon ourselves to create Bezi: the labneh that labnehs better than any other labneh out there. High in protein, low in tang, and ready to party.

Name: Van den Berg Gewürze & Spirituosen
Description:
Die Vision: Als erste Wahl für anspruchsvolle Gaumen will Van den Berg Genuss-Enthusiasten weltweit inspirieren und so elementarer Teil intensiver kulinarischer Momente sein.

Van den Berg ist eine Gewürzmanufaktur in Graz, die sich auf hochwertige Premium-Gewürze spezialisiert hat, die an Intensität nicht zu überbieten sind. Mit viel Leidenschaft werden die exzellentesten Gewürze aus der ganzen Welt ausgewählt und gelangen zur Veredelung in das Gewürzhaus Graz. Hier werden daraus Delikatessen kreiert, die gänzlich von Hand gemischt und abgefüllt werden.

Die Mission: Grob oder fein, pur oder gemischt, fest oder gelöst: Mit unseren herausragenden Produkten bringt Van den Berg einfach mehr Geschmack in jedes Gericht und trägt so zur Kreation kulinarischer Meisterwerke bei.

Das Sortiment hierfür ist extrem breit gefächert und umfasst neben besonderen puren Gewürzen wie dem fermentierten Kampot-Pfeffer, Sizilianisches Zitronensalz oder der in Österreich kultivierten Bio Aji Charapita (die teuerste Chili der Welt) auch die Kombination dieser: nämlich in Form der nach eigenen Rezepturen hergestellten Gewürzmischungen. 

Abgerundet wird das Sortiment durch eine besondere Auswahl an Premium-Spirituosen: denn Alkohol hilft erlesenen Gewürzen ganz speziell bei der Entfaltung Ihres außergewöhnlich intensiven Geschmacks. 

Mittlerweile werden nicht nur Privat-Gourmets beliefert sondern auch viele hoch-dekorierte Küchen, wie etwa die von
Sterne-Koch Wolfgang Zankl-Sertl (Pramerl & the Wolf, 1090 Wien), der sagt: 
"Was uns und Van den Berg verbindet ist das hartnäckige Streben nach der besten Produktqualität. Diesen positiven Wahnsinn schmeckt man".

Für anspruchsvolle Unternehmen werden außerdem nachhaltig in Erinnerung bleibende Lösungen in den Bereichen Mitarbeiter-Zufriedenheit, Fringe Benefits, Kunden-Bindung, Corporate Gifting und Event-Management angeboten.

Name: L'ÉCLAIR DE GÉNIE
Description:
Christophe Adam, l’Homme aux Mille Eclairs, créateur, entrepreneur, celui que le guide Pudlo a consacré “Meilleur Pâtissier de l’année” en 2014, et récemment élu « Meilleur pâtissier 2015 » par les Relais Desserts, lance en 2012 L’Eclair de Génie, un concept créatif « mono-produit » autour de l’éclair.

Son idée : une pâtisserie contemporaine, innovante, rock’n’roll, qui casse les codes de la pâtisserie traditionnelle. Ses best-sellers : l’éclair vanille-pécan et l’éclair caramel beurre salé. La recette du Succès Adam ? De la fantaisie, du naturel, de la finesse, de la fraîcheur, de l’esthétique, et surtout de la créativité ! 

La société n’a cessé de se développer depuis l’ouverture de la première boutique dans le quartier mythique du Marais. Christophe Adam ne cache plus ses ambitions d’extension en France et à l’international, avec l’ouverture de boutiques en Asie, aux Émirats arabes unis ou encore en Europe ! Le chef y a installé ses propres laboratoires, pour offrir à la clientèle des produits 100% frais !

 En succursale, nous recrutons des boulangers, pâtissiers, vendeurs et responsables de boutique pour rejoindre une enseigne humaine, exigeante et moderne.
 En franchise, nous accompagnons les porteurs de projet à chaque étape : étude de faisabilité, recherche d’emplacement, plans, travaux, formation, ouverture.

Rejoindre MARIETTE, c’est :
 Proposer des produits de qualité, fabriqués avec soin
 Travailler dans un cadre structuré, chaleureux et stimulant
 Participer à une aventure entrepreneuriale ou rejoindre un groupe en forte croissance

Notre réseau est déjà implanté en Bretagne, Rhône-Alpes, Alsace… et poursuit son développement actif en 2025.

Vous êtes professionnel de la boulangerie ou souhaitez entreprendre avec un concept différenciant ?

Name: Goody Goody Liquor
Description:
Whether you are searching for the finest wine, newest micro-brew, or limited-edition spirit, Goody Goody has established itself as an institution.

The highest volume liquor store chain in North Texas began in Dallas when Joe Jansen purchased Goo Goo Liquors in 1964. At the time, the store, located on Lower Greenville Avenue, was a meager 15-by-50 feet wide. To save $600 on new signage, Jansen was able to change the name of the store by simply adding “dy” to the original name.

Over the past five decades, Goody Goody has established an excellent reputation based on grand selection, low pricing, and old-fashioned customer service. In fact, by the time Goody Goody opened its second location in 1974, it was noted as the largest liquor store in the state.

“We don’t serve the public to make a profit, we make a profit because we serve the public,” says Jansen. “That philosophy still holds true today as we place an emphasis on helping our customers select the right product.”

The focus on customer service has remained critical to the chain’s success. With 24 stores across Dallas-Fort Worth, Longview, and Houston, every associate is trained on core pillars that continue to set Goody Goody apart in a competitive environment.

When it comes to selection, Goody Goody has it all. With more than 8,200 wines from around the world; 1,600 domestic, foreign, and craft beers; and 5,900 spirits; you’re almost certain to find whatever you’re searching for. On the rare occasion the item is not stocked by the store, special orders can be made at no additional charge if it is something that is distributed in Texas.

Whether you’re looking for fine wine, craft beer, or premium liquor, remember that Goody Goody is around the corner with folks who are ready to help you find the right drink for any occasion.

Name: Grupo Bom Beef
Description:

Essa ideia não surgiu por acaso. O tio de Netão era proprietário de uma casa de carne e o sobrinho se encantou pelo negócio.

Para conquistar esse sonho, viajou pelo mundo trabalhando no bar de um navio. Em 2014 abriu o Bom Beef, um açougue focado em carnes de altíssima qualidade.

Durante a pandemia, surgiu a oportunidade de produzir seu próprio hambúrguer, dando origem então à marca Bom Beef Burgers, que repete o sucesso do açougue.

Name: Midway Supermarket
Description:
لقد تأسست سلسلة أسواق ميدوي في العام 1962م كأول سوبرماركت حديث في مملكة البحرين ، وهي تعتبر ذراع شركة على راشد الأمين في قطاع البيع بالتجزئة ، وتعد أسواق ميدوي أكثر سلسلة متاجر نمواً في المملكة حيث تضم عشرة فروع منتشرة في جميع ربوع مملكة البحرين ومن المتوقع أن تتوسع وتعزز نشاطاتها في القريب العاجل.

ميدوي هو مفهوم المتجر الراقي التي يركز على تقديم أفضل المنتجات مع ضمان جودة الخدمة بأفضل الأسعار التي تكون في متناول الجميع حتى نتمكن من تلبية احتياجات جميع أنواع المستهلكين ، حيث ترفع أسواق ميدوي عالياً شعار خدمة العملاء عن طريق تقديم مجموعة واسعة من المنتجات بأسعار تنافسية على يد فريق عمل يتمتع بالخبرة والكفاءة التامة في نفس الوقت الذي يتقيد فيه تقيداً صارماً بمعايير مراقبة وضمان الجودة.

يتم دعم فروع متاجر ميدوي ببنية تحتية متطورة للغاية ومجهزة بأحدث ما توصل إليه العلم في مجال المرافق والمنافع كما أنها تقدم خدمات التوصيل لعملاء الكرام لدى جميع فروعها وتفتح على مدى 24 ساعة في بعض فروعها.
Midway Supermarket was established in 1962 as the first modern supermarket in the Kingdom of Bahrain. It is considered the arm of Ali Rashid Al Amin Co. in the retail sector. Midway Supermarket are the fastest growing chain in the Kingdom with 10 retail outlets across the Kingdom, and to expand and strengthen its activities soon.
Midway is an upscale store concept that focuses on delivering the best products while ensuring quality of service at the best prices that are affordable so that we can meet the needs of all types of consumers. Midway raise the customer service logo by offering a wide range of products at competitive prices an experienced and efficient team at the same time as strict adherence to quality control and assurance standards.
Midway stores are supported by a state-of-the-art infrastructure equipped with latest facilities and services. It also provides delivery services to customers at all its branches and is open 24 hours in some of its branches.

Name: Smiths Chippy
Description:
Smiths Chippy, nestled in the heart of South Shields, is more than just a takeaway destination – it's a culinary journey steeped in tradition and excellence. Renowned for its exceptional fish and chips, Smiths Chippy has been a local institution for years, captivating the taste buds of both residents and visitors alike.

What sets Smiths Chippy apart is its unwavering commitment to quality. Using only the freshest, sustainably sourced fish and locally grown potatoes, every dish is a testament to the art of crafting the perfect fish and chips. The skilled chefs at Smiths Chippy expertly blend time-honored recipes with contemporary cooking techniques, resulting in a harmonious fusion of flavors that transport patrons to a bygone era of seaside indulgence.

The warm and inviting atmosphere of the establishment adds to the experience, as families, friends, and solo diners gather to savor the iconic British meal. With attention to detail evident in every crispy bite and the friendly staff that exudes hospitality, Smiths Chippy creates an environment that fosters cherished memories and cherished connections.

Smiths Chippy isn't just a place to eat; it's a cultural touchstone, an embodiment of South Shields' culinary heritage. Whether you're relishing a classic fish supper or exploring modern twists on the traditional fare, a visit to Smiths Chippy promises to be a gastronomic adventure that leaves an imprint on both your palate and your heart.
Location: Newcastle Upon Tyne, Newcastle Upon Tyne

Name: Kölner Weinkeller - REWE Wein Online GmbH
Description:
The Kölner Weinkeller is one of the best addresses for premium wines in Germany. Our historic wine cellar is located 13 meters beneath the ground and offers more than 4,500 wines on 2,500 square meters. From simple wines for every day to the 100 Parker points bottles in our treasure room. You can also find all wines online in our modern web store.
The Cologne wine cellar not only offers a large selection of top wines, customers can also taste them and learn more about wine. We have more than 50 wines permanently opened at our tasting counter and our certified sommeliers will be happy to give you comprehensive advice. With a circulation of more than 30.000 copies, our WeinBrevier is probably the highest-circulation and most regarded consumer wine magazine in Germany. Here we tell the stories behind the wines and the winemakers. In our wine blog you´ll find more stories from the world of wine, films, news, recipes and much more. At our wine-events in the cellars treasure or in top restaurants in the region, we regularly present discoveries, new wines or even rare 1er Grand Cru from Bordeaux to selected customers.

Det store varierende udvalg af fersk fisk, røgvarer fra eget røgeri og vores mange delikatesser , går hånd i hånd med det høje serviceniveau, som personalet altid udviser. 
I vores surdejsbageri, er vores fornemmeste opgave, at tilbyde det friskeste og lækreste brød og kager, hver eneste dag. Alt lavet med kun de bedste ingredienser 
og traditionelle metoder. Vores speciale er surdejsbrød, som udvikles gennem en langsom og naturlig gæring, typisk 24-36 timer. 
Dette hjælper fordøjelsen og udvikler en dybere smag, aroma og skorpe. Velkommen.

Name: Feuillette Le Petit Quevilly
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page du magasin Feuillette Le Petit Quevilly !

Plus qu'une simple boulangerie, Feuillette est née en 2009 de la passion de deux anciens pâtissiers pour l'esthétisme et la tradition. Notre boulangerie-pâtisserie propose une large gamme de produits originaux et de qualité.

Ouverts 7 jours sur 7, venez nous retrouver à partir du mois de septembre 2023, pour un petit-déjeuner gourmand, un déjeuner sur le pouce, un goûter en famille, ou tout simplement emporter vos gourmandises !

Chez Feuillette, vous trouverez une large gamme de pâtisseries et des créations signées Feuillette, telles que notre pain, notre brioche feuilletée ou encore nos macarons. 

Notre concept architectural convivial et chaleureux est conçu pour vous offrir une expérience unique, à la fois gourmande et familiale. Nous avons à cœur de vous accueillir dans un cadre agréable et confortable, comme à la maison.

Nous avons hâte de vous accueillir prochainement dans notre boutique Feuillette Le Petit Quevilly et vous faire découvrir notre univers gourmand et chaleureux !

Name: ONS Biologische Delicatessen
Description:
Welkom bij ONS biologische delicatessenwinkel! Bij ONS draait alles om gezond eten, het milieu, lokale gemeenschappen en hoogwaardige producten.

We geloven in de kracht van biologisch voedsel om zowel ons lichaam als de planeet te voeden. Daarom selecteren we zorgvuldig onze producten van lokale boeren die met liefde en respect voor de natuur verbouwen. Onze verse maaltijden, sappige vleeswaren en ambachtelijke kazen zijn allemaal biologisch, waardoor je geniet van de puurste smaken zonder schadelijke chemicaliën of pesticiden.

Door direct bij boeren in te kopen, verminderen we transport en CO2-uitstoot, waardoor we ons steentje bijdragen aan het verminderen van klimaatverandering. Bovendien ondersteunen we lokale boeren en stimuleren we duurzame landbouwpraktijken. Het is onze missie om een duurzame voedselketen op te bouwen, waarin boeren een eerlijke prijs ontvangen en de gemeenschap wordt versterkt.

In onze winkel hebben we ook onze eigen productieafdeling, waar we met zorg en vakmanschap heerlijke gerechten bereiden. Onze getalenteerde chefs maken gebruik van de beste biologische ingrediënten om smaakvolle maaltijden, ambachtelijke vleeswaren en andere lekkernijen te creëren. Op deze manier kunnen we de kwaliteit en versheid van onze producten garanderen, terwijl we ook de controle hebben over het productieproces.

Kies voor gezond eten, ondersteun lokale boeren, en geniet van biologische lekkernijen van de hoogste kwaliteit. Stap binnen in onze winkel en ervaar de heerlijke smaken die samenkomen in een duurzame en verantwoorde voedingservaring.

Name: Cindys Bakery & Restaurant
Description:
Cindys began as a quaint neighborhood bakery that served freshly baked goods to the community in Tarlac City. It quickly gained popularity for its fluffy breads and buttery pastries that served as the breakfast and merienda of choice for many.

Launching off of its crowd-favorite breads and snack specials, Cindys transformed from a simple bakeshop into a full service eatery, buffing up its menu to include more savory dishes like its best selling Palabok and Chicken Barbecue.

Cindys began to rapidly expand, serving its delectable delicacies to Northern Luzon and Metro Manila. Cindys continues to serve its signature meals and baked goods to a standard of quality that keeps people coming back for more, ensuring that it’s always better than you remember.

Cindys has earned its place in the hearts and minds of the Filipino people for its scrumptious food and welcoming atmosphere. Its cherished heritage of serving hearty, heart-warming meals that remind people of home and family has given it the reputation of being the place to be.

Name: Purely Sprouted
Description:
Purely Sprouted, Nature's Sprouted Super Snack, is a delicious way to add some superfood power to your snacking routine. Each of our sprouted nut and seed varieties, including almonds, cashews, walnuts, pumpkin seeds and sunflower seeds, are packed with natural protein, fiber, and other vital nutrients to fuel your body throughout the day. And with our Super Snack Mixes, you can enjoy a satisfyingly crunchy blend of sprouted nuts, seeds, and more — perfect for a between- meal boost or a post-workout recharge.

At Purely Sprouted, we're firmly devoted to providing clean label snacks that are made with only the best ingredients. That's why we promise that our snacks are verified Non-GMO and plant based with no artificial colors, preservatives, sweeteners or other additives. We also believe in transparency, which is why we passionately promote our process and espouse the wonder of sprouting.

As a woman-founded and operated brand, Purely Sprouted brings a unique perspective to the world of health and wellness. With a commitment to conscious nutrition, transparent ingredients and a healthier planet, we strive to create a kinder and more equitable world for everyone. We believe that by empowering women in business, we can build a better future.

Name: The Stone Food & Drink Festival
Description:
A not-for-profit CIC (Community Interest Company), the Stone Food & Drink Festival formed in 2004 with the aim of helping promote Stone as Staffordshire’s ‘capital of food’ and to help support the town’s High Street businesses. 

20 years on and the annual food festival is a real ‘red letter day’ in the foodie calendar. The committee also works alongside Stafford Borough Council on the monthly Stone Farmers’ Market and, more recently, alongside Stone Traders’ Group on a regular Stone Street Food event and the new Stone Sunday Series of markets and events, supported by Stone Town Council…

Name: Afuera Coffee Co.
Description:
Afuera Coffee Co. helps change the world, one cup at a time. We provide specialty coffees from the best & most sustainable farms from around the world, providing lovers of the outdoors with the fuel they need for their adventures.

Every action, both big and small, is an opportunity to make a positive impact. Something as simple as purchasing your monthly bag of coffee really can do some good! We believe that put together, it’s all the small, positive actions that can make the biggest difference in time.

Afuera Coffee Co.’s mission is simple: to provide convenient coffee subscriptions that fuel your passions and to support the preservation of our natural environments. We chose Afuera, meaning “outside” in Spanish, as our name because it is at the heart of everything we do and everything we are. 5% of every sale, not just profits, is donated to charities and organizations that actively restore and preserve our outdoors, so that it can be enjoyed by the people of today as well as of tomorrow.

We aim to build a community of people who are just as passionate about exploring the world around them as they are about protecting it. Hence our motto, “Do Good And Go Afuera.”

We hope our coffee helps start your mornings on the right foot and powers your outdoor adventures, just as it does for us!

Description:

Today, we continue to honor that tradition by sourcing the finest coffee beans from around the world and roasting them using latest technology to create a unique range of signature blends.

Name: So Good Kombucha
Description:
Lesley So left her corporate job in 2020 to pursue her dream of building a start up with a social purpose, So Good Kombucha was formed with a few key objective:  to introduce the UK to the most delicious and authentically healthy Kombucha money can buy, and to be an eco-friendly business that cares for our planet and employs refugees.

Most cold drinks are full of artificial ingredients, sugars, and alcohol that’s bad for you. So Good Kombucha offers a delicious alternative - a sophisticated taste, made from the So-Family recipe, that's vegan-friendly, gluten-free, and packed with stuff that's great for your gut-health. So that you can feel Good about treating yourself. 

- Winner of 2022's Gold award from the Free-From Food Awards.
- All 3 core flavours have won a Gold star at the Great Taste Awards
- Stocked in over 50 independent retailers within first year of trade.
- Show experience at the BBC Good Food Show, the Big Feastival, Vegan Campout, and many more!
- We are partnered with Ecologi to offset our carbon impact per employee, and enforces a no new single-used plastics policy in any of our packaging.
- We are Good Market approved (www.goodmarket.global), and a proud certified member of Social Enterprise UK.

Name: Colo Coffee Roasters
Description:
Somos inicialmente cerveceros colombianos con más de 20 años de experiencia y unos apasionados por la industria de bebidas. En 2018 decidimos emprender en el mundo del café especial con COLO COFFEE ROASTERS, una marca de cafés especiales colombianos inspirada en nuestro país, en la riqueza de su gente y de su tierra. 

Nuestro propósito es seleccionar, tostar y servir las mejores tazas de café de Colombia, y para esto, trabajamos de la mano con los caficultores para que puedan producir un mejor café.
Creemos que ese trabajo por la calidad y diversidad llevará a que el mundo conozca Colombia a través de los cafés de COLO. Queremos contar todas las historias que hay detrás del café y promover el consumo consciente en Colombia

Name: Leaven Foods
Description:
Leaven Foods is re-energizing the baking aisle with a proprietary shelf-stable Instant Sourdough powder that delivers all the flavor and health benefits of natural fermentation, without the hassle of caring for a live starter. Founded in 2023 by two scientists with a passion for baking, the company's mission is to elevate everyday baking and bring artisan-level sourdough into home kitchens, wholesale bakeries, restaurants, and more through a simpler, more convenient and consistent process.

Leaven's flagship product, Instant Sourdough, is a 100% natural blend of wild yeast and flavor-enhancing “bacteria” captured at their peak, then formulated into a pantry staple. The result is a new product category that opens up sourdough baking to everyone, not just expert bakers. And for those who want more complex flavors from fermentation without the sourdough tang, Leaven Foods Wild Yeast is also available.
 
From artisan sourdough loaves to last-minute pizza parties, Leaven Foods is sourdough made simple.

Name: La Ferme du Gros Caillou
Description:
Située à Vannecrocq, non loin du Pays d’Auge, la Ferme du Gros Caillou cultive l’art de transformer la pomme sous toutes ses formes, avec passion et authenticité.

Parmi ses trésors, le fameux balsamique de pomme “Le Velours”, médaillé Épicure d’Or 2024, incarne parfaitement le savoir-faire de la ferme. Élaboré à partir de 7 litres de jus de pomme et 1 litre de vinaigre de cidre, lentement réduits pendant un mois, ce condiment d’exception sublime aussi bien les salades que les mets sucrés ou salés.

Aujourd’hui, la gamme s’est enrichie de quatre variations de balsamiques de pomme, chacune offrant une expérience gustative unique, entre douceur, équilibre et intensité aromatique.

Depuis la reprise de la ferme familiale en 2019, Marc-Antoine Rabel redonne vie à ce lieu chargé d’histoire. Les 5 hectares de vergers produisent cidre, jus de pomme (naturel et pétillant), vinaigre de cidre et bien sûr, la collection de balsamiques de pomme.

Les produits de la Ferme du Gros Caillou sont disponibles directement sur place, dans des casiers automatiques en libre-service, accessibles 24h/24 et 7j/7, pour le plaisir des amateurs de saveurs locales, à toute heure du jour ou de la nuit.

Entre tradition, innovation et respect du terroir, la Ferme du Gros Caillou vous invite à découvrir l’excellence normande à travers ses créations fruitées et raffinées.

Name: FȲTA
Description:
FȲTA is a first-of-its-kind plant-based sports and active nutrition brand designed to optimize athletic performance, health and environmental sustainability.  

Founded by “The Game Changers” documentary producer and The Ultimate Fighter winner, James Wilks, FȲTA utilizes an advanced protein blend made from two ancient grains: whole-ground lupin, an ancient, soil-regenerating bean, and EverPro, an upcycled protein made from barley and rice. EverPro was developed by AB InBev’s sustainable ingredient business, EverGrain.

FȲTA launched in June 2023 and offers three flavors of its Elite Plant Protein — Creamy Chocolate, Café Latte and Caramel Vanilla. To learn more about FȲTA’s revolutionary new foodline, visit https://fyta.com/.

Name: Délices du terroir – Épicerie itinérante & Produits du terroir
Description:
Délices du terroir est une épicerie itinérante engagée dans la valorisation des produits artisanaux et locaux d’Ardèche et de Drôme. Nous sélectionnons avec soin une large gamme de produits authentiques : charcuteries, confiseries, spécialités à la châtaigne, miels, tartinades et bien d’autres trésors du terroir, élaborés sans conservateurs ni additifs.

 Un engagement fort pour le local et le circuit court
Notre mission ? Rendre accessibles les saveurs du terroir à tous, en desservant les villages ardéchois dépourvus de commerces. Grâce à nos tournées régulières, nous offrons aux habitants une alternative de proximité, tout en soutenant activement les producteurs locaux.

 Bien plus qu’une épicerie : un lien social au cœur des villages
Délices du terroir, c’est aussi une expérience humaine et conviviale : chaque passage de notre épicerie est une occasion de créer du lien, d’échanger et de dynamiser les zones rurales. Nous répondons ainsi à un véritable besoin en produits sains et authentiques, tout en préservant le patrimoine gastronomique local.

Services proposés :
 Tournées hebdomadaires pour les particuliers
 Coffrets gourmands personnalisés pour les entreprises et événements
 Approvisionnement en produits locaux pour les professionnels (entreprises, collectivités, offices du tourisme...)

 Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure du goût et du partage !

Our mission is to provide a convenient, reliable, and premium shopping experience for individuals and families seeking the finest produce sourced directly from local farms and trusted suppliers.

At Avitus, we understand the importance of healthy eating and the desire for high-quality, fresh ingredients. That's why we have curated an extensive selection of seasonal fruits and vegetables to cater to our customers' diverse preferences and nutritional needs. Name: Granja Mercado
Description:
En Granja, somos una cadena de tiendas innovadoras y comprometidas con ofrecer productos frescos y de calidad, diseñados para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes. Con más de 5 años de trayectoria en el mercado, nos hemos consolidado como una empresa cercana y confiable para las comunidades donde operamos.

Contamos con una estructura dinámica y funcional, con tiendas diseñadas para garantizar una experiencia de compra ágil y eficiente, desde una rápida entrada y salida hasta la visualización clara de nuestros productos. Nuestros valores se centran en la integridad, el respeto, innovación, alegría, simplicidad y la calidad de servicio, los cuales aplicamos no solo en la atención al cliente, sino también en el desarrollo de nuestros equipos de trabajo.

¿Qué nos hace únicos?

•Portafolio de productos exclusivos: Ofrecemos una línea propia llamada "Granja", que incluye alimentos de alta rotación como granos, harinas y productos frescos, con la mejor relación calidad-precio.

•Innovación en procesos: Nuestros cajeros y equipos operativos están capacitados para garantizar un proceso rápido y eficiente, reflejando nuestro compromiso con la innovación en la experiencia del cliente.

•Presencia en la comunidad: Además de nuestros servicios en tienda, contamos con una línea de atención directa para nuestros vecinos, asegurando una relación cercana y responsable.

Nuestra expansión:

Actualmente operamos 15 sucursales en el estado Carabobo, incluyendo un centro de distribución y un corporativo central. Estamos en un emocionante proceso de crecimiento, lo que nos posiciona como un referente del sector retail en Venezuela.

Por qué trabajar con nosotros:

•Desarrollo profesional: Ofrecemos oportunidades de crecimiento y capacitación para todos nuestros colaboradores.

•Ambiente laboral: En Granja promovemos la colaboración, el respeto y la inclusión como pilares fundamentales de nuestro equipo.

Para Granja, tu talento hace la diferencia!

Name: Yoisho matcha
Description:
OUR JOURNEY
How it al started.... Cecile and Merel met each other over matcha and became best friends. Our matcha dates were our time to catch up and get to know each other even better. We were into matcha, but we didn't know about the different qualities, the rituals and why people choose matcha over coffee. We are both not a big coffee fan but like to take the moment to catch up and explore new places to have the 'coffee' moment. We both feel that after our cup of coffee, we rather feel anxious and not per se higher in energy. That's when we started to look into the different kinds of matcha, different kind of qualities and also the origin. We wanted to create something that will not only help people fall in love with matcha and the taste of it, but also something that is ethically produced in Japan.

That is were Yoisho was born, a high quality, ceremonial grade matcha from Japan. We choose the highest grade and wanted the product to be well made, in the traditional way. Our matcha has a soft taste and has no bitter after taste or what so ever. A matcha you can drink every day, to make you feel good, energized and productive.

Name: The Daily Coffee Group
Description:
The Daily Coffee Group is a rapidly expanding and truly home-grown South African coffee café franchise group. Our The Daily Coffee Café franchises – renowned for their good coffee and being the place where locals meet – offer high-yielding investment prospects that the serious franchisee should take note of.

We offer more than mere franchise opportunities. We present a premium investment platform to become part of South Africa’s lucrative and fast-growing coffee industry in which there is an increasing demand for good coffee and branded lifestyle coffee destinations. This demand, furthermore, is fuelled by a collective requirement for neighbourhood destinations – other than the home or the workplace – where people can meet with family and friends, conduct business discussions, and catch up with work while on the move. 
 
The coffee café has become this essential resource for the community. It serves as that important third place, not where people work or live, but where they spend time to regenerate, interact with others, and continue to be productive in their work. This is what people need today. This is where the action is at community and micro-society level, where the money is spent, and where an investment in a coffee franchise offers dividends!

The Daily Coffee Café franchisees can expect to receive a better-than-average return on investment. This earning power is further enhanced by the fact that the capital needed for franchise set-up costs is considerably lower than that of comparable franchise models available in the market.  

Contact us! Discover your future today in our remarkable franchise investment opportunities. Visit our website, www.drinkgoodcoffee.co.za, for more information. You can also complete our concise online franchise application form at https://thedailycoffeecafe.co.za/franchise-application-form/, or contact Adriaan de Bruyn at adriaan@thedailygroup.africa.

Name: Gabriel Ranch Premium Beef
Description: Gabriel Ranch is a true working Black Angus cattle ranch with multiple divisions focused on beef excellence. We produce Verified Black Angus beef to consumers through our elite Registered Black Angus seed-stock breeding cattle and Herd Bull programs. Using advanced DNA information and years of beef cattle experience, we make breeding decisions; provide daily nutritional, health and physical care for our cow herd and raise our own calves. This allows us total control of the product we provide our customers. At Gabriel Ranch Premium Beef we are from “Conception to Consumer” which is beyond “Farm to Table.”

Name: Grind Zero
Description:
We believe that creating a barista-level coffee experience is something that not only experts can do. We want to show coffee lovers how much fun it can be to experiment with different brewing methods and blends and make it as easy as possible for anyone to start making their own delicious coffee at home without spending hours mastering the art of coffee making.

We source and offer high quality coffee beans, celebrating the unique characteristics and flavors of each individual origin within your cup. Our commitment to quality doesn’t stop at sourcing. We take great care in packaging and shipping our coffee to preserve its freshness and flavor.

Warning! Our passion about coffee is contagious, you might be addicted!

Name: South LA Cafe
Description:
South LA Cafe is a Black-owned, woman-owned & family-owned community coffee shop, market, and cultural center located in the heart of South Central LA dedicated to social impact & a revolutionary business model. 

As a mission-driven organization, and 501c3 we are not only committed in the movement against racial, economic, social, and food inequities, but also focused on RE-BUILDING, CREATING, and EMPOWERING a healthy and sustainable South Central for all people. 

More than just coffee, we’re Coffee With a Cause. Every cup of coffee you purchase is an investment towards self-determination and prosperity for South Central. Coffee is how we bring people in. Community and Connection is what we create. 

Our ideology of abundance allows us to imagine, create, and practice a Revolutionary Business Model. Our framework intersects people, purpose, and profit in an innovative way, where we all win. South LA Cafe is focused on the following four primary areas of community access and equity: 

Cultural Reverence 
Food Justice
Impact Entrepreneurship
Restoring Sovereignty 

Across our four primary areas of access and equity, we imagine and create a redefined, prosperous South Central Legacy.

Name: FEED Açougue do Produtor
Description:
Somos um Açougue do Produtor, onde você encontra carnes de extrema qualidade porcionadas de acordo com a sua necessidade ou ocasião. Temos diversas proteínas, além de embutidos e frios. Fornecemos o PADRÃO FEED, desde a linha dia a dia até o churrasco, oferecendo a melhor solução em carnes. 

Toda carne do Feed é criada e produzida no Brasil, provenientes de produtores selecionados, onde valorizamos o trabalho dos pecuaristas brasileiros, que fazem um trabalho árduo e de muita qualidade. Ninguém melhor que o produtor para selecionar as melhores carnes, não é mesmo? A seleção inicia-se na fazenda. Genética, Alimentação, Manejo e Sanidade são os grandes pilares para uma carne de alta qualidade, e tudo isto com responsabilidade socioambiental. O processamento é realizado em frigoríficos especializados, onde todos os cuidados garantem a produção dos melhores cortes.
Aqui no recebimento temos um processo rigoroso de avaliação de qualidade, garantindo sempre A MELHOR CARNE DA SUA VIDA TODOS OS DIAS.

Além de tudo isso, ministramos cursos de Hambúrguer, Churrasco Básico e Avançado. Realizamos todo tipo de evento em nossa unidade no Itaim Bibi, mas caso prefira um lugar diferente ou até mesmo a sua casa, levamos a experiência Feed até você!

Name: oku
Description:
ōku Conscious Energy Gummy Snacks seamlessly blend indulgence with functional benefits by ingeniously addressing the pervasive concerns of energy dips AND irresistible sweet temptations, while resonating with today's 'Conscious Consumer.' Picture a culinary rainbow of four tantalizing flavors crafted from a meticulously curated blend of non-GMO, functionally-enhanced ingredients including Yerba Mate, Green Tea, Goji Berry, Coconut Water, while also being a good source of dietary fiber. We transcend the conventional with our reduced-sugar, gluten-free, dairy-free, soy-free, non-GMO, and vegan composition, offering an avant-garde treat that carries a mere 70-calorie cost for a 5-gummy serving. Featuring a wholesome 60 mg of non-jittery, non-crash organic caffeine per serving, we serve as an optimal energy catalyst, appealing to a broad spectrum of individuals - from the workout enthusiast, diligent professional, driven college student and tired parent to the weary traveler. Sustainability and responsibility aren't afterthoughts for us - they're ingrained in our DNA. We're immensely proud of our 40% upcycled packaging and our purposeful partnership with B1G1 Business for Good.

Poised to disrupt the market with our unique offering, we are primed to become the preferred choice in the burgeoning "better-for-you" caffeinated snack sector, making a difference in people's lives by enabling allowing them to 'energize without compromise.' Welcome to the ōku experience - a delightful intersection of indulgence, energy, and conscious consumption.

Name: HILONAD
Description:
Hilonad started in 2017 as a wholesale supplier and, since 2021, has expanded to both wholesale and retail operations under its own brand.
Our mission is to support the sustainability of small-scale producers and local businesses, connecting their high-quality products with wider markets.
We specialize in premium food and beverage products — from nuts, dried herbs, and saffron to honey and other plant-based goods — offering solutions for both bulk distribution and retail sales.
Through strategic market planning, innovative product design, and a commitment to fair trade and sustainability, we bridge the gap between traditional craftsmanship and modern market demands.
By combining authentic taste with global quality standards, we create long-term value for both producers and consumers.
Whether you are a bulk buyer, retailer, or an individual seeking specialty items, Hilonad delivers from farm to table with passion, precision, and care.

Name: Moonshot Distribution
Description:
Moonshot Distribution : La proximité autrement - exploitant de superettes alimentaires sous enseignes nationales en Zones ANRU / QPV

L’offre commerciale en région parisienne est souvent marquée par un manque d’investissement et une gestion aléatoire, ne répondant pas toujours aux attentes des consommateurs et des municipalités. 

Conscients de ces enjeux, Anusan VARATHARAJAN et Alexandre von MEHKS ont créé Moonshot Distribution, une entreprise dédiée à l’implantation et à l’exploitation de magasins alimentaires sous
différentes enseignes (Franprix, G20, Monope...) en Île-de-France, plus particulièrement en zones ANRU, QPV et écoquartiers. 

Avec une expertise reconnue dans l’immobilier commercial et la gestion de commerces, Moonshot Distribution ambitionne de réhausser les standards du commerce de proximité en proposant des magasins modernes, bien conçus et adaptés aux exigences la clientèle d'aujourd'hui. 

Pour atteindre cet objectif, le cabinet d’architectes A+A - Antoine MORIZOT a été missionné afin de repenser l’agencement et l’aménagement des espaces commerciaux. 

Priorisant les implantations dans les immeubles neufs tout en restant attentif aux opportunités dans l’existant, Moonshot Distribution souhaite redonner ses lettres de noblesse au commerce alimentaire de quartier.

Name: Steens Manuka Honey
Description:
We make the most delicious, nutrient rich, raw honey, by retaining all the natural aromas, flavours and textures, from one of the worlds most amazingly
clever creatures - bees.

Steens pure New Zealand Honey is loved worldwide for its raw taste, grainy texture, and full flavour. We use a unique process that keeps the honey at or below the natural temperature of the hive without filtering out the bee bread, pollen and other 100% natural goodies.
Our Manuka honey is tested for authenticity using strict NZ Government standards, and then certified for purity under the UMF and MGO testing standards.

Name: Al Batateel Trading

Tartary buckwheat was first introduced to China about 6,000 years ago. Nowadays, the crops can be found across East Asia (China, India, Nepal, Taiwan) and South East Russia. Tartary buckwheat had quickly become a part of natural Eastern medicine, as its kernels contain an extensive range of nutrients, including minerals like iron and magnesium. It is caffeine-free and serves as a perfect substitute for coffee or tea.

Tabúcha was founded to share our love for Tartary Buckwheat and give others a chance to discover the delicious side of well-being. We are passionate about keeping the body and mind in harmony and want to introduce these deliciously sweet cookie-like flavoured kernels to everyone around us.

Name: Mershimer Group, LLC.

Mershimer Group, LLC is a results-driven consulting and compliance partner specializing in franchise brand protection, loss prevention, and operational excellence. Our solutions range from royalty assurance and comprehensive compliance auditing to mystery shopping, field audit programs, and bespoke business process outsourcing — all designed to protect brand equity, reduce risk, and uncover hidden revenue leakage. 

We serve food service, franchising, and retail clients with a pragmatic, boots-on-the-ground approach that delivers measurable results. Our work tackles core challenges like underreported sales, inconsistent brand compliance, shrinkage control, and loss prevention program optimization. Through real-time reporting, frontline observations, and proven methodologies, we help clients in complex multi-location environments improve operational performance, enhance customer satisfaction, and build stronger, more profitable brands.

Name: EL MATHE
Description:
Bienvenue chez EL MATHE une aventure unique au cœur des Alpes suisses où la culture ancestrale du maté rencontre l'innovation.

EL MATHE est une création d’un couple suisso-argentin passionné de maté qui, après des années d'exploration des traditions et des saveurs de l’un de leur pays natal, décide de concrétiser sa vision : créer un maté authentique, innovant, vibrant et moderne. Son voyage commence en Argentine ainsi que dans les vastes plaines uruguayennes, où il est immédiatement captivé par la culture et les arômes uniques de la région. Inspiré par ces découvertes, le couple décide de donner vie à son projet EL MATHE, en s'entourant des conseils des experts en infusions les plus réputés.

Chez EL MATHE, chaque feuille de maté sélectionnée avec amour est le fruit d'un processus méticuleux, garantissant une infusion pure qui conserve toutes les qualités bienfaisantes de cette plante millénaire.

EL MATHE s’efforce également de contribuer à démocratiser et à moderniser la consommation du maté en proposant des outils innovants, où praticité et tradition se rencontrent harmonieusement.

Découvrez les goûts uniques des recettes EL MATHE, élaborées en Suisse avec amour, dévouement, et la conviction que chaque gorgée compte pour votre bien-être global.

É pelas encostas do Parque Natural da Serra de Aire e Candeeiros que queremos mostrar que a tradição se serve à mesa.

A nossa tarefa é simples: levar até si os melhores produtos, cheiros, sabores e texturas, originários de pequenos produtores em formato cabaz ou abertos e disponíveis em caixa ou mesa piquenique.
Alguns, ainda elaborados de forma artesanal, transportam-nos para o nosso passado.

Sediada em Porto de Mós e criada em 2021 a MADE IN Serra de Aire e Candeeiros certifica-se de assegurar a origem de produtos da área geográfica da serra e conselhos inseridos na mesma. A preservação da natureza e a sustentabilidade são os valores da nossa empresa. Estes produtos são nossos, estes produtos somos nós, leve-nos na sua bagagem e no seu coração.

Chez Aura Casta, je sélectionne pour vous des produits artisanaux et gourmands qui célèbrent les saveurs, le savoir-faire et le bien-être. Mon objectif est de créer des expériences uniques et mémorables, adaptées à toutes les occasions.

Pour qui ?

Parce que chaque produit raconte une histoire. Je travaille main dans la main avec des artisans passionnés pour garantir des produits de qualité, authentiques et respectueux de l’environnement.

Name: Pattison's Patisserie
Description:
Founded in 1995 by entrepreneurial Pastry Chef Peter Pattison, our journey began with a vision to redefine patisserie experiences in Australia.

Visionary Leadership:
Under Peter's visionary leadership, Pattison's Patisserie has evolved from a single storefront in 1995 to a thriving network of stores across Greater Sydney. With a relentless pursuit of perfection, Peter's goal is clear - to be Australia's leading boulangerie, delivering artisanal delights that captivate the senses.

Franchise Expansion:
In 2020, Pattison's Patisserie embraced a franchise model, opening new horizons for aspiring entrepreneurs to join our culinary family. This strategic move marked the beginning of an exciting growth phase, enabling us to share our passion for exceptional pastries and service with even more communities.

Upcoming Growth:
2023 marks a milestone of 20 stores, yet the journey is far from over. Pattison's Patisserie is poised for significant growth in the coming years. Our expansion plans include bringing the artistry of our patisserie to new locations, both within New South Wales and potentially beyond.

Join Our Culinary Family:
At Pattison's Patisserie, we invite you to be a part of our culinary family, whether as a valued customer, a pastry chef or a potential franchise partner. Immerse yourself in the irresistible taste of our artisanal delights and join us on a journey where every pastry tells a story of dedication, passion, and the pursuit of culinary perfection.

Name: Verdure Foods Limited
Description:
Verdure Foods Limited is a wholly Zambian owned and managed company that was incorporated in July, 2015.

Verdure Foods Limited provides Plant-Based Food options to individuals and families who desire to live healthier lives by eating clean. We exist to promote the health and happiness of individuals and families by increasing access to Plant-Based Nutrition options.

Verdure Foods Limited was born out of the personal experiences of its founders / directors who have been on a largely Plant Based Diet for over 2 decades now. They had a myriad of challenges finding non-meat food alternatives after completely eliminating animal-based foods from their diet. Over the years, many of those they knew to be on some form of special diet either gave up entirely or compromised often due to lack of readily available Plant-Based Food options. The realization that a lot of people struggled and got discouraged when attempting to live on a Plant Based Diet, whether as a personal lifestyle choice or for medical reasons, led to the birth of Verdure Foods Limited.

Name: Exit Zero Company
Description: Exit Zero was established on July 4, 2003 as a black-and-white weekly magazine in Cape May. The name was inspired by Cape May’s placement at the end of the 172-exit Garden State Parkway and the mission is to promote and celebrate Cape May with a fresh, relevant voice. In 2005, Exit Zero began the expansion of its brand beyond newsprint, opening a tiny retail store, selling Exit Zero-branded apparel and Cape May artwork. The store later moved to a larger location on the island and when the restaurant next door became available in 2015, the company knocked through the wall and created Exit Zero Cookhouse, offering Indian and Thai curries. The Cookhouse was ranked number one restaurant in Cape May by TripAdvisor that summer. In 2018, the restaurant moved across the street into a purpose-built new HQ and became Exit Zero Filling Station – a restaurant, retail store, gas station and publishing office. The gas pumps were removed in 2021 as Exit Zero focused on a new outdoor dining space complete with vintage private dining trailers.

Pahhni was founded by Dr. Satinder Bharaj and Erik Loomis.
Pahhni  is a private startup company located in Hamilton, Ohio. Pahhni was founded in January 2021 by Dr. Satinder S. Bharaj and Erik D. Loomis, both highly experienced professionals who have fortune 50 experience in manufacturing, quality, regulatory and marketing of CPG products.  They have lived in the Greater Cincinnati area for the last 40+ years with their families and are happy to call it home

What makes Pahhni unique from other bottle waters?
In addition to the benefits of drinking alkaline water, Pahhni starts with the best tasting water in the world and makes it a little better. Natural limestone filtration provides a different, and better, process than many competitors in the alkaline water industry which use artificial means such as electrolysis and/or ionization. This natural process is a huge part of the award-winning great taste.

Pahhni is also committed to giving back and supporting the communities in which we live and work, the families who support the business, and the environment. In addition to the great natural taste, a portion of our profits are donated to OceanConservancey.org on behalf of CH4 Global, two organizations who are dedicated to preserving – and ultimately saving – our planet. Buying our water helps YOU – and helps the planet.

Our Core values sets us apart from other bottled water companies.
Quality – we will provide the highest quality GMP products at all times. No shortcuts, no exceptions.
Integrity – doing the right thing, in all aspects of the business, is our #1 priority.
Family/Community First – being a family-owned business, we want to make sure that our employees and surrounding communities are taken care of. We have laid the groundwork to be anything but a traditional company.
Environmental Responsibility – in addition to having 100% recyclable bottles, we are always looking out for better solutions for environmentally friendly materials.

Name: Hometown Grocers, Inc.
Description:
Taking care of our communities comes naturally to us because we live in them, too. Hometown Grocers, Inc. (HGI) is a privately held, Wisconsin-based company with seven locations throughout the state. We are proud to serve our neighbors with exceptional service, quality products and clean stores. Above all, HGI means local, and our knowledgeable associates care for you like family. Expect a smile and a friendly associate always available to help you.

We opened our first HGI location in 2021, but our roots in Wisconsin’s grocery industry run deep. In over 70 years of business, we’ve crafted a people-first culture, and we know how to win in Wisconsin business. We’ve learned what shoppers want and need, and that there’s a difference between the two. Many of the extra services common to larger grocery stores, such as full-service meat and deli departments, require lots of square footage. They simply wouldn’t fit in our smaller-footprint HGI stores.

That’s why we offer you the best of the basics. When you walk into our stores, you’ll find just what you need in your community grocery store – a solid core of products and services along with highly trained service professionals who are always happy to welcome you.

What’s more, our network of stores provides a built-in backup system of inter-store support, so when one store needs extra staffing or stock is running low, a “sister” store can send reinforcements of people or product. It’s the best of both worlds – the feel of a neighborhood store and strength in numbers.
We hope you’ll visit us soon and experience HGI for yourself.

Name: WINEAWAY
Description:
Founded in 2000, Wineaway is Queensland's largest and most popular private wine storage and retail business. We run a purpose-built, temperature-controlled storage facility to allow collectors to store their wine collection, with detailed cataloguing and retrieval services provided. We also have an extensive retail offering of exclusive and highly rated fine wines. Wineaway is a destination and community for fine wine lovers and collectors to buy, share and celebrate the world’s best wines. 

In essence, we are your sommelier, anytime anywhere.

We became Australia's first wine storage facility to offer online access to cellar records and to this day remain as Brisbane's only storage business dedicated solely to wine.

Our service is fully managed. Wines can be delivered to us in person or you can instruct retailers and/or wineries to deliver directly to us. We also provide a pick up service. Upon receipt we catalogue the wines, inspecting each bottle (where appropriate) and transferring relevant data to our online database. Collections are then physically placed within the cellar in compartments dedicated solely to each individual client.

We also offer an extensive collection of exclusive and highly rated wines at competitive prices. If your passion is for aged wines, Wineaway's exclusive Museum List offers the opportunity to purchase wines and vintages of provenance that are seldom seen in even the best of wine stores. 

At the heart of Wineaway is a close-knit team that is passionate about bringing you the most exciting and sought after local and international wines, from new releases and new labels to rare and exotic vintages.

Write to us at email@wineaway.com.au or visit us at our facility.

Opening Hours:
Monday to Friday - 8:30am to 5:30pm
Saturday - 10:00am - 2:00pm
Outside hours - by appointment only

Discover more at www.wineaway.com.au.

Name: Olio Piro.
Description:
An Extra Virgin Olive Oil that makes food taste more delicious… this is what Olio Piro LLC.  is proudly bringing to foodies worldwide, fresh from Tuscany. 

Developed in cooperation with the italian Consiglio Nazionale delle Ricerche, the high antioxidant extra virgin olive oil Piro was launched in 2018 and has been showered with prestigious accolades from the very start. With a bold, fresh flavor and peppery finish, a drizzle of Olio Piro takes your dishes to a new level. 

Both a family business and an international award winner, Olio Piro is a testimony to respect of traditions, commitment to innovation and sustainability and devotion to quality at every level. The epitome of luxury in the Extra Virgin Olive Oil industry. 

Produced in Tuscany from the early harvest of 100% premium Italian olives, Olio Piro was awarded Best in the World in the blended, medium fruitiness category by the 2021 editions of the prestigious FlosOlei Guide. Piro.'s health benefits were bestowed by the never-awarded-before 2018 Health Claim Platinum Honor at the London IOOC and Gold Quality Award in 2020. Piro. also received Gold Awards at the 2019 and 2020 Japan World Competition and at the 2019, 2020, 2021 and 2022 New York International Olive Oil Competition.

Piro. will surprise you with its neat peppery finish, typical of elevated antioxidant polyphenol content. It is a robust oil that is truly elegant and harmonious with a remarkable fluidity that compliments the sophistication of its flavors. Every bottle of Piro. bears a handwritten harvest date, lot number and “best by” date – guaranteeing our commitment to quality and freshness so that consumers get their table the same perfectly fresh taste that could otherwise only be experienced in Tuscany.

Member, North American Olive Oil Association
Member, Speciality Food Association
Member, International Association of Culinary Professionals
Member, Italian American Trade Agen

Imagine the convenience of ordering dinner during your subway ride home and picking it up, hot and delicious, just in time for your arrival. Picture a student choosing a tasty meal from a diverse menu of twenty options after a long night of studying. Envision a night-shift nurse enjoying a nutritious hot meal during a short break in the comfort of the nurses' lounge.

MealMate's significant functional advantages are:
- 5-minute meal preparation
- Large capacity of refrigeration chamber means no sold-out surprises
- Extensive menu refreshed periodically
- Order directly from the MealMate using its touch screen or schedule pickup via a mobile app
- Flexible pickup time - MealMate will keep the order warm for 1.5 hours
- Convenient interface and mobile app

Name: CiboCrudo
Description: CiboCrudo è un progetto imprenditoriale italiano nato nel 2011 che opera nel settore alimentare. Dal 2022 CiboCrudo è un brand di Neulabs, la prima piattaforma in Italia che acquista, crea e sviluppa brand Direct-To-Consumer a livello internazionale. Neulabs sposa interamente la filosofia di CiboCrudo e lo sta rinnovando attraverso competenze avanzate di marketing digitale, tecnologia e operations. I prodotti sono disponibili sul sito www.cibocrudo.com, sui principali marketplace online e nei migliori punti vendita biologici e naturali d’Italia.

Whether you're enjoying a cup of tea at your office or sipping on a brew at home, we hope to provide you with a moment of relaxation and respite from the busyness of everyday life.

If you're already a customer or thinking of buying our teas, we hope our teas bring you a moment of relaxation and respite from the busyness of everyday life.

IndiaKart is a hyperlocal supply-chain commerce platform empowering Kirana stores with fast delivery of FMCG and grocery products through district-level micro-warehouses. We provide 4–6 hour delivery, better margins, and remove traditional distributor dependency—helping small retailers grow faster.

Diamond Drops, developed under IndiaKart’s FMCG vertical, is a premium smoke-free pooja lamp oil made from a 5-oil purity blend. Each bottle carries a QR code that unlocks “Temple in Every Drop” audio stories, mixing devotion, culture, and premium fragrance science. Pilot batches are complete and launch-ready.
