Name: Medicibo
Description:
Crediamo che il nostro benessere derivi da ciò che mangiamo.
Dare supporto al nostro corpo con gli alimenti giusti è fondamentale per raggiungere il giusto equilibrio.
Ogni persona deve conoscere i propri bisogni nutrizionali, non amiamo né gli standard né i cliché. Condividiamo le potenzialità della natura, i suoi benefici per il nostro corpo e la nostra salute.

Name: Falocam SARL
Description:
Chez FALOCAM, notre aventure a commencé avec un rêve simple : apporter la meilleure expérience de crème glacée au cœur du Cameroun. Avec des décennies d'expérience dans la fabrication de crème glacée exceptionnelle, nous nous sommes lancés pour redéfinir ce que signifie savourer ce délicieux dessert 100% Made in Cameroun.

Notre passion pour la crème glacée est ancrée dans notre engagement envers la qualité, la créativité et la communauté. Nous nous approvisionnons localement en ingrédients chaque fois que possible, soutenant les agriculteurs et producteurs locaux. Cela nous permet de créer une crème glacée délicieuse et abordable que tout le monde peut apprécier.

Notre équipe innove en permanence, offrant une gamme de saveurs uniques et classiques pour satisfaire tous les goûts. Des rassemblements familiaux aux célébrations spéciales, notre crème glacée est devenue une composante essentielle de nombreux moments mémorables à travers le Cameroun.

Parce que notre volonté est d’élaborer la plus naturelle, la plus onctueuse des glaces et crèmes glacées, des ingrédients de choix, les meilleurs ingrédients, qui donnent à nos glaces un goût d’exception.

Name: MOJ Honey
Description:
MOJ Honey is a premium honey brand rooted in the rich cultural heritage of Yemen. We specialize in sourcing and delivering the finest Yemeni honey, known for its unique flavors and exceptional quality. Our commitment to authenticity, sustainability, and ethical sourcing drives us to uphold traditional beekeeping practices while supporting local communities.

At MOJ Honey, we believe in preserving the purity and natural benefits of our honey, ensuring that every jar reflects the rich landscapes and centuries-old traditions of Yemen. Our products are 100% raw, unprocessed, and packed with natural goodness, making them not just a delightful addition to your meals, but also a powerful natural remedy.

Whether you're looking for a gourmet treat or a health-enhancing superfood, MOJ Honey offers a taste experience that is as pure as the land it comes from. Join us on our journey to bring the best of Yemen's honey to the world.

Name: Club des Amateurs de Vins Exquis
Description:
L’histoire du CAVE commence en 1984 par un groupe de passionnés qui ouvre l’un des premiers bars à vins de Genève, le Ballon Rouge. Celui-ci connaît très vite le succès. 

Dans la foulée, un Club d’oenophiles est créé. Il est placé sous la responsabilité de Jacques Perrin, alors jeune professeur de philosophie. De l’enseignement de la sagesse à la saveur, il n’y a qu’un pas : le Ballon Rouge ferme après trois ans d’activité et le Club des Amateurs de Vins Exquis prend son essor dans un milieu – celui du négoce des vins – plutôt conformiste et cloisonné. Les rencontres, les nécessités intérieures, l’intérêt d’une clientèle nouvelle, éprise de découvertes, vont très vite confirmer la pertinence de la voie choisie.

Trente-cinq ans plus tard, le CAVE regroupe une dizaine de milliers d’adhérents. S’il est devenu une référence incontournable dans le monde des amateurs de vins et jouit d’une très grande réputation, le Club garde la philosophie qui a fait son succès depuis les débuts : placer la relation client au centre de toutes ses actions et défendre une idée du vin qui, à l’écart des modes et des courants, privilégie les vins de lieu et de terroir ainsi qu’une esthétique du vin dont les vertus cardinales sont finesse, précision, pureté d’expression et harmonie.

Real Estate Excellence:

Retail Innovation:
Our expertise in retail operations enhances the Smith & Wollensky brand through strategic initiatives in brand positioning, marketing, and customer engagement. From exclusive merchandise and loyalty programs to impactful partnerships, we create an elevated and immersive brand experience.

Entertainment Integration:
As leaders in the entertainment industry, we specialize in curating immersive and memorable experiences. At Smith & Wollensky, this expertise translates into live performances, themed events, and collaborations with renowned artists, transforming every visit into a captivating journey.

By uniting the strengths of our consortium, Smith & Wollensky is poised to become a global symbol of excellence. We honor the brand’s storied heritage while embracing innovation to cater to the evolving tastes of our guests. Our passion for exceptional dining and our strategic approach to growth set us apart, ensuring Smith & Wollensky remains a beacon in the industry.

In the last year, we’ve gone from one kitchen to multiple outlets across the city. But our real growth is in the community we’re building — people who try a bowl and keep coming back, who tell their friends, and slowly become part of something bigger.

Name: LA BONNE MER
Description:
Au pied de Notre Dame de la Garde à Marseille, la Bonne Mer c’est avant tout une histoire de 4 amis venant d’horizons différents mais tous passionnés par ce que la Méditerranée offre de plus beau - poissons, coquillages et crustacés.
Le concept de la poissonnerie part du postulat suivant : dans ce monde post-covid, les gens sont à la recherche de valeurs refuges et sont en quête d’authenticité, de proximité et de choses simples.
La volonté première était donc de s’implanter dans un quartier emblématique de Marseille auquel nous avons tous une attache particulière, Vauban et sa Bonne Mère.
Dans un second temps, nous souhaitions remettre au coeur du quartier un commerce de proximité qui disparaissait depuis de nombreuses années à Marseille, la poissonnerie ; et de pouvoir déguster les produits de l’enseigne en direct et sur place.

Name: Milk Tash Coffee
Description:
Welcome to Milk Tash Coffee! 

We are so pleased you have come to join us on our mission. To make coffee milky again! 

We have dedicated many hours and taste buds to make our one of a kind premium milk-based coffee collection! 

How have we done this?

We started by looking at the body, sweetness and acidity in the beans and blended different countries beans to get a grasp on strong flavour profiles. by combing stronger and more vibrant flavours it means coffee taste is able to push through the frothy goodness (milk) and still create a flavoursome cup of coffee without leaving you thinking… “I would love some coffee with this milk”

What is Milk-Based coffee you ask?

Well, we understand there is a huge demand for coffees accompanied by a steamed and frothy generous portion of milk…..the likes of your Flat Whites, Lattés, Cappuccinos and so on. 

We also understand that majority of the time, you might be paying for an extra shot, or that store bought coffee you’re making at home just doesn’t quite give you the wow factor you’re after. This is purely down to the fact the milk is diluting the coffee itself. 

All that can stop! We’ve created the solution you’re after!

Our coffee gurus have used expertly sourced beans from countries like Brazil, El Salvador and more to create an innovative coffee that is designed to be paired with milk!

How do I get my hands on this coffee?
We like to think we are a one stop shop for coffee, so all you need to do is have a look through our collection, find the one, or two or even all that you’d like taste and pick your weight and grind type (best fit for your desired way of brewing). Once done you can quickly check out on our store and expect your coffee within a couple of days.

Lastly, we are still going to adhere to everyone who loves coffee because if you love coffee, we love you! Our Single Origin coffees Are now live!!!

Thanks for choosing Milk Tash Coffee

Visit: www.milktash.com

Name: Greenkrops

Somos 3 personas que llevan 25 años en forma individual dedicados a distintos segmentos del rubro alimenticio a lo largo de los cuales cada uno ha acumulado experiencias en áreas tan diversas como procesos industriales, logística de alimentos y gestión de Inventarios.

Cada uno de los integrantes que conforman este grupo humano afiatado después de 15 años de trabajo en conjunto le otorga a este proyecto la solidez que éste requiere transmitiendo la confianza con que hoy nos identifica nuestra clientela actual, la que nos viene acompañando a lo largo de éstos años.


Visión
Ser en el canal “HORECA” la empresa que brinde el mejor servicio con la máxima calidad a un precio justo buscando una rentabilidad con plena conciencia del rol social al que fuimos llamados a cumplir. 

Misión
Establecernos como el proveedor más confiable y exigente del mercado con la más amplia gama de productos relacionados con el servicio de restauración. Todo ello para atender a una clientela con un máximo nivel de exigencia.
Nos dedicamos a atender al canal HORECA en todo lo que una cocina requiere.

Our food menu features inventive interpretations of breakfast and lunch staples made with local ingredients from South Florida farms.

Every day our family members make a positive impact on the community by sharing sunshine, our unique blend of happy hospitality, ensuring everyone leaves with a smile. We are focused on genuine human connection, ensuring everyone is in a Sunshine State of Mind.

Creativity: The expression and cultivation of creativity guides everything we do at Sunshine. We share this value with the city of Miami and we see our brand as a platform for collaborating with people and brands we love and respect.

Community: You don’t understand the unabashed power of community until you are part of one. Miami is an amazing city with an international reputation, but for residents it is a small town. Sunshine Coffee is our common grounds.

Iced Coffee: Have you ever sipped an iced cold coffee on the beach while the sun shines on your face? It’s heaven. It brings to a place we call the Sunshine State of Mind, a happy place where everything is a little better. Everyday.

Name: WayKup Coffee
Description:
Welcome to WayKup Coffee, a socially conscious brand founded on a love for coffee and a passion for change. Our mission is simple: to provide you with premium-quality coffee while transforming the lives of those less fortunate. Every bag of coffee purchased contributes to well-drilling projects in communities that lack access to clean water, starting in Ethiopia, the birthplace of coffee.

Every gram of coffee we sell provides 1 liter of water to those in need.

Water is the most basic of life’s necessities and in many parts of the world, access to water is restricted or very difficult to obtain. In Africa, usually women and young girls walk hours to retrieve a single bucket of water, removing them from school and exposing them to danger. By providing wells within their villages, we not only provide water, but we pave the way for security, education, community cohesion and economic development.

If you would like to try our coffee or would like to purchase for your office/cafe then please reach out to sales@waykup.ae.

Follow our instagram: @waykup.coffee

Name: Cantine Associate
Description:
Chi ha avuto la fortuna di vivere la grande Italia dei piccoli comuni, probabilmente sa che nelle cantine si conserva il meglio della nostra produzione agroalimentare ed enologica.

La cantina è il luogo in cui stagioniamo, affiniamo o banalmente conserviamo i prodotti della sapienza di un intero popolo, delle contaminazioni culturali e sociali che ha ricevuto. 
L’Italia, anzi l’Europa più in generale, ha sviluppato un’infinità di sapori e tradizioni invidiate nel resto del mondo sia per la biodiversità del territorio, sia per la lunga storia di civiltà. Molte di queste tradizioni si
sono tramandate nelle nostre cantine, oltre che nelle pratiche di produzione, e molte sono ancora, purtroppo, ignote ai più.
L’idea di scoprire e conoscere sapori nuovi, sapori legati a storie e territori che non per caso le hanno sviluppate e tramandate, mi
ha sempre affascinato ed è così che è diventata una passione, la nostra passione.
Cantine Associate nasce per aiutare i commercianti ed i ristoratori a divulgare l’amore per la qualità, della specialità,
dell’unicità.

Luciano Iollo

Tudjuk, milyen nehéz jó ajándékot találni, legyen az születésnap, névnap, esküvő, vagy a baba érkezése… ezért döntöttünk úgy, hogy létrehozzuk ezt a kicsi, de általunk nagyon szeretett családi vállalkozást. 
Olyan hazai, döntően kézműves kisüzemek termékeiből állítjuk össze ajándékcsomagjainkat, melyek kiváló minőséget képviselnek, természetes összetevőket tartalmaznak, nem utaznak feleslegesen a fél világon át, és ami még nagyon fontos, hogy igazi különlegességek, melyek nem jönnek szembe Veled a boltok polcain! Ráadásul mindezzel egy picit talán még segíteni is tudjuk a kistermelőket, kisvállalkozásokat, manufaktúrákat.

We know how difficult it is to find a good gift, whether it's a birthday, name day, wedding, or the arrival of a baby... that's why we decided to create this small, but much-loved family business. 
We put together our gift packages from the products of small domestic, mainly artisan factories, which represent excellent quality, contain natural ingredients, do not needlessly travel halfway around the world, and what is very important, are real specialties that you will not find on store shelves! In addition, with all of this, we might even be able to help small producers, small businesses, and factories a little.

Name: Teraa Living
Description:
Teraa Living: Conscious Luxury for a New World
Teraa Living isn’t just a business, it’s a lifestyle movement. A place where design meets soul, wellness meets intention, and clean living becomes second nature.
Founded by Megha Modi, a holistic designer with roots in fashion, interiors, and energy healing, Teraa Living brings together brands that exist to nourish, restore, and inspire. From organic food to soulful interiors to mindful pet care, every offering is grounded in the belief that luxury is alignment—with nature, with purpose, and with a life well-lived.
________________________________________
Our Story
Megha’s journey began in fashion at age 16, working alongside her mother while balancing school and business. Over time, her passion for design grew beyond clothing and into the spaces people lived in. As she explored interiors, ancient modalities, holistic healing, energy work which added deeper purpose to her work.
A turning point came during her own health struggles. Exhausted and seeking answers, she turned to holistic healing and the teachings of the Medical Medium, discovering the power of clean, plant-based living. That transformation gave rise to Happy Earth Organic—and eventually, the vision for Teraa Living.
Today, every brand under Teraa Living is an expression of Megha’s mission: to create with intention, to heal through design, and to make wellness a way of life.
________________________________________
Our Vision
We imagine a world where:
•	Clean, organic living is the norm
•	Spaces support wellbeing, not just aesthetics
•	Conscious consumption becomes the default
•	Luxury means essence, not excess
We’re here to help make that world real—one honest product, one healing space, one intentional choice at a time.
________________________________________
Our Mission
To bring together impact-driven brands that merge ancient wisdom with modern innovation.
To lead a shift toward sustainable living, soulful design, and authentic wellness.

Nu este moment în viaţa unui om în care vinul de Cotnari să nu îi fie alături. Acompaniază cu succes bucate din cele mai alese, de la feluri principale, până la desert. Reprezintă un cadou de suflet , surprinzător şi întodeauna de bun gust.

 
Vinul de Cotnari nu se bea. El se degustă. El este promisiune divină. Atunci când însoțește un ospăț de durată, băut cumpătat, dezvoltă reacții nobile, uimitoare.

2022 hat unser in-House Paid Ads Team die deutsche Online-Marketing-Szene auf den Kopf gestellt. Als erste Brand in Deutschland haben wir Formate wie Straßenumfragen oder Podcasts als hochperformante Video-Creatives etabliert. So konnten wir in nur 3 Jahren mehr als 300.000 glücklichen Kunden und Kundinnen gewinnen. 

Bei uns kommen A-Player mit Leidenschaft für ihr Feld zusammen, um sich selbst zu verwirklichen.

Die TryMoin DNA? 
Wir geben immer 110%. Nicht weil wir müssen, sondern weil es uns Spaß macht.
Wir helfen uns gegenseitig und ziehen an einem Strang.
Wir sind ehrlich, offen und transparent. 
Wir sagen nie "Das haben wir aber schon immer so gemacht" sondern freuen uns über neuen Input.
Wir respektieren und schätzen alle Teammitglieder und deren Meinungen gleichermaßen - egal welche Position.
Wir ermöglichen maximale Freiheit durch eine moderne Arbeitskultur.
Wir finden kreative Lösungen und ungewöhnliche Ansätze um komplexe Probleme zu lösen.
Wir lieben, was wir tun.

Name: Mimosa Rwm Espiritu
Description:
In 1865, a ship carrying the first Welsh settlers seeking a new life in Patagonia, Argentina, set sail from Liverpool on a voyage of discovery. The first ship, Mimosa, carried passengers on this life changing voyage, and was followed by more ships, establishing the Welsh speaking communities in Patagonia that remain today.
Creating a new spirit brand to celebrate the pioneering spirit of the Welsh people who embarked on this new life and adventure is the vision of Alun Wyn Jones, who won his first cap for Wales in Argentina on the 11th of June 2006 at the Estadio Raul Conti, Puerto Madryn Patagonia.

Name: FHorácio Representações
Description:
FHorácio Representações nasceu com a essência de uma palavra - “Inconformidade”.

Após uma vitoriosa passagem pela gerência comercial na indústria de laticínios, identificamos um enorme potencial de mercado não atendido, a visão era tão clara e a inconformidade com as soluções no mercado era tão grande, que optamos por renunciar uma excelente oportunidade na indústria para ir atrás de outras ainda melhores no mercado de representação.

Foi então que iniciamos nossas atividades em 2014, já tivemos outro nome, mas a essência continua a mesma inconformidade, que nos fez sair de um cargo gerencial para nos aventurarmos a empreender, com a certeza de que poderíamos e ainda podemos oferecer uma solução cada vez mais otimizada ao mercado.
Além de representação comercial, atuamos com consultoria, gestão de equipe de vendas (de algumas indústrias parceiras), equipe de merchandising própria e nossa última empreitada, é um sistema de gestão comercial para representantes, distribuidores e indústrias.

Temos como principal diferencial a busca constante pela excelência no sell out, foco no PDV, gerenciamento analítico dos resultados e desenvolvimento de estratégias para alavancar o negócio de nossos clientes.
Sempre buscando parcerias profissionais, sustentáveis e éticas com nossos clientes e parceiros, construindo relacionamentos de longo prazo com indústrias e clientes.

O objetivo deste canal é nos manter conectados com nossos clientes, parceiros e com todos aqueles que queiram conhecer mais sobre nossa empresa, produtos e nossa forma de trabalho!

Name: Nisarga-A Millet Kitchen

Nisarga: Millet-Based Cloud Kitchen in Indore – Healthy Junk Food Alternatives

At Nisarga, we are a millet-based cloud kitchen in Indore committed to transforming popular junk foods into healthy, nutritious alternatives—all while keeping the delicious taste intact. Name: CleanEats Company Limited
Description:
CleanEats was established in November 2015, in the industrial city of Tema, Ghana serving an array of meals to cater for a varied group of clients with different dietary needs. Most importantly focusing on quick healthy meals for people on the go or living fast paced lives. We provide the highest quality menu items in the health food market at a pocket-friendly price backed by exceptional service to our valued clients.

We all believe wholeheartedly in a Healthy Body and Strong Spirit, and aim to provide the opportunity to use CleanEats to apply this to your everyday life through good nutrition- serving fresh, nutrient packed fruit and vegetable juices, salads, sandwiches and propagating the health and wellness agenda.

Our vision is to expand our operations to be able to first serve all major communities within our home country Ghana, and providing franchising opportunities, to extend our reach to ensure healthy food is accessible to all and people can make healthier choices for all their meals. We also want to help our associate farmers fully exhaust their produce by providing competitive packaging and end products that are marketable internationally. Lastly, to be the lead brand in the health food industry providing fresh and nutrient packed meals at an affordable price.

Name: Leo's Market & Eatery
Description: Leo’s Market & Eatery, founded by Stephanie White-Longworth and Keith White, is a subsidiary of Pride Investment Partners.  The pair were the fourth generation of leadership of GasAmerica, which they grew to more than 90 stores across Indiana and the Midwest before selling to Marathon Petroleum in 2012.  Leo’s is named after the business partners’ late father, Richard Leo White.  Originating in Greenfield, Indiana, Leo’s is like no other ‘convenience’ store concept in the industry today.  Leo’s has a chef providing weekly special featured food dishes including prepared and made-to-order soups, salads, pastas, pastries, and more; and is known for its wide assortment of breakfast, lunch, dinner and dessert kolaches.  Grab your food to-go, dine-in, or visit the drive-thru which serves both eatery and market items.  Leo’s market provides a wide assortment of grocery items including fresh produce, meats, cheeses, breads, ready-to-go family meal options, hand-picked flowers, and gifts; and of course, has your traditional snacks, chips, beverages, etc.  Leo’s supports local Indiana vendors; so, you will always find something ‘homegrown’ or ‘homemade’ in Indiana on the shelves.  Find your local Leo’s at www.yourleos.com.

Name: Crooked Beverage Company
Description:
Crooked Beverage Company is committed to the values, the rules and the desires of those looking for an alternative to alcohol. We are as authentic and real as the fruit we use, the passion we share, and the investments we make to our communities, our partners and those we serve. We will always prioritize safety and education to ensure a happy and enjoyable experience before, during and after consumption of our tonics. Like the water in our lakes, the snow on our roofs, the color of our autumn leaves, the fish under our ice and the cravings for summers we all share, we are Minnesota. Name: Loonen
Description:
Loonen is setting a new standard in bottled water. Our water is spring-sourced, filtered for contaminants, tastefully mineralized, and bottled exclusively in glass. Every batch is third-party tested and certified from source to sip. Loonen is verified non-detect for major contaminants like PFAS, BPA, and microplastics, with lab results published via QR code on every bottle. You deserve to know exactly what’s in your water — and what’s not.

Perfectly pure. Water as it should be.

Name: Hé!maté
Description:
Née en 2021, Hé!maté est une entreprise située dans le Calvados proposant ses 8 recettes de matés 100% naturels et sans arômes artificiels dans les grandes et moyennes surfaces. Aujourd'hui c'est plus de 300 magasins qui nous font confiances ! 

Les feuilles de yerba maté que nous utilisons proviennent d'un fournisseur brésilien certifié biologique et ECOCERT. En outre, nos produits sont conditionnés par deux ESAT (Établissement et Service d'Aide par le Travail) du Calvados, soulignant notre engagement en faveur de l'insertion des personnes en situation de handicap.

Au-delà de notre mission sociale, Hé!maté est profondément engagée dans la préservation de l'environnement. Nos produits sont dépourvus de suremballage, et nous avons éliminé l'utilisation de plastique, privilégiant le carton recyclé et des infusettes fabriquées à partir d'amidon de maïs 100% biodégradable.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure où le goût exquis du maté rencontre un engagement social et environnemental fort !

Name: ape2o
Description:
We are the Anti-plastic-bottle Water Company: spearheading 21st century public water provision for Smart Cities

Our mission is to eradicate single use plastic water bottles - water on-the-go without plastic. 

We all know the problem: there's a growing environmental catastrophe of single use plastic, not just in the natural world, but even in the human gut … now that's the last straw! Paying £1.50 on-the-go for plastic bottled water makes no economic sense, and the bottles exacerbate the problem. There is an inevitable trend towards more sustainable alternatives. 

We've created a network of sophisticated public water vending machines with still & sparkling ultra-filtered water, a range of stay-cold steel refillable bottles, and a philanthropic mandate to clean up oceans/beaches/rivers and fund conservation projects.

We're a profit-with-purpose certified B Corp, donating 10% of all our sales to our cause. 

We want you to feel good about refilling knowing that with every refill and bottle purchase, you're part of the solution, not the problem. 

We're recession friendly and relevant in a post-covid world with hygiene and water purity at our core. 

You  can find our "Big Ape" water fountains at

Name: Carob House
Description:
Carob House is a holistic grassroot initiative aiming to reimagine the way food is produced and consumed in Jordan by engaging communities in inspiring food experiences, from farm to table.
We believe that nutritious food should be widely available in the community. Afterall, our resilience and true security primarily depend on our ability to supply our needs of nutrition, locally, in a regenerative manner. 
At Carob House, we’ve embarked on a mission to innovate a green model of local food production, and build a community of environmentally conscious farmers, food artisans, cooks, and consumers who come together to celebrate nourishing foods and spread the word of harmony and abundance.

Name: SPPL
Description:
About Us www.purepollachi.com


We Are The Future of Tender Coconuts – Pure, Fresh, Effortless

Imagine holding a tender coconut so perfectly designed that opening it is as easy as a gentle push —no tools, no hassle, just nature’s goodness in its purest form. Our premium-quality tender coconuts are crafted for modern convenience, ensuring that every sip is an experience of effortless refreshment.

With a naturally stable base, our coconuts sit securely on your table, allowing you to enjoy your drink without spills or balancing tricks. Whether at home, in a café, or on the go, hydration has never been this seamless.

But convenience is just the beginning. From the lush farms where they are carefully nurtured to the moment they reach your hands, our coconuts travel through a meticulously controlled, ultra-hygienic, and temperature-regulated supply chain. Every step is designed to preserve their freshness, flavor, and nutrition—so you get nothing but the best.

We are not just offering coconuts; we are revolutionizing the way you enjoy them. No mess. No stress. Just pure, natural hydration at its finest.

Welcome to a new era of coconut indulgence. Fresh. Hygienic. Effortless. Designed for professionals and individuals with sedentary lifestyles, our product is set to redefine the beverage industry.

Sortez vos plus beaux tire-bouchons et choisissez un des 600 moments de bonheur (600 références disponibles) à votre disposition.

Rejoignez tous les domaines et leurs vignerons en accédant à notre site réservé aux professionnels.

Name: Big Guns Coffee and Farm
Description:
Introducing Big Guns Coffee: Where High-Octane Coffee Meets Heart and Soul

Are you tired of the same old cup of joe that leaves you feeling uninspired and lacking the energy to tackle life's challenges? Look no further than Big Guns Coffee, the brainchild of the dynamic duo: T.Shane Johnson and his seven-year-old daughter, Charli Johnson. This is not your average coffee; it's a caffeinated masterpiece crafted with passion, resilience, and a whole lot of love.

T.Shane Johnson is no ordinary individual. He's a Marine Corps Veteran, serial entrepreneur, motivational speaker, madman, author, world record athlete, and philanthropist. Having faced life-threatening situations, homelessness, and adversity, he embodies the spirit of never quitting and living life on the edge. His remarkable journey has inspired millions, and now he's channeling that same energy into the creation of Big Guns Coffee.

The story of Big Guns Coffee started with Charli Johnson, a budding entrepreneur in her own right. She suggested to her father that they create a coffee brand that reflects their fast-living, risk-taking attitude. Together, they embarked on a mission to create a coffee line that would energize and motivate individuals like no other. And thus, Big Guns Coffee was born.

With an impressive selection of 38 blends sourced from every corner of the earth, Big Guns Coffee offers a tantalizing array of flavors that will awaken your taste buds and invigorate your senses. Each roast is carefully crafted to deliver an extraordinary taste and an unparalleled caffeine boost that will have you crushing your life goals on a daily basis. And to top it off, Big Guns Coffee proudly presents the First North Carolina Hydroponic Coffee Farm EVER, ensuring that every sip is infused with freshness and quality.

At the heart of Big Guns Coffee is the unwavering dedication of T.Shane and Charli Johnson. Every Sunday, they transform their garage into a coffee-roasting haven.

Name: unQ
Description:
unQ isn’t just a coffee brand—it’s a movement. Built for the bold, the relentless, and the unapologetically different, unQ fuels those who hustle against the grain. We celebrate the non-conformists, the early risers, the late-night dreamers, and everyone who refuses to fit the mold. Our coffee is crafted to energize ambition, disrupt expectations, and inspire the grind.
- Break the Queue, be unQ.

Our Mission:
To serve the unconventional with coffee that stands out—bold in flavor, bolder in spirit. We champion those who hustle hard and challenge the status quo.

What unQ Stands For

Quality Without Compromise: Ethically sourced, expertly roasted, and always fresh. Every bag is crafted with intention and care.

Built for Hustlers: Whether you're chasing a side gig or running the show, unQ is the fuel that keeps your fire lit.

Breaking Stereotypes: We don’t do basic. Our blends challenge the norms and elevate underrepresented voices in every culture and business.

Unapologetically Different: From packaging to product, we stand out in every way—because ordinary isn’t in our vocabulary.

Who Drinks unQ?
Change-makers, hustlers, dream chasers, creators, freelancers, founders, and anyone who thrives on purpose. unQ is for those who work smart, play hard, and dream even harder.

Name: La Boutique Solidaire
Description:
La Boutique Solidaire c'est des produits d’épicerie fine et d’art de la table fabriqués par des personnes en situation de handicap ou d’exclusion. Nos produits ont été sélectionnés pour leur saveur et leur qualité.

Name: Cookie Dough Bliss
Description:
The Brand Story You Didn’t Know You Needed (But You Absolutely Do)

Once upon a time (around 2017), a couple of brave souls decided the world needed a new kind of happiness. Sure, there’s world peace and ending hunger, but have you ever just sat down with a spoon and some cookie dough? Not the kind your mom told you not to eat, but the kind that makes you feel like you’ve won the emotional lottery, minus the salmonella.

We tried to resist. We really did. But let’s be honest, resisting cookie dough is like trying to outrun a treadmill—it’s exhausting, pointless, and you end up with cookie dough anyway. So we embraced it. And thus, Cookie Dough Bliss was born. Because you deserve dessert that loves you back.

Fast forward to today, we’re franchising this magical experience across the land. We’re not just here to sell cookie dough, we’re here to make bad days better, to celebrate the fact that you don’t need a reason to eat cookie dough, and to remind you that life’s too short for the “I’ll start my diet on Monday” nonsense. Spoiler alert: Monday never comes.

We’re not heroes. But if someone wants to start calling us that, we won’t stop you.

Name: Cantinium
Description:
Cantinium is an innovative platform that offers NFTs (non-fungible tokens) of high-quality Italian wines and spirits, with a guarantee of authenticity and preservation. 
We purchase the most valuable bottles directly from the best Italian producers and store them in a cellar equipped with IoT (Internet of Things) technologies that constantly monitor temperature, humidity, and light. 
The collected data is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, creating unique and verifiable NFTs for each bottle, which also attest to ownership. In this way, we offer our customers the opportunity to purchase, store or resell bottles through NFTs, with the assurance of having original and well-preserved products. Cantinium is the NFT marketplace for Italian wine and spirits enthusiasts.

Name: ETERNAL
Description:
The Upcoming Revolution in QSRs: E-commerce and the Dawn of "ETERNAL". 

The QSR industry is undergoing a major transformation, driven by evolving consumer expectations and digital innovation. As e-commerce reshapes the traditional model, this shift is more than a trend—it's a revolution redefining how we engage with fast food.  For years, QSRs have focused on optimizing in-store efficiency and drive-through speed. However, the rise of on-demand delivery, personalized digital experiences, and the sheer convenience of online ordering has irrevocably shifted consumer behavior. Today's customers demand seamless integration between the digital and physical worlds, expecting the same level of speed and customization online as they do in person.  

The fusion of QSR and e-commerce unlocks new possibilities. Digital platforms enable restaurants to extend beyond physical locations, offering customized menus, targeted deals, and seamless ordering. Imagine tracking your burger’s preparation in real-time and receiving it exactly when you want—all from your smartphone. This revolution goes beyond convenience—it's about deeper customer connections. E-commerce enables QSRs to analyze preferences, personalize offers, and boost loyalty through AI-driven insights and app-integrated programs.

Leading this transformation is ETERNAL, backed by TBM - The Brand Makers. More than a delivery platform, ETERNAL is a comprehensive ecosystem that helps QSRs seamlessly integrate e-commerce, optimize ordering, streamline logistics, and build a strong digital presence.

ETERNAL is shaping the future of QSRs with a unified, omnichannel experience. By equipping restaurants with cutting-edge technology, ETERNAL is revolutionizing fast food—where convenience, personalization, and seamless integration redefine quick-service dining. 

Join us in leading this new era!

Name: De Witte Zwaan
Description:
De Witte Zwaan brandt koffie sinds 1902, voor iedereen. 
In onze winkel in Eeklo vind je zowel classic blends als specialty coffee. Daarbij kun je in onze bar een heerlijke koffie drinken. In de Roastery in Zomergem wordt de koffie gebrand. Hier verwelkomen we je, na afspraak, om een workshop te volgen of een blik te geven achter de schermen.

ONZE MISSIE
De beste koffie presenteren. Dat is de essentie. Onze klanten helpen dit doel te bereiken is ons streven. Want koffie, daar draait het om bij De Witte Zwaan. Daar zit onze kennis, dát is onze passie. 
We doen wat we graag doen en dat is een luxe. Het geeft ons de vrijheid om echt te zijn. Puur. Op zakelijk en persoonlijk vlak. Zo maken wij het verschil.

COFFEE AS YOU ARE
We luisteren aandachtig naar jou zodat we kunnen meedenken en meeschrijven aan jouw verhaal. Zo maken we de juiste koffiekeuzes. We adviseren niet alleen welk pad geschikt is voor jou, maar ook hoe je op je bestemming geraakt. We helpen je graag groeien en gaan daarvoor tot het uiterste. Ons engagement is groot. We verwachten datzelfde ook van jou. 

ONZE PASSIE
Drive en passie zijn onontbeerlijk om het koffieverhaal te begrijpen. Van specialty koffies, onze signatuur, tot blends van diverse origines en farmers. Niet enkel de inhoud is van belang, maar ook de beleving, de verpakking,... elk detail telt.

WEES WELKOM
We nodigen je graag uit in onze nieuwe branderij. Je komt er thuis, op alle vlakken. Je vindt er producten die bij je passen en de expertise en adviezen die je vooruithelpen. 

De Witte Zwaan is een ontmoetingsplaats waar gelijkgestemde koffieprofessionelen en -liefhebbers samenkomen om ervaringen en momenten te delen Een plaats waar workshops, rondleidingen, teambuildingactiviteiten of individuele ontmoetingen je inspiratie geven. Dat zet deuren open voor nieuwe verhalen.

Name: Ranch & Rifle
Description:
Ranch & Rifle is more than just a spice company—we’re a community of hunters, veterans, and outdoor enthusiasts who believe in the power of nature and good food to heal and connect. We’re committed to conservation, ethical hunting practices, and reducing waste in game meat preparation. Most importantly, we stand behind our veterans, working hard to support the brave men and women who protect our country.

By partnering with Veteran-based Non-Profits, Ranch & Rifle contributes to outdoor therapy programs that offer healing through hunting, fishing, and cooking. These partnerships allow us to give back in a meaningful way, ensuring that veterans and first responders have access to the resources they need to thrive.

Whether you’re a seasoned hunter, a weekend griller, or simply someone who enjoys flavorful meals, Ranch & Rifle is here to bring your meals to life with our American-made, expertly crafted spices. Join us on this journey as we honor the hunt, cherish the moments shared around the grill, and give back to those who’ve given so much for us.

Name: El Patio Foods
Description:
Before Austin was the city many know it as today – long before SXSW and Austin
City Limits, before Farrah Fawcett, Janis Joplin or Matthew McConaughey ever
attended the University of Texas, before Whole Foods was even an idea, and even
before I-35 was built – stood a small diner on the north end of The Drag.

In 1954, the Joseph family began serving traditional Tex Mex dishes to Austin locals. And while over the last 70 years, high-rises and newer, ‘less local’ businesses have taken the place of former Austin establishments, El Patio has remained an Austin staple, still in its original location on The Drag.

So much more than a restaurant, El Patio is a symbol for the community it serves, a place that honors its family history and celebrates generational relationships. It’s a compilation of stories that speak to the warm, inclusive atmosphere and those who’ve made it what it is today.

Looking forward, the El Patio brand has the opportunity to breathe new life into a
70-year-old business, creating a bridge from the past to the present to the future always building upon its rich family legacy and deep Austin roots. The goal is to take what’s been handed down through generations, and create a brand name that goes beyond Austin (and eventually Texas) – to becoming a household food brand name nationwide.

Name: Le Caviste Gourmand
Description:
Le Caviste Gourmand est une enseigne présente sur Narbonne et Lézignan-Corbières qui, par l’envie de faire vivre le commerce local, vous accueille dans ses boutiques !  L’objectif est de réunir en un seul lieu, une cave à vin, une épicerie fine et un restaurant ! Vous l’avez donc compris, vous pouvez venir chez nous déguster un bon plat dans notre restaurant puis partir à la conquête de nos bons produits locaux au cœur de notre épicerie et enfin retrouver vos vins et spiritueux préférés de la région Occitane.
Le Caviste Gourmand propose près de 800 références de vins et spiritueux, ce qui en fait la plus grande cave d’Occitanie.
Un espace est également dédié aux champagnes, spiritueux (rhums, whisky, cognac, etc) et aux bières.
Depuis toujours, la politique de la maison reste la même : présenter nos produits au prix le plus bas du marché.
Côté épicerie, on apprécie la charcuterie et la viande fraîche, les conserves et les plats préparés, les fromages et bien d’autres. Mais toujours issus de producteurs locaux.
Vous trouverez aussi des produits de la mer, des olives, huiles, tapenades et toute une sélection de tartinables.
Pour les plus gourmands, chocolats, gâteaux, confitures et spécialités régionales.
Vous trouverez également des produits de beauté, savons, gels douches et crèmes au lait d’ânesse : bonne mine garantie !

Name: M&H Ward Group - McDonald's Toowoomba Region
Description:
The M&H Ward Group, proudly owned and operated by Toowoomba locals Mark and Heidi Ward (Licensees), together with Chief Operating Officer Nathan Whitley and Human Resources Director Joshua Bamford, manages seven McDonald’s restaurants across the Toowoomba and Darling Downs Region. Employing over 650 local team members, we are one of the region’s largest private employers and a proud contributor to the local economy.

Our Group is deeply committed to meeting the needs of our community through a range of specialised employment pathways, including:

Disability Employment Pathways - 5 x Award Winning Program

First Nations Employment Youth Employment Pathway

Refugee and Migrant Employment - Our Largest, with over 120 Staff Employed via this pathway.

Mature Age Employment

At-Risk Youth Employment Programs

Our strong focus on diversity, equity, and inclusion has earned us recognition through multiple awards, including Outstanding Disability Employer Australia (2022) and Excellence in Innovation.

With the unwavering support of our Company Directors, this commitment has been championed by HR Director Joshua Bamford, an award-winning Disability Employment Advocate whose leadership continues to drive sustainable, inclusive employment practices across our organisation.

The M&H Ward Group is proud to embody the spirit of local ownership, community connection, and inclusive opportunity — creating genuine jobs for genuine people and driving positive change throughout the Toowoomba and Darling Downs Region.

Name: Swadu India

Built to help hyperlocal food businesses capitalize on the government of India-backed ONDC Network, Swadu makes it easy for food partners to reach new customers across India while offering unbeatable value and convenience to users.
Swadu empowers restaurants to join the ONDC Network without the burden of high upfront costs or hefty commissions. Food partners benefit from a range of comprehensive features, including order management, real-time order notifications, real-time delivery tracking, and automated GST calculations, making running their food business more efficient than ever.
For food lovers, Swadu’s feature-rich app offers a smooth and intuitive ordering experience. With a focus on simplicity and convenience, Swadu enables users to enjoy easy meal selection, order tracking, direct communication with restaurants, and seamless refund and return processes. Swadu also includes customer-friendly features like order tracking, customer support, and more, ensuring every meal meets high standards of taste and quality.

Everyday Essentials, Extraordinary Impact.

Name: Bebang HaloHalo
Description:
Bebang HaloHalo is a celebrated Filipino dessert chain, known for serving the creamiest and most innovative Halo-Halo worldwide. Co-founded by Daymae Salumbides and Sam Karazi, our brand lives by the tagline "Fun, Royal, and Filipino!"

We're shaking up the dessert scene with our unique Halo-Halo preparation, where we freeze and shave milk instead of ice, resulting in a creamier dessert. Our Halo-Halo features only premium ingredients, with our Royal Halo Halo variant even boasting a 24 Karat gold topping.

We've made a name for ourselves with our advanced packaging and delivery system, ensuring our products arrive frozen or we offer a money-back guarantee. Since July 2021, we've become the most viral food brand in Metro Manila, with millions of views on social media platforms like TikTok and Facebook.

Our fully automated ordering system integrates with Facebook Messenger, providing a seamless experience for our customers. With over 200,000 followers on Facebook in less than two years, our strong social media presence speaks volumes about our brand's popularity.

Our customers love us, hailing Bebang HaloHalo as the most delicious and innovative Halo-Halo in the market. We're recognized for our aesthetically pleasing presentation.

With our brand colors of emerald green and gold, we symbolize quality, joyfulness, and authenticity. Our youthful, creative, and high-spirited brand persona resonates well with our primary audience - women aged between 23 and 45.

We're big on content creation. Our success on social media platforms is a testament to our commitment to engaging, fun, and enjoyable content.

From our humble beginnings in Mandaluyong, we're on a mission to make Bebang HaloHalo accessible to every Filipino, both nationally and internationally. Our vision? To make Bebang HaloHalo synonymous with Halo-Halo, becoming the first brand that pops in mind when thinking of this delightful and uniquely Filipino dessert.

Name: Maison Pensato
Description:
Pensato & Co. is a 100% Italian food house whose main business was born in the south of Italy, on 500 acres owned by Fernando Pensato.

Driven by his passion for the land and respect for tradition, he bought the olive grove that once belonged to his ancestors. He enthusiastically developed a range of products of the highest quality for haute cuisine: olives pure and unique variety, vegetables, wheat & grapes.

To complete its range of products, Pensato & Co. developed the prestigious House Balsamic Vinegar of Modena and the diamond of gastronomy: the truffle. Due to its high-quality standards, many Michelin starred as the " Leading Hotels of the World" restaurants use these products. Building on its success, the Pensato & Cie House also became a partner in 2008 of " Relais & Chateaux ", " Euro-Toques " and " Quality & Tradition ".

We uphold strong values for the passion and respect for the earth and our environment. Our passion drives us every day to minimize our impact on the environment by reducing our carbon footprint, reducing our waste, and preserving the natural resources that are so dear to us.
This will preserve the environment and has also allowed us to obtain the certification label " Organic Farming ", certainly the best reward after the smile & satisfaction of our customers.

Que vous soyez amateur(e), curieux(se), débutant(e) ou passionné(e), Vinerosa est fait pour vous. Découvrez ici le monde du vin tel qu'on le voit peu : simple, ludique et centré sur le goût, le voyage, la créativité et la soif d'explorer.

 Nous vous partageons des insights sur les différentes régions du monde, leurs cépages, leurs profils aromatiques, comment accorder le vin et la food...

Description:
MAJU MAKMUR Jayapura was established as a modern Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) Distribution company that focuses on the distribution of packaged Food and Beverages and Non-Food products (House Hold, Cosmetics, Electronics, etc.).

Our company carries the concept of the most complete modern distribution with a variety of products. Currently, with the number of Principals who entrust the product distribution process to us, we have become a leader in the distribution of 82 (Eighty Two) Principals who have various products.

Our hope is that CV. MAJU MAKMUR Jayapura can be a real and best solution in meeting the needs of the people in Papua, especially Jayapura and Wamena for the products we distribute.

Name: Viners - We Love Vinos
Description:
Desde Viners te traemos los mejores vinos de Argentina, con solo un clic, facilitando la compra, desde la elección, hasta el descorche.

Viners nació a fines de 2018, porque como consumidores de vinos queríamos un servicio diferente.

Tenemos una alianza estratégica con Andreani Logística, lo que nos permite entregar nuestros productos en menos de 72 horas en las principales ciudades del país. Además, desarrollamos nuestro propio packaging, con protección premium, para que tus vinos lleguen en perfectas condiciones.

En Viners te ofrecemos solo los mejores vinos de Argentina. El 90% de nuestro catálogo son etiquetas con más de 90 puntos, o con rating mínimo de 4 en Vivino. Y el 10% restante son etiquetas que nuestro Head Sommelier seleccionó especialmente, por su altísima calidad.

Viners no es simplemente una tienda de vinos en internet. Viners es mucho más. Venimos a transformar la vinoteca tradicional, en una experiencia online.

Brindá, compartí, disfrutá!

Name: The Matcha Yaad
Description:
The Matcha Yaad is the home of Britain's first Productivity Beverage. We are where flavour meets function! We specialise in expertly crafting amazing Matcha based products. 

Our Matcha is from Uji, Kyoto, world renowned for the best quality Matcha powder. In fact, Britain's foremost Food and Beverage Brand expert, Eddie Stableford, described our Matcha as "highest, attainable quality". We are serious about delivering to you the best of the best.

Our passion led us from the land of wood and water Jamaica, to the land of the rising sun Japan. There, we immersed ourselves in the vibrant cultures and developed a beverage that is not only packed with powerful nutrients, but has bold, tantalising and mouthwatering flavour! Now we are in the UK empowering our dear customers with our power packed punch!

Name: Movino
Description:
Vi har skabt den moderne vinbutik til dig, som vi altid selv har drømt om! Et sted, hvor vin kombineret med mad, stilfuld gaveindpakning og professionel, men hjemlig service er i fokus. 

Vi kalder det Movino.

Med Movino vil vi skabe fremtidens vinbutik. En moderne detailforretning. En detailforretning som skal trække dig ned i gågaden og ind i butikken. 

Vi er også forhandler af de anerkendte Riedel-glas. Kom ind i butikken og se vores udvalg. 

Her får du vin på glas eller i hele flasker. Serveret ved den rette temperatur og i det rigtige glas. Med fokus på den gode smag og oplevelse.

I køkkenet fremtrylles der frisklavet pasta, vores charcuteri, "Cassoulet" og muligheden for at tilkøbe Joselito-skinker eller kaviar.

Vi glæder os til at byde dig indenfor hos Movino.

Name: The Hideout @ Harper Farm
Description:
Harper Farm has been in the Stephenson family for over 100 years. Throughout our time we've had dairy cows, pigs and sheep to name a few -and the farm is now producing fresh, free range eggs. 

We've diversified the farm into other areas too; producing wind and solar energy, grazing land and we even have our own bee hives!

The Hideout @ Harper Farm - Our local family coffee shop, offering speciality coffee and cakes, along with fresh, free range eggs - is our latest way to diversify the family farm - and keep it sustainable for the next generation!

Name: Steviva Brands
Description: Our line of good-for-you, natural alternative sweeteners are terrific options for cooking and baking without sugar! Whether you need a granulated sweetener to replace table sugar, a powdered sweetener to replace confectionery sugar, or a liquid sweetener to replace corn syrup, we have carefully developed safe, low glycemic, low caloric sweeteners that taste and act just like sugar. At Steviva Brands, we are on a mission to vanquish metabolic disease, one tasty meal at a time! Look no further for zero sugar recipes and a community you can count on!

Name: triple ‘a’ Foodhall
Description:
Welcome to triple ‘a’ Foodhall, where exceptional food meets community pride. Located in Nuneaton, we’re an award winning hub offering everything from hand stretched Neapolitan pizzas, the triple ‘a’ Spud Experience, and freshly baked artisan breads to our signature gelato, made daily with authentic Italian ingredients. We’re also home to the UK’s first Gelato Slice.

We’re more than a foodhall, we’re a community. Whether it’s donating thousands of advent calendars and selection boxes to local schools, supporting initiatives like the National Breakfast Scheme, hosting events such as our festive Santa Meet, or partnering with vendors to showcase the very best in independent retail, we put people first in everything we do.

In 2025, triple ‘a’ achieved multiple major industry honours across the UK retail landscape, including:
 Retail Industry Awards 2025
• Independent Retailer of the Year
 Better Retailing Awards 2025
• Merchandising, In Store Display
• Overall Best Shop
 Bestway Awards 2025
• Large Convenience Store of the Year
 The Convenience Awards 2025
• Large Convenience Store of the Year
• Food to Go Store of the Year

These achievements reflect our commitment to excellence, innovation and community centred retailing.

Visit us to see what makes triple ‘a’ Foodhall a must visit destination. Follow our page for updates, insights and a closer look at what we do best.

 92 Coleshill Rd, Chapel End, Nuneaton CV10 0PH
 tripleafoodhall.co.uk

Our new venture brings together our commitment to excellence and the goal of creating a place where people can connect, collaborate, or simply unwind.

Name: AC Hesed Group
Description:
Founded in Singapore, AC Hesed Group is home to a growing portfolio of food and beverage brands from around the world. It’s existing brand portfolio includes, Krispy Kreme (USA); llaollao (Spain); 108 Matcha Saro (Japan); Ben’s Cookies (UK); TP Tea (Taiwan); Cinnabon (USA); and Jamba Juice (USA). 

Our mission is to provide consumers with foods and beverages of the highest quality and standards, as if they were enjoying our products in their countries of origin. To ensure this, we import key ingredients and equipment to produce our products. For example, flour used in Krispy Kreme doughnuts are imported from the USA; cookie dough in Ben’s Cookies are imported from the UK; and we use only ceremonial-grade matcha powder from Uji, Kyoto, Japan. We also commit to satisfying all international standards of practice, as required by each respective brand principal. 

Our goal is to bring luxurious and delicious treats from around the world to Singapore and beyond. True to this, we have expanded our presence to Malaysia, Indonesia, and soon, Hong Kong. If you are interested in sub-franchising any of the above-mentioned brands (and more), please reach out to us. 

Aligned with our mission to bring delicious treats to the region is the hope to provide homes to similar businesses. Thus, forming the motivation to venture into freehold, food industries commercial property development. 

We look forward to serving you soon.

It was able to do so with the commitment of all the people who worked behind the scenes as a team, collaborating with the different facets involved in the making of a good thing – suppliers, personnel, contractors, creatives, auditors, and others.

Today, it hopes to face what is challenging lately, recognizing this as opportunity, and embracing fully what is exciting ahead. We would like to enhance the team with extraordinary individuals who resonate with and value the desire to keep quality present in all aspects of the work – in the commissary, stores, offices, and everything in between.

Fancy Hank’s knows a thing or two about good food. 

Since opening our American BBQ restaurant in the heart of Melbourne CBD more than ten years ago, we’ve served thousands of happy customers our slow-cooked comfort food.

After so much feedback on our house-made sauces and seasonings, we launched them to the public. Now, we’re dedicated to making your home-cooked meals just a little bit more fancy.

Locally owned and produced, our gourmet products are made from only the freshest ingredients. They are all-natural and preservative-free, offering restaurant-quality flavours.

For your special events, celebrations and dinner parties, we can provide the wine with our expert help and advice. We are the connoisseur in your corner. We also offer bespoke wine tastings and food and wine pairing experiences.
 
Monty’s Wine Emporium is a family-run business committed to excellent customer service, as well as offering an enjoyable experience when you buy your wine from us.

Description:
Bienvenue à La Cave du Maquis

Nous sommes une cave en ligne dédiée à la découverte et à la promotion des vins du Languedoc issus de petits producteurs engagés dans une démarche éco-responsable. Notre mission est de faire connaître et apprécier des vins authentiques, respectueux de l'environnement et des traditions locales.

Nos services incluent :

- Sélection de vins :

Une gamme soigneusement choisie de vins du Languedoc, mettant en avant la diversité et la qualité de ce terroir exceptionnel.

- Animations de dégustation :

Des évènements conviviaux pour découvrir et savourer nos vins, tout en apprenant sur les pratiques viticoles durables.

- Vente en ligne : 

Une plateforme facile d'accès pour commander nos vins et recevoir des conseils personnalisés.

- Services aux professionnels :

Des solutions sur mesure pour les restaurants, hôtels, traiteurs etc souhaitant enrichir leur carte avec des vins de qualité.

Nous croyons en une viticulture respectueuse de l'environnement et soutenons des producteurs qui partagent cette vision. Chaque bouteille que nous proposons est le fruit d'un travail passionné et éthique, garantissant une expérience unique à chaque dégustation.

Contactez nous :

Vous pouvez nous contacter pour toute question, collaboration ou commande. Ensemble, partageons la passion du vin éco-responsable !

Description:
More than a gourmet brand, it is the result of a dream of someone passionate about originality and innovation, with roots in Vila Nova de Gaia.

This young man, named Helder Lobo, has always had a huge taste for artisanal and traditional products, from small producers, bought locally in the centenary grocery store, where we find something that transports us to the childhood of our ancestors. In this sense, Helder decided to create Premium Bite, in 2020, and in this way join small producers as well as support the local economy, taking it beyond borders.

With this brand, we will make our beautiful Portugal known to the rest of the world, demonstrating the value that each producer holds, through dedication to what is produced daily in our land.

Our delivery and dedication will make the difference for every occasion (festive or otherwise), making life even more special with the presence of the details that can be found in our personalised hampers.

We say we are the best in our creations! We have themed Hampers, Christmas Hampers, Corporate Hampers, Original Gifts, all in an elegant, sustainable and gourmet packaging.

We create unique gifts, typically Portuguese souvenirs!

Description:
Welcome to GGT Foods, where GGT stands for God Given Treasures.

Building on the legacy of Shree Bihariji Exports Private Limited, established in 1999, we bring you the finest premium dry fruits. GGT Foods – Discover nature’s treasures, delivered with care.

Name: Mellanmal Inc
Description:
Mellanmål Inc is a US distribution company that sells better-for-you-and-the-planet food products. 

We currently operate in the US and Sweden, but are opening up new markets as opportunities arise. In the US we have a full one-stop-shop operation and offer shipping, import, warehousing, sales and distribution. Our main sales channels are retail B2B but also we also offer B2C sales on our website www.mellanmalofsweden.com.

Get in touch if you are a food entrepreneur that wants to sell your products in the US or Sweden, or if you are a US or Swedish retailer that wants to list the products we sell.

MELLANMÅL is Swedish and literally means "middle-meal" and is a big part of Swedish food culture. It's a healthier small meal between meals, usually low on sugar and high on protein, as opposed to a sweet snack.

Notre équipe vous accueille et vous conseille dans votre choix parmi + de 1000 bières, vins, whiskies ou spiritueux à Chambray-Les-Tours. À emporter, côté cave ou à déguster, côté bar !

From bespoke velvet and leather, to elegant trays and an inspired Oriental Wooden Drawer Box, each packaging option is carefully curated for you.

Name: Gimi Michi
Description:
At Gimi Michi, we're on a mission to bring the bold, authentic flavors of Southeast Asia to your everyday meals—conveniently, affordably, and with zero compromise on taste.

Born out of IIM Ahmedabad, Gimi Michi is reimagining instant food for the modern Indian consumer. Tired of the limited and often artificial options in the market, we set out to craft the real deal—starting with Korean Kimchi Ramen that’s made in India, but rooted in traditional Korean flavor.

Every bowl of Gimi Michi is backed by months of R&D, real tasting panels, and obsessive attention to detail—from the chewy, long-strand noodles to our signature seasoning and vegetable blend. It’s not just a snack—it’s a full meal experience.

We're building more than just a product—we’re building a brand that celebrates real food, cross-cultural flavors, and a bold new wave of FMCG innovation from India.

Whether you're a foodie, an explorer of global cuisines, or just someone craving a hearty, flavorful meal—we're here for you.

Name: All Cleveland Coffee
Description:
All Cleveland Coffee is on a mission to give 1,000,000 meals back to our community through an official partnership with the Cleveland Food Bank. 

We are passionate about supporting the city of Cleveland and its residents. Every bag of coffee sold provides 4 meals to the Cleveland Food Bank, helping to fight hunger in our community. By choosing All Cleveland Coffee you are not only enjoying a delicious cup of coffee, but also making a difference in the lives of those in need. 

In addition to our commitment to giving back, we are here to celebrate the heroes of Cleveland. We believe that every cup of All Cleveland Coffee should be a tribute to the people who make Cleveland the vibrant and resilient community that it is. 

By choosing All Cleveland Coffee, you are not just enjoying a quality cup of coffee, you are also supporting our community and honoring its heroes. If you’re already going to drink coffee, you might as well make a difference.

Name: FOODIES-PLANET
Description:
At FOODIES-PLANET, we believe that chocolate can do more than make you happy. It can also make the world a better place. That’s why we created FOODIES-PLANET, the chocolate brand that cares about you, your taste buds and our planet.

Our Belgian chocolate is 100% vegan and organic without compromise! Made for real FOODIES, who love our PLANET! 

Whether you want a rice milk chocolate bar or a dark chocolate bar with almonds & sea salt, we’ve got you covered!

Name: Blue Pepper
Description:
Blue Pepper is a women-founded tea brand blending wellness, culture, and versatility. Inspired by generations of Indian tea rituals, our infusions are crafted with functional ingredients like turmeric, ginger, and ashwagandha — designed to support balance, immunity, and everyday calm.

From a hot cup to iced blends and tea-based cocktails, Blue Pepper brings bold, feel-good flavor to your daily routine.

We believe tea is more than a drink — it's a ritual of nourishment, connection, and joy.

Explore more: www.bluepepper.ca;  linktr.ee/bluepepperworld

Name: Irish Black Butter
Description:
Welcome to Irish Black Butter the home of a great new taste of Ireland.

Our aim is to ‘spread a little happiness’ with you. We use locally sourced EU PGI status Armagh Bramley Apples from Ireland’s ‘orchard county’ to make our ultra versatile sweet and savoury spread.  It has applications for cooking, baking, spreading and mixing. Suitable for vegetarian and vegan users  this is a truly inclusive all rounder which we are sure you, your friends, and family will enjoy sharing together.

Description: Whether you are looking for a unique dinner party dessert, or want to treat yourself and your family to something special and indulgent, these decadent cookies are guaranteed to be a hit.

At Long John Silver's we treat every moment as an opportunity to celebrate the food we love the most from the place we love most – the sea.

We have always believed that our unique seafood experience should be accessible to all. But our love of the sea goes so much deeper. We work to serve our oceans as faithfully as we serve our customers because we believe whenever you can make waves, you have to.

brands and reshaping the future of culinary excellence
in Saudi Arabia.

experiences by connecting the residents with the visitors
and crafting unforgettable memories. Through showcasing

we continuously strive to create fresh ideas while embracing
the latest industry trends.

gateway to an exclusive gastronomic delight, each visit is an

Description:
C’est la rencontre de deux passionnés, Fabien & Simon,  l’un caviste, l’autre vigneron, deux copains avec la volonté commune de partager la convivialité en bouteille."
Nous avons repensé la manière de faire déguster et vendre les boissons et produits d'épicerie en mettant la “Convivialité” au cœur du réacteur de la distribution des flacons proposés par Atooki. 
Quoi de mieux alors que de vous proposer d’être Consom’acteur et faire de votre expérience d’amateur de vin/jus/spiritueux/huilles..., un outil viral permettant à votre entourage de faire de belles découvertes ?

Pas d’intermédiaire ni de spécialiste porté sur un pied d’estale.

Name: Durham County ABC
Description:
The Durham County ABC Board was organized under the provisions of the Pasqoutank Act in 1937 and implemented by a county wide vote on May 15, 1937, at which time the Durham County Commissioners appointed three individuals to serve on the Board with terms of three years. In 2001, upon authorization by the State Legislature, the County Commissioners appointed two more individuals to serve on the Board bringing the total to five board members. 

As a local Board, authorized and defined by NC General Statutes, Durham County ABC is an independent local political subdivision of the State.

The Board, as provided by North Carolina Alcoholic Beverage Control laws, operates retail liquor stores and, through its law enforcement division, investigates violations of such laws. North Carolina General Statute 18B-805(c) (2) (3) requires that the Board expend at least 5% of profits for law enforcement and at least 7% of the same profits for alcohol education and rehabilitation purposes. NC Statutes also require the Board to distribute its surpluses to the General Fund of Durham County and the City of Durham, which represents a financial benefit to the County and City.

Name: Mirror Margarita
Description:
Inspired to create a cocktail that was familiar in both name and taste but strikingly different in appearance, Mirror Margarita is a crystal-clear twist on the classic Margarita cocktail which when served looks like a glass of water, but is in fact a stunning Margarita with the perfect balance of sweet and sour notes. A playful and futuristic reimagining of one of the world's favourite cocktails, at its heart is the agave plant and a sustainable recipe that heroes the natural taste rather than masking it with lime and salt.

A sensorial journey of discovery like no other cocktail, our collection now has three Margaritas as well as regular limited edition bottles featuring seasonal ingredients, each crystal-clear but with distinctly different flavour profiles.

Mirror Margarita was created as the signature serve at multi-award-winning agave spirits bars Hacha but now as an independent brand can be found in Sainsburys nationwide as well as fantastic venues such as Royal Albert Hall & Firmdale's Ham Yard Hotel.

INVEST IN THE MOST DISRUPTIVE RTD ON THE MARKET // Calling all investors as we open our fundraise to our next chapter of growth. Our Granola Chunks are made with nuts, seeds, and whole fruit sweetness from dates. The result? Gluten-free, refined sugar-free, rich in protein and healthy fats — snacks that actually keep you energized.

Enjoy them your way: with yogurt in the morning, on top of a smoothie bowl, or straight from the bag.

What started as small-batch baking in Amsterdam is now on shelves at leading retailers across the Netherlands and the UK — from Planet Organic in London to STACH and Landmarkt in Amsterdam.

We’re here to prove that healthy doesn’t have to be boring. Pal & Leo is for people who love food, care about their health, and refuse to compromise on taste.

La nostra missione è condividere il ricco patrimonio culinario della Francia, dove l'arte della tavola rappresenta una chiave di eccellenza. Scegliamo con cura i prodotti di alta qualità. 

Vogliamo offrire agli amanti del buon cibo la possibilità di gustare autentiche delizie culinarie provenienti dalla Francia. 

Unisciti a noi in questa avventura enogastronomica, esplora il nostro sito e scopri le prelibatezze Made in France che renderanno le tue esperienze gastronomiche un vero viaggio sensoriale. 

Unisciti a noi in questo viaggio di scoperta, condividiamo la nostra passione per la Francia e la sua dolce vita!

Name: Cranstons Butcher + Maker
Description:
Cranstons was founded in 1914 by Stanley Cranston in the village of Kirkoswald. He delivered meat directly to homes in the northern Eden Valley and provided a personalised and local approach to butchery. He helped form a legacy through only using quality products that could be trusted.

Roger and Philip Cranston took the small butchers and transformed into a modern business. Today Cranstons employs over 200 people but stays true to its values of Quality you can trust.

Cranstons now has Food Halls in Penrith, Orton Grange and Brampton and traditional high street butcher shops in Penrith, Carlisle and Hexham. Cranstons also has its own production unit full of exciting new product development and Café above the Penrith Food Hall which allows us to showcase the best of Cumbrian foods.

In the last 5 years Cranstons have won over thirty national produce awards, most recently picking up the title ‘Best Burger in the UK’ for their Topside and Cheddar Burger at the 2024 Smithfield Awards. The burger is a blend of Beef Topside, Mature Cheddar Cheese and Tomato Chutney.

Name: Half Time
Description:
At Half Time, we eat, sleep, and drink craft beer. 
We began in 2002 as a family business, and opened our first store in Poughkeepsie, NY stocked with 600 of the most exciting and unique beers we could get our hands on. 
Recognizing that the demand for a one-stop “beervana” shopping experience exceeded the immediate New York area, Half Time also became an early pioneer of direct-to-consumer online shipping, sending hard-to-find beers all the way across the country! 
In 2011, we opened our second location in Mamaroneck, NY, and our offerings jumped to nearly 5,000 incredible brews.
Today, Half Time bridges the gap between digital and real-world brew hunting. We started out as a hands-on, community-focused retailer 20 years ago, and today that character remains intact; our Poughkeepsie and Mamaroneck outlets are both every bit as inviting as our website. 
Along this journey, Half Time has also become an active member of the craft beer community: We host our own festivals, like the annual Harbor Island International Beer Festival, and we’ve teamed up with the biggest names in craft beer to throw some of the first virtual beer events, like BeerAdvocate’s “Extreme Beer Fest: Cyberspace” and Untappd’s “Virtual Beer Festival.” 
So as you search the site or browse our shelves, ask yourself: What are you looking for? The latest hop bomb? A stout to warm your bones in cold weather? Your imagination and palate are the only limits. Let Half Time do the rest.

Name: Joon Foods
Description:
Meet Joon, a soon-to-launch pistachio snack company inspired by a 300-year-old family recipe that leverages a unique cooking process to deliver the perfect pistachio experience.

Joon is addressing a gap in the market where tasty, fresh, high-quality pistachios with clean ingredients have been hard to come by.

Pistachios are a superfood rich in antioxidants and high in protein; they contain all nine essential amino acids, making them a complete protein. However, most brands on the market today add seed oils, artificial ingredients, 'natural' flavors, sugars, and other additives to their flavored SKUs. 

We've created the tastiest pistachios, without compromising the health benefits, by avoiding unwanted ingredients.

What Sets Joon Apart?
- Unique Cooking Process: our cooking method results in the creamiest, crunchiest, and tastiest pistachios
- Family Tradition: inspired by a 300-year-old family recipe from a region that pioneered pistachio cultivation
- Delicious Flavors: launching with Original Salted, Salt and Pepper, and Dill Pickle
- Real Ingredients: no additives, no artificial/natural flavors, no added sugars, and no seed oils – just simple, easy to pronounce ingredients
- Convenient and Clean: easy to open, consistently large, and leave no residue on your hands. We source bigger and higher quality pistachios - no more painfully prying open shells
- Vibrant Colors + Unique Look: natural, beautiful shades of pink, purple, and green as if they just fell off the tree. Our use of whole ingredients leaves a one-of-a-kind pattern on every shell and kernel.

Name: LIVS

Name: Kongres Kawy
Description:
Być może uznasz, że Kongres Kawy to kolejny sklep internetowy z kawą i herbatą. I na pierwszy rzut oka, w zasadzie będzie to prawda. Jednak nie o to nam chodzi w tej grze.
Marzy nam się sklep z kawą i herbatą, który będzie miał wpływ na środowisko w którym żyjemy oraz społeczność, która zbierze się w jednym miejscu by nam w tym pomagać. Tak naprawdę kawa i herbata jest tu jedynie pierwszym krokiem, do spełnienia tego marzenia i dziękujemy Ci, że czytając to pchasz nasz w tym kierunku!
Co dokładnie chcemy zrobić?
Przede wszystkim dzięki twoim zakupom chcemy posadzić mnóstwo drzew, pomagać zwierzętom i stworzyć miejsce do odpoczynku w stylu SLOW.
Wyobrażamy sobie to w ten sposób, że za zyski, które będziemy osiągać w związku z prowadzeniem tego sklepu najpierw kupimy działkę, która będzie z daleka od ludzi a następnie posadzimy tam cudowny las, w którym każde zwierzę odnajdzie swój dom.
Gdy już osiągniemy ten milowy krok, na obrzeżach lasu postawimy maleńkie domki a w zasadzie kopuły, z których klienci naszego sklepu będą mogli korzystać na specjalnych warunkach. To przecież będzie również Twoja zasługa! Dzięki nim będzie można wyrwać się z pędzącego świata i choć na chwile zjednoczyć się z naturą. Brzmi pięknie prawda? Pomyśl, jak będzie smakować tam Twoja ulubiona kawa!
W tym wszystkim nie zapominamy jednak o naszej miłości do kawy.
