Name: Divide
Description:
Drink Different. Drink Divide.

Divide is Sri Lanka’s fastest–growing minimalist coffee brand — built on speed, design innovation, and community culture.
What started as a 100–300 sq.ft. grab-and-go concept in Colombo has rapidly evolved into a franchise-ready model that combines global café aesthetics with the convenience Sri Lankan customers love.

At Divide, we focus on simplicity done perfectly:
 Specialty coffee & matcha curated from around the world
 A compact, efficient store model requiring minimal space
 High daily footfall with fast return on investment
 A design-first experience that people love to photograph and share

Our community markets for us. From French-window facades to clean black-and-white branding, every Divide store becomes a landmark — a spot to take a picture, post a story, and grab a cup of quality coffee on the move.

Our Growth Story:
• In just weeks, we built and launched two Colombo locations — Divide Ward Place & Divide Nawam Mawatha
• We are now expanding across Colombo through micro-spaces and curated franchise partnerships
• International expansion has already begun with Divide’s first overseas branch opening in the Maldives

The Divide Blueprint:
• Small footprint. Big return.
• No kitchen required
• Zero wastage operating model
• Fast build time (2–3 weeks)
• Strong digital presence with high social engagement
• Designed for scalability across malls, corporate buildings, transport hubs, and luxury hotels

Divide is more than coffee — it is a culture, a movement, and a lifestyle brand reshaping how Sri Lankans experience specialty beverages.
We are now partnering with investors, property developers, and business owners who want to bring this next-generation coffee model to their district or city.

Drink Divide.
Experience the future of fast coffee.

Name: Roastory Koffie
Description:
Bij Roastory Koffie draait alles om één ding: passie voor écht goede koffie. Vanuit onze eigen branderij selecteren en branden wij de mooiste koffiebonen van over de hele wereld. Van de verfijnde bloemige Yirgacheffe uit Ethiopië tot de volle, nootachtige Braziliaanse Cerrado – iedere boon krijgt bij ons de aandacht die hij verdient.

Wij geloven in de kracht van de slow-roast methode: rustig branden op lagere temperatuur, zodat de smaak en aroma’s zich optimaal kunnen ontwikkelen. Het resultaat? Koffies met een rijk, gelaagd karakter – altijd perfect in balans en afgestemd op de smaakbeleving van onze klanten.

Of het nu gaat om een espresso vol intensiteit, een cappuccino met romige zoetheid of een filterkoffie die sprankelt van frisheid, bij Roastory brengen we de wereld van specialty coffee rechtstreeks in jouw kop. Met precisie, vakmanschap en bovenal: liefde voor koffie.

Name: ScoopMan
Description:
ScoopMan Ice Creams & Cafe, your one-stop for all your dessert cravings in Rohini, North-West Delhi, India. You'll drool over ScoopMan's different premium fresh, creamy milk Ice Creams, customized Sundaes, fresh baked Waffles, thick & creamy Shakes, frothy Ice Cream Sodas, live Pasta and many Appetizers. Your desserts can be customized however you like, as their tagline states, "Real Milk, Real Flavours.".

ScoopMan Ice Creams & Cafe started its first outlet in Oct 2021 and the second outlet was opened in Oct 2022 in Rohini, North-West Delhi. 

In July 2021, the founders came up with the idea after realising that there is a need for a one-stop destination to meet the different dessert cravings for the people staying in Rohini, North-West Delhi. With the backbone of 30 years of manufacturing excellence in premium fresh, creamy milk ice creams, the concept was thoughtfully initiated and driven to provide a one-stop shop for all dessert cravings - from fresh creamy milk ice creams (different real fruit flavours, chocolate options, caramel & nuts options) to customized sundaes, fresh baked waffles, thick shakes, ice cream sodas, live pasta, appetizers and much more. 

The USP of this brand is that it offers diverse premium options of real fresh & creamy milk ice creams and customized dessert options as per one’s taste and preference and is the perfect place for all age groups. 


At the Live Counter in the outlets, you can see how desserts are being created live and get a real taste of it. As you get to know "ScoopMan," you will develop an understanding of the character due to its unique character identity. In terms of prices, they are more reasonable than other large Ice Cream Cafe brands.

Name: hELLO food concept store
Description: Belevingswinkel met artisanale producten, bedrijfscatering, cadeaupakketten.

Name: Grupo Museu da Gula
Description:
O Museu da Gula foi inaugurado no segundo semestre de 1998, na cidade de Ribeirão Preto como um espaço que haveria de representar para a cidade, um local de encontro entre qualidade, conveniência em gastronomia, conveniência e bem estar.

Jamais deixamos de ver através de nossas ações e da incessante busca por novos e melhores produtos, tudo que viesse fortalecer os vínculos de confiança e reciprocidade que, desde o início, recebemos de nossos fiéis clientes.

Trabalhamos com uma visão de futuro, sem comprometer a qualidade e os bons preceitos de relacionamento. No Museu da Gula, produtos e serviços refletem uma filosofia de trabalho construída com solidez, muita persistência aos seus princípios e exagerada preocupação com o bem estar.

Sabemos que tamanha obsessão não nos levará à perfeição. Ela simplesmente cumpre o seu dever de refletir o anseio de nosso maior patrimônio: os clientes “Museu da Gula”.

Name: Nourish Box
Description:
At Nourish Box, we’re transforming the way people cook at home by making meal preparation simple, enjoyable, and stress-free. Our mission is to take the hassle out of cooking by delivering fresh, pre-portioned ingredients and easy-to-follow recipes straight to your doorstep.

Whether you're a busy professional, a home cook exploring new flavors, or someone looking for healthier meal options, our service provides the perfect solution for delicious, homemade meals without the fuss.

We Offer

- Convenience: No more long grocery lists or time spent measuring ingredients.
- Variety: Explore a range of recipes inspired by global and local cuisines.
- Freshness: Ingredients are handpicked and sourced from trusted suppliers.
- Sustainability: Minimizing food waste with perfectly portioned ingredients.

Join us on this journey to make cooking at home easier, more fun, and more rewarding. Follow our page for updates on new recipes, exclusive offers, and tips for enhancing your cooking experience!

Let’s simplify meal prep—one box at a time.

Name: The Healthy Brands Company
Description:
At The Healthy Brands Company, we’re on a mission to revolutionize health and wellness. As a dynamic house of brands specializing in well-being, health, energy, and fitness, we invest in and support innovative brands that share our vision of enhancing lives. Our diverse portfolio includes cutting-edge superfoods, energizing drinks, and fitness solutions designed to empower individuals to thrive.

The Healthy Brands Company is a part of Umida Group (Publ).

Name: GoMatcha
Description: At GoMatcha, we believe in transforming your daily ritual with the finest matcha experience. Our organic, ceremonial-grade matcha is sourced in small batches from Uji, Japan, ensuring enhanced freshness and unmatched quality. We are dedicated to providing you with a superior matcha experience, from farm to cup. Join us in embracing a healthier, more mindful lifestyle with GoMatcha.

Name: Lowpact
Description: Welcome to Lowpact , where adventure meets responsibility in every meal. We're passionate about crafting high-quality, responsibly sourced meals designed for outdoor enthusiasts. Join us on our journey to make adventure accessible to all, without compromising on taste, quality, or sustainability.

Name: Al Leyan Management
Description:
Al Leyan Management is an F&B focused holding and operating company that invests and operates in food and beverage retail concepts. 

Al Leyan Management is the franchisee of Cinnabon, Carvel and Seattle's Best Coffee in Jordan.

Name: Everette's Fresh Roast Coffee
Description: We are a family-owned coffee roaster, founded by Rob Everette in 2023. John Everette joined the company as partner in 2025. We sell a variety of delicious coffee roasts, so there's something for everyone. Whether a coffee lover or manager for your office - or both! - check out our website to learn more and find your flavor today!

Name: Madame Planche
Description:
Madame Planche c'est une boutique physique et en ligne, commerçant de produits alimentaire axé sur l'instant de consommation de l'apéritif ! 

Nous commercialisons des planches apéritives mais aussi des produits d'épicerie fine (toujours autour de l'apéritif).
L'ensemble de nos produits sont 100% locaux et proviennent de la région Auvergne Rhône Alpes. 

Les planches apéritives sont à récupérer dans notre boutique de Lentilly ou livrées sur commande dans un rayon de 20 km autour de Lentilly alors que nos produits d'épicerie fine peuvent être expédiés sur toute la France.

Madame Planche c'est également un service traiteur. Nous nous déplaçons sur les lieux de votre évènement pour mettre en place un buffet de planches en format XXL, un buffet que nous aurons travaillé ensemble pour qu'il corresponde au mieux à vos attentes.

Name: Katori
Description:
Katori is an artisan food company curating a gourmet range of organic food products handcrafted by women artisans of Rajasthan. At the core of Katori is a network of women-owned collectives that employ over 200 women full-time and directly engage with over 2000 small and marginal farmers across the country. 

Traditionally made 
We are reviving age-old and traditional practices to bring you maximum nutrition, freshness and flavour.  

Small Batches 
Women artisans minimally process our products in small batches to maintain the highest standard of quality and authenticity. 

Ethical & sustainable practices 
We promote organic and sustainable practices amongst our farmer networks while also ensuring that they get a fair price for their produce. 

Women's Empowerment 
More than 70% of our proceeds go back to our women's collectives that are providing women artisans with a steady source of employment and income and helping them lead a life with dignity.

Name: Fil
Description:
Welcome to Fil! Our journey begins with the Arabic word 'filfil,' meaning 'pepper,' reflecting the heart of our company. Since our inception, we have brought the rich flavours of Palestinian culture to your table through our authentic and addictive shatta.

Shatta is a delicious and versatile Palestinian chilli-based condiment that is a staple in most if not all, Palestinian households. It is unique in its heritage and ritual as an integral part of the daily culinary experience, with a recipe typically passed down through generations. 

As three Palestinian co-founders, our story is no different. Each of us grew up with salt, pepper, and shatta on the kitchen table. What distinguishes us is not only the mouth-watering flavour of our shatta but also the adaptation of shatta to a global context while remaining true to the cultural journey it represents. We are thrilled to bring a spoonful of our heritage to your table and introduce you to the rich culinary tapestry of our homeland.

Join us on this flavourful journey as we bring Palestinian traditions to a global audience. Discover our products, participate in our traditions, and Get Your Fil

Name: Triangle Wine Company
Description: Locally owned and operated, Triangle Wine Company was formed in 2011 by like-minded individuals committed to creating the best shopping experience in wine retail. Our team has decades of experience in the wine industry at every level. As a group we have been involved in the creation of 100 point scoring wines on the production side of the business, to managing distributorships and retail operations that have led the industry in sales growth. Although there are multiple locations of Triangle Wine Company retail stores, TWC is not a franchise. It is owned together in small business partnership by friends currently open to investors.

Name: Couple's Coffee
Description:
Crafted by an Army Veteran and his coffee-loving wife. Couple's Coffee is inspired by our shared passion for crafting the ultimate coffee experience, one that embodies both sweetness and strength. Coffee plays a profound role in our lives and serves as the centerpiece of our mornings, uniting us before embarking on the adventures of each bustling day.

We take immense pride in not only our unwavering commitment to one another but also in our devotion to offering you an exceptional coffee experience. Every sip of our bold and delectable coffee is a testament to our dedication. Rest assured, our beans are meticulously roasted right here in the USA, ensuring the highest quality and freshness in every cup.

Name: BACCHIC wine boutique
Description: BACCHIC wine boutique is a refined yet rebellious fine wines and spirits business. Young, ambitious, and unashamedly in love with great bottles and great company. We move fast, think independently, and have fun doing it. If you appreciate elegance with a touch of mischief, you will feel at home.

Name: Destination Italy
Description:
Destination Italy creates authentic Italian experiences in your kitchen.
What does this mean? Simply put; it is authentic Italian produce, made by Italians, in Italy, with Italian ingredients. 

Like Italy, food is and should be an experience.

Name: Satisfood Healthy Kitchen

Every meal we produce reflects our passion for great food and our dedication to providing an exceptional customer experience.

Name: RTM FOODS
Description:
RTM Foods: Crafting Flavorful Traditions 

Welcome to RTM Foods, where every bite tells a story! 

At RTM Foods, we’re more than a namkeen brand—we’re a flavor journey. Our roots trace back to Ratlam Madhya Pradesh, where generations of artisans have perfected the art of creating authentic namkeen. From secret spice blends to handcrafted batches, we infuse tradition with innovation.

Our Promise:

 Authenticity: Our namkeen bowls carry the soul of Ratlami flavors.
 Innovation: We blend old-world techniques with modern quality standards.
 Community: RTM Foods is a family—a network of artisans, customers, and food enthusiasts.
 Quality: Our golden namkeen ribbon symbolizes unwavering standards.
 Passion: Flames dance in our kitchen, fueled by love for flavor.

We dream of RTM Foods becoming India’s flavor ambassador. Imagine our namkeen gracing tables worldwide, sparking conversations, and celebrating the artistry of Ratlam. It’s more than food—it’s a language of love.

Join Our Flavor Journey: Connect with us! Let’s chat about spices, entrepreneurship, or that unforgettable namkeen crunch. Together, we’ll savor success.

Name: PT. Made Bali Roti (Daily Baguette)
Description:
Daily Baguette was established in 2014. Owned by a couple from France, Delphine and Maxime. After travelling all over Southeast Asia in 2011, including to Bali, the couple fell in love with the island and kept on talking about moving to Bali for good. 

Having spent years working as a baker in a boulangerie in Paris, Maxime saw the opportunity to bring his skills elsewhere. He started by teaching the skills while travelling. After several trips back and forth to Bali for vacation, they've decided to bring French cuisine, which is also the passion shared in the family, to Bali. 

Everything in Daily Baguette is made fresh everyday with authentic French ingredients to uphold the top-notch quality. The whole idea about building the baked goods shop and restaurant, Daily Baguette started in 2013. Delphine came up with the brand name, because in French, people buy fresh bread everyday and there were not many of those services offered in Bali back then.

They made the right decision moving to Bali and opening the restaurant Daily Baguette. Now after almost 10 years, with team members growing from 15 to 60 people and more, as the business is growing exponentially. Aiming to be a household name, Daily Baguette is focusing on delivering the same top quality French bread and pastry everyday.

Name: PremOla Granola
Description: PremOla Granola was founded by Lisa and Ben Bastian. Ben has enjoyed this granola since he can remember. He suggested to his mom to share it beyond their immediate family.  They did just that and have been taking orders ever since.  People love it all by itself, as a sprinkle on yogurt, smoothie bowls, oatmeal, on salad or as a baking mixture for fruit cobblers - a super versatile and fun nutty offering.

Name: TAHIRA Foods Ltd.
Description: Today, Tahira Foods Limited is the leading producer and distributor of Halal foods in Europe. Our distribution infrastructure is composed of depots, cold stores and a fleet of delivery vans in the United Kingdom (London and Manchester), France (Paris, Lille and Lyon), Germany (Hamburg, Stuttgart, Berlin and Siegburg), Holland (Breukelen) and Sweden (Malmo). Tahira products are also distributed through independent wholesalers in Denmark, Italy, Spain, Ireland and Austria. Our products can be predominantly found in nationwide supermarkets named on our stocklists and local ethnic stores.

Name: PT Serata Boga Raya | SerataFoods
Description:

At SerataFoods, we put forward the four cores of our foundation: Tested Products, Competitive Prices, Trusted Suppliers, and Reliable Payment. Our vision is to provide the best and most trusted online shopping place for families/entrepreneurs (B2C / B2B) in the F&B sector in Indonesia to get the most quality kitchen and restaurant goods. With our founding team who has multi-years of experience in Research-Chef, Restopreneur, and Operations Logistic, we strive to be the best of the best in delivering your kitchen satisfaction.

-A Serata Group Company (All Rights Reserved)-

Name: Vip Comércio de Frutas e Legumes LTDA
Description: Desde nossa fundação em 2001, nos tornamos mestres em nosso ofício. Com um atendimento incomparável, temos o compromisso de fornecer produtos de qualidade e serviços excepcionais para que nossos clientes sempre voltem a nos procurar.  Sempre oferecendo produtos e serviços vips.

Name: H&CO
Description: An instinct to continually aim for excellence. H&CO is the grand blueprint to encompass and refine all of the founder's, Howard, endeavors: to be at the forefront of the nation's gourmet gifts and lifestyle industry. H&CO sets out to provide an even greater service as a purveyor of exquisite taste and refined luxury. The inspiration for growth has always been empowered by the growing demands of the cultured urbanites, thus inspiring the H&CO mission to promise the creation of more distinctive products, those that span beyond desserts and into gifts, lifestyle and merchandises.

Name: Puffy Cotton Candy
Description:
Puffy Cotton Candy is an innovative cotton candy company centered around the magical experience of seeing cotton candy spun fresh, in a vibrant physical store environment. Our store concept takes cotton candy-making to thrilling new heights as Puffy artists spin custom creations by hand, in eye-popping sizes, shapes, and colors — in dozens of mouthwatering flavors. In addition to spinning delicious traditional cones, cakes, and crystals, Puffy crafts mesmerizing cotton candy edible art sculptures. Standing nearly two feet high, Puffy transforms a mountain of fresh cotton candy into magical characters like a magical unicorn, cuddly teddy bear, sweet puppy dog, and much more.

Our Puffy flagship store opened in late-2022 in Franklin, TN, and our second store location opened in mid-2024 in Nashville, TN. Our first Puffy franchise location opened its doors in Freehold, NJ in early 2025, our second and third franchise locations opened in Orlando, FL and Las Vegas, NV in mid-2025, with 15 additional franchise locations slated to open across Dallas-Fort Worth, TX, Orlando, FL, Tampa, FL, Jacksonville, FL, and NJ State starting in mid-2025.

Name: Penny Lick Ice Cream Company
Description: Penny Lick Ice Cream Company is a New York based, small batch ice cream brand proudly free of peanuts, tree nuts and sesame. Find our shops in Hastings on Hudson, Mamaroneck, and Ossining. Find our carts all over the NYC metro area. We are available for vending and for private events year round.

Name: Jurgy
Description:
Jurgy is on a mission to bring you the best tasting beef jerky on the planet. Founded by Cam Jurgens in 2021, Jurgy is a testament to Jurgens Farm, established more than 100 years ago in the small town of Pickrell, Nebraska.

Cam grew up farming cattle, corn, hay, soybeans and more. Jurgy is a culmination of Cam’s love for beef and farmers. The hard work, attention to detail, and humility learned on the farm are the same characteristics that drive Cam on the football field and in his quest to bring you world-class beef jerky products.

Name: Celtic - Eau Minérale Naturelle
Description: Un don de la Nature, au coeur du Parc Naturel Régional des Vosges du Nord, classé Réserve Mondiale de Biosphère par l’UNESCO.

Name: Dolce Bakery

Name: Celsius Roasters
Description:
Nous sommes une marque de café de spécialité, haut de gamme et responsable, à destination des professionnels (CHR et entreprises) et des particuliers. 

Plus que notre mission, voici notre raison d'être :
- Proposer des cafés d'exception, sélectionnés sur les meilleurs terroirs et récoltés par des producteurs consciencieux
- Torréfier de manière artisanale, en harmonie avec chaque café pour révéler leur potentiel aromatique
- Limiter au maximum notre impact environnemental, dans une démarche d’amélioration continue et d’ouverture aux critiques constructives
- Développer des relations long terme avec nos différents interlocuteurs : producteurs, importateurs, fournisseurs et clients

Nous proposons un accompagnement sur-mesure pour votre transition vers le café de spécialité (définition des besoins, mise en relation avec les fournisseurs de machines et suivi régulier) et un service de livraison en entreprise de café fraichement torréfié. 

Vous pouvez nous contacter sur notre site https://celsius-roasters.fr/pages/bureaux

Name: O Dreams Spain
Description:
O’Dreams es la identidad de la marca en España, responsable de desarrollar y consolidar la presencia nacional de uno de los conceptos gastronómicos más innovadores de Europa: Dreams Donuts.

Bajo esta marca, introducimos en el mercado español una experiencia única de donuts artesanales completamente personalizables, con una imagen disruptiva, atención al detalle y un enfoque claro en la creatividad y la calidad del producto.

Dreams Donuts, nacida en Bélgica en 2020, se ha posicionado como líder en su categoría a nivel europeo, con más de 100 tiendas activas y presencia en países como Francia, Italia y Bélgica. La marca ha sido reconocida con el Wallonia Export Start Award 2024, y es hoy un referente en el sector food & beverage por su capacidad de innovar, conectar con nuevas generaciones y reinventar la repostería tradicional.

Desde O’Dreams, trabajamos para que la experiencia que ha conquistado Europa tenga en España una proyección sólida, coherente y alineada con los valores que han hecho de Dreams Donuts un éxito internacional.

The brand would focus on providing traditional South Indian beverages and snacks at the highest standards of quality, taste and hygiene. 

All products would be priced in the budget range. A lean business model shall be followed, with minimal store size & menu.

Name: East India Retailing Pvt Ltd
Description: Since 1999, we have been Colombo's premier liquor retailer, founded by connoisseurs for connoisseurs. Our knowledgeable team shares a passion for wines, spirits, and exceptional customer service. We take pride in being the go-to destination for discerning customers, offering expertise and a curated selection of fine beverages. Trust us to cater to your liquor needs with our unwavering dedication and expertise.

Name: The Blue Renaissance
Description:
It's very simple really. We are questioning why should Juice have Water? If we just stick to using Fruits and the water inside the fruits nurtured by Nature and the ecosystem of powerful life giving plants, we wont have to add water or then Sugar or concentrates. or anything! We are questioning the 150 billion dollar global industry and creating solutions. Our flagship magic is Organic certified 100% Blueberry Juice with nothing added. Not even water. 

We then use that as a base to make other berry blends. Of course no sugar or concentrates or preservatives. And yet we have a refreshingly balanced juice that fits right into your lifestyle making you really healthy. 

Then we questioned why should health taste like Health and we believe by using our blueberry as a carrier for other bitter off notes but potently healthy mushroom extracts, we can create a really tasty line of lifestyle relevant functional juices that's is already a necessity for the supercharged word we live in and lives we live. 

Our 'Game your life' series has been created, keeping in mind that different days demand different physical and mental caring. Game your Monday with Lions Mane helps with focus and concentration, Game your Friday gets you party ready and on and on. Come discover our weekly range.

Name: Grow green LTD
Description:

Grow green is also the proud representative of some of the biggest retail chains in Israel.
Grow green's vision is to import and export different types of food products to show the Israeli market and the world more flavors they have yet to meet.

Name: Fortune Global Trading Ltd
Description:
Fortune Global Trading Ltd is an importer, distributor, and sourcing specialist of food products from around the world. We have built strong partnerships as exclusive distributors of international brands, ensuring we represent their vision and uphold their core values in the UK market.
Our dedication to quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction has driven our continuous growth. We ensure that all products comply with local labelling regulations, working closely with ‘Food Labelling Services’ to maintain compliance and accuracy. With expertise in launching and expanding brands, we collaborate closely with suppliers to develop effective marketing strategies.
In an ever-evolving market where consumers seek new and unique flavours, our mission is to source high-quality products and offer them at competitive prices.

Name: DXN Brasil
Description:
A DXN foi fundada em 1993 por Datuk Lim Siow Jin, um graduado do Instituto Indiano de Tecnologia, impulsionado pela busca pelos benefícios do cogumelo Ganoderma (Lingzhi, o Rei das Ervas) para a saúde humana. Seu trabalho incansável resultou na criação da empresa com foco no potencial dessa erva.

Com sede na Malásia e atuação global, as principais atividades da DXN são o cultivo, fabricação e comercialização de suplementos alimentares saudáveis, sendo mundialmente conhecida pelos seus produtos à base de Ganoderma. Suas linhas incluem suplementos dietéticos, alimentos, bebidas, higiene pessoal, cosméticos, utilidades domésticas e sistemas de tratamento de água.

Desde o início, a DXN adota a filosofia "Um Dragão, Um Mundo, Um Mercado, e Uma Mentalidade" ('One Dragon One World One Market and One Mind') para seu crescimento contínuo.

A DXN Holdings Berhad, a holding do Grupo DXN, foi listada na bolsa de valores da Malásia (Bursa Malaysia) em 2003, saindo em 2011 após uma oferta pública de aquisição do fundador.

Reconhecida por sua qualidade, a DXN diversificou seus negócios para áreas como imobiliário e tecnologia da informação. No seu principal modelo de venda direta, a empresa tem uma rápida expansão global, com mais de 20 milhões de distribuidores registrados em todo o mundo, consolidando sua posição como líder em produtos baseados em Ganoderma.

Name: Smooder
Description:
Smooder is a health and wellness company, focusing on providing healthy frozen fruit and vegetable cups to corporate companies, which will then be blended into a smoothie using our proprietary automated and self-cleaning Smooder machine.

Do you struggle to keep up with the National Health Promotion Board's recommendation of 2 servings of fruits and vegetables each day? Are you looking to lose weight and stay slim but unable to curb the temptation of reaching out for a can of sugary soda water?

Fret not! Smooder is here to empower and kickstart your healthy habits one cup at a time. Made with 100% natural ingredients with no added sugar, healthy living never tasted so good before! Having said that, still not a reason to start indulging in all the yummy fast food :)

Allow us the opportunity to present and showcase our proprietary and patented Smooder machine through a complimentary demonstration. No sales pitch, no hard sell, just a glimpse of how we are able to help YOU achieve your goals. What are you waiting for? Head down to our website below to find out more!

www.smooder.com

Thank you for being as excited as I am about getting YOU to kickstart on the journey of healthy habits through innovation and technology.

Our olive oil is produced by MOLON LAVE producers’ group from Lakonia with respect to the traditional cultivation methods and by the Knowledge and Innovation of implementing sustainable practices. We create products with high nutritional value for our daily meals. 
For the first time internationally in 2022, MOLON LAVE was certified for the bioactivity of its composition for the benefit of human health and well-being. 
In our factory and our olive mill we use the latest technological advancements and environmentally-friendly production methods that guarantee the superior quality of our olive oil, enabling as to export our products across the world.

Welcome to our LinkedIn page! 

At D2D, we are passionate about promoting a healthy and balanced lifestyle among people who need it the most, modern working professionals. We do this by crafting health products that can fit in easily in their lifestyle and improve their lives holistically.

Join us on this journey as we inspire and empower working professionals in the metropolitan cities of India to lead healthier and happier lives. Through our engaging mindset posts, thought-provoking podcasts featuring industry leaders, and curated content on healthy lifestyle choices, we aim to provide valuable insights and practical tips that you can incorporate into your daily routine.

We strive to foster a supportive environment where everyone can share their experiences, exchange ideas, and find inspiration to achieve their wellness goals. Whether you're looking to enhance your physical health, boost mental well-being, or cultivate a positive mindset, our community is here to support you every step of the way.

Stay tuned for our latest updates, expert advice, and exclusive content that will help you navigate the challenges of modern living while prioritizing your health. Together, let's create a vibrant community that thrives on healthy habits and empowers each other to live our best lives.

Follow us to stay connected, engage in meaningful discussions, and embark on a transformative journey towards a healthier and happier you. Join our movement today and be a part of the change!

Description: Indulge Creamery is more than just ice cream and desserts; it’s a philosophy born in India, rooted in the belief that artisanal desserts and artisanal coffee can be a carefully crafted moment of pleasure. Each bite or sip is made to be savoured, not rushed. It’s about balance, refinement and restraint. Name: WineOnline.ca
Description:
WHAT WE DO
At WineOnline.ca, we aim to provide an unmatched shopping experience by providing wine lovers with the opportunity to:

*Purchase quality-focused wines not otherwise retailed Ontario and Alberta 
*Purchase wine as gifts to be delivered to friends and family
*Order wine and wine accessories from the comfort of your home, office, cottage or anywhere else 
*Have wine delivered to your door (FREE for 12+ bottles) 
*Research each wine before purchasing it: tasting notes, expert 3rd party reviews, food complements, serving/storing notes, etc.
*Track current and previous orders via personalized online accounts
*Access fine wine in rural regions

ABOUT THE WINES
Perhaps the most exciting part of our job is sourcing wine. We travel regularly to the world's leading wine regions in search of great values and outstanding selections. We also recognize the quality of wine being made in our own backyard; we make regular visits to our local wineries, and make the stand-outs available to our customers. We also offer a full complement of wine accessories: e.g., glassware, corkscrews, wine bags, books, etc.

WHERE WE'VE BEEN AND WHERE WE'RE GOING
When we started in 2004, we were one of only two online wine shops in Ontario and almost no one knew such a service existed. In 2016, we have thousands of customers who trust us with sourcing the best wines for the best value.  In time, we hope to provide all Canadians with the convenience and quality that our customers in Ontario and Alberta enjoy. We are aware our continued success is based on the quality of our products and our ability to serve our customers well. This is the foundation of our business.

Taste the difference

Egy Trade is one of the leading companies in supermarket, restaurant, café, and hotel equipment solutions across Egypt and the Middle East.

Our product range includes a wide selection of display refrigerators, commercial freezers, and central cooling systems, in addition to supermarket shelving, preparation tables, cashier machines, electronic scales, and packaging systems — making Egy Trade a one-stop destination for all commercial setup needs.

Combining European technology with a deep understanding of local market demands, Egy Trade supplies equipment from world-class manufacturers known for energy efficiency, modern design, and long service life.
The company also offers professional installation, maintenance, and technical support services provided by a specialized team to ensure optimal performance and reliability.

At Egy Trade, we believe our clients’ success is our success. That’s why we offer free consultations, customized solutions, and on-site follow-up for every project — whether it’s a small supermarket, a full restaurant setup, or a large hotel kitchen.

Through commitment, consistency, and attention to detail, Egy Trade has earned the trust of customers across Egypt and the Arab region, becoming a leading name in supermarket and restaurant equipment solutions.

Name: Gomo Coop
Description:
A Gomo Coop é uma Cooperativa de Consumo Participativa localizada no centro da cidade de São Paulo.

Um supermercado inovador baseado num modelo que é sucesso em diferentes lugares do mundo!

Qualquer pessoa pode comprar na Gomo, basta  se tornar cooperante e participar do funcionamento do espaço  para ter acesso a uma grande variedade de produtos frescos e de qualidade, livres de veneno e também convencionais!

Como?
Trabalhando  junto para manter um negócio que também é seu!
Cada pessoa se torna dona de uma parcela da cooperativa e contribui com 3 horas por mês realizando uma tarefa, como operar o caixa, organizar o estoque, limpar um espaço, atender às pessoas cooperantes no escritório, entre muitas outras opções.

Pertencer a um lugar assim traz muitas vantagens!

- Você constrói um negócio solidário mais sustentável e justo;
- Conhece a origem e a rede de distribuição dos seus alimentos;
- Participa de uma comunidade que compartilha dos seus valores;
- Encontra uma melhor versão do que você consome no dia a dia;
- Entende a composição dos preços e também economiza!

A Gomo Coop acredita que para consumir com responsabilidade é preciso valorizar a transparência, atuar pela preservação do planeta e lutar por melhorias sociais coletivamente.

Quer vir com a gente? Preencha sua pré-cooperativação!
https://graocoop.fibery.io/@public/forms/uRoiO1ja

Name: TwoTwenty
Description:
We’ll try not to keep you too long because we’d rather you were out and about, TwoTwenty in hand, getting up to whatever it is you get up to...

Why call ourselves TwoTwenty? As humans we see with a radius of 220 degrees. We wanted to create a brand that encourages us all to be more present in the moment, enjoying what’s around us right now. We want us all to indulge in more guilt free fun together, whatever that might be.

We have always loved the concept of hard seltzer, yet the brands on offer didn’t hit the mark and lacked personality. They were often pumped full of artificial sweeteners, colours and preservatives or tasted so weak that they made your nan look like Anthony Joshua. So we spent our evenings and weekends creating a hard seltzer that tasted deliciously true to the flavour within.

Taking inspiration from the ephemeral drawings and messages found in venues, TwoTwenty hard seltzer sticks two fingers up to boring.

We want you to revel in the moments in front of you. All 220 degrees.

Enjoy your 220°.

Name: РЕПТИЛ/REPTIL
Description:
Рептил маркетите постојат од 1996 година и бележат континуиран раст и економски успех од своето основање. Нашата компанија е основана врз темелите на поранешните самопослуги Центро преку модернизирање на нивните простории и вработување на дел од нивниот искусен персонал. Ова ни овозможува да се истакнеме како единствен ланец-маркети во градот кој ја продолжува традицијата и гарантира топла и искрена услуга за секој потрошувач. Рептил маркетите не ја забораваат топлината на маалските продавници. Нашиот приоритет е секој купувач да излезе задоволен по пазарувањето.

Денес, нашата компанија располага со 25 маркети со формат на мали, големи и средни. Тие се распоредени во различни населби во главниот град Скопје, а сега и во Виница, кој брои 3 маркети. Рептил Маркети е првата компанија која ја имплементираше првата онлине продавница во Македонија. Од 2016 година до сега успешно работи со константен развој и успешно следење на светските трендови на онлине пазарувањето. Пазарењето може да се прави од сите типови на уреди и е неверојатно брзо и едноставно.

Founded in 1996, REPTIL has been experiencing continuous growth and economic success since its establishment. Our company was founded on the foundations of the former Centro supermarkets by modernizing their premises and employing some of their experienced staff. This allows us to stand out as the only supermarket chain in the city that continues the tradition of guaranteing warm and sincere service for every consumer keeping the culture of the neighborhood stores. Our priority is for every customer to leave satisfied after shopping.

Today, our company has 25 small, large and medium-sized supermarkets. They are located in different neighborhoods in Skopje, and now in Vinica, which has 3 supermarkets. Reptil Markets is the first company to implement the first online store in Macedonia. Since 2016, it has been successfully operating with constant development and successful monitoring of global trends in online shopping.

Description:

We also have a range of handpicked spirits, including single malt whiskies, gin and boutique rums, not to mention craft beers from around the world and a selection of Cuban cigars.

Theatre of Wine has extensive experience of instore, corporate and private tastings, having hosted over 1,000 events ranging from our weekly tastings to corporate functions with over 300 guests.

Name: Jollibee UK
Description:
Over 1,400 stores and counting…
Jollibee is famous across the world for delicious crispy fried chicken and fast-food classics with a tropical twist. Founded in 1978 by Tony Tan Caktiong in the Philippines, the company was built up from humble ice cream store beginnings, then later on expanded to hot food. Jollibee quickly became the market leader in the Philippines’ fast food industry and by 1998, was a globally successful business. The brand continues to be owned by Jollibee Group with over 1,400 locations across Asia, Europe, the US and the UK.

Jollibee serves up the crispiest, juiciest and tastiest fried chicken around, with a diverse menu including Jollibee Chicken Sandwich, hotdogs, fries, desserts and refreshing drinks. Chickenjoy is our signature dish based on the family’s special recipe, hand-breaded in store for extra crispiness. Another favourite is Jolly Spaghetti, made with a Filipino inspired sweet-style sauce, loaded with layers of cheese and hot dog slices. These unique dishes have earned the brand a cult following around the globe, from Hong Kong to New York and now here in the UK.

Parent company, Jollibee Group, now has over 5,800 stores globally and operates in 33 countries. In the U.S., Jollibee Group owns the major food brands Smashburger and The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf. The company also owns the Filipino franchise for Burger King. To this day, Jollibee still outperforms both McDonald’s and KFC in the Philippines.

Looking to the future, Jollibee intends to open 50 stores in the UK by 2025, with further plans to expand in Italy, Spain and other European markets.

Name: SAS Flowine
Description:
Flowine est né d’une volonté commune de faire découvrir et partager notre passion pour l’univers des vins. C’est le fruit d’un travail de réflexion et de préparation de près de 18 mois qui nous a permis de concrétiser notre projet de tour du monde des vins au début de l’année 2022.

Durant près de six mois, nous avons eu la chance de découvrir 28 régions viticoles au cœur de sept pays producteurs. Nous avons débuté notre voyage par la découverte du vignoble australien avant de nous rendre en Amérique du Sud pour y visiter les principaux terroirs du Chili, de l’Argentine, de l’Uruguay, de la Bolivie et du Pérou. Enfin, nous avons terminé notre périple par un passage aux Etats-Unis.

Cette expérience hors du commun nous a offert la possibilité de rencontrer plus de 500 acteurs de la filière viticole à travers le monde. Ces instants de partage nous ont permis de mieux comprendre les spécificités de leurs terroirs, la complexité de leurs marchés et les problématiques auxquelles ils doivent faire face au quotidien.

Tout au long de notre voyage, nous avons communiqué sur les réseaux sociaux pour partager notre aventure. Cela nous a donné la possibilité de mettre en avant le travail d’exception réalisé au quotidien par ces hommes et ces femmes pour magnifier leurs terroirs.

Forts de cette expérience, nous avons décidé d’offrir une nouvelle orientation à Flowine en devenant distributeur de vins du monde sur le territoire français. Désormais, nous souhaitons assurer un rôle d’ambassadeur pour les propriétés viticoles qui nous ont le plus marqué au cours de notre voyage.

Name: Macalat
Description:
Macalat is set to redefine and disrupt the chocolate industry with a new category, Organic Sweet Dark Chocolate. The innovative creation introduces a completely new category of bitter-free 70% sweet dark chocolate, offering a delightful superfood-infused experience that transcends the limitations of traditional craft bean-to-bar dark chocolates.

By incorporating a new flavorless Fermented Mushroom Mycelium Extract, developed by mushroom ingredient innovator, MycoTechnology, Macalat successfully eliminates bitterness and astringency, revealing a full spectrum of cacao and superfood flavors that leave no unpleasant mouth feel or aftertaste. This innovative mushroom ingredient revolutionizes the chocolate experience, without the need for sugar, revealing an unparalleled chocolate taste sensation.

Certified Organic sugar-free, Macalat presents a host of impressive features, including 70% Peruvian Cacao, a plant-based superfood composition, zero-net carbs, and finally, freedom from bitterness. With its wholesome superfood attributes, Macalat stands as a testament to the future of chocolate innovation. The benefits of 70% cacao are emerging as the healthiest way of consuming chocolate. The final dark chocolate barrier for most consumers is addressed. Superfoodie consumers may have it both ways, now. The end of bitterness AND the end of sugar. 

Combining the velvety smoothness of perfectly tempered 70% Peruvian Cacao with other plant-based superfood inclusions such as Maca, Lucuma, Vanilla, Monk Fruit, and Cinnamon, Macalat captivates with its gentle and unique caramel-like sweetness. The addition of the remarkable mushroom extract ensures a smooth and sweet finish, devoid of any bitterness or harshness. The mushroom ingredient is not sweet, itself, but works like alchemy on the taste buds. Truly incredible. 

The brand’s fitting battle cry is “Tasting is Believing!"

Name: Ofisnack
Description:
Ofisnack es una empresa que se compromete a elevar el bienestar en el entorno laboral a través de soluciones innovadoras y saludables. Nos especializamos en proporcionar snacks saludables a empresas que buscan mejorar el clima laboral y nutrir a sus colaboradores, ya sea en la oficina o desde la comodidad de sus hogares durante el home office. 

¿Quiénes somos? En Ofisnack, entendemos que el bienestar es clave para un rendimiento laboral óptimo. Somos más que proveedores de snacks; somos aliados en la creación de ambientes laborales saludables y experiencias memorables para cada miembro del equipo. 

Nuestra Propuesta: 

- Snacks Saludables: Ofrecemos una variedad de opciones nutritivas y deliciosas para satisfacer los gustos de todos (apto celíacos, apto veganos, bajos en azúcar) 

- Bienestar en Casa: Extendemos nuestras soluciones a los hogares de los colaboradores, apoyando el trabajo desde casa con opciones saludables. 

- Compromiso y Colaboración: Construimos relaciones basadas en la confianza, el compromiso y un enfoque colaborativo hacia el bienestar.

Name: The Wine Of The Champions Italia
Description:
The Wine of The Champions” rappresenta la fusione tra valori profondi come l’amicizia, il piacere di vivere e la passione per il vino che unisce una squadra di grandi campioni.
Fabio Cordella, il fondatore del team è un uomo di sport e discendente di una famiglia storica di viticoltori che sin dal 1911 allevano gli straordinari vigneti salentini.
E’ stato il suo desiderio di unire questi mondi così diversi ma nello stesso tempo così vicini che ha consentito di scrivere la straordinaria storia di The Wine of The Champions.
Ogni vino parla del proprio campione in quanto ognuno di loro ha lavorato accanto agli enologi per realizzare il vino più in linea con il proprio carattere e le proprie aspettative gustative.
E’ iniziata una nuova partita, che non si gioca nel campo da calcio, ma nelle tavole degli appassionati di vino, in tutto il mondo.

Engagés, nous vous proposons des algues fraîches salées, des algues déshydratées en paillettes ou des algues en poudre pour toutes les qualités nutritives et environnementales exceptionnelles qu’elles apportent, autant pour l’Homme que pour la Nature.

Nous créons et imaginons des produits à base d’algues et de plantes sauvages locales, comme le Sel Étoilé, les Pépites (gomasio), thé des sirènes et chocolat pour illuminer et ioder vos papilles. Notre ambition : mettre des algues françaises dans chaque assiette !

Hep Ken est une entreprise éthique qui s'engage auprès de ses producteurs exclusivement bretons. Une attention particulière est portée à ses emballages éco-conçus qui sont principalement ensachés grâce à notre collaboration avec l'ESAT de Thones à travers un programme d'évolution avec ses travailleurs.

Name: LABEVI
Description:
Sviluppiamo prodotti alimentari a base di frutta e verdura e crioessiccate.

Labevi è un preparato in polvere per frullato a base di sole frutta e verdura. Pronto in meno di un minuto.
Senza conservanti.
Senza zuccheri aggiunti.

Senza scuse.

Senza "Sbatti"

1 persona su 10, in Italia, non consuma abbastanza alimenti vegetali. 
La tendenza del 2021, inoltre, vede una preoccupante diminuzione degli acquisti di ortofrutta. 

Noi abbiamo reinventato frutta e verdura per rendere facile l'aggiunta di 2 porzioni di questi alimenti alla routine giornaliera. 

Siamo sostenitori della crioessiccazione, un processo che permette l'eliminazione dell'acqua dagli alimenti mantenendone pressoché inalterate le proprietà organolettiche e i valori nutrizionali.

Gli alimenti crioessiccati, grazie ad una shelf life che può arrivare fino a due anni senza utilizzo di conservanti, sono un valido mezzo per diminuire gli sprechi individuali. 

Non solo, possono contribuire a recuperare alimenti che andrebbero buttati ancora prima di arrivare al consumatore finale.

We believe in the power of tea to bring people closer to the beauty of nature. Join us in our journey and find your bliss with 6000Feet!

Name: Amul Ice Lounge
Description:
In a world where ice cream is often a mere afterthought, Amul Ice Lounge is born out of a desire to elevate this humble experience to an art form. With over 25 years of research and development, Amul embarks on a global journey to serve the most premium & international range of ice cream in Ice Lounge. The ambition is to create a transcendent experience that tantalizes the senses and satisfies the soul. Creating the world's best-tasting ice cream is no small feat. It took years of meticulous research, countless iterations and an unwavering commitment of quality to perfect our recipes. Ice creams served at Amul Ice Lounge are the result of a labor of love, a testament of dedication to provide an unparalleled sensory experience. 
Amul Ice Lounge is not just about ice cream; it's about an experience. An experience curated for young adults with a craving for the exotic and the extraordinary. Our ice creams are crafted from real milk, infused with rare ingredients that capture the authentic essence of their country of origin. Velvety indulgence, French Caramel; the exquisite bliss of Swiss Chocolate; the creamy perfection of Gelato Chocolate and the robust aroma of Turkish Coffee, are amongst many other international flavours.  
What sets Amul Ice Lounge apart is its exclusivity. These flavors are not available anywhere else, making each visit to Amul Ice Lounge a new discovery. The ever-evolving menu ensures that there is always something new to try. Amul Ice Lounge has the “Instagrammble” ambiance, pampering service and the joy of sharing something truly special with those you love.

Name: CasaMia Eccellenze A Tavola
Description:
CasaMia nutre un interesse particolare per il cibo, perché per noi non deve solo saziare, ma deve anche soddisfare il palato, saziare gli occhi, raccontare, trasmettere sensazioni ed emozioni nuove. Per noi, ogni piatto è un’opera d’arte che si materializza sulla tavola, pronto ad emozionare chi lo gusta.

CasaMia è un luogo in cui la passione per il cibo si fonde con la cura per i dettagli, creando un’esperienza unica e indimenticabile. E ogni volta che ci sediamo a tavola, sappiamo che stiamo per vivere un’esperienza che va ben oltre il semplice piacere del gusto.


CasaMia è un luogo dove la passione per le cose buone è coltivata da tempo. Qui, tutto è ben fatto con un’attenzione costante all’eccellenza, valorizzando i prodotti del territorio e rispettando l’evoluzione del gusto.

La ristorazione a filiera corta è frutto di una ricerca attenta della qualità, dalla selezione delle materie prime fresche alla cura speciale dello Chef, che si impegna a garantire piatti di grande valore. Ma CasaMia è molto di più di un semplice ristorante. CasaMia è un luogo in cui il cibo è un’esperienza completa, che va oltre il semplice saziare la fame.

Name: Suqi
Description:
Suqi is a digital grocery platform aimed at delivering a variety of exclusive and affordable Halal goods to consumers across Europe.

Founded in 2022, Suqi acts as the culinary bridge between customers’ cultural and current homes. Bringing proud and diverse foods, inspired by the cultures and places that make up the fabric of Europe's communities, to their fingertips, any day of the week.
Customers can order from a range of about 1,500 products, including a variety of pantry staples for everyday cooking, meats, cheeses, fruits and vegetables, beverages, aromatics, seasonings, as well as frozen foods to stock up on.

For Suqi, making cooking Halal food easier is not an end in itself. Suqi believes that cooking and time spent around the dinner table is what truly brings people together. Therefore, creating memories around the dinner table shouldn’t be expensive or inconvenient. Suqi tackles this with affordable options without sacrificing quality.

Driven by curiosity, biodiversity, and flavour, the garden is home to over 500 varieties of organic heritage seeds and plants, along with a few feathered friends and an abundance of wildlife. Here, the focus is on diversity—not just in appearance, but in taste. Imagine a garden filled with heirloom figs, tomatoes, herbs, apples, chillies, pears, squashes, currants, and more—each variety offering something unique and exciting to discover.

Name: Le Goût des Vins - Cave & Dégustation
Description:
L’histoire remonte à 2012… Des vacances en Toscane. Un coup de foudre pour une cave - bar à vin. Et l’idée lancée autour d’antipasti et de bons verres de Chianti, les yeux pleins d’étoiles … « un jour on fera çà ! »… 
En 2020, en plein confinement, l’audace nous emporte : on se lance ! La France offre cette opportunité de pouvoir créer une entreprise en 3 semaines seulement, même en cette période si spéciale… Alors le concept de base n’est pas tout à fait celui-là, mais on s’adapte ! Caviste en ligne avec livraison expresse sur la métropole lilloise avec pour objectif bien sûr de s’installer ensuite physiquement. 

Mars 2022 nous y sommes ! Après quelques mois d’attente, et quelques autres travaux de transformation, nous avons le plaisir de vous accueillir à Chéreng pour vous faire découvrir des vins 100% plaisir - tous rigoureusement dégustés et sélectionnés (on n’a pas un boulot facile, vous savez !… ;-) Notre passion pour la satisfaction clients n'a pas de limite ! 

Suivez-nous, découvrez de jolies pépites à prix plaisir, pour vous et pour vos évènements d’entreprise & actions de team building !

Name: Curry Town Pizza
Description:
Curry Town Pizza: Redefining the Global Pizza Landscape  

Curry Town Pizza is an ambitious, disruptive QSR concept actively developing a premium Fusion Pizza brand destined to become a market leader in the UK and beyond.

We are currently operating at a grassroots level (from a market-tested gazebo concept) with a clear vision for scalable growth, operational excellence, and a differentiated culinary offering.

For Pizza Professionals & Chefs: We are pioneering the next major food trend. Our focus is on the artisan technique and innovative application of flavour, demanding a high level of culinary skill. We offer a chance to work with a unique product at the intersection of two major global cuisines.

For Future Investors: We are validating a highly scalable, high-margin model built on the untapped demand for elevated East-meets-West cuisine. We aim to move from market concept to a full-scale operation with strong unit economics and a defensible, unique brand identity.

Follow us to track our journey as we prove our concept, refine our operations, and move toward significant scaling. We are building the future of pizza, and we're looking for ambitious partners to join us.

Name: Mon Dessert, by The Bottled Baking Co
Description:
We curate and collect the most exquisite dessert recipes and ingredients from around the world, so you can create them yourself at home.

Started by self-taught patisserie chef, Samina Courtin, Mon Dessert was founded upon her passion for baking. Having realised there was an opportunity to teach the everyday person how to make complex treats easily at home, the Mon Dessert kit was born. We’re always seeking to challenge and help you develop your dessert making skills, one recipe at a time.

Now part of The Bottled Baking Co, we're looking to introduce the range of baking kits to more retailers across the UK and beyond to the delights of this unique range of baking products. 

For all enquiries, please contact info@bottledbaking.co.uk

Name: Bellamie Apéritif
Description:
Bellamie is a luxurious cherry liqueur apéritif, meticulously crafted using only real fruits and natural ingredients. Inspired by the traditional French 'Guignolet' liqueur, Bellamie is made with the acclaimed Montmorency sour cherry, which imparts a vibrant and tart flavour. The liqueur is further enriched with a touch of cognac and the subtle infusion of cherry blossom, with cherry & apricot stones, creating a refined marzipan and sweet spice finish that lingers. Bellamie is perfect for savouring with loved ones, whether sipped on the rocks, mixed into a refreshing spritz, or crafted into an exceptional cocktail.

Visit our website & follow us on social media for more info:
IG: @BellamieAperitif

Name: Freshopp
Description:
Véritable acteur de l’anti-gaspi, Freshopp est la solution de proximité qui rapproche les producteurs et les transformateurs confrontés à leurs problématiques de production et les consomm’acteurs soucieux de l’avenir de la planète et de leur pouvoir d’achat dans un contexte économique tendu.


Freshopp propose à prix réduits des produits de qualité, frais et surgelés, sauvés du gaspillage qualité, directement issus de producteurs et de transformateurs agroalimentaires. Ces produits n'ont pas trouvé leur place dans les réseaux de distribution classique (produit hors calibre, en surproduction, série limitée, léger défaut esthétique, packaging spécifique…).


Freshopp offre l'opportunité à tous de consommer des produits français de qualité de façon éco responsable, et de sauvegarder son pouvoir d’achat.


Freshopp accompagne également les producteurs et les transformateurs agroalimentaires en leur permettant de se mettre en conformité avec la législation en vigueur, de valoriser leurs produits à sauver donc à réduire leur gaspillage et leur empreinte carbone et ainsi agir pour la planète.


Notre ambition résumée en quelques points :

-  Limiter le gaspillage alimentaire 
-  Redonner du sens à la consommation pour qu’elle devienne éco responsable
-  Contribuer à maintenir le pouvoir d’achat des ménages 
-  Préserver l’environnement et les ressources naturelles 
-  Valoriser les produits en circuit court 
-  Participer à la démarche RSE des producteurs et des transformateurs
-  Participer au développement économique des commerces locaux servant de point de collecte grâce à leur parking


Devenez Freshopper et rejoignez nous dans la lutte contre le gaspillage alimentaire !

#antigaspi #agroalimentaire #foodtech #Ecommerce #alimentation
#sustainability #food #innovation #startups #digitalmarketing #mobileapplications #ecoresponsable #developpementdurable

Name: Veda Bharath Natural Food Products Private Limited
Description:
Veda Bharath Foods Pvt Ltd is a Hyderabad based social business forefront in the development and promotion of natural farming and expertise in desi seeds for healthy yield, free from contamination. 

Veda Bharath associates with farmers by supplying desi seeds, buy back desi rice and market the premium quality healthy rice on ecommerce platforms and retail outlets in India, and further plans to export as well. 

Built on the strong foundation of ancient Vedic philosophy of “Sarve Jana Sukhino Bhavantu” which translates to “May everyone be happy”, Veda Bharath believes healthy eating leads to physical and mental well-being, influencing happiness. And Veda Bharath endeavours for a pollution-free, strong and healthy India, through its commitment to natural farming methods free from chemicals. 

Active in the field of natural farming since 2017, the environmentally conscious company strongly believes that natural farming ensures environment protection, farmer welfare and consumers’ good health. Taking inspiration from the pragmatic agriculturist and famous exponent of natural farming, Shri Subhash Palekar, Veda Bharath aims to encourage farmers to adopt natural farming methods, while protecting cows, which are an integral part of farming families. 

Veda Bharath sources over 4700 varieties of desi seeds which facilitates farmers a viable and debt free farming practices. Beginning with 10 acres, Veda Bharath has now reached 600 acres and plans to cover 1000 acres of land under natural farming, by collaborating with farmers. Adhering to its tagline, Veda Bharath envisions to dedicate its efforts towards healthy natural farming practice that results in a healthy community, happy farmers and successful business.

We're convinced that small-batch artisanal food is a healthier and tastier alternative to industrially-processed foods, which is why we only choose organic or all-natural products produced locally in Greece. When you buy one of our Artisans' products, you support a very small business with big dreams, one that embodies contemporary Greek culinary excellence.

- Un magasin de producteurs locaux et bio
- Une épicerie vrac adossée au magasin pour permettre aux consommateurs de faire l’intégralité de leurs courses dans un même lieu
- Une offre de restauration diversifiée bio et fait-maison
- Un espace d’animations pédagogiques et citoyennes sur les enjeux de l'alimentation durable

Kooma est porté par un collectif d’acteurs variés : des professionnels de l’agriculture paysanne et de la restauration, des associations et citoyens, la Ville et l'Eurométropole de Strasbourg, la Fondation Terra Symbiosis, Bio en Grand Est. Tous sont réunis au sein d’une Société Coopérative d’Intérêt Collectif, qui permet de concilier enjeux économiques, écologiques et sociaux et d’organiser une dynamique collective entre les différents acteurs du projet.

Name: Convict Coffee Company
Description:
We are a small family owned coffee shop focused on creating an equitable profit share model with our employees while impacting our community by supporting non-violent felons as they re-enter society and programs designed to intervene with young people who are at risk to prevent them from entering the system. 
Our founder Dan spent several years in and out of incarceration between the ages of thirteen and twenty-two before his first child was born while he was in prison. Since then he has turned his life around and has over forty years experience in Hospitality leading brands like Applebee's, Logan's Roadhouse, Marie Callender's , Rock Bottom Brewery, Illegal Pete's and Cheba Hut to name a few.

In almost every company we have seen that the front line employee is under-valued while the CEO and investors clean up on the backs of their hard work. We seek to create something better, something different where everyone wins.

Name: Gröna gårdar AB
Description:
Gröna gårdar bildades 2001. Vår egen gård, Bjällansås, ligger på Bokenäset utanför Uddevalla. Vi samverkar även med ett trettiotal av de bästa uppfödarna runt om i Västsverige, från Halmstad i söder till Karlstad i norr.

Gemensamt för alla gårdar är att utöver KRAV:s regler även följa Gröna gårdars egna kriterier för uppfödning, varav det främsta är att djuren äter artriktig föda, det vill säga gräs och örter.

Eftersom våra djur växer upp långsamt på naturlig föda hinner köttet utveckla en rik och fyllig smak, samtidigt som det blir välmarmorerat och därför naturligt mört.

Name: Big League Chew
Description:
Big League Chew was created by former Cornell lefty Rob Nelson in 1977 while playing for the fabled Portland Mavericks. With help from 13-year-old batboy Todd Field and former New York Yankee All-Star Jim Bouton, Rob's idea got off to a sweet start. 
The idea was simple: shredded bubble gum in a stay-fresh pouch. The first batch was made on Feb. 6th, 1979 in Candy Field's kitchen (Todd's mom!). Big League Chew hit retail shelves a year later and instantly became a fan favorite across America. 
Over four decades and one BILLION pouches later, Big League Chew remains a classic for kids and adults. It can even be found in Cooperstown as the "Hall of Fame Bubble Gum "!

Name: Too Sweet Cakes
Description:
Every great story starts with a dream—and ours began with a simple one: to create pastries that not only tasted incredible but made people feel cared for.

Too Sweet Cakes was founded in 2016 by Shelbi Geyer, whose love for baking started as a young girl, sketching cake designs and dreaming of one day opening her own bakery. That dream stayed with her, fueled by a passion for creativity, connection, and a belief that food could be something truly meaningful.

What started as a small wholesale bakery quickly grew into something more. In 2018, we opened our first storefront in Bend, Oregon, creating a space where pastries weren’t just desserts—they were memories in the making. From there Too Sweet Cakes expanded to Lake Oswego, and today, we proudly operate four retail locations across Oregon and Arizona, with a fifth location opening in 2026 in Paradise Valley, Arizona.

Beyond our storefronts, you’ll find Too Sweet Cakes pastries featured in over 100 locations across Oregon, Washington, and Arizona. It’s been an incredible journey—one made possible by the extraordinary team who has brought their talents, heart, and dedication into every part of the business.

Our team of bakers, decorators, and visionaries are the heartbeat of Too Sweet Cakes. Together, we share a mission that’s never changed: to love people well through pastries.

As we continue to grow, we remain rooted in the values that sparked it all—creativity, community, and a deep love for making people feel special. We are so grateful to every customer, partner, and community who has supported our journey—and we can’t wait to celebrate even more sweet moments with you, one bite at a time.

Name: Table 87
Description: Family-owned and operated since 2012, Table 87 was crowned “The Home Of The Coal Oven Slice” when we opened our first slice shop in Brooklyn Heights. Description:
CALIDRIS 28 Deutschland GmbH is a dynamic company that operates throughout Germany and is headquartered in Hamburg. It is a part of Splendid Drinks AG's corporate group and has been actively distributing its core product, 28 BLACK, since 2008.

In 2008, 28 BLACK Açaí became the first energy drink that did not taste like "gummy bears" and did not require taurine. The product range now includes many other flavours that cater to every need - from classic to fruity-fresh, sour-tingling to calorie- and sugar-free. The refreshing flavours are vegan, gluten-free, and lactose-free and contain neither taurine nor preservatives.

28 BLACK, the better energy drink, is for different lifestyles, expectations, and daily challenges. It is intended for individuals either amid their everyday routine or looking to depart from it. It is for people who have plans for tomorrow.

With MOÅ, we carry on a legacy and honor the memory of our beloved friend and sister, who designed and created this exceptional vodka.

Join us in keeping the spirit alive and making every #moament count.

Name: Pique-Poque
Description:
A PIQUE-POQUE, Pipocas e Alimentos Divertidos Ldª instalou as primeiras máquinas de pipocas nos cinemas independentes de Portugal há 30 anos.
Levamos a nossa HAPPY FOOD aos cinemas, às empresas, aos eventos e a casa dos nossos clientes!
Ao longo dos anos alargamos o leque de produtos, e introduzimos os nachos nos cinemas de Portugal e Angola e oferecendo também, a pedido do mercado, produtos para a confecção de algodão doce.
Os cinemas foram, desde o início, o nosso ‘core business’. Mas nos últimos anos, penetramos noutros mercados, principalmente na área dos eventos. Destacamos a colaboração com marcas como a Tezenis, Caixa Geral de Depósitos, BP, Zippy, Budget, Vodafone, NOS, WTF, Festival Panda, Clarins, Cirque du Soleil, Volta a Portugal, AM Live e Cascais Christmas Village.
Em 2020, uma parceria com a Galp passou a levar a casa de muitos portugueses #aspipocasdocinema.

Continuamos a trabalhar e a pipocar, e em breve teremos novidades divertidas!

Pique-poque,
It's all about Food and Fun!

Name: Symbiate Ventures
Description:
We’re a fast growing, online-first gourmet foods start-up on a mission to make baking a joyful, creative adventure for everyone. At Symbiate Ventures, we’re here to disrupt the food ingredients space with innovation, inspiration, and a dash of fun!

Our founding team brings together diverse expertise from giants like Hindustan Unilever, McKinsey, Bain, and Norwest Venture Partners, blending years of experience in the food sector with the passion of home chefs. Curious about us? Meet the team at https://www.symbiate.in/about-us 

Our Key Brand: The Select Aisle
Imagine a world where every baker—whether a curious beginner or a seasoned pro—has access to premium-quality ingredients, expert know-how, and endless inspiration. That’s the magic we create at The Select Aisle.

Here’s how we do it:
1. Discover: We scour the globe to find the finest baking ingredients.
2. Test & Curate: Our in-house bakers rigorously test these treasures to bring you only the best.
3. Deliver: We package them in convenient sizes and deliver right to your doorstep.

From elusive ingredients to value-added essentials like gluten-free flours, colourful sprinkles, and ready-to-go baking mixes, The Select Aisle is your one-stop shop for all things baking.

But we don’t stop there! We also share recipes, tips, and baking wisdom to spark creativity and help our community whip up delightful treats.

Name: Safia
Description:
Все начиналось с сушек бабушки 

Сеть кондитерских домов Safia - это семейный бизнес, история которого начинается с кондитера-любителя Мухайё Касимовой. В 2001 году Мухайё Касимова вместе со своим супругом у себя дома начали выпекать сушки и продавать их.

Уже в 2008 году их дочь - Мадина Акмаловна, в целях развития семейного бизнеса, основывает первый кондитерский магазин. Не имея никаких внешних инвестиций, на основе своих личных сбережений, начинает  деятельность в своем первом кондитерском магазине под названием «Дом Выпечки от Мадины».

Она вдохновляется успешным опытом семьи и реализует собственные идеи, рецепты, вкус. Благодаря ее кулинарному опыту и кондитерскому мастерству продукция кондитерской становится вкусной, красивой, высококачественной.

В 2015 году число кондитерских магазинов увеличивается до трех.


В 2015 году к семейному бизнесу присоединились сыновья Мадины Акмаловны. Шахзод Алишерович – старшый сын Мадины Акмаловны, создает эффективную финансовую модель и автоматизированный учет компании.

А Бекзод Алишерович, завершив обучение в Европе, привносит в кондитерскую новые идеи и концепции. По его инициативе в этом же году открывается бренд «Safia», названный в честь племянницы, и кондитерские превращаются в сеть кофеен с широким ассортиментом горячих и холодных блюд, в дополнении к полюбившейся всем выпечке.

Вскоре запускается услуга индивидуального заказа для создания эксклюзивных тортов с неповторимым оформлением. Также становится доступной услуга кейтеринга.

Продукция Safia становится востребованной среди потребителей не под воздействием громких рекламных кампаний, а по рекомендациям родственников, знакомых, к которым было доверие.

Name: Super Barão Supermercados
Description:
Em 27 de abril de 1992 começa a trajetória do Barão, que inaugurou nesta data o Mercadinho P2, primeiro estabelecimento de toda rede, então situado na rua P2, no Setor dos Funcionários, em Goiânia, onde funcionou por 9 anos.
Em 2001, o Mercadinho mudou sua localização, passando a funcionar na rua P16, no mesmo setor, onde permaneceu por mais 03 anos, quando migrou para outro ponto comercial, na mesma rua, em frente ao colégio Rui Barbosa.
A partir de então o que se tem é o crescimento da rede, com a inauguração do segundo supermercado, no setor Cidade Jardim, em 02 de fevereiro de 2007, já com o nome fantasia de SUPER BARÃO SUPERMERCADO, aprimorando o conceito de cuidar do cliente e vender mais por menos.
A Rede Barão possui 26 lojas em todo Estado de Goiás, e segue em amplo e constante crescimento.
Durante a pandemia todas as lojas estiveram abertas e atenderam seus clientes dentro dos mais rigorosos protocolos de segurança orientados pelo Ministério da Saúde e OMS.

Nos 2 magasins sont engagés en Seine Saint Denis pour le développement du mieux manger à prix discount auprès de leurs clients et clientes . 
Nous proposons tous les métiers traditionnels dans nos 2 magasins (boucherie, charcuterie, traiteur, fromagerie, boulangerie, primeur , poissonnerie) ainsi qu’une large offre de produits frais , vrac, bio, épicerie , boissons…nous travaillons avec de très nombreuses PME et producteurs en approvisionnement circuits courts direct magasins: proposez nous vos offres de produits ! 
Suivez les réalisations de nos équipes, nos offres de postes a pourvoir, nos besoins d’animation ou de produits, les concepts qui nous plaisent, nos produits faits sur place , nos fournisseurs. Suivez aussi nos équipes et nos métiers au quotidien.

Decouvrez aussi nos offres d’emplois pour rejoindre 2 équipes très engagées au quotidien. 
Rejoignez nos équipes et nos rayons dans ces 2 villes très dynamiques de la Seine st Denis, à savoir Noisy le Grand et Aulnay sous Bois

Innovationsagentur trifft Familienunternehmen: 
Mit ADD TO WATER verbinden wir zwei Welten mit einem Ziel: Innovation für den Getränkemarkt. Wie können wir mehr Freude am Wasser trinken schaffen? Diese Frage stellte sich das Team von ADD TO WATER zu Beginn ihrer Zusammenarbeit.

Die Antwort: Individuelle Geschmackskombinationen für mehr Abwechslung beim Wasser trinken. Gemeinsam entwickelten wir, Ottakringer & TheVentury, ADD TO WATER, um mit dem fruchtig natürlichen Aroma den Wassermarkt zu revolutionieren. Die Mission: Drink with Joy

Name: Matchasome
Description:
We love to celebrate life, and matcha is our superpower.
 
In the summer of 2022, our pure love for matcha drove us to open the first matcha café-concept in Germany. Since then, we are constantly pushing boundaries and redefining the world of matcha – online and offline. 

After many tastings and analyses of nutritional, chemical, and residue levels, we hand-picked the very best organic matcha from the top tea regions in Japan. We proudly source our teas directly from Kagoshima and Uji.

Our farm to cup matcha is packed with healthy levels of amino acids, such as L-theanine, phytonutrients, antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and comes in beautiful vibrant green color that extends to its taste. 

We exclusively offer ceremonial grade matcha made from the youngest tea leaves from the first harvest—they are suitable for tea ceremonies and drinking pure or with milk. 

You can experience Matchasome in our cafés in Berlin as well as online via matchasome.com.

Se trata de una empresa familiar con la cual continuar la tradición del chorizo Santa Rosano y, más allá del chorizo, poder llevar un poco de nuestra gastronomía a todos los latinos que se encuentren en España y Europa, con el fin de que se sientan como en casa. 

Nuestro equipo trabaja duramente con el objetivo de conseguir esa satisfacción plena de todo aquel que decide probar uno de nuestros productos, proporcionando a los consumidores la mejor calidad y sabor en todos los productos que ofertamos para que nuestros clientes puedan tener una alimentación totalmente nutritiva y equilibrada, a la vez que disfrutan de un producto con un sabor exquisito.

Tratamos de ofrecer un surtido variado que abarca desde chorizo, salami, salchichón cervecero, salchichas rancheras, longaniza, manjar blanco y diferentes tipos de arepa. Actualmente, se pueden encontrar nuestros productos en España y en diferentes países de Europa como Italia, Francia, Holanda, Portugal, entre otros. Además, existe la posibilidad de realizar pedidos a través de la página web, sin importar su ubicación, de manera que podamos cumplir nuestra misión.

Description:
Профессиональные сотрудники встречают гостей в двух просторных магазинах, разделенных по принципу: винный отдел; а также крепкий алкоголь и сигары. 
На наших полках собраны лучшие образцы продуктов со всего света. Прямые поставки по эксклюзивным контрактам гарантируют оригинальность и качество нашей продукции. Опытные закупщики следят за последними тенденциями в мире алкоголя и сигар, чтобы наши клиенты получали только лучшие новинки в каждой категории. Подобранный ассортимент закрывает практически все запросы наших гостей, так как в нем помимо популярных позиций представлены такие редкие на острове продукты, как канарские вулканические вина, премиальное саке, китайская водка Мао Та, самые дорогие в мире бокалы ручной работы и многое другое.
Наш раздел “Элитная коллекция” не оставит равнодушным ни одного искушенного любителя вин и крепкого алкоголя.. В нем представлены произведения искусства: от Великих шато Бордо, до вертикальной коллекции Romanee Conti и самых редких виски Macallan. Вас ждут более 500 редких вин Бургундии, Калифорнии, Тосканы, при этом года урожая подобраны таким образом, чтобы любители наслаждались винами уже сейчас. Также, гости смогут оставить заказ, и мы найдем и доставим на Кипр любое вино, существующее в мире.
Сигары - быстро развивающаяся категория во всем мире. Punin Wine представляет широкий ассортимент сигар и элитных сигарных аксессуаров. Эксклюзивный контракт с Дэниел Маршалл позволил представить на острове знаменитые золотые сигары. А изысканные хьюмидоры и другие сигарные аксессуары уже украшают кабинеты многих знатоков ароматного хобби Кипра.

Welcome to The Wine Auction Room - join us in our love of great wine.

Our work in the wine industry for over 30 years has credited us with the title “Wine Maven”.  We’ve grown grapes, sold prestige brands, heaved barrels and lugged cases.  Each day is fueled by our passion for wine, a thirst to grow our wine knowledge and typically presents us with crazy new adventures.  

In 2018, perched in New Zealand and inspired by the fruits of our labour, we believed it was time that the loyal (and novice) wine enthusiast had access to an interesting variety of wine.  So we started The Wine Auction Room.  

We know that we are not alone in our love for rare and fine wine and are thrilled to help others access these products on the secondary market.  

Join our wine auctions at The Wine Auction Room.  Nothing brings us greater joy than introducing our customers to new wines or coveted vintages.
