Name: Grupo Açaí Original / Polpanorte Europa
Description:
A Família #Polpanorte surgiu no ano 1995 com o fornecimento de polpas de fruta de excelente qualidade para o mercado local, e rapidamente se tornou uma marca líder e de confiança no Brasil. 

Quase 30 anos depois, e com um vasto know how no segmento das polpas de fruta, foi no açaí que a marca consolidou o seu mercado, criando uma fórmula com alma, que torna o seu mix de açaí o mais cremoso e saboroso, não só no Brasil, mas também na Europa através da representação da marca Açaí Original. 

Rico em carbohidratos, lipídeos e fibras, além de outros nutrientes essenciais para o funcionamento do nosso organismo, o valor energético do açaí, conta com gorduras benéficas que auxiliam na redução do colesterol mau (LDL) e melhoram o colesterol bom (HDL). São inúmeros os benefícios para a saúde e bem estar, nomeadamente a sua ação antioxidante, essencial no combate à ação dos radicais livres, responsáveis pelo envelhecimento precoce e pelo surgimento de doenças degenerativas do sistema nervoso, mas é o seu sabor que o torna tão desejado.

Connosco, para além do Mix com Guaraná, o Mix com Banana, Zero ou puro, pode encontrar também o creme de Cupuaçu em vários formatos, assim como diversas polpas de frutas congeladas que podem ser utilizadas das mais diversas formas, contribuindo com um sabor naturalmente único, às suas várias formas de utilização. 

Não deixe que o seu negócio fique para trás. Acompanhe as tendências, e garanta este sabor de origem natural aos seus clientes. 

Fale connosco e encomende já.

Name: Wein- & Feinkost Zylinder
Description:
Extra Natives Olivenö, Weine & Schaumweine, Spirituosen, Gin, Destillate, Wurstwaren, Schinkenprodukte, Käsesorten, Pasta, Saußen, Patés, Aceto Balsamico aus Modena und Traditionale, Gewürze, Reis, Risottosorten, Süssigkeiten, Brotaufstriche süss & salzig, Kosmetik aus Olivenöl aus der Toskana, Haselnüsse aus dem Piemont etc. etc. 

Buon giorno, wir sind Matteo & Manuela Sartori, Inhaber von „Wein & Feinkost Zylinder“. Feine kulinarische Erlebnisse direkt aus Italien - das erwartet unsere Kunden, Privatpersonen sowie Unternehmen, in unserem Ladengeschäft, bei besonderen Events oder bei sich zu Hause. Unsere Produkte wählen wir bei unseren Reisen in die unterschiedlichsten Regionen Italiens aus, meist handelt es sich hier um kleine Manufakturen.  Award-winning quality - Gold at Taste of the West (three years running) and Platinum at Food Drink Devon for Best Online Retailer (two years running).

Perfect for client gifts, employee recognition, seasonal thank-yous, or welcoming new team members. We can handle bulk orders, add personal messages, and work to your timescales.

Sobre esta premisa, elaboramos productos que buscan la perfecta combinación entre la máxima calidad de ingredientes, utilizando los chocolates de origen más deliciosos y singulares del mundo, y la creatividad propia de la alta gastronomía.

TCM Cookie was created for cookie lovers, by a cookie lover. These cookies are monstrous, being 5 oz in size with about a 5 inch diameter.

We are a company devoted to satisfying EVERYONE'S cookie cravings, year round. We’ve all got a Cookie Monster in us, it just takes the right cookie to bring it out.

Kind of like each of us, every cookie is handmade and crafted to perfection. Our goal is to inspire everyone to live a little, indulge, and not feel guilty about it. Don’t be ashamed to feed your inner monster!

Not only is it important to us to share our love of cookies but it’s just as important to be mentors and role models. One of our biggest goals to be an example to a new generation of Black kids. 

As Cookie Monsters, we vow to be who we need to be no matter the difficulties we encounter. We vow to show, not only tell, them that they too can dream big and be ANYTHING. We vow to be who we are, unapologetically, and to encourage others to do the same!

Name: La Fromagerie Ponpon Valence Tournon
Description:
Fromagerie, crèmerie et épicerie fine : l'adresse gourmande en centre-ville de Valence et de Tournon depuis 2025.
Découvrez nos fromages de producteurs, ainsi que toute une gamme de desserts lactés artisanaux et de produits régionaux (miels, confitures, huiles...)

Name: My Green Fuel
Description:
En My Green Fuel, nos especializamos en ofrecerte el mejor matcha latte listo para disfrutar. Somos los únicos en España que te brindamos un matcha latte instantáneo con solo dos ingredientes naturales y saludables: matcha ceremonial de alta calidad y bebida de avena en polvo.

Nuestro matcha latte no solo es delicioso, sino que también está repleto de antioxidantes, proporcionando energía duradera de forma natural. Con My Green Fuel, puedes disfrutar de una bebida saludable que se prepara en segundos, ya sea en casa o en cualquier lugar.

Name: Malu Coffee
Description: Pour over coffee on the go: experience the perfect balance of quality and convenience with Malu

Name: Special Blends Hospitality Group
Description: Special Blends Hospitality Group is an F&B company managing multiple brands including Chai And Co., Slider Stop, Biryani & Paratha, Acai Stop. We specialize in creating and running hybrid models, including dark kitchens and dine in models.

Name: LEEK Food Solutions
Description:
Brengt nog meer smaak en gemak aan de keuken met behulp van pure kruidenblends.

Geen overbodige toevoegingen, wel puur kruiden.
Geen overtollige kruidenpotten, wel precies wat je nodig hebt.
Simpele recepten, altijd lekker en gevarieerd eten. 

Tot snel, 
Sander Kern

Name: DIVIN • Cave à vin •
Description:
Vente de vins, champagnes, spiritueux et bières locales.
Location tirage pression.
Livraison pour les pros & les particuliers !

Name: Bjuiced - Corporate Wellness
Description:
bhealthy - bfit - bjuiced

Get up run, bike, swim, enjoy the sunrise and Brefreshed with our amazing flavors.

As Fenwick Island and Ocean City's premier Juice Bar, we source our fresh ingredients from local farmers and suppliers. Our recipes focus on nutrients, taste and health.

Name: BamJam
Description:
Available online at bamjamprotein.com and in select retail!
Follow our journey along on Instagram and TikTok @bamjamprotein

Name: RUE D'ITALIE
Description: Dans notre établissement, nous valorisons l’art de vivre culinaire Italien avec des produits de qualité. Nous avons l'envie de faire partager et découvrir l’Excellence de la Gastronomie Italienne par une sélection en direct des Meilleurs Producteurs de la Péninsule.

Name: Bismillah Bakery
Description:
Bismillah Bakery is Birmingham's epitome of culinary excellence, crafting exquisite handcrafted cakes. Specialising in bespoke creations, including halal and vegan options, our cakes are a fusion of artistry and premium local ingredients. 

With a rich heritage, we stand as the West Midlands' foremost cake artisans. From personalised birthday indulgences to elegant wedding confections, our cakes cater to every occasion. Choose from our halal or vegan range, tailored to your taste and values. Enjoy the convenience of our seamless delivery service, ensuring your cake arrives in pristine condition. 

Join us in savouring life's sweet moments, redefined through our unparalleled craftsmanship. 

Bismillah Bakery is now franchising, inviting you to join our journey of sweet success.

Name: Ansonia Wines
Description:
Mark and Tom Wilcox are father-and-son importers specializing in artisan French wines. We import wines from winemakers we know personally. We specialize in Burgundies, but also import wines from the Alsace, the Rhône, the Languedoc, the Loire, and Bordeaux.

We distribute wines to fine restaurants in Washington DC, Philadelphia and Boston. We sell to wine enthusiasts and collectors through our posts.

Our goal is to bring wine drinkers closer to winemakers.

Name: Flour Child AU
Description: Flour Child is a new an dinnovative creation in pizza and bar culture. Our hero product, is called “Pinsa Romana” and it is the very best pizza you will ever taste! Whilst steeped in history it is actually very new, even, for its country of origin Rome in Italy. Definitely a first for Australia. Pinsa Romana is a remarkably different pizza in every way. We also boast a large range of cocktails and drinks. The perfect concept to start in sunny St Kilda.

Name: zithai
Description: joy of shrikhand

Name: My Coffee Group
Description:
My Coffee Group
La passione per il caffè espressa in macchine a cialde biologiche ed ecologiche

Sono questi i punti cardine intorno ai quali nel 2009 è nata e si è sviluppata My Coffee a Modena, Parma e Reggio Emilia. Un’azienda specializzata nella vendita e nella fornitura in comodato d’uso gratuito di macchine da caffè a cialde e di cialde per caffè e bevande calde in carta filtro alimentare.

Passione per il caffè
Un prodotto tanto raffinato quanto diffuso: dalle verdi foreste tropicali fino alle cialde da poter comodamente consumare in ufficio o a casa, il caffè una delle bevande più consumate al mondo e ricca di tantissimi effetti positivi per il nostro organismo.

Condivisione
di questa passione che coinvolge più di un miliardo di consumatori in tutto il mondo e che traina le vendite degli apparecchi deputati alla sua preparazione.

Estrema cura dei dettagli e dei clienti
tanto nel settore aziendale, quanto nel settore ho.re.ca. clienti sempre più grave; attenti e cosmopoliti, che richiedono competenza, innovazione, ma anche creatività.

Name: Arnakke Vinimport
Description:
Arnakke Vinimport startede i 1984 med import af franske vine. Sidenhen er andre lande kommet til, herunder Australien, Italien, Spanien og Portugal.
Sortimentet er ligeledes udvidet med Champagne, således at det nu dækker en bredere efterspørgsel.
Arnakke Vinimport er eksklusiv importør af vine fra Cullen Wines (Margaret River), Leconfield Wines (Coonawarra og Adelaide Hills), Monterosola (Toscana), Godin & Filles (Champagne), Quinta da Basilia (Duoro) m.fl.
Salg sker fra webshop, samt direkte fra lagre i Arnakke og Allerød.

Name: FOOD'ICI
Description:
LOCAVORE DISTRIBUTIONB2B DÉCARBONÉ  

FOOD'ICI simplifie les relations commerciales, logistiques et administratives entre les producteurs et la grande distribution. 

A l'heure d'une révolution écologique nécessaire, notre chaîne alimentaire est concernée dans cette transition. 

Augmenter de 2 à 10% la consommation de produits locaux passera, d'une part, par l'augmentation de l'offre en local mais aussi par l'organisation et l'optimisation de la chaîne de distribution. 

Nous voulons faire gagner du temps et de l'argent aux producteurs tout en simplifiant la distribution pour les managers de GSA.

Name: GoPresso
Description: At GoPresso, our mission is to empower hikers, campers, and adventurers to elevate their journeys by providing them with the ultimate coffee-brewing companion. We believe that every adventure should be accompanied by the rich aroma and taste of freshly brewed coffee, no matter how remote the location. Our innovative portable coffee machines, designed for compatibility with both pods and ground coffee, ensure that every adventurer can experience the joy of a perfectly brewed cup in just 5 minutes. We are dedicated to enhancing the outdoor experience, one cup at a time.

Name: MAKE Matcha Co
Description:
Did you know less than 2% of the matcha sold worldwide adheres to traditional Japanese farming practices? Most brands are mass-produced, “white-label” matcha, which is why we’re excited to introduce MAKE: a premium collection featuring the highest-grade matcha you can make at home. 

MAKE’s Heritage Grade matcha is a traditionally procured, small batch matcha from Uji, Kyoto. From the hand-picked tea leaves to the beautifully designed packaging—every step of the process at MAKE is done with the utmost consideration under the guidance of Kobayashi, a level 10-dan tea master. 

Find us on instagram: @MAKEmatcha.co

Name: Jar&Joy
Description:
Welkom bij Jar&Joy!  
Bij ons draait alles om makkelijk, snel én lekker koken. 
In onze pop-upwinkel vind je alles wat je nodig hebt om je maaltijden met plezier en zonder stress te bereiden.

Name: L'Epicurien Vin
Description:
Whether you are a buyer or a seller, our mission is to provide you with unforgettable experiences.

Whether it's a sale of rare wines, a gourmet dinner accompanied by legendary wines, our goal is to share our passion for wine with bon vivants like you.

Name: Scooter Bay Sales & Marketing
Description:
Scooter Bay Sales is a performance-based food brokerage company that provides best-in-class services to ensure growth and profitability for its retail customers and brands.

Scott Shoub founded Scooter Bay in 1996, intending to redefine the food brokerage business in the Midwest. Today, the company supports national, regional and local customers in more than 400 store locations within the Illinois, Indiana, Wisconsin and Michigan markets.

The Scooter Bay team comprises experienced professionals driven by a passion for exceeding customer expectations. Their efforts have repeatedly earned Scooter Bay "Broker of the Year" recognitions by nationally renowned food brands.

Name: Vyne Wine
Description:
At Vyne, we believe wine is more than just a bevvy, a drink, just a nightcap - it's a journey, a conversation, and a connection waiting to happen. As your personal wine matchmaker, we curate a global selection of bottles from renowned vineyards and hidden gems alike, so you can discover the one that suits you most.

But we don’t stop at helping you find the right wine. Vyne is also your creative partner in wine and spirits — blending e-commerce, digital storytelling, and experiential moments into every bottle we sell. Whether you're browsing for a casual sip or planning a grand tasting experience, we make wine easy to explore, enjoy, and share.

Sit back, relax, and let the wines do the talking. All you have to do is find the one that fits you best, and we’ll take care of the rest.

Name: Let's Dish!
Description: Let's Dish!, a small local company, is committed to making mealtime simpler and tastier for busy families, with wholesome, healthy, handmade meals.

Name: Down the Road Spice Co.
Description: We are on a mission to change the way Indian food is cooked and experienced in the US by making it more simple, more delicious and more accessible to the home chef. We do this with our small-batch, organic masalas (spice blends) that serve as the base for making an Indian dish in under 30 minutes with just a few fresh ingredients.

Name: V and B Amiens les Halles
Description: Chez V and B Amiens les Halles, on aime partager de bons moments, tant du côté BAR par nos soirées Afterwork... que du côté CAVE avec + de 1000 références bières , vins  et spiritueux  sur place ou à emporter, pour faire plaisir ou se faire plaisir !

Name: Nutri Butter
Description:
This is not your average nut butter! 

In today’s world of interesting ingredients and never-ending recipes, one thing is certain. Eating well doesn’t need to be dull. Soggy salads and super juiced celery, step aside. Nutrition’s got far more exciting than that. You see to us, good food doesn’t just mean healthy food. It also means interesting, moreish, can’t-wait-to-get-it-in-your-mouth food.

And that’s the kind of wellness we’re interested in. That’s why at Nutri Butter, each peanut-bursting jar is full of body boosting benefits. From chia seeds and baobab for workouts. To maca and cinnamon for the immune system. But the thing that makes it even better? It tastes pretty great too. 

This is not your average nut butter.
These are nuts that do more.

Name: BeerMyBrand
Description:
Crafted for marketing and event professionals.
Order bespoke branded beer.
Elevate your brand effortlessly.

BeerMyBrand SaaS platform bridges the gap between breweries and the corporate world. 

Whether you're a company aiming to resonate through a bespoke brew or a brewery eager to expand your portfolio, BeerMyBrand streamlines the process. 

Dive in and discover the power of branded beer – turning every event, campaign, or celebration into a memorable beverage experience.

Name: SAI Ramen
Description: First Ramen Bar in Indonesia. Founded in 2020. 100% Original Japan Recipe. MUI Halal Certified

Name: Botko Foods
Description: Botko Foods creates foods our consumers can feel good about indulging in. Made with nutrient rich, easy to digest ingredients like almond, coconut, flaxseed and extra virgin olive oil to deliver a complete snack rich in fiber, protein and heart-healthy fats. Plant-based. Non-GMO. Certified Gluten Free. Kosher.

Name: Grindhog Day Coffee
Description:
Grindhog Day Coffee was created by the crew at In Other Good News in August 2020, as a way to raise money for the charity Foodbank, in an ongoing capacity. 
Every kilogram of coffee sold since, has created 16 meals for vulnerable Victorians, equating to tens of thousands of meals for the increasing number of people suffering from food insecurity.

Name: Chef's Table
Description: Premiering on Netflix in 2015, Chef’s Table quickly became a cultural phenomenon, captivating audiences with its intimate and inspiring portrayals of world-renowned chefs. As Netflix’s longest-running original series, it has introduced millions to the artistry, passion, and innovation behind culinary excellence. Now, the Chef’s Table team brings their signature storytelling beyond the screen, curating exclusive dining experiences and products that celebrate the intersection of food and creativity.

Name: Supermercados Romancini
Description:
Os Supermercados Romancini são uma rede de supermercados que conta com cinco empresas distintas para atender às necessidades dos clientes. Com mais de 23 anos de história, essa rede se tornou uma referência no setor varejista.

O Romancini Vera é reconhecido por sua dedicação em oferecer produtos frescos e de qualidade, como frutas, legumes, carnes e produtos de padaria. Os clientes podem encontrar alimentos saudáveis e de origem confiável nessa empresa.

A Romancini Matriz é a loja principal da rede, que oferece uma experiência completa de compra. Com um amplo espaço e setores organizados, a loja possui uma variedade de produtos, desde itens básicos de mercearia até produtos de cuidados pessoais e limpeza.

O Romancini Super Prático foi projetado com foco na praticidade e conveniência. Com um layout otimizado, os clientes encontram uma seleção de produtos essenciais de forma rápida e eficiente. Essa loja é ideal para compras rápidas.

O Romancini Restaurante é uma extensão dos supermercados, oferecendo refeições prontas e lanches rápidos. Com um cardápio diversificado que inclui pratos quentes, saladas, sanduíches e sobremesas, o restaurante atende tanto aos clientes que buscam uma pausa durante as compras quanto aos que desejam alimentação fora de casa.

Por fim, o Supermercado Verdão é parte integrante dos Supermercados Romancini. Com uma variedade de produtos alimentícios e não alimentícios, essa loja atende a uma clientela diversa. Com preços competitivos e um ambiente agradável, o Supermercado Verdão é uma opção popular para compras em grande escala ou do dia a dia.

Ao longo dos anos, os Supermercados Romancini se destacaram por sua dedicação em oferecer produtos de qualidade, variedade e excelente atendimento aos clientes. Com suas cinco empresas, essa rede se tornou uma escolha confiável para as necessidades de compras dos consumidores.
Location: Lucas do Rio Verde, Mato Grosso

Name: Au Local
Description:
Le groupement d’achat Au Local propose des paniers personnalisés et sans engagement. Les produits locaux et de saison proviennent de fermes situées à moins de 100km de Grenoble.

Fruits et légumes, produits laitiers, viandes, épicerie sèche, miel, boissons…
De nombreux points de distribution à Grenoble, des tarifs réduits pour les quotients familiaux de moins de 900€, et aussi des animations autour de l’alimentation saine et locale et des visites à la ferme !

Name: Fromagerie Lou
Description:
Fromagerie à Simiane Collongue

447 avenue du général de Gaulle
cc le moulin
13 109 SIMIANE COLLONGUE

Enfin une fromagerie sur le secteur de Bouc Bel Air / Simiane  :) 
Plus besoin de se déplacer sur Aix ou Marseille pour composer votre plateau fin de repas, votre raclette ou fondue

On retrouve essentiellement des fromages fermiers : fromages produits, fabriqués et affinés avec le lait du troupeau d'une seule ferme. Généralement au lait cru (pas chauffé au-delà de 40°). De quoi conserver certains arômes spécifiques de son terroir.

Il sera possible aussi de retrouver des fromages italiens comme Parmigiano Regiano, Pecorino et Pepato, ou espagnols avec le Manchego, ou encore suisse comme l'Etivax, le Kaltbach, le Tilsit ou anglais comme le Shrosphire. 

Venez vous régaler !
Suivez nos aventures sur les reseaux sociaux

Name: Arthur's Urban Market
Description: At Arthur’s Urban Market, our philosophy is simple – we believe that every bite tells a story. From the benefits of buying healthy, to the untold stories of local farmers, and our relationships with vendors around the world, we bring these stories home. With offerings like our onsite artisan bakery, we strive to inspire a more European style approach to grocery shopping — where a daily trip to the market is as important to your dinner as enjoying the meal itself. It’s all part of sharing our passion for food with our customers, helping them make healthier and informed choices for nourishing themselves and their families.

Name: Mythology Coffee
Description: Mythology Coffee offers specialty coffees from India roasted perfectly and delivered fresh to you.

Name: KGS Operations
Description:
DAK’s Market is our customers’ preferred destination for a variety of food and beverages, from the dine-in or takeaway meals of our national restaurant brand, to our grab-and-go options made fresh on site, to a nice selection of snacks and drinks. Our visitors are always treated to a clean environment and welcoming staff members who express their sincere thanks for each purchase. We also work to surprise and delight our customers with quality inventory options, unique décor and memorable, family-friendly experiences well beyond those of the typical convenience store.

DAK’s Market operations team is driven to provide our customers with the best experiential retail and fueling possible. We strive to create an immersive and shareable experience that prioritizes customer engagement — not sales, stimulates customers’ senses, and defies customer expectations. This is achieved through frictionless or contactless payments, curbside delivery, online ordering, state-of-the-art facilities, and exceptional sanitary standards. We strive to compete for a larger “share of life”— where a greater percentage of consumers’ needs are addressed and to become a destination of choice to serve many aspects of everyday life.

Name: Ruggine Bologna
Description:
Ruggine nasce come un “bar di carattere” fondato nel 2014 da quattro “ragazzi” di angoli diversi di italia. 

Oggi non si tratta solamente di un bar del centro di Bologna ma di una solida realtà del territorio che ha aggiunto tre piccoli gioielli alle proprie attività: Ragū e Ragū &Draft, punti vendita dedicati allo street & fast food Bolognese! 

Errelab é il laboratorio di produzione di pasta fresca, pane e condimenti é ormai la sede aziendale, dove nascono idee, ricette e le forniture necessarie per avere un prodotto artigianale e personalizzato nei punti vendita!

Name: AutoMat BilleLivs
Description:
Vi är en obemannad livsmedelsbutik som har öppet 05.00-23.00 alla dagar året runt. Vi satsar mycket på vårt koncept med Local Love, vilket innebär att framhäva de lokala producenterna. 
Välkommen in!

Name: todo - GLP-1 protein & fiber shakes
Description: Ready to drink protein shakes that naturally help with appetite control, fullness and strength. 26g of milk protein powered by Real California Milk and 6g of prebiotic fiber can keep you full for up to 4 hours.

Name: La Finezza
Description:
Dentro i nostri prodotti c'è il lavoro, la passione e la ricchezza di circa 15000 olivicoltori
La Finezza è un brand nato dalla passione di tanti piccoli e medi produttori italiani che ogni giorno lavorano per dar vita a prodotti di alta qualità. Attraverso La Finezza avrete la certezza di avere sulle vostre tavole un olio non industriale e 100% italiano. Garante del progetto e della qualità è la Filiera certificata ISO 22005:2007 di Unapol (Unione Nazionale Associazioni Produttori Olivicoli), nata su iniziativa degli stessi produttori olivicoli e riconosciuta dal Ministero delle Politiche Agricole che, ad oggi, raccoglie circa 30.000 produttori di 9 regioni italiane. Raccolta, spremitura e conservazione sono gli unici passaggi che compie il nostro olio. Un olio unico, che arriva veramente dall'oliveto alla tavola, senza passaggi aggiuntivi. Un olio capace di raccontare con la sua ricca varietà di sapori le storie degli olivicoltori italiani.
Produciamo olio extravergine d'oliva mono cultivar, oli aromatizzato, olive da tavola e patè. 
BUONI, NATURALI, 100% QUALITA' ITALIANA. 
Nessuna intermediazione industriale, sosteniamo i produttori italiani riconoscendo loro il giusto valore

Name: Coastal Vending 912 LLC
Description:
Locally Serviced. Nationally Shipped. Built for Modern Vending. 

We are revolutionizing the industry by combining full-service local care with a nationwide machine sales division. In Coastal Georgia, we serve as your "on-the-go pantry," providing sleek touchscreen machines at no cost. 
Nationwide, we empower entrepreneurs by shipping state-of-the-art, customizable vending machines directly to your door—with lift-gate service included. We offer training video and virtual appointments, ensuring you can confidently handle setup, restocking, and troubleshooting from day one. 

Coming in Q3 2026: We are expanding into AI-powered micromarkets, offering frictionless self-checkout of all your favorite items!

Name: BlueBear
Description: Cairo-based bubble gum innovators since 2017. We offer Balalino and Swipe, Uncompromising on quality, certified materials for excellence.

Name: Tennessee Peanut Co.
Description: Southern roasted and dessert peanuts that bring home the taste of Tennessee Hill Country | Family Owned by Jay & Jessie Cleveland in Nashville TN

Name: Curitiba
Description: Somos uma cafeteria com essência em cafés e bebidas especiais e que faz parte de uma rede de franquias presente em vários estados do Brasil.

Name: Clayton Winehouse
Description:
At Clayton Winehouse we believe in living a life refined and that means spending time with friends, family and colleagues. We founded Clayton Winehouse in 2020 out of a deep appreciation for wine.
Adoration for wine, spirits and food sparked the idea to create a curated wine experience. Our expertise in the wine industry and connections to private dealers ensure that the experiences at Clayton Winehouse are unrivaled.

Name: SUPERMERCADO SILVA
Description: O SUPERMERCADO SILVA é uma loja no estado de Goiás, trabalhando com muita determinação para continuar essa trajetória de sucesso, buscando conhecer o perfil de seus clientes e atende–lós em necessidade, visando melhorar a cada dia a qualidade de seus serviços e produtos. Servir bem os clientes, oferecer vários empregos diretos e indiretos e contribuir com desenvolvimento da cidade de Anápolis, são os motivos de orgulho para nós. A política de sustentabilidade alia, com o comprometimento de todos os níveis da empresa, as exigências econômicas com as necessidades sociais e o respeito aos recursos naturais. Na gestão dos negócios, incluímos a responsabilidade social com princípios e ações que favorecem o desenvolvimento sustentável e agregam valor ao relacionamento com os vários públicos. Estimulamos, contribuímos e participamos de seu crescimento social. Quando se fala em Supermercados, imediatamente o nome Supermercado Silva sempre é lembrado! É uma referência em preços baixos e qualidade de atendimento, antes de qualquer coisa, porque o já conta com a confiança de mais de 50 mil clientes Anapolinos. Toda manhã, acordamos cedo e trabalhamos duro para você ter uma loja limpa, arrumada, organizada, com produtos frescos, marcas de qualidade, os menores preços em todas as seções, grande variedade e o atendimento amigo que contribui para que mais e mais pessoas visitem nossas lojas e se tornem clientes fiéis.

Name: Idiotropa
Description: Drying is the oldest and perhaps the healthiest way of preserving fresh agricultural products.

Name: পুষ্টিসাধক
Description: আমরা ন্যাচারাল ফুড নিয়ে কাজ করে চলেছি ।খাদ্য উৎপাদন ও ব্যবহারের পরিবেশগত ক্ষতিকর প্রভাব কমাতে আমাদের এই পদক্ষেপ নেওয়া ।প্লাস্টিক প্যাকেজিং একটি প্রধান স্বাস্থ্যগত এবং পরিবেশগত সমস্যা, তাই আমরা কোনো প্রকার প্লাস্টিক প্যাকেজিং ব্যাবহার করিনা ।আমরা খাবার উৎপাদন থেকে শুরু করে  আপনাকে পরিবেশন করা পর্যন্ত যত কার্যক্রম রয়েছে তার কোনোটাতেই এমন কোন উপাদান বা পাত্র ব্যাবহার করিনা যা আপনার হেলথকে ক্ষতিগ্রস্থ করতে পারে।আপনার ইউমিন সিস্টেমকে ডেভেলপ করে আপনাকে সুস্থ রাখাটাই আমাদের মূল লক্ষ্য এর পাশাপাশি  পরিবেশের সুরক্ষা নিয়ে আমরা সচেতন থাকি ।আসুন স্বাস্থ্যকর প্রিজারভেটিভ মুক্ত ন্যাচারাল খাবার গ্রহণ করি এবং ইকো সিস্টেমকে  সুস্থ রেখে ভবিষ্যৎ প্রজন্মকে সুন্দর পরিবেশ উপহার দেই।

Name: Positive Vibe Coffee Co, LLC
Description:
Positive Vibe Coffee Co brings you specialty grade organic coffee that ignite positivity and fulfillment in your daily routine. Enjoy freshly roasted, ethically sourced coffee delivered to your doorstep. Support our mission to combat child abuse with our caramel flavored coffee, I am Brave! 

Join our vibrant community and raise the vibe of your life and the planet. Choose Positive Vibe Coffee Co for a truly uplifting coffee experience.

Name: Nouvelle Maison
Description:
We're Nouvelle Maison, your French neighborhood market, café, boulangerie, fromagerie, charcuterie, and cave à vin. 

We offer authentic French goods, local produce, exceptionally prepared foods, fresh bread and pastries, imported cheeses and meats, and a curated selection of wines and spirits.

Enjoy a pain au chocolat or Parisien sandwich. Learn about our latest Pinot Noir. Catch up with neighbors and friends.

Name: Leonidas ZiDa bv
Description:
- Wij zijn er voor grote én kleine bedrijven.
- Offerte op maat volgens uw wensen én budget.
- Wij leveren of verzenden naar uw bedrijf, klanten, personeel,...

  -> Het bedrukken van pralines mogen we helaas niet.
  -> Wél is alles mogelijk ivm personaliseren van de verpakking.

Name: Ybor City Coffee and Tea Co
Description:
Ybor City Coffee and Tea Co. would love to welcome you to our cozy and inviting coffee shop. As you enter our shop, you will be greeted by the rich aroma of freshly brewed coffee beans, instantly awakening your senses. The decor is a perfect blend of historic and modern, with exposed brick walls adorned with local artists’ artwork and comfortable, mismatched furniture that creates an eclectic and welcoming atmosphere.

Our shop highlights house-made baked goods as well as breakfast and lunch menu items. The shop features an exquisite assortment of small farm and many single origin coffees from around the world. Our baristas are always ready to recommend the perfect roast to match your taste preferences, and they take pride in creating unique and flavorful signature drinks that you won't find anywhere else. We pride ourselves in our Baristas who offer friendly and passionate knowledge about our coffee. They eagerly engage in conversations about different brewing methods, coffee origins, and flavor profiles, ensuring that every customer's experience is personalized and educational.

From flaky croissants to decadent muffins, there's something to satisfy every craving. We even have options for those with dietary restrictions, ensuring that everyone feels welcome and well-catered to.

Ybor City Coffee and Tea Co. is a one-of-a-kind experience and part of an enriching community. The cozy seating areas and free Wi-Fi make it an ideal spot to work, study, or simply unwind with a book. The coffee shop also serves as a creative hub within the community. It's a gathering place where local artists, musicians, and writers can come together, as well.

Overall, our coffee shop offers, not only exceptional coffee, but also an experience that is warm, friendly, and culturally enriching. It's a place where you can truly appreciate the artistry and craftsmanship that goes into every cup and leave feeling inspired and energized.

Name: Pure Kakaw
Description:
Our fascination with cacao started with the effect that it has on our body and mind. Even more when we learned how it can support us in a healthy, happy and productive lifestyle. For example how it increases focus and creative flow.

Traditionally cacao is known as a 'heart opening medicine'. You can literally experience how it can bring your awareness to your heart area from where you can connect more powerful to yourself, your creativity, vision, passion projects, and to others too. We believe that if we live from a heart-centered perspective we create a more beautiful world.

Ideas when to use cacao:
◊ Focus into your flow - create a 2h work bubble
◊ Morning energizer
◊ Brainstorm or creative session
◊ Team or client meeting
◊ Pick-me-up in the afternoon

The natural ingredients in cacao are quite fascinating. A known effect of pure cacao is how it helps to ‘get in the flow’. This makes it an especially interesting drink for work, next to coffee and tea. Whether you need focus in your own work bubble or connect to create something with your team.

Pure cacao is a healthy alternative to coffee. The theobromine in cacao is a mild stimulant that is longer active than caffeine without the dip.

Name: CARNICERIAS LA SELECTA
Description:
Somos una combinación de conocimientos técnicos sobre la manipulación y procesamiento de carne, ademas de mantener una gestión adecuada de la higiene y seguridad alimentaria, brindando siempre una atención al cliente de calidad y amable, aportando siempre al cumplimiento normativo y estrategias de diferenciación para destacar en el mercado. Nuesto proposito es proveer a los clientes de una variedad de carnes frescas y procesadas, garantizando la calidad, seguridad e higiene de los productos que ofrecemos.
Trabajamos con proveedores de confianza que suministran carne de calidad y cumpliendo con las normativas sanitarias establecidas. Asi garantizamos y mantenemos una cadena de suministro eficiente para garantizar la frescura y disponibilidad de los productos cárnicos.
Nuestros carniceros tienen el  conocimientos técnicos sobre cómo manipular y procesar diferentes tipos de carne. Esto incluye habilidades para cortar, deshuesar, picar y preparar cortes específicos de acuerdo con las preferencias de los clientes.
Para nosotors es fundamental mantener altos estándares de higiene y seguridad alimentaria por ello seguimos un  protocolo estricto para la limpieza y desinfección de equipos, superficies y utensilios, así como mantener la carne almacenada a temperaturas adecuadas para prevenir la proliferación de bacterias y garantizar la frescura y la calidad del producto final.
Todos nuestros colaboradores estan capacitados para asesorar a los clientes sobre diferentes tipos de carne, sugerir cortes adecuados para diferentes recetas y proporcionar información nutricional.
En un mercado tan competitivo, destacamos  ofreciendo productos de alta calidad, carnes de origen local, cortes especiales y productos cárnicos preparados de manera única, lo que nos permitirá diferenciarnos y llegar a más clientes.

Name: ESPACE NDUGU

Chers amateurs de légumes frais,
Nous sommes ravis de vous annoncer le lancement de notre toute nouvelle plateforme de vente de légumes en ligne !  appelé ESPACE NDUGU
Chez ESPACE NDUGU, nous sommes passionnés par l'alimentation saine et équilibrée. Nous croyons en l'importance de consommer des légumes frais, cultivés localement et de la plus haute qualité. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec des producteurs locaux de confiance pour vous garantir des produits frais, cultivés avec soin et sans compromis sur la qualité.
Voici ce que vous pouvez attendre de notre plateforme de vente de légumes en ligne :

Name: Popoli
Description:
Everything good in life starts with a drop of olive oil. To us, olive oil is culture. It’s our parents and grandparents harvesting olives on the same plot for half a century. It’s respect for the land, it’s who we are.

Sitting around a big table of friends and family in Italy is never complete without olive oil. It’s what brings us together. Most Mediterranean families who own land make their own olive oil to distribute among their always large families (cousins, cousin’s cousins – it adds up). Nowhere is this truer than in Abruzzo, a mostly rural region blessed with fertile valleys and hot summers, perfect for olive harvesting.

But since we actually make too much of the good stuff, we’ve decided to share it with everyone else. Unfiltered and cold-pressed, small-batch and local, it’s extra virgin olive oil as it should be.

Name: Tupan Beverages
Description:
Tupan Beverages is not just a beverage brand — we are a community rooted in purpose. From the forest to your cup, our mission is to eliminate waste from the Amazon açaí supply chain by upcycling açaí beans into functional beverages that fuel both people and planet.

 Certified Impact
Every product is USDA Organic and Non-GMO Project Verified, crafted without artificial additives or shortcuts. Clean, functional, and rooted in Amazonian tradition.

 Fair Trade & Roots
We partner with Amazonian cooperatives and smallholder farmers, ensuring fair wages, dignity, and inclusion. Our Roots lie in the forest: honoring biodiversity, indigenous wisdom, and the people who safeguard the Amazon for generations.

 The Tupan Manifesto

1 We honor the forest, not just its fruits.

2 People before products, always.

3 Radical transparency and Fair Trade integrity.

4 Health-driven function, rooted in tradition.

5 The Amazon is our compass.

6 We don’t sell drinks. We serve a ritual.

7 Upcycling is just the beginning.

8 Flavor without compromise.

9 We are Tribe, not trend.

 Our Beverages

Açaí Coffee – roasted açaí beans, a bold coffee alternative.

Açaí Brew Original – refreshing and antioxidant-rich.

Açaí Brew Pineapple – tropical twist with natural prebiotic fiber.

Açaí Brew Camu Camu – bright and tangy, packed with vitamin C.

Every sip supports the Amazon, empowers local communities, and proves that sustainability and flavor can thrive together. Join the Tupan Tribe and taste the future — rooted in the forest.

Name: Ecrin Terroir
Description:
Chez nous, tout commence à la campagne. Ici, rien n’est artificiel : tout est 100 % artisanal.

Nous refusons catégoriquement l’industriel. Aujourd’hui, demain, et toujours. Nous ne travaillons qu’avec des producteurs, passionnés, attachés à leurs terres et à leur métier. Ces artisans n’ont pas de vitrine tape-à-l’œil ni de marketing agressif. 

Parfois, leur seul point de vente est leur ferme, leur atelier, ou un marché de village. Notre rôle est de faire sortir ces trésors des chemins de terre, pour les rendre accessibles à tous, où que vous soyez.

Ecrin Terroir : quand chaque saveur devient un bijou

Name: House of Habanero
Description:
House of Habanero is positioning itself to become the UAE's premier online destination for chilli aficionados. We're on a mission to curate a remarkable selection of the finest hot sauces, chilli preserves, spicy snacks, and tongue-tingling beverages, all neatly presented on a seamless e-commerce platform.

Our core vision at House of Habanero is to nurture collaboration and mutual growth among local and regional chilli artisans, with a strong emphasis on promoting UAE-made products. Simultaneously, we are introducing the UAE to the world's best artisanal and craft hot sauces and chilli products for the very first time. Our approach involves making these exceptional products accessible to consumers across the country while establishing strategic B2B partnerships with UAE and regional businesses.

Furthermore, we are committed to sharing the captivating stories of the passionate people behind these exciting, dynamic and established brands, and aim to connect with chilli enthusiasts by fostering a vibrant and engaged chilli-loving community right here in the UAE.

Get ready for a delicious journey of discovery as we debut House of Habanero in Q1 2024.

Name: Il Punto SIGMA
Description:
SIGMA – Società Italiana Gruppo Mercantili Associati – è un’azienda che opera nella GDO italiana sin dalla sua fondazione nel 1962 a Bologna. 
	
Tra i primi sul territorio italiano a lanciare prodotti a marchio, operiamo in tutta Italia con le nostre insegne: estensioni create per avvicinarci in ogni modo alle varie esigenze territoriali e di clientela. 

Siamo diventati nel tempo sinonimo di familiarità e solidità in tutta Italia, perché da 60 anni siamo vicini a te e alle tue preferenze, con tanti prodotti di qualità e sempre freschi tutti i giorni. 	

La vicinanza ai nostri clienti è il nostro core business, e per far sì che ciò si concretizzasse abbiamo sviluppato, nel corso degli anni, diverse insegne a marchio SIGMA, tra le quali: IL PUNTO SIGMA.

I nostri Punti, o negozi di prossimità, sono il cuore vero dell’Italia: sono i nomi, le facce, i sorrisi delle persone che conosciamo e delle quali ci fidiamo e affidiamo.

Name: DeliDeli Oy
Description:
DeliDeli started its operations in 2001 as a small shop. Now we import and distribute high-quality food such as oils, vinegars, pates, canned fish, truffle products, olives, jams, pasta and pasta sauces, coffee, tea cakes and chocolate mainly from France, but also from Italy, Spain, Greece and Portugal. 

We are constantly expanding our collection of food products, bringing new and authentic traditional flavour experiences to our customers in Finland. Our product selection criteria are superior taste, high quality, purity, and visual appeal.

Throughout the years, we have established trustful lasting relationships with our DeliDeli retail store customers and expanded our wholesale business.

Our passion for cuisine keeps growing, and we stand by our mission to continue to supply our customers with one-of-a-kind products.

Name: Le Marké
Description:
Le Marké is a modern market + grocer.

We’re guided by the unspoken bond that comes from sitting across from one another at the table. A belief in the generosity of a home-cooked meal; in ingredients that celebrate place and season; in the stories we tell; in everyday ways of living and being; in quiet reminders of what’s important.  Le Marké’s collection brings forth ingredients + products intended for savoring the present while supporting a more sustainable future. We work to simplify sustainability while amplifying ease, wellbeing, and experience. 

As a mission-driven, woman-owned business we are guided by the belief that everyone deserves the right to live well–and that an equitable future requires ongoing, conscious support for both people and planet. 

Le Marké donates 1% of all proceeds to Women’s Earth Alliance, an organization that provides leadership, strategy, and training for women leaders to scale climate and environmental initiatives while connecting them to a global alliance of peers, mentors, and funding.

Name: The Open Food Company, LLC.

Founded in 2024 by Emmy-nominated actor Harry Hamlin and renowned Chef Renée Guilbault, this family-owned, WBENC-certified business is on a mission to empower consumers with high-quality, flavorful food made from simple, whole ingredients—without preservatives or additives. The Open Food Company shares its full recipes and step-by-step guides for free, allowing home cooks to recreate their products from scratch. 

By bridging the gap between convenience and culinary craftsmanship, transforming the way people engage with food and providing meaningful impact to our communities with every bite.

To Our Favourite Spice Collector,

Welcome aboard to Spice Power!

Spice Devis is a mixtape of two best friends (Avishikta and Amulya) lives, flavored with spice, stirred with sass, and always rooted in home. It’s our love letter to the chaos and comfort of growing up everywhere and missing home everywhere, too. Our two debut products are: Kasundi and Kandi Podi! 

1) Kasundi 

This ain’t mustard. It’s Kasundi, baby!

Bold, fiery, and unapologetically Bengali, just like our co-founder Avishikta.
She’s carried it everywhere: from Kolkata to Singapore, Manchester to Dubai.
Every spoonful reminds her of her maa’s pantry and her dida’s kitchen secrets.
Tangy, punchy, and straight from the homeland: this jar’s got stories to tell! 


2) Kandi Podi 

Not your basic podi. It’s Kandi podi, Devis! 

Born in Hyderabad, just like Amulya and made the way her amma did it.
Hot rice. A fat scoop of ghee. And this podi, roasted just right.
Basically, it’s Amma-approved and Mirchi-certified.
This isn’t seasoning; it’s a full-blown emotion.

And if you’re wondering who the Devi is? It’s you. It’s anyone who’s ever brought people together through food, turned leftovers into magic, or added a spoon of something spicy just for fun.

So go on and shake that Podi, dollop that Kasundi, and cook like the Devi you are.

With all our love and a little bit of masala,
Avishikta & Amulya
(Your resident Spice Devis)

Per questo abbiamo scelto:
• confezioni ed etichette in carta FSC ossia da foreste gestite con rigorosi standard ambientali
• flaconi in vetro scuro farmaceutico per garantire la massima stabilità del prodotto e perché il vetro è l’unico materiale reciclabile all’infinito
• flaconi per sostanze liquide in RPET ossia plastica reciclata al 100%

In ultimo, ma non per ultimo, la Jea è un’azienda italiana che deve quindi seguire alti standard di qualità, con integratori registrati al Ministero della Salute e che ha scelto come partners/ fornitori piccole medie aziende italiane che lavorano ogni giorno con grande passione garantendo in ogni fase della lavorazione un approccio di grande serietà e affidabilità.

Name: Friese & Strobl Ventures UG (haftungsbeschränkt)
Description: Over the last one and half year Arved Friese and Kilian Strobl have been working on the creation of the first ever University Beer specifically for their beloved Zeppelin University. Together they created a beer from students for students, where each and every student can submit their own label-design. Thanks to much support from the university community as well as the brewery of choice Meckatzer Löwenbräu have enabled us to launch this project in the Fall Semester of 2023. Before every semester the ZU-community now has the possibility to choose from a pool of student submitted designs so that the label of each semester is representative for the universities culture. The beer his then sold predominantly to the initiatives that make zeppelin university so unique and distinctive. We operate on thin margins to ensure cheap prices for the aforementioned initiatives so that they can sell the beer at events to generate money for their cause. After receiving positive feedback from all stakeholders and selling over 8000 Beers of the first semester edition, we determined the new label through a Design Competition for the Spring 2024 edition „ZÜffl 2.0“. Here it is! We want to thank each and every person at Zeppelin University for their support. The Design Challenge for the third edition has already started and we are excited to see what the creative minds of our community will come up with!

Description:
Anjali.Tea est une marque d’infusions confidentielle, née du goût du beau, du bon et du vrai.

Fondée par Sophie Giran, formée à l’École Hôtelière de Lausanne et issue de l’univers du luxe et du bien-être, AnjaliTea s’adresse aux professionnels exigeants qui souhaitent offrir à leurs clients une expérience à la fois gustative, sensorielle et régénérante.

Nos recettes sont conçues comme des crus : des plantes bio, majoritairement françaises, associées à des mudras, aussi appelés “yoga des doigts”. 

Chaque infusion devient un moment d’ancrage, un geste simple transformé en expérience sensorielle.

Nos rituels de 10 minutes répondent aux besoins réels de vos clients : apaiser le mental, faciliter le sommeil, soulager les tensions, retrouver clarté ou énergie.

Toutes nos infusions sont 100 % bio, vegan et sans arômes ajoutés.

Nous privilégions les circuits courts et un packaging recyclable, pensé pour sublimer l’instant tout en respectant l’environnement.

Parmi nos créations les plus appréciées :

➜ Make a Wish : Hibiscus, Souci, Rose, Eucalyptus, Lavande + Anjali Mudra 

➜ Feel lignt : Romarin, Réglisse, Menthe poivrée, Pissenlit + Mudra Digestion

➜ Red Moon : Achillée millefeuille, Alchémille, Framboise, Cassis, Sauge + Mahatrika Mudra 

À découvrir sur : www.anjalitea.com

 Pour qui ? 

➜ Pour tous les amateurs d'infusions et de rituels. 

➜ Pour les hôtels, spas, concept stores, espaces de travail ou de ressourcement qui souhaitent proposer une offre sensorielle, durable et différenciante.

Offrir Anjali.Tea, c’est offrir bien plus qu’un thé : c’est créer une signature émotionnelle, un goût inoubliable, une expérience de bien-être alignée avec vos valeurs.

  Envie de faire découvrir nos rituels à vos clients ?

- Contactez-nous par e-mail : contact@anjalitea.com 
- Ou envoyez un message privé, directement sur Linkedin

Name: Bertolino is Coffee
Description:
Com a Fazenda Lírio do Vale localizada na cidade de Campos Altos em Minas Gerais, iniciou o cultivo e comercialização do café arábica na década de 70, tornando-se referência desde o início em café de qualidade e sabor inigualável.
Com propósito de resguardar e transmitir aos brasileiros o que temos de melhor em café arábica, nasce então a Bertolino is Coffee com objetivo de transformar o sonho em realidade, consumir o café que aqui é produzido, o verdadeiro café.

Nosso terroir é uma soma de características, estamos localizados em uma região previlegiada, na cidade de Campos Altos, Cerrado Mineiro, cultivamos nossos cafés em uma altitude de 1.200m com clima especial para o cultivo de cafés, clima seco além do solo regular, que assegura a melhor retenção de água durante as estações chuvosas, criando reservas para os períodos mais secos. Afeta diretamente no acesso das plantas aos nutrientes e minerais, trabalhamos sempre para proporcionar uma bebida mais que especial repleto de aroma e sabor.

A classificação dos grãos é realizada em três etapas ao decorrer do processo, sendo:

Separação dos frutos maduros (cereja) para secagem natural;

Classificação dos grãos já secos por meio de maquinário, selecionando somente os grãos sem defeitos, peneira 16+;

Separação pós torra, eliminando os grãos imperfeitos. (Quackers e Queimados).

Nossos perfis de torra foram desenvolvidos para extrair o máximo de sabor de cada grão a bebida. A cada safra é refeito os perfis de torra para que tenhamos uma igualdade de sabores e sensorias. Além de todo processo pós torra que realizamos testes para obter 100% de cada xícara.

Ao extrair o máximo dos nossos cafés especiais na torra, desde à acidez até a doçura em cada xícara, preocupamos em manter sempre o frescor de cada pacotinho. Com isso trabalhamos com o método "Just in time" de produção, proporcionando a verdadeira sensação de um café fresquinho e suave.

Name: Le Matin Patisserie
Description:
MATIN – MORNING IN FRENCH
Nothing beats the smell of freshly-baked pastries in the morning.

Founded in 2020 – Le Matin, or “the morning” in French is a French-inspired patisserie with an ever-evolving menu of unique pastries, expertly-crafted from exciting ingredients sourced from the world over.

Born amidst the turbulence of the 2020 epidemic, Le Matin Patisserie defied the odds and rose above the daunting challenges. With an unwavering determination, we embarked on a mission to redefine the world of viennoiserie and desserts, treating our cherished customers to an unparalleled artisanal experience.

Customers can expect signature French delights for brunch and dessert while dining in an elegant and welcoming space.

With a keen palate and a strong desire to push the boundaries of what pastry represents. He has honed his skills by working alongside world-renowned chefs – Adriano Zumbo (Adriano Zumbo Patisserie), Christopher Thé (Black Star Pastry), Peter Gilmore (QUAY), Andre Chiang (Restaurant Andre) and René Redzepi (Noma).

Name: Village Wholefoods Group
Description:
Village Wholefoods Group is the team behind a growing network of independent wholefood grocers and online platforms, all built around a shared commitment to good food, health, and sustainability.

It all started 10 years ago in East London, when Ahmet Sik opened a family run grocers in the heart of Victoria Park Village with the aim of bringing great produce and premium groceries to the local community. Since then, we’ve grown steadily — but we’ve kept that same ethos at the heart of everything we do.

Today, our group includes three London stores:
• Village Organic (Hackney E9)
• Village Wholefoods SW4 (Clapham)
• Village Wholefoods N1 (Islington)

As well as two online shops:
• WholefoodsBox.co.uk – fresh produce and an exciting selection of up-and-coming brands 
• NaturesHealthBox.co.uk – a one stop shop for supplements and vitamins

Across all parts of the business, we focus on high-quality, responsibly sourced products that support healthier lifestyles. We’re proud to still be independent, still growing, and still putting our customers first.

Name: You Are The Plant
Description:
You Are The Plant is more than a tea company — it’s a return. A return to the Earth, to traditional plant knowledge, and to the simple act of reconnecting with ourselves through nature.

We create herbal infusions and earth-based remedies that support balance, vitality, and everyday wellbeing. Our blends are crafted with care, using thoughtfully selected herbs, roots, flowers, and spices known for their traditional uses and subtle, energetic properties. Where possible, we choose organic and sustainably sourced ingredients, and we are continuously working toward increasing this commitment.

Whether you’re sipping a calming infusion as part of your evening ritual or seeking grounding support through the rhythm of the seasons, every blend is a gentle invitation: to slow down, to listen, and to remember that you, too, are part of the natural world.

Our inspiration is drawn from a rich tapestry of herbal traditions across cultures — from folk remedies to ancient practices — always approached with deep respect and curiosity.

At You Are The Plant, we don’t offer quick fixes. We offer connection. We believe in conscious choices, gentle nourishment, and the quiet strength that comes from living in rhythm with the Earth.

Because when we return to nature, we remember who we truly are.

Name: GFNation
Description:
When starting a gluten free diet for the management of inflammatory disorders & intolerance, its not uncommon to quickly realise how restrictive your diet becomes.

Feeling like all your favourite foods are gone makes grocery food shopping and eating out very overwhelming and perceptibly impossible, bringing on feelings of disappointment, stress, and anxiety.

There aren't many with the time & energy to shop hop in hope of finding suitable gluten free free.

Supermarkets, health & organic food stores and other independents stock a wide range of gluten free food products, but not all are low FODMAP approved as well, making the navigation of ingredients lists to assess suitability time-consuming & infuriating.

At GFNation, we’ve brought all your Coeliac and anti-inflammatory food needs together, all in the one place.

As beekeepers we know that every hive is unique, that every native plant, every region and every season creates honey with its own special signature. Rather than blending our honeys for consistency, we want to celebrate the incredible diversity of flavour that comes from our native forests in Aotearoa, New Zealand. Each small batch, artisan honey is produced by us or by dedicated beekeepers like us in hard to reach places, then packed in small runs to preserve its unique taste.
We are proud to bring you a range that will surprise, delight and inspire your customers with rare and unique honeys that they have never tasted before. Backed by international awards, independent testing, and focus on ethical and sustainable artisan beekeeping, you can rely on us to deliver a truly delicious range, which will evolve with new limited releases over time. This is a unique opportunity to present something truly special to your most discerning customers.
Each jar has a QR code that your customers can scan to find out exactly where their particular batch of honey has come from.

Name: Miller Farms
Description:
Founded in 1950, Miller Farms is a fourth-generation, community-driven business that believes Everyone Is Family. With humble beginnings selling eggs door to door, Earl and Margaret Miller prided themselves on listening to the needs of their neighbors and making time to help others.

The tradition lives on at our landmark location in Avon, Connecticut and beyond with our all-natural pet food brand, Oma's Pride.

Thanksgiving is our favorite holiday. Family. Friends. Food comas. And in the middle of it all...turkey! For over 70 years, we've brought people together with our signature Thanksgiving turkeys. Yes, over a million people have enjoyed a Miller Farms turkey since the 1950s. 

In 2020, we had to pivot and move the celebration and store online, while launching a new tradition called the Thankful Turkey, partnering with other multi-generational family farms to source the best turkeys in the country. 

Each purchase of a turkey and donation benefited Connecticut Foodshare, our local Feeding America food bank, to help alleviate the pressures of food insecurity.

Feeding 100,000 People in 2023

Since 2020, we have helped feed 200,000 people during the Thanksgiving holiday. This year for 2023, we aim to feed 100,000 people through direct turkey donations to Connecticut Foodshare, our local Feeding America food bank.

Join us in giving back by making a donation by purchasing turkeys for families in need, purchasing a Miller Farms fresh turkey for your family or loved ones, or thanking your employees by sending them a Miller Farms fresh turkey directly to their door.

All donations in the form of turkeys will be delivered directly to Connecticut Foodshare, our local Feeding America food bank.

Miller Farms Cares is the non-profit arm of Miller Farms and is a registered 509(a)(2) organization.

Name: Spacemilk
Description:
At Spacemilk, we’re building the next generation of nutrition—engineered not just for human performance, but for planetary survival.

Today’s food systems are outdated, unsustainable, and filled with compromises. From monoculture crops to inflammatory dairy, our nutrition landscape is broken. Spacemilk was born to correct that course.

We use advanced food technology to craft the world’s most efficient protein—derived from non-GMO yeast, perfected through clean, solvent-free processing, and designed for the human body. With superior amino acid bioavailability, zero allergens, and no environmental burden, Spacemilk isn’t grown. It’s precision-crafted.

Our mission is simple, but bold:
1. Create nutrition that strengthens and empowers.
2. Use production methods that can sustain Earth—and beyond.
3. Unlock the potential to nourish humanity anywhere.

From performance athletes and ethical consumers to future-forward explorers, we serve those who believe food can be better—smarter, cleaner, and designed for what’s next.

This is not just a product. It’s a movement.
The era of slow, extractive nutrition is ending. The future of food is here.

Sic itur ad astra. Thus is the path to the stars.

Name: Silkflair
Description:
Silkflair è un viaggio continuo alla scoperta delle migliori materie prime, selezionate per raccontare storie di tradizione, passione e innovazione. Ogni giorno scegliamo ingredienti unici, capaci di sorprendere e ispirare, offrendo nuove esperienze gastronomiche. Il nostro obiettivo è proporre prodotti di altissima qualità che permettano di esplorare la ricchezza di storia, tradizioni e sapori.

Ci impegniamo a far conoscere il vero valore degli ingredienti, esplorandone l'origine e le storie che li rendono speciali. Attraverso Silkflair, invitiamo a scoprire un modo di vivere la cucina che va oltre il gusto, abbracciando una prospettiva più consapevole.

Vogliamo diventare un punto di riferimento per chi cerca ispirazione nel mondo del cibo di qualità. Silkflair è sinonimo di scoperta e condivisione: guidiamo chi ha voglia di esplorare nuovi sapori e tradizioni, svelando ingredienti nascosti e dimenticati, accompagnando con discrezione in un percorso fatto di sapori che raccontano il loro passato e lasciano spazio a nuove interpretazioni.

Como herança, a nossa qualidade e sucesso no segmento foi um dos combustíveis para expandir a mesma proposta de qualidade e serviço para os demais setores que compõe a nossa loja. Com uma gama de produtos gourmertizado, o Bem Que Tem vem conquistando os corações apaixonados por culinária, por que sofrem por alguma restrição alimentar, por quem busca uma qualidade de vida alimentar mais saudável e claro... Por quem não abre mão de uma bom atendimento. O queridinho do Barreiro já faz parte da rotina da vida de BH e Região... E para o nosso objetivo fronteiras não nos LIMITA!

Our pesto's also feature Parmigiano Reggiano DOP, and fresh regional Italian ingredients. 

The combination of quality in terms of ingredients, flavor, and production process are what set Luca 1863 apart. Where traditional ingredients meet modern recipes - Luca 1863 is an essential for your pantry.

Name: Der Weinfleck
Description:
Der Weinfleck – Aus Liebe zu gutem Wein.

Bei uns geht es um Menschen, Herkunft, ehrlichen Genuss und nachhaltige Verantwortung.

Wir arbeiten seit Jahren eng mit kleinen, meist familiengeführten Betrieben in Europa: Winzer, Olivenbauern und Feinkost-Erzeuger, die mit Handarbeit, Erfahrung und Leidenschaft hochwertige Produkte schaffen. Wir kennen alle persönlich. Jeder Wein, jedes Olivenöl, jedes Produkt hat für uns ein Gesicht und eine Geschichte.

 Direkt & fair
Alle Produkte kommen ohne Zwischenhändler direkt vom Erzeuger. So sichern wir faire Preise für Erzeuger und Kunden.

 Nachhaltig & europäisch
Der Weinfleck hat sich auf Weine & Feinkost aus Spanien spezialisiert, vertreibt darüber hinaus aber auch Weine aus traditionellen Anbauländern wie Deutschland, Italien, Frankreich und Österreich. Kurze Transportwege, reduzierte CO₂-Belastung, keine Übersee-Importe. Nachhaltigkeit ist bei uns gelebte Verantwortung.

 Qualität statt Masse
Handwerklich hergestellte Produkte mit Charakter, Herkunft und Persönlichkeit – fernab industrieller Massenproduktion.

 Faire Preise
Direktbezug ermöglicht außergewöhnliche Qualität zu sehr fairen Konditionen – transparent und nachvollziehbar.

 Partner der qualitätsorientierten Gastronomie
Gastronomen schätzen unsere Beratung, Zuverlässigkeit, konstante Qualität und ergänzende Weinschulungen.

 Weinproben & Events
Zahlreiche Weinproben und Events in unserer Vinothek. Geschäftskunden buchen uns zudem für professionelle Verkostungen vor Ort.

 Gläservermietung
Vermietung von Wasser-, Sekt-, Weißwein- und Rotweingläsern für private und geschäftliche Anlässe.

 Vor Ort oder Online
Einkaufen in der Weinfleck Vinothek in Memmingen (Allgäu) oder im Onlineshop. Zur Abholung oder per Versand.

Wer kein Massenprodukt sucht, auf Nachhaltigkeit und Qualität großen Wert legt und Mitarbeiter treffen möchte, die von Weinbau und Herkunft wirklich etwas verstehen, wird im Allgäu beim Weinfleck in Memmingen fündig.

 WEINFLECK.DE

Name: Standard Proof Whiskey Co
Description:
Standard Proof Whiskey Co was “Born Behind the Bar” in Nashville, TN. Disrupting traditional retail and eCommerce spirits sectors one high quality craft whiskey bottle at a time. Our award winning whiskeys feature only the finest quality ingredients and are crafted with time and care. 

Standard Proof Whiskey Co. boasts two brick & mortar distillery tasting rooms for all your whiskey needs, from cocktails and group classes to private events and more. Our flagship location in Nashville, TN is conveniently located downtown near Broadway and the Ryman. Recently opened in Austin, TX, our second location can be found centrally in the Rainey Street historic district. Each venue is well equipped and great for corporate private events or just a fun night out. We offer a wide variety of decadent craft cocktails, from traditional standards to new cocktail creations, food and bottles and merchandise to go. Standard Proof Whiskey Co hosts a Whiskey Tasting & Cocktail Making experience too. Guests learn about the history of whiskey, receive a tasting flight and then get to make a variety of whiskey cocktails. 

Standard Proof Whiskey offers a great way to say “thank you” to your friends as well. Through our fulfillment partners, we conveniently ship our products directly to homes or businesses in 44 states across the U.S. Virtual tastings are a great way to bond with your team from afar too! 

Standard Proof Whiskey Co strives to be an excellent place for private events, fun nights out, and corporate team building. And if you can’t come visit us, we would love to serve you through our easy to use and convenient online store!

Name: Vinstokken.dk
Description:
Velkommen til Vinstokken.dk
- Spanske Vine af egen import

Bag Vinstokken.dk står Tom og Pia.
Vi har skabt Vinstokken.dk ud fra en fælles passion for god vin 
og en stærk forbindelse til Spanien hvor vi har boet i 5 år.
 
Hvorfor lige vin?
Det er ikke blot smagen, men teknikken bag vinene, der er fascinerende.
”Druen kan give tusinde forskellige smagsnuancer – alt afhængig af proces.
Der er så mange ting man kan skrue på, og ting man ikke er herre over, fx vejret, som har en kæmpe påvirkning.”

”Vores mission er at finde unikke og spændende vine fra nogle af de bedste vinområder. Vi vil sælge vine, der imponerer os!”, siger Pia.
Mange af vinhusene har vi selv besøgt og alle vine i sortimentet har vi selv importeret.
Vinstokken.dk er ikke kun for vinkenderen, men i høj grad også for den glade vindrikker.

Du finder letforståelige og overskuelige beskrivelser af vores vine.
På den måde kan du hurtigt se, om vinen matcher dine ønsker.
 
Hvis du stadig sidder tilbage med spørgsmål - så kontakt os endelig, så finder vi den rigtige vin i fællesskab!

Name: LACAVEDEDAVID
Description:
« Je veux des vins qui aient la gueule de l’endroit où ils sont nés… et les tripes de ceux qui les ont faits. »

En totale adéquation avec cette citation de Jacques Puisais, je suis parti faire le tour de France afin de vous dénicher des vins, des spiritueux et des bières authentiques et uniques. Chaque bouteille sélectionnée à LA CAVE de David est le reflet de son terroir et conte l’histoire des hommes et des femmes qui l’on confectionnée, pour le plus grand plaisir de nos papilles.
LA CAVE de David vous propose une sélection de quelques 250 vins, 80 spiritueux et 40 bières :

•	Français: la sélection est issue de la production locale et nationale. Pourquoi aller chercher des trésors ailleurs alors que nous en avons juste à côté ! Une petite exception faite sur les whiskys et les rhums, car il faut tout de même reconnaître le savoir-faire et l’excellence des Ecossais et Japonais pour le whisky et des îles pour le Rhum.

•	Bio: 97% de la sélection qui vous est proposée est issue de l’agriculture biologique et biodynamique. C’est un choix idéologique de ma part et ma mince contribution à préserver la planète et la santé des consommateurs. C’est également un parti pris gustatif. En effet les pratiques biodynamiques laissent d’avantage le sol s’exprimer ce qui confère au vin des subtilités organoleptiques, une minéralité exceptionnelle et des saveurs délicates et élégantes, sans pareil.

Que vous soyez néophytes ou érudits, gourmets ou juste gourmands, je vous attends, dans la bonne humeur, à LA CAVE de David afin de vous partager ma passion et de vous conseiller au mieux pour que chaque bouteille fasse de vos moments un instant inoubliable, de partage et de convivialité.

Name: Bleuzé Interfood
Description:
Fine food with a story is something Bleuzé has a nose for. Our own story starts in 1948 with the wish to spice up the post-war culinary landscape with impulses from French and Italian cuisine. Meanwhile, Bleuzé has become a leading regional delicatessen distributor, with premium delicacies from all corners of the world. 

Our customers, whether they are small groceries, trendy concept stores or famous supermarket giants are able to come to us for more than 2000 products we selected with care and passion. Name: JetFuel Energy
Description:
JetFuel Energy started with a clear vision. Thoughts and ambitions can linger, but it’s the audacious ones that take flight. Achieving greatness in daily life or in an intense workout, is about triumphing over those minor, daily obstacles. Everyone has aspirations, ambitions, and desires, but what steps are you taking daily towards their realization?

At JetFuel, we believe everyone has the potential for greatness. Our mission is to provide the tools to unlock it. Whether you're an athlete pushing the limits, an entrepreneur chasing dreams, or a student striving for excellence, JetFuel is your unwavering companion on your journey to success.

Our dedicated team wakes up every day with a fervent ambition: to ignite the energy in every individual seeking that extra push any time of the day from every walk of life. JetFuel is here to amplify your journey and transform your ambitious thoughts into achievements.

Name: Dicey's Spicy
Description:
Welcome to Dicey's Spicy, where passion for food meets fiery innovation. My name is Brian, and I am the proud creator of Dicey's Spicy. With a background in the food industry and a love for all things flavorful, I set out to shake up the traditional Russian dressing with a bold and spicy twist.

At Dicey's Spicy, we believe in the power of heat to elevate your culinary experience. Each bottle is crafted with care and attention to detail, ensuring a perfect balance of fiery flavors that will leave your taste buds tingling.

Join me on this flavorful journey as we explore new taste sensations and redefine the way you think about what condiment to use for your next meal. Thank you for choosing Dicey's Spicy – where every bottle is a testament to my passion for food and dedication to quality.

Name: BrewBar
Description:
BrewBar, jesteśmy wiodącą specjalistyczną firmą kawową, oddaną dostarczaniu wyjątkowych doznań związanych z kawą dla naszych cenionych klientów. Z pasją do najwyższej jakości ziaren kawy pozyskiwanych z różnych zakątków świata, cieszymy się z tworzenia unikalnych i smakowitych zaparzeń, które kuszą podniebienia. 

Obserwuj nas, aby być na bieżąco z naszą najnowszą ofertą kawową, wydarzeniami i współpracami. Bez względu na to, czy jesteś miłośnikiem kawy, koneserem, czy po prostu szukasz przyjemnego zastrzyku energii, BrewBar to doskonałe miejsce na zaspokojenie Twojej kawowej ciekawości. Dołącz do nas w tej podróży, w trakcie której nadal zmieniamy kulturowe podejście do kawy, filiżankę po filiżance.

Name: Ratios
Description:
At Ratios Bakery, we are passionate about crafting the finest artisanal baked goods in Cairo, Egypt. Our sourdough bread is our foundation, made using traditional techniques and our own unique 12-year-old wild culture starter. 

We offer a variety of sourdough bread, including baguettes, ciabatta, and focaccia, as well as a range of decadent pastries, cakes, and sweet and savory treats. We believe in using only the freshest and highest-quality ingredients we can find, and create everything from scratch in-house, ensuring that every bite is a taste of true artisanal quality. 

We are a must-visit destination for anyone who loves high-quality, artisanal bread and pastries. We pride ourselves on being local and an integral part of the Maadi, Cairo community.

Name: Cinnabon Philippines
Description:
The Cinnabon Story

It began in early 1985 when father and son team, Rich and Greg Komen, enlisted a master baker to create the world’s greatest cinnamon roll from scratch. After months of frustration and hundreds of failed attempts, the trio came up with the perfect mix combining the finest ingredients from across the globe. On December 5th, their sweet dreams became a reality as they opened the first Cinnabon bakery in Sea Tac Mall in Seattle to thousands of eagerly awaiting costumers. The original Cinnabon cinnamon roll topped with its signature frosting was an instant success, right out of the oven. America was hooked. Finally, a national treat that didn’t need a side of ice cream.

Cinnabon in the Philippines

The indulging aroma of Cinnabon has been in the Philippines since 1999 under the management of CANELLE FOOD CORPORATION (CAFCO), which holds the exclusive franchise of Cinnabon in the country.

The opening of the very first Cinnabon bakery at Robinsons Place Manila in October 1999, made a milestone as the very first Cinnabon Bakery in Asia.

As to date there are thirty four (34) Cinnabon bakeries in the country committed to baking the world’s most famous cinnamon rolls, using the finest quality ingredients and serving them to you hot, right out of the oven.

Name: Eleftheria Cheese
Description:
Eleftheria Cheese began in Mumbai in 2015 with one mission: to put India on the world cheese map. Today, it is recognised as a pioneer of artisanal cheesemaking in the country and a benchmark for quality.

Our cheeses have earned international acclaim, including multiple Gold and Super Gold honours at the World Cheese Awards. In 2023, one of our creations was ranked among the top five cheeses in the world in Norway, a first for an Indian creamery and a defining moment for the industry.

Eleftheria is a trusted and loved brand among leading chefs, luxury hotels, gourmet retailers and individual consumers across India. We believe that great milk makes great cheese and source high quality indigenous milk from small family farms in Maharashtra. We do not use preservatives, artificial additives or chemicals. Each wheel reflects a commitment to craft, flavour, culture and integrity.

Eleftheria stands at the intersection of craft, culture and conviction. We continue to champion Indian artisanal cheese, growing its appreciation at home and earning its place on international tables.

Name: CAFOCO Bars
Description:
We started CAFOCO when it wasn't trendy. We started CAFOCO when we saw a need for really healthy snacking. Because the food world had too much chemicals in their products. 

Then came the Drama. Too many buzzwords. Too many “no added this, no bad that.” 

We kept it stupidly simple.
Bars made from real ingredients you can pronounce - dates, nuts, cacao, plant protein. No sugar trickery. No lab-manufactured nonsense. No pretending to be anything we’re not.

Our bars don’t have perfect edges or glossy shine.
They have rough breaks, shorter shelf lives and nothing to hide.
Because real food isn’t built to last forever.

We’re not fluff-free. We’re just bullsh*t-intolerant.
And in a world full of borrowed buzzwords, turns out being the real deal is the best copy we’ve got.

That’s CAFOCO.
A clean snack trying to survive in a dirty food world.

Name: Spisa Food Market
Description:
Spisa Foodmarket - where culinary exploration meets Scandinavian tradition in the heart of Marbella. Our journey began with a simple mission: to cater to the discerning palates of Scandinavians living and visiting the area, offering them a taste of home in the vibrant
Spanish landscape. 

What started as a humble food market and deli has blossomed into a culinary haven - a food destination where gastronomic enthusiasts meet to explore a world of flavors. While our roots lie in Scandinavian cuisine, our shelves now boast an eclectic array of international delicacies, reflecting the diverse tastes and preferences of our global clientele.

At Spisa, we understand that Swedes are cosmopolitan in nature, always eager to explore new horizons and embrace different cultural influences. It’s this spirit of openness and adventure that drives
our ambition to not only satisfy the craving for traditional Swedish food but also to tantalize the taste buds with a tempting selection of global groceries and cuisines.

But Spisa is more than just a grocery store - it's a vibrant community hub, a place where food enthusiasts gather to celebrate the joy of good food and beverages. Our vision extends beyond mere
commerce - we're committed to fostering a culture of quality, authenticity, and culinary exploration.
As we continue to grow and evolve with new stores, our dedication to providing a unique culinary experience remains unwavering. Whether
you're a seasoned foodie or an adventurous eater, we invite you to join us in embracing a lifestyle where every meal is an opportunity to nourish both body and soul.

Welcome to Spisa – where every bite is a moment of pleasure, and every visit is a celebration of the art of living well.

Name: Billinghurst
Description:
Apertura Julio 2023. Bienvenido a nuestra vinoteca vanguardista, donde la pasión por el vino se encuentra con la modernidad. Con más de 500 etiquetas cuidadosamente seleccionadas de las mejores bodegas de toda Argentina, te invitamos a explorar un mundo de sabores y aromas inigualables.

Nuestra vinoteca joven es el lugar ideal para los amantes del vino y los curiosos que buscan nuevas experiencias. Aquí encontrarás una amplia variedad de vinos tintos, blancos, rosados y espumantes, todos ellos representantes auténticos de la rica diversidad vinícola de nuestro país.

Nuestro equipo de expertos en vinos está siempre dispuesto a brindarte asesoramiento personalizado, ayudándote a descubrir nuevas joyas enológicas o recomendándote la elección perfecta para cualquier ocasión.

Sumérgete en un ambiente moderno y acogedor mientras exploras nuestras estanterías repletas de etiquetas elegantes y atractivas. Organizadas cuidadosamente, te invitamos a recorrer las diferentes regiones vitivinícolas de Argentina, desde los renombrados viñedos de Mendoza hasta las sorprendentes bodegas de Salta y Patagonia.

Además, ofrecemos eventos especiales y catas dirigidas para que puedas profundizar tu conocimiento sobre el fascinante mundo del vino. Acompáñanos en emocionantes degustaciones donde podrás descubrir los secretos de los sabores y aprender a maridar diferentes vinos con exquisitos platos.

En nuestra vinoteca, la tradición se fusiona con la innovación, brindándote una experiencia única en cada visita. Te esperamos con las puertas abiertas para que puedas disfrutar de la diversidad y calidad de los vinos argentinos en un ambiente joven, moderno y apasionado.
