Para Pescados La Alondra, el valor de las relaciones a largo plazo es fundamental. Preocupados en promover la satisfacción y el bienestar de nuestra comunidad, tanto clientes, proveedores o colaboradores.

Además de su compromiso con la calidad, la sostenibilidad y el servicio al cliente, La Alondra tenemos una gran pasión por la gastronomía. Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de productos del mar, te asesoraremos en la elaboración de platos deliciosos y saludables.

En definitiva, en Pescaderías La Alondra trabajan con pasión y compromiso día a día para ofrecerte lo mejor del mar. Nos enorgullece ser una empresa vallisoletana que se preocupa por tu bienestar alimenticio ya seas cliente, proveedor o colaborador. Si quieres descubrir la calidad y el sabor de La Alondra, no dudes en contactar con nosotros.

Name: Mango Twist
Description:
A combinação dos maiores produtores e distribuidores de mangas a nível global, com um time de especialistas com experiência internacional em alimentos e bebidas, foram responsáveis pela criação do Mango Twist. Uma maneira inovadora para levar uma das frutas mais consumidas no planeta direto da fazenda ao consumidor. 
Mais que expertise em todas as etapas do plantio, seleção e transformação da fruta, somos uma equipe de apaixonados pelo sabor, a textura e o potencial nutricional da manga. Nós os TWISTERS, somos #mangolovers
Nossa produção é 100% própria, padrão exportação para as principais redes de varejo da Europa, EUA e Ásia. Nossa manga é cultivada no Vale do São Francisco seguindo exigências internacionais de sustentabilidade, qualidade e responsabilidade social. Os cultivares, ou tipos de mangas como Palmer, Keitt e Kent, estão entre as espécies mais valorizadas internacionalmente. 
Nossa equipe de alimentos e bebidas criou a Mango Twist para oferecer aos consumidores novas alternativas para o consumo da manga. Além de gostoso como a fruta de boa qualidade, queremos que seja saudável, que seja nutritivo e que seja uma experiência agradável. 
Acompanhamos as tendências dos consumidores que buscam mais opções de alimentos e bebidas como bowls, smoothies e snacks - formatos que trazem conveniência e praticidade para o consumo. 
Desenvolvemos centenas de receitas com base de manga. Em parte das receitas, o sabor da manga é protagonista, sendo combinado com outras frutas e ingredientes naturais.  Em outras receitas o sabor da manga é apenas coadjuvante levando doçura, textura cremosa e nutrientes saudáveis. 
A Mango Twist é exatamente isso...a mistura, a combinação, a explosão de sabores incríveis a partir da manga. Ou, para quem for consumidor-raiz da fruta natural, uma nova versão da manga no copo!

Name: FDA CAFÉS
Description:
À propos de FDA Cafés 

FDA cafés est une 𝐏𝐌𝐄 𝐟𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐬𝐩𝐞́𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐞́𝐞 𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐬 𝐥𝐚 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐛𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐟𝐞́ 𝐞𝐧 𝐈̂𝐥𝐞-𝐝𝐞-𝐅𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐮𝐢𝐬 𝟑𝟎 𝐚𝐧𝐬. Nous sommes fiers de mettre notre expertise et notre passion au service de nos clients pour créer la pause-café parfaite, adaptée à leurs besoins et à leur style de vie.

 Notre Mission 

Chez FDA Cafés, notre mission est simple : 𝐨𝐟𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐫 𝐚̀ 𝐧𝐨𝐬 𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞́𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐟𝐞́ 𝐞𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞. Nous croyons que chaque tasse de café mérite d'être savourée pleinement, c'est pourquoi nous nous engageons à fournir des produits de qualité, soigneusement sélectionnés auprès des meilleurs producteurs de café. Nous sommes déterminés à 𝐜𝐫𝐞́𝐞𝐫 𝐥𝐚 𝐩𝐚𝐮𝐬𝐞-𝐜𝐚𝐟𝐞́ 𝐪𝐮𝐢 𝐯𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐥𝐞, que ce soit au bureau ou à la maison.

 Notre Engagement Qualité

 Rejoignez-nous

Name: Bubbel Broeders
Description:
Bubbels. Misschien is een bubbel wel de meest overgewaardeerde en de meest ondergewaarde drank van Nederland. Of het nu gaat om de bekende Champagnes, de Cava’s of de minder bekende Franciacorta wijnen, wij Nederlanders hebben nog geen échte bubbel cultuur.

Waar in Italië “gewoon” een flesje bubbels wordt gedronken tijdens het diner, doen wij Nederlanders dat alleen met oud en nieuw of als er echt iets te vieren is. En als we dat dan doen, verwennen we onszelf niet met écht lekkere bubbels. Het wordt tijd dat we daar verandering in brengen. Het leven zou tenslotte elke dag een feestje moeten zijn!

Wij kiezen bewust niet voor de grote en bekende merken, maar werken samen met de kleine boeren die hun eigen druiven verbouwen, de oogst zelf verwerken en bottelen. Want daar zit echte ambacht in, en dat proef je.

Description:
Gate+ enables access into fresh, tasty & convenient meals at workplaces through re-defining the overall vending experience for everyone.

INNOVATIVE FOOD SOLUTION VIA SMART KIOSK NETWORK: 

A smart fridge stocked with fresh meals, salads, snacks and variety of other options; like a food store always available. Which you can open with your phone with just one click, then just grab and go. 

Gate+ offers seamless experience: Instant access into fresh and tasty food and smooth experience with zero contact. Besides, it helps you keep your people healthy, happy and motivated.

SMART, EFFICIENT & AI POWERED:

Smark kiosk placement, set up and maintenance is easy, no burden, no efforts on your side. The system learns the buying patterns of your users, predicts which food to deliver on a schedule and give automated orders that matches your location’s needs. 

Based on real-time data on smart kiosk network, we provide metrics and insights about user habits and productivity. And optimize constantly. 

EXPERTLY CURATED & RESPONSIBLY SOURCED: 

All items are expertly curated by Gate+ team and responsibly sourced from quality partners. We customize menu items and use dieatry recipes and labels including allergen-friendly, gluten-free, vegetarian, and many more.

GREAT FOR ANY SIZE, LOCATION & BUDGET:

Gate+ is an innovative food solution for any size, location and budget. Office spaces, medical centers, schools, factories, fitness studios and many more. 

Turn your location into a 7/24 fresh food destination.
Give your people better eating options.
Help them save time & money.

Let’s change how we eat together.

Name: Bi'OK et ses Jardins
Description:
Bi’OK est une PME 100% belge, qui a commencé son aventure en 2006 avec l’ouverture de son premier magasin bio à Thorembais.
Aujourd’hui, nous comptons 4 magasins et un beau terrain agricole de 8 hectares sur lequel nous cultivons avec amour et patiente des légumes de saison, des arbres fruitiers, mais aussi des ruches, petits animaux et d’autres surprises…

Avant d’être un magasin, Bi’OK est un engagement citoyen pour un plus grand respect de la nature et la dignité humaine.  
Nous accueillons les clients dans un lieu à l’ambiance conviviale où faire ses achats est un plaisir. 
Nous proposons des fruits et légumes, des produits frais, de l’épicerie et des cosmétiques de qualité, certifiés biologiques. Nous disposons également d’une large gamme de compléments alimentaires, de produits diététiques, de bien-être et d’entretien. 
Notre assortiment est sélectionné avec soin en privilégiant les produits locaux, issus de petites entreprises et dans la mesure du possible en vrac ou avec le moins de déchet possible.  

Générosité, passion, engagement, respect de la nature, joie de vivre… ce sont les moteurs de BI’OK. Toujours portés par l’enthousiasme et l’intuition !

RAY Health has a range of all-natural products. 
It is for those who wish to adapt and lead a healthier lifestyle. RAY Health is a one-stop solution for the calorie-conscious, diabetics, and everyone who loves to stay fit and healthy.

Name: iSpice Foods
Description:
Our journey began in the 1980s when my father discovered that dehydrating vegetables significantly extended their shelf life, a discovery that resonated globally. This led him to explore dehydrating various vegetables across China, aiming to use them as ingredients in fast foods and as spices.

Over the decades, we have built a reputation for innovation and quality, providing high-quality spices, dehydrated vegetables, and fruits. Recently, we have enhanced our offerings by providing one-stop product customization and collaborating with clients to develop market-leading products.

Our commitment to excellence has made us a trusted partner in the industry. We pride ourselves on our adaptability and dedication to meeting the evolving needs of our clients. Our goal is to become a global leader in the supply of spices and dehydrated food products, continuously delivering exceptional taste and quality. Join us as we bring the best flavors to tables worldwide.

We’ve teamed up with world-leading scientists to create something revolutionary.

Australia's first-ever cold brew protein coffee.

We’ve sourced the finest single-origin coffee beans for that clean caffeine hit and steered clear of artificial flavours, sweeteners, and additives.

This isn’t just about drinking coffee; it’s about redefining it.

Name: Jumbo Lange Leemstraat 145
Description:
Jumbo, daar het gebeurt het!

Werken bij Jumbo is meer dan zomaar een baan. Je wordt onderdeel van een bijzondere familie van mensen die samen willen ondernemen en winnen. 
Die durven te dromen en grote stappen nemen zonder vrees. Heb jij het Jumbo DNA in je?

Jumbo zet de klant op nummer één. Zo zijn we groot geworden. Want mensen helpen zit in ons DNA. Dat merk je in elke Jumbo supermarkt. Ook in België maken we boodschappen doen leuker, voordeliger en gemakkelijker. Eind 2019 openden we hier onze eerste winkels. En er is plaats voor nog meer Jumbo in het Belgische supermarktlandschap. Daarom zijn we op zoek naar supergemotiveerde medewerkers. Ben jij een échte mensenhelper? Dan rollen we voor jou de rode loper uit.

Waar staat Jumbo voor? Jumbo staat voor:
- Beste service + grootste assortiment x laagste prijzen waar de klant kan rekenen op de 7 zekerheden.

Door de klant altijd centraal te zetten is Jumbo één van de best gewaardeerde supermarkt ketens.

Niet voor niets is Jumbo al 16x uitgeroepen tot de beste supermarkt van Nederland. We streven ernaar om dit in België ook waar te maken.

Llama Mama is a delicious functional soda founded by two Latin American women. 
Our goal was to create a prebiotic and antioxidant tonic using Peruvian superfoods to support gut health and immunity. Other than being vegan, gluten free, non-gmo, ORGANIC and all it’s ingredients sourced through fair trade practices, Llama Mama was also born with a social mission. Name: Sobio Besançon
Description: Depuis sa création en 2005, So.bio participe au développement d’une Bio exigeante, transparente et juste sur tout le territoire français. Nos équipes travaillent au quotidien pour proposer des produits Bio les mieux adaptés à chacun d’entre vous. Dans nos magasins, nous privilégions en priorité les circuits courts et la production locale en tâchant de couvrir le plus possible l’ensemble de notre assortiment, soutenant ainsi l’économie locale pour vous garantir une alimentation saine et équilibrée. Chez So.bio, vous découvrirez un véritable marché composé d’un rayon traditionnel, d’un espace traiteur & crèmerie, pains à la coupe ainsi que des fruits et légumes frais livrés quotidiennement. Nous sélectionnons les meilleurs vins de nos régions, à retrouver dans notre cave bio avec un large choix pour tous les goûts ! Achetez malin, achetez en vrac ! C’est LA solution idéale pour alléger vos dépenses tout en respectant l’environnement. Notre rayon dédié au vrac propose plus d’une centaine de produits bios alimentaires et non alimentaires : des légumineuses en passant par du vrac liquide non alimentaire et cosmétiques solides. So.bio pense également à votre bien-être et vous invite à découvrir son espace Santé & Beauté : Soins naturels, produits cosmétiques bio, compléments alimentaires, conseils beauté… Nos spécialistes en diététique & esthétique, nos naturopathes, seront ravi(e)s de vous accompagner dans vos choix.

Name: Soulmate Spirits Ltd
Description:
Soulmate Spirits... find yours

Welcome to our world of premium award winning spirits.  Our journey started, like many great things, with a walk, a laugh, and a damn good glass of gin. 
We’ve raised glasses through life’s highs and lows - celebrating friendship, love, and everything in between. And somewhere on one of our many yomps through the Kent countryside, we had an idea: What if we could bottle not just flavour, but a feeling?

That spark became Say It With Gin, our first venture into artisan gin in the UK, with a personalised gifting twist. But what started with one bottle soon became a bigger calling — to create a craft spirits brand that speaks with real connection and thoughtful moments.

Today, we’ve evolved into Soulmate Spirits — a female-owned small-batch award winning distillery brand lovingly producing Cornwall gin, Cornwall vodka, and a whole lot of soul. Still just the two of us. Still proudly based in Kent. Still working with makers who share our standards and values.

Whether it’s a party or poured just because, shared with a soulmate or sipped solo - we’re here to make it meaningful.

IWSC 2025, Great Taste & The Gin Guide 2024

Name: Let Them Eat
Description:
Let Them Eat specialises in creating tasty, healthy, comforting vegetarian food for busy people.
TASTY
First and foremost, our food is tasty. Like really, really tasty. We know what we’re good at and we do it well. Thanks to our amazing chef (see above) we have perfected the art of making vegetables taste amazing and creating food combinations you won’t find anywhere else. Our customers always come back for more.
HEALTHY
Everything on our menu is free of preservatives and chemicals. It’s cooked from scratch using the best ingredients we can find. Over half of our products are vegan and dairy free. Many are also gluten-free. We focus on non-processed, high-protein food which is tasty and comforting.
LOCAL PRODUCTS
Like you, we want to know where our food comes from. So we work really hard to source as many local ingredients as we can, which we then hand-make into the amazing products you see in our stores. 
CONVENIENT
We know you’re busy, so our food is fast, easily eaten ‘on the go’ and our packaging makes it super transportable to take back to your desk, home or wherever you’re heading. If you’d rather have a quiet space to enjoy our food, relax in our store cafes and take your time. All of our products can be frozen and many enjoy a long shelf-life in the fridge, too.
SUSTAINABILITY
We want to take care of our environment as well as our customers. We do our bit by trying to avoid animal products in our food and using sustainable ingredients wherever possible. Our packaging is minimal and either recyclable or compostable. Even labelling is done with stamps, not stickers. Taking our food home? You’re welcome to bring your own reusable containers, if you like.

Name: Hidden Fruits
Description: Freshly frozen British raspberries hidden in two layers of Belgian chocolate. Made in London. Stocked in select M&S stores, Gopuff and Independents.

Name: Wine and More GmbH
Description:
Frei nach dem Motto "das Leben ist zu kurz, um schlechten Wein zu trinken", finden Sie bei Wine and More eine Sortierung feinster Tropfen.

Wir sind spezialisiert auf Weine aus Italien und Südafrika. Sie finden bei uns vor allem Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc und Insolia, aber auch Cabernet Sauvignon, Shiraz und Nero d’Avola, um nur einige zu nennen. Auf den persönlichen Kontakt zu den Winzern dieser individuellen Weinbetriebe legen wir sehr grossen Wert und besuchen daher jedes Jahr die Regionen, um die Weine zu testen.

Und die Preise? Auch da braucht es Geduld und Spürsinn. Dennoch gelingt es uns immer wieder, abseits der üblichen Spekulationsdynamik, vernünftige Erzeuger mit realistischen Preisvorstellungen zu finden. Dort kaufen wir gerne ein. 

Sie können den wechselnden Empfehlungen auch in unserem Shop folgen. Wir bieten Weine für jeden Anspruch an. Vom einfachen, verlässlichen "Gebrauchswein" bis zum erlesenen Tropfen finden Sie für jeden Anlass die richtige Flasche.

Name: Gin du Vully Sàrl
Description:
Notre Gin est élaboré artisanalement à base d'orge du Vully, cultivé et récolté dans le respect de la terre. 
Les plantes aromatiques du Vully, comme la feuille de vigne, l'ortie, le noyer et le romarin s'associent parfaitement aux baies de genévrier, aux agrumes et autres botaniques.

Epices et racines contrebalancent enfin magnifiquement le côté floral et végétal du distillat, en lui apportant une élégante touche de douceur et de caractère.

Amoureux de la région, nous avions à coeur de proposer un Gin qui nous ressemble et qui relève le "bon vivre" du Vully.

Name: Vin00s
Description:
Vin00s is the first media platform fully dedicated to non-alcoholic wine.

We connect the people shaping this fast-growing category, from winemakers and distributors to hospitality buyers, retailers, and curious drinkers discovering what’s next.

Non-alcoholic wine used to be overlooked: hard to find, hard to compare, rarely taken seriously. That’s changing fast, and Vin00s is helping drive that shift by making it visible, credible, and exciting.

Part review hub, part media agency, part community, Vin00s publishes honest reviews, video tastings, interviews, and industry insights through our podcast Non-Alcoholic Wine Celebrities, newsletter, and social channels.

We work with wineries, distributors, and hospitality brands that want to reach a new generation of drinkers. Advertising opportunities include sponsored placements, newsletter features, podcast segments, and creative collaborations that actually resonate with the alcohol-free audience.

The goal is simple: make it easy and inspiring for everyone to explore the world of wine, just without the alcohol.

We believe in Churning Tradition and Savouring Heritage, bringing authentic flavors and stories to modern lifestyles. Our reach spans flea markets, corporate tie-ups, gifting solutions, and D2C via our website, delivering across India—from Kashmir to Kanyakumari and Andaman to Anand.
Every product is a celebration of heritage, adapted for today’s convenience, without compromising authenticity. We’re just getting started—join us as we continue to make tradition relevant for the modern world.

Two of our brands have secured patents, supported by the Indonesian Agency for Creative Economics (BEKRAF), underscoring our dedication to fostering creativity and innovation within the industry.

It is our journey of driving business growth while leaving a positive impact on society. Welcome to explore our brands, engage with us on social media, and be a part of our mission to create a better world for all.

Name: Honorguard Coffee
Description:
At Honorguard Coffee, every bag of freshly roasted coffee fuels a mission far greater than just a great cup—it's about healing, hope, and honoring those who have served. We’re proud to say that with every purchase, our customers are directly supporting the training and placement of service dogs for veterans, offering life-changing support to the warriors who’ve given so much for us.

Rooted in the belief that business can be a force for immense good, Honorguard Coffee blends humble strength and approachability with a warm, action-oriented approach. We're not just a coffee company; we're a community driven by empathy, connection, and a shared mission to make a meaningful impact.

With our operations based in the Treasure Valley of Idaho, we’re committed to delivering exceptional coffee while supporting small businesses and fostering strong local relationships. Our mission wouldn’t be possible without our incredible customers, who have joined us in this journey to end veteran suicide, one service dog at a time.

Whether you’re a coffee lover, a supporter of veteran causes, or someone seeking a tangible way to make a difference, Honorguard Coffee welcomes you. Together, we’re creating something extraordinary—a future where every veteran can find the healing they need.

Join us in making a real difference, one cup at a time.

You can also enjoy delicious coffee, tea, vegan cakes, and side salads in the deli.
Minimal waste shopping of bulk foods has never been easier!

Bring your own container or use one of ours. You just fill your container with as much as you want and we’ll weigh it at check-out.

You will have instant access to information about the origin of the products while you shop. Each product label has a QR code that can be scanned with your mobile device. There you can read more about our selection criteria and more about each product, including recipes.

Name: Willards Kitchen
Description:
Come on in to Willards Kitchen, where everyone is welcome and simple, delicious, full-flavored food is always ready!

Chef and Owner Will Russell loves to create a fun, relaxing and chill kitchen and entertaining vibe for his guests and family. He brought this approach to his successful catering business and now wants to help you rock it in your kitchen with his three delicious and versatile rubs. 

Will developed his flagship All Purpose Seasoning to make his catering dishes fast, easy and consistently awesome. It became the foundation for his most popular recipes such as chicken, burgers, steak and veggies. Realizing the need for a more delicate touch in seafood and Mediterranean dishes, he created the Seafood Rub & Seasoning. Then, Will went back to his roots of comfort food and bold taste and created a unique rub with a smoky and robust flavor - Smoked BBQ Rub was born! On his recent travels to visit family in New Mexico, he fell in love with the New Mexico chili pepper and said "I HAVE to make a taco seasoning out of these," and BAM - Let us introduce you to the New Mexico inspired Taco Seasoning!

In his free time, you can find Will in his kitchen experimenting with new recipes, connecting with friends over a frosty beer or mixing a spicy jalapeño margarita for his amazing wife Natalie.

This ensures a fresh cup of coffee every time, the way it was meant to be! We offer a wide variety of roast profiles and flavors to fulfill your coffee needs. Name: Supergreen
Description:
Welcome to Supergreen, where we believe in the power of fresh, wholesome food to fuel your day and brighten your plate. Supergreen is dedicated to delivering quality salads made from carefully selected, nutrient-rich ingredients. We embrace vibrant flavors and a diverse range of ingredients to offer you a delicious and convenient way to enjoy a balanced diet.

Why Choose Supergreen?

Wholesome & Delicious: Our salads feature unique combinations of greens, superfoods, and toppings, thoughtfully crafted to provide a delightful taste experience and maximum nutritional value.
Convenience Meets Quality: Whether you're in need of a quick lunch or a satisfying dinner, Supergreen’s salads are designed to seamlessly fit into your busy lifestyle without compromising on quality.
Value: We believe eating well shouldn’t be costly. Our menu offers affordable options that don’t skimp on quality, ensuring your satisfaction and health are always a priority.
Beyond salads, we’re building a community centered on wellness. Whether you’re a regular or new to Supergreen, we invite you to join us on a journey toward healthier eating habits.

Experience the blend of convenience and nutrition at Supergreen. Thank you for choosing us, where good food meets convenience.

Name: Mantra Foods & Wellness
Description:
Established in 2009, Mantra Wellness started supplying the Mauritian wholesale and retail market with beauty and well-being products such as 100% Pure Essential Oils, Fragrances, Aromatherapy products such as Essential Oils, Bath soaps, Shampoo, Bath scrubs, Bath Bombs, and Diffusers.

As the years progressed, we noticed that our customers were changing their eating habits and were looking for more natural and organic alternative to their groceries as they wanted to move towards a more positive and healthy diet with real benefits. With that idea in mind and the increased demand in natural and organic product, we grew to increase our range of product. Today, Mantra Wellness has transformed from a pioneer concept to Mauritius’ leading retailer of organic and natural products. We offer fresh non-perishable produce, groceries, baby and children's needs, beauty and wellness and household products from the most ethical organic producers around the world. We also supply to many of Mauritius’ organic retailers, restaurants and hotels.

Name: Vivis Pryd
Description:
Vivis Pryd ønsker at øge interessen for økologiske fødevarer, der er produceret lokalt med respekt for årstidens variation.

I gårdbutikken sælges der økologiske æg samt frugt og grønt der er dyrket på vores økologiske landbrug i Herluflille. 

Landbruget er et økologisk landbrug, hvilket betyder hakkejern og aldrig pesticider. 
For os er det vigtigt, at vi passer på dyrene og miljøet.

I gårdbutikken finder du altid hjemmelavet syltetøj, sirup og saft af vores bær, sennep med vores honning og honning som vi slynger og tapper 2 gange om året.

Galleriet udstillinger Vivis malerier, men også gårdbutikken prydes af de flotte malerier. Malerierne er moderne kunst tit i stærke farver og figurative, naturalistiske motiver. Malerier kan også købes i webshoppen på https://www.vivispryd.dk.

Name: AMANDOTE
Description:
AMANDOTE nació en el año 2018 con la propuesta de desarrollar mates que cuiden el organismo y le aporten beneficios. El proceso de producción es 100% artesanal. 

Desde AMANDOTE queremos también dar a conocer nuestras costumbres, así fué que desarrollamos nuestra fórmula para el primer y único MATE DE TÉ del mercado.

El MATE DE TÉ  proviene del Sur de la Provincia de Entre Ríos, es una mezcla de hierbas, frutas y flores (sin yerba mate) que se toma principalmente como mate  (o se puede consumir como té o bebida fría). Es un mate bajo en sodio que activa el sist. digestivo, aporta Calcio, Magnesio, Hierro, Potasio, Fósforo y Rutina.

Por otro lado, tenemos nuestra linea de BLENDS DE YERBA MATE, utilizamos yerba de corte grueso, sin palo ni polvo y con secado Barbacuá. DULCE CONCEPCIÓN con pétalos de rosas damascenas, té verde y está endulzada naturalmente con hojas de Stevia. BENDITO AMARGO con cedrón y menta y 4 ESTACIONES endulzado naturalmente con Stevia y sabor naranja.

The bottom line? It's always cold-pressed, always single-source, and always certified organic. No exceptions.

Here, we made you something.

Name: Orra Spices
Description:
Orra Spices is a company that was established in 2022, but has a rich history dating back to 1927, when its ancestor was founded as a traditional masala and dry fruit business in Old Delhi and Peshawar. Led by a team of young entrepreneurs, Orra was created to preserve authentic flavors while adapting to modern needs. The company has since expanded into a group of companies with diverse product offerings and a global presence.

Orra is headquartered in Delhi and operates across several North and Western Indian states, including Haryana, Gujarat, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh, and Uttarakhand. These regions are known for their high-quality tea, spices, and herb plantations. With the help of over 5000 dedicated farmers, Orra is able to source and supply spices, tea, and herbs of exceptional quality, delivered on time and with remarkable consistency.

Orra attributes its success to the hard work of farmers who have tended to the plantations for generations, and it is committed to promoting sustainable development and good agricultural and manufacturing practices, as well as improving working conditions.

Name: Drink Heti
Description:
Heti means "Home" in the Dakota language, an homage to the founders grandfather. 

Heti beverages are low dose hemp derived drinks created to give you a sense of place by celebrating the plants around us. These botanical, non-alcoholic, microdose drinks are designed to transport you to a place in nature. Connecting with plants is proven to give us the feeling of calming connection. Heti Products are all natural seltzers infused with flavors Indigenous to North America such as cranberry, sumac, dandelion, rosehip, wild mint, and black currant. Created with the intention to taste each plant flavor. Not overwhelming sweetness, but instead just enough. The taste of nature, deliciously evoking a sense of belonging. We will never use refined cane sugars. Intentionally, we use natural sweeteners such as maple, agave, and honey.

We are focused on giving back to the Veteran & first responder communities by donating a portion of our profits to The Veterans Connection, a 501 (c)(3) non profit focused on Veteran & First Responder mental health & suicide prevention.   

Untreated mental health conditions such as Post Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD), depression, and anxiety are a significant disabler for the Veteran and first responder population. Raising awareness to these epidemics is important. Finding ways to stem the tide is even more so. 

Check out our products and learn more about our mission at: 22salute.com

Must be 21+ to follow. Drink & share responsibly.

We are passionate about offering high-quality products that evoke cherished memories and create new ones for generations to come. Whether you're reminiscing about the sweets you enjoyed as a child or introducing these timeless classics to your own family, we are here to make every moment special.

Existimos para matar a fome de todos, a qualquer hora e na refeição que você preferir, sempre entregando sabor e qualidade ao seu prato

Name: FARM SHOP
Description:
Before the COVID-19 pandemic, Le Sherpa Farmers Market had become the social rendezvous of Kathmandu on Saturday mornings, where people connected over fresh produce and artisanal goods. Customers often asked us to extend market hours, open new locations, or offer the incredible products from our small local vendors every day. Inspired by this demand, our management team began exploring the idea of creating a Farm Shop.

Then, at the end of March, everything changed. The city lockdown and social distancing regulations forced us to temporarily suspend the market, as the country faced the challenges of the COVID-19 pandemic.

Rather than seeing this as a setback, we saw it as an opportunity to innovate. In response, Le Sherpa launched a virtual marketplace for local produce, maintaining our connection with customers and continuing to support our vendors through this challenging time. What started as a temporary solution quickly evolved into something much more—a thriving, multi-faceted Farm Shop that seamlessly blends the best of physical and online shopping, providing fresh, local goods to the community every day.

Name: Bravory Bakehouse
Description:
At Bravory Bakehouse, our mission is to honor courage, empower resilience, and inspire community—one handcrafted treat at a time. By creating opportunities for military spouses and first responders, we aim to blend exceptional products with a purpose-driven business model that fosters connection, gratitude, and strength.

Bravory (brav•ory): (noun): The unique combination of bravery and valor, defined as the exceptional courage and moral strength to confront challenges with both bold action and noble purpose. It encapsulates the fearless pursuit of what is right and just, often for the benefit of others, reflecting both personal resilience and selfless dedication.

This new word signifies not only acting with boldness but doing so with honor and integrity, blending the spirit of bravery with the principled essence of valor.

Name: Herbal Cacao
Description:
We are Herbal Cacao, Europe’s leading ceremonial cacao brand for powerful herbal blends rooted in Indigenous wisdom and modern holistic wellness.

Created in sacred partnership with Indigenous Maya communities in Guatemala and Belize, our ceremonial cacao is more than a drink, it’s a sacred medicine. Each blend is infused with functional mushrooms, adaptogenic herbs, and ancestral intention to support self-love, daily ritual, and spiritual connection.

From lion’s mane for mental clarity, to chaga for immune resilience, and blue lotus for inner calm. Whether you seek emotional clarity, heart-opening presence, or nervous system balance,  our cacao guides you home to yourself, every cup invites you to slow down, tune in, and feel, 1-sacred sip at-a-time.

We are on a mission to help people across Europe return to ritual, heart-centered living, and embodied holistic wellness — one heart-opening sip at a time.

 Discover the blends: www.herbalcacao.com
 Join our free online community: https://herbal-cacao-community.mn.co/spaces/10308003?utm_source=manual

Our mission is to empower holistic wellness through our medicinal ceremonial cacao blends, created for daily rituals that cultivate a deeper sense of self-love.

Through our unique, powerful blends, we invite you to join us on this transformative path toward a conscious and healthy lifestyle. 

Together, we are co-creating a conscious new world of heart-centered living, empowering self-love one sip at a time.

Onder het mooiste van ItaIië verstaan we onze heerlijke delicatessen, maar ook de streek waar onze mooie producten vandaan komen. Onze producten zijn uniek en puur Italiaans, sommige zelfs rechtstreeks uit de ‘laars’.

- Olijfolie extra vierge, pasta, pesto of wijn
- In een doos, op een houten plateau of in een mand

Description:
Os Supermercados Romancini são uma rede de supermercados que conta com cinco empresas distintas para atender às necessidades dos clientes. Com mais de 23 anos de história, essa rede se tornou uma referência no setor varejista.

O Romancini Vera é reconhecido por sua dedicação em oferecer produtos frescos e de qualidade, como frutas, legumes, carnes e produtos de padaria. Os clientes podem encontrar alimentos saudáveis e de origem confiável nessa empresa.

A Romancini Matriz é a loja principal da rede, que oferece uma experiência completa de compra. Com um amplo espaço e setores organizados, a loja possui uma variedade de produtos, desde itens básicos de mercearia até produtos de cuidados pessoais e limpeza.

O Romancini Super Prático foi projetado com foco na praticidade e conveniência. Com um layout otimizado, os clientes encontram uma seleção de produtos essenciais de forma rápida e eficiente. Essa loja é ideal para compras rápidas.

O Romancini Restaurante é uma extensão dos supermercados, oferecendo refeições prontas e lanches rápidos. Com um cardápio diversificado que inclui pratos quentes, saladas, sanduíches e sobremesas, o restaurante atende tanto aos clientes que buscam uma pausa durante as compras quanto aos que desejam alimentação fora de casa.

Por fim, o Supermercado Verdão é parte integrante dos Supermercados Romancini. Com uma variedade de produtos alimentícios e não alimentícios, essa loja atende a uma clientela diversa. Com preços competitivos e um ambiente agradável, o Supermercado Verdão é uma opção popular para compras em grande escala ou do dia a dia.

Ao longo dos anos, os Supermercados Romancini se destacaram por sua dedicação em oferecer produtos de qualidade, variedade e excelente atendimento aos clientes. Com suas cinco empresas, essa rede se tornou uma escolha confiável para as necessidades de compras dos consumidores.

Name: Puffles
Description:
At Puffles, we are committed to bringing Hong Kong egg waffles to the South Florida community with a modern twist. Not only are we introducing one of Hong Kong’s most famous street snacks to foodies in the States, but we are also injecting our own spin to the cultural phenomenon. Hong Kong egg waffles, also known as "Gai Dan Jai", are crispy on the outside yet soft and sweet on the inside. Individuals are able to customize their own waffle cone with choices from our wide selection of ice cream flavors and toppings. 

To complement these signature waffles, Puffles also serves bubble tea that is made to order using only the best ingredients sourced from Taiwan. Bubble tea was originally created by mixing black tea with milk and adding tapioca balls (bubbles, boba, pearls) to tie the drink together. At Puffles, we are committed to bringing the best and freshest bubble tea in the area. Our teas are brewed daily, using only loose tea leaves to release the full flavor of the leaves. The tapioca pearls are also cooked in our kitchen throughout the day to maintain the quality and texture of the pearls. These tapioca pearls have a shelf life of only four hours to ensure that it has a chewy consistency with the sweet taste of honey. It can be added into your choice of beverage to elevate your drinking experience to the next level. At Puffles, you can choose between milk tea, fruit teas, or slushes to satisfy any craving you might have. Toppings range from tapioca pearls and popping bubbles (an explosion of flavor caused by the burst of the bubbles) to different types of jellies. With all these options, we hope you can find the bubble tea drink that is perfect just for you!

Van visie tot resultaat, dankzij onze straight line aanpak: gestructureerd, resultaatgericht en commercieel doordacht.

ONZE MISSIE
We willen bedrijven helpen om met goesting én efficiëntie te blijven ondernemen. Met een duidelijke aanpak en een goed doordacht plan begeleiden we trajecten van A tot Z — met een minimum aan tijdverlies en een maximum aan impact.

We geloven in efficiëntie met empathie, in rendement met respect voor mens en merk.

ONS NETWERK
Onze kracht zit in jarenlange samenwerking binnen het Prik&Tik-netwerk en nauwe relaties met belangrijke stakeholders zoals:

- Drankenleveranciers
- Mediabureaus
- Juridische kantoren
- Innovatieve technologiepartners in de sector

Dit stelt ons in staat om niet alleen strategisch mee te denken, maar ook operationeel te schakelen.

WERKEN MET ONS?
Of je nu een brouwerij, distributeur of partner bent in de drankenindustrie — we helpen je om sneller en sterker vooruit te gaan.

C’est tout naturellement qu’elle a poursuivi des études de Commerce International avec toujours comme fil conducteur, le commerce des vins. Après avoir « fait ses armes » au sein du négoce familial, elle a mis l’expertise ainsi acquise au service du distributeur national France Boissons. Mais la fibre familiale entrepreneuriale l’a rattrapée… C’est ainsi que Les Vins de Mathilde ont vu le jour.

Nous vous proposons ainsi une large gamme de vins qui sauront répondre à vos différents besoins et envies. Vous trouverez également un conseil professionnel et un accompagnement passionné dans votre choix.

Un travail permanent de recherche de nouveaux flacons, à faire découvrir aux amateurs et initiés, est mené.

This will ensure that you experience the maximum taste and flavour in your tea. And in the case of Rooibos, you are sure to get the most from its powerful natural antioxidants.

This is why we only sell loose-leaf Espresso-Ground Rooibos Blends – perfect for your Espresso machine, plunger or stove-top Moka Pot.
For ease of use and a full-bodied Rooibos experience, nothing beats our delicious and flavourful Rooibos Espresso Capsules, fully compatible with any Nespresso Machine.
If convenience is your thing, then try our great tasting Instant Rooibos Cappuccino and Instant Chai Latte.

So, say NO to tea bags and caffeine, and create your own healthy and flavourful Rooibos Cappuccinos and Lattes with our range of REDBREW Rooibos products!

With Rooibos Love,
REDBREW

Name: The Juice Laundry
Description: The Juice Laundry was founded on the concept of keeping our bodies clean and healthy, starting with what we put into them. Whether juiced, blended, or eaten whole, fresh produce is full of life-giving nutrients and enzymes. We choose to use 100% organic ingredients, 100% of the time, because the phrase “organic when possible” is often highly misleading. If we can’t find something organic on a given day, it won’t be on our menu. That’s our commitment to you, and to your health. Thanks for checking us out!

Name: UJJWALBHAARAT
Description:
Ujjwal Bharat is a multi-vendor marketplace designed to empower India’s local economy by bringing farmers, small businesses, service providers, and consumers onto one inclusive platform. Unlike conventional e-commerce, Ujjwal Bharat integrates online convenience with offline accessibility, ensuring that rural and semi-urban communities also benefit from the digital revolution.

The platform follows a farm-to-table model, helping farmers and producers get fair prices while delivering fresh, affordable products directly to customers. At the same time, it supports local vendors and shops by expanding their reach beyond traditional boundaries. Beyond products, Ujjwal Bharat also enables essential services such as housekeeping, appliance repair, healthcare assistance, and more—making everyday living simpler and more reliable.

A unique feature of Ujjwal Bharat is its community-driven income model. Franchise owners, vendors, and even customers can earn through referral and passive income opportunities, creating a cycle of shared prosperity.

Our vision is to build a self-sustaining and inclusive ecosystem that contributes to the dream of Aatmanirbhar Bharat—a brighter, stronger, and self-reliant India where growth and opportunities are accessible to all.

Name: champagne.zuerich
Description:
Hier können Sie exzellente Champagner kaufen und profitieren von einem enorm breiten Sortiment von über 140 verschiedenen Winzer- und Marken-Champagner. Sie finden hier Champagner von Winzerpersönlichkeiten, von Freaks, Tüftlern und wahnsinnigen Genies, die unter Achtung der Natur mit ihrer eigenen Handschrift auf höchstem Niveau Champagner produzieren.

Love

In einer Welt der Ungewissheit, die jeden Tag mehr und mehr gespalten wird, gehören wir zu denjenigen, die glauben, dass die Welt – wie das Glück – besser ist, wenn man es teilt. Wir glauben an die Liebe und das die Liebe zu anderen auch die Liebe zum Leben ist. Die Liebe zum Teilen, zum Zusammensein, zum glücklich machen von unseren lieben Freunden und die, die es noch werden wollen. Dafür stehen wir und dies fördern wir.
Unser Ziel

Wir haben uns zum Ziel gesetzt Ihnen die Hemmschwelle dieses absolut göttlichen Getränkes so niedrig wie nur immer möglich zu halten, so dass auch Sie in den Genuss von Weinen kommen, welche Sie im Supermarkt nicht finden. Und warum finden Sie diese Weine kaum im Handel? Weil Sie in so geringer Zahl produziert werden, dass es dafür schlicht weg nicht reicht.

Hier finden Sie zum Teil Weine, von denen keine 3500 Flaschen produziert wurden, genau so wie biologisch oder biodynamisch produzierte Champagner. Auch dies ist eine Seltenheit und machen lediglich 2% aller in der Champagne produzierten Cuvées aus.

Lassen Sie sich von uns inspirieren und überzeugen Sie sich selbst, dass man zum Champagner trinken weder einen Nerzmantel noch affektiert am Cüpli-Glas nippen müssen, sondern das guter Champagner enorm viel Spass macht und regelmässig getrunken werden sollte. Sie haben es sich verdient!

Name: Zia Hatch Chile Company
Description:
Zia Hatch Chile Company supplies authentic Hatch Chile products to retailers and chefs nationwide.

New Mexico is recognized as the “Chile Capital of the World”. New Mexico Chile, harvested once per year in the fall, is predominantly grown in Southern New Mexico due to its high altitude, dry climate and rich soil.

We set out on a mission to bring Hatch Chile, in a shelf stable format, to those those with similar stories who lost a piece of home, those who desire a healthy lifestyle, and those who want to curate meaningful culinary experiences; in turn introducing the incredible, region specific crop to the nation.

Our Founder Nate’s story, coming from a family of 17 aunts and uncles in New Mexico and being weaned on Hatch Chile out of the bottle, is the same as so many others around the nation who moved away from home to places where their beloved food doesn’t exist. When that happens, you feel like you’ve lost a piece of home and your soul.

Zia was introduced to share the flavor of New Mexico with consumers across the country.

Name: Just You & Coffee
Description:
Unsere Mission ist es Menschen wieder mehr dazu zu bewegen innezuhalten und zu reflektieren. Das alles bei einem leckeren Kaffee, unabhängig ob mit oder ohne Koffein damit du deine Momente zu jederzeit kreieren kannst. Dabei wollen wir faire Arbeitsbedingungen sicherstellen und den Einfluss auf die Umwelt so gering wie möglich halten. 

Wer oder was ist eigentlich "Just You & Coffee"? Im Prinzip ist es ganz einfach: Bei uns geht es um dich und dem Moment für dich, den du mit deinem frisch gebrühten Kaffee in der Hand kreierst. 

Sei es ein sonniger Morgen, der nur dir gehört. Den du mit dem Kaffeeduft in der Nase und der Tasse in der Hand, auf deinem Balkon oder einfach auf deiner Couch startest. Oder deine Pause am Nachmittag mit Kollegen, mit denen du über die Themen sprichst, die euch außerhalb der Arbeit bewegen. Jeder Moment kann ein Moment des Innehaltens und Entschleunigens sein und daran wollen wir bei "Just You & Coffee" erinnern.

Name: Monkey Hanger Co
Description:
When it comes to legendary coffee, we don't monkey around. 

Not all coffees are equal and at Monkey Hanger we are proud of our passionate producers, and stand with them in giving you our specialty-grade coffee beans. Grown at high altitudes and only handpicked when ripe with flavor, our beans are then carefully processed and freshly roasted by our dedicated craftspeople to produce coffee that has bags of character and complexity. Monkey Hanger coffee has been scored 80 and above out of 100 and is graded as ‘Specialty Coffee’ according to the exacting standards of the SCA (Specialty Coffee Association).

All Monkey Hanger coffee is ethically produced, traded and the farmer is fairly compensated. We recognize the passion and dedication that goes into producing the best quality beans and are committed to supporting our producers. Our specialty-grade coffee goes beyond ethical certifications such as Fair Trade and Rainforest Alliance. In fact, when it comes to our dedicated growers and producers we go the extra mile to ensure they get paid a higher price.

All Monkey Hanger coffee is craft-roasted to order in Southern Califonria and delivered to you at its peak freshness, ready to enjoy.

Our coffee range includes single-origin and blends, in 12oz, 2-lbs., and 5-lbs. bags, as well as single serve pods. Choose whole bean or your preferred grind size. We offer corporate gifting, including bulk discounts, custom packaging and direct to recipient shipping, and we welcome wholesale opportunities.

Contact us with questions, feedback or just to say "hiya" at hiya@monkeyhanger.co.

Name: Delaunay Léveillé
Description:
Delaunay-Léveillé voit le jour en 1840, Rue Marbeuf et Place de la Madeleine, à Paris.

la famille Delaunay et la famille Léveillé, toutes deux origines de Normandie, se joignent pour former la maison familiale Delaunay Léveillé. A ses débuts, l’entreprise est spécialisée dans le commerce de volailles et de gibiers des régions de France : Houdan, Bresse, Vendée, Pauillac… Au fil des années, elle devient la référence en la matière ! En quête de mets authentiques et délicats, le Tout-Paris vient d’ailleurs y côtoyer l'excellence.

A cette époque on voit émerger les premiers guides culinaires, qui reconnaissent volontiers l’exigence de la qualité, dont fait preuve la maison depuis sa fondation. Allant jusqu’à lui attribuer certaines des plus hautes récompenses culinaires !

De génération en génération, l’entreprise familiale fait évoluer ses produits, en plaçant toujours au centre de son développement les valeurs de la tradition et du savoir-faire français. Près de deux siècles plus tard, ce n’est plus la volaille et le gibier, mais la confiserie et la biscuiterie qui font de Delaunay Léveillé, un acteur incontournable des produits régionaux français !

Nos produits sont présents partout dans les régions de France, et aussi à l'étranger. 

Toute notre équipe travaille pour proposer les meilleurs produits possibles et honorer la volonté de proposer des produits qualitatifs dont nous sommes fiers.

Félix Delaunay

Name: Asha Tea House
Description:
There is a cup of tea out there for everyone, whether it's a simple cup of straight tea, or a crafted glass of flavored tea. At Asha, we strive to feed (or cultivate) this love for tea by serving you high-quality tea drinks made with fresh, pure and real ingredients.

But we also know that drinking tea isn't just about the drink--it's also about where you drink it and who you drink it with. Which is why we designed every element of our Berkeley tea house, from the open communal table and cozy booth seating to the loyalty program and friendly customer service, to maximize your tea-drinking enjoyment.

"Asha", after all, is Taiwanese for "someone that enjoys life", and our hope is that drinking Asha Tea will remind you of the things you enjoy about life.

Asha Tea House was founded and is operated by David and Diana L. The two were inspired by how Starbucks revolutionized the coffee industry by creating a "third home" for coffee lovers, and envisioned a place like Asha for tea lovers.

Asha has been operating as an online store since September 2011, and recently opened a brick-and-mortar storefront in Berkeley, CA in July 2012.

Nous souhaitons permettre à tous les lyonnais de consommer des boissons de qualité produites localement et en bouteilles consignées. Le réemploi permet d'éviter jusqu'à 79% d'émissions de CO2 par bouteille, ce n'est pas rien! 
A la façon des paniers de légumes, nous vous proposons de composer votre assortiment de boissons du quotidien (eau, lait, jus, bières, vin...) et de recevoir votre panier chez vous à la fréquence que vous aurez choisi. Name: Mitra Otte
Description:

Mitra behoort tot de grootste drankenspeciaalzaken van Nederland, met een enorm assortiment aan dranken en alles wat daarmee te maken heeft. Of het nu gaat om een mooi speciaal bier, een sublieme wijn, een stoere borrel of een exquise cognac, bij ons ben je aan het juiste adres!

Ook voor non-alcoholische dranken!

Bij Mitra kom je niet alleen voor de drank(en). Wij zijn ons ervan bewust dat je vaak met vragen zit die met onze dranken te maken hebben, zoals ‘welke wijn schenk ik bij mijn diner?’ of ‘kan ik bier drinken bij een zoet dessert?’. 

Wij hebben een uitstekende kennis van dranken met alles wat daarbij hoort en adviseren je graag!

Ook voor een cadeau kom je naar Mitra. Of het nu voor een verjaardag, jubileum of ‘zomaar’ is, we maken er met professionele materialen een verrassend geschenk van. Zelfs via onze webshop kunnen we jouw geschenk op de juiste wijze inpakken.

Elk jaar organiseren wij zo’n duizend proeverijen, waar we onze kennis met jou delen. Je kunt bij ons ook terecht voor al jouw feesten, partijen en evenementen en we kunnen je adviseren over de juiste invulling van jouw feest. Privé of zakelijk, we staan graag voor je klaar! 

Mitra schenkt!

Name: Activ Hippy
Description:
Activ Hippy is a lifestyle wellness brand built on one powerful idea: India doesn’t struggle with awareness; it struggles with compliance.
People have the intent to be healthier, but they don’t find finishable nutrition formats. And if it doesn’t finish, it doesn’t repeat. If it doesn’t repeat, it doesn’t scale.
That’s why we designed a new behaviour-fit format for modern India: 60ml functional wellness shots that deliver energy, clarity, gut support, endurance, and daily balance in a 3-second ritual.
No mixing, no dilution, no fridge, no confusion. 
Just open → finish → feel better.
Built for students, officegoers, athletes, founders, creators, commuters, and anyone who needs instant wellness without complexity, Activ Hippy transforms supplementation into a familiar, tasty, finishable experience that fits real life, not idealised routines.
Our shots behave like beverages but perform like supplements: a perfect blend of flavour, convenience, portability, and functionality. Each variant is crafted with clean, science-backed ingredients, including natural caffeine, multivitamins, ginger, curcumin, electrolytes, Shilajit, Ashwagandha, prebiotic fiber, and antioxidants.
As India enters a preventive-health decade with rising demand for functional foods and instant wellness rituals, Activ Hippy is building the category’s most scalable advantage:
A finish-first format that aligns with real human behaviour.
Our mission is simple: To create India’s most finishable wellness habit, one 60ml shot at a time.
Learn more: https://activhippy.com/

Name: natrl box water
Description:
One solution won’t fit all

We all know that plastic water bottles are bad for the environment, but it's hard to find a sustainable and practical alternative that works for everyone. 

Millions of plastic water bottles are produced each year and most of them end up in our oceans and landfills. Plastic takes centuries to decompose, so this is a huge environmental problem.

natrl box water is a new solution to support people who want to use quality natural mineral water and cut out plastic bottles. The UAE currently only has desalinated or distillation options for simple drinking water, and not everyone is comfortable with drinking chemically treated tap water. If we want to consume quality mineral water, we turn to the bottled water from various brands that still use a lot of plastics. natrl box water - the first ever bulk option for natural mineral water - was created to support eco-conscious people who want quality mineral water without the plastic bottles.

natrl box water is perfect for the whole family as it comes from one of the cleanest sources on Earth in New Zealand. It is 100% sterile and ready to consume. natrl box water is free-from chemical treatments, as the water comes out of the aquifer and is bagged immediately. It is low in sodium, BPA-free and doesn’t contain fluoride. 

Our paper-based alternative is sourced from 100% recycled paper and uses only small amounts of plastics that are 100% recyclable. Plus, natrl boxes are designed to fit easily into your fridge to maximise storage. Or you can pop it on your desk at work and stay hydrated throughout the day without harming the planet.

Name: EDEKA Kulinarikwelten Stengel
Description:
Beginn 1932 als Familienunternehmen aktuell in 3. & 4. Generation.
Seit 2011 versorgen wir mit den Kulinarikwelten E-Center Stengel die Metropolregion Nürnberg mit allen Zutaten für ein feines Leben. 
Kein Weg ist uns zu weit und kein Produkt zu außergewöhnlich.

Mit unseren mittlerweile 50.000 Produkten, unseren hohen Ansprüchen an unsere Mitarbeiter und an uns selbst haben wir uns bereits weit über die Grenzen von Fürth hinaus einen Namen gemacht, denn „Wenn’s einer hat, dann der Stengel“.

Wir suchen Mitarbeiter, die unsere Überzeugung teilen und Teil unserer Erfolgsgeschichte werden wollen.

Unser Marktteam besteht aus rund 200 Mitarbeitern aus ca. 16 verschiedenen Nationen an aktuell zwei Standorten. 
Wir erfüllen die Kulinarikwelten mit Leben – vor und hinter den Kulissen. Sie möchten Teil unseres bunten Teams werden?  Überzeugen Sie uns von Ihrem Talent, Ihrer positiven Einstellung und Begeisterung für außergewöhnliche Lebensmittel! 

Es erwarten Sie nette, aufgeschlossene Kolleginnen und Kollegen und abwechslungsreiche Tätigkeiten. Wir bieten kompetenten und serviceorientierten Menschen vielfältige Möglichkeiten. Übrigens: Auch Quereinsteiger haben bei uns gute Chancen, ihren Platz zu finden und ihr Können unter Beweis zu stellen.

Bewerben Sie sich jetzt unter bewerbung@kulinarikwelten.de – wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Een “Schotse Pub” met honderden Whisky’s en een ruime keuze onafhankelijke bottelingen. Neem plaats aan de bar en maak gebruik van de service om whisky’s te proeven.

Name: La Fortezza Società Agricola srl
Description:
La Fortezza si trova a Torrecuso, un territorio al quale sono legati tutti gli abitanti, tra cui Enzo Rillo, imprenditore già affermato nel campo delle costruzioni, della sicurezza stradale, nel tessile e nel terziario avanzato e che decise di investire nel settore vitivinicolo. Perché la scelta di questo settore? 
Il Dott. Rillo è prima di tutto figlio di contadini, con un’infanzia ed adolescenza passate a scorrazzare tra i campi di Torrecuso, in cui nacque ed in cui dirige le sue molteplici attività. E quindi chi meglio di lui può far conoscere il territorio da cui provengono i suoi pregiati vini!

La Fortezza, una delle realtà vitivinicole più importanti della provincia di Benevento
Tra questi produttori si colloca una valida realtà: la Cantina La Fortezza, il cui vero punto di forza è costituito da un mix di qualità del terreno, esposizione, altitudine e cura della vigna.
I vitigni che caratterizzano la produzione vitivinicola della Cantina sono l’Aglianico del Taburno, in quantità tale da permettere alla stessa azienda di effettuare un’accurata selezione in vigna per le diverse linee di vendita garantendo la produzione di vini di altissimi pregio, come ad esempio, l’Aglianico Riserva. 
Un altro vitigno è la Falanghina del Taburno, la cui esposizione dei vigneti garantisce un risultato ottimale in termini di grado zuccherino, profumi ed acidità del vino senza dover ricorrere a tagli durante la fase di lavorazione. 
Le vigne di Greco e di Fiano destinate alla produzione della Cantina, oltre ad essere prodotte dalla stessa azienda, vengono anche selezionate in esterno. Ai produttori viene imposto un severo e meticoloso disciplinare di coltura. 
Individuati i terreni e le relative vigne, i produttori sono seguiti ed affiancati durante tutti i passaggi fino alla raccolta.

Name: Rootvego
Description:
Rootvego adalah brand minuman sehat berbasis bahan alami Indonesia, dirancang untuk membuat gaya hidup bersih dan berkelanjutan lebih mudah diakses. Fokus kami sederhana: mengubah kekayaan hayati lokal menjadi produk yang relevan bagi kebutuhan masyarakat modern.

Kami meyakini bahwa transisi menuju perilaku konsumsi yang lebih sehat tidak harus rumit. Dengan merangkai buah, bunga, dan rempah lokal ke dalam format infused water siap seduh, Rootvego membantu membangun kebiasaan kecil yang dapat mendukung energi, ketenangan, dan kualitas hidup sehari-hari.

Rootvego dikembangkan dengan pendekatan keberlanjutan, kesehatan preventif, dan inovasi berbasis bahan alami. Tujuan kami adalah membangun ekosistem produk sehat yang mendukung green economy, sekaligus memperkuat pemanfaatan potensi biologis Indonesia dalam industri makanan dan minuman.

Name: The Healthy Pup Co.
Description:
The grocery store pet aisle needs some TLC. 
 
As superfood fanatics, we love seeing how better-for-you products have finally made it to the grocery shelves. But here's the problem... the pet aisle's been left behind (like, far far behind...) and as dog parents, we're just not about that. So, we created healthypup to shake up the shelves.

Healthypup is raising the bar on pet nutrition by bringing the same high-quality superfoods ingredients we know & love to our four-legged family members.

Because it's a no-brainer: better food = better years, and what more do we really want for our furry friends?

Here's to feeding dogs like family.

Name: Mantova
Description:
Mantova is your trusted source for 100% authentic, premium, Italian culinary products. Proudly serving Italian food since 1905, sourcing 100% organic ingredients from local Italian farms from Sicily to Tuscany.

We work exclusively and are fully dedicated to the development and the
distribution of high-quality Italian products into the American Market.

Our passion is quality and tradition: we are a one stop shop for the finest oils, vinegars, sauces, pastas and more, straight from Italy to your table. Our commitment to excellence ensures that each product reflects the rich heritage and craftsmanship of Italian cuisine.

Whether you’re a home chef or a professional, our carefully curated selection will elevate your dishes with fresh, bold flavors. Explore our range of organic, non-GMO, and artisanal products and experience Italy in every bite.

Además de lanzar su propia marca de productos, Stein Foods empezó apoyando a emprendedores, ofreciendo servicios como desarrollo de marcas, desarrollo de formulaciones, diseño y asesoría de empaque y maquila total del producto. Esto con los estándares más altos de higiene, calidad e inocuidad.

For years we have been doing business with leading catering companies - hotels, restaurants and pastry shops, and supplying specialized stores throughout Croatia, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Serbia, Austria and Germany. Until now, we shared it with our friends and family, and from now on we share it with all of you at 7 locations throughout Croatia, and we also deliver directly to your kitchen via the web store.

Description:

Name: Nagaura
Description:
A Nagaura é uma marca comprometida em oferecer alimentos saudáveis e orgânicos, contribuindo para o bem-estar e a saúde dos consumidores por meio da qualidade de seus produtos.

Desde legumes, frutas e verduras orgânicas até itens de mercearia, acompanhamos de perto todo o processo de produção, garantindo uma entrega final que valoriza a qualidade, incentiva pequenos produtores e promove um consumo mais sustentável.

Nosso propósito vai além de fornecer alimentos naturais. Queremos incentivar escolhas mais saudáveis, acessíveis e sustentáveis, ajudando nossos clientes a se nutrirem de maneira equilibrada e prática.

Missão
 Oferecer produtos orgânicos e saudáveis com qualidade.

Visão
 Ser referência na distribuição de produtos orgânicos no Brasil, garantindo qualidade, rastreabilidade e compartilhamento de conhecimento.

Valores
 Confiança
 Transparência
 Respeito ao consumidor
 Compromisso com pequenos produtores
 Sustentabilidade
 Responsabilidade socioambiental

Estrutura e Diferenciais
 Atuação em Guarabira do Norte e Fortaleza, com embaladora própria e certificação.
 Cadeia fria com câmara fria e estrutura de alimentos microprocessados (em fase de projeto).
 Incentivo direto a produtores, fortalecendo a cadeia de consumo responsável.

 Certificados:
 Orgânico Brasil
 OIA (Organics International Association)

Se você busca uma alimentação mais saudável, prática e sustentável, conheça o Nagaura Inbox e leve o melhor dos alimentos orgânicos para a sua rotina!

 vendas@nagaura.com.br

Name: Tossin Pizza
Description:
Dare to defy convention? Craving more than the mundane? Welcome to Tossin Pizza, where we toss aside the ordinary and craft extraordinary experiences on every slice. 

In our world, pizza is more than just sustenance; it's an art form. We believe in turning each doughy canvas into a masterpiece, a journey of flavors that speaks to your unique palate. No more settling for the run-of-the-mill carb affair – our pizzas are a symphony of taste, a culinary escapade, and an ode to individuality.

Quality isn't just a word; it's our obsession. Our tomatoes voyage from Italy, our mozzarella takes a detour via Wisconsin, and our pepperoni makes its mark all the way from California.  And how do we orchestrate this culinary marvel? With the timeless elegance of a wood-fired oven. The result? A taste that dances exclusively on your taste buds, a tantalizing tango of ingredients that's a league of its own.

Tossin Pizza is a narrative, not just a menu. Our pages are filled with stories of sustainability and community, tales of giving back to the very soil that feeds us. Every bite is a promise of care, every flavor a salute to responsibility. Our packaging wears the badge of recycled materials, and a part of our proceeds paints smiles across local charities. 

It's time to shift paradigms, to embrace pizzas that redefine the game. Let Tossin Pizza be your passport to the extraordinary, a culinary carnival that's both a feast for the senses and a celebration of our shared home. Get ready to tantalize your taste buds and join us in tossing out the ordinary, one slice at a time.  #TossinPizzaMagic #CraftingDeliciousness

Na D'Vine Momentos Especiais, transformamos cada ocasião em uma celebração inesquecível. Nossa loja oferece uma seleção premium de vinhos, acessórios sofisticados e presentes exclusivos. 

Somos apaixonados por vinhos e acreditamos que cada garrafa conta uma história única. Nosso jogo de degustação às cegas, "Mestre dos Vinhos", proporciona uma experiência envolvente e educativa para até seis participantes. Venha nos visitar e descubra como podemos tornar seus momentos ainda mais especiais!

Name: Dionysus - Culture Food
Description:
At Dionysus - Culture Food, we are on a mission to showcase lesser-known culinary treasures produced in tiny batches across Italy’s picturesque rolling hills, mountains and valleys.
 
Our founder Edoardo, a native Tuscan shaped by years in London's competitive food scene, established Dionysus to showcase rare Italian delicacies that reflect generations of tradition tied intrinsically to their terroir.

What you taste in our products - whether it is the grassy freshness of early harvest extra-virgin olive oil, the surprising flavour of Cinta Senese cured meats, or the sweet nuttiness of ash-aged pecorino - tells profound stories rooted in local soils and sociocultural lore. 

We import to preserve these authentic flavours and the age-old biodiverse environments that shape them.

Dionysus presents exquisite foods even Italians rarely discover - each bottle, cured meat and cheese ripening under our brand is specially curated by Edoardo through painstaking producer partnerships. We take pride in phenomenal customer experiences reflecting our passionate provenance.

We have been selected to present our business in the prestigious Parliament of London and, among our private customers, we have the pleasure of serving members of the House of Lords as well as other distinguished professionals.

Follow our journey as we chase flavours from hidden Italian workshops cherishing disappearing local varieties and techniques - it’s time to get back in touch with the origins of what we eat and drink.

Name: Farmers To You
Description:
At Farmers To You we know our farmers and producers personally. That’s why we can promise to provide fresh, high-quality food produced on healthy farms. We know you do not make your food decisions lightly. We are grateful for each purchase you make from Farmers To You that supports our farmers and producer partners that are dedicated to growing nourishing food for your family.

Here is our promise so that you can feel good about your buying decision. (If you want to learn more, just write to us, or pick up the phone and call.)

Food grown on healthy farms:
We sell food grown in a regenerative and sustainable way. Our farmer partners care for your health and for the land, animals and the environment. The farmers and producers share their precise farming and production practices. 

Local, fresh, and carefully selected:
We find the best foods available in New England from more than 100 local farmers and producers. It is hard to find other markets with this breadth of local, fresh and delicious vegetables, meats, cheeses and other foods.

 
Week-to-week flexibility and convenience:
Our food is delivered to pick-up sites or to your door every week all year. The ordering and delivery are predictable and reliable. You shop, order and pay week to week. We know some weeks you might not need much fresh food but other weeks you will do a big shop.

No Food Waste:
We only order what we've sold each week to our partner families. Any leftover food is cooked up for our weekly staff dinner or donated to the local food shelves. Food scraps are composted, returning valuable nutrients back to the soil.

We are here for you:
If you want to learn more just send us a note to info@farmerstoyou.com or pick up the phone and call us at 802-225-6383. And if you are not satisfied with our products or service, we’ll provide complete credit to you.

The word ‘jadibuti’ literally means a herb. Some of their attributes such as aroma, flavours and medicinal properties make them integral part of many cultures and stories. WE are a generation amidst a major cultural shift. Sailing through the present, building a legacy, and creating new stories need inspiration. JDButi appreciates the subtle magic of “coffee” that stimulates, inspires, comforts and connects.  We hope to add flavours to YOUR process of decoction, and awaken the spirit of child-like curiosity to give you the space to  “Espress Yourself”.

What we love:

Sipping Coffee
Sharing Stories

Sharing stories about sipping coffee
Sharing coffee while sipping stories

In short, everything about Coffee & Stories.

Description:

Nine Generations represents our commitment to the long-lasting traditions and social ties of wine and whisky in our lives. We ultimately aim to bridge the distilleries and wineries within our network with individuals who either seek to enrich their own wine and whiskey collections or simply want to enjoy pure and memorable drinking experiences.

Name: Dernier Verre
Description:
Passez du tout jetable au zéro déchet pour les boissons de vos événements.

Chaque année, des tonnes de bouteilles plastiques et en verre finissent à la poubelle après festivals, séminaires, mariages… Pourtant, la consigne est la solution la plus simple et durable pour réduire ces déchets.

Dernier Verre remet le réemploi au cœur de l’événementiel : boissons artisanales locales, livrées, récupérées, lavées et réemployées. Un service clé en main, zéro galère, 100 % impact positif.

Basé sur l’économie circulaire, notre modèle inclut un bilan RSE chiffré, une logistique décarbonée et des producteurs engagés. La preuve que l’événementiel peut être (vraiment) éco-responsable.

 +400 références consignées en bouteilles et en fûts : bières, vins, sodas, jus… exclusivement issues de productions artisanales françaises, au plus proche de Toulouse.

Alors, prêt à dire stop au plastique ? Dernier Verre n’attend qu’une seule consigne : la vôtre !

Name: Regained Foods LTD
Description:
At Regained Foods LTD, we’re dedicated to transforming food waste into delicious, sustainable products. As a social enterprise, our mission is to reduce food waste by upcycling surplus bread and other ingredients into high-quality pastries, nourishing both people and the planet.
Our current range includes cupcakes, cakes, and cake parfaits (cake jars) - each crafted with care and purpose. Every product we create turns potential waste into something valuable, proving that sustainability and great taste go hand in hand.

Beyond our products, we are committed to community impact. Through workshops, events, and educational content, we work to inspire our community to rethink food waste and embrace sustainable practices. At Regained Foods, we believe that together, we can create a positive impact—one treat at a time.

At Regained Foods, we believe that each bite can make a positive difference, together, we can create a positive impact—one treat at a time.

Name: Vinskabt
Description:
Vinskabt er en usnobbet og jordnær vinshop.
Vi handler med vin, lavet af folk med en kærlighed til marken, produktet og håndværket.
Om vinen betegnes økologisk, biodynamisk eller naturvin, hænger vi os ikke i. Så længe den er lavet med hjertet på rette sted, kvaliteten er i orden og det smager godt, finder du den her.

Vinskabt er drevet af Trine og Thomas Fisker; søster og bror.
Vi elsker god vin. Vi elsker at finde god vin. Og, nå ja bevares, så kan vi da også meget godt lide at sælge, og fortælle om den gode vin vi finder.

Vores tilgang er lige til: vin skal drikkes helt nede på jorden. Det vin du godt kan lide er god vin; det håber vi du finder her.

in de wijnwinkel tref je meer dan 400 wijnen, een wisselende selectie lokale en speciaalbieren en een hoek vol alcoholvrije dranken. Ook is er de Meer Bubbels shop-in-shop met het grootste assortiment mousserende wijnen van de regio.

Description:
DeApotheek is a beer shop specialized in non-Belgian beers. Located in an old pharmacy in Ghent, Belgium. DeApotheek wants to pay tribute to Belgian beer culture by offering amazing beers from other countries. The idea is to let everyone in the Ghent region discover and enjoy a curated selection of astonishing beers, crafted by cool breweries. Allowing you to expand your beer selection in your refrigerator with unique and delicious flavours and beer styles from all over the world. 

DeApotheek imports and sells beers, cider and ginger juice from all over the world.

Come and discover.

Name: KLIQ.SK - Alkohol pre výnimočné príležitosti
Description:
Sme dvaja nadšení zberatelia a ochutnávači alkoholických nápojov, najradšej máme tie z kategórie destilátov. Na slovenský trh obchodov s alkoholom sme chceli priniesť najmä osobnejší prístup a možnosť pre zákazníkov poradiť sa s výberom produktov. Ponúkame len to, čo sa nachádza aj v našej domácej alkoholovej poličke, čo nám chutí a čo by sme "všetkými desiatimi" odporúčili ďalej. Neustále sa snažíme naše portfólio aktualizovať o nové produkty, máme však pre ich výber veľmi prísne kritériá. Netajíme sa tým, že nie sme fanúšikmi nárazového pitia alkoholu a radšej si ho vychutnávame v menších degustačných množstvách.

Tie cenovo “najvýhodnejšie” a najbežnejšie konzumované alkoholické produkty u nás nenájdete, kvalita, chuť, dizajn, história a príbeh za značkou sú totiž pre nás to najdôležitejšie. Radi sa vzdelávame, čítame, skúmame a objavujeme nové poznatky zo sveta alkoholu, ktoré vám chceme odovzdať prostredníctvom našej blogovej sekcie alebo našich sociálnych sietí. Pri preprave tak krehkého tovaru, akým je alkohol v sklenených fľašiach je pre nás samozrejme prvoradá bezpečnosť balenia, potrpíme si však aj na detaily. Každú fľašu balíme do darčekového papiera s naším logom a potom do ochranného voštinového papiera, ktorý je ekologickou alternatívou k bublinkovej fólii. Doklad k objednávke vám spolu s ňou zas pošleme v zapečatenej obálke s KLIQ podpivníkom.

Urobíme všetko pre to, aby ste si z nákupu u nás odniesli čo najlepší zážitok. Na zdravie!

Name: Froot Pops
Description:
I created Froot Pops in homage to my little sister and best friend in the world. She adores this snack and can eat an impressive amount in a single sitting. I made some at home and my husband was constantly going back to the freezer for another bite. 


Our friends started asking me to make them too, and it finally gave me the courage to bring this gorgeous treat to market. I love what a simple, clean product Froot Pops is – the secret (shhh… don’t tell anyone!) is in using fresh, plump berries and pairing it with high quality fairtrade Belgian chocolate. 


I’m so proud of Froot Pops, starting with the taste but going all the way to how we source our ingredients sustainably and craft every bite with the utmost care in our production kitchen in East London. Truthfully, i just want everyone to try it! I hope you love it as much as I do – or, better yet, as much as my sister does. 


With love,
Ana (Founder)

---

Froot Pops is a Pantree Marketplace Ltd brand.

Description:

Each formula contains a mix of vitamins, minerals, and a key ingredient 
known as an *adaptogen to form the most potent and nourishing blends for the health conscious. 

We're so excited to have you join us on this journey to #health and #wellness. 

*An umbrella term that describes different herbs and mushrooms that have been shown to help the body adapt to different stressors, including emotional, physical, and mental stress.

Name: Herban Flow
Description:
At Herban Flow, we’re reimagining the social beverage experience. Based in the heart of St. Petersburg, we are Florida’s first dedicated non-alcoholic bottle shop — a curated retail space offering cannabis-infused, mushroom-based, and herbal drinks that help you feel good without the booze.

Whether you’re looking to energize, unwind, focus, or simply vibe out, our selection of THC seltzers, kava tonics, functional mushrooms, and sober social elixirs has something for every mood and moment. We champion conscious consumption and proudly support the growing sober-curious and wellness-focused community.

More than a retail store, Herban Flow is a cultural hub — hosting events, tastings, and festivals like High & Dry to celebrate a new kind of nightlife. Our mission is to make plant-powered drinking mainstream, accessible, and exciting — without the hangover.

Find your flow. Stay SoberAF.

Name: SendinAfrika
Description:

C'est une révolution du transfert d'argent traditionnel.

SendinAfrika est une application  en ligne qui offre à la diaspora Africaine la possibilité d'acheter des produits de première nécessité ainsi que les services dans des magasins locaux, qui seront livrés à vos proches au pays dans trois créneaux de votre choix (48H -> livraison standard, 24H-> livraison accélérée, ou 5H-> livraison prime) . La solution SendinAfrika garantie à la diaspora que les fonds envoyés en Afrique seront utilisés à bon escient.

Name: Patina Wine
Description:
Från ett intresse och dröm redan i unga år gjorde olika omständigheter under 2021 att drömmen plötsligt kunde förverkligas. Patrick startade upp sitt vinföretag, med rådgivning från den gode vännen Magnus. Med värdefull erfarenhet av vin och kunskap om vingårdarnas arbete i Spanien började företaget växa fram.

Den sista pusselbiten blev klar tidigt 2022 när Patina Wine & Deli kunde knyta till sig Torbjörn. Med en gedigen försäljningsbakgrund inom dryckesbranschen, ett stort nätverk och stort driv var nu företagets form på plats och vin fortsätter vara den gemensamma passionen.

Name: minidrinks
Description:
A MiniDrinks foi fundada na cidade de Curitiba em 2014, com o objetivo de se tornar referência nacional no comércio de bebidas em miniatura. Acreditamos que nosso negócio é um ótimo meio de estreitar o laço entre as pessoas, através de presentes criativos, brindes empresariais, kits para casamento, enfim, todo tipo de agrado que qualquer pessoa gostaria de receber por ser lembrada.

Trabalhamos com todos os tipos de bebidas, com volumes de no máximo 375ml. Criamos um site totalmente focado em proporcionar a melhor experiência de compra para nossos clientes, utilizando ferramentas para facilitar a visualização dos produtos, navegação e a efetivação da compra. Nossas bebidas são 100% originais, lacradas de fábrica, nacionais e importadas.

A MiniDrinks conta com Aperitivos, Cachaças, Conhaques, Espumantes e Champagnes, Gins, Licores, Saques, Tequilas, Vinhos, Vodkas, Whiskys e outras bebidas não alcoólicas, além de uma área gourmet com várias opções! Contamos também com uma categoria de kits e presentes que com certeza vai lhe proporcionar ótimas ideias!

Atendemos eventos empresariais, casamentos, lembranças, brindes, aniversários, com a personalização das garrafinhas e montagem de kits de acordo com a necessidade de cada cliente. Estamos constantemente buscando novidades para surpreender nossos clientes, sempre primando pelo melhor atendimento e que possamos proporcionar a melhor experiência de compra possível.

Name: Tamworth Distilling
Description: In a small town at the foot of the White Mountains, we built Tamworth Distilling and Mercantile in 2015, a small-batch distillery and test kitchen. Our water comes from the Ossipee Aquifer, grain and other produce is sourced from farms within a 150 mile radius, and a variety of botanicals are foraged in the local forests or grown in the distillery’s own gardens. Like the New England Transcendentalists before us, we’re setting out into nature to build community, inspiration, and experimentation.
