Name: Captain Doregos
Description:
Welcome to Captain Doregos, where we serve up fresh and flavorful chicken, fish, and burgers to satisfy all your cravings. Our quick-service restaurant is dedicated to providing delicious, high-quality meals in a fast and convenient manner.

At Captain Doregos, we believe that great food starts with great ingredients. That's why we use only the freshest and highest-quality ingredients to prepare our menu items. Whether you're in the mood for a crispy chicken sandwich, a juicy burger, or a perfectly fried piece of fish, we've got you covered.

Our commitment to quality doesn't stop at the food itself. We also strive to provide exceptional service to every customer who walks through our doors. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff is always on hand to answer any questions you may have and ensure that your dining experience is a pleasant one.

In addition to our delicious menu items, we also offer a range of convenient services to make your life easier. From online ordering and delivery to catering for events and parties, we're here to help you enjoy our food whenever and wherever you want it.

Captain Doregos is more than just a restaurant - it's a community. We're proud to be a part of the neighborhoods we serve, and we're committed to giving back to our community in meaningful ways. Whether it's through donations to local charities or participating in community events, we're always looking for ways to make a positive impact.

Thank you for considering Captain Doregos for your next meal. We look forward to serving you soon!

We offer three traditional flavors that everyone knows and loves, along with three seasonal holiday flavors that bring a festive touch to celebrations.  Whether you’re looking for a treat for a casual get-together, a gift for a corporate client, a college care package, or just something sweet for yourself, our cookies are perfect for satisfying any sweet tooth!

As a women-owned business, we’re passionate about keeping our operations personal and community-focused while delivering a delicious product.  We ship our cookies nationwide, so no matter where you are in the U.S., you can enjoy our treats.  Our cookies also make great gifts—whether for clients, team members, or loved ones!

At Aunt JoJo’s Cookies, every bite is a reminder of kindness and joy, and we love sharing that with our customers!

Name: Fridge Friend
Description:
Increase the shelf-life of your fresh produce by up to 3 weeks.

Stop throwing your groceries (and money) in the trash. Save money and reduce food waste with a Fridge Friend filter.

Meet Fridge Friend
Are you sick of throwing out food? We have an affordable, simple solution that actually works - and it’s great for the planet too. 

The Fridge Friend filter is a scientifically-backed filter that when placed inside your fridge, keeps your produce fresh (and edible) for longer.

A friend to your fridge, a friend to the planet.

Why do I need a Fridge Friend?
We’re throwing out tonnes of food each year at a great cost to both households, and the environment. In fact, the average household throws out 25% of their groceries, which adds up to over $2,000 per household, per year. That hurts!

But the worst part of all? Food wastage is drastically hurting the planet too, contributing up to 10% of all greenhouse gas emissions. 

But it’s not all bad news…

We can tackle climate change directly from our kitchens. Studies have shown reducing food wastage is the single most powerful thing you can do to impact climate change.

The planet and your grocery bill will thank you.

How does it work?
Simply place it in your fridge and Fridge Friend saves you that extra trip to the grocery store by filtering contaminated air, water and particles through our 100% natural mineral compound.

It’s completely non-toxic and safe to use, with its unique honeycomb structure absorbing 79% of ethylene gas and 85% bacteria and odors - proudly preserving your produce.

Name: Queen Bee Honey
Description:
Queen Bee Honey is a purpose-driven natural food brand committed to providing 100% pure, chemical-free honey sourced directly from nature. Established in 2023 as a grassroots initiative, Queen Bee Honey has become a trusted name in region for natural wellness and authentic taste.
We offer over 20 varieties of raw, unprocessed, single-origin honey collected from different floral belts across the country, such as Sidr, Acacia, Himalayan, Jamun, Mustard, Litchi, and Wild Forest. Our honey is never heated or adulterated, preserving all natural enzymes, nutrients, and flavor. Each drop is harvested responsibly, without any use of chemicals, additives, or artificial processes.
Beyond products, Queen Bee Honey stands for people and purpose. We empower women through employment and training, creating livelihood opportunities for rural and underprivileged women. We partner directly with producers across India to ensure ethical sourcing and fair pricing. Our model supports sustainable beekeeping, biodiversity conservation, and rural development.
We also help aspiring entrepreneurs and small resellers start their own businesses by offering affordable bulk rates, customized packaging, and branding support. With us, many first-time business owners have launched successful ventures in natural foods, especially women and retired individuals.
Whether you're a customer seeking real honey, a retailer, or someone looking to start a meaningful business, we’re here for you.

 Pan-India Delivery
 Bulk & B2B Orders
 Business Startup Support
 Queen Bee Honey — Just Honey. Just Pure.

Name: dinkers glazed nuts
Description:
WHY we do what we do


glazed nuts and autism…

come together at dinkers! 

based in southern utah, dinkers specializes in gourmet glazed nuts, including almonds, pecans, and peanuts. owners devon and anna are passionate about more than just delivering delicious nuts—they're committed to fostering an inclusive environment. dinkers mission is to provide meaningful employment opportunities to neurodivergent young adults, empowering them toward greater independence.

with over four years of mentorship experience in the industry, devon and anna, drawing from her personal experience with autism in the family, truly understand the challenges neurodivergent adults face. in fact, the dinkers name and logo have a special connection to their family story. anna’s sister, kathryn, who has autism, created the dinkers brand. kathryn loves drawing animals and writing short stories;  she depicted devon as “dinkers the giraffe” when he joined the family. when devon and anna decided to start their gourmet nut business in st. george, kathryn was given the honor of creating the brand’s logo and name—dinkers glazed nuts.

dinkers isn’t just about delicious snacks; it’s about life lessons. through their work, team members learn essential skills such as time management, conflict resolution, customer service, workplace hygiene, etc. these lessons are designed to help them thrive both within the workplace and in their personal lives, building confidence and independence along the way.

in october 2024, dinkers launched a sister brand along side neurodev called neurodivergent nuts, advancing their mission to “embrace neurodivergence one nut at a time.” check out the website to learn more about the incredible team behind this initiative.

Name: Two Fish Foods
Description:
Two Fish Crab Shack, located in Chicago's Bronzeville neighborhood, quickly gained a cult-like following when it opened in 2016 thanks to its fun-filled seafood boil in a bag experience featuring fine, fresh seafood paired with unique and irresistible sauces.

When the COVID-19 pandemic closed indoor dining across the Chicagoland area, Two Fish founder Yasmin Curtis took to her kitchen to create an at-home solution for her seafood boil devotees. She combined customer-favorite shrimp and crab legs with Two Fish’s 3 The Chi-Way sauce in an easy-to-use, frozen package fans could keep in their freezers and enjoy from the convenience of home and Two Fish Foods was born.

Today, Two Fish Food's seafood boil bags are available in the seafood freezer section at thousands of grocery stores across the country. To find Two Fish Foods near you, visit www.twofishfoods.com.

Name: مجموعة نظير الساعدي Nadheer Alsaadi Group
Description:
نظير الساعدي من أكبـر شـركات التوزيـع فـي العـراق، لإستيراد المنتجـات الغذائيـة مـن جميـع أنحـاء العالـم.
شـركة عائليـة تأسسـت عـام 1905 وتـم انشـاء فـرع 272 فـي عـام 1987 وكانـت الانطلاقـة الكبـرى فـي عـام 2003 بعـد الانفتـاح الاقتصـادي فـي العـراق وقـد عملـت الشـركة منـذ ذلـك الحيـن فـي اسـتيراد وتوزيـع مختلـف السـلع التجاريـة سـريعة الـدوران وحققنـا نجاحـات كبيـرة فـي التوزيـع جملـة ومفـرد وكان منتجنـا الاول هو رز 272 بسـمتي 1121 حيـث احتـل الصـدارة فـي العـراق لعـدة سـنوات.
قامـت الشـركة بتوسـيع شـبكة التوزيـع الخاصـة بهـا لتشـمل نطاقـات LOB أخـرى مثـل TT، MT، HoReCa، الصيدليـات. عملـت الشـركة علـى توسـيع دائـرة التوزيـع لديهـا حيـث اسسـت فروعـا فـي إقليـم كردسـتان، والمنطقـة الجنوبيـة مـن البصـرة، ومنطقـة الفـرات الاوسط بالاضافـة إلـى المقـر الرئيسـي فـي بغـداد ولدينـا وكلاء فـي جميـع المحافظـات. كنـا وما زلنا قادريـن وكفؤيـن علـى تزويـد السـوق العراقـي بأكثـر مـن 250 منتجـا اسـتهالكيا وتقديـم خدمـات التوزيـع والتسـليم والتوريـد المسـتمر لاحتياجـات السـوق. ولدينـا حوالـي 17000 نقطـة بيـع فـي العـراق / لدينـا فـرع خـاص لبيـع البقوليـات والعطاريـات ومـواد خـام المطاعـم ومعامـل الحلويـات.

Description:

Name: DIME
Description:
For decades, MSG was unfairly labeled as “bad,” because of a 1968 letter where a doctor speculated he felt "off" after eating Chinese food. The media ran with it, coining “Chinese Restaurant Syndrome” and fueling fear and xenophobia. But science proves MSG is completely safe.

MSG (monosodium glutamate) is simply glutamic acid, naturally found in foods like tomatoes and mushrooms. While the modern process of making MSG started in Japan, it’s now produced worldwide using fermented starches native to each region, like cassava in Latin America. Think of MSG like sugar in fruit: naturally occurring but also made in a concentrated form like table sugar.

The real issue was never MSG – it was the false narrative surrounding it. We’re here to shut down the myths and put MSG back where it belongs with bold everyday seasonings.

At SUNWAVE LTD, we believe in the power of community and technology to create a better world. Our mission extends beyond providing solar-powered cooling systems; we're committed to educating and empowering communities, advocating for climate justice through an intersectional lens, and driving radical systemic change towards a more sustainable and equitable global food system.

Join us on our journey as we continue to innovate, inspire, and implement solutions where the sun meets innovation. Together, we can light the path to a sustainable future.

Name: Cave du Val d'Ars
Description:
La Cave du Val d'Ars, du nom de la cité engloutie légendaire du lac de Paladru, est un établissement de proximité présent depuis plus de 30 ans, aujourd'hui spécialisé dans la vente de vins fins, mais également de spiritueux, bières et produits d'épicerie fine. Une importance toute particulière est donnée aux vins et produits du terroir italiens, territoire important pour moi de par les liens tissés au fil des années. 

Aujourd'hui, la philosophie de la cave s'articule autour de trois valeurs principales : la proximité, la confiance et la durabilité. Ce sont ces trois valeurs qui définissent l'attention donnée à notre sélection mais également dans les rapports que nous entretenons avec nos partenaires; et lien nouveau que nous tissons au fil des rencontres.

Name: Sicilian Food Shop
Description:
Che cos'è Sicilian Food Shop?

Sicilian Food Shop è un negozio online progettato da un team tecnico digitale per presentare il meglio dell’enogastronomia siciliana: una selezione minuziosa di prodotti tipici di alta qualità, ricercando solo il vero gusto autentico in quei prodotti genuini e artigianali quasi introvabili, per soddisfare gli amanti del vero gusto siciliano.
A chi si rivolge

Sicilian Food Shop nasce per tutti gli appassionati di cucina e di enogastronomia siciliana, per coloro che amano sperimentare i piatti tipici della tradizione e che desiderano conoscere più da vicino la provenienza, la storia e le unicità dei prodotti che assaporano.
Come soddisfare tutti questi desideri? 

Ricercando e selezionando solo i migliori prodotti tipici della nostra Sicilia, prodotti che ancora oggi mantengono quell'artigianalità che li rende unici e ovviamente poterli acquistare online.

Da qui nasce l'idea di creare una piattaforma di vendita online sincera e di gestirla nel migliore dei modi, proponendo nel web solo prodotti tipici siciliani veramente eccellenti, attraverso un'attenta selezione di piccoli produttori locali artigiani sparsi per la Sicilia. Con l’aiuto del digitale arricchiamo le pagine del nostro Shop con contenuti audio, video, e foto per raccontare curiosità e storie dei singoli prodotti, valorizzandone le loro origini, il duro lavoro artigianale di chi li produce e molto altro ancora. Tutti questi elementi, uniti alla nostra passione innata per il buon cibo siciliano, contribuiranno a rendere i prodotti Sicilian Food Shop un’esperienza di sapore autentica, multi sensoriale, indimenticabile.
La nostra missione è selezionare con passione e attenzione i migliori produttori di vere eccellenze del gusto siciliano, mostrando le loro eccellenze in fantastici prodotti online, per assicurarti un risultato gustoso, autentico, unico e di qualità.

Name: Mix&Matcha
Description:
Mix&Matcha is Israel's largest matcha importing and distributing brand.

Established with a vision to bring the authentic taste and experience of Japanese matcha to Israel, we have become the go-to destination for matcha enthusiasts across the country. With a deep passion for this ancient tea tradition and a commitment to quality, we have successfully built a reputation as a trusted supplier in the industry.

At Mix&Matcha, we take pride in sourcing and curating the finest ceremonial grade matcha from Japan. Our unique matcha, meticulously harvested and processed, offers a distinct flavor profile and an exquisite vibrant green color that delights even the most discerning matcha connoisseurs.

In addition to our premium matcha selection, we also offer a range of matcha accessories, including traditional matcha making sets and whisks. These meticulously crafted tools enable our customers to prepare matcha with the utmost care and authenticity, elevating their tea-drinking experience to new heights. Furthermore, we are proud to offer a selection of branded merchandise that allows our dedicated fans to showcase their love for [Business Name] and our exceptional products.

We have cultivated a passionate community around our brand, and our loyal customers form a devoted cult following. They appreciate the dedication we put into sourcing the best matcha and our commitment to delivering a truly exceptional product. We are grateful for their continued support and enthusiasm, which drives us to continuously raise the bar and exceed expectations.

As a versatile business, we cater to both B2B and B2C customers. We collaborate with over 100 locations, including cafes and specialty shops, providing them with our premium matcha and accessories. We take immense pride in our partnerships with cafes, working closely with them to ensure their customers experience the true essence of matcha.

𝑪𝒂𝒗𝒊𝒂𝒓 𝒇𝒐𝒔𝒕𝒆𝒓 𝒖𝒏𝒊𝒒𝒖𝒆 𝒎𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒔 𝒐𝒇 𝒆𝒙𝒑𝒍𝒐𝒓𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏, 𝒖𝒏𝒊𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒑𝒆𝒐𝒑𝒍𝒆 𝒊𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒑𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒆𝒏𝒕 𝒎𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕."

Founded in Geneva in 2019, Conzept Caviar is born with the desire to create new consumption habits around caviar.  We aspire to introduce this exquisite and lesser-known delicacy to individuals who possess the means to access it but have yet to savor the indulgence of Caviar.

Always considered as a luxury product reserved for a small category of fine connoisseurs, Conzept Caviar intends to change Caviar's upscale image. Our goal is to allow a larger range of consumers to enjoy this fine delicacy, while preserving its prestige and glamour character. 
Selling Caviar in Geneva, Verbier, Zürich to Professionals and Private
individuals since 2019. We are expanding and now exporting Caviar in
whole European Union.

Conzept Caviar is a brand managed by From' Epices SA ( https://www.linkedin.com/in/jean-jacques-tereins-61b5a031 )  based in Geneva.

Name: Uvarara SA
Description:
Come nasce Uvarara? Nasce da una mia grande passione per il nettare di Bacco. Non ero ancora maggiorenne, quando il vino ha cominciato a esercitare una prima attrazione su di me, in particolare il rosso. Quante bevute di fiaschi e borracce di novello alle pendici delle mie montagne! Con il passare degli anni si è invece fatto largo l’interesse per i vini pregiati, che mi ha portato a intensificare la ricerca e le visite a numerose cantine. Per lo più prediligevo realtà poco conosciute, che scovavo leggendo pubblicazioni qua e là su giornali e riviste dedicate all’argomento.

In questo modo ho iniziato a scoprire vini rari, spinto dalla curiosità e dallo studio dell’enologia quale autodidatta. Degustando vini di grandi etichette e partecipando a vari eventi del settore, ho costruito la mia conoscenza in materia, assecondando sempre la sensibilità del mio palato. La mia ricerca, dedicata alla scoperta di prodotti vicini alla grande qualità ma dai prezzi contenuti, mi ha portato a fondare Uvarara, la ditta che oggi rappresenta i vini che importo.

Mi sono dedicato prevalentemente al territorio francese, in particolar modo alle regioni di Bordeaux, Bourgone, Alsazia e Chatenauneuf du Pape. Nella regione di Champagne ho invece preso contatto con piccoli produttori, quasi introvabili, ma dalle cantine qualitativamente ineccepibili. Per quanto concerne l’Italia, ho prediletto i vini Toscani e Piemontesi per poi aggiungere Lombardia, Marche, Veneto, Trentino Alto Adige e Friuli Venezia Giulia. La gamma viene completata da una linea di vini Ungheresi e delle collaborazioni con piccoli produttori del Ticino.

Oggi l’azienda rappresenta ben 60 cantine con circa 300 etichette, tutte selezionate per soddisfare anche i palati più esigenti. Un lavoro durato anni, portato avanti con grande amore e passione, che vuole offrire l’opportunità a commercianti, ristoratori e amici di poter assaporare l’altissima qualità a un prezzo giusto.

Brindiamo tutti insieme!

Romolo Nottaris

Name: Anadi Sutra 18C Food World
Description:
ANADI SUTRA – 18th Century Vedic Food, our operations are the heart of everything we do. From ingredient sourcing and quality checks to careful crafting and eco-friendly packaging, every step reflects our commitment to authenticity, purity, and wellness.

We reject harmful ingredients like white sugar, white salt, red chili, palm oil, preservatives, and artificial colors. Instead, we use premium-quality, research-backed alternatives, creating products that nourish the body and delight the senses.

We're Dedicated To Providing High Quality Food Products
Our products are crafted with meticulously selected ingredients, combining the best of nature, science and 18th Century Vedic Food Formulations. We prioritize safety, efficacy, and sustainability in every step of our process.

Our philosophy is simple: Food is Medicine. That’s why every product is developed by our food researchers, and skilled artisans—using only toxin-free, plant-based, clean-label ingredients. Name: Pátio Gormet
Description:
Pátio Gourmet
 

Para viver uma vida saudável é preciso inspiração. É preciso de estímulos positivos. Uma atitude única. É preciso encontrar um lugar que combine com toda essa vontade. Para que se possa viver essas sensações todos os dias.

Para fazer parte desse estilo de vida, cada vez mais comum em diversos cantos do planeta, nasceu o Pátio Gourmet, em 2014.

Uma loja especial, que já nasceu saudável, com aquele frescor e aquele jeito gostoso de ser, que nenhum supermercado possuía em Manaus.

Já nasceu inovadora também, com produtos exclusivos, com marcas que fazem sucesso nos mais diversos cantos do mundo. Um cuscuz marroquinho, uma massa italiana. O Pátio trouxe muitas propostas inéditas, harmoniosamente organizadas em estações incríveis para sushi, peixes e carnes. Uma padaria simplesmente deliciosa com fornadas de pães cheirosos e quentinhos saindo a cada hora, uma sessão de dar água na boca com frutas, legumes e verduras absolutamente frescos e de excelente qualidade.

O Pátio Gourmet nasceu para ser mais do que um supermercado gourmet, nasceu para ser a extensão de todas as casas, um pátio mesmo onde se vive com mais qualidade, com respeito a natureza, com um sabor de tudo que é feito na hora, de tudo que deixa a gente feliz.

A loja inaugurou no caminho das avenidas mais movimentadas de Manaus: Constatino Nery e Djalma Batista, por onde passam muitos que vão para casa e de muitos que vem do trabalho. São centenas e centenas de pessoas, que aceitaram o irresistível convite para uma vida mais saudável e saborosa.

E no dia 09 de Agosto de 2019 nasceu o novo Pátio Gourmet Morada do Sol, localizada na Avenida Via Láctea, 825, Aleixo, procurando atender todas as expectativas dos nossos clientes, sendo um ambiente agradável, com um restaurante especial, pensando no paladar dos mais exigentes. Sabemos que viver boas experiências nos conduzem a lidar com o dia a dia de maneira mais leve e feliz, por isso prezamos em servir cada cliente com dedicação e responsabil

Name: VitalSetas S.A.S.
Description:
VitalSetas nace del amor por lo natural, la curiosidad y la necesidad de integrar en nuestra alimentación una opción medicinal a base de hongos funcionales, unos organismos excepcionales que pueden ser incorporados en nuestra dieta, sin esfuerzo, sin riesgo, y con evidencia de beneficios para la salud.

El mundo ha cambiado y vivimos en medio de profundos retos: la pandemia, el estrés de la situación económica y social, el calentamiento global. Pero creemos que el cambio puede comenzar con nosotros: nuestros hábitos, nuestra alimentación, nuestra actitud.

Nuestro propósito es hacer un pequeño aporte en el bienestar individual y así, esparciendo hábitos saludables, contribuir a la red que genere un cambio positivo en la sociedad. 

En VitalSetas queremos ser el hogar de los hongos funcionales en Colombia y educar sobre los enormes beneficios de estos alimentos milenarios que promueven la salud y el bienestar.

Name: North Texas Business Alliance Co-op
Description:
The North Texas Business Alliance (NTBA) was established in 1999 and serves convenience store and gasoline station owners by equipping them with bulk purchasing power, industry know-how, and the right connections to strengthen business practices and effectively compete in the market. We are a part of the National Alliance of Trade Associations (NATA), which is an organization dedicated to uniting trade associations across the United States, to leverage the synergy of joint purchasing power and negotiate national deals with major vendors in the convenience store industry.

As a cooperative, we are marked by the unity of our membership, which currently stands at north of 600 stores and the integrity of growth and leadership of successful entrepreneurs and industry veterans. We provide significant size, scale, and scope for suppliers, vendors, and service providers and use our collective buying power to benefit stores through rate negotiations, rebates, and training programs. Our partners are selected based on their ability to provide excellent customer service and a competitive edge to our members, and range from Fortune 500 companies such as Coca-Cola, Keurig Dr Pepper, and PepsiCo, to up and coming regional service providers. We have also partnered with many governmental agencies, including the TABC, TCEQ, and TWC, to advance social responsibility strategies and foster an environment focused on continuous learning and improvement.

Our passion for the community and proclivity for seeking out philanthropic opportunities has allowed us to become a platform for advocacy and engagement in North Texas. NTBA has routinely partnered with important initiatives such as the Aga Khan Foundation’s Partnerships in Action Program, American Heart Association, Carter Blood Care, Cowboy Santas Program, Home For Our Troops, North Texas Food Bank, and the Children’s Cancer Fund.

Name: Vinistas
Description:
Fundada en 2015, vinistas.com se ha afianzado en el sector de la venta de vino online con un modelo de negocio centrado en la venta de vinos de enólogos y pequeños productores con acceso limitado a los grandes canales de distribución a su comunidad de clientes,  formada por más de 4.000 vinistas registrados, en un nicho de mercado que había permanecido inexplorado en el sector de la venta de vino online en España. 

Con este modelo de negocio, cada parte hace lo que mejor se le da: vinistas.com selecciona productores según sus altos estándares de calidad y se ocupa del marketing, de la logística y de la atención al cliente; los productores pueden centrarse en la elaboración de vinos auténticos y originales y los “vinistas” acceden a vinos de calidad, poco o nada introducidos en los grandes canales de distribución, a precios accesibles.

Vinistas comercializa más de 250 vinos de unos 50 pequeños productores de vinos de calidad.

Name: Épis of Haiti
Description:
Épis of Haiti brings the vibrant flavors of the Caribbean to your kitchen with our premium spices, herbaceous marinades, and specialty products. Crafted to enrich every dish, our offerings transform home-cooked meals into extraordinary culinary experiences. Whether you're recreating authentic Caribbean recipes or adding a bold twist to your international favorites, our products are your key to unforgettable flavor. Savor the taste of tradition—elevate every meal with Épis of Haiti.

Our products are crafted with the utmost care, adhering to strict safety and legal guidelines. They are manufactured in a certified, allergen-free (i.e., nut-free, shellfish-free, diary-free) facility that prioritizes the well-being of workers and the environment. Materials are ethically sourced, and every step of the process meets industry and governmental standards. With this commitment, we ensure that our products are not only high-quality but also responsibly made.

Our Mission

Épis of Haiti is committed to offering premium, authentic spice blends, marinades, and culinary products that embody the vibrant essence of Haitian and Caribbean cuisine. Our mission is to empower home cooks, families, and food enthusiasts with high-quality, versatile ingredients that make preparing any meal effortless, healthy, and enjoyable. By using fresh, natural ingredients and crafting affordable products, we aim to bring both flavor and nourishment to every kitchen globally.

Our Vision

Our vision is to become a trusted household name known for delivering flavorful, health-conscious, and culturally authentic food products. We aspire to inspire a global community where cooking is not just a daily task but an enriching experience that brings people together, promotes wellness, and honors cultural diversity. By continuing to innovate, educate, and connect with our customers, we hope to play a key role in shaping a world where the beauty of Caribbean cuisine is widely celebrated.

Nous sommes à l’air de la découverte de l’autre et surtout du partage. Nous échangeons et communiquons de plusieurs façons et l’alimentation en fait définitivement parti. KASSY est donc l’opportunité de comprendre l’autre en voyant, côtoyant et « goutant » son savoir-faire culinaire.

Ce sont ces valeurs que nous avons à cœur de transmettre au travers de notre projet entrepreneurial.

Tout cela, en étant respectueux de l’environnement (un combat majeur pour notre génération).

Le bar à huîtres vous invite à une expérience unique de dégustation d’huîtres et de grand cru qui sauront satisfaire les palais les plus exigeants. Nous souhaitons faire de l’huître un produit d’exception en vous offrant un voyage culinaire innovant lors de vos événements professionnels et privés, mariages, soirées d’entreprise, fêtes locales ou grandes manifestations. Nos infrastructures mobiles répondent à tous les besoins qu’il s’agisse d’événements réalisés en intérieur comme en extérieur.

La prestation
Nous aménageons un espace afin de plonger vos convives dans l’univers de bar à huîtres et leur permettre de profiter pleinement de cette expérience.

Name: Feniks Inc.
Description:
Makers and distributors of the Rubi Micro-Cafe, a next generation self-serve automated coffee kiosk serving premium cafe-quality brewed coffee and specialty beverages.   Rubi was designed to bring great tasting coffee and an elevated consumer experience to locations where it has been traditionally hard to find a decent cup.  Rubi is designed as a free-standing coffee solution for retail locations, workplaces, health care facilities, and college campuses.  Rubi leverages the latest wireless telemetry for remote monitoring, intelligent alerts, self-diagnosis/repair, real time reporting, automatic updates, and touchless ordering/payments.

Recent Press Release:
SEATTLE, Wash (April 2, 2014) –Feniks Inc., a new Seattle food tech start-up, today announced it has acquired the assets from Outerwall’s Rubi coffee kiosk business. The deal includes the Rubi brand name, technology and associated intellectual property, along with the completed inventory of Rubi coffee kiosks. The financial terms of the agreement were not disclosed.

Feniks Inc. was founded earlier this year by Jim Craig, Travis Pierce, and Doug Coppenbarger - three former leaders of the Rubi kiosk product team at Outerwall. Feniks has raised $1.5m in seed funding to re-launch the Rubi Micro-Café concept over the next two months and will work closely with vending operators around the country to deploy Rubi in retail stores, college campuses, hospitals, and workplaces.

“Our work on the Rubi Micro-Café over the past few years has successfully demonstrated the demand for a next generation coffee kiosk that delivers a premium quality product with an elevated user experience,” notes CEO Jim Craig. “With consumers spending over $18B each year on coffee away from home, we are incredibly excited to continue developing the Rubi platform and bringing great coffee to new places where it is currently hard to find.”

Learn more at rubimicrocafe.com

Nous importons et distribuons du sirop de Yacon bio, un édulcorant naturel venu du Pérou, reconnu pour son index glycémique bas et ses bienfaits pour la digestion.

Nous reversons une partie de chaque vente a une association au Pérou qui accompagne et aide a rendre la vie meilleure de jeunes atteint de Trisomie.

Notre mission : offrir une alternative durable et savoureuse au sucre, qui prend soin à la fois de votre santé et de la planète.
En alliant tradition péruvienne et innovation française, nous posons les bases d’une marque responsable, tournée vers le bien-être et l’avenir.

 Avec Ekeko, sucrer devient un geste de santé.

Description:
Fundada em outubro de 2020, a Amendoeira Orgânica surgiu com o propósito de levar uma alimentação mais saudável e sustentável para todos os brasileiros por um preço justo e acessível. Trabalhamos com as melhores marcas do mercado voltadas para alimentos orgânicos, sem glúten, low carb e dietas com restrições à leite ou açúcar.

 Começamos atuando no Mercado Livre e após alguns meses, nossa loja já se encontrava posicionada entre os melhores vendedores da plataforma. Aos poucos tivemos que ir aumentando nosso quadro de colaboradores para atender o número crescente de pedidos e em pouco mais de um ano já atendíamos uma média de três mil pedidos por mês.

Desde então, aumentamos nosso catálogo, mudamos nossa empresa de local, para poder comportar um maior número de produtos e colaboradores, e começamos a atuar também em outros canais de vendas como Amazon, Shopee, Magazine Luiza e Americanas, além de renovarmos nosso site, que agora não é apenas uma loja virtual, mas também um portal de informação com notícias, receitas, dicas de consumo e de como ter uma vida mais saudável.

Name: Swiss Fine Food AB
Description:
Under the brand name CHEESE CORNER, Swiss Fine Food AB is the exclusive importer and distributor of some of the finest traditional Swiss food products within the territory of Sweden.

Swiss Fine Food AB is based in Värmdö (Stockholm county).

With CHEESE CORNER, we import AOP raclette cheese, dried pork meat, spice mixes and herbal teas - and we import them directly from the producers in Valais -who we all know personally-, to Sweden. All products are exclusive.

We also import a very selective (and select) range of raclette by-products, like raclette grills, the very traditional potato baskets (from SPIMA Handels AG), raclette slicers and spatulas.

Swiss Fine Food AB and CHEESE CORNER are a personal adventure, founded by the 3 of us: kim, Alain and Ross.

Before moving to Sweden, we’ve lived almost 50 years in Switzerland (Valais/Vaud). We love raclette, and our ambition is to bring not only good raclette to Sweden, but a whole, genuine raclette universe, with its history, savoir-faire and spirit.

Raclette is a Swiss traditional dish. A complete meal worth sharing. 

And with CHEESE CORNER, your raclette meal turns your home into a cosy chalet.

This can happen:

B2C - All you need for an authentic raclette is on https://cheesecorner.se/
B2B - We partner with hotels, restaurants or event companies to create raclette-themed events, private or corporate: https://cheesecorner.se/events/

Contact us at welcome@cheesecorner.se
… and come and visit us at https://cheesecorner.se/

Välkomna!

Description:
Cavewoman Wines is a wine store focused on helping customers find the perfect wine for any occasion - whether that occasion is a big birthday celebration or simply a rainy Tuesday night on the sofa.

We’re not so into tradition, we like to bend the rules a little. We err on the side of modern classic with a twist. While connaisseurs will still find a bottle to please them, we exist to serve the passionate amateur, the customer who wants to know more about wine, to expand their range and looking to learn a little while enjoying great wine. 

We care about who makes our wine and their stories. We’re particularly interested in highlighting female winemakers.

AdaptoLatte combines 100% natural adaptogens, nootropics, and functional mushrooms to help you start your day feeling focused, balanced, and energised.

Name: Rebel Vin ApS
Description:
Rebel Vin er historien om venner der går sammen om at lave en lille lokal butik med dejlige vine og lækre delikatesser. Kærligheden til produktet fornægter sig ikke og vi har en stor passion for den daglige luksus, hvor dagen bare bliver det bedre med lidt ekstra forkælelse som en god flaske vin, en god kop kaffe eller lækre delikatesser. Efter mange rejser til syden opstod ideen at vi skulle skabe en hyggelig butik med nærvær og hvor alle er velkommen. Intet snobberi her, det er vin uden dresscode! Vores mission er at alle gæster går i bedre humør end da de kom :-)

Kom ned vi vores flotte butik og smag dagens vine, køb nogle af vore lækre delikatesser, book billet til en af vores mange vinsmagninger, eller skriv til os hvis du gerne vil holde dit eget arrangement i butikken.

Her er plads til alle, vi kalder det "Vin uden dresscode".

Name: Crave Snacks

Description:

At the core of our platform is a synergistic combination of human milk oligosaccharides and high purity pomegranate extract. 

The purpose of this relatively simple blend is to fuel and shape the gut to provide both gut health and mitochondrial health.

Name: Food of Gods
Description: Food of Gods is revolutionising the food system, starting with one powerful ingredient: spices. Our unwavering mission is to create a healthier and more nutritious world. We source nutrient-dense and freshly harvested spices directly from family-run farms in Africa and Asia, ensuring heirloom varietals are preserved and local communities supported. By partnering with farmers who champion regenerative agricultural practices and act as guardians of bio-diverse food forests, we are making a positive impact on both people and the planet. Join us in our journey to #DeCommoditiseSpices.

Name: Chateau Divino
Description:
Chateau Divino, gevestigd in Almere, is ontstaan vanuit liefhebberij voor bijzondere kwaliteitswijnen. Wij zijn in 2012 begonnen met het importeren van wijn uit Piemonte en de Loire. Tegenwoordig is het assortiment aangevuld met nog meer prachtige wijnen uit verschillende wijnstreken in Europa, denk aan Toscane, Rhône, Rioja en Douro. Alle wijnen worden door ons persoonlijk geselecteerd en komen rechtstreeks van de wijnboer. Wij streven naar langdurige relaties met onze wijnboeren. Niet alleen als blijk van de constante kwaliteit van de wijnen maar ook zeker als blijk van de prettige samenwerking met de wijnboeren. Wij betalen eerlijke prijzen aan de wijnboeren en daardoor hebben de door ons geïmporteerde wijnen een ook een eerlijke prijs/kwaliteitsverhouding.
Dat over smaak niet te twisten valt weten wij als geen ander, daarom is er voor ieder wat wils. Van droog tot zoet en van jong en fruitig tot vol en complex. Maar ook budget speelt een rol bij het selecteren van een goede fles. Bij Chateau Divino is er dan ook voor iedere portemonnee een mooie smaak te vinden. De huiswijnen zijn persoonlijke aanraders en fijn om samen te delen. De flessen uit het hogere segment zijn vanzelfsprekend van exclusieve klasse.
Chateau Divino levert aan particulieren, Horeca en business2business en verzorgt officiële SDEN wijncursussen.

Name: Agapi
Description:
We are a small artisanal manufacturer with an obsession for SIMPLE INGREDIENTS & NUTRITION. We don’t use preservatives, colours, artificial flavours, or any tricky gums and emulsifiers to deceive your taste buds or visuals. We keep it truly SIMPLE – just milk and selective bacterial strains, following an authentic GREEK recipe that involves straining the milk approximately THREE TIMES. This process gives our yogurt its creamy texture and rich PROTEIN content, a result of genuine craftsmanship, not just fancy words :-)

Ever made a fruit  shake with just milk, colours, and a copious amount of sugar? Or squeezed a grain-sized blueberry and felt satisfied? A ton of our competition does exactly that, the trick is to just use a picture of the fruit on the packaging. Our commitment to being real goes far beyond that. We source Alphonso mangoes from Ratnagiri, blueberries, peaches, and raspberries from Chile and Poland, strawberries from Mahabaleshwar, and bananas from Andhra Pradesh. Our honey and vanilla come directly from farmers in Punjab and Chikmagalur. Most of our milk comes from farms practicing organic methods. The lengths we go to in sourcing the best speak of our intent.

Our HANDCRAFTED approach means there will always be slight variations in our products—that’s how nature made things, and that’s how we’re keeping it.

Name: Wimp Decaf Coffee Co
Description:
Decaf sucks. 
We're unsucking it.

Most decaf drinkers are tired of sacrificing taste and quality. Most coffee companies use low-quality beans and toxic decaffeination practices, leading to bland results and an unhealthy lack of choice. Delicious coffee should be enjoyed any time of day. It should be as dialed at 8pm as it is at 8am. Where are the great tasting healthy options?

Welcome Wimp. We choose our beans with craft care. Our partners in Guatemala, Colombia, and beyond create pure, clean, and wildly sophisticated beans. We use safe, flavorful methods like Swiss Water, Ethyl Acetate (EA), and Carbonic Maceration for decaffeination, ensuring clean and delicious decaf.

Wimp is more than just coffee. It’s a posse of people shaking off hustle culture. We’re choosing to enjoy life, work out loud, and have fun. Calm as fuck is a common reply to “how you doin?” around here.

We’re building Wimp in public, embracing every awkward misstep and pro move. It’s like a reality show, but with less drama and more coffee. 

Why Wimp? Someone once said decaf was for the weak. Whatever, dude. We’re owning it and making decaf the hero. We’re turning what culture says about hustle on it’s head. It’s about enjoying great coffee any-freaking-time you want. 

Let’s make decaf something you choose, not tolerate. No more chemical-laden, tasteless brews. We’re here for quality, clean beans, and heaps of fun. Don’t settle. Choose decaf, don’t tolerate it.

Name: Biscuits Création
Description:
Plus que des biscuits...

Chacun d’entre nous a dans son imaginaire sa Madeleine de Proust, qui nous replonge dans nos souvenirs d’enfance, ravivant de belles émotions.

Que ce soit un moment agréable vécu avec beaucoup de tendresse, une odeur sortant du four, des saveurs ou des textures qui éveillent nos sens…

Ces biscuits sablés personnalisés réveilleront probablement des souvenirs gravés dans vos mémoires tels les sablés bretons partagés et dévorés aux goûters.

C'est avec ces parfums en tête que nous avons imaginé ces biscuits, confectionnés à la main à Montréal. Croustillants et gourmands, ils sont composés d’ingrédients naturels, sans colorant, ni additif, ni conservateur. Les biscuits se conservent jusqu'à 2 mois à l'abri de la chaleur et de l'humidité.

 Biscuits Création détient le statut de Transformateur Artisan.

 Emballage écologique et biodégradable :
Les biscuits sont emballés dans des sachets en PLA (acide polylactique), conçus à partir de plantes et/ou de maïs, et sont donc compostables. 

 Nos fournisseurs sont basés au Canada.

 Le service s’adresse aux particuliers et aux professionnels (clients, collaborateurs et partenaires) qui souhaitent offrir un cadeau original et gourmand.

 La livraison n’est pour l’heure pas encore disponible mais un point de retrait est offert à Montréal (Rosemont-La-Petite-Patrie).

Professionnels : 
Tirez profit de notre service de biscuits personnalisables pour vos supports de communication.
Des biscuits personnalisés faits maison pour vos clients, collaborateurs et partenaires. Des biscuits à votre image pour vos événements. Des biscuits sablés à déguster sans modération pour accompagner un café ou un thé.

 Biscuits Création est Lauréate des Bourses d'Honneur 2023 pour la diversité ethnoculturelle délivrées par Entreprendre ici et le Ministère de l'Économie, de l'Innovation et de l'Énergie.

Name: The Nuva
Description:
At Nuva, we believe fresh food should be clean, safe, and honest — not just a claim on a label.

We are redefining how India experiences fruits and vegetables by combining nature’s purity with advanced, science-backed washing technology.

What We Do

Nuva offers high-quality, chemical-free, ready-to-use fruits and vegetables, purified through our signature 3-step cleaning process:
Ozone Wash → UV Sterilization → RO Purified Rinse.
This ensures 99.9% clean produce while preserving nutrition, texture, and natural freshness.

Our Purpose

To bring transparency, trust, and true cleanliness into everyday eating.
In a world where “organic” is often misunderstood, we focus on actual safety — eliminating dust, wax, pathogens, pesticide traces, and contaminants before anything reaches your kitchen.

Our Vision

To become India’s most reliable fresh-produce brand by making clean eating effortless, accessible, and consistent for every household.

Our Values

Purity First: Science-backed cleaning for real safety.
Honesty Always: No shortcuts, no surface-level claims.
Customer-Centric: Quality that builds trust every day.
Sustainability: Mindful sourcing and minimal waste practices.

Where We’re Available

Experience Nuva’s clean, ready-to-eat fruits and vegetables across multiple touchpoints:
Retail Stores
Shop No. 184, Radhakrishnan Flat, BPC Rd, near Akota Garden,
Sheetal Nagar, Akota, Vadodara, Gujarat 390020

Online
Order directly from our website: thenuva.com

What Makes Nuva Different

Triple-stage cleaning technology
Chemical-free, preservative-free produce
High hygiene standards
Farm-to-family freshness
Transparent processes
Consistent quality

Our Promise

Clean isn’t optional — it’s essential.
With Nuva, you don’t just eat fresh… You eat truly clean.

Name: CarnieBees
Description:
CarnieBees is a small, family-run beekeeping business based in Aberdeenshire, founded in 2018 by Anna, a beekeeper and apitherapy enthusiast, and her daughter Kaya. Anna's personal struggle with fibromyalgia inspired her mission to learn about apitherapy and enlighten others about its potential. With a deep-rooted passion for natural health, at CarnieBees, we specialise in crafting honey infusions as alternatives to sugary spreads and syrups, while also producing other high-quality natural bee products. Additionally we are dedicated to educating others about the use of these items.

A modest venture of catering to friends and family has flourished and CarnieBees products now grace the shelves of several cafes and shops in Aberdeen and Aberdeenshire, steadily expanding our presence across Scotland.

We collaborate closely with neighbouring beekeepers, creating a beekeeping community to bring sustainable Scottish bee products to you.

Beyond products, CarnieBees envisions a future encompassing therapeutic spaces like saunas designed to offer health assistance. Our goal is to create a holistic sanctuary where well-being and education intertwine, positively impacting lives.

With a rich heritage in aquaculture, our brand blends traditional methods with innovative practices to create a luxurious product that delights the senses. Each batch is hand-harvested and undergoes meticulous quality control, resulting in caviar that is rich in flavor and exquisite in presentation.

We pride ourselves on transparency and sustainability, working closely with local fisheries and adhering to environmentally responsible practices. Our mission is not only to offer a gourmet experience but also to contribute positively to the ecosystem and the communities we work with.

Whether you are a fine dining restaurant, a gourmet food retailer, or a discerning individual seeking an exceptional culinary experience, The Caviar Society is your trusted partner for gourmet caviar. Join us in celebrating the art of fine dining and the luxury of exceptional caviar.

Connect with us to explore our range of products and discover how we can elevate your culinary offerings!

Name: Mondanette Butchery
Description:
Established in 1983 as one man’s dream to provide superior quality products, Mondanette Butchery has grown from strength to strength. It was the dream of a young man that committed to hard work and long hours that has built Mondanette to what it is today. Never taking his eye of the fact that people will not pay for a quality product he set about establishing himself in a niche market where only the best would ever be good enough, whether it be supplier, product or hygiene

From humble beginnings we have established ourselves as suppliers of only the best quality meat money can buy. Our focus has always been meat and just meat and we continually strive to keep in touch with our clients and their specific needs. We will never lose focus of the fact that the consumers needs changes on a daily basis and with this in mind we always explore new and exciting ideas and variations that you will not find in many other butcher shops. Our variety is second to none and will always keep expanding.

Our reputation is built on our commitment to providing only the best quality products, backed up by customer service levels that we strive to make second to none.

Whilst we never lose sight of the fact that our success is built on our role as the local family butcher, offering traditional quality meat products, we have also expanded and diversified our product range to include a vast variety of exceptional cold meat products. Ferreira’s Cold Meat products was established in 2009 and with the wealth of experience acquired over years we can honestly say that you will look long and hard to find pure products on any other shelve

Finding a quality butcher is hard these days. With supermarkets forcing many independent butchers out of business, you will often have to travel a long way to buy good quality meat for your table.

Name: Two Dogs Coffee Co
Description:
Our hobby is collecting hobbies, and when we found coffee roasting something instantly clicked. Our original goal was to steer away from sugary coffees as we often found ourselves questioning what we were actually drinking if we have to add all this extra stuff just to make it taste decent. We wanted something that tasted good without adding, sugar, cream, flavor syrups (sometimes even all of the above). So, like all hobbies, we began to research what gave coffee its flavor. Could there really be coffee beans that brewed a good cup of coffee without needing additional flavorings? We went on a hunt - from local supermarkets to big named grocery stores to small coffee shops to craft roasters, we realized the coffee got better and better as we went further and further away from the distribution process. After getting locally roasted beans and having the BEST cup of coffee we thought we could ever have, we started to think about ways we could make it better ourselves and and how we could control the variables. Several books and online forums later, we started the pursuit of home coffee roasting! A messy, inconsistent batch of coffee beans later we have successfully roasted coffee beans ourselves! But it wasn’t pretty. Some were light, some were dark, and some even came out burnt. It was smokey as heck and to be honest quite terrible. Although frustrated, it made us more interested in the roasting process. We dove head first into understanding more about the roasting process and how to control the different variables. We experimented, we roasted hundreds of thousands of beans and each batch came out better than the last.
We started making bags for friends and family to see their enjoyment in a good cup of coffee. Before we knew it, we had requests for our delicious coffee roasts. An idea was born..

Two Dogs Coffee Company

We want to share our love for coffee and coffee roasting with others so they too can enjoy a good cup. Quality coffee right at you fingertips

Name: Halles de Talence

Portées par Ville Envie, foncière de proximité à l’origine du projet, les Halles participent pleinement au dynamisme de Talence.  Plus qu’un marché, elles sont devenues un véritable lieu de vie : convivialité, événements et animations font battre le cœur de la place Alcalà de Henares.

 Créer du lien social à travers des animations et partenariats culturels et associatifs
 Promouvoir une consommation responsable et durable

Description: 24Food är ett franchisekoncept inom obemannad livsmedelshandel. 24Food bedriver också teknikutveckling inom obemannad handel.

Name: Remix Beverages, Inc
Description:
Remix offers a delicious lineup of non-alcoholic beverages crafted to taste like your favorite cocktails but designed to be enjoyed with OR without alcohol. Our drinks feature an artful fusion of all-natural flavors, real juice, and electrolytes, delivering the delicious taste of classic cocktails in a guilt-free and modern way with only 3 grams of sugar and 20 calories or less per can.

Elevate your drinking game with Remix – the ultimate choice for those seeking a modern, guilt-free, and unforgettable experience.

Name: Teas By Kara
Description:
Kara stands for "Pure" in Sanskrit. From the ancient Tea Estates of Assam to the mesmerizing landscapes of Darjeeling, we sought the finest tea gardens and carefully crafted each blend that reflects the inherent flavors and unfolds the rich aromas of tea.

Guided by our commitment to purity, we ensure using only natural ingredients and ethically sourced tea leaves. We believe that Tea has an inherent ability to connect hearts and minds and its essence lies in being all natural and pure.

As the story of ‘Kara’ continues to unfold, we invite you to experience the sheer delight of each of our unique creations as we persistently craft new blends to reflect the innate flavors and character of the tea.

Name: TOGO | Cafea de specialitate
Description:
Cafeaua TOGO deschide ușa către o călătorie gustativă excepțională, aducând în prim plan cele mai prețioase arome din cele cinci colțuri ale lumii. De la plantațiile din Columbia, Brazilia, Etiopia, Kenya și Nicaragua, fiecare ceașcă de cafea TOGO capturează esența măiestriei în cultivarea și prăjirea cafelei premium.

TOGO pentru noi reprezintă mult mai mult decât cafea; este pasiunea și dedicația noastră pentru calitate, inovație și sustenabilitate. Îmbinăm plăcerea relaxării, simțurilor și conectării cu o motivație vibrantă de a crea și de a inspira.

Curajul de a te lăsa inspirat de gustul boabelor noastre de cafea TOGO este pe deplin remunerat!

Name: Casa Farinato Pasta
Description: Seit mehr als 50 Jahren mit Erfahrung & Tradition feinste Pasta artigianale aus Getreide von den besten Kornkammern Italiens mit wertvollen Weizenkeimen. Herstellung mit Bronzeschablonen damit die Oberfläche den Sugo bestens aufnimmt. Trocknungsprozess schonend bei max. 48°C während mindestens 42 Stunden damit sich die essentiellen Aminosäuren bilden und alle Nährstoffe in bester Weise erhalten bleiben. Der Sugo wird aus sizilianischen biologischen Datterini aus nachhaltigem Anbau wird erst zubereitet und erst vor Ort nach dem Rezept von Nonna Teresa gekocht erst sobald die Tomaten reif sind. Die Gemüse für Antipasti sind besonders da sie auf vulkanischer Erde angepflanzt sind und nur mit wenig natürlichen Zutaten traditionell in Gläsern eingelegt werden. Edde Weine und Geschenke-Ideen wie personalsierte Pasta-Abos bereichern das Angebot nach Ihren individuellen Wünschen und Budgets.

Name: DÉLISS
Description:
DÉLISS (Démarche Étudiante Locale, Innovante, Solidaire et Sociale)
Insta : @deliss.vd

Notre entreprise, uniquement pilotée par des étudiants, vise à promouvoir, notamment chez les jeunes, une alimentation plus responsable, c'est-à-dire plus locale, saine et respectueuse de l'environnement, tout en étant un acteur majeur de l'économie circulaire locale.
 
Problèmes actuels : Les jeunes générations sont malheureusement trop souvent contraintes financièrement de consommer des snacks/boissons de basse qualité. De plus, les petits producteurs locaux respectueux de l'environnement peinent à concurrencer les grands groupes peu soucieux de l'écologie, de notre santé ou de notre économie locale. Cela doit changer !

Notre projet de distributeurs automatiques, né d'un but idéal, vise à recréer ces liens entre producteurs et consommateurs tout en leur redistribuant la création de valeur issue de nos ventes ; 
1) Nous créons des partenariats avec les producteurs locaux pour vous proposer leurs meilleurs produits dans nos automates à des prix ultra-compétitifs grâce à notre gestion efficace des coûts.
2) Nous proposons ces produits dans nos automates accessibles 24/7 situés principalement vers les lieux éducatifs (gymnases, bibliothèques, hautes-écoles, universités).
3) Nous rémunérons uniquement des étudiants pour remplir les machines et gérer toute la partie stratégique de l'entreprise. C'est un premier pas dans le monde des affaires et ce revenu permet pour beaucoup de sortir de la précarité étudiante.

Enfin, nos critères de sélection très exigeants (sans gluten, végan, sans lactose, produit en CH, bio, compostable/recyclable majoritairement) nous permettent d'être accessible pour tous et d'être le plus compétitif en termes d'impact environnemental (baisse de Co2), nutritionnel (en moyenne B, ce qui est 3x mieux que le conventionnel) et social !

Le mieux ? Nos produits sont de réels délices !
Venez découvrir notre dizaine d'automates à proximité de vous (EPFL, Unil) !

He was aware that India is a protein-deficient and lactose-intolerant country. The moment he realized the benefits of skyr, he knew that India needed a healthy product like this. Description:
DELI VINO is a unique initiative by wine experts specializing in exclusively importing rare types of alcohol. As the name suggests, it’s a combination of a store where wines are sold alongside gourmet delicacies (delicatessen) and an eclectic neighborhood bar, allowing customers to enjoy a wide selection of high-quality alcohol from around the world at accessible prices.

Description: Depuis 2011, le Marché public de Pointe-aux-Trembles , organisme à but non lucratif, est devenu un pilier incontournable de la vie de quartier estivale. Chaque samedi de l'été, de la fin mai à la fin septembre, la Place du Village se transforme en un lieu vibrant d'échanges, de découvertes et de convivialité. Niché au cœur du quartier historique de Pointe-aux-Trembles, en bordure du majestueux fleuve Saint-Laurent, cet événement saisonnier attire les foules de 10h à 15h. Mettant en vedette des maraîchers locaux, des commerces et des artisans du quartier et d'ailleurs, le Marché offre une diversité exceptionnelle. Name: Smith Bros. Crafted Beverages
Description:
The brainchild of 9-year old Felix and 6-year old Everett, Smith Bros. Crafted Beverages sets out to produce the best lemonade and limeade you've ever had. Each week, we also kick it up a notch with a rotating signature beverage, always using fresh and interesting flavors - like our Prickly Pear Limeade or "Sparks and Stripes", a bomb pop style layered drink with three entirely different flavors stacked on top of one another and topped with pop rocks for some fireworks! We also have our famous “Shark Attack” Blue Raspberry Limeade or Lemonade available every week.

In addition to these fun and unique signature drinks, our commitment to packing the absolute most flavor in every glass is unwavering. You won't find any watered down or overly syrupy drinks at this tent. Our everyday Limeade and Lemonade is downright delicious and sure to put a smile on your face. 

These boys have very big ideas and were the driving force behind starting Smith Bros. Crafted Beverages. Everett is a master of flavors in the kitchen, creating the majority of our wildest and most delicious creations, like a cotton candy lemonade and our beloved Fall signature "Apple Cinnamon Sparkle". Both of these kiddos love serving and are amazing to talk with. 

You can find us most Wednesday nights from 6-8pm at the Bondurant Farmer's Market and occasionally other local events. Hope to see you there!

As the second generation at Il Tuo Banco we are continuously reconceptualizing the way of doing business "on the road," starting from redefining our values such as sustainability and our purpose to promote an ethical business that generates wealth and development for all those involved in the supply chain, and that gives back to our customers not only excellent products but also a community in which they can feel at home.

We maintain strict quality standards in the industry, and have an unshakable commitment to sustainable agriculture. It's our mission to provide to you the best 
culinary products for cooking, eating and entertaining.

Name: MagMat Vin & Smil
Description:
MagMat Vin & Smil, er stiftet i 2024 af Vagn Kristensen.

Vagn er uddannet tjener og sommelier.

Vagn laver vinsmagninger, sælger vin og vingaver for både private og virksomheder og kan hyres ind som freelance-tjener eller sommelier af virksomheder.

Lidt mere om Vagn.

Jeg er Tjener helt ind i hjertet.

Jeg elsker gæster, elsker at give folk en god oplevelse, uanset om det er et bryllup, en kurv til en virksomhed eller en vinsmagning, jeg har det fantastisk når alt er gået perfekt og gæsterne er lykkelige og booker sølvbrylluppet med det samme eller flere vingaver.

Jeg elsker vin, men vin uden alt det nørdede. Vin er ret simpelt: “en gæret most af pressede druer på flaske” og så selvfølgelig et umådeligt smukt håndværk af vinbonden. 

Jeg er uddannet tjener i Svendborg i 1994 og sommelier uddannet i London i slutningen af 1998. 

Jeg har solgt vin, bestyret en pibe forretning på strøget, haft store stillinger i hotelbranchen, været selvstændig med salg af Pokemon kort, og meget meget mere. 

Ja, jeg har prøvet rigtig meget forskelligt, der alt sammen har formet mig til den jeg er i dag. Det har også givet mig viden om, hvad der driver og motiverer mig. 

Det hele vil jeg nu bruge til at skabe mit eget, fordi jeg VIL lave noget jeg er god til og noget jeg elsker. 

Håber I vil støtte mig og mit MagMat projekt. Jeg lover jer alle rigtig god Vin & masser Smil.

Vagn

Entreprise familiale historique, Les 3 Caves s'est imposée comme une référence incontournable dans la distribution et la production de boissons depuis sa fondation en 1875. Forts de plus d'un siècle d'expertise et d'une passion transmise de génération en génération, nous sommes fiers de vous offrir une gamme complète et diversifiée de produits de qualité.

Nous servons une clientèle variée, qu'il s'agisse de professionnels (cafés, hôtels, restaurants ), de particuliers  en quête de découvertes, d'associations (clubs sportifs , comités festifs ) animant vos événements, ou des grandes et moyennes surfaces (GMS) .

Description:
Maison ODIN est une marque française de thé qui célèbre l’excellence d’un savoir-faire artisanale réalisé en France, à partir de feuilles rigoureusement sélectionnées.

Nous sommes des passeurs d’émotion, des interprètes sensibles d’un thé façonné avec justesse, lenteur et respect de la matière.

À travers chaque création, Maison ODIN incarne l’art du thé à la française, un art qui allie précision, élégance, et présence poétique.

Découvrez nos thés sur le site et prenez le temps de les dégustés !

Description: L'entreprise “Les Caves Notre Dame” situé à Montpellier, est une spécialisée dans les vins, champagnes et spiritueux. Elle s'adresse aux particuliers et aux professionnels, notamment de la restauration en leur proposant une très large gamme de produits (+ de 3000 références).

We are a "Little store with the BIG selection!" Our great prices, convenient location, and excellent customer service makes Elma Wine & Liquor the best!

Whether you are picking up a bottle of wine on your way to a party, stocking your home bar, or planning a large event, Elma Liquor is the place to shop. With parking just steps from the front door and a knowledgeable staff eager and ready to help you make a selection, the value provided is difficult to beat.

Many of the brands that you know and trust, such as Barefoot, Mondavi, Bully Hill, Caymus, Mirassou, Three Olives, Pinnacle, Jack Daniels, and many more are in stock alongside a large selection of unique wines and liquors from around the world. Con la comodidad de una casona antigua de vinos y capacidad para hasta 12 personas, brindamos un entorno perfecto para sommeliers, pequeños productores, importadores de bebidas o empresas que buscan un lugar privado y equipado para sus encuentros. 
Un espacio pensado para fomentar la creatividad y las conexiones en el mundo del vino.

Name: Little Big Flavour Kits
Description:
For foodies with a passion for culture cuisine, we are the sustainable Sri Lankan spice kit brand.  Our kits feature tried-and-tested  family recipes along with authentic spices, directly sourced from a network of small family farms in Sri Lanka. Inside each pack, you will find a carefully curated selection of whole and ground spices, coconut milk powder, and a chilli sachet—everything you need to create a delicious, home-cooked Sri Lankan curry.
Our recipes and spices are rooted in Sri Lankan tradition, ensuring an authentic culinary experience. The kits cater to vegan diets without compromising on flavour or quality, we are after all foodies at heart. 
Deeply committed to sustainability, our inner packs are made with NatureFlex cellulose packaging, which is readily home compostable so that our customers can enjoy our products while making an eco-friendly choice, reducing their environmental footprint.

Name: Bonjerk
Description: Bonjerk is an Asian spiced jerky company combining flavors inspired by beloved East-Asian dishes with thoughtfully sourced meats from our partner farms. Our products are deeply connected to our Chinese roots; like the savory Char Siu Pork Jerks from char siu baos at Sunday dim sum, and spicy Málà Sichuan Pork from the iconic Chinese dish mapo tofu. As a company committed to supporting ecosystem restoration, Bonjerk sources meat from ranches who are dedicated to caring for their animals and building resilient soil. We value transparency in our supply chain, bridging the gap between producers and consumers while prioritizing equitable partnerships with our farmers to honor the work they do for us and the planet.

Name: NY Spice Shop
Description:
Brimming with love, care, and enthusiasm for our craft, NY Spice Shop was established as a love letter to the culture and diversity that finds a home in New York City. As a certified minority and women-owned business, we seek to honor the ideals and dreams from all the communities that make up our glorious melting pot of a city. Founded to celebrate the world’s spices, teas, and herbs; our mission is to share this rich history with you. Through our carefully crafted and home-tested selections, we hope to build an appreciation for the varied cuisine that can be discovered within our prosperous city.

Presenting only the finest quality of spices, teas, dried fruits, and herbs, NY Spice Shop is committed to offering only the best ingredients to you and your family. Our products are tried and tested in our own home kitchens before they are deemed ready for yours. With blends lovingly created by our in-house staff, we believe that our enthusiasm and passion will be showcased in the food you eat and enchant your senses as much as it does ours.

Reflecting our belief in family, love, and commitment to a great customer experience, NY Spice Shop hopes to bring the energy and grandiose of New York City alive on your taste buds. Join us for an adventure through the delectable teas, herbs and spices this world has to offer!

Spices | Herbs | Teas | Nuts | Dried Fruits | Healthy Snack Packs | Bulk Spices | WholeSale Herbs & Spices | Spices & Seasoning | Hard To Find Chilies

Description:
Seit 1997 teilen wir unsere Leidenschaft für Portwein und freuen uns über jeden, der dieses traditionsreiche Getränk aus dem wunderbaren Weinland Portugal für sich entdeckt. 
Portwein entsteht im spektakulären oberen Douro-Tal im Nordosten Portugals in dem weltweit ersten geschützten Anbaugebiet für Weinbau (seit 1756).

Später kamen bei uns die portugiesischen Rot- und Weißweine ins Sortiment hinzu, sowie der einzigartige Vinho Verde.

Entdecken Sie mit uns die faszinierende Vielfalt und den unverwechselbaren Charme der portugiesischen Weine.

On therootedstore.com, you’ll find specialty coffee, whole-leaf green tea, premium nuts, homemade-style multigrain mixes, and snacks kids actually like, without the junk. All rooted in clean ingredients and made to fit healthy routines.

Here on LinkedIn, we talk food, wellness, and the everyday choices that shape how we live, as well as what’s next at The Rooted Store.

Description:
A rare and unique find, Hederman Smoke House, the only traditional smokehouse of its kind in Ireland, has been producing exceptional smoked seafood, and some of the world’s finest smoked salmon since 1982. 

This family business, run by Frank Hederman, his wife Caroline and their team, also produces smoked eel, mackerel, haddock, mussels, butter, and spices, and a range of speciality dishes for sale locally and online.

In 2023 we launched our new Tasting Room, courtyard and walled garden on site, where you can shop in comfort with easy parking, and enjoy tours and private events in season. Savour pre-booked platters or bespoke menus with food straight from the smoke house and be entertained with anecdotes and expert advice on smoking.

#BakeNBell #LuxuryCakes #DubaiBakery #OnlineCakeShop #CakeDeliveryDubai #CustomCakes #BespokeCakes #DessertLovers #DubaiBusiness

Name: Pesche
Description:
Pesche redefines the mocktail experience, blending the art of non-alcoholic beverages with wellness. Each can is a crafted with adaptogens, herbs, and nootropics, thoughtfully chosen to elicit specific feelings and sensations for every occasion. More than just a drink, Pesche is a journey of taste and health, meticulously formulated by a registered dietitian with a trio of functional ingredients.

But that's just the beginning. Pesche elevates the mocktail realm with extraordinary flavor profiles, mirroring the essence of your favorite alcoholic cocktails. Our signature flavors - Lift: a Peach Mango Margarita, Kickback: a Strawberry Mint Mojito, and Unwind: a Tart Cherry Shirley - offer a sophisticated twist on classic favorites.

Understanding the importance of accessibility, Pesche was born out of a desire to fill the void in the non-alcoholic beverage market. We cater to those who seek the luxury of a fine cocktail without the effects of a hangover later, whether for health reasons or personal choice. Pesche is more than a beverage; it's a celebration of choice, offering an exclusive, indulgent experience for everyone. Join us in embracing a new era of mindful drinking, where choosing not to drink is no longer boring, but exciting.

Our expansive inventory features boutique producers, organic and kosher options, and rare finds from regions including Algeria, Hungary, Greece, Israel, and New York State.  ￼ ￼

Recognized as the Best Wine and Liquor Store in Westchester, our commitment to excellence extends beyond our products. We provide complimentary local delivery to White Plains, Scarsdale, Rye Brook, and surrounding areas, along with nationwide shipping services.  ￼ ￼

Our in-store experiences include complimentary tastings, exclusive masterclasses, and private events in our dedicated tasting room. We also honor our community heroes—police, fire, EMS, and military personnel—with special discounts every Wednesday.  ￼

At Westchester Wine Warehouse, we blend expertise with hospitality, ensuring every customer finds the perfect bottle for any occasion.

The Big Guava Tampa is a family owned business. You will usually find all 3 sisters behind the counter. We are committed to bringing you a healthy and energizing experience. Our shop features a variety of energy-boosting teas, nutrient dense smoothies, and delicious acai bowls that will nourish your body and satisfy your taste buds. We also offer protein-packed donuts that are perfect for a guilt-free treat.

Our shop is not only a place to grab a quick bite, but also a space for you to relax, work, and study. We offer free Wi-Fi and a cozy atmosphere that will make you feel right at home. Whether you're meeting with friends, working on a project, or studying for an exam, we've got you covered.

In addition to our food and drinks, we also showcase local art that is available for purchase as well as a Little Free Library where you can pick up a book or leave a book. Name: Primal Meats
Description:
Welcome to Primal Meats! We specialise in providing high-quality, sustainable meats that promote the regeneration of our planet and its ecosystems.
Our selection of products includes beef, lamb, mutton, hogget and wild game. We aim to provide our customers with reassurance of nutrient quality and traceability, by sourcing meat that is organically reared, 100% grass-fed, Pasture for Life and from farmers who are transitioning to these regenerative methods. You can support our transitioning farmers by joining our Primal Stakes Club.
We offer a subscription box service that helps us balance all the cuts from the carcass, allowing us to buy whole animals from great small-scale farms. By subscribing to our meat boxes, you're not only supporting our business but also becoming more adventurous in the kitchen and ensuring you always have a freezer full of nutritious meat.
At Primal Meats, we value quality and integrity, providing excellent customer service and free access to our "Primal Experts" who can answer your questions about health and wellness, following an ancestral approach. We are confident in the quality of our meat and offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
At Primal Meats, we believe in creating a supply ecosystem, using holistic management to work with every link in our supply chain, supporting existing businesses that are doing things well.
Thank you for supporting our business and helping us move towards a better future for our livestock and the planet.

Description: Weine Wagner ist ein Wein- und Champagnerhandel für ausgewählte Winzererzeugnisse. Der Handel mit Wein und Champagner ist eine familiäre Tradition. Mein Großvater Manfred E. Wagner hat mit dem Import von Champagner bereits in den 1970er Jahren den Grundstein für diesen Wein- und Champagnerhandel gelegt. Zu dem Champagnerweingut Guerre et Fils aus Venteuil bei Épernay besteht ein Jahrzehntelanger guter Kontakt. Da mein Großvater auch sehr viel Zeit in den Abruzzen Italiens verbracht hat, bestehen heute auch langjährige, gute Kontakte zu Weingütern in dieser Region. Wir fühlen uns als familiärer Wein- und Champagnerhandel sehr stark mit den italienischen Weingütern und dem Champagnerweingut Guerre et Fils verbunden. Die Basis des Wein- und Champagnerhandels Weine Wagner ist langjähriges Vertrauen in konstant gute und hochwertige Wein- und Champagnererzeugnisse.

Otkir: Elevate Your Culinary Experience with Pure, Natural Spices and Herbs

Welcome to Otkir, where the rich aroma and authentic flavors of premium spices and herbs transform every meal into a gourmet experience. At Otkir, we believe in the power of nature to bring out the best in your culinary creations.

Our Mission

At Otkir, our mission is to provide the highest quality spices and herbs, sourced from the finest growers around the world. We are committed to sustainability, fair trade practices, and supporting local farmers to ensure that every product we offer is not only good for your taste buds but also for the planet.

Why Choose Otkir?

Premium Quality: We meticulously select and process our spices and herbs to maintain their natural essence, aroma, and flavor.
Health Benefits: Our products are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that contribute to a healthier lifestyle.
Sustainable Practices: We are dedicated to eco-friendly practices, from sustainable sourcing to minimal packaging.
Fair Trade: We support fair trade practices, ensuring that our farmers and suppliers are treated with respect and fairness.
Innovative Blends: Discover our unique spice blends that bring a modern twist to traditional flavors, perfect for culinary enthusiasts and professional chefs alike.
Our Products

Explore our diverse range of spices and herbs, including saffron, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and more. Whether you are looking for single-origin spices or expertly crafted blends, Otkir has something to elevate every dish.

Join the Otkir community and embark on a journey of flavor and wellness. Follow us for delicious recipes, cooking tips, and the latest updates on our products.

Elevate your taste. Choose Otkir.

De Biertuup is iemand met een passie voor bier. Deze passie gaat verder dan alleen het drinken van bier. Het gaat ook over de ervaring die erbij komt kijken. Want iedereen kan bier drinken. Zo worden er geregeld brouwerijen bezocht om te kijken hoe dit overheerlijke bier wordt gebrouwen. 

Deze passie wil De Biertuup dan ook graag overbrengen naar anderen. Maar hoe doet De Biertuup dit? Dat kan op verschillende manieren. Zo houdt De Biertuup zijn mede-tuupen graag op de hoogte via social media, vindt De Biertuup het leuk om dingen te organiseren voor zijn mede tuupen (proeverijen, bierwandelingen, bierworkshops en nog véél meer) én brouwt De Biertuup zijn eigen bier om samen met zijn mede-tuupen te drinken!

At Finally, we believe candy should be fun, delicious, and guilt-free. That’s why we’ve revolutionized traditional sweets by creating candy that satisfies your cravings without compromising your health.

With only 95 calories and a Nutri-Score A, they’re the perfect blend of indulgence and nutrition. Whether you’re treating yourself or sharing with loved ones, Finally Candy proves that healthy and tasty can go hand in hand.

We’re on a mission to bring joy back to candy—because life is sweeter when you can enjoy it guilt-free. 

 What Makes Us Different?

No Added Sugar: Enjoy the sweetness you love without the sugar overload.
Packed with Fiber: Each bag delivers 35g of healthy fiber, helping you stay nourished.
Natural Ingredients: No artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives—just plant-based goodness.
For Everyone: Perfect for low-sugar diets, kids, diabetics, and anyone seeking a healthier lifestyle.
Finally Candy is more than just a snack; it’s a movement toward better choices, smarter ingredients, and a whole lot of fun.

 Ready to join the candy revolution? Explore our range and indulge without compromise.

Finally Candy: Redefining candy, one bite at a time.

Marasby Market helps wine lovers to discover the best English winemakers, and then allows them to buy their wines direct, at the same prices available at the vineyard itself. It's better for people. It's better for producers. It's better for the planet.

The Marasby English Wine Tasting Club brings the best English wines to a fantastic venue in London Bridge. At monthly tastings in the Marasby clubroom, you can discover delicious English wines, and meet the amazing people who make them, without leaving central London.

Description:
Cooperativa Agricolă Integrată "Țara Mea" a fost înființată în anul 2014 din dorința inițiatorilor proiectului de a reuni cât mai mulți producători agricoli pentru a putea să-și desfacă marfă în marile lanțuri de magazine. Pentru început, un grup de legumicultori din județul Olt s-au asociat și astfel au fost puse bazele Cooperativei.
De la finalul anului 2016, suntem prezenţi sub brandul “Țara Mea” în retail cu o gama largă de produse ce cuprinde legume şi fructe, conserve, carne de porc, carne de pasăre, ouă, lactate si brânzeturi, produse de morărit si panificaţie, precum şi altele. 
Cooperativa iși desfasoară activitatea în județele Arad, Brașov, Giurgiu, Satu-Mare, Buzău, Olt, Hunedoara, Galați, Prahova, Călărași și în Municipiul București și asigură circa 4.000 de locuri de muncă.

Tony’s Tap Water comes straight out of a reverse-osmosis machine in Austin, Texas. We add back the minerals and electrolytes your body actually needs. Nothing more. Nothing hidden. No virtue signaling.
We run the company the same way. Execution over noise. Clear thinking over corporate fluff.
As we grow, we’re looking for people who operate the same way — direct, capable, and comfortable taking ownership without hand-holding. If that sounds like you, we’d love to connect.
