Name: Survival Supply House
Description:
My name is Chuck Trautman and I got into the survival supply business because my friends and family are UNPREPARED for natural and man-made disasters. And so are the majority of the US population.

Why should you listen to me? I’m a US Marine combat veteran who wants to prepare you to survive whatever the world throws at us.

In the Southeast, there are hurricanes and flooding. In the Midwest, there are tornados and flooding.

In the West, there are earthquakes and wildfires. There are thunderstorms that can knock out electricity everywhere.

And if you feel none of these pose a risk to you, ask yourself, would you be prepared for a cyber-attack or other external threats which could shut down your electricity, water, and create food supply shortages?

Every family needs a disaster plan, and every plan should include food, water and a few basic survival tools. Good news - that’s what we supply.

The food supplies you receive from Sgt Chuck's Survival Supply House have a 25-year shelf life, our freeze-dried and dehydrated foods include premium meats and vegetarian and gluten-free options. We also offer basic survival equipment (first aid, "bug out" bags, water storage containers, etc)

Gain the peace of mind that your family WILL survive a disaster with Sgt Chuck’s Survival Supply House.

Prepare For Life. Visit https://www.survivalsupplyhouse.com/ to place your order today!

We ship our products across the U.S.A. (Free Shipping for the lower 48 states).

Name: Ubofood Vietnam Joint Stock Company
Description:
Ubofood’s optimal food system was officially operated from the end of 2019, by the founders with more than 18 years of experience and enthusiasm in the food industry, and clean agriculture.
In a short time, Ubofood has quickly won the love and trust of a large number of consumers, honored to become the "Priority Trusted Brand of 2022" organized by Business and Commerce Magazine.

The difference of Ubofood is the network of delivery points (POS/Mini POS stations) located throughout residential areas, apartments, office buildings, hubs, etc... Each POS is equipped with standard refrigerators and freezers, helping food to be preserved at temperatures from 0℃ to 4℃, ensuring our customers get the best quality and fresh products.

OUTSTANDING POINTS:

• The outstanding point of Ubofood's system is the smooth and closed connection between all stages of the food distribution process from Farm to Production - Slaughter / Harvest - Preliminary Processing - Preservation -
Transport - Receiving products.
• This makes it possible to optimize operating costs and contributes to the products price that is 10-15% lower than the market and
always stable.
• Moreover, the economic sharing model with "transshipment points" - which are grocery stores/individuals/enterprises, also contributes to increasing income and brings practical benefits to Ubofood's partners.

Name: OVACARE
Description:
Acreditamos na singularidade de cada mulher. Suas histórias, corpos e jornadas merecem mais do que soluções genéricas.

Nos dedicamos a criar alternativas naturais que ressoam com a sua liberdade e estilo de vida consciente. O poder de escolher como cuidar de si mesma está em suas mãos.

Oferecemos mais do que produtos; somos uma parceira que respeita a liberdade de escolha e incentiva um estilo de vida saudável.

Nossa missão é clara: apoiar você em sua jornada para que se torne protagonista em sua própria história de saúde e bem-estar. Todas nós merecemos acesso a produtos que promovam nossa saúde de forma segura, natural e que fortalecem a nossa autonomia e bem-estar integral.

Somos uma fonte de autocuidado e equilíbrio, impulsionando as mulheres com SOP, Endometriose e outras dificuldades hormonais, a se sentirem confiantes, empoderadas e plenas. 
Acreditamos que cada mulher é uma declaração viva de poder.

Na Ovacare, a autonomia sobre os nossos corpos é nosso pilar e reforçamos todos os dias: a escolha é sua.

Construímos uma comunidade que empodera mulheres e, juntas, cultivamos hábitos saudáveis que promovem a saúde feminina e o bem-estar.

Ovacare, a solução natural que transforma sua jornada de autocuidado em uma declaração diária de liberdade e poder pessoal.

KhetiValah presents
 KrushiAharam

Rooted in Agriculture. Refreshing Every Journey.

Highways are more than roads — they are journeys of people, produce, and purpose.
KrushiAharam is designed as a new-age rural stop, where agriculture, refreshment, wellness, and experiences come together naturally.

At KrushiAharam, travelers don’t just stop to eat — they pause, refresh, and reconnect. From clean, hygienic facilities and refreshing rest areas to farm-fresh food, medicinal and aromatic leafy soups, and thoughtfully curated rural experiences, every element is inspired by the land that feeds us.

Our spaces celebrate farm-to-plate food, showcase authentic agricultural produce through KhetiCorner, and open doors to agri-tourism experiences that help people understand where their food truly comes from. Rooted in villages, fields, and farmer wisdom, KrushiAharam brings rural India closer to every journey.

Whether you’re a traveler seeking a meaningful break, a family exploring nature, or a citizen curious about agriculture — KrushiAharam welcomes you.

Food • Farms • Wellness • Experiences
Not just a stop. A connection to the soil. 

Team #KhetiValah

Name: Nutriceará - De Bem Com A Vida
Description:
Olá, seja bem-vindo à NutriCeará!

Nossa história começou em 28 de novembro de 2017, quando nos tornamos franqueados da De Bem Com a Vida, uma marca consolidada no mercado de produtos saudáveis. Nossa primeira loja foi inaugurada no Shopping RioMar Fortaleza, e, com o sucesso e a confiança dos nossos clientes, rapidamente expandimos nossa atuação. Hoje, totalizamos 10 lojas em toda a capital, sempre comprometidos com a promoção da saúde e do bem-estar.

Ao longo dessa trajetória, enfrentamos desafios, aprendemos com os erros e aproveitamos oportunidades para crescer e aprimorar nossos serviços. Acreditamos que o sucesso vem da aprendizagem contínua, da inovação e, acima de tudo, da paixão pelo que fazemos.

Nosso propósito é claro: oferecer produtos saudáveis, naturais e de alta qualidade, prezando pelo atendimento humanizado e pela experiência do cliente. Nosso portfólio conta com alimentos a granel, suplementos, produtos orgânicos, funcionais e dietéticos, garantindo mais opções para quem busca um estilo de vida equilibrado.

Com o apoio dos nossos clientes e a dedicação da nossa equipe, seguimos crescendo e inovando. Acreditamos que uma boa alimentação transforma vidas, e essa é a nossa maior motivação!

 NutriCeará – Cuidando de você, sempre!

 Que seja infinito o que nos faz bem! 
 Venha fazer parte dessa jornada com a NutriCeará!

You finally made it to CoHeaven Coffee!

Coheaven Coffee is here for you, offering a sip of relaxation during those exhausting or fast-paced times, transporting you to a place of nirvana. Coheaven is dedicated to you, and only you.

Name: Zenforest Coffee Roasters
Description:
Zenforest Coffee has a curated collection of coffee having its origin in Western Ghats of India, where coffee and nature coexist in perfect harmony. With over 15 years of hands-on coffee farming experience and a legacy spanning three generations, we’ve taken our love for coffee to the next level. Inspired by the growing appreciation for specialty coffee, we decided to go beyond the ordinary—transforming the finest beans from our estate into a symphony of flavors through our unique fermentation and aging processes. The result? Coffees as bold and unforgettable as the rainforest itself.

Nestled in Coorg, our state-of-the-art fermentation and aging house is where the magic happens. From honey-washed delights to barrel-aged wonders, spice-kissed brews, and the rare Coffee Cascara, each blend is crafted with an artisan’s touch. Every bean tells a story, every roast is a masterpiece, and every cup brings you closer to the soul of the Western Ghats.

At Zenforest Coffee, we’re not just about coffee—we’re about creating an adventure in every cup. With a commitment to quality and a deep respect for nature, we source, process, and roast the finest beans with care. So whether you’re sipping a bold espresso or a smooth pour-over, you can taste the wild, untamed spirit of the forest in every sip. Welcome to Zenforest—where coffee and nature unite for an experience like no other.

Description:
UnBlend Foods is an FMCG food & beverage startup reimagining India's favorite foods through science, innovation, and taste. We transform everyday Indian meals into nutritional powerhouses without compromising on flavor making wellness accessible through the foods India already loves.

Our Story:
The idea for UnBlend was born from a simple realization: while Indians are deeply connected to their traditional foods, most everyday meals fall short on the essential nutrients needed for peak performance, faster recovery, and long-term health. The market is flooded with supplements, Snacks, and westernized health foods, but there's been a critical gap nutritious versions of the foods Indians actually eat every day.

We exist to fill that gap.

What We Do:
Using food science and innovative technology, we're reimagining beloved staples and foods like paneer, dosa and idli batter, and plant-based alternatives of Indian favorites ones.

Every Unblend product is:
✓ High in protein – Fuel your body with what it needs
✓ Low in carbs and fat – Smart nutrition for modern lifestyles
✓ Delicious – Because health shouldn't mean compromise
✓ Familiar – Fits seamlessly into your daily routine

Our Mission:
To make nutrition effortless. We believe healthy eating shouldn't require drastic lifestyle changes, expensive supplements, or giving up the foods you grew up with.

Unblend brings better nutrition and better taste to the kitchen table one beloved Indian dish at a time.

Our goal is to deliver a premium cafe experience that’s accessible and affordable, making us the go-to spot for food lovers and coffee enthusiasts alike.

Inspired by the glamour of Bollywood, our cafe offers a cozy and inviting ambiance where every visit feels like a special occasion. Whether you're dropping by for a quick coffee, enjoying a meal with friends, or just looking for a place to unwind, Bollywood Brews is the perfect destination.

Join us at Bollywood Brews - The Coffee Caravan, where every sip and bite is a celebration of taste, quality, and the vibrant spirit of Bollywood.

Mais de 40 unidades espalhadas pelo Brasil levam diariamente a qualidade e o sabor da nossa marca.

A Bread King foi a primeira a introduzir o conceito de padaria congelada no Brasil, atendendo a um mercado em constante expansão. Hoje conta com um mix de mais de 200 produtos, feitos com ingredientes da maior qualidade, sem conservantes e utilizando metodologia de ultracongelamento.

Name: T By Daniel
Description:
Welcome to T By Daniel, where every cup of tea is a sip of magic! Founded by Daniel and his wife, our journey began with a simple mission: to turn ordinary tea time into an extraordinary experience filled with joy, kindness, and excitement.

At T By Daniel, we believe that tea is more than just a beverage; it's an adventure in every cup. Our shop is a vibrant haven where colors pop and smiles are served as freely as our tea. We're not just selling tea; we're creating memories, building community, and spreading happiness.

Our selection of teas is meticulously crafted, ranging from the timeless "Night in Rio" to the comforting "Famous Lion Chai." Each blend is carefully chosen to ensure the highest quality and most delightful flavors, whether you're looking for a burst of fruity freshness or a soothing spiced warmth.

But T By Daniel is more than just a tea company. We're a movement dedicated to infusing life with kindness. Through our unique community initiatives and engaging customer interactions, we aim to make a positive impact on every individual who steps into our tea world.

Join us on this flavorful journey and discover why T By Daniel is not just a place to buy tea—it's a place to experience life. Follow us for updates on new blends, special events, and our journey as we continue to bring joy and connection to the world of tea.

Whether you're a tea aficionado or a curious newcomer, we promise a visit to T By Daniel will be anything but ordinary. Let's brew some joy together, one cup at a time!

Clean. Functional. Actually enjoyable.

With large SKU mix, our product portfolio ranges from Dry Fruits, Nuts, Dates, Berries, Roasted Seeds to Assorted Combo Gift packs along with our most nutritious & popular Energy Laddu. From a vibrant city rich in heritage, the story began. Every detail in 'Shira" is crafted with the soul of its place. More than a flavor, it's a heartfelt, authentic experience with an elegance that mirrors the city where it all started.

Name: Each-a-Cup, Singapore
Description: Drink Good, Feel Good! Back in the 1990s, a food connoisseur once ran a confectionery business in the land of Taiwan. Intrigued by the innovative combination of delicious milk teas and chewy tapioca balls called boba in the street food markets, he decided to travel 3,094km away from the heartland of Asia, just to bring this brilliant invention known as bubble tea, to Singapore. In 1999, Each-A-Cup was birthed. With a heart desire for each and every one to enjoy a special cup of tasty bubble   tea, while absorbing the health benefits of the individual drinks at the same time. With strong ingenuity and passion to create innovative recipes while strictly concocting to high standards with every cup satisfying yet revitalizing to encapsulate our brand’s essence of “the goodness of each cup”, we have successfully stretched our footprints and established our presence not just in Singapore, but also in the lands of Malaysia, Indonesia and Brunei

Name: Mt. Comfort Coffee
Description:
Mt. Comfort started with the concept of premium single-origin (no blends) whole bean coffee that is...super fresh (shipped immediately after roasting) and super affordable (think coffee shop coffee at club store sizes and prices).

Our goal continues today and everyday to provide the most excellent single origin coffee to our customers. We are constantly searching the globe for the best coffee producers in the world. Our team consists of farmers who understand the art of growing the perfect bean and veteran coffee experts that have the craftsmanship and experience to roast the bean to its highest quality. This combination gives Mt. Comfort Coffee a unique coffee experience we guarantee our customers will love.

Name: Alea Chocolates
Description:
Farming, Manufacturing, Café, Retail, Export

Alea Chocolates is an award-winning chocolate brand based in Bicol, Philippines, championing sustainability, ethical sourcing, and local farming. From our heritage farm to our café at SM City Legazpi, we craft premium, healthier cacao products—sugar-free and proudly Filipino.

Our success is rooted in quality, innovation, and community. We’re a recognized Key Cacao Processor by the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) Bicol and trusted by Michelin-starred chefs and global culinary leaders. 

In 2024, we joined the Philippine Tablea Competition for the first time, proudly representing Bicol—and made history as the first Bicolano Champion. Our Alea Tsokolate Lemon Latte was judged the country’s best tsokolate drink by top celebrity chefs.

This milestone was followed by another national honor: the Presidential Award for Outstanding MSME 2025, where we were nominated by DTI for our excellence in enterprise and impact in the region.

We’re also a Partner for Youth Employment with DepEd, providing real work experience and business skills to students who work while studying—empowering the next generation of entrepreneurs.

Alea’s integrated model—from farm to café—continues to serve both people and planet. With demand rising for ethical, high-quality cacao, we’re proud to elevate Bicol’s cacao industry and lead sustainable chocolate innovation in Southeast Asia.

Name: True Story
Description:
In a world seeking healthier and sustainable food choices, True Story Organics was created from the trusted legacy of Gulab Oils to address the growing challenges in agriculture, soil health, chemical-laden food, and unsustainable farming practices.

At True Story Organics, we offer a wide range of organic millets, pulses, natural sweeteners, and cold-pressed oils, produced using sustainable farming methods and sourced directly from farmers, eliminating middlemen. This approach makes sure that farmers receive fair profits while consumers enjoy high-quality, certified organic products at the best prices. Our products carry certifications from Ecocert, Jaivik Bharat, and Indian Organic Certifications, guaranteeing zero chemicals, zero carbon footprint, and complete transparency.

To know more about True Story Organics, please visit –
www.truestoryorganics.com
https://www.facebook.com/truestoryorganics

Name: BEVFLORA
Description:
W BEVFLORA wierzymy, że algi to przyszłość zdrowego odżywiania. Naszą misją jest propagowanie ich jako kluczowego składnika diety, który nie tylko dostarcza wysokiej jakości białka, ale także wspiera zdrowie i równowagę ekologiczną.

Dążymy do tego, aby algi stały się powszechnym elementem codziennego jadłospisu, pomagając ludziom na całym świecie odkryć ich niezwykłe właściwości. Chcemy inspirować do świadomego wyboru produktów, które nie tylko odżywiają organizm, ale także szanują naszą planetę.

Pragniemy, aby każdy mógł czerpać z mocy natury, wprowadzając algi do swojej diety i doświadczając korzyści płynących z ich regularnego spożycia.

Nossos Produtos e Serviços
	•	Distribuição de Alimentos: Soluções rápidas e simplificadas para reposição de estoque.
	•	Atendimento Personalizado: Relação próxima e ágil com cada cliente.
	•	Logística Eficiente: Processos otimizados para reduzir custos operacionais e prazos de entrega.

Nossa missão é facilitar a rotina de nossos clientes, garantindo eficiência, qualidade e economia em cada entrega.

Adhérent au réseau BACK EUROP FRANCE, 1er groupement de France, notre offre de plus de 12 000 articles disponibles en 3 températures (ambiant, frais et surgelé) vous apporte une solution complète et performante en 1 livraison.

meet your new lunchtime obsession. Square + Fair isn’t just a sandwich shop—it’s a rebellion against boring lunches. Name: Medza Gourmet
Description:
Medza Gourmet is a dynamic and forward-thinking parent company in Lebanon’s thriving food and beverage sector. With a passion for culinary innovation and a commitment to quality, Medza Gourmet has cultivated two distinct brands that cater to diverse consumer tastes—from fast-casual street food to refined French patisserie.
Founded on the belief that food should be both memorable and meaningful, Medza Gourmet blends tradition with modernity, local flair with global inspiration. 

Ciaowarma
Concept: Lebanese street food reimagined with a global twist
Ciaowarma is Medza Gourmet’s flagship snack and restaurant chain, known for its bold flavors, playful branding, and fast-paced service. It elevates the humble shawarma into a healthy crave-worthy experience.

Nougi
Concept: Haute French pâtisserie & artisanal coffee, infused with Lebanese soul.
Nougi is Medza Gourmet’s luxury patisserie brand, offering exquisite French desserts crafted with precision, artistry, and seasonal ingredients. From delicate entremets to buttery viennoiseries, Nougi is a celebration of elegance and indulgence.

Name: FIT CHOCOLATE BARS
Description:
Trying to lose weight and have a healthy diet doesn't mean that you have to give up all snacks. FIT is your delicious healthy snack with natural sugar from high-quality dates, low in carbohydrates, full of vitamins (A.B.K.) fibres, and good proteins from carefully selected nuts…the perfect ingredients to be FIT.

Embark on a snacking frenzy and indulge in a chocolate bar, totally guilt-free! The ultimate craving satisfaction comes packed in our handcrafted organic and tasty FIT bars. FIT transports you to a discovery of mindful eating without the conscience in pairing dates, nuts, and chocolate.

Our FIT bars contain 100% natural ingredients and are designed to meet as many dietary requirements as possible. Transparent our ingredients, our chocolate bars steer completely clear of sugar whilst being rich in mono and polyunsaturated fats. On top of this, all bars are Vegan and Vegetarian and are free of Gluten, Dairy, Wheat, Egg, Milk, Soya, Sugar, and artificial flavourings and preservatives; Vegan approved by the vegetarian society.

Elegantly wrapped, each of our organic handcrafted bars is produced in the United Kingdom. Each bar is treated with extraordinary care, mindful of all allergies and intolerances. Our packaging reflects our minimalistic and organic approach to mindful eating.

We are a family-run business with Belgian, Spanish and Moroccan influences in our taste. We use high-quality ingredients in all of our bars, incorporating middle eastern dates, 60% dark chocolate from Africa, and European flavours. Combining all of these together strikes a perfect flavour balance in our nutritious, dreamy indulgence alternative to everyday snacking.

Our FIT bars are the perfect mid-morning snack. They pair well with your lunchtime meal or as a post-gym treat to encourage mindful eating. Leave out the unnecessary sugar and cure your chocolate cravings any time of the day. Fuel your day the natural way and enjoy with a clear conscience. No more strict snacks!

Dansk webshop som forhandler kvalitetsvine fra bæredygtige og økologiske vine og bobler fra mindre europæiske vinproducenter.
Vi sælger både privat og engros - desuden kan vi tilbyde vinsmagninger og gaveløsninger (privat som erhverv).
Vi har en ambition om at være tæt på vores kunder og knytte kunder og vinbonden tættere på hinanden.
Vi har valgt at samarbejde med nogle af de bedste mindre vinbønder i EU. De har stor passion for kvalitet og respekt for biodiversitet og naturen, og det falder godt i tråd med vores værdier og overbevisning. 
Mange af vinbønderne er eksperimenterende i forhold til metoder, smag og bæredygtig produktion.

Vores sortiment er nøje udvalgt sammen med Marie von Ahm, hvor vi har fokus på kvalitetsvine fra EU til fair priser.

Vi har valgt ikke at køre med høje førpriser, fordi en af detailhandlens største udfordringer er ugennemsigtige priser med urealistisk høje førpriser for at kunne give rabatter på 50-70%.

Hos os har vinen en pris for 1 stk. og lille rabat hvis du køber 6 flasker grundet vores besparelse på logistik og fragt.

Kontakt os endelig hvis vi kan hjælpe dig.

Name: NASHE.VSE
Description:
NASHE.VSE an e-commerce FMCG company that helps to lead a healthy lifestyle in the big city by delivering fresh, natural products from farm to home.
(a part of Gals-Agro Corp: https://gals-agro.com/en/about/)

Our mission:
To unite all those who are not indifferent to a healthy lifestyle, delicious farm food, ecology and responsible consumption based on a new gastronomic culture - love for local, healthy food.

In order to realize this mission, we have formulated 6 principles that form the basis of everything we do:

- Only Ukrainian products
We work with wonderful people from Ukraine who love what they do! Therefore, we really believe that Ukrainian farm products are the best and we openly tell the world about it!

- Only small and medium farms
We unite farmers and fundamentally do not work with large farms or agricultural holdings.

- Only proven quality
We personally check each farm and each product supplied from the manufacturer to the final consumer. If you do not like the quality of the product, we will refund your money without a check!

- Only honest product
We are convinced that there is a specific person behind every name or brand. A person who puts his soul and his life philosophy into what he does. We know every farmer by sight. Therefore, with us you will not see the names of brands, you will see names of people.

- Just a fair price
We are a farmer's cooperative in which everyone does what he can do well. Farmers entrust us with the process of selling and delivering the product to the consumer, and we entrust our farmers with the production of a high-quality and tasty product, therefore we consider the price they set is fair and adequate.

- Only responsible consumption
We want people to know more about Ukrainian farmers. Love for local products develops Ukrainian farming.

Name: Papalote Salsas
Description:
Papalote Roasted Tomato Salsa is the culmination of nearly 50 years of family tradition, secret recipes and culinary expertise.

In 1999 Victor Escobedo opened Papalote Mexican Grill on 24th Street, in the heart of the San Francisco Mission district. The goal: To prepare outstanding Mexican dishes with the freshest meats and produce available and serve them in a comfortable and exciting atmosphere.

Victor believes every Mexican restaurant should have a salsa that embodies the essence of the concept; Papalote Roasted Tomato Salsa embodies the spirit of Papalote Mexican Grill. This outstanding salsa, with its unique texture and unmistakable smoky notes, is elaborated with the same commitment to quality, freshness and flavor as the dishes it was intended to enhance at the family’s restaurant. 

Papalote Salsas have been reviewed and raved about by the media at local, state and national levels, including USA Today, The Wall Street Journal, Sunset Magazine, The Food Network, The Cooking Channel, and the Travel Channel, to name a few.

Without a doubt, the most exciting accolade Papalote Roasted Tomato Salsa has received came after Papalote beat Iron Chef Bobby Flay in the Burrito episode of Food Network’s Throwdown! with Bobby Flay. After an intense battle of epic proportions, Chef Flay declared “the salsa is the secret weapon!” 

Papalote Roasted Tomato Salsas are available at Whole Foods Markets in Arizona, Nevada, Hawaii and California. Throughout the greater Bay Area Papalote is available at Safeway, Lucky, Raley's, Mollie Stone’s, Nugget Markets, Bi•Rite, Berkeley Bowl, and many more specialty stores.

Papalote Salsa is available on line at www.papalotesalsa.com

Whether you're a tea aficionado or a casual sipper, we invite you to join us on this journey of discovery and exploration.

Name: Panera Bread of Iowa
Description: At Panera Bread, we believe that good food, food you can feel good about, can bring out the best in all of us. Food served in a warm, welcoming environment, by people who care. To us, that’s good eating and that’s why we’re here.

Name: Rost & Brygg
Description:
Vi har hjälpt över 5000 svenskar att bryta sig loss från tråkkaffets grepp. Rost & Brygg är inte bara en kaffeleverantör, vi är din personliga guide i kaffets värld. Vi levererar noggrant utvalt, färskt rostat kaffe direkt hem till dig, eller till er arbetsplats.

Lyft fikastunden | Upptäck din favoritsmak | Kaffe anpassat för dig

Vi gör det enkelt att dricka godare kaffe. Genom personlig matchning och nära samarbete med några av Sveriges främsta rosterier säkerställer vi att du alltid får en unik och engagerande smakupplevelse. Letar du efter kaffe som engagerar, överraskar och faktiskt smakar något? Då är det dags att prova Rost & Brygg.

Våra tjänster:

- Kaffeprenumeration för Hemmet: Vi levererar ett nytt specialkaffe varje månad, personligt anpassat efter dina smakpreferenser, utrustning och malningsgrad.
- Kaffelösningar för Företag (B2B): Vi tar hand om ert kontorskaffe, från månatliga leveranser av specialkaffe till rådgivning kring utrustning. Engagera er personal med kaffe som smakar något utöver det vanliga.
- Högsta Kvalitet: Fokus på spårbart specialkaffe, transparenta samarbeten och hantverk.

Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din kafferesa? Kontakta oss för att designa din perfekta kaffeprenumeration. Företag? Vi erbjuder kostnadsfri konsultation för att transformera ert kontorsfika

Name: SIPO CHOCOLATERIE
Description: Nous produisons du chocolat 100% naturel et 100% naturel depuis 15 ans. Des produits de haute qualité à la portée de tous. Venez découvrir par vous-même dans notre boutique à Douala Akwa

Name: Sizzlefish
Description: Sizzlefish is a food and beverage company that provides fish and seafood products.

Name: Goconut España
Description:
Llevamos dándole al coco desde 2015, y podemos decir que en eso somos los mejores. Detrás de GOCONUT está World’s Coconut Trading, el mayor operador de coco fresco en Europa, contamos con plantaciones dedicadas de coco fresco en Tailandia, Vietnam e India y exportamos coco fresco a más de 33 países.

Somos unos apasionados del coco, y queríamos acercarte la naturaleza y nuestros productos de una manera divertida y saludable. Por eso nace GOCONUT.

GOCONUT es una nueva forma de disfrutar del coco, y de la vida. Comer sano y rico no está reñido! Nuestro compromiso de utilizar solo ingredientes naturales y los mejores cocos frescos del mundo.

GOCONUT es COCO on the GO , es decir, llegas, pides y te lo llevas. Rápido, sencillo, y delicioso.

Name: Maharaja Drinks
Description:
We're on a journey to shake up what drinks enthusiasts know of India and its delicious array of high quality drinks – and we've saved you a seat.

Our mission is to find the gems in the treasure trove that is the Indian drinks world, and deliver them to your door. To truly dive into each supplier’s story, we go back to the source: personal meetings with the makers, tours of their facilities and tasting sessions (naturally, our favourite part).

We've consciously chosen and tasted them ourselves to ensure that they deliver on flavour and deserve a spot in your drinks cabinet. Maharaja Drinks: bringing India's most palate-pleasing drinks to the UK and beyond.

Name: Mercearia do Algarve
Description:
Mercearia do Algarve – Sabores Autênticos, presentes especiais!
Desde 2015, a Mercearia do Algarve tem vindo a destacar os melhores produtos locais, cuidadosamente selecionados de produtores regionais que partilham a nossa paixão pela região.
Trazemos a essência da cultura e tradições do Algarve com produtos de alta qualidade e cabazes / ofertas personalizadas, que promovem “Os Sabores Cá da Gente” e “A Arte de Vida à Algarvia.”
A nossa loja física e online oferece uma vasta seleção de sabores autênticos do Algarve, enquanto os nossos cabazes, cestas e presentes são perfeitos para qualquer ocasião — Cabazes  empresariais, cabazes de boas-vindas, eventos corporativos, casamentos, conferências e celebrações sazonais, tais como o Natal.
Fornecemos soluções personalizadas para hotéis, empresas e eventos, garantindo uma experiência com produtos regionais de alta qualidade. Seja para um pequeno gesto de agradecimento ou cabazes para eventos em grande escala, entregamos com flexibilidade, personalização e eficiência.
Desde a seleção e montagem, até à recolha ou entrega, tratamos de tudo — poupando tempo e esforço aos nossos clientes enquanto criamos uma experiência única e memorável para aqueles que a recebem.
Explore o nosso website para exemplos de cabazes e inspiração.
Serviço de envio disponível para entregas nacionais e internacionais.
 Disponíveis para novas parcerias. Contacte-nos – merceariadoalgarve@gmail.com

Name: Togronis
Description: Togronis was conceptualized amidst the global pandemic, when bars and restaurants had to get creative and with looser regulations, started selling drinks to go. Which brought up an idea: why can't I have my favorite craft cocktail in a can? Togronis (Craft Negroni To Go), by Common Pour, is the first line of ready to drink craft cocktails in a can.

Name: Tortamania
Description: Oferecemos o que há de melhor no mercado em doces, tortas, sobremesas e muitas outras delícias que encantam nosso público. Não deixe seus clientes sem esse sabor. Peça já uma visita de um representante Tortamania.

AG Vending rekur sjálfsala. Við bjóðum vinnustöðum, íþróttafélögum, skólum og fleirum sjálfsala með fullri þjónustu þeim að kostnaðarlausu. 
Úrvalið er sniðið að þörfum hverrar staðsetningar og er óháð framleiðendum og innflytjendum. Coke og Pepsi eða Nocco og Collab saman í sjálfsala er engin hindrun.

Name: Frank's Fruit Market - Haberfield
Description:
Frank's Fruit Market - Haberfield is a small family run fruit shop in Inner West Sydney, currently celebrating 50 years of business.  It is a treasured favourite amongst Sydney foodies and chefs. Next year the premises of the shop will mark its Centenary year of have been operating continuously as a fruit shop since 1925, making this little shop likely the oldest fruit shop in Sydney.

John and Bree Velluti are the current custodians of the business following Frank and Mary Bonfante who founded and operated the business from 1974 - 2019. Frank and Mary still make regular appearances to Haberfield and the shop and are very loved by the community.

We have a proud history of serving the Inner West community and broader Sydney with locally grown, seasonal produce and we are specialists in sourcing Italian varieties of fruit and vegetables grown in Australia.

Name: 85+ Specialty Coffees
Description: 85+ Specialty Coffees is an online store with a very specific mission to hand-pick distinct coffees from around the world and introduce them in different formats to this country’s growing community of specialty coffee lovers. We truly believe that life is too short for bad coffee and so we work tirelessly to curate coffees scoring a Q-grade of at least 85 points, roast them locally, and deliver our freshly roasted beans to your doorstep regardless where you are in the UAE. It is a business that has been born out of a great love and appreciation for the diversity that specialty coffee adds to our lives, and so we wanted to build something that would caffeinate everyone in a unique way – whether that is someone who is trying specialty coffee for the first time using our drip bags because they don’t have any brewing equipment at home, or the coffee connoisseurs and home baristas who need a source they can trust for consistently high quality coffees – a place they can always come back to and experiment with new origins or new processing methods.

Name: Triveneto
Description:
Projekt jsme vytvořili s kamarádem, který žije v Itálii ve Veroně již několik let. Postupně jsme poznávali místní podniky a dodavatele, kteří usilují o zachování chutí a tradic, které byly předávány po generace. Díky tomu, máte dnes jedineční možnost si objednat tyto produkty v Česku jenom u nás.

Prodáváme od malovýrobců a farmářů z oblasti benátska tzv. Triveneto.
Naše dodavatele známe osobně.
Naši dodavatelé si zakládají na kvalitě s dlouholetou tradicí.

Provozujeme internetový obchod pro koncové uživatele, v Praze máme taktéž kamennou prodejnu a spolupracujeme i jako dodavatel pro firmy a podniky.

Name: Tactical Snacks
Description:
TACTICAL SNACKS: FUEL YOUR MISSION, NOT YOUR WAISTLINE!

- Not only do our gummies pack the punch of traditional candy flavor, but they also boast fewer calories, reduced net carbs, and a significant boost in dietary fiber without compromising on the explosive taste and satisfying texture you crave. 

- But we don’t stop there — we've also got a Protein version! Each Tactical Snacks Protein gummy is fortified with premium collagen protein, giving you the strength to continue the mission, whether it's a grueling workout or a long day at the range. 

Tactical Snacks: No concessions, just full-on flavor and function.
100% Veteran-owned.

Fashion Fruit es un proyecto que nace con la aspiración de elevar la fruta de calidad, ese producto natural, saludable y lleno de recuerdos al rango de los mejores regalos acompañada de tendencia y moda.

Desde 1997 nuestro día a día es trabajar para que nuestros clientes tengan una experiencia única, especial y gratificante cuando tienen que pensar o elegir un regalo.

Con la finalidad de satisfacer cada día nuestros clientes, la empresa ha actualizado sus productos y servicios, atendiendo de esta forma a las exigencias de nuestros usuarios.

Nuestro objetivo es conseguir “envolver expresiones de afecto” a través de regalos que marcan la diferencia.

La calidad de los productos y la excelente atención al cliente son sin duda, los atributos diferenciadores, que  hacen que seamos una de las primeras opciones para los consumidores y, nos permiten mantener una relación fiel con nuestros clientes

Somos muy conscientes que los regalos Fashion Fruit deben dejar el mejor recuerdo, pues es la imagen de nuestros clientes y es esa responsabilidad la que nos estimula cada día.

Regalar es un arte, y en Fashion Fruit lo sabemos.

Name: Roomyysfood
Description:
At RoomyysFood, we take pride in enhancing your dream rental stay with our top-notch, delicious, and hygienic food services. As the perfect complement to your comfortable accommodation, we offer a delightful dining experience that will satisfy your taste buds and nourish your soul.

Our mission is simple - to provide you with an exceptional culinary journey without leaving the comfort of your rental space. We understand that a satisfying meal is essential for a memorable stay, and that's why we go above and beyond to serve you the finest food options.

*Why Choose RoomyysFood:*

 *Quality First:* We source the freshest ingredients to ensure that every dish is bursting with flavors and prepared to perfection.

 *Convenience at Your Fingertips:* Place your food orders seamlessly through our user-friendly platform, and we'll deliver the deliciousness right to your doorstep.

Embrace a dining experience that perfectly complements your dream rental stay with RoomyysFood. Trust us to provide you with a gastronomic journey filled with quality, hygiene, and culinary delights. Let us be your go-to food partner, making your stay truly unforgettable!

Name: Shree Fooods
Description:
"Skip the Boring, Savor the Flavor!

No long-winded tales of how, when, and where. We're simply passionate about whipping up delectable dishes, and we're here to dish it out. If you've got a taste for great food, you've got to give our menu a whirl at least once. We promise you'll be hitting that 'Order' button again! Hungry? Order Now!"

Name: Simply Granola
Description:
Simply Granola was created in 2016 out a love for all things healthy + wholesome and a whole lot of it. I believe that each day should be celebrated with an active start, splattered with the occasional sleep in. Whether fast-paced or slightly slower - no morning should go by without a seriously rockin’ granola!

The heart behind Simply Granola is simple yet sumptuous. I have used a conscious selection of good-for-you ingredients that promise greatness with every mouthful. We do single batch baking and take all the granolas from production to packaging by hand, pouring a whole lot of love into what I hope will be many glorious granola moments for every one of you.

In 2017 we added the Simply Honey range to our collection and in 2018 we moved from our beloved kraft bags to our new and improved box range. 2019 was the year that made me a mama to our little lad Jack, and also the year we added our 5th flavour to our range of granolas. 2020, amidst all the madness that was COVID-19, we launched Simply Coffee, a range of Nespresso compatible coffee capsules that aims to bring quality coffee capsules to the market at an affordable pricing point. Simply Sweet was our final addition to all things SIMPLY in 2020  - a roasted coffee bean enrobed in decadent layers of chocolate and has eat-me-forever written all over them. We kicked off 2021 with our first limited edition granola and in June we launched the coveted high protein granola range. 2022 we launched our Vegan granola and we have many more new releases coming soon!

2022/2023 was also the start of our journey alongside Pick n Pay developing 6 new SKU’s for them in their Crafted Collection and Live Well ranges. 

Produced with heart and delivered with care, Simply Granola is dedicated to the bon vivant at heart, seeking an everyday indulgence while embracing a conscious lifestyle.

Name: Viwa France
Description:
VIWA est une nouvelle génération de boissons désaltérantes destinées aux personnes actives qui prennent soin de leur santé.
Chaque produit a un goût différent et répond à des besoins différents du corps humain.
Ils présentent les avantages de l'eau et des boissons non alcoolisées : 
Ils sont rafraîchissants, peu caloriques, ont des saveurs fruitées uniques et contiennent des vitamines essentielles à une vie saine.
Edulcoré avec de la stévia douce INKA. 
La stévia est une plante ancienne qui normalise le métabolisme, 
stabilise la tension artérielle, stimule la production d'insuline, abaisse le taux de cholestérol, a un effet régénérant sur la peau, nettoie et contribue au fonctionnement optimal de l'organisme, contient des prébiotiques (fibres d'inuline) et des acides gras oméga 3 (provenant d'algues).
Quels sont les bienfaits des vitamines ?
Les vitamines B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, et B8 sont impliquées dans la production d'énergie, 
La vitamine C possède des propriétés antioxydantes qui luttent contre le vieillissement des cellules. Elle aide à la cicatrisation et consolide les dents et les os.
LE MAGNESIUM :
Son rôle est incontournable pour notre bonne santé.
Le magnésium participe à plus de 300 réactions biochimiques qui sont indispensables à la production d'énergie :
Soutien du système nerveux 
Maintien de la santé osseuse 
Régulation du rythme cardiaque 
Régulation de la glycémie 
Réduction du stress 
Régulation de la pression artérielle 
Soutien de la fonction musculaire ...
LE ZINC :
Soutien de la santé oculaire 
Croissance et développement 
Cicatrisation des plaies
Synthèse de l'ADN et des protéines
Régulation de l'humeur 
Maintien des os
Régulation du métabolisme 
Prévention des problèmes prostatiques
Production de spermatozoïdes
Grâce à ses propriétés anti-inflammatoires et cicatrisantes, le zinc permet de lutter contre les problèmes de peau comme l'acné, le psoriasis ou la dermatite.
Buvez VIWA VITAMINWATER, en bouteilles de 600 ml ou en canettes de 330 ml !

Name: Globalhops
Description:
Globalhops

Bij Globalhops zijn we gepassioneerd door het delen van de rijke en gevarieerde wereld van speciaalbier. Het bedrijf is opgericht door bierenthousiastelingen die de missie hebben om mensen te laten genieten van hoogwaardige ambachtelijke bieren en hen kennis te laten maken met de kunst en ambacht van bierbrouwen.

Onze Proeverijen:
Onze proeverijen zijn meer dan alleen een bierervaring; ze zijn een reis door smaken, aroma's en tradities. We organiseren zorgvuldig samengestelde proeverijen waarbij deelnemers de kans krijgen om een verscheidenheid aan speciaalbieren te ontdekken, begeleid door deskundige bierkenners. Of je nu een doorgewinterde bierkenner bent of net begint aan je bierreis, onze proeverijen zijn geschikt voor alle niveaus.

Onze Webshop:
Naast onze proeverijen bieden we ook een uitgebreide webshop waar je een scala aan hoogwaardige speciaalbieren kunt ontdekken en kopen. We hebben een zorgvuldig samengestelde selectie van bieren van ambachtelijke brouwerijen over de hele wereld, waardoor je toegang hebt tot zeldzame en smaakvolle bieren die je moeilijk ergens anders kunt vinden. Ons team staat klaar om je te helpen bij het maken van de juiste keuze en om je bestelling snel bij je thuis te bezorgen.

Onze Missie:
Bij Globalhops is onze missie om de liefde voor speciaalbier te verspreiden, mensen bewust te maken van de diversiteit van smaken en stijlen, en hen te helpen bij het ontdekken van hun nieuwe favoriete bieren. 

Of je nu op zoek bent naar een onvergetelijke proeverijervaring of hoogwaardige speciaalbieren voor thuis, Bierliefhebbers Proeverijen & Webshop staat klaar om aan al je bierbehoeften te voldoen. Proost op avontuur en genieten van geweldige bieren!

Name: Primabiotic US
Description:
Welcome to Primabiotic, a prestigious European brand of premium dietary supplements, deeply inspired by the wonders of nature. Our unwavering commitment is to cater to discerning consumers who prioritize the highest quality ingredients and demand exceptional results.

 Our Distinctive Origin: Founded in 2017 in Poland, Primabiotic swiftly captured the market's attention with our groundbreaking Collagen shots. Admired for their unparalleled convenience, delectable flavor, and adherence to a Swiss recipe of excellence, Primabiotic Collagen now reigns as the undisputed choice among consumers.

 Global Reach: With a burgeoning base of over one million satisfied customers, our reach extends to Germany, and we proudly offer our Collagen product in France and the United Kingdom. As we eagerly anticipate further expansion across Europe and beyond, stay tuned for exciting updates.

 Exemplary Customer Feedback: In Poland, our Collagen product boasts a remarkable 4.99/5 rating, based on 152 reviews. Our aspiration is to introduce Primabiotic Collagen to the discerning customers of the United States, confident that its appeal will mirror the enthusiastic reception it has garnered in Europe.

 Seasoned Expertise: With six years of invaluable experience, we have meticulously crafted a product that not only delights the palate but also consistently delivers impressive results, tailored to meet the exacting standards of our discerning clientele.

 Our Vision: At Primabiotic, we ardently champion a holistic approach to well-being, one that seamlessly integrates dietary supplementation, advanced skincare, and a steadfast commitment to a health-conscious lifestyle. This integrated philosophy is the key to unlocking your full potential and redefining your wellness journey.

We invite you to embark on this transformative voyage with Primabiotic, where excellence, innovation, and nature converge to elevate your pursuit of optimal health and wellness.

Name: Eve Biology
Description:
No time for a wellness journey? We hear you! We created Eve Biology Meal Replacements to give women in menopause a simple, convenient and effective way to get their spark back. You know, so they can carry on building companies, chasing their goals, raising teenagers, caring for parents and pursuing their passions. 


Specifically formulated for women over 40. Through enriched nutrition, we want to help women reclaim their confidence, energy, and vitality, so they can continue to thrive in all areas of their lives. Create companies, save businesses, take over boardrooms, grow families, networks, careers and friendships. 

Eve Biology Meal Replacement Shakes help to restore the delicate balance between the gut, hormones, and metabolism, target menopause symptoms, increase gut microbiome and help to control weight. 

Exacting Standards - Every single meal replacement meets the rigorous standards set by the European Food Safety Authority. 

Evidence Based - Our commitment to evidence-based formulation means that we can confidently provide you with the best possible meal replacement that will deliver real, tangible results.

Lasting Relief - We understand that symptom relief is often a temporary fix. That's why we created our meal replacement to go beyond the quick fix and focus on providing long-term holistic health benefits.

Taste & Texture - It can be a challenge to balance active ingredients and results with taste, but we use naturally derived flavours and ingredients to find that sweet spot between pleasant and delicious. 

Want to join a trial? Sign up on our website and we'll be in touch!

Name: Coffee 'n' Capes
Description:
Comic books have a rich history of storytelling and inclusion. As children we turned to comics for inspiration through our favorite heroes. We dreamt of having super powers & helping those less fortunate. We donned capes made of cardboard, pretended to fly, and stood against injustice in our backyards.

As adults these things still matter.

Now our ritual of storytelling happens over premium coffee with friends and family. While we don't have super powers (yet), we still believe that heroes are meant to help those less fortunate.

With each bag of coffee sold we give back to our community, help those in need. Just like the cape-wearing, shield-wielding icons we looked up to, we stand for truth, justice, and a better world for all.

And really really great coffee.

Name: Cibi Genuini - Più che Bio
Description:
Cibi Genuini - Più che Bio è una Benefit corporation nata per aiutare i produttori virtuosi che mantenendo modelli produttivi sostenibili a tutela della biodiversità, sono la chiave per garantire un'alimentazione sana ed un Pianeta più pulito.
Agricoltori, piccole aziende agricole, fattorie attente all'impatto sociale delle proprie produzioni, nel rispetto del ciclo di vita di piante ed animali.

Nei nostri punti vendita di Roma è possibile acquistare prodotti genuini realizzati con tecniche artigianali e sostenibili.

Su www.cibisaniegenuini.it trovi approfondimenti sulla sicurezza alimentare, news, indagini sulla qualità dei prodotti, prezzi e tanto altro. 
Chiunque deve poter sapere chi, come e dove è stato prodotto il cibo che mangia.

English
Cibi Sani e Genuini is a "Benefit corporation" created to help and enhance virtuous producers (farmers, small farms, farms, companies attentive to the social impact of their productions) who, by maintaining sustainable production models and protecting biodiversity, are the key to ensure the safety of a healthy diet and a cleaner and longer-lived planet.

On our ecommerce www.cibisaniegenuini.com in the stores in Rome it is possible to buy genuine products made with artisanal and sustainable techniques.

On www.cibisaniegenuini.it deals with food safety, with news, insights and surveys on the quality of products, prices and much more.
It is possible to buy genuine products with delivery throughout Italy.
 Everyone needs to know who, how and where the food they eat was produced.

Name: The FishLovers
Description:
The FishLovers brengt online topkwaliteit vis rechtstreeks van de bron naar de consument. Wij maken het verschil in een sector waar ambacht, versheid en duurzaamheid centraal staan. Door nauw samen te werken met vakmensen, selecteren we maximaal dagverse vis, schaal- en schelpdieren van de hoogste kwaliteit, zorgvuldig gecontroleerd en professioneel verpakt.
Onze missie is helder: de consument dichter bij eerlijk, gezond en duurzaam gevangen vis brengen – zonder tussenhandel, zonder concessies. Met een groot assortiment en dankzij onze efficiënte logistiek en gebruiksvriendelijke webshop maken we hoogwaardige vis toegankelijk voor iedereen in Nederland en Vlaams België, zowel voor particuliere als zakelijke klanten.
Vandaag vóór 23:59 uur besteld, volgende dag gekoeld en vacuüm verpakt geleverd. The FishLovers staat voor gemak, betrouwbaarheid en de pure smaak van de zee – professioneel verwerkt, vers geleverd.

Name: 3D Empanadas
Description:
Empanadas deCon más de 10 años de experiencia logramos la receta perfecta y queremos compartir este sabor contigo!

Fundada por 3 mujeres, una mamá y dos hijas, 3D Empanadas se crea para brindarle a los colombianos 3 sabores, carne, pollo y queso.  3D empanadas nace por una familia fascinada por las empanadas de la mamá, en todas las reuniones y eventos cada miembro de la familia es capaz de comerse hasta 20 empandas en una noche, Si! su sabor es único, inigualable, crocante y así deliciosas son las empandas 3D.



Por tener exito en la familia, 3D empanadas fué creada para entregarle a los colombianos el sabor de nuestra tierra en versión mejorada. Nuestra misión es conquistar paladares y brindar explosión de sabores por cada mordida. Nuestra pasión es la empanada!, con mas de 10 años de experiencia llegamos a la receta perfecta y queremos compartir este sabor con todos. 



El origen de nuestra empanda surge en 2010 y a lo largo de los años hemos conquistado los paladares de la familia y amigos y es por eso que en el año 2022 decidimos compartir este sabor con todos los colombianos.



Disfruten y comenten en las redes @3Dempanadas si también les pareció que es la mejor empanada de Colombia.

Name: Vinalia Monaco
Description:
Vinalia Monaco, les gens, les vins, la table.

Vinalia Monaco est une société de distribution de vins, champagnes et épicerie fine, basée à Monaco et sur la Côte d'Azur, depuis plus de vingt ans. 

Mais aujourd’hui, c’est avant tout un groupe d’amis aux racines communes.
Notre objectif est de rechercher et de distribuer une sélection de vins artisanaux, naturels, à l’image du territoire dont ils sont issus et élaborés avec le moins d’intervention possible. Le moins d’intervention possible à la vigne, le moins d’intervention possible au chai, aucun ajout d’intrants chimiques. 

Des vins vivants.
La sélection de vins Vinalia a une histoire, un sens. Elle met en oeuvre un réseau de vignerons tous différents mais liés par un fil conducteur,
une sélection par nature en constante évolution, car elle est le fruit de recherches, de voyages, de rencontres, de découvertes, des rapports d’amitié.

Avec le même esprit nous voulons valoriser le goût, la diversité,
les origines, les terroirs, les typicités des nombreux produits
alimentaires qui composent notre proposition d’épicerie fine.
Jambons crus, pâtes sèches et farcies, truffes et cèpes,
poissons de rivière et sardines, pesto, huile d’olive,
fromages affinés, légumes aigres-doux, chocolat,
tous ces produits sont aussi exceptionnels et uniques,
parce que leurs auteurs le sont.

Nous désirons défendre cette unicité et vous les faire connaître.

C’est la raison d’être de Vinalia.

Name: DBS Revenda Ambev
Description:
Nossa história começa em 2017 na cidade de Monte Santo com a implantação da primeira Central de Bebidas Ferreira Dias, distribuidora exclusiva de produtos do portfólio Ambev. Essa parceria ocorreu quando a cervejaria testou novos modelos de atendimento ao mercado fora das capitais e grandes centros urbanos.

Pela entrega de resultados acima da média, o grupo conquistou novas áreas de atendimento no Recôncavo Baiano, Chapada Diamantina e Território do Sisal. Em 2024, com uma carteira de 25 cidades no Estado da Bahia atendendo diretamente mais de meio milhão de pessoas, as Centrais de Bebidas se fundem e dão origem a Revenda DBS.

Atualmente contamos com quatro unidades de distribuição, sendo duas matrizes em Itaberaba e Santa Luz, além de duas filiais em Ipirá e Monte Santo. Temos mais de 250 colaboradores em nosso quadro de funcionários que está em constante expansão.

Nossa Missão é gerar motivos para brindar com nossos consumidores e clientes, através de nosso nível de serviço e qualidade dos produtos ambev.                          

Nossa Visão é ser a melhor distribuidora de bebidas do nordeste, levando excelência ao interior da Bahia.                                                                                                        

Nossos Valores são atuar com ética, inclusão, segurança, transparência e respeito aos nossos clientes e fornecedores.

Ga de uitdaging aan en probeer iemand te vinden die het mooie Italië niet kent. Die spaghetti, pizza of wijn helemaal niet lekker vindt. Geen twijfel mogelijk, Italië is het land waar iedereen vrolijk van wordt. 

Allora, geniet u mee met onze ontdekte wijnhuizen, delicatessen en al het lekkers uit Italië. Uiteraard houden wij niet de heerlijke wijnen uit omringende landen voor u achter. Sommige zijn gewoon te goed om het alleen bij Italië te houden. 

Bij alle producten is  onze voorkeur voor biologische wijnen en respect voor de natuur erg belangrijk. Direct vanuit Italië importeren wij de nog niet eerder in Nederland ontdekte wijnhuizen zoals Anna Spinato en Le Rive. Uniek in Nederland.

Name: Organico
Description:
The question is straightforward: Is the world prepared for the next pandemic? And a straightforward response is required for this straightforward query. The answer, we believe nature itself has the solution. We are Organico, driven by a mission to inspire and care for people through the power and purity of nature. At Organico, we cherish the gifts of nature, sourcing only the finest ingredients and preserving their purity to help everyone lead happier, healthier lives.

We believe in the moral satisfaction that comes from doing good—for both people and the planet. Our commitment goes beyond mere products; it's about nurturing life and nature in harmony. Organico stands for a holistic approach to well-being, where nature meets innovation daily.

Welcome to Organico, where natural living takes on a deeper meaning. We believe that the closer we are to nature, the safer we become. Join us in our journey towards a future where nature's wisdom guides us, ensuring a world better prepared for whatever challenges lie ahead.

Name: g.lato
Description:
Nosso Manifesto - PENSA, SINTA, QUEIRA!
Que sua experiência seja gostosa! Que seu atendimento seja extraordinário! Que este g.lato seja o mais gostoso da sua vida! Que você se sinta amado! Que você morra de saudades de nós! Que você fale da gente para o mundo! Que você prove dos nossos sabores! Que você sinta esta doçura! Que juntos façamos a diferença!

NOSSO DESAFIO
O francês Hércules Guiraud, tataravô dos irmãos Edu e Gui migrou para o Brasil em meados do século XIX, para trabalhar na equipe de confeiteiros do imperador Dom Pedro II, que era conhecido por ser um ávido apreciador de sorvetes. Os irmãos Guiraud decidiram resgatar essa história e unir a dedicação e o amor de seu tataravô francês pelos doces, com a alegria e paixão italiana pelos gelatos, juntando-se a família italiana da Eli, construindo uma nova experiência de desfrutar de gelatos e produtos complementares deliciosos, nos lembrando de quão bela é a vida.

NOSSA MISSÃO
Impactar a vida das pessoas, oferecendo sorrisos, disseminando amor e proporcionando momentos
especiais através da entrega de gelatos, produtos e ações complementares com uma experiência
única.

NOSSA VISÃO
Ser a gelateria com a melhor e mais deliciosa experiência ao consumidor do Brasil.

NOSSOS VALORES
• O cliente é a nossa razão!
• Uma experiência única é a alma do nosso negócio!
• Momentos importantes devem ficar registrado em nossas memórias e nossos corações!
• Nascemos com impacto ESG – Queremos um mundo melhor!
• Sem integridade e ética nem abrimos nossas portas!
• O lucro é nosso meio, e não o nosso fim!
• Do início ao fim é tudo sobre “sermos humanos”!

Authentic cultural connection and local ingredient sourcing

Name: Shandong Qihe Bio Technology Co.,Ltd
Description:
Qihe Biotech, founded in 2000 with registered capital 47,855,200 RMB, is located in Zibo city, Shandong province, mainly engaged in research and development, production, sales and export of edible fungi.

The company has more than 2，000 employees, and has more than 1,200,000 square meters of edible fungus production base, products exporting to South Korea, Japan, United States, Germany, Spain, Australia, South Africa, as well as other countries.

It has introduced in the world's advanced edible fungus CNC system and established a complete production system from the development of strains to the final products. Qihe has obtained 3 international invention patents, 26 domestic utility model patents, and 1 design patent. Its products have passed the GLOBAL GAP, ISO22000 and Organic product certification.
In recent years, the company, relying on scientific and technological progress, relying on domestic resources and manpower advantages, vigorously implements the “going out” strategy. It has established nine subsidiaries and five production bases in Japan, United States and EU, products becoming more and more popular in local markets.
Qihe Biotech not only drives domestic farmers to get rich, but also improves foreign farmers’ income level by training them of edible fungi cultivation technics, promoting the development of agriculture overseas.
In the future, Qihe will increase its investment, implement new projects, launch new products, acheive a better and better corporation reputation in the international market

Name: Kildetoft Wine A/S
Description:
Kildetoft Wine blev grundlagt i 2019 af Master Sommelier Jess Kildetoft. I begyndelsen var det tænkt som en lille hobby import forretning, der skulle drives ved siden af arbejdet på restaurantgulvet. 

I 2020 gik Jess fuld tid og det blev til en egentlig vinforretning. Fra starten har fokus været på de små europæiske producenter. Dem der selv stod for arbejdet i marken og kælderen, dem der tog stilling til økologi, biodynamik og dem, der havde en naturlig tilgang til, hvad der kan skabes, når tingene bliver gjort grundigt.

Vinene vandt hurtigt indpas på mange af de gode restauranter her i Danmark og det er netop af den vej vi stille og roligt har skabt vores eksistens. I løbet af årene er der kommet flere producenter til og vi begrænser os ikke længere til Champagne og Bourgogne. Den nye generation af unge vinmagere har bragt os til regioner som Yarra dalen i Australien, Swartland i Sydafrika og Santa Maria dalen i Californien. Derudover vil der altid være et sortiment af personlige favoritter på webshoppen. Ens for alle vores vinhuse er den kompromisløse tilgang til vin, hvilket bliver vores fornemmeste opgave at videreformidle.

Vores mål er, så at sige at, kunne inspirere og selvfølgelig også guide den nysgerrige vindrikker.

Name: Foodies by SDX
Description:
Foodies at SDX is a well-tested retail model that subverts normal market practice which pile pressure, reduce margins and prohibit small food producers. 

Now in the heart of Glasgow, you can buy freshly sourced Scottish products at a price you can afford, and which rewards small producers directly. They pay a nominal rent to us and in return they get our guidance, our marketing, our retail sales expertise and a high-visibility city centre presence. 

Every penny you spend in store goes directly to producers.

We have done it in the arts with three city centre shops across Edinburgh and Glasgow – now turning over annually £3.5million.

Too often food is a prisoner of the market economy in freshness, quality and price.

At Foodies by SDX we have created a model that gives consumers great products and rewards small producers.

Pop in and try our delicious products - from jams, chutneys, chocolate and honey, to charcuterie, chilli sauces and clootie dumplings.

Name: Choose Healthy
Description:
Mission: Empowering individuals to make informed food choices by providing detailed insights into food ingredients.

Vision: A world where everyone understands the ingredients in their food and makes healthier choices.

FoodyGoody is dedicated to helping people find healthy foods by providing comprehensive information about food ingredients. Our goal is to empower consumers with the knowledge they need to make informed decisions about what they eat, promoting healthier lifestyles and greater awareness of food content.

Key Features:
Ingredient Database: A comprehensive database of food ingredients with detailed information on nutritional value, potential allergens, and health benefits.
Label Scanner: A mobile app feature that allows users to scan food labels and get instant information about the ingredients.
Personalized Recommendations: Tailored food recommendations based on users' dietary preferences, allergies, and health goals.
Educational Content: Articles, videos, and infographics about food ingredients, their sources, and their effects on health.
Our Approach: We believe that understanding what goes into your food is the first step towards a healthier lifestyle. Our platform is designed to be user-friendly and accessible, providing valuable insights through a combination of technology and expert knowledge. 
By leveraging data analytics and user feedback, we continuously improve our services to meet the evolving needs of our users.

Join Us: Be a part of the movement towards healthier eating. Whether you're looking to understand food labels better, find healthier alternatives, or simply learn more about what you're eating,

Name: Orbital Decaf Coffee
Description:
Orbital was created by LatinX specialty coffee enthusiasts and entrepreneurs who have survived long on caffeine. Still, you can drink so much caffeine before the jitters and insomnia take hold, so we founded Orbital Decaf Coffee.

Orbital Decaf Coffee roasts only chemical-free decaf and Half-Caf specialty coffee beans.

It all began with us sourcing and roasting the best, most exotic, naturally processed specialty coffee beans we could find. In the process, our health-conscious friends and family challenged us, who expressed that it was too hard to find good-tasting decaffeinated coffee that was free of chemicals.

The challenge was accepted, and we immediately partnered directly with Colombian coffee farms and achieved decaffeinated and half-caffeinated coffee flavor notes that are so good that they're out of this world!

Realizing a white space in the market for caffeine-conscious consumers who appreciate the quality and uniqueness of specialty coffee flavors, we decided to create Orbital Decaf. We offer single-origin decaffeinated beans that undergo chemical-free decaffeination processes like Swiss water and Sugar Cane without sacrificing the coffee flavors and properties of the bean.

Orbital's Decaf and Half-Caf Coffee is a start-up ready to partner with medium to large retailers, cafes, and restaurants for wholesale.

Orbital Jitter-Free Decaf Coffee: You will tell yourself it's not decaf, and your tastebuds will agree.

Name: Vittle & Smoke Ltd
Description:
We use traditional smoke craft to enhance and intensify premium quality ingredients, we offer you innovative, astounding and scrumptious smoky culinary delights to be enjoyed both on their own or to elevate your gastronomical efforts in the kitchen.

Vittle & Smoke want to live in a world where everyone is able to enjoy innovative, smoky culinary delights at home.. Chocolate is genuinely good for you.. And our kids don’t feel the need to change their clothes a million times in one day.
At Vittle & Smoke we believe that people should be able to rediscover the lost secret of our ancestors. By using traditional smoke craft to enhance and intensify premium quality ingredients, we offer unique everyday products to be enjoyed both on their own, or to enable budding connoisseurs of food to elevate their gastronomical efforts.

When we’re not inventing new fusions to use in ‘Betty the Flavour Box’ (our traditional Cedar smoke house), you’ll find us all exploring a new footpath, baking gooey cookies (with smoky chocolate of course) or chasing the spinner across the table in Game of Life.

We hope to develop our family business and continue to offer you superior quality, innovative, tasty and exciting new products. At Vittle & Smoke we love to bring family and friends together, to connect over a shared love of food and a desire for a culinary adventure.

We look forward to welcoming you to join us on our journey. Thank you

hello@vittleandsmoke.co.uk

Name: AlegriaGourmetShop
Description:
Alegría Gourmet Shop es una boutique especializada en canastas navideñas y regalos corporativos, con curaduría de productos gourmet europeos exclusivos. 
Ayudamos a compañías a reconocer, fidelizar y celebrar a clientes, equipos y aliados con detalles memorables y una logística sin estrés.

¿Qué hacemos?
* Tenemos una colección de Canastas Navideñas desde 40 dólares. 
* Con opciones con o sin alcohol,
* Personalización de marca con logo, colores corporativos y mensajes.
* Logística llave en mano: entregas por lote o a múltiples direcciones; coordinación y reporte.

Nuestra experiencia
4 años tragajando con grandes empresas. Más de 4 mil regalos entregados.

Nuestra curaduría
Seleccionamos productos de origen europeo —quesos, jamones, trufas, chocolates premium, conservas y frutos secos de alta calidad— y diseñamos combinaciones equilibradas en sabor, presentación y propósito (agradecimiento, reconocimiento, celebración).

¿Cómo trabajamos?

1. Brief y presupuesto: necesidades, destinatarios y fechas.
2. Propuesta en 3 niveles (económica, estándar y premium) con fotos y desglose.
3. Producción
4. Entregas, con seguimiento y confirmación de recepción.

¿Por qué Alegría?
• Enfoque 100% corporativo y atención personalizada.
• Presentaciones cuidadas, listas para impresionar al primer vistazo.
• Opciones **sin alcohol** y **sin refrigerados** disponibles.
• Procesos claros para compras B2B y **facturación** ordenada.

¿Quieres recibir el catálogo o una cotización a medida? Escríbenos por mensaje directo o a nuestro Whatsapp 0958715516 y con gusto te enviamos 3 alternativas según tu presupuesto y fechas de entrega.

— Alegría Gourmet Shop • Regalos que crean relaciones duraderas.

Name: SUNNN
Description:
Ci occupiamo di proporre 4 Fragranze di Olio EVO attentamente selezionate tra le migliori Cultivar del Sannio. Vogliamo portare il prestigio di un prodotto che racconta l'Italia e la sua straordinaria biodiversità a livello di eccellenza, cioè nel posto dove merita: nell'Olimpo dei sapori Italiani.

Il parallelismo che troviamo ideale per raccontare la visione dell’Olio EVO dei prossimi anni è quello fatto con il Vino. Infatti, la storia del Vino “commerciale” deve essere un esempio e un riferimento: conoscere l’Olio, le sue differenze, far capire al pubblico che c’è un universo da esplorare è compito di chi ha intuito e si vuole differenziare.

Sempre più ristoratori e professionisti del settore capiscono l’importanza e la potenza di un prodotto che ha centinaia di sfaccettature e di utilizzi: siamo qui per mostrarti il potenziale delle nostre fragranze.

Name: Tawnshi Charcuterie
Description:
Tawnshi curates modern, Indigenous, hand-crafted charcuterie boards & boxes.

Delight your clients, teams and guests with a cultural food experience.

VIP Gift - Do you like to show your appreciation often? You may qualify for our preferred pricing for corporate accounts on any of our charcuterie boxes. Contact us to discuss your needs and preferred pricing.

Branded Gift - Add your company’s branding to our charcuterie boxes for some extra “wow!” factor. These are suitable for customer appreciation, team building, special events and more. Corporate branded boxes have a minimum order quantity of 10 gifts.

Housewarming Gift - Turn a house into a home with the thoughtful gift of a delicious experience. Our charcuterie boxes are excellent for housewarming gifts or closing deal celebrations.

Create a beautiful, high-end experience for customer appreciation, corporate events, and executive functions.

*We require 2-3 days lead time on most orders*

Tawnshi charcuterie boxes contain a variety of smoked and cured meats, seasonal fresh fruits and vegetables, bannock, assorted jellies, dulce (sea bacon), cheese, pickled preserves, nuts & berries.

All boxes are crafted according to what  is in season and available. We like to switch things up with new ideas and discover indigenous products.

“Tawnshi,” means hello in the Michif language of the Metis.

Our charcuterie business represents an invitation to look back and appreciate indigenous culture. It is also a way to look forward, through conversations over food.

This is our modern take on a unique, high-end and storied culinary experience through a fusion of indigenous flavours and ingredients.

We are based in Vancouver, BC.

Bem-vindo à N2 Brasil, onde a verdadeira experiência de consumo se encontra com a inovação e a paixão pelo gelato! Estamos presentes em 12 países ao redor do mundo, sendo parte do Grupo Barreiro, e somos reconhecidos internacionalmente pela excelência dos nossos produtos. A N2 é mais do que uma marca: é um fenômeno global, trazendo a alegria e o sabor do gelato para pessoas de diferentes culturas e tradições.

O feedback positivo que recebemos diariamente dos nossos consumidores é um testemunho da nossa qualidade e dedicação.

Estamos sempre em busca de expansão e inovação, proporcionando aos nossos franqueados um modelo de negócio sólido e uma marca de renome, pronta para conquistar ainda mais o coração dos Brasileiros!
Junte-se a nós e descubra porque na N2 Brasil, não é magia, é tecnologia!

Name: Barry Island Spirits Co
Description:
Barry Island Spirits Co is a small, family-run independent spirits business specialising in creating premium, small-batch spirits from the purest Welsh water gravitated from the Brecon Beacons. Based in the Vale of Glamorgan, the recipes for the Barry Island Spirits range have been inspired by the natural environment around our home on the beautiful South Wales coastline. A husband-and-wife team, Barry Island Spirits Co was formed in 2021 and focuses on creating small-batch high quality, naturally great tasting spirits. 

Despite being a new business, Barry Island Spirits Co is already making waves: Barry Island Welsh Dry Gin was awarded a Great Taste Award Gold Star in 2021 with judges saying it is a 'beautifully balanced gin'. In May 2022 the internationally recognised Gin Guide Awards announced Barry Island Pink Dry Gin as a winner in the Flavoured Gin category, Barry Island Dry Gin as Highly Commended in the Traditional Gin Category and Barry Island Spirits as a Design & Branding Winner for the full range of spirits.

In addition to winning a Great Taste award, Barry Island Gin has appeared in the Sunday Times Magazine, is stocked by Heston Blumenthal’s Michelin Star restaurant, The Hinds Head in Bray and it’s been spotted in The Body Coach Joe Wick’s home bar.

Our current range includes Barry Island Welsh Dry Gin (40%), Barry Island Botanical Spiced Rum (40%), Barry Island Organic Welsh Vodka (40%) and Barry Island Pink Dry Gin (37.5%). Products are available in striking, custom designed 70cl and 5cl bottles. Supporting products such as glassware and hamper boxes are also available. 

Barry Island Spirits Co products are stocked by independent Farm Shop’s, Deli’s, bars and restaurants (including Heston Blumenthal’s Michelin Star restaurant The Hinds Head in Bray) all over the UK.

Name: VORTÉ TECHNOLOGIES
Description:
VORTÉ's vision is to mitigate human impact on climate change helping both the environment and future generations by introducing a platform technology  to replace traditional cooling, freezing and heating applications. No traditional refrigeration cycle involved. 

The VORTÉ system can be adapted for both portable and fixed use and can be a very simple system powered remotely for off-grid use, or, for systems that have built in temperature monitoring, on demand servicing and regulation capability.

Typical temperature capability ranges from -40⁰C to +135⁰C. The VORTÉ system is adapted to offer both cold and hot temperatures. 

VORTÉ’s technology system represents a significant advancement in energy efficient heating and cooling. Example applications include portable cooler boxes and refrigerators, dairy milk cooling, beverage refrigeration, temperature-controlled freight containers, produce preservation including fish or heated food delivery services and heated gas at pressure reduction sites in gas distribution networks.

Name: Allenbrand's American Popcorn
Description:
Hello and thank you for taking the time to visit our page!
My name is Joshua Allenbrand and I’m the owner and Master Popper of Allenbrand’s Gourmet Popcorn. We are a unique family owned company.  We specialize in producing handmade popcorn in small batches. 
I’m a second generation popcorn artist with over 20 years’ experience. Originally from America where I learned all things popcorn from my family’s business. I met my wonderful Dutch partner while she was visiting on holiday and she is what brought me to here. We decided to live in The Netherlands and to continue my family’s passion for popcorn. I use our American recipes to offer an exclusive popcorn that is not mass produced. We take pride in the quality and freshness of our popcorn. This isn’t the same old taste and ideas that many have come to expect but rather this is popcorn born of inspiration and time tested recipes made with love.
I use a small batch production style that allows us to minimize the popcorn’s exposure to air after popping (open exposure to air is the enemy of fresh popcorn). After the corn is popped we use a sifting process to help clean the popcorn of small or un-popped pieces. The sifted popcorn is bagged using a linear weigh machine immediately locking in the freshness. Other benefits of small batch production is we are able to really control the quality of the ingredients and just as importantly, the process used to create your popcorn. All of these things combined helps ensure the best quality possible. Having our popcorn is just like fresh onsite popcorn without all the hassle. What that means for you or your guests is that they receive a consistent high quality product with superb freshness!

Maar we maken je ook wendbaarder en responsiever waardoor je snel kunt inspelen op de veranderende vraag van klanten, nog voordat de productie is gestart. Name: The Sustainable Food Company
Description:
We face serious challenges globally due to revved-up climate change, a growth in population to almost 10 billion by 2050, and a frightening erosion of biodiversity. Climate change, for instance, has many causes, with the food value chain at the top of global greenhouse gas emitters. Independent research reveals that the food value chain accounts for 25 percent to 30 percent of global greenhouse gas emissions. The problem will amplify given that the global population increases and more people from developing countries demand more high-quality proteins.
 
Our goals are to create social impact and commercial value by strategically aligning to UN SDG 2 (zero hunger), UN SDG 4 (quality education), UN SDG 12 (climate action), and UN SDG 13 (responsible production and consumption) through different commercial and social products and services.

Name: Crispe Cookies Bakery
Description:
Welcome to Crispe Cookies, where our passion for baking delicious treats meets a commitment to quality.

Under the ownership of Wesley Hortmann, Crispe Cookies has emerged as a prominent force in Cape Town after what began as a modest venture with just six employees has blossomed into a thriving enterprise, now boasting a team of over 100 dedicated individuals.

Since 1994, Crispe Cookies has been dedicated to crafting mouthwatering treats for the local community. Seven years ago, our journey took a significant turn when Shoprite recognised the exceptional quality of our offerings, igniting a partnership that continues to fuel our growth.

We're proud to count Shoprite, Spar and Food Lovers Market among our esteemed retail supporters, whose unwavering backing has not only elevated our brand but also enabled us to share our delectable treats with an ever-expanding audience. Our dedication to excellence also earned us the prestigious title of Best Quality award from Shoprite in 2023, a sweet testament to our unwavering commitment to superior products.

At Crispe Cookies, we're more than just a bakery; we're a testament to the power of passion, quality, and community.
