Name: Grupo Bonprix
Description:
QUIENES SOMOS: 1era cadena de bebidas del país, se busca explotar y maximizar esta categoría. Apuntamos a la venta de bebidas de alcohol y sin alcohol, a consumidor final. No nos enfocamos solo a la vida nocturna, sino también al día a día de nuestros clientes. Contamos con un surtido eficiente para los distintos tipos de usuarios que se acerquen a nuestros locales.Somos una empresa formada por emprendedores, fundada en el año 2016, una empresa en continuo crecimiento y en continua mejora del modelo de negocio.  
Un modelo novedoso probado y exitoso. 

MERCADERIA: Solo trabajamos con primeras marcas. Compramos en forma directa a las marcas la mercadería de esta forma nos apoyamos en nuestros proveedores construyendo relaciones comerciales a largo plazo. 

NUESTROS LOCALES: Nuestra estrategia de expansion ES estar ubicados en zonas de alto poder adquisitivo, ubicados cercanos a barrios cerrados y country,  LLegando a los barrios cerrados a traves de publicidad y con la posibilidad de entregar pedidos con flota propia en la puerta de la casa del cliente. 100% de nuestros locales cuentan con estacionamiento exclusivo para clientes y asistencia personalizada 

NUESTRO DIFERENCIAL: Nos ocupamos de atender personalmente a cada cliente, en cuanto ingresa al local, contará con un asistente de compras para poder asistir y aconsejar a lo largo de toda experiencia Bonprix. Los clientes pasan muy breves minutos en el local, ya que una vez elegidos los productos, se les cobra y se los asiste para cargar toda la compra en sus vehículos. Nuestros clientes están muy fidelizados con nosotros, ya que cada vez que nos visitan se van sabiendo que obtuvieron muy buenas ofertas a mejores precios y una excelente atención.

Name: Happy Fungi
Description:
Happy Fungi: Rooted in Nature, Crafted for Wellbeing 

At Happy Fungi, we're passionate about delivering the finest locally cultivated and produced mushroom products. Our dedication to sustainable practices ensures every step of our process respects and honours the environment.

Our Values:

 Locally Cultivated, Locally Produced: We proudly support local agriculture and economies. All our mushrooms are grown in Somerset, UK, ensuring freshness while reducing our carbon footprint.

 Sustainable Practices: Our operations are powered by renewable energy from a biogas plant. We recycle growing waste back into the plant, creating a truly circular and eco-friendly process.

 Purity and Minimal Environmental Impact: Committed to purity and minimal environmental impact, we bring nature’s hidden benefits to your sophisticated lifestyle, enhancing your health and vitality.

Name: Cracked Bean Roastery
Description:

They roast and sell speciality coffee on a retail and wholesale basis. All the green coffee is socially and ethically sourced from countries of origin, ensuring that people are valued and supported throughout our production chain.
All the profits from the business are re-invested back into the business, so that we can support local people who are experiencing unemployment with volunteering, training and employment opportunities. We do all this by creating a supportive work-based environment where second and third chances are part of our culture and ethos!

Name: Vini Vari GmbH

Vini Vari stands for carefully selected wines from Piemonte – artisanally crafted, sustainably produced, and rooted in true origin. I work directly with small, family-run wineries that value tradition and respect for nature.

The focus is on native grape varieties and lesser-known appellations – from Alto Piemonte to Canavese, from Slarina and Erbaluce to Grignolino.

Through tastings, events, and direct consultation, I bring this diversity to a curious audience – in gastronomy, among wine lovers, and through my webshop.

Vini Vari is not about mass production – it's wine for those who seek character, authenticity, and depth.

Name: The Blissful Gourmet
Description:
Founded by Dr. Yeshwant Muthusamy, an AI technologist by day and passionate chocolatier by night, who discovered that the precision and care he brings to technology also defines his approach to chocolate. By day, he guides his clients on their AI journey; by night, he crafts premium handmade truffles and fudge that transform indulgence into an art form.

The Blissful Gourmet began as a personal escape—a way to channel Yeshwant's deep love of chocolate and gourmet desserts into something tangible, beautiful, and shareable. But it became something more: a commitment to proving that exceptional confections don't require compromise—delivering uniquely blissful flavors and a delight in every bite!

Every truffle, fudge square, and treat is hand-crafted in small batches using only real, wholesome ingredients. We use no artificial flavors and no synthetic colors. Instead, we feature premium liqueurs like Raspberry Liqueur, Amaretto di Saronno, Grand Marnier, and Cointreau Noir—carefully measured in minimal quantities (less than 1.5 ml per piece) to enhance complexity without overwhelming the palate.

We prepare everything in a home kitchen that complies with the Texas Cottage Food Law—meaning your treats are made in small batches, not mass-produced in a commercial facility. This approach ensures that every piece reflects the meticulous care, cleanliness, and genuine love that go into something truly special.

From Grand Marnier truffles with coconut flakes to Cointreau Noir truffles finished with gold and silver sugars, from Amaretto truffles with almond biscotti to Fruit & Nut fudge infused with raspberry liqueur—our eclectic creations celebrate unexpected harmonies and deliver uniquely blissful flavors. Non-alcoholic versions are available on request.

Whether for corporate gifting, special celebrations, or simply because you deserve something beautifully handcrafted, The Blissful Gourmet transforms ordinary moments into blissful experiences with a delight in every bite!

Name: iCCi Brest
Description:
Nous sommes installés depuis avril 2016 à Brest, au 85, Rue de Paris (Quartier St Marc). Notre but est que vous puissiez réaliser vos courses avec un large choix de produits locaux et de saison, de qualité et au prix juste.

L'ensemble de nos produits en circuit-court, viennent exclusivement de France, dont 80% ont parcouru moins de 100 km. Nous sommes en relation directe avec nos producteurs partenaires.

 

ICCI, MAGASIN 100% MADE IN FRANCE : NOUS SOMMES LE SEUL INTERMÉDIAIRE ENTRE VOUS, CONSOMMATEURS, ET NOTRE COMMUNAUTÉ DE PRODUCTEURS.
 
iCCi ça veut dire quoi ?

Le premier i : c’est vous le consommateur, cette lettre ressemblant à un petit bonhomme.

Le premier C : il correspond au mot circuit (de circuit-court).

Le deuxième C : il correspond au mot court (de circuit-court).

Le deuxième i : c’est le producteur, cette lettre ressemblant à un petit bonhomme.

Imagine a treat that looks like a donut, bigger than macarons, yet with a special sponge cake that's incredibly delicious. Name: TopCan Beverages
Description:
Topcanbeverages is a brand which is keen on bringing an innovative curve to your average drinking beverage cans. Started by two college students with an idea to provide access to easy drinking cocktails. The first set of SKU'S being a range of five flavours of Cocktail mixers. Which include three classics :- Sex on the beach, Cosmopolitan and Goldrush along with two flavours with an Indian touch namely:- Kalakhatta and Green Mango Litchi. 

The concept created allows the consumer to remove the aluminium lid on top of a 330ML can which is only 250ML full, leaving an empty space of 80ML. Pouring in their choice of spirit or whatsoever they would like to top it off with. Then a soft black plastic lid allows you to reseal the can, shake it and that's it! A ready cocktail to drink in under 20 seconds.

Name: Holey Confections
Description:
Holey Confections: #DIETSTARTSTOMORROW

Redefining Gourmet Indulgence, One Donut at a Time

Welcome to Holey Confections, where culinary artistry meets the timeless allure of donuts. We're not just a donut company; we're a revolution in the world of gourmet confections. Our signature creation, the 140-layer donut, is a testament to our commitment to innovation and quality. Each layer is a whisper of perfection, meticulously crafted to deliver an unrivalled taste experience.

At Holey Confections, we believe in the magic of fresh ingredients and the power of homemade recipes. Our donuts are a symphony of flavors, freshly prepared every morning to ensure the highest quality. From the first bite, you'll taste the difference that dedication and passion bring to our confections.

But we're more than just exceptional donuts. We're a brand with a vision. As we embark on our journey to become North America's premier donut brand, our focus remains steadfast on sustainability, inclusivity, and community. Our vegan options are a nod to our commitment to cater to diverse tastes and dietary preferences, ensuring that everyone can indulge in the Holey Confections experience.

Join us on this exciting journey as we expand across the continent, bringing a touch of gourmet indulgence to every corner of North America. Follow our story, savor our creations, and be part of a community that celebrates the joy of high-quality, artisanal donuts.

Holey Confections - Where every bite is an adventure in taste.

Name: C'est Lä Vé
Description:
At C'est Lä Vé, we're on a mission to transform snacking by putting nutrition, sustainability, and flavor at the forefront of our brand. We're passionate about enhancing the on-the-go snacking experience, and it all starts with our commitment to mindful choices.

Our core belief is that snacking should be guilt-free and enjoyable. That's why we've crafted a range of plant-based, charcuterie-inspired snacks known as Luncheries. These aren't just snacks; they're a tasteful journey into conscious eating.

Our approach centers on intentional ingredients, thoughtfully curated flavors, and eco-friendly packaging. We're proud to offer compostable packaging, reducing waste and encouraging responsible disposal practices.

As pioneers in the conscious-eating snack industry, we're dedicated to delivering more than just a snack; we're offering an experience that resonates with individuals seeking a mindful and delicious way to #snackforlife.

Nossa história começa na maravilhosa cidade sul mineira Poços de Caldas, onde, há mais de 50 anos, nossa família se dedica aos mais deliciosos produtos da culinária mineira, em especial, aos queijos, doces, cafés, charcutaria e cachaça. Ainda no antigo Mercado Municipal, meu avô já comercializava produtos em sua banca. Meu pai e meus tios também seguiram essa tradição e hoje em dia eu e minhas irmãs também nos dedicamos a esse negócio.

Em 2022, depois de um dos períodos mais difíceis da humanidade, entendemos que estava na hora de nos unir ao universo digital e aqui estamos. Todo o know hall adquiridos por nossa família ao longo desses mais de 50 anos estão colocados nesse novo empreendimento que pretende ser um espaço para novos colaboradores e novas pessoas que possam se beneficiar desse novo negócio. 

O Clube dos Mineiros é um espaço para receber todos aqueles que apreciam a boa e apetitosa comida mineira através dos queijos do nosso estado. Também os doces fazem parte do nosso cardápio, assim como a charcutaria, a cachaça, a cerveja artesanal e tudo mais que possa fazer parte da nossa cultura. 

Também temos espaço para produtos de outros estados brasileiros, afinal, um país como o nosso, tão grande e tão cheio de diversidade reúne em todas as partes um pouco da essência de um povo tão querido. Estamos localizados na belíssima Maringá, sul do país, de onde podemos servir praticamente toda a nação brasileira e, em alguns casos, até fora do país. 

Pode chegar, vamos "proziá" e tomar uma boa xícara de café. Aqui, na nossa família, cabe todos os sotaques e culturas.

Name: Manalù - Bistrot & Bakery Lab
Description:
Cos'è Manalù?
Manalù è un ristorante, una pasticceria, un bar dove fare colazione o merenda, è una paninoteca, è un locale dove andare a fare l’aperitivo oppure bere una buona tisana davanti al tuo libro preferito. 
è un ambiente dove si respira l’amore per le materie prime, l’attenzione ai dettagli, la cura del cliente e la voglia di crescere ogni giorno.

Oggi Manalù trova la sua forma in un grande unico locale nel cuore della città di Livorno : Il Manalù Bistrot & Bakery Lab  

Com'è nato Manalù?
L’attuale format di Manalù nasce dall’apertura del 1° bistrot 100% senza glutine di Livorno: appunto il Bistrot Manalù. Il tutto  nato dall’intuizione di 3 fratelli: Manuela, Nadia e Luca. Figli di ristoratori, nati e cresciuti tra pentole e fornelli, hanno sempre sognato un locale tutto loro… nel 2013 Manuela si scopre celiaca e, poco dopo, questo episodio si rivela essere il seme per la nascita del nuovo locale: un ristorante che potesse accontentare tutti, ANCHE i celiaci ed ecco prendere vita il progetto 100% naturalmente gluten free, cioè con nessuna possibilità di contaminazione.

Name: Central Supermercados
Description: Em 1928 dava-se início na cidade de Promissão (SP) a Casa Central, nas atividades de barbearia e perfumaria, logo transformada para loja de armarinhos sob a direção do seu fundador José Miguel Salomão. Em 1942, veio a se transferir e se estabelecer na cidade de Botucatu como depósito de cereais, criando bases e princípios para seus filhos Naim, Roberto e Antonio. Assim a boa semente havia germinado tornando estes comerciantes honrados no ramo varejista e atacadista em nossa cidade. Confiando em Botucatu, em 1978 passou para Central Supermercados, vindo associar-se à empresa a terceira geração, Paulo Roberto e José Roberto. Aliados aos conceitos de modernidade e valorização do consumidor, utilizaram todos os recursos da automação comercial e, a partir de então, a loja foi passando por constantes ampliações havendo até a necessidade de uma grande reforma com direito a reinauguração no ano de 1997, contando agora com uma área superior a 5.000 m². Devido à administração responsável e ao crédito da tradição que conquistou, o Central Supermercados vem escrevendo sua história, baseado no foco de seu cliente, e na valorização dele para seu sucesso. A qualidade nos serviços, variedade dos produtos e bons preços são os pontos chave para a empresa. “O maior patrimônio do Central é o nosso cliente.

Name: Tiger Purrr
Description:
Tiger Purrr chai is meticulously crafted by the taste-maker of the world’s most awarded Vietnamese restaurant, Red Lantern — famous for its delicious clash of the authentic and the experimental.

WELCOME TO THE SLOW BUZZ
Unlike coffee which sledgehammers your body with caffeine, Tiger Purrr chai is all about that pure, slow-release caffeine that gives you sustained stamina to do your thing, whatever it is. While it’s not decaf, it’s a deliciously gentle buzz.

FOR A POSITIVE CHARGE
Our co-founder, Pauline Nguyen, The Spiritual Entrepreneur, practices shamanic activation to connect the mindset, heartset, healthset and soulset to a higher frequency. She activates all our pure ingredients so they are better digested by the body and absorbed with a positive charge. You’ll feel it from sip to soul.

PROUDLY SMALL
The “Big chai” industry churns out cheap powder and concentrate to satisfy the masses. Not our cuppa tea. We’re proudly small batch and obsessed with premium quality, thoughtfully sourced ingredients. We only use authentic ctc (cut, tear and curl) grade Assam tea and hand roast all our spices.

ANTI-ORDINARY IN EVERY WAY
We're taking a stand against the negative practices of the "big chai" industry. That's why we're anti-artificial, anti-preservatives, anti-additives, anti-single use tea bag packaging, anti-pesticides and anti-concentrate. We keep things pure. It's what we leave out that makes us stand out.

OUR PRODUCTS
 The One – A fiercely elegant blend of whole-leaf assam tea, cassia, cardamom, clove, ginger, star anise, fennel seed, warming szechuan pepper, angelica root. Loose leaf. Chef crafted. 150g – 37 serves.

 The One refill – The same delicious blend of Assam tea and aromatic spices as 'The one', delivered in a cost-effective, handy pouch. So you can keep your stunning cylinder stocked every single month. Loose leaf. Chef crafted. 150g – 37 serves.

 The Lucky Three – our Lucky Three Tiger Purrr box set. 3 x 150g of Tiger Purrr chai.

Name: Villa Gaspar
Description:
Located in Ubeda (Jaen, Andalusia, Spain), Villa Gaspar is a boutique family-owned olive farm dedicated to producing a premium EVOO of superb quality. It is made in October with the harvest's first olives, which are still green and fresh and preserve the maximum intensity of flavor and aroma. We control all stages of the production process carefully, from growing to cold pressing, to achieve the highest quality. The result is a balanced and delicious oil that satisfies the most exquisite palate

Villa Gaspar was born in 2020 after the death of my father, Gaspar. After his loss, we felt the responsibility to maintain his legacy and the urgent need to pay tribute to him. For this reason, we decided to create a premium EVOO of superb quality that comes exclusively from the olive trees that my father himself planted 50 years ago, and that we have named after him. Villa Gaspar is, therefore, the story of a legacy; a legacy that we want to perpetuate in time in form of this wonderful elixir.

Description:
Short Road Pizza began in 2020 as a neighbourhood initiative during lockdown, when my wife Kate, an illustrator, and I, a Creative Director and Chef, started baking pizzas in our back garden to support our local food bank. What started as a community project quickly turned into a successful pop-up, beloved by our neighbours and beyond.

Our pizza blends the best of Italian and American styles—combining the thin, crispy charm of classic Thin Crust Romana with the distinctive flavours of American signature pies. After surpassing our charity goals, we transitioned into a full-fledged pop-up business, hosting successful events at local delis, wine bars, weddings, and private parties.

Now, we’re poised for growth and looking to expand our reach. We're passionate about bringing our refined, creative pizzas to more communities and creating memorable culinary experiences for our customers.

You can now find us at the Three Colts Tavern in Bethnal Green and The William The IV in Leyton slinging pies 7/7.

Description:
When it comes to legendary gin, we don't monkey around. 

Our Monkey Hanger Gin is distilled literally a monkey’s throw from the Headland of Hartlepool where our famous monkey met his fate. Each gin is uniquely formulated to our custom recipe and only made in small batches.

Small batch distilling is an artisan craft and is the opposite of mass produced, commercial gins. Created for gin-lovers, and those that want to try something different and unique, small batch gin is truly rewarding. All Monkey Hanger gin is individually hand-numbered by bottle and batch by our master distiller.

All Monkey Hanger gins are crafted using only natural ingredients – no artificial flavourings here. 

We only use natural botanicals, fruits, herbs, and spices, sourced as locally as possible to deliver subtle flavors with a smooth finish. Savour one of our gins with your favourite tonic and a twist of citrus peel, or simply sip over ice, for some truly le’gin’dary times.

Our gin is available for custom-branding and we offer corporate gifting, including bulk discounts, custom packaging and direct to recipient shipping, and we welcome wholesale opportunities from retail outlets and bars.

Contact us with questions, feedback or just to say "hiya" at hiya@monkeyhanger.co.

Name: Bistro Tech Distribution
Description:
Bistro Tech : la révolution culinaire revisitée

Le mot bistro vient du russe bystro, qui signifie « vite » — un cri lancé pour réclamer un service rapide. Au XIXᵉ siècle, le bistrot a bouleversé la façon de consommer : proximité, simplicité, rapidité, cœur de quartier.

Aujourd’hui, avec Bistro Tech, nous portons cette même révolution dans l’ère de la robotique culinaire et de la FoodTech.
Notre mission : offrir aux restaurateurs, foncières et opérateurs la technologie la plus agile, intuitive et performante pour transformer leurs cuisines — sans compromis sur la qualité.
Bistro Tech, c’est l’ADN du bistrot : la convivialité, la rapidité, la régularité… redéfinis pour le XXIᵉ siècle.

Ce que la machine Botinkit apporte

Conçue avec des chefs pour être utilisable par tous, la Botinkit Omni automatise les cuissons complexes : sauces, risottos, sautés, mijotés, currys… en reproduisant la précision d’un grand chef avec la constance d’une machine.
Sa cuve rotative intelligente, ses bacs à condiments calibrés et son pilotage digital garantissent une exécution parfaite, portion par portion, en limitant les pertes, le stress et la dépendance à la main-d’œuvre rare.

 Résultat : une cuisine plus rapide, plus régulière, plus rentable — sans rien céder sur le goût ni la créativité.
Qu’il s’agisse d’un restaurant, d’un hôtel, d’un corner en gare ou d’un concept de restauration à emporter, Botinkit permet d’industrialiser la qualité artisanale et d’ouvrir de nouveaux horizons de productivité et de liberté pour les professionnels.

C’est pourquoi nous sommes fiers d’être le distributeur officiel de Botinkit en France et en Suisse, et d’accompagner cette nouvelle génération de cuisines — plus humaines, plus durables et plus intelligentes.

I prodotti proposti sono tutti e solo prodotti artigianali italiani, selezionati da produttori che non sono presenti nella Grande Distribuzione. I nostri Produttori hanno solo prodotti di qualità eccellente, molti BIO, o con certificazioni DOP, IGP, ecc o alcuni di Presidio Slow Food. Li accomuna la genuinità, la qualità artigianale e l’italianità, che sono alla base della nostra ricerca e selezione.

CIBO&ARTE è il filo conduttore dell’identità di Quelquid, espressione del legame, tutto italiano, tra il cibo, famoso in tutto il mondo e l’arte, di cui l’Italia è culla riconosciuta a livello internazionale.

Fare la spesa è molto semplice: vai al sito quelquid.it, ti registri e metti nel carrello i prodotti che preferisci tra le categorie Ortofrutta, Pastificio, Macelleria, Caseificio, Biscotteria, Dispensa e Bottiglieria. 
Trovi prodotti freschi e freschissimi e anche da dispensa, che ti vengono consegnati a casa nel giorno che tu scegli al momento dell’ordine. 
Riceverai così comodamente a casa la tua spesa alimentare per la famiglia.

Description:
At Moderne Barn Wines & Spirits, we believe in celebrating life’s finest moments with a glass of something truly exceptional. Our passion for craftsmanship and quality drives us to curate an exquisite selection of premium wines and spirits from around the globe. Whether you’re a seasoned connoisseur or a curious enthusiast, our diverse collection offers something to satisfy every palate.

We pride ourselves on offering a personalized experience, from sourcing rare vintages and craft spirits to hosting intimate tastings. Our expert team is here to guide you through every sip, ensuring you discover new favorites and deepen your appreciation for fine beverages.

At Moderne Barn Wines & Spirits, we’re more than just a store — we’re a community of wine and spirit lovers committed to elevating the art of drinking well. Visit us in-store or explore our exclusive collections online, and let us help you celebrate in style.

- Curated selection of fine wines and craft spirits
- Rare and limited-edition bottles
- Personalized recommendations and consultations
- Private tastings and events
- Corporate Gifts

Raise your glass with us and experience the difference that passion, knowledge, and quality can make. Cheers!

Name: Cool Tea Against Cruelty
Description:
Cool Tea Against Cruelty is a proudly Australian tea company dedicated to crafting exceptional tea products while making a real impact. Offering a range of teas, blends, iced teas, and other tea-inspired products, we combine premium quality with a purpose-driven mission.

At the heart of our business is a commitment to sustainability and compassion. We source our tea from smallholder farmers, ensuring ethical practices and fair support for the hardworking individuals behind every leaf. Additionally, 50% of our profits are dedicated to ending animal cruelty, driving positive change for animals and communities worldwide.

Cool Tea Against Cruelty isn’t just about tea—it’s about creating a movement where good taste meets good deeds. By choosing our products, customers are not only enjoying premium tea but also joining a cause that’s focused on building a kinder, more sustainable future.

Name: Southland Ships Supplier
Description:

With a dedicated team and modern logistics structure — including refrigerated trucks, storage chambers, and warehouses — we ensure quality, reliability, and punctuality in every delivery.

We supply provisions, bonded stores, deck, engine, and cabin stores, safety equipment, and chemicals, always prioritizing excellence and competitive pricing.

As members of international maritime associations such as IMPA and ABFN, we are proud to serve shipowners, managers, and agents worldwide, offering trustworthy service and long-term partnerships.

Southland Ships Supplier — Your reliable partner at Brazilian ports.

--- 
A Southland Ships Supplier é uma empresa brasileira de shipchandler sediada em Rio Grande, que oferece soluções completas de fornecimento marítimo para embarcações que escalam os portos de Rio Grande, Porto Alegre e Tramandaí.

Com uma equipe dedicada e estrutura logística moderna — incluindo caminhões refrigerados, câmaras frias e armazéns — garantimos qualidade, confiabilidade e pontualidade em cada entrega.

Fornecemos provisões, bonded stores, materiais de convés, máquina e camarote, equipamentos de segurança e produtos químicos, sempre priorizando a excelência e preços competitivos.

Name: Nahz Cafe
Description:
Welcome to Nahz Cafe, we are dedicated to promoting healthy living while nurturing the imaginative spirits of our young patrons. Our menu is bursting with wholesome and nutritious options, designed to fuel growing bodies and inspire young minds. We believe that good health is essential to a child's well-being, and we strive to make nutritious choices appealing to our young customers.

Our mission is to create a world of joy and wellness, where kids reign supreme and healthy living takes center stage. We want to help families establish lifelong habits that help kids avoid the serious health risks associated with childhood obesity. We believe that the sooner you introduce wholesome, nutritious choices into a child’s diet, the easier they’ll be able to develop a healthy relationship with food that can last them a lifetime. 

At Nahz Cafe, we offer mouthwatering treats and refreshing beverages, all carefully crafted with the utmost care and a pinch of youthful creativity. We want to make healthy eating fun and exciting for kids, and we believe that every bite at our café should be a delightful experience.

Join us on this extraordinary journey towards a healthier and happier future for our little ones. Let's savor the flavors of good health and embark on an adventure that ignites the imagination while fostering a love for nourishing choices.

Name: Laaya Foods
Description:
Laaya Foods was founded on our passion for bees, honey, and the environment. Since its inception, Laaya Foods has been working alongside marginalized and tribal farmer communities intending to provide significantly better livelihood to these communities from agricultural and allied activities. These communities are deeply rooted in their tradition and their love of Mother Nature. They abstain from practicing modern high-yield, expensive, and harmful farming practices and are thus the leading practitioners of organic and natural agricultural processes.

We associate with such communities, extend them resources in different forms such as scientific or monetary assistance, better market linkage, education regarding government schemes, post-harvest management, and technological advancements they require and help them with better price realization for their efforts and commitment.

We have partnered with multiple farming communities of Jharkhand, Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh, and Tripura. With our joint efforts, the communities can fetch better prices for their natural and non-toxic produce. Our farmer communities are also involved in producing value-added products and taking up other agricultural practices apart from farming.

Producing pure and natural food takes immense manual effort and we strive towards making sure the producer is aptly rewarded for its efforts. Your every purchase from Laaya Foods goes a long way in contributing towards our ethical yet marginalized farming communities.

Name: Occelli Global Trading
Description:
Occelli Global Trading is the continuation of the international trade operation formerly known as Eureka Global Trading.

Since 1999, the company has operated in global markets with a focus on predictability, efficiency, and operational reliability.

In January 2026, following the sale of the Eureka brand, the operation continues under a new name, led by its founder, Dario Occelli.

Occelli Global Trading is a newly established company by name, but not by practice. It begins its operations grounded in decades of experience, established international relationships, and a proven operational method.

Occelli Global Trading operates in international trade with a clear mission: to transform currency volatility, regulatory barriers, and logistical complexity into structured, controlled, and auditable processes.

More than exporting and importing products, the company delivers operational security and competitive advantage. Its differentiator lies in how each operation is structured: predictable, traceable, and auditable from start to finish.

Areas of expertise include:

• Specialty coffee and commodities, with full traceability and consistent quality.
• Premium beverages, including selected wines, cachaças and juices, managed through controlled logistics.
• Premium beef and sheep meat cuts, including Halal-certified supply, meeting strict international standards.
• Recycled aluminum, combining efficiency and environmental responsibility.
• Brewing supplies, such as malt and hops, serving large-scale and craft breweries.

With over two decades of experience, the company operates through a robust international network, delivering tailor-made solutions under strict regulatory compliance.

Predictability is not a differentiator. It is the baseline.

Revenir à l’essentiel et donner redonner à la nature tout son pouvoir : voici nos maîtres mots.

Estamos 100% dedicados a nuestro emprendimiento, es el sustento de nuestra familia y nuestra pasión.  Somos un gran equipo y todos nuestros productos están seleccionados con el mismo amor que nos entregamos cada día.

Name: Pistash
Description:
Pistash is excited to enter the market with our own pistachio milk! Pistash is dedicated to bring the beauty and health of pistachios to the world through crave-worthy food and beverages. 

CEO & Founder, Alex Sborov, is a 2nd generation member of her family's pistachio farming business. Alex grew up surrounded by pistachios. These nutritious nuts were her favorite golf course snack through her collegiate career, providing antioxidants, salt, and protein to sustain her during tournaments.

In 2018, Alex began experimenting with pistachio desserts, from meringues to cookies and cheesecakes, and found them to be a perfect addition to various dishes like soups, pasta sauces, and charcuterie boards. While pursuing her MBA at UC Berkeley, she envisioned a way to continue her family's legacy and share her passion for this premium nut.

As she delved deeper into pistachios, Alex discovered they require less water to grow than other nuts – an important discovery given California’s recent drought challenges. She also was taken aback by the numerous additives and unpronounceable ingredients in the plant-based milks she consumed.

The world deserves a natural, creamy, and delicious plant-based beverage. Using simple, locally grown ingredients from California, Alex created her first product for Pistash: a delightful, creamy pistachio milk.

Whether you're a health-conscious individual, a conscientious consumer, or someone simply looking for delicious and nourishing food options, Pistash aims to be your go-to destination for wholesome plant-based products.

Please follow for company updates and where to find Pistash at a store near you.

Name: Litro
Description: Litro skapar sockerfria energidrycker av naturliga ingredienser - i en brustablett som smakar bättre än burk. Vi utmanar dryckesindustrin genom att kombinera bekvämlighet, hållbarhet och fantastisk smak. Med Litro får du en energidryck som är sockerfri, naturlig och enkel att ta med överallt.

Name: Diego's Bakery
Description: Diego's Bakery is a heartfelt tribute to Diego's passion for baking. Inspired by authentic flavors from Europe, Latin America, and the U.S., Diego recreates cherished recipes that evoke the warmth of home, using only fresh ingredients—never canned. Diego's chef education deepened his appreciation for the artistry of baking, fueling his desire to share these creations. We can’t wait for you to join us in savoring the warmth, nostalgia, and joy in every bite!

Name: Nutrisum
Description:
Nutrisum took shape when we saw our immediate family member’s daily struggle to find credible choices in the market for maintaining a balanced and nutritious diet given their battle with lifestyle related health issues. We witnessed a lack of credible alternatives impacting their quality of life, either pushing them to make compromises with the choices they have to make or letting go of simple pleasures of life like enjoying rusks with a morning cup of tea.

We set out on a mission to change this by creating Nutrisum - a brand dedicated to providing reliable options that fit seamlessly into everyday lives and help support a healthy lifestyle without compromising on the experience.

Don’t miss out on the small pleasures of life.

Name: Ooika
Description:
Ooika brings uncompromised Matcha to the U.S. by preserving heritage production methods across the historic terroirs of Japan. The 800-year-old Matcha-making traditions are in danger of being forgotten in Japan. As we lose them, we also lose the unique flavors and aromas of heritage Matcha.

We foster personal relationships directly with tea farmers who utilize traditional cultivation methods. By making the stories of heritage Matcha accessible, Ooika aims to preserve heritage Matcha for generations to come.

Matcha is meant to be consumed fresh. Our Matcha is milled in-house with authentic Japanese stone mills (Ishi Usu) in-house for unparalleled freshness.

Name: DS-SPAIN
Description:
Somos un equipo de profesionales con un único objetivo, atender las necesidades de nuestros clientes de la forma más eficaz. Para cumplir dicho objetivo creemos que el compromiso y la pasión que aportamos a cada labor que realizamos nos hace cada día un poco mejores. 
 
En Ds-Spain nos dedicamos a la distribución de productos, con varios años de experiencia en el sector de la hostelería y la restauración. Proporcionado servicio a hoteles, restaurantes, empresas de catering y “dark kitchen”. Ponemos a disposición de nuestros clientes un amplio catálogo de productos de alimentación, así como de limpieza y menaje. Así mismo, nos adaptamos a las particularidades de cada uno de nuestros clientes.

Pero Ds-spain no se queda aquí, ofrecemos mucho más, porque somos un aliado para su tiempo, nos diferenciamos, tanto por la calidad de nuestros productos como por el servicio y atención personalizado. También y una gran ventaja de nuestra empresa es que nuestros clientes pueden realizar sus pedidos on-line de forma muy sencilla, facilitando la gestión y el día a día de su empresa y además en nuestra plataforma on-line podrán visualizar sus pedidos, facturas, descargar los documentos en PDF, tener su archivo digital siempre disponible.

Si quieres más información visita nuestra web https://ds-spain.com/ y si tienes alguna duda no dudes en contactar con nosotros.

Name: Grupo Real Casagrande
Description:
Seja bem-vindo à página oficial do Grupo Real Casagrande no LinkedIn. Somos uma empresa com raízes profundas e uma visão voltada para o futuro. Fundada com coragem e determinação por Orides e Vanis Casagrande, nossa história começou em Campo Novo do Parecis, onde hoje somos sinônimo de qualidade, eficiência, bom atendimento.

Além de nosso reconhecido supermercado, expandimos os horizontes para uma gama diversificada de negócios, incluindo atacados, restaurantes e uma rede postos de combustíveis. Nos orgulhamos em fornecer carne de nossa própria fazenda, seguindo os mais altos padrões de qualidade e sustentabilidade.

Nossa missão não se limita apenas aos negócios. Nos comprometemos impactar positivamente a comunidade, gerando empregos e apoiando iniciativas sociais. O futuro nos inspira constantemente a inovar e aprimorar nossos produtos e serviços para atender às necessidades em evolução de nossos clientes.

Junte-se a nós nesta jornada de sucesso e comprometimento. No Grupo Real Casagrande, a tradição se une à busca constante pela excelência. Siga-nos para se manter atualizado sobre nossas últimas notícias e oportunidades de carreira. Estamos ansiosos para conectá-lo à nossa comunidade e compartilhar nosso compromisso com a qualidade e o crescimento.
Location: CAMPO NOVO DO PARECIS, Mato Grosso

Name: Family Traditions Specialty Foods, LLC
Description:
Welcome to Family Traditions Specialty Foods!

 At Family Traditions Specialty Foods, we're passionate about creating unforgettable culinary experiences through our premium brands: Coconut Joe's Hot Sauces and Bold City Seasonings. As a company deeply rooted in the love for authentic flavors and cherished family recipes, we strive to bring the essence of tradition to every table.
Coconut Joe's Hot Sauces represent the fusion of tropical inspiration and culinary expertise. Crafted with handpicked exotic ingredients and perfected through generations of recipes, each bottle of Coconut Joe's delivers a symphony of flavors that tantalize the taste buds and transport you to sun-kissed shores. Whether you're craving a fiery kick or a subtle tropical twist, Coconut Joe's has a sauce to suit every palate.
Bold City Seasonings embodies the spirit of boldness and creativity in every sprinkle. Our diverse range of seasonings is meticulously blended to enhance the natural flavors of your favorite dishes, adding depth and character to every bite. From savory classics to adventurous flavor profiles, Bold City Seasonings elevates your culinary creations to new heights, making every meal a memorable experience.
As a company, we are committed to quality, authenticity, and innovation. We source the finest ingredients from around the globe, ensuring that each product meets the highest standards of excellence. Our dedicated team of culinary experts works tirelessly to develop new and exciting flavors that capture the essence of tradition while embracing the spirit of innovation.
Join us on a journey of flavor discovery and culinary delight. Whether you're a seasoned chef or an adventurous home cook, Family Traditions Specialty Foods invites you to savor the taste of tradition with Coconut Joe's Hot Sauces and Bold City Seasonings.
Discover the flavors that bring families together and traditions to life. Welcome to the Family Traditions Specialty Foods family.

Name: Summer Supermercados
Description:
Com mais de 20 anos de história, o Summer Supermercados tem o prazer de fazer parte do dia a dia das comunidades de Niterói, Maricá e Saquarema. Nosso compromisso é oferecer sempre qualidade, variedade e os melhores preços, com um toque especial de cuidado, pois somos uma empresa familiar que entende e valoriza as necessidades de cada cliente.

Trabalhamos com dedicação para garantir que suas compras sejam práticas, econômicas e completas. Para isso, contamos com grandes parceiros, como Heineken, BRF (Sadia e Perdigão), e muitas outras marcas de confiança, sempre trazendo o melhor para sua casa. Além disso, buscamos oferecer promoções imperdíveis para que você aproveite mais e pague menos.

Pensando ainda mais no seu bem-estar, criamos o Clube Summer +, um programa exclusivo para nossos clientes, com vantagens, descontos e ofertas personalizadas.

Mais do que um supermercado, queremos ser uma parte importante da sua vida, contribuindo para o conforto e a satisfação de sua família. Nossa missão é crescer junto com as cidades em que atuamos, sempre com o compromisso de oferecer o melhor para nossos bairros e para você.

Venha nos visitar e aproveite tudo o que o Summer Supermercados tem para oferecer!

Our smart vending technology guarantees real-time freshness and a seamless grab-and-go experience. Whether you’re rushing between meetings or need a post-workout boost, Grab N' Greens has you covered.

Description:

Each bottle of Spade & Sparrows is made with your taste buds, nights-out and (most importantly) your nights-in, in mind.

From our 12oz mineral-infused cans to our versatile Chaser Drops, every product is crafted with intention and 100% natural. Name: Cong Caphe MY
Description:
Xin chào! Welcome to Cong Caphe, the authentic coffee chain straight from Vietnam, where only the finest ROBUSTA coffee quality reigns. For the strong coffee aficionados who crave a brew that fuels you for hours, this is your spot. It's not for the faint-hearted, but for those who dare to dive into bold flavours. All are served in a timeless Vietnamese ambience that whisks you to Vietnam the moment you step inside.

As one of Vietnam's largest and most recommended coffee chains, we've thrived for nearly two decades – a must-visit spot in Vietnam. Our iconic "Nau Da" (known as the Hanoian in Malaysia Chain) coffee, enriched with condensed milk, won hearts thanks to Cong Caphe's touch. The introduction of the "coconut coffee smoothie" took Cong Caphe soaring, while the renowned "Bac Xiu" (coffee with coconut milk over crushed ice) became a Vietnam legacy. Every drink is handcrafted, except for the ice of course. Come and experience coffee magic that lasts a lifetime!

Women Owned * Black Owned*

Name: desipaya
Description:
What is Paya in Desi language ?

Paya  is a traditional dish of Pakistan. It is especially popular at various festivals and treated to special guests and get togethers. Paya means feet in Urdu and Hindi. The main ingredients of the dish are the trotters or hooves of a cow, goat, water buffalo or lamb; cooked with various spices. We specialize only in Cow Trotters so you can order the BEEF PAYA with DESI PAYA.

Name: Long Run Coffee
Description:
Long Run Coffee helps athletes fuel, perform, and recover so they can get the most out of their passions.  

We were the first to develop electrolyte infused coffee with a patent-protected process that infuses electrolytes into the oils of coffee beans, providing runners and athletes with a coffee that supports hydration and is better-tasting than traditional coffee.  

We have since innovated and launched additional products for athletes, such as our Ready to Run instant hazelnut latte powder that uses a proprietary blend of electrolytes, caffeine, and natural ingredients to support hydration muscle function, performance and promote overall balance in your body.

Long Run Coffee is here to Fuel Your Passion and help you achieve your ideal running performance and overall wellbeing in a sustainable and enjoyable way, without sacrificing taste or wasting time.

Name: Roni the Great
Description:
We are a family business that has been engaged in the cultivation and processing of organic aronia (or chokeberry) in the Prefecture of Pella in Greece since 2016.
Our purpose is the production and distribution of organic products of excellent taste and high nutritional value under the Roni The Great brand.
They are 100% natural, strong anti-oxidant, anti-viral and anti-microbial, vegan, gluten-free, with no added sugar! 
The Roni the Great line of products, branded, private label and in bulk, includes:
•       Aronia juice 100%
•       Aronia natural fruit drinks
•       Aronia fruit jams
•       Aronia powder
•       Dried / frozen / fresh aronia berries in bulk
•       Aronia & spices tea
 The fruits of aronia come from our organic fields in Pella, North Greece, the birthplace of Alexander the Great!  
Roni the Great competitive advantages:
1. The soil, topography, and climate of our own large cultivable fields give large quantities of aronia fruits with the same quality characteristics like taste, aroma, size, color and ripening in the same period.
2. The fields are nearby the processing facilities. The result is our aronia berries are high in brix value (23-30) that makes them sweeter and  they keep all the nutritious properties of the aronia super food, that otherwise get lost in long transportation! We do not import any raw materials from overseas!
3. Our organic cultivation, with consistency and ethics, results in the production of aronia fruits with zero (0) residues in 549 active chemical components (tested by an accredited laboratory for this purpose).
4. We are flexible company that listens to our customers’ needs and adapts to them, regarding the production of custom made products and new recipes like new flavours in juice and more.

Name: BAZAAR COFFEE
Description:
Hello! We are Bazaar Coffee; a tiny, family owned business specializing in sourcing, roasting, retailing and wholesaling single origin, specialty coffee. We roast our specialty coffee in micro batches so each pound of coffee is exquisite with cup scores into the 90's, roasted on demand for ultimate freshness.
We began building Bazaar Coffee because we wanted the freedom to put our family first, to work in an environment where the company culture reflects our values and the flexibility to do what we love from anywhere. We are Nataliah & Tyler Dodd; a former Norfolk Sheriff’s Deputy, married to a Bisbee native who grew up locally, and our kids. Combining a shared love for coffee and community, we began Bazaar Coffee; coffee for community.
One of our favorite ways to build community is to collaborate, finding ways for Bazaar Coffee to partner with artists, small businesses, photographers, etc. working together to help our community thrive. If you want to collaborate with us, are interested in carrying our Specialty Coffee, or would like to order wholesale, please email us at hello@bazaarcoffee.com! Our website, www.bazaarcoffee.com, is currently our primary storefront. However, a sampling of our retail is also available locally, inside of Classic Rock Couture at 38 Main Street in Bisbee, Arizona. How ever, or where ever you like to enjoy our coffee, we hope you get Bazaar together!

Name: Benevolence FMCG Consulting Services

It requires knowledge of food safety, traceability in manufacturing, supplier management, supply chain requirements and risk management. Candice Bull, founder of Benevolence has experience in these fields as well as extensive knowledge on constantly changing legalities and the specifics pertaining to the various FMCG categories – in particular Food & Personal Care.

Whether you are looking for a service to fit into an existing infrastructure or are looking to outsource completely, we have the agility to customise our offering to your business’ requirements.

Name: Porfiro.co
Description:
After conducting extensive field research in 2017, it was revealed to us that we were able to take a new and essential step in the field of nutrient-dense snacks and refreshments’ industry and to represent and provide healthy and proper products for a salubrious and wholesome lifestyle based on health and self-care. As our target was to compete with other brands in a world-wide scale, we chose a universal name for our brand: Porfiro. The name Porfiro was chosen in one of the brand’s owner’s trips to Spain; one of the countries that own some of the finest food brands with distinguished packings and a progressive and professional knowledge of marketing and trade. 
Since Piarom Date,Pistachio and Almond are from top agricultural products of Iran, regarding their quality, origin and healthiness, we arrived at the decision to provide the international market with these products as the key members of the Porfiro brand’s family while maintaining an outstanding quality alongside the application of scientific methods and meeting the highest international standards. These products are included in the category of nutritious and wholesome snacks and refreshments and are there to provide our Dear Customers with the due nutrition for their healthy and deserved lifestyles.

Name: Victoria Wines Fiji
Description:
Victoria Wines is a Fiji-based family business dedicated to importing and distributing fine wines from all over the world. We have Wine Shops in Denarau, Nadi and Suva.

With our Wine Club, Wine Events and Wine Tastings, we offer a complete selection of world-class wines, beers, ciders and soft drinks. We are able to meet visitors at Nadi International Airport, or deliver anywhere in Nadi Town, Denarau Island or Suva City. Read more on our delivery page.
We also supply to Fiji's top boutique Island Resorts and Restaurants.

We also own and manage some hospitality business: Bad Dog Café & The Dogfather Bar at Damodar City in Suva, as well as a Suva-based catering company, Top Dog Catering. 

As we import wines directly from France, Italy, Spain, Portugal, Chile, Argentina, the USA, New Zealand, and Australia, we maintain two large bonded warehouse and storage facilities in Suva and Nadi, which are strictly temperature controlled. 

Our tagline “We love it, We drink it, We sell it” reflects our passion and enjoyment of great wine and our commitment towards sharing this with all our customers. 

Find out more about who we are on our website, or for more information on our products and services, please contact us on +679 6750236/ 8958915.

Name: EMME MAC BLACK
Description:
Emme Mac Black Specialty Coffee is the epitome of refined coffee craftsmanship, transforming your daily ritual into a memorable coffee experience. Founded in regional Victoria, our beans are ethically sourced from across the equatorial coffee belt, then Italian-style slow-roasted in Melbourne. Crafted for the discerning palate, our blends boast rich, uncomplicated flavours and elegant simplicity, available in all formats including whole beans, ground and home compostable capsules.

Rooted in the founders' shared passions for travel and coffee, Emme Mac Black encapsulates the spirit of exploration in every cup. Embracing sustainability at every stage, from coffee producers to local packaging and even recycled coffee cup stationery, we invite you to join us on a journey where each sip is a fusion of quality, ethics, and the joyous spirit of adventure. Emme Mac Black Specialty Coffee — where the love for exceptional coffee meets the passion for adventure.

Name: Soquermar
Description:
A Soquermar, Comércio de Produtos Alimentares, Lda. tem como objetivo ser o seu parceiro confiável no mundo dos produtos alimentares e higiene. Desde a nossa fundação em 1994, dedicámo-nos apaixonadamente a oferecer soluções de alta qualidade para a indústria do retalho. O nosso compromisso com a excelência e a satisfação do cliente tem sido a base do nosso crescimento e sucesso contínuo.

Ao longo dos anos, construímos uma reputação sólida como líderes no fornecimento de uma vasta gama de produtos essenciais para o setor. Desde alimentos de primeira qualidade até produtos de higiene que garantem segurança e bem-estar, a nossa missão é abastecer os retalhistas com produtos que atendam às necessidades dos seus clientes e elevem os padrões de qualidade.

A nossa jornada começou com uma visão clara: sermos mais do que apenas fornecedores. Queremos ser parceiros estratégicos dos nossos clientes, compreendendo profundamente as suas necessidades específicas e fornecendo soluções personalizadas que impulsionam os seus negócios. Acreditamos que o sucesso sustentável é alcançado através de relações sólidas e colaborativas, e é por isso que valorizamos cada parceria que construímos ao longo do tempo.

Na Soquermar, a nossa equipa é o coração do que fazemos. Profissionais experientes e dedicados trabalham incansavelmente para garantir que cada produto que chega até si seja da mais alta qualidade. A nossa busca incessante pela inovação e aperfeiçoamento é o que nos mantém à frente da curva, sempre nos adaptando às mudanças do mercado e às necessidades em constante evolução dos nossos clientes.

À medida que avançamos para o futuro, reafirmamos o nosso compromisso com os nossos valores fundamentais: integridade, qualidade e parcerias duradouras. Estamos entusiasmados com a oportunidade de continuar a crescer junto com os nossos clientes e parceiros, proporcionando produtos que fazem a diferença nas vidas das pessoas.

Name: Platypus Brewing
Description:
Platypus Brewing is a craft brewery in Houston, TX with a full service bar and restaurant on site. Founded in 2016 the Texas-meets-Australia concept is the brainchild of an Aussie and Texas trio, Sean and Rachna Hanrahan and Morgan Hughes. The trio was seeking to bring together the cultures and flavors of their home countries, original and new, through good food, beer and friends, old and new. 

On site expect anwhere from 12 -15 freshly brewed beers on tap along with craft cocktails, liquor, wine and ciders. The seasonal menu is set to pair perfectly with beers and cocktails and offers something for everyone. Beers can also be found around town at select bars and restaurants on tap plus in cans on site and at select retailers. 

Visit Platypus Brewing with family and friends, or come down and make some new ones, and enjoy a drink, a meal and a couple of laughs.

Name: Matilda Creations
Description:
Doğadaki mükemmeliyetin dengesinden yola çıkan Matilda Creations olarak estetik anlayışımızla doğaldaki bu uyumun peşine düşüyoruz. Hem görsellik hem de lezzet anlamında dengeyi buluyor, doğadan ilham alarak her biri benzersiz sonuçlar ortaya çıkaran tarifler üretiyoruz.

Matilda Creations dünyası; 25 bini aşkın çeşidi olan ve tüm bu çeşitlerinde kendine has farklılıklar barındıran orkideden esinleniyor. Bu çeşitlilik ve özgünlükle ile hikayemizi derinleştiriyoruz.

Orkidenin asaleti, yüzyıllara dayanan değeri ve elegan duruşu; ürünlerimizi ve sunuş şekillerimizi yönlendiren en önemli unsurlardan... Dişiliği markamızın kimliğinde, çeşitliliği peşine düştüğümüz yaratıcılık ve özgünlükte, farklılığı kucaklaması ise sizlere ulaşan her kutunun biricik olmasında bize yol gösteriyor.

Ürünlerimizi hazırlarken yeme-içme olgusunun bir sanat olarak ele alınması gerektiğine inanıyor ve bu anlayışı benimseyerek hareket ediyoruz. Özgün tasarım ve sanatı buluşturan sunumlarımızı doğanın kendi dengesiyle saf bir estetiğe kavuşturuyoruz.

Ürünlerimizin hazırlanmasından sizlere ulaşmasına kadar her noktada bunu sağlayabilmek vermek istediğimiz mesajın temelini oluşturuyor. Her bir kutunun taze çiçeklerle, bambaşka hazırlanması da bu felsefenin bir parçası. Her kutu; içinde bulunulan “an”ın enerjisiyle, büyük bir özveriyle hazırlanıyor ve makaronların ulaştığı kişiye lezzet ve görsellikle beraber bu enerjiyi, özveriyi de ulaştırarak mutlu etmeyi amaçlıyoruz.

Name: WA-CHAA! Worldwide
Description:
From the legendary house of Huang Fei Hong comes WA-CHAA! The kung fu cult-classic bringing honor to the peanut. 

Action mastery, cinematic excellence, and peanut expertise come together. 

The once respected peanut has fallen far, with careless stewardship from lesser companies. Under these false masters, it has been placed on the bottom shelf, gathering shame, as inferior products have taken over hearts, minds and provisioners.

Through our productions, we’re demanding people re-experience the protein power, timeless appeal, and kung fu delicacy that may be overlooked, but never defeated.

Made with the treasured peanuts of Shandong, famous Sichuan numbing peppercorns, toasted chili flakes, and honor. 

If you do not love them, you are mistaken.

Name: The Coffee Cyclist
Description:
Once upon a time, there was a person who was passionate about two things in life - coffee and cycling. This person was constantly seeking new adventures and exploring new places, but there was one thing that always remained a constant - a good cup of coffee. Whether it was during a break from a long ride or just simply enjoying a quiet moment, a good cup of coffee was always a source of comfort and joy.

One day, this person had an epiphany - why not combine their two loves and create a unique coffee brand inspired by the thrill of cycling? And thus, the journey of creating a new coffee brand began.

The brand was built on the principles of quality and adventure. Every bean was carefully sourced from the finest coffee-growing regions in the world, and each roast was crafted to perfection to deliver the perfect cup of coffee.

With a love for cycling and a passion for coffee, the new brand was finally ready to share its unique blends with the world. Whether you're a seasoned cyclist/runner or simply someone who loves a good cup of coffee, this brand promises to bring a touch of adventure to every cup. Join us on this journey and experience the thrill of cycling or running with every sip.

We offer a range of different blends:

Tour De France - Zimbabwe/Brasil blend
Giro d’Italia - Rwanda/Colombia blend
The Monument - Brazil/Ethiopia blend
La Vuelta - Ethiopia/Colombia blend
Whiskey Infused blend
Brandy Infused Blend
180 ml Cold Brew IV drip bag

Name: Indy Fresh Market
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Indy Fresh Market, a supermarket committed to providing fresh, affordable, and local products to underserved communities.

At Indy Fresh Market, we believe that everyone deserves access to high-quality groceries and a wide range of fresh produce. Our mission is to create a positive impact by delivering a welcoming shopping experience and supporting the local economy through partnerships with local farmers and suppliers.

As a community-oriented supermarket, we are dedicated to offering a diverse selection of products that will meet the unique needs and preferences of our customers. From everyday essentials to specialty items, we strive to stock our shelves with an extensive range of fresh foods, center store products, and top-notch meats.

Our team of dedicated professionals will be at the heart of our success. We will foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment that values teamwork, respect, and innovation. Together, we aim to exceed customer expectations by delivering exceptional service and maintaining the highest standards of quality throughout our store.

At Indy Fresh Market, we will go beyond being just a grocery store. We will actively engage with the communities we serve through educational initiatives, charitable programs, and partnerships with local organizations. We believe in giving back and making a difference in people's lives, fostering a sense of belonging and empowerment.

Join us in our mission to make fresh, affordable, and local products accessible to all. Follow our LinkedIn page to stay updated on our latest news, future career opportunities, community initiatives, and more. Together, we can build a stronger and healthier future for underserved communities.

#CommunitySupermarket #FreshAffordableLocal #MakingADifference #JoinOurTeam #IndyFreshMarket

Name: Spice Pickle
Description:
হোমমেড • অর্গানিক • স্বাস্থ্যসম্মত • সুস্বাদু 
                ঘরোয়া আচারের পুরনো সেই স্বাদ মানেই স্পাইস পিকেল।
          যে কোন আচার/ ডিপিংস/ সস এর কাস্টমাইজ অর্ডার নেওয়া হয়।

আসসালামু আলাইকুম, ১০০% অর্গানিক ও স্বাস্থ্যসম্মত, হোমমেড, মাজাদার স্বাদের টক-মিষ্টি কিংবা ঝাল আচার / ডিপিংস / ডিপিংস সস অথবা চুয়াডাঙ্গার খেজুরের ঝোলা ও পাটালি গুড় অর্ডার করতে ইনবক্স করুন।স্পাইস পিকেলের যে কোন সাইজের আচার/ ডিপিংস/ সস/ গুড় অর্ডার করলেই সারা বাংলাদেশে হোম ডেলিভারি করা হয়। 

স্পাইস পিকেল মানেই স্বাদের সাথে সু-স্বাস্থ্যের অঙ্গীকার। 
ঝাঁঝালো স্বাদে ভরপুর, একদম ঘরোয়া রেসিপিতে তৈরি হয় আমাদের স্পাইস পিকেলের প্রতিটি আচার, ডিপিংস এবং ডিপিংস সস।
 ১০০% প্রাকৃতিক ও অর্গানিক উপাদানে তৈরি
 কোনো কেমিক্যাল বা ক্ষতিকারক প্রিজারভেটিভ নেই
বাছাইকৃত মশলার ঝাল মিষ্টি আর দেশি খাঁটি সরিষার তেলের অনন্য স্বাদে

আমাদের আচারের বিশেষত্বঃ
প্রিজারভেটিভ মুক্ত, টেস্টিং সল্ট মুক্ত, সাদা চিনি বা কোন ধরণের সুইটনার ব্যবহার করা হয় না।
খাঁটি কাঠের ঘানিতে ভাঙ্গা সরিষার তেল, খাঁটি গুড় বা লাল চিনি এবং বাছাইকৃত সেরা উপাদান আচার তৈরিতে ব্যবহার করা হয়।
একমাত্র আমাদের আচারের প্রতিটা জারে পাবেন তেল কম আচার বেশি।

Name: The Fine Wine Gang
Description:
United we stand!
From this very thought the Fine Wine Gang was born.
The Gang's purpose has always been to establish a union of independent wine merchants, united by their passion and their desire to hunt down the best wine, but also to offer wine lovers a selection that is off the beaten track. In the future, new members of the gang will be able to make their voices heard, both by participating in the choice of new gems, but also by bringing this union to life by sharing their beautiful finds...

Name: Domeli Coffee
Description:
Domeli Coffee is more than just a coffee company – it's a passion project dedicated to delivering the finest coffee blends to coffee lovers everywhere. Our premium coffee is sourced from the best coffee producers across South America, Africa, and South East Asia, carefully selected for their unique flavor profiles and exceptional quality.

At Domeli Coffee, we take great pride in our roasting process. Our master roasters have decades of experience and use a combination of traditional and modern techniques to bring out the best in each bean. Our coffee is roasted to perfection, resulting in a rich and smooth taste that is sure to delight even the most discerning coffee drinker.

Our commitment to quality extends beyond just the coffee itself. We believe that every aspect of the coffee-drinking experience should be exceptional, which is why we offer a range of premium coffee accessories, including coffee makers, grinders, and mugs. Whether you prefer to enjoy your coffee at home or on the go, Domeli Coffee has everything you need to make your coffee break a truly special moment.

Domeli Coffee it's a way of life. We are passionate about coffee and dedicated to sharing that passion with others. Our team is made up of coffee lovers, just like you, who are committed to delivering the best coffee-drinking experience possible. Join us on our journey to discover the finest coffee blends from around the world. Try Domeli Coffee today and experience the difference for yourself.

But that's not all – we also take sustainability seriously. We understand that the coffee industry can have a negative impact on the environment and communities, which is why we source our coffee beans from producers who prioritize sustainable practices. Our coffee is ethically sourced, ensuring that the farmers and workers who grow and harvest our beans are treated fairly and paid a living wage.

Domeli Coffee is the perfect choice for coffee lovers who are looking for a premium coffee experience.

We have since innovated and launched additional unique supplements for athletes, such as our Rest & Recover Tea, Ready to Run instant hazelnut latte electrolytes + caffeine powder, and Caffyne Energy Pouches.

Name: Camp's Kitchen
Description:
Camp's Kitchen was founded in February 2022. Our goal is to create a world where locally produced condiments and hot sauces are easily accessible to consumers.

Our Founder and Chief Flavor Officer, Michael Camp, was inspired to start this company because, for one, there isn't a good enough selection of hot sauces in the UAE supermarkets, and two- the craft hot sauce scene is booming everywhere around the world. The UAE residents deserve to have a world-class experience at home.

At Camp's Kitchen, we encourage our community to explore their spice-level boundaries and share the excitement for innovative hot sauce flavours.

Name: Farmwell Drinks
Description:
Farmwell began with a dream from the Ramstad family to create a farm that grew something truly special, with real benefits that could make a lasting impact. 

They discovered the Aronia berry & knew they had found what they were looking for. A natural antioxidant powerhouse berry & not-too-sweet flavor.

So, the Ramstad’s planted 25,000 Aronia berry bushes by hand, building their organic regenerative farm from the ground up.

At Farmwell, they believe that when farming is done with care and purpose, it leads to something more. Because good farming leads to good ingredients, and good ingredients fuel a better way to live. FarmWell, Live Well—it’s that simple.

Name: EAT freedom
Description:
YOUR SUPERIOR OUTDOOR FOOD

The first idea of creating delicious and lightweight outdoor food was born in a tent at a high camp on Cho Oyu, Tibet, in 2011 where Sara Rocci Denis had struggled to maintain the strength to climb an 8000m peak. Lacking the right nutrition to achieve her goal, she set on a mission to create a line of gourmet meals, suitable for supporting high physical and mental performance that are quick to prepare and easy to carry.

Five years later Sara Rocci Denis gained Stefano Polato as Chef and Head of Food Development for EAT freedom. The meeting marks the beginning of the actual conceptual phase of the project that led to the foundation in Munich in January 2021. In 2022 the start-up launched a set of selected recipes to the International Space Station as part of the bonus food allowance for the Mission Minerva of the European Space Agency.

Shortly after the foundation, EAT freedom was chosen to develop part of the customized meal selection of ESA astronaut Samantha Cristoforetti for the Mission Minerva to the International Space Station in 2022.

Description:

We are the first mountain cold-pressed juicery in Kangra, actively working with women and locals, that makes you taste true wellness sourced from nearby farms and farmers. Our format of work came into place by first restoring an old Himachali mud house which is also the legacy of “Amma” who belonged to where it is today Slobar, thus bringing in the most authentic version of a local Himachali life into a contemporary palette, just for you. We provide 100% transparency with our offerings and the people we associate with. At Slobar, eating healthy is not a boring affair not just because of the taste but also it makes you realize that what you eat is what you become. 
In our micro cafe, we serve the best cold-pressed juices and smoothie bowls in town. All the wet waste and fruit pulp goes directly to our cattle, thus we are super blessed to contribute back to the community and also cultivate a zero waste practice with our operations. Every time you indulge with Slobar, Amma’s legacy gets to see a better future. And that’s not it, our mission is to always bring in the magic potion of nature in the most innovative form possible. The journey has just started. 
Located in the heart of Bir, Himachal Pradesh also known as the Paragliding Paradise of India. We love to contribute to the existing geo-social construct and be rooted in nature.

Name: VinSano GmbH
Description:
Als Weinliebhaber unternehmen wir regelmässig Reisen in Weinbaugebiete. Dabei interessieren wir uns vor allem für kleine und mittelgrosse Betriebe, die erstklassigen Wein produzieren.
5 Freunde, eine gemeinsame Leidenschaft für Wein und den Wunsch, auserlesene Tropfen für den Eigengebrauch eigenständig in die Schweiz zu importieren, das steckt hinter der VinSano GmbH. In 2008 gegründet, erlaubt es uns die Weinimportfirma direkt beim Produzenten ohne Zwischenhandel Weine zu importieren. Nicht nur die grossen Gewächse und bekannten Namen interessieren uns, sondern kleine und mittelgrosse Betriebe, die mit viel Leidenschaft erstklassigen Wein zu vernünftigen Preisen produzieren.

Dank unserer regelmässigen Besuche vor Ort, kennen wir die Produzenten persönlich, erfahren die Geschichte der von uns degustierten Weine und entdecken auch stets neue Winzer. Nur die erlesensten Weine finden den Weg in unser Sortiment.

Unser Weinangebot stiess bei unseren Freunden und Bekannten von Beginn an auf reges Interesse. Warum sollten nicht auch Sie von unseren Kontakten, fundierten Kenntnissen exzellenter Weine und unseren attraktiven Preis- Leistungsvorteilen profitieren ? Wir haben ursprünglich einmal im Jahr eine Degustation durchgeführt. Heute sind es zwei kostenlose Degustationen pro Jahr, eine im Frühjahr und im Herbst.

Der Erfolg unseres Geschäftsmodells ist das Angebot, gute, seriös vinifizierte Weine von uns bestens bekannten Produzenten zu präsentieren, die nicht überteuert sind. Wir möchten Sie in unserem erlesenen Kundenkreis willkommen heissen und deshalb sind wir dazu übergegangen, unsere Weine online anzubieten.

Die Welt der Weine wächst stetig. Sich darin zurechtzufinden und bezahlbare Qualitätsweine zu entdecken, ist eine Herausforderung, die wir gerne mit Enthusiasmus für Sie annehmen. Wir freuen uns, die weiteren Schritte mit Ihnen gehen zu können.

Name: Callie Baby Bottle, LLC
Description:
Callie Baby Bottle, LLC is an innovation-driven company reimagining how infant formula is delivered in times of crisis, instability, or everyday convenience needs. Our flagship product, the Callie Baby Safe & Ready System, features a patented, dual-pouch feeding solution that keeps powdered formula and sterile water completely separate until the moment of use.

This single-use, no-prep system eliminates the need for clean water, measuring, sterilization, or heating. Just press to mix, and feed. It’s a revolutionary product for disaster zones, hospitals, refugee camps, shelters, humanitarian aid organizations, and emergency preparedness kits.

 Key Benefits:
– Ready-to-use in seconds
– No external water, bottles, or utensils needed
– Shelf-stable (no refrigeration)
– Safe, sterile, and hygienic
– Ideal for caregivers in crisis or without training
– Lightweight and disposable for field logistics

 Use Cases:
– Disaster relief (wildfires, floods, earthquakes)
– Refugee and displacement camps
– NICUs and field hospitals
– Conflict zones and emergency shelters
– Crisis postpartum care and addiction recovery
– WASH-compromised communities
– Urban water crises and housing insecurity

Our design supports health equity and emergency nutrition readiness, providing a solution when conventional formula prep becomes dangerous or impossible.

A clinical study, supported by a grant from Los Alamos National Laboratory, is underway to validate the system's safety, shelf life, and field application in partnership with pediatric and nutrition experts.

At Callie Baby, our mission is simple:
Safe Nutrition. Anytime. Anywhere.

Name: GOUSSY
Description:
Fini les carences nutritionnelles, les longues préparations et les repas fades. Ajoutez gourmandise et bien-être à vos repas avec des légumineuses prêtes en 3 minutes, pour des plats équilibrés et savoureux.


Pourquoi GOUSSY ?

Super rapide : Les légumineuses GOUSSY sont prêtes en 3 minutes. Fini le temps passé à les tremper et les cuire pendant des heures. Il n’a jamais été aussi simple de diversifier son alimentation avec des recettes variées et savoureuses, qui s’intègrent parfaitement dans de nombreuses cuisines du monde, que ce soit en salades, en soupes, en ragoûts ou même en desserts.

Facile à digérer : GOUSSY a un procédé spécial qui rend les légumineuses plus légères pour l’estomac. Plus besoin de se soucier des ballonnements souvent causés par ces aliments.

Bon pour la santé : Nos légumineuses permettent d’éviter les carences nutritionnelles car elles sont riches en protéines, fibres, vitamines et minéraux, sans ajout de sel ou de conservateurs. La cuisson à la vapeur et la surgélation rapide conservent tous ces bons nutriments.
Une consommation régulière de légumineuses est associée à un risque réduit de maladies cardiovasculaires, de diabète de type 2 et de certains cancers.
Leur haute teneur en fibres et protéines aide à mieux contrôler la faim et la satiété, ce qui est bénéfique pour la gestion du poids.

Écologique et local : GOUSSY soutient les agriculteurs locaux avec des méthodes qui respectent l’environnement, comme l’utilisation réduite d’eau et la diminution de l’empreinte carbone.
Les légumineuses enrichissent naturellement les sols en azote, réduisant ainsi le besoin d’engrais chimiques.

Ça se conserve longtemps : Les légumineuses GOUSSY sont surgelées, elles peuvent se garder longtemps, ce qui est bien pratique.

Prix abordable : Les légumineuses sont relativement peu coûteuses par rapport aux autres sources de protéines.

Sie fragen sich, woher Ihre Lebensmittel kommen? Yobst liefert alle Informationen, bis zum letzten Apfelkern. Wir machen Regionalität sichtbar, würdigen lokale Helden und fördern die Zusammenarbeit in der Region. Für Landwirte und Hersteller schaffen wir eine direkte Verbindung zum Verbraucher, unterstützt durch datenbasierte Preisfindung und mehr. Konsumenten erhalten nur das Frischeste aus der Region zu fairen Preisen, jederzeit verfügbar.

Darüber hinaus liegt uns die Umwelt am Herzen: Yobst setzt auf kurze Transportwege und effizientes Schnittstellenmanagement, um unsere CO2-Bilanz zu verbessern. Durch die Minimierung von Lebensmittelverschwendung und die Betonung des Werts regionaler Produkte tragen wir nicht nur zur Frische auf Ihrem Teller bei, sondern auch zu einem besseren Gewissen und einer nachhaltigeren Zukunft.

We believe in progress without compromising the authenticity that makes pani puri an everlasting favorite.

Join the Magic:
Connect with us here on LinkedIn to stay abreast of the magic we're creating at Magic Mingle. Be part of our community where sophistication, warmth, and technology converge to redefine the pani puri experience. Together, let's embark on a journey where each bite is a celebration of tradition and progress.

Name: Dresdner Kaffee und Kakaorösterei
Description:
Kaffeegenuss ist unser Handwerk – und Qualität unser Anspruch. 

Bei der Dresdner Kaffee und Kakao Rösterei verbinden wir traditionelle Handwerkskunst mit nachhaltigem Handeln. 

Unser Trommelröstverfahren veredelt jede Bohne zu einem aromatischen Meisterwerk. 

Wir richten uns an alle Kaffeeliebhaber, die höchsten Wert auf Geschmack und Qualität legen, ob zu Hause, im Büro oder auf Reisen. 

Neben exklusiven Kaffeespezialitäten bieten wir Beratung und Verkauf von Kaffeemaschinen sowie deren Wartung und Reparatur, professionelle Kaffee-Seminare sowie Private-Label-Lösungen. 

Für den puren Kaffeegenuss gibt es unseren BrewCoffeeBag – eine röstfrisch gemahlene Tassenportion für eine Zubereitung, die bis auf heißes Wasser und einer Tasse keinerlei Equipment benötigt.

Besuche uns in Dresden und erlebe, wie Kaffeebohnen im Trommelröstofen ihr volles Aroma entfalten. 

Unsere Manufaktur bietet nicht nur Einblicke in die Kunst der Röstung, sondern auch eine besondere Location für Feiern, Firmenevents oder Tagungen – mit Platz für bis zu 50 Personen, gern auch mit kulinarischer Begleitung. 

Nachhaltigkeit ist für uns eine Verantwortung: von der Auswahl unserer Rohstoffe, der Kaffeeverpackungen bis zur ressourcenschonenden Verarbeitung. 

Unser Qualitätsanspruch wurde bereits mehrfach ausgezeichnet, und als Mitglied der Deutschen Röstergilde und dem Deutschen Kaffeeverband stehen wir für traditionell gerösteten Kaffee. 

Genieße mit uns die Welt des feinen Geschmacks – Handwerk, das man schmeckt, und Leidenschaft, die inspiriert.

Name: GOOD JUICE
Description:
What is GOOD JUICE?
 
Whether at home in South Africa or when Good Juice moves abroad our brief is the same - to engender, showcase and support diversity within the South African wine scene.
 
The name is derived from a colloquial wine industry term used to describe delicious, well-made wine. “Good juice”. We take this to mean wine made with progressive working conditions using fruit from sustainably farmed vineyards and with low-intervention practices in the cellar. Good for the earth, good for the grapes, good in the glass. 
 
Good Juice sits in the low intervention & natural wine space. This is a large and growing international trend linked to the organic movement and already widespread in all major wine growing regions. In South Africa this trend is in its infancy but gaining tracking fast, with more producers working this way each year. 
 
We’re interested in
●      Diversity in the producers we feature
●      Giving a platform to upcoming/progressive producers
●      Presenting new faces and bringing new consumers into wine
●      Disrupting wine’s conventional/pretentious image
●      Guiding wine curious visitors to SA towards an alternative wine experience

Name: Deliciously
Description:
A Life Lived Well Starts Here
At Deliciously, we believe that food is more than fuel—it’s the foundation for a life lived well.

We are redefining wellness through clean, better-for-you products, a thoughtfully curated marketplace, and personalized lifestyle services that simplify your day and optimize your life. Whether you’re indulging in our collagen-enhanced marshmallows, browsing our marketplace for good, clean snacks and meals, or letting us take the stress out of wellness with Deliciously Simplified, every choice you make is crafted to nourish your wellbeing without compromise.

What We Offer
 Better-for-You Products
Our flagship line of better-for-you CPG products, including indulgent treats like collagen-enhanced marshmallows and s'mores, blends clean ingredients with functional benefits. Free from artificial additives, preservatives, and high-glycemic sweeteners, each product allows you to indulge deliciously—without sacrificing your health.

 The Deliciously Marketplace
Your one-stop destination for superfood snacks, wholesome meals, functional beverages, and clean-ingredient essentials. Every product is rigorously vetted to ensure it’s free of corn, soy, GMOs, seed oils, and unnecessary fillers. We do the hard work so you can shop with confidence.

 Deliciously Simplified
A new lifestyle service designed to simplify your life and optimize your wellbeing. Through personalized wellness consulting, pantry overhauls, meal planning, grocery delivery, and concierge services, Deliciously Simplified takes the hard stuff off your plate—so you can focus on what matters most.

Our Mission
To create a world where clean food and intentional living go hand in hand. Deliciously proves that good food can be good for you—and that wellness doesn’t have to be complicated.

Let’s Live Deliciously Well
Join us on this journey to simplify wellness, elevate your choices, and enjoy a life lived deliciously well.

 Discover more: DeliciouslyBetter.com
