“We discovered that city people were having difficulty in accessing our quality Australian country produce”
To bridge this disconnection we set about securing new metropolitan venues to taste, promote and sell a wider range of Australian produce. We provided infrastructure, professional staffing, licensing, permits and logistical support for Australian food and beverage businesses to present and sell their products to the metropolitan market.
A weekly calendar of market locations is now listed on our website, and we welcome producers and visitors to participate in our Australian Wine & Food events to support Australian businesses and enjoy our world class produce.

Name: Andenhonig
Description:
En la Quinta “Los Girasoles” funciona “Andenhonig”. La Quinta es un ejemplo de producción sostenible y de economía circular. Los sistemas de producción que se encuentran instalados son: un apiario de Apis melífera, un taller de extracción de miel, un laboratorio de fitocosmetología, un captador de agua de la humedad atmosférica, un biodigestor casero, una huerta agroecológica y lumbricultura. Los distintos procesos son monitoreados en tiempo real, con la tecnología del Internet de las Cosas (IoT), que nos permite conocer y tomar decisiones oportunas en tiempo real (los prototipos se han mejorado con investigaciones, que han dado como resultado diversos artículos indexados).

La Quinta tiene varias propuestas innovadoras, sin embargo, el interés está centrado en la potenciación de la producción apícola. La apicultura es un ejemplo de actividad productiva de la economía circular, ya que genera desechos con valor agregado (cera,  propóleo, entre otros). La base de nuestra línea de producción (extracción de miel y la fitocosmetología) es el manejo de las colmenas de abejas. Por consiguiente, buscamos alternativas para mejorar y optimizar las actividades que implican el mantenimiento de un apiario y la tecnificación de los productos derivados y procesados con enfoque natural, creando una propuesta de valor para la sociedad.

Not only do we pride ourselves in providing small-batch, artisan-roasted specialty coffee to our community, we also consider ourselves unique exporters of soccer vibes, culture, art, and experiences! Our mission is to bring the passion of soccer and great coffee into your everyday lives.

At the beginning of every game, there is that one epic moment where all the excitement begins... and that’s at the sounds of the whistle... at Kickoff. We decided to call it “Kickoff” because of the meaning behind the name, the beautiful game, and our vision of bridging the coffee and soccer communities.

In many ways, soccer reflects life. Many outcomes often depend on how we set ourselves up to overcome the day to day wins and losses. It starts with those daily rituals that set you up to kickoff your day on the right foot. You know, like score some goals whether it’s on the pitch, at the office, raising a family, running a business, or being a great fan. Wherever and whatever your matchday is, be ready for KICKOFF.

Top-quality-artisan-roasted coffee, for soccer people, by soccer people.

Name: Petite Palates
Description:
Start Bold to Stay Curious.

Petite Palates is a parent-founded baby food company bringing bold, savory, spice-led meals to the baby aisle — because babies deserve better than bland.

We launched Petite Palates from our own kitchens, cooking the kinds of meals our babies actually loved — from lentil dal passed down through generations to globally-inspired dishes with real depth and nutrition. But when we couldn’t find anything like it on shelves — especially in a pouch — we created it ourselves.

Our all-natural, veggie-forward, protein-rich pouches are crafted to expand tiny palates during the flavor window, a crucial developmental stage when babies are most open to new tastes. Each recipe is rooted in real food and global flavor, made for the way modern families eat — and live.

We believe feeding babies well shouldn’t mean choosing between convenience and complexity. That’s why Petite Palates combines warmth, depth, and nutrition — in a pouch that works for real life..

Why We're Different:
 Savory, spice-led recipes
 All-natural, veggie-forward ingredients
 High in protein and fiber
 Designed for the flavor window
 Convenient, portable pouch format
 Parent-founded, mission-driven

We’re here to help babies fall in love with real food — one boldly seasoned bite at a time.

How can that be? Honduras is the #3 largest coffee producer in Latin America and #6 globally. 

That’s when Orgullo was born. We’re on a mission to change that and make it more accessible to all. 

Orgullo (meaning “Pride” in Spanish) is a 100% minority and women-owned business. We’re proud to embark on this journey with you. Join us!

E’woke is designed to suit the needs of every conscious consumer, including vegans, vegetarians, health conscious folks, as well as lactose and celiac intolerant people.

Each time you choose E’woke, you choose health, environment and sustenance for the future. To reduce our carbon footprint, we are committed to using sustainable products and practices.

Drop by, let us host you and introduce you to a conscious, kind and compassionate world.
